To support arbitrary game sizes, we introduce a dominated embedding that maps (m,n) games to qubit-compatible power-of-two dimensions while preserving equilibrium structure. We then develop a projected extragradient method using stochastic gradient estimates derived from finite measurement shots, and establish variance bounds scaling as O(1/S) with respect to the number of measurement shots S, along with convergence to approximate first-order stationarity under standard assumptions. Since stationarity does not guarantee equilibrium optimality, we evaluate performance using the game-space Nash gap. Numerical results demonstrate high-precision solutions on structured instances up to 32x32, while highlighting challenges in unstructured settings.

AI.tldr: 提出投影变分量子外梯度框架，用于计算双人零和矩阵博弈的近似纳什均衡，将混合策略参数化为参数化量子电路的Born分布，支持任意规模博弈并实现收敛分析。
AI.motivation: 将经典双线性鞍点问题转化为量子电路参数空间中的优化问题，利用量子计算优势处理大规模博弈，同时保持与基于测量的量子硬件的兼容性。
AI.method: 1) 将混合策略参数化为PQCs的Born分布；2) 引入支配嵌入将任意(m,n)博弈映射到量子比特兼容的2的幂次维度；3) 开发基于有限测量样本随机梯度估计的投影外梯度方法；4) 建立方差界限和收敛性分析。
AI.result: 建立了方差界限O(1/S)（S为测量次数），在标准假设下收敛到近似一阶平稳点；在结构化实例上实现了高达32x32的高精度解，但在非结构化设置中面临挑战。
AI.conclusion: 提出的VQEG框架成功将经典博弈问题转化为量子优化问题，实现了理论收敛保证和实际数值表现，为量子计算在博弈论中的应用提供了可行路径，但非结构化问题的挑战仍需进一步研究。

title: On convergence rates of subgradient descent on semialgebraic functions
summary: We analyze the constant step size subgradient method on nonsmooth, nonconvex functions. We identify geometric assumptions on the objective function under which i) its domain admits a partition (stratification) into smooth manifolds (strata) on which the function is smooth; ii) a global projection formula for Clarke subgradients holds; and iii) quantitative curvature bounds hold on each stratum. Under these conditions, we prove that the iterates of the subgradient method locally shadow a Riemannian gradient descent on nearby strata, which we use to measure stationarity. We introduce a selection rule for the active stratum and develop a mechanism that assembles local descent inequalities across successive strata into explicit convergence rates. These rates are expressed in terms of the number of dimensions present in the stratification, improve as the number of strata decreases, and recover, up to constants, the classical rates in the smooth case. We show that the stated assumptions follow from the existence of Lipschitz stratifications of semialgebraic sets, and are therefore automatically satisfied for semialgebraic functions and, more generally, for functions definable in polynomially bounded o-minimal structures, yielding the first known convergence rates in these settings. As intermediate results of independent interest, we establish tubular neighborhood estimates for Lipschitz stratifications and a global projection formula for Clarke subgradients. Finally, we show that our framework extends to decreasing step size and recovers, via an alternative argument, the recently announced result of Lai and Song on sequential convergence of the subgradient method with step sizes 1/k.

AI.tldr: 本文分析了非光滑非凸函数上的常步长次梯度方法，在几何假设下证明了迭代点局部跟踪附近流形上的黎曼梯度下降，并给出了收敛速率，适用于半代数函数等可定义函数类。
AI.motivation: 研究非光滑非凸优化问题的收敛性分析，特别是次梯度方法在非光滑非凸函数上的收敛行为，填补了半代数函数等可定义函数类收敛速率分析的空白。
AI.method: 1) 识别目标函数的几何假设：定义域可分层为光滑流形，Clarke次梯度具有全局投影公式，各层具有定量曲率界；2) 证明次梯度迭代局部跟踪附近流形上的黎曼梯度下降；3) 引入活跃层选择规则，将逐层下降不等式组合为显式收敛速率；4) 将框架扩展到递减步长情况。
AI.result: 1) 在所述几何假设下，次梯度方法迭代点局部跟踪附近流形上的黎曼梯度下降；2) 获得了显式收敛速率，速率表达为分层中维数的函数，随层数减少而改善，在光滑情况下恢复经典速率；3) 证明了这些假设对半代数函数自动成立；4) 建立了Lipschitz分层的管状邻域估计和Clarke次梯度的全局投影公式；5) 框架可扩展到递减步长，恢复了Lai和Song关于步长1/k的序列收敛结果。
AI.conclusion: 本文为非光滑非凸优化中的次梯度方法提供了系统的收敛性分析框架，特别适用于半代数函数和多项式有界o-极小结构可定义函数，填补了这些函数类收敛速率分析的空白，并为非光滑优化理论提供了新的工具和中间结果。

title: "CS 1.5": An Experience Report on Integrating CS1 and Discrete Structures for the AI Era
summary: The rapid proliferation of generative AI has fundamentally altered the landscape of introductory computer science education. Traditional methods that prioritize syntax memorization and writing code from scratch are challenged by tools that can generate such code instantly. In response, we designed and implemented an experimental course integration at Northeastern University Vancouver, merging "Intensive Foundations of Computer Science" (CS1) and "Discrete Structures" into a single, cohesive studio experience. Dubbed "CS 1.5"--a playful nod to its position between CS1 and CS2--this course operates on two core principles: embracing AI as a collaborator rather than an adversary, and prioritizing deep theoretical foundations alongside practical implementation. This report details our pedagogical interventions, including the restructuring of the timetable to support a 4-hour studio format, the introduction of "sharing circles" to foster human connection, and the strategic shift to "code comprehension" over code generation. We discuss specific integrated projects--spanning set theory, recursion, and probability--that bridge the gap between mathematical proofs and software implementation. Finally, we reflect on the changing role of the instructor--from a repository of knowledge to a human mentor--and offer practical recommendations for scaling this high-touch, integrated model.

AI.tldr: CS 1.5课程将计算机科学基础与离散结构整合，拥抱AI作为协作工具，强调代码理解而非生成，重构教学方式以适应生成AI时代。
AI.motivation: 生成式AI的快速发展改变了计算机科学入门教育，传统强调语法记忆和从头编写代码的方法受到挑战，需要重新思考教学方式以适应AI工具的存在。
AI.method: 设计实验性课程整合：1) 将CS1和离散结构合并为4小时工作室格式；2) 引入"分享圈"促进人际连接；3) 战略转向"代码理解"而非代码生成；4) 开发连接数学证明与软件实现的综合项目。
AI.result: 成功实施了CS 1.5课程，创建了高接触、整合的教学模式，重新定义了教师角色从知识库到人类导师的转变，提供了可扩展的教学建议。
AI.conclusion: 生成AI时代需要根本性的教学改革，拥抱AI作为协作工具，强调理论基础和代码理解，教师角色需要转变为人类导师，这种整合模式为计算机科学教育提供了可行路径。

title: Preventing overfitting in deep learning using differential privacy
comment: Master's dissertation State University of New York at Buffalo first published in 2017
summary: The use of Deep Neural Network based systems in the real world is growing. They have achieved state-of-the-art performance on many image, speech and text datasets. They have been shown to be powerful systems that are capable of learning detailed relationships and abstractions from the data. This is a double-edged sword which makes such systems vulnerable to learning the noise in the training set, thereby negatively impacting performance. This is also known as the problem of \emph{overfitting} or \emph{poor generalization}. In a practical setting, analysts typically have limited data to build models that must generalize to unseen data. In this work, we explore the use of a differential-privacy based approach to improve generalization in Deep Neural Networks.

AI.tldr: 本文提出使用差分隐私方法来改善深度神经网络的泛化能力，解决过拟合问题
AI.motivation: 深度神经网络在实际应用中面临过拟合问题，当训练数据有限时，模型容易学习训练集中的噪声，导致在未见数据上表现不佳。实际应用中分析师通常只有有限数据来构建需要良好泛化能力的模型。
AI.method: 探索使用基于差分隐私的方法来改善深度神经网络的泛化能力
AI.result: 未在摘要中明确说明具体结果，但暗示差分隐私方法有望改善泛化性能
AI.conclusion: 差分隐私方法为解决深度神经网络过拟合和泛化问题提供了一种有前景的途径

title: Support Sufficiency as Consequence-Sensitive Compression in Belief Arbitration
summary:
When a system commits to a hypothesis, much of the evidential structure behind that commitment is lost to compression. Standard accounts assume that selected content and scalar confidence suffice for downstream control. This paper argues that they do not, and that determining what must survive compression is itself a consequence-sensitive problem. We develop a recurrent arbitration architecture in which active constraint fields jointly determine a hypothesis geometry over candidates. Rather than carrying that geometry forward in full, the system compresses it into a support-aware control state whose resolution is regulated by current consequence geometry, arbitration memory, and resource constraints.
  A bounded objective formalizes the tradeoff. Too little retained support collapses policy-relevant distinctions, producing controllers that select content adequately while misrouting verification, abstention, and recovery. Too much retained support fragments learning across overly fine contexts, degrading adaptation even as discrimination improves. These failure modes yield ordered controller predictions confirmed by a minimal repeated-interaction simulation. Adaptive controllers that regulate support resolution outperform all fixed-resolution controllers in cumulative utility. Agile adaptive control outperforms sluggish adaptive control. Fixed high-resolution control achieves the best commitment accuracy but still trails adaptive controllers because resource cost and learning fragmentation offset the gains from richer retention.
  Support sufficiency should be understood not as a static representational threshold, but as a dynamic compression criterion. Robust arbitration depends on preserving the smallest support structure adequate for policy under the current consequence landscape, and on regulating that structure as conditions change across repeated cycles of inference and action.

AI.tldr: 论文提出了一种基于后果敏感性的支持感知控制状态压缩方法，通过动态调节支持结构分辨率来优化仲裁性能，而非采用固定的高分辨率或低分辨率策略。
AI.motivation: 传统方法假设选择的内容和标量置信度足以支持下游控制，但本文认为这不够。系统在做出假设承诺时会丢失大量证据结构，而确定哪些信息需要在压缩中保留本身就是一个后果敏感性问题。
AI.method: 开发了一种循环仲裁架构，其中活动约束场共同确定候选假设的几何结构。系统将该几何结构压缩为支持感知的控制状态，其分辨率由当前后果几何、仲裁记忆和资源约束共同调节。通过有界目标形式化权衡，并进行了最小重复交互模拟验证。
AI.result: 调节支持分辨率的自适应控制器在所有固定分辨率控制器中表现最佳。敏捷自适应控制优于迟缓自适应控制。固定高分辨率控制虽然获得最佳承诺准确性，但由于资源成本和学习碎片化的抵消，仍落后于自适应控制器。
AI.conclusion: 支持充分性不应被视为静态表示阈值，而应作为动态压缩标准。稳健仲裁依赖于在当前后果环境下保留足够政策的最小支持结构，并在推理和行动的重复周期中随着条件变化调节该结构。

title: Foundational Study on Authorship Attribution of Japanese Web Reviews for Actor Analysis
summary: This study investigates the applicability of authorship attribution based on stylistic features to support actor analysis in threat intelligence. As a foundational step toward future application to dark web forums, we conducted experiments using Japanese review data from clear web sources. We constructed datasets from Rakuten Ichiba reviews and compared four methods: TF-IDF with logistic regression (TF-IDF+LR), BERT embeddings with logistic regression (BERT-Emb+LR), BERT fine-tuning (BERT-FT), and metric learning with $k$-nearest neighbors (Metric+kNN). Results showed that BERT-FT achieved the best performance; however, training became unstable as the number of authors scaled to several hundred, where TF-IDF+LR proved superior in terms of accuracy, stability, and computational cost. Furthermore, Top-$k$ evaluation demonstrated the utility of candidate screening, and error analysis revealed that boilerplate text, topic dependency, and short text length were primary factors causing misclassification.

AI.tldr: 研究探索基于风格特征作者归属在威胁情报中支持行为者分析的适用性，使用日本评论数据进行实验，发现BERT微调效果最佳但训练不稳定，TF-IDF+逻辑回归在大规模作者场景下表现更优。
AI.motivation: 探索基于风格特征的作者归属方法在威胁情报中支持行为者分析的适用性，为未来应用于暗网论坛奠定基础。
AI.method: 使用日本乐天市场评论数据构建数据集，比较四种方法：TF-IDF+逻辑回归、BERT嵌入+逻辑回归、BERT微调、度量学习+k近邻。
AI.result: BERT微调获得最佳性能，但当作者数量增加到数百时训练不稳定；TF-IDF+逻辑回归在准确性、稳定性和计算成本方面表现更优；Top-k评估显示候选筛选的实用性；错误分析发现模板文本、主题依赖和文本长度短是主要误分类因素。
AI.conclusion: 作者归属方法在威胁情报中具有应用潜力，但需考虑作者规模、计算成本和文本特征等因素；TF-IDF+逻辑回归在大规模场景下更具实用性。

title: PAC-Bayes Bounds for Gibbs Posteriors via Singular Learning Theory
summary: We derive explicit non-asymptotic PAC-Bayes generalization bounds for Gibbs posteriors, that is, data-dependent distributions over model parameters obtained by exponentially tilting a prior with the empirical risk. Unlike classical worst-case complexity bounds based on uniform laws of large numbers, which require explicit control of the model space in terms of metric entropy (integrals), our analysis yields posterior-averaged risk bounds that can be applied to overparameterized models and adapt to the data structure and the intrinsic model complexity. The bound involves a marginal-type integral over the parameter space, which we analyze using tools from singular learning theory to obtain explicit and practically meaningful characterizations of the posterior risk. Applications to low-rank matrix completion and ReLU neural network regression and classification show that the resulting bounds are analytically tractable and substantially tighter than classical complexity-based bounds. Our results highlight the potential of PAC-Bayes analysis for precise finite-sample generalization guarantees in modern overparameterized and singular models.

AI.tldr: 该论文推导了Gibbs后验的显式非渐近PAC-Bayes泛化界，适用于过参数化模型，比传统复杂度界更紧，并应用于低秩矩阵补全和ReLU神经网络
AI.motivation: 传统基于一致大数定律的最坏情况复杂度界需要模型空间的度量熵控制，不适用于过参数化模型。需要发展能适应数据结构和内在模型复杂度的后验平均风险界
AI.method: 推导Gibbs后验（通过经验风险指数倾斜先验得到的数据依赖分布）的显式非渐近PAC-Bayes泛化界。使用奇异学习理论工具分析参数空间的边际型积分，获得后验风险的显式表征
AI.result: 得到的界在分析上可处理，比传统基于复杂度的界显著更紧。应用于低秩矩阵补全和ReLU神经网络回归与分类，展示了方法的实际可行性
AI.conclusion: PAC-Bayes分析在现代过参数化和奇异模型中具有提供精确有限样本泛化保证的潜力，为理解这些模型的泛化行为提供了新工具

title: Goal-oriented Resource Allocation for Collaborative Integrated Sensing and Communication
summary: In this paper, we consider resource allocation for a collaborative integrated sensing and communication (ISAC) scenario, in which distributed smart devices can be scheduled to perform sensing and transmit their sensing features to a fusion center. The fusion center aims to perform classification tasks on the environment based on received features. A scalable networksensing framework is proposed to balance the performance of the sensing service with that of the classical enhanced Mobile Broadband (eMBB) service. We adopt a tractable theoretical metric, the discriminant gain, as a proxy for the classification goal. We formulate cross-layer optimization problems to maximize discriminant gain under constraints on energy consumption and eMBB communication quality for the independent and joint scheduling policies. The joint scheduling policy has considerably higher complexity than the independent scheduling policy, in exchange for better collaborative sensing performance. A simplified gain model is proposed to reduce the complexity and practicality of the joint scheduling policy. Both policies are obtained via successive convex approximation and parametric convex optimization. Extensive experiments are conducted to verify the goal-oriented framework and the two policies. It is demonstrated that the two policies outperform the baseline policies with both synthetic and realistic radar simulation datasets. The joint scheduling policy can exploit device correlations and thus performs better than the independent scheduling policy under strong correlations and strict communication constraints.

AI.tldr: 提出面向目标的可扩展网络感知框架，通过联合调度策略平衡ISAC感知服务与eMBB通信性能，优化分类任务的判别增益
AI.motivation: 在协作式集成感知与通信场景中，需要平衡感知服务性能与传统eMBB通信服务质量，同时考虑分布式智能设备的资源分配和调度问题
AI.method: 提出可扩展网络感知框架，采用判别增益作为分类目标的理论度量，制定独立调度和联合调度两种策略的跨层优化问题，通过连续凸近似和参数凸优化求解
AI.result: 两种策略在合成和实际雷达仿真数据集上均优于基线策略，联合调度策略在强相关性和严格通信约束下能利用设备相关性获得更好性能
AI.conclusion: 面向目标的网络感知框架有效平衡了ISAC感知与eMBB通信性能，联合调度策略在复杂场景下具有优势，但需要权衡计算复杂度与性能增益

title: Trajectory-Restricted Optimization Conditions and Geometry-Aware Linear Convergence
summary: Linear convergence of first-order methods is typically characterized by global optimization conditions whose constants reflect worst-case geometry of the ambient space. In high-dimensional or structured problems, these global constants can be arbitrarily conservative and fail to capture the geometry actually encountered by optimization trajectories. In this paper, we develop a trajectory-restricted framework for linear convergence based on localized geometric regularity. We introduce restricted variants of the Polyak--Łojasiewicz inequality, error bound, and quadratic growth conditions that are required to hold only on subsets of the domain. We show that classical convergence guarantees extend under these localized conditions, and in key cases, we develop new arguments that yield explicit relationships between the corresponding constants. The resulting rates are governed by geometric quantities associated with the regions traversed by the algorithm. For polyhedral composite problems, we prove that convergence is controlled by restricted Hoffman constants corresponding to the active polyhedral faces visited along the trajectory. Once the iterates enter a well-conditioned face, the effective condition number improves accordingly. Our work provides a geometric quantification for fast local convergence after active-set or manifold identification and more broadly suggests that linear convergence is fundamentally governed by the geometry of the subsets explored by the algorithm, rather than by worst-case global conditioning.

AI.tldr: 该论文提出了一个轨迹受限的线性收敛框架，通过局部几何正则性分析优化算法的收敛性，证明收敛速率由算法遍历区域的几何特性决定，而非全局最坏情况条件数。
AI.motivation: 传统一阶方法的线性收敛分析依赖于全局优化条件，其常数反映的是最坏情况下的几何特性。在高维或结构化问题中，这些全局常数可能过于保守，无法捕捉优化轨迹实际遇到的几何特性。因此需要开发一个能够反映算法实际遍历区域几何特性的收敛分析框架。
AI.method: 提出了轨迹受限的线性收敛框架，引入了Polyak-Łojasiewicz不等式、误差界和二次增长条件的受限变体，这些条件只需要在域的子集上成立。证明了经典收敛保证在这些局部条件下仍然成立，并建立了相应常数之间的显式关系。对于多面体复合问题，证明了收敛由沿轨迹访问的活跃多面体面对应的受限Hoffman常数控制。
AI.result: 收敛速率由算法遍历子集的几何量决定。一旦迭代进入条件良好的面，有效条件数相应改善。为活跃集或流形识别后的快速局部收敛提供了几何量化，表明线性收敛根本上由算法探索的子集几何决定，而非全局最坏情况条件。
AI.conclusion: 线性收敛本质上由算法探索的子集几何特性决定，而非全局最坏情况条件数。该框架为理解优化算法的局部收敛行为提供了新的几何视角，特别适用于分析活跃集识别后的快速收敛现象。

title: Decoding AI Tutor Effects for Educational Measurement: Temporal, Multi-Outcome, and Behavior-Cognitive Analysis
summary: Artificial intelligence (AI) tutors have become increasingly popular in learning environments. In this study, we propose an AI agent prototype framework for exploring AI-assisted learning with temporal interaction patterns, multiple outcomes analysis, and behavioral-cognitive learner profiling. Based on three research questions, this study aims to investigate whether early interaction patterns can predict later performance and trust, how multiple outcomes can be traded off with different AI tutor feedback conditions, and if learner profiles can be identified with behavioral and cognitive indicators. An AI tutor agent has been developed to provide various feedback forms to learners, including hints, explanations, examples, and code. A neural policy model and a stochastic simulation framework are used to produce artificial student-AI tutor interaction records, which include response time, attempts, hint requests, correctness, quiz results, improvement, satisfaction, and trust. Temporal features are used to predict later correctness and trust with early interaction patterns, and clustering methods are used to find learner profiles. The results showed that early interaction patterns were predictive of later performance and trust, that student behavior changed over time with AI-based tutoring, and that latent student profiles could be identified based on their behavioral and cognitive differences.

AI.tldr: 该研究提出一个AI导师代理框架，通过时间交互模式、多结果分析和行为-认知学习者画像来探索AI辅助学习，发现早期交互模式可预测后期表现和信任，学生行为随时间变化，并能识别潜在学习者画像。
AI.motivation: 随着AI导师在学习环境中日益普及，需要探索AI辅助学习的有效机制，特别是时间交互模式如何影响学习结果、不同反馈条件的权衡，以及如何通过行为认知指标识别学习者画像。
AI.method: 开发AI导师代理提供多种反馈形式（提示、解释、示例、代码），使用神经策略模型和随机模拟框架生成人工学生-AI导师交互记录，包括响应时间、尝试次数、提示请求、正确性等指标，采用时间特征预测后期表现和信任，使用聚类方法识别学习者画像。
AI.result: 早期交互模式能有效预测后期正确性和信任度；学生在AI辅导下行为随时间发生变化；基于行为和认知差异可以识别出潜在的学生画像。
AI.conclusion: AI导师系统的时间交互模式分析为个性化学习提供了重要见解，早期交互特征可作为预测学习成果的有效指标，学习者画像的识别有助于实现更精准的AI辅导策略。

title: Beyond Verifiable Rewards: Rubric-Based GRM for Reinforced Fine-Tuning SWE Agents
summary: Despite recent progress in Large Language Model (LLM) Agents for Software Engineering (SWE) tasks, end-to-end fine-tuning typically relies on verifiable terminal rewards such as whether all unit tests pass. While these binary signals reflect whether the final solution is correct, they provide little guidance for shaping intermediate behaviors during multi-step interactions, thereby limiting improvements in the overall quality of the resolution process. To address this, we introduce a rubric-based Generative Reward Model (GRM) that provides richer learning signals. The GRM is equipped with human-designed rubrics that indicate criteria for encouraging or discouraging specific behavioral patterns, and we leverage this feedback for high-quality training data collection via trajectory filtration. When used for Reinforced Fine-Tuning (RFT) on SWE Tasks, our approach outperforms terminal-score-only rejection sampling: it more effectively suppresses undesirable patterns while promoting beneficial ones, as confirmed by case analyses, and it ultimately improves final test accuracy.

AI.tldr: 提出基于评分标准的生成奖励模型（GRM），为LLM软件工程任务提供更丰富的学习信号，相比仅依赖终端测试结果的训练方法，能更好地引导中间行为模式，提升最终测试准确率。
AI.motivation: 当前LLM代理在软件工程任务中的端到端微调主要依赖可验证的终端奖励（如单元测试是否通过），这些二元信号虽然能反映最终解决方案是否正确，但对多步交互过程中的中间行为缺乏指导，限制了解决过程整体质量的提升。
AI.method: 引入基于评分标准的生成奖励模型（GRM），该模型配备人工设计的评分标准，用于鼓励或抑制特定的行为模式。利用这种反馈通过轨迹过滤收集高质量训练数据，并将其用于软件工程任务的强化微调（RFT）。
AI.result: 该方法在软件工程任务中优于仅依赖终端分数的拒绝采样：能更有效地抑制不良行为模式，同时促进有益模式（案例分析证实），最终提高了测试准确率。
AI.conclusion: 基于评分标准的生成奖励模型为LLM软件工程任务提供了更丰富的学习信号，相比仅依赖终端测试结果的训练方法，能更好地引导中间行为，提升整体解决过程质量和最终性能。

title: GoCoMA: Hyperbolic Multimodal Representation Fusion for Large Language Model-Generated Code Attribution
comment: Accepted to the International Conference on Multimedia & Expo (ICME) 2026
summary: Large Language Models (LLMs) trained on massive code corpora are now increasingly capable of generating code that is hard to distinguish from human-written code. This raises practical concerns, including security vulnerabilities and licensing ambiguity, and also motivates a forensic question: 'Who (or which LLM) wrote this piece of code?' We present GoCoMA, a multimodal framework that models an extrinsic hierarchy between (i) code stylometry, capturing higher-level structural and stylistic signatures, and (ii) image representations of binary pre-executable artifacts (BPEA), capturing lower-level, execution-oriented byte semantics shaped by compilation and toolchains. GoCoMA projects modality embeddings into a hyperbolic Poincaré ball, fuses them via a geodesic-cosine similarity-based cross-modal attention (GCSA) fusion mechanism, and back-projects the fused representation to Euclidean space for final LLM-source attribution. Experiments on two open-source benchmarks (CoDET-M4 and LLMAuthorBench) show that GoCoMA consistently outperforms unimodal and Euclidean multimodal baselines under identical evaluation protocols.

AI.tldr: GoCoMA是一个多模态框架，通过结合代码风格特征和二进制预执行文件图像表示，在双曲空间中进行融合，用于识别代码是由哪个大语言模型生成的。
AI.motivation: 随着大语言模型生成代码能力的提升，代码来源识别变得重要，涉及安全漏洞和许可问题。需要区分代码是人工编写还是由特定LLM生成。
AI.method: GoCoMA采用多模态框架：1) 代码风格特征捕获高层次结构和风格特征；2) 二进制预执行文件图像表示捕获低层次字节语义。将两种模态嵌入投影到双曲Poincaré球中，通过基于测地线余弦相似度的跨模态注意力机制融合，最后将融合表示投影回欧几里得空间进行LLM来源归属。
AI.result: 在两个开源基准测试（CoDET-M4和LLMAuthorBench）上的实验表明，GoCoMA在相同的评估协议下，始终优于单模态和欧几里得多模态基线方法。
AI.conclusion: GoCoMA通过结合代码风格和二进制表示的多模态方法，在双曲空间中有效融合特征，显著提升了LLM代码来源识别的性能。

title: StrEBM: A Structured Latent Energy-Based Model for Blind Source Separation
summary: This paper proposes StrEBM, a structured latent energy-based model for source-wise structured representation learning. The framework is motivated by a broader goal of promoting identifiable and decoupled latent organization by assigning different latent dimensions their own learnable structural biases, rather than constraining the entire latent representation with a single shared energy. In this sense, blind source separation is adopted here as a concrete and verifiable testbed, through which the evolution of latent dimensions toward distinct underlying components can be directly examined. In the proposed framework, latent trajectories are optimized directly together with an observation-generation map and source-wise structural parameters. Each latent dimension is associated with its own energy-based formulation, allowing different latent components to gradually evolve toward distinct source-like roles during training. In the present study, this source-wise energy design is instantiated using Gaussian-process-inspired energies with learnable length-scales, but the framework itself is not restricted to Gaussian processes and is intended as a more general structured latent EBM formulation. Experiments on synthetic multichannel signals under linear and nonlinear mixing settings show that the proposed model can recover source components effectively, providing an initial empirical validation of the framework. At the same time, the study reveals important optimization characteristics, including slow late-stage convergence and reduced stability under nonlinear observation mappings. These findings not only clarify the practical behavior of the current GP-based instantiation, but also establish a basis for future investigation of richer source-wise energy families and more robust nonlinear optimization strategies.

AI.tldr: StrEBM提出了一种结构化潜在能量模型，通过为不同潜在维度分配可学习的结构偏置，实现源分离和可识别、解耦的潜在表示学习。
AI.motivation: 传统方法通常使用单一共享能量约束整个潜在表示，限制了潜在维度的结构化组织。本文旨在通过为不同潜在维度分配独立的可学习结构偏置，促进潜在表示的可识别性和解耦性，实现更结构化的潜在组织。
AI.method: 提出StrEBM框架，每个潜在维度关联独立的能量公式，允许不同潜在组件在训练中逐渐演化到不同的源角色。采用高斯过程启发的能量函数（具有可学习长度尺度），但框架本身不限于高斯过程。通过直接优化潜在轨迹、观测生成映射和源结构参数来实现。
AI.result: 在线性和非线性混合设置的合成多通道信号实验中，模型能有效恢复源成分，为框架提供了初步实证验证。同时揭示了重要的优化特性：后期收敛缓慢，非线性观测映射下稳定性降低。
AI.conclusion: StrEBM为结构化潜在能量模型提供了通用框架，当前基于高斯过程的实现展示了可行性，但也揭示了优化挑战。这些发现为未来研究更丰富的源能量族和更鲁棒的非线性优化策略奠定了基础。

title: CVaR-Guided Decision-Focused Learning and Risk-Triggered Re-Optimization for Two-Stage Robust Microgrid Operation
summary: Microgrid operation is highly vulnerable to short-term load uncertainty, while conventional predict-then-optimize pipelines cannot fully align probabilistic forecasting quality with downstream robust scheduling performance. This paper proposes a CVaR-guided decision-focused learning and risk-triggered re-optimization framework for two-stage robust microgrid operation. A probabilistic load forecasting model first generates multi-quantile outputs, which are converted into prediction intervals to parameterize the load uncertainty set of the downstream two-stage robust optimization (TSRO) model. To improve forecasting reliability under difficult and high-risk operating conditions, a CVaR-guided forecasting objective is introduced to emphasize tail-sensitive samples. To further close the forecast-decision gap, a convex regularized surrogate TSRO model and a smooth regret loss are developed, enabling downstream operational feedback to be propagated to the forecasting model through KKT-based implicit differentiation. For online deployment, a risk-triggered re-optimization mechanism selectively re-solves the remaining-horizon TSRO only when the schedule mismatch becomes significant, avoiding unnecessary online computation. Case studies on modified IEEE 33-bus and 69-bus microgrids demonstrate superior probabilistic forecasting accuracy, operational economy, and tail-risk mitigation over benchmark methods, while preserving near-full-re-optimization performance with less than 0.5% higher operating cost and up to 91% lower daily solution time.

AI.tldr: 提出CVaR引导的决策聚焦学习和风险触发重优化框架，用于两阶段鲁棒微电网调度，通过改进概率预测与下游鲁棒优化的对齐，提升应对短期负荷不确定性的能力。
AI.motivation: 传统"预测-优化"流程无法将概率预测质量与下游鲁棒调度性能充分对齐，微电网运行对短期负荷不确定性高度敏感，需要更有效的预测-决策协同方法。
AI.method: 1) 概率负荷预测生成多分位数输出，转换为预测区间参数化不确定性集；2) 引入CVaR引导的预测目标强调尾部敏感样本；3) 开发凸正则化代理TSRO模型和平滑遗憾损失，通过KKT隐式微分实现操作反馈传播；4) 设计风险触发重优化机制，仅在调度失配显著时重新求解。
AI.result: 在改进的IEEE 33总线和69总线微电网案例中，相比基准方法展现出更优的概率预测精度、运行经济性和尾部风险缓解能力，同时以低于0.5%的额外运行成本和高达91%的日求解时间降低，保持了接近完全重优化的性能。
AI.conclusion: 所提框架通过CVaR引导的决策聚焦学习和风险触发重优化，有效缩小了预测-决策差距，在保证运行性能的同时显著降低了计算负担，为微电网鲁棒调度提供了实用解决方案。

title: Boţ-Nguyen Acceleration, Weighted Mean Ergodic Iteration, and the Beta-Binomial Distribution
summary: In 2023, Boţ and Nguyen introduced a new class of accelerated algorithms for finding a fixed point of a nonexpansive operator as the weak limit of a sequence. In this paper, we analyze a particular instance of their algorithm when the nonexpansive operator is assumed to be linear. Surprisingly, the Boţ-Nguyen acceleration then fits naturally into the framework of weighted mean ergodic iterations. This allows us to identify the weak limit as the projection of the starting point onto the fixed point set. Moreover, the weights involved are closely related to the beta-binomial distribution. Finally, when the parameter is equal to 4, then we obtain strong convergence of the iterates.

AI.tldr: 本文分析Boţ-Nguyen加速算法在线性非扩张算子下的特殊情况，发现该算法可纳入加权平均遍历迭代框架，弱极限是初始点在不动点集上的投影，权重与beta-二项分布相关，当参数为4时获得强收敛。
AI.motivation: Boţ和Nguyen在2023年提出了一类新的加速算法用于寻找非扩张算子的不动点。本文旨在分析该算法在线性算子这一特殊情况下的性质，探索其与加权平均遍历迭代的联系。
AI.method: 研究Boţ-Nguyen加速算法在线性非扩张算子下的特定实例，将其置于加权平均遍历迭代框架中进行分析，探讨权重与beta-二项分布的关系，并分析参数为4时的收敛性质。
AI.result: 发现Boţ-Nguyen加速算法在线性情况下自然地融入加权平均遍历迭代框架；证明了弱极限是初始点在不动点集上的投影；揭示了算法权重与beta-二项分布的紧密联系；证明了当参数等于4时，迭代序列强收敛。
AI.conclusion: Boţ-Nguyen加速算法在线性非扩张算子下具有特殊的数学结构，与加权平均遍历迭代和beta-二项分布密切相关，特定参数条件下可获得强收敛性，为理解该算法提供了新的理论视角。

title: Talk, Walk, and Market Response: Multimodal Measurement of AI Washing and Its Capital Market Consequences in China
comment: 18 pages, 3 figures, 7 tables, academic research paper
summary: As artificial intelligence and generative large language models drive industrial upgrading, capital markets increasingly focus on AI-themed listed firms. Information asymmetry and technological opacity lower the cost of exaggerating AI capabilities relative to genuine R&D, spurring widespread AI Washing. Using China's A-share market from 2018Q1 to 2025Q2, we advance literature in measurement and mechanism testing. We construct a multimodal AI Washing Risk Score (AWRS) via Qwen-VL to assess text-image consistency in annual reports and roadshows, and a Material Real-Investment Matching Index (MRMI) from patent quality, AI intangible asset capitalization, and technical personnel compensation using PCA. Four findings emerge: (1) AWRS lacks predictive power for future MRMI, with a wider rhetoric-action gap among financially constrained firms; (2) substantive AI investment boosts high-quality patents, while empty rhetoric crowds out industry innovation; (3) long-horizon institutional investors detect AI Washing through site visits and reduce holdings; (4) such divestment triggers analyst downgrades, retail selling, and sharp valuation corrections within 180 days. Results are robust to IV-2SLS and staggered DID using the ChatGPT shock. This study enhances disclosure and pricing-efficiency research and supports RegTech for curbing thematic speculation.

AI.tldr: 该研究构建了AI Washing风险评分和实质性AI投资匹配指数，发现AI炒作与实质性投资脱节，且会挤出行业创新，机构投资者能识别并减持AI炒作公司，引发估值修正。
AI.motivation: 随着AI和生成式大语言模型推动产业升级，资本市场日益关注AI主题上市公司。信息不对称和技术不透明使得夸大AI能力相对于真实研发的成本更低，引发了广泛的AI Washing现象。研究旨在测量AI Washing并检验其机制。
AI.method: 使用中国A股市场2018Q1-2025Q2数据，通过Qwen-VL构建多模态AI Washing风险评分(AWRS)评估年报和路演中的图文一致性，并通过主成分分析(PCA)构建实质性投资匹配指数(MRMI)，结合专利质量、AI无形资产资本化和技术人员薪酬。采用IV-2SLS和交错DID方法进行稳健性检验。
AI.result: 四个主要发现：1) AWRS对未来MRMI缺乏预测力，财务约束公司言行差距更大；2) 实质性AI投资促进高质量专利，空洞炒作挤出行业创新；3) 长期机构投资者通过实地调研识别AI Washing并减持；4) 减持引发分析师下调评级、散户抛售和180天内估值修正。
AI.conclusion: 研究增强了信息披露和定价效率研究，支持监管科技遏制主题炒作。AI Washing与实质性投资脱节，机构投资者能有效识别并引发市场纠正，为监管提供了实证依据。

title: SaFeR-Steer: Evolving Multi-Turn MLLMs via Synthetic Bootstrapping and Feedback Dynamics
summary: MLLMs are increasingly deployed in multi-turn settings, where attackers can escalate unsafe intent through the evolving visual-text history and exploit long-context safety decay. Yet safety alignment is still dominated by single-turn data and fixed-template dialogues, leaving a mismatch between training and deployment.To bridge this gap, we propose SaFeR-Steer, a progressive multi-turn alignment framework that combines staged synthetic bootstrapping with tutor-in-the-loop GRPO to train a single student under adaptive, on-policy attacks. We also introduce TCSR, which uses trajectory minimum/average safety to propagate late-turn failures to earlier turns.I. Dataset. We release STEER, a multi-turn multimodal safety dataset with STEER-SFT (12,934), STEER-RL (2,000), and STEER-Bench (3,227) dialogues spanning 2~10 turns.II. Experiment. Starting from Qwen2.5-VL-3B/7B, SaFeR-Steer substantially improves Safety/Helpfulness on both single-turn (48.30/45.86 -> 81.84/70.77 for 3B; 56.21/60.32 -> 87.89/77.40 for 7B) and multi-turn benchmarks (12.55/27.13 -> 55.58/70.27 for 3B; 24.66/46.48 -> 64.89/72.35 for 7B), shifting failures to later turns and yielding robustness beyond scaling alone.Codes are available at https://github.com/Ed-Bg/SaFeR-Steer

AI.tldr: SaFeR-Steer是一个渐进式多轮对齐框架，通过分阶段合成引导和导师在环的GRPO训练，解决MLLM在多轮对话中的安全漏洞问题，显著提升了单轮和多轮场景下的安全性和有用性。
AI.motivation: 当前MLLM的安全对齐主要基于单轮数据和固定模板对话，而实际部署中攻击者可以利用视觉-文本历史在多轮对话中逐步升级不安全意图，并利用长上下文安全衰减漏洞，导致训练与部署之间存在不匹配。
AI.method: 提出SaFeR-Steer框架：1）结合分阶段合成引导和导师在环的GRPO（Group Relative Policy Optimization）训练单个学生模型；2）引入TCSR（Trajectory Cumulative Safety Reward），使用轨迹最小/平均安全度将后期轮次的安全失败传播到早期轮次；3）发布STEER数据集，包含STEER-SFT、STEER-RL和STEER-Bench三个子集。
AI.result: 基于Qwen2.5-VL-3B/7B模型，SaFeR-Steer显著提升了安全性和有用性：单轮基准上，3B模型从48.30/45.86提升到81.84/70.77，7B模型从56.21/60.32提升到87.89/77.40；多轮基准上，3B模型从12.55/27.13提升到55.58/70.27，7B模型从24.66/46.48提升到64.89/72.35，并将安全失败推迟到更晚的轮次。
AI.conclusion: SaFeR-Steer有效解决了MLLM在多轮对话中的安全对齐问题，通过渐进式对齐框架和轨迹级安全奖励机制，显著提升了模型的安全性和鲁棒性，超越了单纯模型缩放的效果。

title: Agentic Frameworks for Reasoning Tasks: An Empirical Study
summary:
Recent advances in agentic frameworks have enabled AI agents to perform complex reasoning and decision-making. However, evidence comparing their reasoning performance, efficiency, and practical suitability remains limited. To address this gap, we empirically evaluate 22 widely used agentic frameworks across three reasoning benchmarks: BBH, GSM8K, and ARC. The frameworks were selected from 1,200 GitHub repositories collected between January 2023 and July 2025 and organized into a taxonomy based on architectural design. We evaluated them under a unified setting, measuring reasoning accuracy, execution time, computational cost, and cross-benchmark consistency.
  Our results show that 19 of the 22 frameworks completed all three benchmarks. Among these, 12 showed stable performance, with mean accuracy of 74.6-75.9%, execution time of 4-6 seconds per task, and cost of 0.14-0.18 cents per task. Poorer results were mainly caused by orchestration problems rather than reasoning limits. For example, Camel failed to complete BBH after 11 days because of uncontrolled context growth, while Upsonic consumed USD 1,434 in one day because repeated extraction failures triggered costly retries. AutoGen and Mastra also exhausted API quotas through iterative interactions that increased prompt length without improving results.
  We also found a sharp drop in mathematical reasoning. Mean accuracy on GSM8K was 44.35%, compared with 89.80% on BBH and 89.56% on ARC. Overall, this study provides the first large-scale empirical comparison of agentic frameworks for reasoning-intensive software engineering tasks and shows that framework selection should prioritize orchestration quality, especially memory control, failure handling, and cost management.

AI.tldr: 对22个主流智能体框架在三个推理基准上的大规模实证评估，发现框架选择应优先考虑编排质量而非推理能力
AI.motivation: 尽管智能体框架在复杂推理和决策方面取得进展，但缺乏对其性能、效率和实用性的系统性比较证据，需要填补这一研究空白
AI.method: 从2023年1月至2025年7月收集的1200个GitHub仓库中筛选22个广泛使用的智能体框架，按架构设计分类，在统一设置下评估BBH、GSM8K和ARC三个推理基准的准确性、执行时间、计算成本和跨基准一致性
AI.result: 22个框架中19个完成所有基准测试，其中12个表现稳定（平均准确率74.6-75.9%，每任务执行时间4-6秒，成本0.14-0.18美分）。数学推理表现显著下降（GSM8K平均准确率44.35%，而BBH和ARC分别为89.80%和89.56%）。性能问题主要源于编排问题而非推理限制
AI.conclusion: 这是首个针对推理密集型软件工程任务的智能体框架大规模实证比较，表明框架选择应优先考虑编排质量，特别是内存控制、故障处理和成本管理，而非单纯追求推理能力

title: Reciprocal Co-Training (RCT): Coupling Gradient-Based and Non-Differentiable Models via Reinforcement Learning
summary: Large language models (LLMs) and classical machine learning methods offer complementary strengths for predictive modeling, yet their fundamentally different representations and training paradigms hinder effective integration: LLMs rely on gradient-based optimization over textual data, whereas models such as Random Forests (RF) employ non-differentiable feature partitioning. This work introduces a reciprocal co-training framework that couples an LLM with an RF classifier via reinforcement learning, creating an iterative feedback loop in which each model improves using signals from the other. Tabular data are reformulated into standardized textual representations for the LLM, whose embeddings augment the RF feature space, while calibrated RF probability estimates provide feedback signals that guide reinforcement learning updates of the LLM. Experiments across three medical datasets demonstrate consistent performance gains for both models, with particularly strong effects for the LLM. Ablation analyses show that iterative refinement, hybrid reward design, and dimensionality control jointly contribute to these gains. The proposed framework provides a general mechanism that allows incompatible model families to leverage each other's strengths through bidirectional adaptation.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种通过强化学习将大语言模型与随机森林分类器耦合的互惠协同训练框架，使两种不同范式模型能够相互提升性能。
AI.motivation: 大语言模型和传统机器学习方法在预测建模中各具优势，但由于它们基于完全不同的表示形式和训练范式（LLMs依赖梯度优化和文本数据，而随机森林等模型使用不可微特征划分），难以有效整合。
AI.method: 提出互惠协同训练框架：1) 将表格数据转换为标准化文本表示供LLM处理；2) LLM的嵌入增强随机森林特征空间；3) 校准后的随机森林概率估计为LLM提供强化学习反馈信号；4) 通过迭代反馈循环使两个模型相互提升。
AI.result: 在三个医学数据集上的实验显示，两个模型的性能都获得一致提升，LLM的提升尤为显著。消融分析表明迭代细化、混合奖励设计和维度控制共同促成了这些增益。
AI.conclusion: 该框架提供了一种通用机制，使不兼容的模型家族能够通过双向适应相互利用优势，为整合不同范式模型提供了新途径。

title: Distributional Off-Policy Evaluation with Deep Quantile Process Regression
summary: This paper investigates the off-policy evaluation (OPE) problem from a distributional perspective. Rather than focusing solely on the expectation of the total return, as in most existing OPE methods, we aim to estimate the entire return distribution. To this end, we introduce a quantile-based approach for OPE using deep quantile process regression, presenting a novel algorithm called Deep Quantile Process regression-based Off-Policy Evaluation (DQPOPE). We provide new theoretical insights into the deep quantile process regression technique, extending existing approaches that estimate discrete quantiles to estimate a continuous quantile function. A key contribution of our work is the rigorous sample complexity analysis for distributional OPE with deep neural networks, bridging theoretical analysis with practical algorithmic implementations. We show that DQPOPE achieves statistical advantages by estimating the full return distribution using the same sample size required to estimate a single policy value using conventional methods. Empirical studies further show that DQPOPE provides significantly more precise and robust policy value estimates than standard methods, thereby enhancing the practical applicability and effectiveness of distributional reinforcement learning approaches.

AI.tldr: 提出基于深度分位数过程回归的离策略评估方法DQPOPE，用于估计完整的回报分布而非仅期望值，在相同样本量下获得统计优势。
AI.motivation: 现有离策略评估方法大多只关注总回报的期望值，而忽略了完整的回报分布信息。从分布角度进行离策略评估能提供更全面的信息，增强分布强化学习方法的实际应用性。
AI.method: 提出DQPOPE算法，采用深度分位数过程回归技术，将离散分位数估计扩展到连续分位数函数估计。使用深度神经网络进行分布离策略评估，并进行严格的样本复杂度分析。
AI.result: 理论分析表明DQPOPE在估计完整回报分布时，所需样本量与常规方法估计单个策略值相同，具有统计优势。实证研究显示DQPOPE比标准方法提供更精确、更稳健的策略值估计。
AI.conclusion: 从分布角度进行离策略评估具有重要价值，DQPOPE方法通过估计完整回报分布，在相同样本量下获得更好的性能，增强了分布强化学习方法的实际应用效果。

title: Scaling and Analytical Approximation of Porous Electrode Theory for Reaction-limited Batteries
summary: Porous electrode theory (PET) provides essential insights into electrochemical states, but its computational complexity hinders real-time control and obscures scaling relations. To bridge the gap between high-fidelity simulations and reduced-order models, we present a framework of scaling analysis and analytical approximations. By assuming high-performance electrodes minimize transport limitations and overpotentials, we derive a simplified "lean model" governed by four dimensionless numbers: (i) a traditional Damk"ohler number, Da, scaling the characteristic reaction rate to the diffusion rate in the electrolyte-filled pores; (ii) the "process Damk"ohler number," Da_p, scaling the reaction rate to the applied capacity utilization rate (C-rate); (iii) the "wiring Damk"ohler number," Da_w, scaling the reaction rate to an effective electromigration rate for ions in the pores in series with electrons in the conducting matrix; and (iv) the "capacitive Damk"ohler number," Da_c, comparing the rates of Faradaic reactions and double-layer charging. For batteries, we derive analytical solutions for standard protocols, including galvanostatic discharge, chronoamperometry, and electrochemical impedance spectroscopy. Validated against numerical simulations of a practical NMC half-cell, our formulae show excellent agreement at negligible computational cost. This interpretable, physics-based framework accelerates battery design and state estimation while unifying the modeling of batteries, supercapacitors, fuel cells, and other porous electrode systems.

AI.tldr: 提出基于四个无量纲数的简化"精益模型"，用于多孔电极系统分析，显著降低计算成本并保持物理可解释性
AI.motivation: 多孔电极理论计算复杂，阻碍实时控制和尺度关系分析，需要在高保真模拟和降阶模型之间架起桥梁
AI.method: 通过假设高性能电极最小化传输限制和过电位，推导出由四个无量纲数控制的简化"精益模型"：传统达姆科勒数Da、过程达姆科勒数Da_p、布线达姆科勒数Da_w、电容达姆科勒数Da_c
AI.result: 推导出电池标准协议（恒流放电、计时电流法、电化学阻抗谱）的解析解，与实际NMC半电池数值模拟验证显示优异一致性，计算成本可忽略
AI.conclusion: 该可解释的物理框架加速电池设计和状态估计，统一了电池、超级电容器、燃料电池等多孔电极系统的建模

title: Reference Condensation for Model Predictive Control with Preview
summary: In model predictive control (MPC), preview information can greatly improve tracking. Including preview information does, however, increase the parameter dimension linearly with the preview horizon, which increases online cost and, more importantly, the complexity of explicit MPC. We introduce reference condensation, a method that compresses a future reference trajectory into a single setpoint through a linear map. For the unconstrained tracking problem, the map follows from a least-squares projection. For receding-horizon MPC, we also study a weighted variant that prioritizes the first applied control. Numerical experiments on a double integrator and a higher-order aircraft example show that the weighted condensation closely matches full preview while keeping the parameter dimension independent of the preview horizon.

AI.tldr: 提出参考凝聚方法，将未来参考轨迹压缩为单个设定点，减少MPC参数维度，保持预览优势的同时降低计算复杂度。
AI.motivation: 模型预测控制中预览信息能显著改善跟踪性能，但会增加参数维度，导致在线计算成本增加和显式MPC复杂度上升。
AI.method: 提出参考凝聚方法，通过线性映射将未来参考轨迹压缩为单个设定点。对于无约束跟踪问题，映射来自最小二乘投影；对于滚动时域MPC，研究加权变体以优先考虑首个控制动作。
AI.result: 在双积分器和高阶飞机模型上的数值实验表明，加权凝聚方法在保持参数维度独立于预览时域的同时，能紧密匹配完整预览的性能。
AI.conclusion: 参考凝聚方法有效解决了预览信息带来的维度增加问题，在保持跟踪性能的同时显著降低了计算复杂度。

title: Why AI Readiness Is an Organizational Learning Problem, Not a Technology Purchase
summary: Global corporate AI investment reached $252.3 billion in 2024, yet only 6% of firms report significant earnings impact. This article argues that AI project failure is fundamentally an organizational learning problem rather than a technology deficit. Drawing on a systematic synthesis of 19 large-scale industry and academic sources, including surveys of nearly 10,000 organizational leaders, we identify two categories of failure: organizational (culture, leadership alignment, governance, and human-AI learning deficits) and technical (semantic bottlenecks and output management challenges). We introduce the Siloed-Integrated-Orchestrated (SIO) progression model, which maps enterprise AI capability across five pillars -- Culture & Leadership, Human Capital & Operations, Data Architecture, Systems Infrastructure, and Governance & Regulatory Compliance -- and provides prescriptive guidance for advancing between stages. The implications challenge organizations to reframe AI investment as capability development rather than technology procurement.

AI.tldr: AI项目失败主要是组织学习问题而非技术缺陷，提出了SIO进展模型指导企业AI能力建设
AI.motivation: 尽管全球企业AI投资已达2523亿美元，但仅6%的企业报告显著收益影响，需要理解AI项目失败的根本原因
AI.method: 系统综合19个大规模行业和学术来源，包括近10000名组织领导者的调查，识别组织和技术两类失败原因，提出SIO进展模型
AI.result: 识别出组织性失败（文化、领导对齐、治理、人机学习缺陷）和技术性失败（语义瓶颈和输出管理挑战），建立包含五个支柱的SIO模型
AI.conclusion: 企业应将AI投资重新定义为能力发展而非技术采购，通过SIO模型指导组织从孤立到集成再到协调的AI能力演进

title: SetFlow: Generating Structured Sets of Representations for Multiple Instance Learning
summary: Data scarcity and weak supervision continue to limit the performance of machine learning models in many real-world applications, such as mammography, where Multiple Instance Learning (MIL) often offers the best formulation. While recent foundation models provide strong semantic representations out of the box, effective augmentation of such representations of MIL data remains limited, as existing methods operate at the instance level and fail to capture intra-bag dependencies. In this work, we introduce SetFlow, a generative architecture that models entire MIL bags (i.e., sets) directly in the representation space. Our approach leverages the flow matching paradigm combined with a Set Transformer-inspired design, enabling it to handle permutation-invariant inputs while capturing interactions between instances within each bag. The model is conditioned on both class labels and input scale, allowing it to generate coherent and semantically consistent sets of representations. We evaluate SetFlow on a large-scale mammography benchmark using a state-of-the-art MIL-PF classification pipeline. The generated samples are shown to closely match the original data distribution and even improve downstream performance when used for augmentation. Furthermore, training on synthetic data alone shows competitive results, demonstrating the effectiveness of representation-space generative modeling for data-scarce and privacy-sensitive tasks.

AI.tldr: SetFlow是一种用于多示例学习(MIL)的生成架构，直接在表示空间中建模整个MIL包，通过流匹配和Set Transformer设计生成连贯的表示集，在乳腺X光检查等数据稀缺任务中表现优异。
AI.motivation: 数据稀缺和弱监督限制了机器学习模型在乳腺X光检查等真实应用中的性能，现有方法在实例级别操作，无法捕捉包内实例间的依赖关系。
AI.method: 提出SetFlow生成架构，结合流匹配范式和Set Transformer设计，直接在表示空间中建模整个MIL包，处理排列不变输入并捕捉实例间交互，通过类别标签和输入规模进行条件生成。
AI.result: 在大规模乳腺X光检查基准测试中，生成样本与原始数据分布高度匹配，用于数据增强时能提升下游性能，仅使用合成数据训练也能获得有竞争力的结果。
AI.conclusion: SetFlow证明了表示空间生成建模在数据稀缺和隐私敏感任务中的有效性，为MIL领域提供了新的数据增强方法。

title: From Subsumption to Satisfiability: LLM-Assisted Active Learning for OWL Ontologies
summary: In active learning, membership queries (MQs) allow a learner to pose questions to a teacher, such as ''Is every apple a fruit?'', to which the teacher responds correctly with yes or no. These MQs can be viewed as subsumption tests with respect to the target ontology. Inspired by the standard reduction of subsumption to satisfiability in description logics, we reformulate each candidate axiom into its corresponding counter-concept and verbalise it in controlled natural language before presenting it to Large Language Models (LLMs). We introduce LLMs as a third component that provides real-world examples approximating an instance of the counter-concept. This design property ensures that only Type II errors may occur in ontology modelling; in the worst case, these errors merely delay the construction process without introducing inconsistencies. Experimental results on 13 commercial LLMs show that recall, corresponding to Type II errors in our framework, remains stable across several well-established ontologies.

AI.tldr: 论文提出了一种将LLMs作为第三方组件用于主动学习的方法，通过将候选公理转化为反概念并用受控自然语言表达，让LLMs提供现实世界实例来近似反概念，从而确保在建模中只可能出现II类错误。
AI.motivation: 在主动学习中，成员查询(MQs)允许学习者向教师提问，但传统方法存在引入不一致性的风险。作者希望利用LLMs的能力来提供现实世界实例，同时确保建模过程中只出现可接受的错误类型。
AI.method: 1. 将每个候选公理转化为对应的反概念；2. 用受控自然语言表达这些反概念；3. 将表达呈现给LLMs；4. LLMs作为第三方组件提供现实世界实例来近似反概念；5. 这种方法确保只可能出现II类错误。
AI.result: 在13个商业LLMs上的实验结果显示，召回率（对应框架中的II类错误）在多个成熟本体上保持稳定，表明该方法具有鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: 将LLMs作为第三方组件用于主动学习是可行的，该方法通过确保只出现II类错误（最坏情况仅延迟构建过程而不引入不一致性），为基于LLMs的本体建模提供了安全框架。

title: Data Mixing for Large Language Models Pretraining: A Survey and Outlook
summary: Large language models (LLMs) rely on pretraining on massive and heterogeneous corpora, where training data composition has a decisive impact on training efficiency and downstream generalization under realistic compute and data budget constraints. Unlike sample-level data selection, data mixing optimizes domain-level sampling weights to allocate limited budgets more effectively. In recent years, a growing body of work has proposed principled data mixing methods for LLM pretraining; however, the literature remains fragmented and lacks a dedicated, systematic survey. This paper provides a comprehensive review of data mixing for LLM pretraining. We first formalize data mixture optimization as a bilevel problem on the probability simplex and clarify the role of data mixing in the pretraining pipeline, and briefly explain how existing methods make this formulation tractable in practice. We then introduce a fine-grained taxonomy that organizes existing methods along two dimensions: static versus dynamic mixing. Static mixing is further categorized into rule-based and learning-based methods, while dynamic mixing is grouped into adaptive and externally guided families. For each class, we summarize representative approaches and analyze their strengths and limitations from a performance-cost trade-off perspective. Building on this analysis, we highlight challenges that cut across methods, including limited transferability across data domains, optimization objectives, models, and validation sets, as well as unstandardized evaluation protocols and benchmarks, and the inherent tension between performance gains and cost control in learning-based methods. Finally, we outline several exploratory directions, including finer-grained domain partitioning and inverse data mixing, as well as pipeline-aware designs, aiming to provide conceptual and methodological insights for future research.

AI.tldr: 本文对LLM预训练中的数据混合方法进行了系统性综述，提出了基于静态与动态混合的分类框架，分析了现有方法的优缺点，并指出了跨领域可迁移性、评估标准化等挑战及未来研究方向。
AI.motivation: 数据混合在LLM预训练中对训练效率和下游泛化能力具有决定性影响，但现有研究分散且缺乏系统性综述。本文旨在填补这一空白，为数据混合方法提供全面梳理和分类框架。
AI.method: 首先将数据混合优化形式化为概率单纯形上的双层优化问题，然后提出细粒度分类法：静态混合（规则基与学习基）和动态混合（自适应与外部引导）。对每类方法总结代表性方法并分析性能-成本权衡。
AI.result: 建立了数据混合方法的系统分类框架，分析了各类方法的优缺点，识别了跨领域可迁移性有限、评估协议不标准、学习基方法性能增益与成本控制之间的固有张力等核心挑战。
AI.conclusion: 数据混合是LLM预训练的关键研究方向，未来需要探索更细粒度的域划分、逆向数据混合、管道感知设计等方法，以解决现有挑战并推动该领域发展。

title: mlr3torch: A Deep Learning Framework in R based on mlr3 and torch
summary: Deep learning (DL) has become a cornerstone of modern machine learning (ML) praxis. We introduce the R package mlr3torch, which is an extensible DL framework for the mlr3 ecosystem. It is built upon the torch package, and simplifies the definition, training, and evaluation of neural networks for both tabular data and generic tensors (e.g., images) for classification and regression. The package implements predefined architectures, and torch models can easily be converted to mlr3 learners. It also allows users to define neural networks as graphs. This representation is based on the graph language defined in mlr3pipelines and allows users to define the entire modeling workflow, including preprocessing, data augmentation, and network architecture, in a single graph. Through its integration into the mlr3 ecosystem, the package allows for convenient resampling, benchmarking, preprocessing, and more. We explain the package's design and features and show how to customize and extend it to new problems. Furthermore, we demonstrate the package's capabilities using three use cases, namely hyperparameter tuning, fine-tuning, and defining architectures for multimodal data. Finally, we present some runtime benchmarks.

AI.tldr: mlr3torch是一个基于torch的深度学习框架，集成到mlr3生态系统中，简化了神经网络的构建、训练和评估，支持表格数据和通用张量，提供预定义架构和图形化网络定义。
AI.motivation: 深度学习已成为现代机器学习实践的核心组成部分，但需要更便捷的工具来简化神经网络的构建、训练和评估流程，特别是与现有机器学习生态系统集成。
AI.method: 基于torch包构建，提供预定义神经网络架构，支持将torch模型转换为mlr3学习器，使用mlr3pipelines的图形语言定义整个建模工作流（包括预处理、数据增强和网络架构）。
AI.result: 实现了可扩展的深度学习框架，支持分类和回归任务，能够处理表格数据和通用张量（如图像），通过三个用例展示了超参数调优、微调和多模态数据架构定义的能力。
AI.conclusion: mlr3torch为mlr3生态系统提供了强大的深度学习功能，简化了神经网络工作流，支持定制和扩展，并通过运行时基准测试验证了其性能。

title: Synchronization-Safe Dynamic Microgrid Formation for DER-Led Distribution System Restoration With Constraint-Aware Graph Learning
summary: Prolonged blackouts in distribution systems (DSs) with high penetration of distributed energy resources (DERs) necessitate novel restoration strategies to rapidly restore loads. However, the resulting complex optimization problem significantly limits scalability. This paper proposes a synchronization-safe dynamic microgrid (MG) formation (SSDMGF)-enabled restoration framework, in which a constraint-aware graph learning approach is developed to enhance solution efficiency. To characterize the restoration status of systems with evolving boundaries, the concepts of system mode and system class are defined. To ensure synchronization safety during restoration, the transitions of system mode and class for dynamically formed MGs are explicitly restricted. To further accelerate the solution process, a constraint-aware spatio-temporal graph convolutional network (STGCN) is designed to partially generate high-quality warm-start solutions, where synchronization-related constraints are embedded into a differentiable feasibility-resolving layer based on the straight-through estimator (STE). Case studies on a modified IEEE 123-node feeder validate that the proposed method ensures synchronization-safe MG formation and improves restoration performance. Meanwhile, the proposed acceleration framework achieves significant computational speed-ups without compromising final optimality.

AI.tldr: 提出基于同步安全动态微电网形成的配电网恢复框架，采用约束感知图学习方法提升求解效率，确保同步安全并加速计算
AI.motivation: 高渗透率分布式能源的配电网在长时间停电时需要快速恢复负荷，但复杂的优化问题限制了可扩展性，需要新的恢复策略
AI.method: 提出同步安全动态微电网形成恢复框架，定义系统模式和系统类概念，采用约束感知时空图卷积网络生成高质量热启动解，通过可微分可行性解析层嵌入同步相关约束
AI.result: 在改进的IEEE 123节点馈线验证中，该方法确保同步安全的微电网形成并提升恢复性能，加速框架在不影响最终最优性的情况下实现显著计算加速
AI.conclusion: 提出的同步安全动态微电网形成恢复框架有效解决了高渗透率分布式能源配电网的恢复问题，通过约束感知图学习方法在确保同步安全的同时显著提升计算效率

title: A model of anisotropic branched optimal transport
summary: We propose a new anisotropic optimal transport model based on the theory of currents, where the anisotropic cost function splits as the product of a factor depending only on the spatial direction and a factor depending only on the multiplicity of the current. We prove that the planar transport problem admits a minimizer. In arbitrary dimension, we show that a minimizer exists provided that the ambient space endowed with the anisotropic norm is hypermetric.

AI.tldr: 提出基于电流理论的新各向异性最优传输模型，其中成本函数分解为空间方向因子和电流多重性因子的乘积，证明了平面传输问题存在最小化解，在任意维度下，当赋予各向异性范数的环境空间是超度量时存在最小化解。
AI.motivation: 传统最优传输理论通常使用各向同性成本函数，但在许多实际应用中需要考虑各向异性特性。本文旨在建立基于电流理论的各向异性最优传输模型，以更好地处理具有方向依赖性的传输问题。
AI.method: 基于电流理论构建各向异性最优传输模型，将成本函数分解为空间方向因子和电流多重性因子的乘积。采用变分方法和几何测度论技术，分析在不同维度下的最小化问题存在性。
AI.result: 证明了平面传输问题总是存在最小化解。在任意维度下，当环境空间赋予各向异性范数后成为超度量空间时，传输问题也存在最小化解。
AI.conclusion: 成功建立了基于电流理论的各向异性最优传输框架，为处理方向依赖性传输问题提供了理论基础，并给出了不同维度下最小化解存在性的充分条件。

title: Automating Sexual Injustice: Epistemic Injustice in Fembot Design and Feminist Directions for Equitable HRI
comment: 5 pages, 1 figure. Peer-reviewed workshop paper presented at the Equitable Robotics for Wellbeing (EqRoW) Workshop at the ACM/IEEE International Conference on Human-Robot Interaction (HRI 2026), Edinburgh, UK, March 16, 2026
summary: Current AI-enabled female sex robots, or "fembots," are primarily designed to simulate female sexual responses through a lens of male-centric bias and pornographic stereotypes. This paper analyses fembot development as a failure in equitable robotics, arguing that these machines perpetuate "epistemic injustice" by prioritizing male hedonistic fantasies over empirical truths of female sexual experience in their design decisions. Drawing on Miranda Fricker's framework of testimonial and hermeneutical injustice, this analysis demonstrates how fembot interfaces discredit women's lived sexual knowledge and empirical research on female sexual physiology while privileging male-centred fantasies. This paper proposes three Feminist Design Directions including empirical grounding, epistemic plurality, and active consent modelling, which are grounded in Donna Haraway's concept of "Situated Knowledge" and accompanied by concrete evaluation criteria. These directions aim to facilitate a transition toward evidence-based intimate AI that prioritizes epistemic justice, mutuality, and inclusive design for marginalized users including disabled, neurodivergent, and LGBTQ+ communities.

AI.tldr: 论文分析当前女性性爱机器人设计中的男性中心偏见，提出基于女性主义认识论的设计方向以实现更公正、互惠的亲密AI
AI.motivation: 当前女性性爱机器人设计存在男性中心偏见和色情刻板印象，忽视了女性真实的性体验和生理知识，造成了认识论上的不公正
AI.method: 运用Miranda Fricker的证言不公正和诠释不公正框架分析机器人设计问题，基于Donna Haraway的"情境知识"概念提出三个女性主义设计方向
AI.result: 识别出机器人设计如何贬低女性性知识并优先男性幻想，提出实证基础、认识多元性和主动同意建模三个设计方向及具体评估标准
AI.conclusion: 需要向基于证据的亲密AI过渡，优先考虑认识论公正、互惠性和包容性设计，服务边缘化用户群体如残障、神经多样性和LGBTQ+社群

title: Matched-Learning-Rate Analysis of Attention Drift and Transfer Retention in Fine-Tuned CLIP
summary: CLIP adaptation can improve in-domain accuracy while degrading out-of-domain transfer, but comparisons between Full Fine-Tuning (Full FT) and LoRA are often confounded by different learning-rate conventions. We study how adaptation method and optimization scale jointly shape attention drift and transfer retention in CLIP using a controlled matched-learning-rate comparison of Full FT and LoRA. The completed matrix contains 80 runs on CLIP ViT-B/32 across EuroSAT and Oxford-IIIT Pets, spanning four shared learning rates ($10^{-6}$, $5{\times}10^{-6}$, $10^{-5}$, $5{\times}10^{-5}$) and five seeds, and evaluates attention-drift metrics, best validation accuracy, and adapter-aware CIFAR-100 zero-shot accuracy. Learning rate strongly modulates structural change: on EuroSAT, Full FT moves from mild entropy broadening at $10^{-6}$ to marked contraction at $5{\times}10^{-5}$, whereas LoRA remains entropy-positive across the full matched grid. At matched learning rates, LoRA preserves substantially more zero-shot transfer than Full FT, averaging $45.13\%$ versus $11.28\%$ CIFAR-100 accuracy on EuroSAT and $58.01\%$ versus $8.54\%$ on Pets. Oxford-IIIT Pets also reveals a regime effect: low-learning-rate LoRA underfits in-domain, so method-only averages can obscure when LoRA becomes competitive. Supporting rollout, patch-to-patch, and CKA analyses are directionally consistent with the controlled matrix. Overall, matched-learning-rate evaluation materially changes the interpretation of Full FT versus LoRA, and attention drift is most useful as a descriptive diagnostic of representation preservation rather than a causal explanation of transfer behavior.

AI.tldr: 在匹配学习率条件下比较CLIP的完全微调与LoRA，发现LoRA能更好地保持零样本迁移能力，而完全微调会导致注意力漂移和迁移能力下降。
AI.motivation: 传统CLIP适配方法在提升域内准确率的同时会损害域外迁移能力，而完全微调与LoRA的比较常因学习率惯例不同而产生混淆，需要控制学习率进行公平比较。
AI.method: 使用匹配学习率控制实验，在CLIP ViT-B/32上对EuroSAT和Oxford-IIIT Pets数据集进行80次运行，比较完全微调与LoRA在不同学习率下的表现，评估注意力漂移指标、最佳验证准确率和适配器感知的CIFAR-100零样本准确率。
AI.result: 学习率强烈影响结构变化：在EuroSAT上，完全微调从低学习率的轻度熵增到高学习率的显著熵减，而LoRA在整个匹配网格中保持熵增。在匹配学习率下，LoRA比完全微调保留更多零样本迁移能力（EuroSAT：45.13% vs 11.28%；Pets：58.01% vs 8.54%）。
AI.conclusion: 匹配学习率评估显著改变了对完全微调与LoRA的理解，注意力漂移更适合作为表示保留的描述性诊断工具，而非迁移行为的因果解释。

title: Agentic Risk-Aware Set-Based Engineering Design
summary: This paper introduces a multi-agent framework guided by Large Language Models (LLMs) to assist in the early stages of engineering design, a phase often characterized by vast parameter spaces and inherent uncertainty. Operating under a human-in-the-loop paradigm and demonstrated on the canonical problem of aerodynamic airfoil design, the framework employs a team of specialized agents: a Coding Assistant, a Design Agent, a Systems Engineering Agent, and an Analyst Agent - all coordinated by a human Manager. Integrated within a set-based design philosophy, the process begins with a collaborative phase where the Manager and Coding Assistant develop a suite of validated tools, after which the agents execute a structured workflow to systematically explore and prune a large set of initial design candidates. A key contribution of this work is the explicit integration of formal risk management, employing the Conditional Value-at-Risk (CVaR) as a quantitative metric to filter designs that exhibit a high probability of failing to meet performance requirements, specifically the target coefficient of lift. The framework automates labor-intensive initial exploration through a global sensitivity analysis conducted by the Analyst agent, which generates actionable heuristics to guide the other agents. The process culminates by presenting the human Manager with a curated final set of promising design candidates, augmented with high-fidelity Computational Fluid Dynamics (CFD) simulations. This approach effectively leverages AI to handle high-volume analytical tasks, thereby enhancing the decision-making capability of the human expert in selecting the final, risk-assessed design.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一个由大型语言模型驱动的多智能体框架，用于辅助工程设计的早期阶段，通过专业智能体协作、基于集合的设计方法和形式化风险管理，在气动翼型设计中实现高效的设计空间探索和筛选。
AI.motivation: 工程设计早期阶段通常面临巨大的参数空间和不确定性，传统方法效率低下。本文旨在利用AI技术自动化高容量分析任务，增强人类专家在风险评估设计中的决策能力。
AI.method: 采用基于集合的设计哲学，构建由人类管理者协调的多智能体框架，包括编码助手、设计智能体、系统工程智能体、分析智能体。集成条件风险价值作为定量风险指标，通过全局敏感性分析生成可操作的启发式规则，系统性地探索和筛选初始设计候选集。
AI.result: 该框架成功应用于气动翼型设计问题，能够自动化劳动密集型的初始探索，生成经过高保真计算流体动力学模拟验证的精选最终设计候选集，有效处理高风险设计并增强人类专家的决策能力。
AI.conclusion: LLM驱动的多智能体框架能够有效辅助工程设计早期阶段，通过形式化风险管理和自动化分析，在保持人类监督的同时显著提高设计探索效率和决策质量。

title: LiFT: Does Instruction Fine-Tuning Improve In-Context Learning for Longitudinal Modelling by Large Language Models?
summary: Longitudinal NLP tasks require reasoning over temporally ordered text to detect persistence and change in human behavior and opinions. However, in-context learning with large language models struggles on tasks where models must integrate historical context, track evolving interactions, and handle rare change events. We introduce LiFT, a longitudinal instruction fine-tuning framework that unifies diverse longitudinal modeling tasks under a shared instruction schema. LiFT uses a curriculum that progressively increases temporal difficulty while incorporating few-shot structure and temporal conditioning to encourage effective use of past context. We evaluate LiFT across five datasets. Models trained on longitudinal tasks with different levels of temporal granularity are tested for generalisability on two separate datasets. Across models with different parameter sizes (OLMo (1B/7B), LLaMA-8B, and Qwen-14B), LiFT consistently outperforms base-model ICL, with strong gains on out-of-distribution data and minority change events.

AI.tldr: LiFT是一个纵向指令微调框架，通过统一的时间指令模式和渐进式课程学习，提升LLM在纵向NLP任务中的表现，显著优于基础模型的上下文学习。
AI.motivation: 大型语言模型在上下文学习中难以处理需要整合历史背景、追踪演化交互和处理罕见变化事件的纵向NLP任务。
AI.method: 提出LiFT纵向指令微调框架：1）统一不同纵向建模任务的指令模式；2）采用渐进式课程学习，逐步增加时间难度；3）结合少样本结构和时间条件化，鼓励有效利用历史上下文。
AI.result: 在5个数据集上评估，不同参数规模的模型（OLMo 1B/7B、LLaMA-8B、Qwen-14B）均表现优于基础模型ICL，在分布外数据和少数变化事件上获得显著提升。
AI.conclusion: LiFT框架能有效提升语言模型在纵向NLP任务中的表现，特别是在处理时间依赖性和罕见事件方面具有优势，展示了纵向指令微调的价值。

title: Symmetry Guarantees Statistic Recovery in Variational Inference
summary: Variational inference (VI) is a central tool in modern machine learning, used to approximate an intractable target density by optimising over a tractable family of distributions. As the variational family cannot typically represent the target exactly, guarantees on the quality of the resulting approximation are crucial for understanding which of its properties VI can faithfully capture. Recent work has identified instances in which symmetries of the target and the variational family enable the recovery of certain statistics, even under model misspecification. However, these guarantees are inherently problem-specific and offer little insight into the fundamental mechanism by which symmetry forces statistic recovery. In this paper, we overcome this limitation by developing a general theory of symmetry-induced statistic recovery in variational inference. First, we characterise when variational minimisers inherit the symmetries of the target and establish conditions under which these pin down identifiable statistics. Second, we unify existing results by showing that previously known statistic recovery guarantees in location-scale families arise as special cases of our theory. Third, we apply our framework to distributions on the sphere to obtain novel guarantees for directional statistics in von Mises-Fisher families. Together, these results provide a modular blueprint for deriving new recovery guarantees for VI in a broad range of symmetry settings.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种关于变分推断中对称性诱导统计量恢复的通用理论，统一了现有结果并应用于球面分布获得新保证。
AI.motivation: 变分推断(VI)是现代机器学习中的核心工具，但变分族通常无法精确表示目标分布。虽然已有研究表明对称性可以帮助恢复某些统计量，但这些保证是问题特定的，缺乏对对称性如何强制统计量恢复的基本机制的理解。
AI.method:
1. 刻画变分极小值何时继承目标的对称性，并建立这些对称性固定可识别统计量的条件
2. 通过证明位置-尺度族中已知的统计量恢复保证是我们理论的特例来统一现有结果
3. 将框架应用于球面分布，获得von Mises-Fisher族中方向统计量的新保证
AI.result: 开发了一个通用的对称性诱导统计量恢复理论，为变分推断在广泛对称性设置中推导新的恢复保证提供了模块化蓝图。
AI.conclusion: 该理论克服了现有工作的问题特定限制，提供了对对称性如何强制统计量恢复的基本理解，为在多种对称性设置中推导新的变分推断恢复保证提供了系统框架。

title: Timescale Limits of Linear-Threshold Networks
summary: Linear-threshold networks (LTNs) capture the mesoscale behavior of interacting populations of neurons and are of particular interest to control theorists due to their dynamical richness and relative ease of analysis. The aim of this paper is to advance the study of global asymptotic stability in LTNs with asymmetric neural interactions and heterogeneous dissipation under the structural Lyapunov diagonal stability (LDS) condition. To this end, we introduce a one-parameter family of LTNs that preserves the LDS condition and has a parameter-independent equilibrium set. In the fast limit, this family converges to a projected dynamical system (PDS), while in the slow limit, it converges to a discontinuous hard-selector system (HSS). Under LDS, we prove that the fast PDS limit is globally exponentially stable and that the HSS limit is globally asymptotically stable. This alignment suggests that the limiting systems capture essential mechanisms governing stability across the entire LTN family. Together with numerical evidence, these findings indicate that resolving stability at the fast and slow endpoints provides a promising and structurally grounded path toward establishing global stability for LTNs with biologically plausible recurrence and diagonal dissipation.

AI.tldr: 本文研究线性阈值网络(LTNs)在非对称神经相互作用和异质耗散下的全局渐近稳定性，通过引入保持Lyapunov对角稳定性(LDS)条件的单参数LTN族，分析其在快慢极限下的稳定性行为。
AI.motivation: 线性阈值网络能捕捉神经元群体相互作用的介观行为，对控制理论家具有吸引力。然而，在非对称神经相互作用和异质耗散下，建立全局渐近稳定性仍具挑战性。本文旨在推进这类网络在结构Lyapunov对角稳定性条件下的全局稳定性研究。
AI.method: 引入一个保持LDS条件的单参数LTN族，该族具有参数无关的平衡点集。分析该族在快极限下收敛到投影动力系统(PDS)，在慢极限下收敛到不连续硬选择系统(HSS)。在LDS条件下，证明快PDS极限的全局指数稳定性和慢HSS极限的全局渐近稳定性。
AI.result: 证明在LDS条件下，快PDS极限具有全局指数稳定性，慢HSS极限具有全局渐近稳定性。数值证据表明，这些极限系统捕捉了控制整个LTN族稳定性的基本机制。
AI.conclusion: 通过分析快慢极限系统的稳定性，为建立具有生物合理递归和对角耗散的LTNs全局稳定性提供了一条有前景且结构基础扎实的路径。极限系统的稳定性对齐表明它们捕捉了控制整个LTN族稳定性的基本机制。

title: Negative Momentum for Convex-Concave Optimization
summary: This paper revisits momentum in the context of min-max optimization. Momentum is a celebrated mechanism for accelerating gradient dynamics in settings like convex minimization, but its direct use in min-max optimization makes gradient dynamics diverge. Surprisingly, Gidel et al. 2019 showed that negative momentum can help fix convergence. However, despite these promising initial results and progress since, the power of momentum remains unclear for min-max optimization in two key ways. (1) Generality: is global convergence possible for the foundational setting of convex-concave optimization? This is the direct analog of convex minimization and is a standard testing ground for min-max algorithms. (2) Fast convergence: is accelerated convergence possible for strongly-convex-strong-concave optimization (the only non-linear setting where global convergence is known)? Recent work has even argued that this is impossible. We answer both these questions in the affirmative. Together, these results put negative momentum on more equal footing with competitor algorithms, and show that negative momentum enables convergence significantly faster and more generally than was known possible.

AI.tldr: 该论文重新审视了min-max优化中的动量机制，证明了负动量在凸凹优化中可实现全局收敛，在强凸强凹优化中可实现加速收敛，突破了先前认为不可能的限制。
AI.motivation: 动量机制在凸最小化等场景中能加速梯度动态，但在min-max优化中直接使用会导致发散。尽管Gidel等人2019年发现负动量有助于收敛，但动量在min-max优化中的能力仍不明确：1）在凸凹优化中能否实现全局收敛？2）在强凸强凹优化中能否实现加速收敛？近期研究甚至认为这是不可能的。
AI.method: 重新审视min-max优化中的动量机制，特别是负动量方法。研究负动量在凸凹优化和强凸强凹优化两种关键设置下的收敛特性。
AI.result: 对两个关键问题都给出了肯定回答：1）在凸凹优化中，负动量可以实现全局收敛；2）在强凸强凹优化中，负动量可以实现加速收敛。这些结果超越了先前认为不可能的限制。
AI.conclusion: 负动量在min-max优化中比已知的更具能力，能实现更快速和更一般的收敛，使其与竞争算法处于更平等的地位，并展示了负动量在min-max优化中的强大潜力。

title: Global brain drain and gain in high-potential student mobility
summary: The mobility of high-potential individuals, particularly graduates from elite academic institutions, serves as a critical driver of global innovation and economic development. Despite its importance, granular data on the specific trajectories and demographic drivers of these flows remain scarce in traditional administrative sources. In this study, we leverage anonymized, aggregate-level digital trace data from the LinkedIn Advertising platform to map the international mobility of graduates from 1,504 QS-ranked universities across 102 countries. We find that global talent flows are highly concentrated, with the United States capturing 38.4\% of the mobile elite, followed by the United Kingdom (7.9\%) and Canada (6.8\%), while regional hubs like the United Arab Emirates (5.2\%) have emerged as significant talent magnets. Our analysis reveals a global Relative Gender Gap (RGG) of +3.16\%, indicating a modest male overrepresentation that varies sharply by destination, from extreme male skews in Ethiopia (+60.34\%) to female overrepresentation in Armenia ($-$30.77\%). Professional integration is highly structured; while Business Development and Operations are universal entry channels, technical specialization in Engineering and IT is concentrated in specific innovation hubs. Destination ``pull'' is primarily driven by economic capacity, institutional stability, and educational infrastructure, though female graduates demonstrate significantly higher sensitivity to the cost of living. These findings provide a high-resolution lens on the global ``brain circulation,'' highlighting the destination-specific comparative advantages that govern high-skilled relocation.

AI.tldr: 利用LinkedIn数据追踪全球精英大学毕业生流动，发现人才流动高度集中（美国占38.4%），存在性别差异（全球男性多3.16%），专业整合模式化，经济、制度、教育是主要吸引因素。
AI.motivation: 精英大学毕业生流动对全球创新和经济发展至关重要，但传统行政数据缺乏详细的流动轨迹和人口驱动因素信息，需要更精细的数据来理解这一现象。
AI.method: 使用LinkedIn广告平台的匿名聚合数字痕迹数据，追踪来自102个国家1504所QS排名大学毕业生的国际流动情况。
AI.result: 全球人才流动高度集中：美国吸引38.4%的流动精英，英国7.9%，加拿大6.8%；存在性别差异（全球男性多3.16%），但各国差异巨大；专业整合高度结构化；经济能力、制度稳定性和教育基础设施是主要吸引因素。
AI.conclusion: 研究为全球"人才循环"提供了高分辨率视角，揭示了不同目的地特定的比较优势如何影响高技能人才流动，女性毕业生对生活成本更为敏感。

title: CGCMA: Conditionally-Gated Cross-Modal Attention for Event-Conditioned Asynchronous Fusion
summary: We study asynchronous alignment, a first-class multimodal learning setting in which a dense primary stream must be fused with sporadic external context whose value depends on when it arrives. Unlike standard multimodal benchmarks that assume structural synchrony, this setting requires models to reason explicitly about freshness and trust. We focus on the event-conditioned case in which continuous market states are paired with delayed web intelligence, and we use high-frequency cryptocurrency markets only as a timestamped, high-noise stress test for this broader problem. We propose CGCMA (Conditionally-Gated Cross-Modal Attention), whose central design principle is to separate text-conditioned grounding from lag-aware trust control. Text first attends over price sequences to identify event-relevant market states, after which a conditional gate uses modality agreement, web features, and lag $τ_{\mathrm{lag}}$ to regulate residual injection and fall back toward unimodal prediction when external context is stale or contradictory. We introduce CMI (Crypto Market Intelligence), an asynchronous evaluation corpus with 27,914 real-news samples pairing high-frequency price sequences with lagged web intelligence. On the current short real-news corpus, CGCMA attains the highest mean downstream Sharpe ratio ($+0.449 \pm 0.257$) among the evaluated baselines under a shared zero-cost threshold-trading evaluation on news-available bars. Additional controls show that the gain is not explained by web scalars alone and is not recovered by simple freshness heuristics. The resulting evidence supports problem validity and a promising asynchronous multimodal gain on this stress-test setting.

AI.tldr: 论文提出CGCMA模型处理异步多模态学习问题，在加密货币市场中使用延迟的网络情报来改进高频价格预测，通过条件门控机制平衡新鲜度和可信度。
AI.motivation: 研究异步对齐问题，即密集主数据流（如连续市场状态）与偶发性外部上下文（如延迟的网络情报）的融合。传统多模态学习假设结构同步性，而实际应用中需要考虑信息新鲜度和可信度，特别是在事件条件化的情况下。
AI.method: 提出CGCMA（条件门控跨模态注意力）模型，核心设计原则是将文本条件化基础与延迟感知信任控制分离。首先让文本关注价格序列以识别事件相关的市场状态，然后使用条件门控机制（基于模态一致性、网络特征和延迟时间τ_lag）调节残差注入，当外部上下文过时或矛盾时回退到单模态预测。
AI.result: 在CMI（加密货币市场情报）数据集（27,914个真实新闻样本）上评估，CGCMA在新闻可用时段内获得最高的平均下游夏普比率（+0.449 ± 0.257）。控制实验表明收益不能仅由网络标量或简单新鲜度启发式方法解释。
AI.conclusion: 该研究验证了异步多模态学习问题的有效性，在加密货币市场这一高噪声压力测试场景中展示了有前景的异步多模态增益，CGCMA模型能够有效处理延迟和不可靠的外部上下文。

title: The Query Channel: Information-Theoretic Limits of Masking-Based Explanations
summary: Masking-based post-hoc explanation methods, such as KernelSHAP and LIME, estimate local feature importance by querying a black-box model under randomized perturbations. This paper formulates this procedure as communication over a query channel, where the latent explanation acts as a message and each masked evaluation is a channel use. Within this framework, the complexity of the explanation is captured by the entropy of the hypothesis class, while the query interface supplies information at a rate determined by an identification capacity per query. We derive a strong converse showing that, if the explanation rate exceeds this capacity, the probability of exact recovery necessarily converges to one in error for any sequence of explainers and decoders. We also prove an achievability result establishing that a sparse maximum-likelihood decoder attains reliable recovery when the rate lies below capacity. A Monte Carlo estimator of mutual information yields a non-asymptotic query benchmark that we use to compare optimal decoding with Lasso- and OLS-based procedures that mirror LIME and KernelSHAP. Experiments reveal a range of query budgets where information theory permits reliable explanations but standard convex surrogates still fail. Finally, we interpret super-pixel resolution and tokenization for neural language models as a source-coding choice that sets the entropy of the explanation and show how Gaussian noise and nonlinear curvature degrade the query channel, induce waterfall and error-floor behavior, and render high-resolution explanations unattainable.

AI.tldr: 该论文将基于掩码的后解释方法（如KernelSHAP和LIME）建模为通信信道问题，提出信息论框架分析解释可靠性，推导出解释恢复的容量界限，并通过实验验证标准方法在信息论允许的范围内仍可能失败。
AI.motivation: 现有基于掩码的后解释方法（如KernelSHAP和LIME）缺乏理论保证，无法确定何时能可靠恢复特征重要性。需要建立理论框架来分析解释过程的根本限制，理解查询预算、模型复杂度和解释可靠性之间的关系。
AI.method: 将解释过程建模为通信信道：潜在解释作为消息，每个掩码查询作为信道使用。推导出解释恢复的强逆定理和可达性结果，提出基于互信息的蒙特卡洛估计器作为查询基准，比较最优解码与基于Lasso和OLS的方法（对应LIME和KernelSHAP）。
AI.result: 证明了解释率超过信道容量时，任何解释器和解码器的精确恢复概率必然趋近于零；而稀疏最大似然解码器在速率低于容量时可实现可靠恢复。实验显示存在查询预算范围，信息论允许可靠解释但标准凸代理方法仍失败。分析表明高斯噪声和非线性曲率会降低信道质量，导致瀑布和误差平台行为。
AI.conclusion: 该信息论框架为解释方法提供了理论基础和性能界限，揭示了标准方法（LIME、KernelSHAP）在理论允许范围内的失败情况，并分析了超像素分辨率、分词等源编码选择如何影响解释熵，以及噪声和曲率如何限制高分辨率解释的可实现性。

title: QU-NLP at QIAS 2026: Multi-Stage QLoRA Fine-Tuning for Arabic Islamic Inheritance Reasoning
comment: Accepted for publication, The 7th Workshop on Open-Source Arabic Corpora and Processing Tools, LREC26 conference
summary: Islamic inheritance law (ilm al-mawarıth) presents a challenging domain for evaluating large language models' structured reasoning capabilities, requiring multi-step legal analysis, rule-based blocking decisions, and precise fractional calculations. We present QU-NLP's submission to the QIAS 2026 shared task on Arabic Islamic inheritance reasoning. Our approach employs a multi-stage Quantized Low-Rank Adaptation (QLoRA) fine-tuning strategy on Qwen3-4B: (1) domain adaptation on 3,166 Islamic fatwa records to acquire inheritance terminology and jurisprudential reasoning patterns, followed by (2) task-specific training on 12,000 structured inheritance cases to optimize JSON-formatted output generation. Using 4-bit NF4 quantization with rank-128 LoRA adapters, our model achieves 90% MIR-E (Mawarith Inheritance Reasoning Evaluation) score on the test set, demonstrating competitive performance while requiring minimal computational resources. Our results show that domain-specific pre-adaptation combined with structured output training enables small language models to perform complex legal reasoning tasks effectively comparing to commercial systems such as Gemini-2.5-flash.

AI.tldr: QU-NLP团队使用QLoRA微调Qwen3-4B模型，在阿拉伯伊斯兰继承法推理任务上取得90% MIR-E分数，性能接近商业系统。
AI.motivation: 伊斯兰继承法是一个复杂的结构化推理领域，需要多步骤法律分析、基于规则的阻断决策和精确分数计算，适合评估大语言模型的结构化推理能力。
AI.method: 采用多阶段QLoRA微调策略：1）在3,166条伊斯兰教法记录上进行领域适应，学习继承术语和法学推理模式；2）在12,000个结构化继承案例上进行任务特定训练，优化JSON格式输出生成。使用4位NF4量化和秩128 LoRA适配器。
AI.result: 模型在测试集上达到90% MIR-E分数，展示了竞争性性能，同时仅需最小计算资源。性能可与Gemini-2.5-flash等商业系统相媲美。
AI.conclusion: 领域特定预适应结合结构化输出训练能使小型语言模型有效执行复杂的法律推理任务，为资源受限环境下的专业领域应用提供了可行方案。

title: Overcoming Selection Bias in Statistical Studies With Amortized Bayesian Inference
summary: Selection bias arises when the probability that an observation enters a dataset depends on variables related to the quantities of interest, leading to systematic distortions in estimation and uncertainty quantification. For example, in epidemiological or survey settings, individuals with certain outcomes may be more likely to be included, resulting in biased prevalence estimates with potentially substantial downstream impact. Classical corrections, such as inverse-probability weighting or explicit likelihood-based models of the selection process, rely on tractable likelihoods, which limits their applicability in complex stochastic models with latent dynamics or high-dimensional structure. Simulation-based inference enables Bayesian analysis without tractable likelihoods but typically assumes missingness at random and thus fails when selection depends on unobserved outcomes or covariates. Here, we develop a bias-aware simulation-based inference framework that explicitly incorporates selection into neural posterior estimation. By embedding the selection mechanism directly into the generative simulator, the approach enables amortized Bayesian inference without requiring tractable likelihoods. This recasting of selection bias as part of the simulation process allows us to both obtain debiased estimates and explicitly test for the presence of bias. The framework integrates diagnostics to detect discrepancies between simulated and observed data and to assess posterior calibration. The method recovers well-calibrated posterior distributions across three statistical applications with diverse selection mechanisms, including settings in which likelihood-based approaches yield biased estimates. These results recast the correction of selection bias as a simulation problem and establish simulation-based inference as a practical and testable strategy for parameter estimation under selection bias.

AI.tldr: 提出一个基于模拟的推理框架，通过将选择机制嵌入生成模拟器中，实现无需可处理似然函数的贝叶斯推断，从而校正选择偏差。
AI.motivation: 选择偏差在流行病学或调查中普遍存在，传统校正方法依赖可处理的似然函数，限制了在复杂随机模型中的应用。基于模拟的推理通常假设随机缺失，无法处理选择依赖于未观测结果的情况。
AI.method: 开发了一个偏差感知的模拟推理框架，将选择机制直接嵌入生成模拟器中，实现摊销贝叶斯推断。该方法将选择偏差重新构建为模拟过程的一部分，包含诊断工具来检测模拟与观测数据之间的差异并评估后验校准。
AI.result: 该方法在三种具有不同选择机制的统计应用中恢复了良好校准的后验分布，包括基于似然的方法产生有偏估计的情况。
AI.conclusion: 将选择偏差校正重新构建为模拟问题，确立了基于模拟的推理作为选择偏差下参数估计的实用且可测试策略。

title: A Control-Oriented Framework for Coupling Physics-Based and Data-Driven Models
summary: Design, control, and estimation for dynamic systems require accurate and analytically tractable models. However, modern engineered systems contain components that are described with heterogeneous modeling paradigms, as well as subsystems that are challenging to model from physics alone. There have been significant efforts to address this through heterogeneous coupling frameworks and data-driven modeling. However, these two paths have been pursued in parallel. This work bridges this gap by introducing a control-oriented framework to couple physics-based and data-driven models. A physics-based microgrid with a data-driven data center load model is used to demonstrate the proposed four step methodology. Application of the framework yields a coupled system that allows for rigorous assessment of control properties.
