Equilibrium and stability tests are conducted, and they both reveal that the coupling structure and functions play a critical role in determining physically meaningful equilibrium points and stability of the integrated system. This information could only be accessed through the proposed framework, highlighting its importance.

AI.tldr: 提出一个控制导向框架，将物理模型与数据驱动模型耦合，应用于微电网与数据中心负载的集成系统分析
AI.motivation: 现代工程系统包含多种建模范式，物理建模和数据驱动建模通常并行发展，缺乏统一的耦合框架来整合这两种方法
AI.method: 提出四步方法论的控制导向框架，将物理模型与数据驱动模型耦合，以微电网物理模型与数据中心负载数据驱动模型为例进行演示
AI.result: 应用框架得到耦合系统，可严格评估控制特性；平衡点和稳定性测试显示耦合结构和函数对确定物理意义平衡点和系统稳定性起关键作用
AI.conclusion: 提出的框架能揭示仅通过传统方法无法获取的系统信息，突显其在整合异质建模范式中的重要性

title: Symplectic Inductive Bias for Data-Driven Target Reachability in Hamiltonian Systems
summary: Inductive bias refers to restrictions on the hypothesis class that enable a learning method to generalize effectively from limited data. A canonical example in control is linearity, which underpins low sample-complexity guarantees for stabilization and optimal control. For general nonlinear dynamics, by contrast, guarantees often rely on smoothness assumptions (e.g., Lipschitz continuity) which, when combined with covering arguments, can lead to data requirements that grow exponentially with the ambient dimension. In this paper we argue that data-efficient nonlinear control demands exploiting inductive bias embedded in nature itself, namely, structure imposed by physical laws. Focusing on Hamiltonian systems, we leverage symplectic geometry and intrinsic recurrence on energy level sets to solve target reachability problems. Our approach combines the recurrence property with a recently proposed class of policies, called chain policies, which composes locally certified trajectory segments extracted from demonstrations to achieve target reachability. We provide sufficient conditions for reachability under this construction and show that the resulting data requirements depend on explicit geometric and recurrence properties of the Hamiltonian rather than the state dimension.

AI.tldr: 本文提出利用物理定律的归纳偏置（特别是哈密顿系统的辛几何和能量层上的内在递归性）来解决非线性控制中的目标可达性问题，通过链式策略组合局部认证的轨迹段，实现数据高效的控制。
AI.motivation: 非线性控制通常依赖于平滑性假设（如Lipschitz连续性），这会导致数据需求随维度指数增长。作者认为数据高效的非线性控制需要利用自然界本身嵌入的归纳偏置，即物理定律施加的结构。
AI.method: 聚焦于哈密顿系统，利用辛几何和能量层上的内在递归性，结合链式策略（chain policies）方法，将局部认证的轨迹段从演示中提取并组合，以实现目标可达性。
AI.result: 提供了该构造下可达性的充分条件，并证明由此产生的数据需求取决于哈密顿量的显式几何和递归性质，而不是状态维度。
AI.conclusion: 通过利用物理定律的归纳偏置（特别是哈密顿系统的结构特性），可以实现数据高效的非线性控制，避免传统方法中数据需求随维度指数增长的问题。

title: Same Verdict, Different Reasons: LLM-as-a-Judge and Clinician Disagreement on Medical Chatbot Completeness
summary: LLM-as-a-Judge frameworks are increasingly trusted to automate evaluation in place of human experts, yet their reliability in high-stakes medical contexts remains unproven. We stress-test this assumption for detecting incomplete patient-facing medical responses, evaluating three rubric granularities (General-Likert, Analytical-Rubric, Dynamic-Checklist) and three backbone models across two clinician-annotated datasets, including HealthBench, the largest publicly available benchmark for medical response evaluation. LLM Judges discriminate complete from incomplete responses at and slightly above near chance (AUC $0.49$--$0.66$); at the threshold required to recall $90\%$ of incomplete responses, clinicians must still review the vast majority of the dataset, offering no triage utility. Even when model and clinician verdicts agree, they rarely cite the same explanation; and when they diverge, false positives stem from over-flagging non-essential gaps while false negatives reflect outright detection failures. These results reveal that LLM Judges and clinicians apply fundamentally different completeness standards; a finding that undermines their use as autonomous evaluators or triage filters in clinical settings.

AI.tldr: LLM作为评估者在医疗领域不可靠，无法有效识别不完整的患者医疗回答，与临床医生标准存在根本差异。
AI.motivation: LLM-as-a-Judge框架在医疗高风险环境中被越来越多地用于替代人类专家评估，但其可靠性尚未得到验证。本研究旨在测试LLM在检测不完整患者医疗回答方面的表现。
AI.method: 使用三种评分粒度（通用李克特量表、分析性评分标准、动态检查表）和三种基础模型，在两个临床医生标注的数据集（包括最大的公开医疗回答评估基准HealthBench）上进行评估。
AI.result: LLM评估者区分完整与不完整回答的能力接近或略高于随机水平（AUC 0.49-0.66）；在需要召回90%不完整回答的阈值下，临床医生仍需审查绝大多数数据，无法提供有效的分流效用。即使模型与临床医生判断一致，也很少引用相同的解释；当判断分歧时，假阳性源于过度标记非必要缺陷，假阴性则反映完全检测失败。
AI.conclusion: LLM评估者与临床医生应用根本不同的完整性标准，这一发现削弱了它们在临床环境中作为自主评估者或分流过滤器的使用价值。

title: Shifting the Gradient: Understanding How Defensive Training Methods Protect Language Model Integrity
summary: Defensive training methods such as positive preventative steering (PPS) and inoculation prompting (IP) offer surprising results through seemingly similar processes: both add trait-inducing objects to large language models (LLMs) during training, and both defend the LLM against acquiring the trait. The surprising success of these methods comes with the question: how do they work? Are PPS and IP doing the same thing? We provide behavioral and mechanistic comparisons of these two methods using "evilness" as a case-study trait. Our central finding is that PPS and IP achieve their defensive benefits through distinct mechanisms. Behaviorally, we show that neither PPS nor IP operates through a purely associative mechanism; and PPS can both defend against trait acquisition and actively reduce pre-existing expression, whereas IP is ineffective in models that were previously finetuned to express the trait. This behavioral divergence is reflected mechanistically: PPS shifts the activation gradient towards an attenuating direction along the PPS vector axis. When the PPS vector is aligned with a trait-expressing axis, it can reverse the gradient pressure, reducing rather than increasing activation along that axis. In contrast, IP continues to resist a precise mechanistic account. Direct cosine similarity analyses reveal that IP has a characteristically different gradient signature than PPS, and qualitative analyses reveal IP's gradient to be more diffuse. Furthermore, IP reduces the next-token prediction loss on trait-expressing data where PPS need not, consistent with the notion that IP "explains away" the trait-expression in the training data. Taken together, our analyses reveal distinct mechanisms by which each method operates and highlight open questions about IP's mechanistic picture.

AI.tldr: PPS和IP是两种防御性训练方法，都通过添加特质诱导对象来防御LLM获取不良特质，但机制不同：PPS能防御特质获取并减少已有表达，而IP对已微调表达特质的模型无效；PPS通过梯度偏移机制工作，IP机制更复杂且不明确。
AI.motivation: 研究PPS（正向预防性引导）和IP（接种提示）这两种看似相似但效果显著的防御性训练方法的工作机制，探究它们是否采用相同机制，以及如何防御LLM获取不良特质。
AI.method: 使用"邪恶性"作为案例研究特质，进行行为和机制比较：行为上分析两种方法是否通过纯关联机制工作；机制上分析梯度激活模式，包括PPS向量轴对齐、余弦相似性分析和定性梯度分析。
AI.result: PPS和IP通过不同机制实现防御效果：PPS能防御特质获取并减少已有表达，通过梯度偏移机制工作；IP对已微调模型无效，梯度特征更分散，机制不明确，可能通过"解释掉"训练数据中的特质表达来工作。
AI.conclusion: 两种方法工作机制不同：PPS机制相对清晰，通过梯度偏移防御；IP机制更复杂且不明确，需要进一步研究。研究揭示了防御性训练方法的多样性机制。

title: RankGuide: Tensor-Rank-Guided Routing and Steering for Efficient Reasoning
summary: Large reasoning models (LRMs) enhance problem-solving capabilities by generating explicit multi-step chains of thought (CoT) reasoning; however, they incur substantial inference latency and computational overhead. To mitigate this issue, recent works have explored model collaboration paradigms, where small reasoning models (SRMs) generate intermediate reasoning steps to achieve a better accuracy--latency trade-off. Despite recent progress, effectively and efficiently detecting and mitigating SRM failures in collaborative systems remains a key challenge. To address this issue, we analyze SRM inference in both the generated text and hidden-state spaces, and identify three types of failure modes: \textit{overconfidence}, \textit{uncertainty}, and \textit{heavy revalidation}. Building on these insights, we propose \textbf{RankGuide}, a framework that improves the efficiency and effectiveness of SRM--LRM collaboration through tensor-rank-guided routing and steering. Specifically, RankGuide leverages a routing signal that incorporates tensor-rank signals derived from consecutive hidden states to detect when SRMs are likely to fail and selectively invoke LRMs. In addition, we introduce a tensor-rank-filtered steering vector extraction method to modulate the reasoning trajectory of SRMs, thereby improving their generation quality. By improving both routing and steering through tensor-rank signals, RankGuide enables SRM--LRM collaborative systems to achieve more efficient reasoning with fewer steps and improved accuracy. Experiments on multiple reasoning benchmarks demonstrate the efficacy of RankGuide in reducing latency by up to $1.75\times$ compared to LRM, while maintaining competitive accuracy relative to prior methods.

AI.tldr: RankGuide框架通过张量秩引导的路由和调控，提升小推理模型与大推理模型协作系统的效率，在保持准确性的同时降低延迟
AI.motivation: 大型推理模型生成显式多步思维链推理时会产生显著的推理延迟和计算开销。虽然小推理模型协作可以改善准确性与延迟的权衡，但有效检测和缓解小推理模型的失败模式仍然是一个关键挑战
AI.method: 分析小推理模型在生成文本和隐藏状态空间的推理，识别三种失败模式（过度自信、不确定性和重度重新验证）。提出RankGuide框架，利用连续隐藏状态张量秩信号的路由机制检测小推理模型可能失败的情况并选择性调用大推理模型，同时引入张量秩过滤的调控向量提取方法来调节小推理模型的推理轨迹
AI.result: 在多个推理基准测试中，RankGuide相比大推理模型能减少高达1.75倍的延迟，同时保持相对于先前方法的竞争性准确性
AI.conclusion: 通过张量秩信号改进路由和调控，RankGuide使小推理模型-大推理模型协作系统能够以更少的步骤实现更高效的推理，并提高准确性

title: Measuring Representation Robustness in Large Language Models for Geometry
summary: Large language models (LLMs) are increasingly evaluated on mathematical reasoning, yet their robustness to equivalent problem representations remains poorly understood. In geometry, identical problems can be expressed in Euclidean, coordinate, or vector forms, but existing benchmarks report accuracy on fixed formats, implicitly assuming representation invariance and masking failures caused by representational changes alone. We propose GeoRepEval, a representation-aware evaluation framework that measures correctness, invariance, and consistency at the problem level across parallel formulations, combining strict answer matching, bootstrap confidence intervals, paired McNemar tests, representation-flip analyses, and regression controls for surface complexity. We prove that our Invariance@3 metric decomposes accuracy into robust and fragile components and is bounded by the weakest representation. Evaluating eleven LLMs on 158 curated high-school geometry problems (474 instances), we find accuracy gaps of up to 14 percentage points induced solely by representation choice. Vector formulations emerge as a consistent failure point, with Invariance@3 as low as 0.044 even after controlling for length and symbolic complexity. A convert-then-solve prompting intervention improves vector accuracy by up to 52 percentage points for high-capacity models, suggesting that failures reflect representation sensitivity rather than inability; however, low-capacity models show no gains, indicating deeper limitations. These results suggest that current models rely on representation-specific heuristics rather than abstract geometric reasoning. All datasets, prompts, and scripts are released at https://github.com/vedjaw/GeoRepEval.

AI.tldr: GeoRepEval框架评估LLMs在几何问题不同表示形式（欧几里得、坐标、向量）下的鲁棒性，发现表示选择可导致高达14%的准确率差异，向量形式是主要失败点，表明模型依赖表示特定启发式而非抽象几何推理。
AI.motivation: 现有几何推理评估通常假设表示不变性，仅报告固定格式的准确率，掩盖了仅因表示变化导致的失败。需要评估LLMs在不同几何表示形式下的鲁棒性、不变性和一致性。
AI.method: 提出GeoRepEval框架，在158个高中几何问题（474个实例）上评估11个LLMs，每个问题有欧几里得、坐标、向量三种平行表示。使用严格答案匹配、bootstrap置信区间、配对McNemar检验、表示翻转分析和表面复杂度回归控制。提出Invariance@3度量，将准确率分解为鲁棒和脆弱成分。
AI.result: 表示选择可导致高达14个百分点的准确率差异。向量形式是主要失败点，Invariance@3低至0.044。通过转换后求解提示干预，高容量模型的向量准确率提升高达52个百分点，但低容量模型无改善，表明存在更深层限制。
AI.conclusion: 当前LLMs依赖表示特定的启发式方法而非抽象几何推理。GeoRepEval框架揭示了表示敏感性对评估结果的重要影响，为改进几何推理评估提供了新视角。

title: Adaptive Kernel Selection for Kernelized Diffusion Maps
summary:
Selecting an appropriate kernel is a central challenge in kernel-based spectral methods. In \emph{Kernelized Diffusion Maps} (KDM), the kernel determines the accuracy of the RKHS estimator of a diffusion-type operator and hence the quality and stability of the recovered eigenfunctions. We introduce two complementary approaches to adaptive kernel selection for KDM. First, we develop a variational outer loop that learns continuous kernel parameters, including bandwidths and mixture weights, by differentiating through the Cholesky-reduced KDM eigenproblem with an objective combining eigenvalue maximization, subspace orthonormality, and RKHS regularization. Second, we propose an unsupervised cross-validation pipeline that selects kernel families and bandwidths using an eigenvalue-sum criterion together with random Fourier features for scalability.
  Both methods share a common theoretical foundation: we prove Lipschitz dependence of KDM operators on kernel weights, continuity of spectral projectors under a gap condition, a residual-control theorem certifying proximity to the target eigenspace, and exponential consistency of the cross-validation selector over a finite kernel dictionary.

AI.tldr: 论文提出两种自适应核选择方法用于核化扩散映射：变分外层循环学习连续核参数，以及无监督交叉验证流程选择核族和带宽，两者共享理论基础包括Lipschitz依赖性和谱投影连续性。
AI.motivation: 在基于核的谱方法中，选择合适的核是关键挑战。核化扩散映射中，核决定了扩散型算子的RKHS估计器精度，从而影响恢复的特征函数质量和稳定性。
AI.method:
1. 变分外层循环：通过微分Cholesky约简的KDM特征问题，学习连续核参数（带宽和混合权重），目标函数结合特征值最大化、子空间正交性和RKHS正则化。
2. 无监督交叉验证流程：使用特征值和准则结合随机傅里叶特征选择核族和带宽，实现可扩展性。
AI.result: 两种方法共享理论基础：证明了KDM算子对核权重的Lipschitz依赖性、在间隙条件下谱投影的连续性、控制与目标特征空间接近度的残差定理，以及有限核字典上交叉验证选择器的指数一致性。
AI.conclusion: 论文提出了两种互补的自适应核选择方法用于核化扩散映射，提供了完整的理论保证，包括算子连续性、谱稳定性和选择器一致性，为核选择问题提供了系统解决方案。

title: Experimental Characterization Data for Battery Modules with Parallel-Connected Cells across Diverse Module-Level State of Health and Cell-to-Cell Variations
summary: This experimental dataset presents both module-level and cell-level characterization data for lithium-ion battery modules composed of three parallel-connected inhomogeneous cells across a wide range of module-level state of health (M-SoH) and cell-to-cell variation (CtCV). First, 70 cells are aged to establish an inventory with cell-level state of health (C-SoH) ranging approximately from 100% to 80% (80% is considered as the end-of-life for automotive applications). From this inventory, 78 battery modules are then assembled, each exhibiting a distinct M-SoH value (from 100% to 80.98%) and a unique CtCV value (from 0% to 9.31%, defined as population standard deviation of C-SoH within each module). Module-level characterization data are collected at 25°C under 0.5C and 0.25C conditions, enabling extraction of module-level capacities and supporting diagnostic analyses such as incremental capacity analysis and differential voltage analysis. Before a module is assembled and tested, cell-level characterization tests are conducted for every individual cell within that module under 1C conditions, enabling direct quantification of CtCV and providing accurate labels for cell-level capacities and internal resistances. The dataset is organized with both raw time-series data and processed summary information such as C-SoH, M-SoH, and CtCV for all modules. With the paired module-level and cell-level characterization data, this dataset enables understanding and development of advanced degradation monitoring mechanisms for battery modules with parallel-connected cells in the presence of CtCVs.

AI.tldr: 该数据集提供了由三个并联异质电池组成的锂离子电池模块在宽范围模块健康状态和电池间差异下的模块级和电池级表征数据。
AI.motivation: 为了理解和开发在存在电池间差异情况下并联电池模块的先进退化监测机制，需要包含模块级和电池级表征的配对数据集。
AI.method: 首先将70个电池老化至健康状态范围约100%到80%，然后组装78个电池模块，每个模块具有不同的模块健康状态和电池间差异值。在25°C下收集模块级表征数据，在组装前对每个电池进行电池级表征测试。
AI.result: 创建了一个包含原始时间序列数据和处理后的汇总信息的数据集，涵盖所有模块的电池健康状态、模块健康状态和电池间差异值，支持增量容量分析和差分电压分析等诊断分析。
AI.conclusion: 该配对数据集为理解和开发存在电池间差异的并联电池模块的先进退化监测机制提供了重要资源。

title: Generalized Composed Alternating Relaxed Projection Algorithm for Two-Set Feasibility Problem
summary: We study the two-set feasibility problem of finding a point in the intersection $X\cap Y$ of closed convex sets in a Hilbert space. We propose a generalized composed alternating relaxed projection algorithm (gCARPA) that blends Douglas-Rachford-type and projection-reflection-type dynamics via an outer averaging step $μ$ and an internal relaxation $(γ,θ,η)$. The algorithm contains several classical projection methods as special cases. We also introduce its non-stationary variant, in which $(γ_k,θ_k,η_k)$ vary over iterations, and establish its convergence. For the subspace feasibility model, we derive an explicit spectral characterization via principal-angle block decompositions, yielding computable subdominant-eigenvalue factors and a minimax parameter-selection recipe in a symmetric regime that targets critical damping on principal-angle planes. Numerical experiments illustrate that the generalized relaxation and its non-stationary tuning can improve or match baseline methods in problem-dependent regimes.

AI.tldr: 提出广义复合交替松弛投影算法(gCARPA)，结合Douglas-Rachford和投影反射动态，包含多种经典投影方法，并引入非平稳变体，在子空间可行性模型中通过主角度分解获得谱表征和参数选择方法。
AI.motivation: 解决希尔伯特空间中两个闭凸集交集的可行性问题，现有投影方法各有局限，需要更通用的框架来统一和扩展经典方法，并通过参数优化提升收敛性能。
AI.method: 提出gCARPA算法，通过外部平均参数μ和内部松弛参数(γ,θ,η)结合Douglas-Rachford和投影反射动态。引入非平稳变体，参数随迭代变化。对于子空间问题，使用主角度块分解进行谱分析。
AI.result: 建立了算法的收敛性，对于子空间可行性模型获得了显式谱表征，推导出可计算的次主导特征值因子，提出了对称机制下的极小极大参数选择方法，数值实验显示广义松弛和非平稳调优能在问题依赖机制中改进或匹配基线方法。
AI.conclusion: gCARPA提供了一个统一框架，包含多种经典投影方法作为特例，其非平稳变体和参数优化策略能够根据具体问题提升收敛性能，为可行性问题的求解提供了更灵活有效的工具。

title: RoMathExam: A Longitudinal Dataset of Romanian Math Exams (1895-2025) with a Seven-Decade Core (1957-2025)
summary: AI in Education research increasingly relies on authentic, curriculum-grounded assessment data, yet large, well-structured exam corpora remain scarce for many languages and educational systems. We introduce RoMathExam, a longitudinal dataset of Romanian high-school mathematics exams spanning 1895-2025, with a robust standardized core for 1957-2025. The dataset contains 10,592 mathematics problems organized into 600+ complete exam sets across multiple tracks (M1-M4), covering both official national examination sessions and ministry-published training variants. Beyond high-fidelity digitization and a unified JSON schema with traceable provenance, RoMathExam is enriched with curriculum-aligned topic tags and dense text embeddings, enabling variant detection, deduplication, and similarity-based retrieval. To overcome the lack of historical psychometric data, we propose and validate a solution complexity metric as a scalable intrinsic proxy for difficulty. Our evaluation across three frontier reasoning models (GPT-5-mini, DeepSeek-R1, and Qwen3-235B-Thinking) reveals high cross-model synchronization (r > 0.72), confirming the metric's ability to isolate intrinsic mathematical depth from stochastic generation noise. We demonstrate the dataset's utility through a longitudinal analysis that quantifies a "regime shift" from volatile historical formats to a standardized, algebra-dominant modern curriculum. RoMathExam provides a foundation for reproducible research in difficulty modeling, curriculum analytics, and LLM evaluation in low-resource linguistic contexts.

AI.tldr: RoMathExam：一个包含1895-2025年罗马尼亚高中数学考试的纵向数据集，包含10,592个数学问题，具有课程对齐标签和文本嵌入，并提出了一种可扩展的解题复杂度指标作为难度代理。
AI.motivation: 当前AI教育研究缺乏许多语言和教育系统的大规模、结构化的考试语料库，特别是对于罗马尼亚语这样的低资源语言环境，需要高质量的课程基础评估数据来支持难度建模、课程分析和LLM评估研究。
AI.method: 1) 收集1895-2025年罗马尼亚高中数学考试数据，包含600+完整考试集；2) 建立统一JSON模式，包含可追溯来源；3) 添加课程对齐主题标签和密集文本嵌入；4) 提出并验证解题复杂度指标作为历史心理测量数据的替代方案；5) 使用三种前沿推理模型(GPT-5-mini、DeepSeek-R1、Qwen3-235B-Thinking)评估指标有效性。
AI.result: 1) 创建了包含10,592个数学问题的RoMathExam数据集；2) 解题复杂度指标在三种模型间显示出高度同步性(r > 0.72)，证实了其从随机生成噪声中分离内在数学深度的能力；3) 纵向分析揭示了从波动历史格式到标准化、代数主导的现代课程的"制度转变"。
AI.conclusion: RoMathExam为低资源语言环境中的难度建模、课程分析和LLM评估提供了可重复研究的基础，提出的解题复杂度指标是历史心理测量数据的有效替代方案，数据集展示了从历史波动到现代标准化的课程演变。

title: Functional Similarity Metric for Neural Networks: Overcoming Parametric Ambiguity via Activation Region Analysis
summary: As modern deep learning architectures grow in complexity, representational ambiguity emerges as a critical barrier to their interpretability and reliable merging. For ReLU networks, identical functional mappings can be achieved through entirely different weight configurations due to algebraic symmetries: neuron permutation and positive diagonal scaling. Consequently, traditional parameter-based comparison methods exhibit extreme instability to slight weight perturbations during training. This paper proposes a mathematically grounded approach to constructing a stable canonical representation of neural networks and a robust functional similarity metric. We shift focus from comparing raw weights to analyzing the topology of neuron activation regions. The algorithm first eliminates scaling ambiguity via L2-normalization of weight vectors with subsequent layer compensation. Next, discrete approximations of activation regions are generated as binary functional signatures evaluated over a data sample. To overcome the computational bottleneck of comparing large binary vectors, we adapt Locality-Sensitive Hashing, specifically MinHash, providing a fast and statistically precise approximation of the Jaccard index. The final cross-network neuron matching is formulated as a linear sum assignment problem solved via the Hungarian algorithm. We demonstrate theoretically and experimentally that our metric mitigates the neuron "flickering" effect and exhibits exceptional robustness to minor weight perturbations. This framework provides a solid foundation for model merging, transfer learning, objective assessment during pruning, and Explainable AI paradigms.

AI.tldr: 该论文提出了一种基于神经元激活区域拓扑的稳定规范表示和功能相似性度量方法，解决了ReLU网络中由于代数对称性导致的表示模糊问题。
AI.motivation: 现代深度学习架构日益复杂，表示模糊性成为可解释性和可靠模型合并的关键障碍。ReLU网络中，相同的功能映射可以通过完全不同的权重配置实现（神经元排列和正对角缩放），导致传统参数比较方法对训练中的轻微权重扰动极度不稳定。
AI.method: 1) 通过L2归一化权重向量并补偿层间缩放来消除缩放模糊性；2) 生成离散的激活区域近似作为二进制功能签名；3) 使用MinHash进行局部敏感哈希，快速近似Jaccard指数；4) 将跨网络神经元匹配表述为线性分配问题，用匈牙利算法求解。
AI.result: 理论和实验证明，该度量方法缓解了神经元"闪烁"效应，对轻微权重扰动表现出卓越的鲁棒性，为模型合并、迁移学习、剪枝评估和可解释AI提供了坚实基础。
AI.conclusion: 该框架从比较原始权重转向分析神经元激活区域拓扑，提供了数学上严谨的稳定规范表示和鲁棒功能相似性度量，解决了深度神经网络中的表示模糊性问题。

title: Evaluating Tool-Using Language Agents: Judge Reliability, Propagation Cascades, and Runtime Mitigation in AgentProp-Bench
comment: 9 pages, 5 figures, 12 tables (8 main + 4 supplementary). Under review at Information Processing & Management. Code and data: https://github.com/bhaskargurram-ai/agenthallu-bench
summary: Automated evaluation of tool-using large language model (LLM) agents is widely assumed to be reliable, but this assumption has rarely been validated against human annotation. We introduce AgentProp-Bench, a 2,000-task benchmark with 2,300 traces across four domains, nine production LLMs, and a 100-label human-validated subset. We quantify judge reliability, characterize error propagation, and evaluate a runtime mitigation. Substring-based judging agrees with human annotation at kappa=0.049 (chance-level); a three-LLM ensemble reaches kappa=0.432 (moderate) with a conservative bias. Under validated evaluation, a parameter-level injection propagates to a wrong final answer with human-calibrated probability approximately 0.62 (range 0.46-0.73 across models). Rejection (catching bad parameters) and recovery (correcting after acceptance) are independent model capabilities (Spearman rho=0.126, p=0.747). A tuned runtime interceptor reduces hallucination on GPT-4o-mini by 23.0 percentage points under a concurrent n=600 control, but shows no significant effect on Gemini-2.0-Flash, whose aggressive parameter rejection eliminates the target failure mode. All code, data, traces, and human labels are released at https://github.com/bhaskargurram-ai/agenthallu-bench.

AI.tldr: AgentProp-Bench是一个包含2000个任务的基准测试，用于评估工具使用型LLM代理的自动评估可靠性，发现基于子字符串的评估与人工标注一致性仅为偶然水平，而三模型集成能达到中等一致性。
AI.motivation: 工具使用型LLM代理的自动评估被广泛认为是可靠的，但这一假设很少通过人工标注进行验证。作者旨在量化评估者的可靠性，描述错误传播，并评估运行时缓解措施。
AI.method: 构建了AgentProp-Bench基准测试，包含2000个任务、2300条轨迹，涵盖四个领域和九个生产级LLM。使用100个标签的人工验证子集，比较自动评估与人工标注的一致性。研究了参数级注入的错误传播，并测试了运行时拦截器的缓解效果。
AI.result: 基于子字符串的评估与人工标注的一致性仅为kappa=0.049（偶然水平）；三模型集成达到kappa=0.432（中等一致性），但存在保守偏差。参数级注入以约0.62的概率传播到错误最终答案。拒绝（捕获错误参数）和恢复（接受后纠正）是独立的模型能力。调优的运行时拦截器在GPT-4o-mini上减少幻觉23.0个百分点，但对Gemini-2.0-Flash无显著效果。
AI.conclusion: 当前工具使用型LLM代理的自动评估方法可靠性有限，需要更严格的验证。错误传播概率高，拒绝和恢复是独立能力。运行时缓解措施对某些模型有效，但并非通用解决方案。作者发布了完整的代码、数据、轨迹和人工标签供进一步研究。

title: Injecting Structured Biomedical Knowledge into Language Models: Continual Pretraining vs. GraphRAG
summary: The injection of domain-specific knowledge is crucial for adapting language models (LMs) to specialized fields such as biomedicine. While most current approaches rely on unstructured text corpora, this study explores two complementary strategies for leveraging structured knowledge from the UMLS Metathesaurus: (i) Continual pretraining that embeds knowledge into model parameters, and (ii) Graph Retrieval-Augmented Generation (GraphRAG) that consults a knowledge graph at inference time. We first construct a large-scale biomedical knowledge graph from UMLS (3.4 million concepts and 34.2 million relations), stored in Neo4j for efficient querying. We then derive a ~100-million-token textual corpus from this graph to continually pretrain two models: BERTUMLS (from BERT) and BioBERTUMLS (from BioBERT). We evaluate these models on six BLURB (Biomedical Language Understanding and Reasoning Benchmark) datasets spanning five task types and evaluate GraphRAG on the two QA (Question Answering) datasets (PubMedQA, BioASQ). On BLURB tasks, BERTUMLS improves over BERT, with the largest gains on knowledge-intensive QA. Effects on BioBERT are more nuanced, suggesting diminishing returns when the base model already encodes substantial biomedical text knowledge. Finally, augmenting LLaMA 3-8B with our GraphRAG pipeline yields over than 3 points accuracy on PubMedQA and 5 points on BioASQ without any retraining, delivering transparent, multi-hop, and easily updated knowledge access. We release the processed UMLS Neo4j graph to support reproducibility.

AI.tldr: 研究探索两种利用UMLS结构化知识增强语言模型的方法：持续预训练将知识嵌入参数，GraphRAG在推理时检索知识图谱。构建了大规模生物医学知识图谱，评估显示BERTUMLS优于BERT，GraphRAG显著提升LLaMA 3-8B的QA性能。
AI.motivation: 当前语言模型适应专业领域（如生物医学）主要依赖非结构化文本，本研究探索利用UMLS结构化知识的互补策略，以更有效地将领域知识注入语言模型。
AI.method: 1) 从UMLS构建大规模生物医学知识图谱（340万概念，3420万关系），存储在Neo4j中；2) 从图谱生成约1亿token的文本语料，用于持续预训练BERT和BioBERT得到BERTUMLS和BioBERTUMLS；3) 开发GraphRAG管道，在推理时检索知识图谱增强LLaMA 3-8B。
AI.result: 在BLURB六个数据集上，BERTUMLS优于BERT，在知识密集型QA任务上提升最大；对BioBERT效果更微妙，表明基础模型已有大量生物医学知识时收益递减。GraphRAG使LLaMA 3-8B在PubMedQA上提升超过3个点，BioASQ上提升5个点，无需重新训练。
AI.conclusion: 结构化知识注入对语言模型适应专业领域至关重要。持续预训练和GraphRAG是互补的有效策略，特别是GraphRAG提供了透明、多跳且易于更新的知识访问方式。研究发布了处理的UMLS Neo4j图谱以支持可重复性。

title: Spectral bandits for smooth graph functions
comment: Published in International Conference on Machine Learning (ICML 2014)
summary: Smooth functions on graphs have wide applications in manifold and semi-supervised learning. In this paper, we study a bandit problem where the payoffs of arms are smooth on a graph. This framework is suitable for solving online learning problems that involve graphs, such as content-based recommendation. In this problem, each item we can recommend is a node and its expected rating is similar to its neighbors. The goal is to recommend items that have high expected ratings. We aim for the algorithms where the cumulative regret with respect to the optimal policy would not scale poorly with the number of nodes. In particular, we introduce the notion of an effective dimension, which is small in real-world graphs, and propose two algorithms for solving our problem that scale linearly and sublinearly in this dimension. Our experiments on real-world content recommendation problem show that a good estimator of user preferences for thousands of items can be learned from just tens of nodes evaluations.

AI.tldr: 该论文研究图上的平滑函数在多臂老虎机问题中的应用，提出基于有效维度的算法，在真实世界内容推荐中仅需数十次节点评估即可学习数千物品的用户偏好。
AI.motivation: 解决在线学习问题中涉及图结构的情况，如基于内容的推荐系统。在推荐系统中，每个可推荐物品是图节点，其期望评分与邻居相似，目标是推荐高期望评分的物品。
AI.method: 引入有效维度概念（在真实世界图中较小），提出两种算法：一种线性缩放于有效维度，另一种次线性缩放于有效维度。
AI.result: 实验表明，在真实世界内容推荐问题中，仅需数十次节点评估即可学习数千物品的用户偏好估计器。
AI.conclusion: 提出的基于图平滑函数和有效维度的多臂老虎机算法能够有效解决图结构在线学习问题，在真实世界推荐系统中表现出色，累积遗憾不会随节点数量大幅增长。

title: Online Reinforcement Learning for Safe Gain Scheduling in Nonlinear Quadrotor Control
summary: This paper presents an online reinforcement-learning framework for safe gain scheduling of a nonlinear quadcopter controller. Rather than learning thrust and torque commands directly, the proposed method selects gain vectors online from a finite library of pre-certified stabilizing controllers, thereby preserving the structure of the underlying snap-based control law. Safety is enforced by restricting the policy to admissible gains that maintain forward invariance of a prescribed safe state set, while dwell-time constraints prevent excessively fast switching. To reduce the action-space dimension, translational gains are shared across spatial axes by exploiting the isotropic structure of the translational dynamics, whereas yaw gains are scheduled independently. A deep Q-network learns to adjust feedback authority according to the current flight condition, using aggressive gains during large transients and milder gains near hover. High-fidelity nonlinear simulations demonstrate accurate trajectory tracking, bounded attitude motion, reduced control effort near convergence, and stable hover regulation under online safe gain scheduling.

AI.tldr: 提出一种用于四旋翼飞行器非线性控制器安全增益调度的在线强化学习框架，通过从预认证稳定控制器库中选择增益向量，在保持原有控制结构的同时确保安全性。
AI.motivation: 传统四旋翼控制器在不同飞行条件下需要手动调整增益，难以在保证稳定性的同时实现最优性能。需要一种能够在线自适应调整增益的方法，既能应对大瞬态变化，又能在悬停时保持稳定。
AI.method: 采用深度Q网络学习根据当前飞行条件调整反馈增益，从有限预认证稳定控制器库中选择增益向量。通过安全约束确保状态集的正向不变性，设置驻留时间约束防止过快切换。利用平移动力学的各向同性结构共享空间轴增益，独立调度偏航增益。
AI.result: 高保真非线性仿真显示：实现了精确轨迹跟踪、有界姿态运动、收敛时减少控制努力，以及在线安全增益调度下的稳定悬停调节。在大瞬态时使用激进增益，在悬停附近使用温和增益。
AI.conclusion: 该框架成功实现了四旋翼控制器的在线安全增益调度，在保持原有控制结构的同时，通过强化学习自适应调整增益，确保了飞行安全性和控制性能的平衡。

title: Crouzeix-Raviart Finite Element Approximation of Dirichlet Boundary Control Problems with Piecewise Constant Controls
summary: This article examines the Dirichlet boundary control problem governed by the Poisson equation, where the control variables are square integrable functions defined on the boundary of a two-dimensional bounded, convex, polygonal domain. It employs an ultra-weak formulation and utilizes Crouzeix-Raviart finite elements to discretize the state variable, while employing piecewise constants for the control variable discretization. Furthermore, it establishes an optimal order a priori error estimate for the control variable.

AI.tldr: 该论文研究了由泊松方程控制的Dirichlet边界控制问题，在二维凸多边形域上使用超弱公式和Crouzeix-Raviart有限元离散状态变量，分段常数离散控制变量，并建立了控制变量的最优阶先验误差估计。
AI.motivation: 研究Dirichlet边界控制问题在科学和工程计算中的重要性，特别是在二维凸多边形域上，需要开发有效的数值方法和误差分析理论。
AI.method: 采用超弱公式处理泊松方程，使用Crouzeix-Raviart有限元离散状态变量，控制变量采用分段常数离散，并建立相应的数值格式。
AI.result: 建立了控制变量的最优阶先验误差估计，证明了所提数值方法的理论收敛性。
AI.conclusion: 提出的基于超弱公式和Crouzeix-Raviart有限元的数值方法对于Dirichlet边界控制问题是有效的，获得了控制变量的最优收敛阶。

title: Instructor-Created Custom GPTs as Pedagogical Partners Fostering Immersion in Online Higher Education: Two Case Studies
comment: Accepted for presentation at iLRN 2026 - Immersive Learning Research Network conference
summary: As online higher education expands, sustaining student engagement remains a critical challenge. This paper approaches immersive learning by investigating how custom GPTs foster immersion (as a state of deep mental involvement) for students and instructors. While large language models (LLMs) offer potential for enhancing feedback, little research has examined instructor-created custom GPTs designed to align with specific pedagogical goals. This paper addresses this gap, employing the Immersive Learning Cube framework, which conceptualizes immersion through three dimensions: system (envelopment by the environment), narrative (meaningful context), and agency (commitment to meaning-making). Through a qualitative analysis of two distinct case studies, an accelerated graduate grant writing course in the US and an undergraduate software engineering course in Portugal, we analyze course-embedded artifacts to map how custom GPTs influence these immersion dimensions. In the grant writing course, the custom GPT functioned as a feedback partner, fostering system immersion through its immediacy, narrative immersion by reinforcing the proposal's evolving story, and agency immersion by empowering students to negotiate feedback and take ownership of revisions. In the software engineering course, a diegetically-framed custom GPT acted as a metacognitive tutor, enhancing system immersion via its permanent availability, narrative immersion through its role-play function and agency immersion by scaffolding students' self- and co-regulated learning. Our findings demonstrate that thoughtfully integrated custom GPTs can act as powerful pedagogical partners that leverage all three dimensions of immersion. Rather than replacing human instructors, they can amplify immediacy, coherence, and learner autonomy, creating more engaging and immersive online learning environments.

AI.tldr: 研究发现，教师定制的GPT模型能通过系统、叙事和代理三个维度增强在线学习的沉浸感，作为教学伙伴而非替代教师，提升学习体验。
AI.motivation: 随着在线高等教育的扩展，维持学生参与度成为关键挑战。虽然大型语言模型有潜力增强反馈，但很少有研究探讨教师为特定教学目标定制的GPT如何促进沉浸式学习。
AI.method: 采用沉浸式学习立方体框架，通过三个维度（系统、叙事、代理）分析沉浸感。对两个案例进行定性分析：美国加速研究生资助写作课程和葡萄牙本科软件工程课程，分析课程嵌入的人工制品。
AI.result: 在资助写作课程中，定制GPT作为反馈伙伴，通过即时性增强系统沉浸，通过强化提案故事增强叙事沉浸，通过赋权学生协商反馈增强代理沉浸。在软件工程课程中，定制GPT作为元认知导师，通过永久可用性增强系统沉浸，通过角色扮演功能增强叙事沉浸，通过支架式学习增强代理沉浸。
AI.conclusion: 精心整合的定制GPT可以作为强大的教学伙伴，利用沉浸的三个维度。它们不是替代人类教师，而是放大即时性、连贯性和学习者自主性，创造更具吸引力和沉浸感的在线学习环境。

title: Non-Stationarity in the Embedding Space of Time Series Foundation Models
summary: Time series foundation models (TSFMs) are widely used as generic feature extractors, yet the notion of non-stationarity in their embedding spaces remains poorly understood. Recent work often conflates non-stationarity with distribution shift, blurring distinctions fundamental to classical time-series analysis and long-standing methodologies such as statistical process control (SPC). In SPC, non-stationarity signals a process leaving a stable regime - via shifts in mean, variance, or emerging trends - and detecting such departures is central to quality monitoring and change-point analysis. Motivated by this diagnostic tradition, we study how different forms of distributional non-stationarity - mean shifts, variance changes, and linear trends - become linearly accessible in TSFM embedding spaces under controlled conditions. We further examine temporal non-stationarity arising from persistence, which reflects violations of weak stationarity due to long-memory or near-unit-root behavior rather than explicit distributional shifts. By sweeping shift strength and probing multiple TSFMs, we find that embedding-space detectability of non-stationarity degrades smoothly and that different models exhibit distinct, model-specific failure modes.

AI.tldr: 该论文研究时间序列基础模型嵌入空间中非平稳性的可检测性，区分分布非平稳性（均值偏移、方差变化、趋势）和时间非平稳性（持续性），发现不同模型具有特定的失效模式。
AI.motivation: 现有研究常将非平稳性与分布偏移混为一谈，模糊了经典时间序列分析和统计过程控制中的基本区别。在SPC中，非平稳性标志着过程离开稳定状态，检测这种偏离对质量监控和变点分析至关重要。作者希望研究不同形式的非平稳性在TSFM嵌入空间中的线性可检测性。
AI.method: 在受控条件下研究分布非平稳性（均值偏移、方差变化、线性趋势）在TSFM嵌入空间中的线性可访问性，同时研究由持续性引起的时间非平稳性（反映弱平稳性违反）。通过扫描偏移强度并探测多个TSFM模型，分析嵌入空间对非平稳性的检测能力。
AI.result: 研究发现嵌入空间对非平稳性的可检测性平滑下降，不同模型表现出各自特定的失效模式。不同TSFM在检测不同类型非平稳性方面具有不同的敏感性和能力。
AI.conclusion: 时间序列基础模型的嵌入空间对非平稳性的检测能力有限且模型相关，这为理解TSFM在质量监控和变点分析等实际应用中的局限性提供了重要见解，强调了需要针对特定非平稳性类型设计专门的检测方法。

title: Debate as Reward: A Multi-Agent Reward System for Scientific Ideation via RL Post-Training
summary: Large Language Models (LLMs) have demonstrated potential in automating scientific ideation, yet current approaches relying on iterative prompting or complex multi-agent architectures often suffer from hallucination or computational inefficiency. A critical bottleneck in applying Reinforcement Learning (RL) to this open-ended domain is reward hacking -- where models exploit imperfect evaluation proxies to maximize scores without producing genuine scientific innovation. To address these limitations, we propose an RL framework explicitly tailored for high-quality scientific idea generation. We propose the first multi-agent reward function designed to serve as a judge, decoupling methodological validation from implementation details while providing strict binary rewards that are robust to reward hacking. To effectively optimize against this sparse signal, we utilize an unbiased variant of Group Relative Policy Optimization to mitigate artificial length bias. We grounded our training in ICLR-320, a curated dataset of problem-solution pairs extracted from ICLR 2024 proceedings. Experiments demonstrate that our framework significantly outperforms state-of-the-art baselines across expert-evaluated metrics of novelty, feasibility, and effectiveness.

AI.tldr: 提出针对高质量科学创意生成的强化学习框架，通过多智能体奖励函数解决奖励攻击问题，在ICLR数据集上显著优于现有方法
AI.motivation: 当前LLM在科学创意生成中存在幻觉和计算效率低的问题，强化学习应用面临奖励攻击的瓶颈，需要专门针对高质量科学创意生成的解决方案
AI.method: 提出专门为高质量科学创意生成设计的RL框架，包括首个多智能体奖励函数作为评判者，将方法验证与实现细节解耦，使用无偏的组相对策略优化来缓解长度偏差
AI.result: 在ICLR-320数据集上的实验表明，该框架在专家评估的新颖性、可行性和有效性指标上显著优于最先进的基线方法
AI.conclusion: 提出的强化学习框架有效解决了科学创意生成中的奖励攻击问题，能够产生高质量的科学创新想法

title: HalluSAE: Detecting Hallucinations in Large Language Models via Sparse Auto-Encoders
summary: Large Language Models (LLMs) are powerful and widely adopted, but their practical impact is limited by the well-known hallucination phenomenon. While recent hallucination detection methods have made notable progress, we find most of them overlook the dynamic nature and underlying mechanisms of it. To address this gap, we propose HalluSAE, a phase transition-inspired framework that models hallucination as a critical shift in the model's latent dynamics. By modeling the generation process as a trajectory through a potential energy landscape, HalluSAE identifies critical transition zones and attributes factual errors to specific high-energy sparse features. Our approach consists of three stages: (1) Potential Energy Empowered Phase Zone Localization via sparse autoencoders and a geometric potential energy metric; (2) Hallucination-related Sparse Feature Attribution using contrastive logit attribution; and (3) Probing-based Causal Hallucination Detection through linear probes on disentangled features. Extensive experiments on Gemma-2-9B demonstrate that HalluSAE achieves state-of-the-art hallucination detection performance.

AI.tldr: HalluSAE：一个受相变启发的框架，将大语言模型幻觉建模为潜在动力学中的临界转变，通过稀疏自编码器和几何势能度量实现最先进的幻觉检测性能。
AI.motivation: 现有幻觉检测方法大多忽视了幻觉的动态特性和底层机制，限制了实际应用效果。需要从动态系统角度理解幻觉的产生过程。
AI.method: 提出HalluSAE框架，将生成过程建模为势能景观中的轨迹：1）通过稀疏自编码器和几何势能度量定位相变区域；2）使用对比logit归因识别幻觉相关稀疏特征；3）在解耦特征上通过线性探针进行因果幻觉检测。
AI.result: 在Gemma-2-9B模型上的大量实验表明，HalluSAE实现了最先进的幻觉检测性能。
AI.conclusion: 将幻觉建模为动态系统中的临界相变，通过稀疏特征分析和势能景观方法，能够更有效地检测和归因大语言模型中的事实错误。

title: Random Matrix Theory of Early-Stopped Gradient Flow: A Transient BBP Scenario
summary: Empirical studies of trained models often report a transient regime in which signal is detectable in a finite gradient descent time window before overfitting dominates. We provide an analytically tractable random-matrix model that reproduces this phenomenon for gradient flow in a linear teacher--student setting. In this framework, learning occurs when an isolated eigenvalue separates from a noisy bulk, before eventually disappearing in the overfitting regime. The key ingredient is anisotropy in the input covariance, which induces fast and slow directions in the learning dynamics. In a two-block covariance model, we derive the full time-dependent bulk spectrum of the symmetrized weight matrix through a $2\times 2$ Dyson equation, and we obtain an explicit outlier condition for a rank-one teacher via a rank-two determinant formula. This yields a transient Baik-Ben Arous-Péché (BBP) transition: depending on signal strength and covariance anisotropy, the teacher spike may never emerge, emerge and persist, or emerge only during an intermediate time interval before being reabsorbed into the bulk. We map the corresponding phase diagrams and validate the theory against finite-size simulations. Our results provide a minimal solvable mechanism for early stopping as a transient spectral effect driven by anisotropy and noise.

AI.tldr: 论文提出一个随机矩阵模型，解释梯度下降训练中信号检测的瞬态现象：各向异性的输入协方差导致学习动态中快慢方向分离，产生早期停止的瞬态谱效应。
AI.motivation: 经验研究表明，训练模型时存在一个瞬态阶段：在有限梯度下降时间窗口内可检测到信号，之后过拟合占主导。需要建立可解析处理的模型来解释这一现象。
AI.method: 构建线性师生设置中的随机矩阵模型，分析各向异性输入协方差下的梯度流动态。使用2×2 Dyson方程推导对称化权重矩阵的时变体谱，通过秩二行列式公式获得秩一教师的离群值条件。
AI.result: 发现瞬态Baik-Ben Arous-Péché (BBP)转变：根据信号强度和协方差各向异性，教师尖峰可能永不出现、出现并持续，或仅在中间时间间隔出现后被重新吸收到体谱中。绘制了相应的相图。
AI.conclusion: 该模型为早期停止提供了一个最小可解机制，表明各向异性和噪声驱动的瞬态谱效应是理解梯度下降训练中信号检测现象的关键。

title: Nesterov Accelerated Distributed Optimization with Efficient Quantized Communication
summary: In modern large-scale networked systems, rapidly solving optimization problems while utilizing communication resources efficiently is critical for addressing complex tasks. In this paper, we consider an unconstrained distributed optimization problem in which information exchange among nodes is governed by a directed communication graph. In our setup we focus on two key challenges. The first is the zigzag phenomenon caused by the objective functions of individual nodes having significantly different curvature along different directions. The second is that the communication channels among nodes are subject to limited bandwidth, which motivates the use of compressed (quantized) messages. To address both challenges simultaneously, we propose QANM, a distributed optimization algorithm that combines Nesterov-accelerated gradient descent with a distributed finite-time quantized consensus protocol, enabling accelerated convergence. Under strong convexity and smoothness assumptions, we show that our proposed algorithm converges linearly to a neighborhood of the optimal solution. Finally, we validate our algorithm on a distributed sensor fusion application for multi-dimensional target parameter estimation, where simulations across two distinct scenarios confirm the convergence guarantees and demonstrate clear acceleration benefits over non-momentum baselines.

AI.tldr: QANM：一种结合Nesterov加速梯度下降和分布式有限时间量化共识协议的分布式优化算法，用于解决具有不同曲率函数和带宽受限通信网络的优化问题。
AI.motivation: 现代大规模网络系统中，需要快速解决优化问题并高效利用通信资源。面临两个关键挑战：1）节点目标函数在不同方向上曲率差异大导致的"之字形"现象；2）节点间通信带宽受限，需要使用压缩（量化）消息。
AI.method: 提出QANM算法，结合Nesterov加速梯度下降和分布式有限时间量化共识协议。算法通过量化消息传递减少通信开销，同时利用动量加速收敛。
AI.result: 在强凸性和光滑性假设下，算法线性收敛到最优解的邻域。在分布式传感器融合应用中验证，两种不同场景的仿真均证实收敛保证，并显示出比无动量基线明显的加速优势。
AI.conclusion: QANM算法能有效解决具有不同曲率函数和带宽受限通信网络的分布式优化问题，通过量化共识和动量加速实现高效收敛。

title: Beyond the Bellman Fixed Point: Geometry and Fast Policy Identification in Value Iteration
summary: Dynamic programming is one of the most fundamental methodologies for solving Markov decision problems. Among its many variants, Q-value iteration (Q-VI) is particularly important due to its conceptual simplicity and its classical contraction-based convergence guarantee. Despite the central role of this contraction property, it does not fully reveal the geometric structure of the Q-VI trajectory. In particular, when one is interested not only in the final limit $Q^*$ but also in when the induced greedy policy becomes effectively optimal, the standard contraction argument provides only a coarse characterization. To formalize this notion, we denote by $\mathcal X^*$ the set of $Q$-functions whose corresponding tie-broken greedy policies are optimal, referred to as the practically optimal solution set (POS). In this paper, we revisit discounted Q-VI through the lens of switching system theory and derive new geometric insights into its behavior. In particular, we show that although Q-VI does not reach $Q^*$ in finite time in general, it identifies the optimal action class in finite time. Furthermore, we prove that the distance from the iterate to a particular subset of $\mathcal X^*$ decays exponentially at a rate governed by the joint spectral radius (JSR) of a restricted switching family. This rate can be strictly faster than the standard $γ$ rate when the restricted JSR is strictly smaller than $γ$, while the convergence of the entire $Q$-function to $Q^*$ can still be dominated by the slower $γ$ mode, where $γ$ denotes the discount factor. These results reveal a two-stage geometric behavior of Q-VI: a fast convergence toward $\mathcal X_1$, followed by a slower convergence toward $Q^*$ in general.

AI.tldr: Q值迭代(Q-VI)具有两阶段几何行为：首先快速识别最优动作类别，然后以较慢速度收敛到精确Q*函数
AI.motivation: 传统基于收缩性的收敛分析无法充分揭示Q-VI轨迹的几何结构，特别是无法准确描述诱导贪婪策略何时变得有效最优
AI.method: 通过切换系统理论重新审视折扣Q-VI，分析其几何行为，证明Q-VI在有限时间内识别最优动作类别
AI.result: Q-VI到POS特定子集的距离以受限切换族的联合谱半径(JSR)指数衰减，该速率可能快于标准γ速率；同时揭示了两阶段收敛行为
AI.conclusion: Q-VI具有两阶段几何结构：快速收敛到POS，然后较慢收敛到精确Q*函数，这为理解强化学习算法收敛特性提供了新视角

title: A Framework for Human-AI Q-Matrix Refinement: A NeuralCDM Evaluation
summary: Q-matrices are a cornerstone of theory-driven assessment and learning analytics, making item demands and students' underlying knowledge components and misconceptions explicit and actionable. However, Q-matrices are typically crafted by experts, making them time-consuming to build, prone to subjectivity, and difficult to validate empirically. We propose a framework for human-AI Q-matrix refinement in which large language models (LLMs) generate candidate Q-matrices using structured, misconception-aware prompting, and NeuralCDM provides an empirical evaluation layer to compare candidates based on how well they explain student response data. We apply the framework to a thermodynamics assessment dataset and benchmark locally deployed LLMs against cloud-served models. Results show that iteratively refined LLM-generated Q-matrices can exceed expert-baseline model fit (AUC 0.780 vs. 0.717), and that locally deployed models achieve comparable performance to cloud APIs, supporting privacy-preserving deployment.

AI.tldr: 提出一个人类-AI协作的Q矩阵优化框架，利用LLMs生成候选Q矩阵，NeuralCDM评估候选矩阵对学生反应数据的解释能力，在热力学评估数据集上验证，结果显示LLM生成的Q矩阵在模型拟合度上超过专家基准
AI.motivation: 传统Q矩阵依赖专家构建，耗时、主观且难以实证验证，需要更高效、客观的Q矩阵构建方法
AI.method: 提出人类-AI协作框架：1) LLMs通过结构化、考虑错误概念的提示生成候选Q矩阵；2) NeuralCDM作为实证评估层，比较候选矩阵对学生反应数据的解释能力；3) 在热力学评估数据集上测试，并比较本地部署与云端LLMs的性能
AI.result: 迭代优化的LLM生成Q矩阵在模型拟合度上超过专家基准（AUC 0.780 vs. 0.717），本地部署模型性能与云端API相当，支持隐私保护部署
AI.conclusion: LLMs与认知诊断模型结合可有效优化Q矩阵构建，减少专家依赖，提高客观性和实证有效性，同时支持隐私保护部署

title: (Sparse) Attention to the Details: Preserving Spectral Fidelity in ML-based Weather Forecasting Models
summary: We introduce Mosaic, a probabilistic weather forecasting model that addresses two principal sources of spectral degradation in ML-based weather prediction: (1) deterministic training against ensemble means and (2) compressive encoding creating an information bottleneck. Mosaic generates ensemble members through learned functional perturbations and operates on native-resolution grids via block-sparse attention, a hardware-aligned mechanism that captures long-range dependencies at linear cost by sharing keys and values across spatially adjacent queries. At 1.5$°$ resolution with 214M parameters, Mosaic matches or outperforms models trained on 6 times finer data on headline upper-air variables and achieves state-of-the-art results among 1.5$°$ models, producing well-calibrated ensembles whose individual members exhibit near-perfect spectral alignment across all resolved frequencies. A 24-member, 10-day forecast takes under 12 seconds on a single H100 GPU.

AI.tldr: Mosaic是一种概率天气预测模型，通过功能扰动和块稀疏注意力机制解决ML天气预测中的谱退化问题，在1.5°分辨率下实现最先进的预测性能
AI.motivation: 解决基于机器学习的天气预测中两个主要的谱退化来源：1）针对集合平均的确定性训练；2）压缩编码造成的信息瓶颈
AI.method: 通过学习的功能扰动生成集合成员，通过块稀疏注意力机制在原生分辨率网格上操作，该机制通过相邻查询共享键值来以线性成本捕获长程依赖
AI.result: 在1.5°分辨率、2.14亿参数下，Mosaic匹配或优于在6倍更精细数据上训练的模型，在1.5°模型中达到最先进水平，产生校准良好的集合，其个体成员在所有解析频率上表现出近乎完美的谱对齐
AI.conclusion: Mosaic通过创新的扰动机制和硬件对齐的注意力架构，有效解决了ML天气预测中的谱退化问题，实现了高效、准确的概率天气预报

title: When Agents Go Quiet: Output Generation Capacity and Format-Cost Separation for LLM Document Synthesis
summary: LLM-powered coding agents suffer from a poorly understood failure mode we term output stalling: the agent silently produces empty responses when attempting to generate large, format-heavy documents. We present a theoretical framework that explains and prevents this failure through three contributions. (1) We introduce Output Generation Capacity (OGC), a formal measure of an agent's effective ability to produce output given its current context state - distinct from and empirically smaller than the raw context window. (2) We prove a Format-Cost Separation Theorem showing that deferred template rendering is always at least as token-efficient as direct generation for any format with overhead multiplier $μ_f > 1$, and derive tight bounds on the savings. (3) We formalize Adaptive Strategy Selection, a decision framework that maps the ratio of estimated output cost to available OGC into an optimal generation strategy (direct, chunked, or deferred). We validate the theory through controlled experiments across three models (Claude 3.5 Sonnet, GPT-4o, Llama 3.1 70B), four document types, and an ablation study isolating each component's contribution. Deferred rendering reduces LLM generation tokens by 48-72% across all conditions and eliminates output stalling entirely. We instantiate the framework as GEN-PILOT, an open-source MCP server, demonstrating that the theory translates directly into a practical tool.

AI.tldr: 论文提出输出停滞问题理论框架，通过输出生成容量、格式成本分离定理和自适应策略选择，解决LLM生成大格式文档时的沉默失败，并实现GEN-PILOT工具减少48-72%的token使用。
AI.motivation: LLM驱动的编码代理存在"输出停滞"问题：在尝试生成大型、格式繁重的文档时，代理会静默产生空响应。这种失败模式尚未被充分理解，需要理论框架来解释和预防。
AI.method: 提出三个核心贡献：1) 引入输出生成容量(OGC)，衡量代理在给定上下文状态下的有效输出能力；2) 证明格式成本分离定理，显示延迟模板渲染总是比直接生成更token高效；3) 形式化自适应策略选择框架，根据估计输出成本与可用OGC的比率选择最优生成策略。
AI.result: 在三个模型(Claude 3.5 Sonnet、GPT-4o、Llama 3.1 70B)和四种文档类型上的实验验证：延迟渲染在所有条件下减少LLM生成token 48-72%，完全消除输出停滞。实现为开源MCP服务器GEN-PILOT。
AI.conclusion: 该理论框架成功解释和预防LLM输出停滞问题，通过形式化分析和自适应策略选择显著提高token效率，理论可直接转化为实用工具，为LLM编码代理提供可靠解决方案。

title: SynopticBench: Evaluating Vision-Language Models on Generating Weather Forecast Discussions of the Future
comment: Accepted for presentation at Climate Informatics 2026
summary: Recent advances in visual-language models (VLMs) have led to significant improvements in a plethora of complex multimodal tasks like image captioning, report generation, and visual perception. However, generating text from meteorological data is highly challenging because the atmosphere is a chaotic system that is rapidly changing at various spatial and temporal scales. Given the complexity of atmospheric phenomena, it is critical to verifiably quantify the effectiveness of existing VLMs on weather forecasting data. In this work, we present SynopticBench, a high-quality dataset consisting of 1,367,041 text samples of Area Forecast Discussions created by the National Weather Service over the continental United States paired to images of 500mb geopotential height, 2 meter temperature, and 850mb wind velocity in weather forecasts. We also present Synoptic Phenomena Alignment and Coverage Evaluation (SPACE), a novel evaluation framework that can be used to effectively estimate the quality of text descriptions of synoptic weather phenomena. Extensive experiments on generating forecast discussions using state-of-the-art VLMs show the sensitivity of existing evaluation metrics in this domain and enable further exploration into synoptic weather and climate text generation.

AI.tldr: 该论文提出了SynopticBench数据集和SPACE评估框架，用于评估视觉语言模型在天气预报文本生成任务上的表现，发现现有评估指标在该领域存在敏感性不足的问题。
AI.motivation: 虽然视觉语言模型在多模态任务上取得了显著进展，但气象数据文本生成面临独特挑战：大气是混沌系统，时空尺度变化快速。需要可验证地量化现有VLMs在天气预报数据上的有效性。
AI.method: 1) 构建SynopticBench数据集：包含1,367,041个美国国家气象局制作的区域预报讨论文本样本，配以500mb位势高度、2米温度和850mb风速的天气预测图像；2) 提出SPACE评估框架：用于有效评估天气现象文本描述质量。
AI.result: 通过使用最先进的视觉语言模型生成预报讨论的广泛实验，展示了现有评估指标在该领域的敏感性，并为天气和气候文本生成的进一步探索提供了基础。
AI.conclusion: 该工作为评估视觉语言模型在气象领域的应用提供了高质量数据集和专门评估框架，揭示了现有评估指标在天气文本生成任务上的局限性，推动了天气和气候文本生成研究的进一步发展。

title: FUSE: Ensembling Verifiers with Zero Labeled Data
summary: Verification of model outputs is rapidly emerging as a key primitive for both training and real-world deployment of large language models (LLMs). In practice, this often involves using imperfect LLM judges and reward models since ground truth acquisition can be time-consuming and expensive. We introduce Fully Unsupervised Score Ensembling (FUSE), a method for improving verification quality by ensembling verifiers without access to ground truth correctness labels. The key idea behind FUSE is to control conditional dependencies between verifiers in a manner that improves the unsupervised performance of a class of spectral algorithms from the ensembling literature. Despite requiring zero ground truth labels, FUSE typically matches or improves upon semi-supervised alternatives in test-time scaling experiments with diverse sets of generator models, verifiers, and benchmarks. In particular, we validate our method on both conventional academic benchmarks such as GPQA Diamond and on frontier, unsaturated benchmarks such as Humanity's Last Exam and IMO Shortlist questions.

AI.tldr: FUSE是一种无需真实标签的验证器集成方法，通过控制验证器间的条件依赖关系来提升验证质量，在多种基准测试中表现优于半监督方法。
AI.motivation: 大语言模型输出验证已成为关键需求，但实践中常使用不完美的LLM评判者和奖励模型，因为获取真实标签耗时且昂贵。
AI.method: 提出完全无监督分数集成（FUSE）方法，通过控制验证器间的条件依赖关系，改进集成文献中谱算法的无监督性能，无需真实正确性标签。
AI.result: FUSE在测试时扩展实验中通常匹配或优于半监督替代方案，在GPQA Diamond、Humanity's Last Exam和IMO Shortlist等多样基准上验证有效。
AI.conclusion: FUSE提供了一种无需真实标签的有效验证器集成方法，在大语言模型训练和部署的验证任务中具有实用价值。

title: End-to-End ILC for Repetitive Untrackable Tasks: A Cooperative Game Perspective
summary: An inherent assumption of perfect tracking in iterative learning control (ILC) is that there exists an ILC input such that the generated output can track the desired trajectory reference. This assumption may fail in practice, which gives rise to desired but untrackable tasks. This paper gives an end-to-end ILC design for repetitive untrackable tasks in closed-loop systems. The reference input is trial-to-trial updated together with the ILC feedforward input based on the measurement data. This two-player behavior of the closed-loop ILC system is investigated from a cooperative game perspective. A sufficient condition for the two-player end-to-end ILC to have a lower cost than the one-player norm optimal ILC (NOILC) is discovered. Finally, a numerical example is given to verify the effectiveness of the developed method.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种针对不可跟踪任务的端到端迭代学习控制方法，通过协同博弈视角同时更新参考输入和ILC前馈输入，相比传统NOILC能获得更低成本。
AI.motivation: 传统ILC假设存在完美跟踪的输入，但实际中可能存在期望但不可跟踪的任务。当参考轨迹无法被系统完美跟踪时，需要新的ILC设计方法。
AI.method: 提出端到端ILC设计，将参考输入与ILC前馈输入在试验间协同更新。从协同博弈角度分析闭环ILC系统的双玩家行为，建立理论分析框架。
AI.result: 发现了双玩家端到端ILC相比单玩家范数最优ILC（NOILC）能获得更低成本的充分条件。通过数值例子验证了所提方法的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 该端到端ILC方法能有效处理重复性不可跟踪任务，通过协同更新策略在闭环系统中实现性能提升，为实际应用提供了理论支持。

title: On-Trip Matching and Pricing for Shared Rides
summary: Although shared rides have the potential to increase vehicle utilization and reduce congestion and emissions, these benefits depend heavily on ridesharing platforms' ability to match riders effectively. As such, shared rides have seen limited success outside of dense urban areas -- the sparse outskirts of greater metropolitan areas remain underserved. In the literature, the dominant matching model involves collecting rider requests in a batch interval and solving a non-bipartite matching problem on the requests. However, this model neglects the ability of a rider to be matched to a future arriving rider even after she is initially dispatched solo; namely, matching is only modeled pre-trip, and the value of on-trip matching is not explicitly accounted for. We develop a dynamic, stochastic matching model, where the platform makes both pre-trip and on-trip matching decisions, and contrast the behavior of each phase of matching. Using both synthetic and real-world data from Chicago, we find that whereas pre-trip matching is well-suited to dense downtown areas with concentrated demand, on-trip matching is critical in sparser outskirts where demand is spatially dispersed, and manages a tradeoff between matching opportunity and value. We also embed the matching model in an outer pricing optimization problem to study the interaction of matching with pricing, and find that the addition of on-trip matching increases profitability and efficiency for the platform and lowers prices for riders. These effects are particularly pronounced in the sparse outskirts, where operating shared rides -- even providing access to any form of transportation -- has historically been most challenging.

AI.tldr: 研究提出动态随机匹配模型，结合出行前和途中匹配，特别适用于需求稀疏的郊区，能提升平台盈利效率和降低乘客价格。
AI.motivation: 当前拼车匹配模型主要关注出行前批量匹配，忽略了途中匹配的价值。这导致拼车服务在需求稀疏的郊区效果不佳，限制了共享出行的整体效益。
AI.method: 开发动态随机匹配模型，平台同时做出出行前和途中匹配决策。使用合成数据和芝加哥真实数据进行分析，并将匹配模型嵌入外部定价优化问题中。
AI.result: 出行前匹配适合需求密集的市中心，而途中匹配对需求分散的郊区至关重要。加入途中匹配能提高平台盈利效率，降低乘客价格，在郊区效果尤为显著。
AI.conclusion: 途中匹配是解决郊区拼车服务挑战的关键，能平衡匹配机会与价值，提升共享出行的整体效益和可及性。

title: What Is Actually Being Annotated? Inter-Prompt Reliability as a Measurement Problem in LLM-Based Social Science Labeling
summary: Large language models (LLMs) are increasingly used for annotation in computational social science, yet their methodological reliability under prompt variation remains unclear. This paper introduces Inter-Prompt Reliability (IPR), a framework for evaluating the stability of LLM outputs across semantically equivalent but linguistically varied prompts. Drawing on Inter-Rater Reliability, IPR is measured by Pairwise Agreement Rate (PAR) and its distribution to capture both consistency and stochasticity in model behavior. We evaluate this framework on two tasks with distinct properties: TREC (interpretative) and Politifact (knowledge-anchored). Results show that LLM annotation exhibits substantial stochastic variation in interpretative tasks, while appearing more stable in knowledge-based tasks. We further show that majority voting across prompts significantly improves reproducibility and reduces variance. These findings suggest that LLM prompt acts as an instrumental measurement while its wording exhibits methodological uncertainty. For future LLM-based CSS studies, we suggest that researchers move beyond single-prompt evaluation toward distributional stability and prompt aggregation within our IPR framework.

AI.tldr: 该论文提出了"提示间可靠性"(IPR)框架，用于评估大语言模型在语义相同但表述不同的提示下的输出稳定性，发现模型在解释性任务中表现出显著随机性，而在知识性任务中更稳定，建议采用多提示聚合方法。
AI.motivation: 大语言模型在计算社会科学中越来越多地用于标注任务，但其在不同提示下的方法可靠性尚不明确。需要评估LLM输出在语义等价但语言表述不同的提示下的稳定性。
AI.method: 提出了"提示间可靠性"(IPR)框架，借鉴评分者间可靠性概念，使用配对一致率(PAR)及其分布来衡量模型行为的一致性和随机性。在TREC(解释性)和Politifact(知识锚定)两个具有不同特性的任务上进行评估。
AI.result: 结果显示，LLM标注在解释性任务中表现出显著的随机变化，而在基于知识的任务中显得更稳定。跨提示的多数投票显著提高了可重复性并减少了方差。
AI.conclusion: LLM提示作为工具性测量，其措辞存在方法不确定性。建议未来基于LLM的CSS研究应从单一提示评估转向分布稳定性，并在IPR框架内采用提示聚合方法。

title: Dimensional Criticality at Grokking Across MLPs and Transformers
summary: Abrupt transitions between distinct dynamical regimes are a hallmark of complex systems. Grokking in deep neural networks provides a striking example -- an abrupt transition from memorization to generalization long after training accuracy saturates -- yet robust macroscopic signatures of this transition remain elusive. Here we introduce \textbf{TDU--OFC} (Thresholded Diffusion Update--Olami-Feder-Christensen), an offline avalanche probe that converts gradient snapshots into cascade statistics and extracts a \emph{macroscopic observable} -- the time-resolved effective cascade dimension $D(t)$ -- via grokking-aligned finite-size scaling. Across Transformers trained on modular addition and MLPs trained on XOR, we discover a localized dynamical crossing of the Gaussian diffusion baseline $D=1$ precisely at the generalization transition. The crossing direction is task-dependent: modular addition descends through $D=1$ (approaching from $D>1$), while XOR ascends (from $D<1$). This opposite-direction convergence is consistent with attraction toward a candidate shared critical manifold, rather than trivial residence near $D \approx 1$. Negative controls confirm this picture: ungrokked runs remain supercritical ($D>1$) and never enter the post-transition regime. In addition, avalanche distributions exhibit heavy tails and finite-size scaling consistent with the dimensional exponent extracted from $D(t)$. Shadow-probe controls ($α_{\mathrm{train}}=0$) confirm that $D(t)$ is non-invasive, and grokked trajectories diverge from ungrokked ones in $D(t)$ some $100$--$200$ epochs before the behavioral transition.

AI.tldr: 论文提出TDU-OFC方法，通过分析梯度快照的级联统计来检测神经网络中的"顿悟"现象，发现泛化转变时级联维度D(t)会穿越高斯扩散基线D=1
AI.motivation: 深度神经网络中的"顿悟"现象（从记忆到泛化的突然转变）缺乏鲁棒的宏观特征，需要开发能够检测这种转变的宏观可观测指标
AI.method: 提出TDU-OFC方法：将梯度快照转换为级联统计，通过有限尺寸标度提取时间分辨的有效级联维度D(t)，在Transformer和MLP上进行实验验证
AI.result: 发现泛化转变时D(t)会局部穿越D=1基线，不同任务穿越方向不同；未发生顿悟的运行保持超临界状态；D(t)在行为转变前100-200个epoch就能区分顿悟轨迹
AI.conclusion: TDU-OFC提供了检测神经网络顿悟现象的宏观可观测指标，揭示了顿悟转变的临界特性，为理解深度学习中的相变提供了新视角

title: CT Open: An Open-Access, Uncontaminated, Live Platform for the Open Challenge of Clinical Trial Outcome Prediction
summary: Scientists have long sought to accurately predict outcomes of real-world events before they happen. Can AI systems do so more reliably? We study this question through clinical trial outcome prediction, a high-stakes open challenge even for domain experts. We introduce CT Open, an open-access, live platform that will run four challenge every year. Anyone can submit predictions for each challenge. CT Open evaluates those submissions on trials whose outcomes were not yet public at the time of submission but were made public afterwards. Determining if a trial's outcome is public on the internet before a certain date is surprisingly difficult. Outcomes posted on official registries may lag behind by years, while the first mention may appear in obscure articles. To address this, we propose a novel, fully automated decontamination pipeline that uses iterative LLM-powered web search to identify the earliest mention of trial outcomes. We validate the pipeline's quality and accuracy by human expert's annotations. Since CT Open's pipeline ensures that every evaluated trial had no publicly reported outcome when the prediction was made, it allows participants to use any methodology and any data source. In this paper, we release a training set and two time-stamped test benchmarks, Winter 2025 and Summer 2025. We believe CT Open can serve as a central hub for advancing AI research on forecasting real-world outcomes before they occur, while also informing biomedical research and improving clinical trial design. CT Open Platform is hosted at $\href{https://ct-open.net/}{https://ct-open.net/}$

AI.tldr: CT Open是一个开放访问的实时平台，每年举办四次临床试验结果预测挑战，使用自动化去污染流程确保评估的公正性
AI.motivation: 科学家长期寻求准确预测现实世界事件结果，临床试验结果预测对领域专家来说也是高风险的开放挑战，需要评估AI系统是否能更可靠地进行预测
AI.method: 提出CT Open平台，采用全自动去污染管道，使用迭代LLM驱动的网络搜索来识别试验结果的最早提及，确保评估时结果尚未公开
AI.result: 发布了训练集和两个时间戳测试基准（Winter 2025和Summer 2025），验证了管道质量并通过人类专家标注确保准确性
AI.conclusion: CT Open可作为推进AI预测现实世界结果研究的中心枢纽，同时为生物医学研究和临床试验设计提供信息

title: EchoChain: A Full-Duplex Benchmark for State-Update Reasoning Under Interruptions
summary: Real-time voice assistants must revise task state when users interrupt mid-response, but existing spoken-dialog benchmarks largely evaluate turn-based interaction and miss this failure mode. We introduce EchoChain, a controlled benchmark for evaluating full-duplex state-update reasoning under mid-speech interruptions. EchoChain identifies three recurring failure patterns in post-interruption continuations: contextual inertia, interruption amnesia, and objective displacement. The benchmark generates scenario-driven conversations and injects interruptions at a standardized point relative to assistant speech onset, enabling controlled cross-model comparison. In a paired half-duplex control, total failures drop by 40.2% relative to interrupted runs, indicating that many errors are driven by state-update reasoning under interruption rather than task difficulty alone. Across evaluated real-time voice models, no system exceeds a 50% pass rate, showing substantial room for improvement in mid-generation state revision. EchoChain provides a reproducible benchmark for diagnosing state-update reasoning failures in full-duplex voice interaction.

AI.tldr: EchoChain是一个评估语音助手在用户中途打断时状态更新推理能力的基准测试，发现现有系统在中断后继续响应时存在三种常见失败模式，且所有评估模型通过率均低于50%。
AI.motivation: 现有语音对话基准主要评估轮次式交互，忽略了用户在中途打断时语音助手需要更新任务状态的现实场景，缺乏对这一失败模式的系统评估。
AI.method: 引入EchoChain基准，通过生成场景驱动的对话并在助手语音开始后的标准化时间点注入中断，实现跨模型的受控比较。同时设置半双工对照组进行对比。
AI.result: 识别出三种中断后继续响应的失败模式：上下文惯性、中断遗忘和目标偏移。在配对半双工控制实验中，总失败率比中断运行降低了40.2%。所有评估的实时语音模型通过率均未超过50%。
AI.conclusion: EchoChain为诊断全双工语音交互中的状态更新推理失败提供了可复现的基准，表明当前系统在中途生成状态修订方面仍有很大改进空间。

title: Revisiting Active Sequential Prediction-Powered Mean Estimation
comment: Published as a conference paper at ICLR 2026
summary: In this work, we revisit the problem of active sequential prediction-powered mean estimation, where at each round one must decide the query probability of the ground-truth label upon observing the covariates of a sample. Furthermore, if the label is not queried, the prediction from a machine learning model is used instead. Prior work proposed an elegant scheme that determines the query probability by combining an uncertainty-based suggestion with a constant probability that encodes a soft constraint on the query probability. We explored different values of the mixing parameter and observed an intriguing empirical pattern: the smallest confidence width tends to occur when the weight on the constant probability is close to one, thereby reducing the influence of the uncertainty-based component. Motivated by this observation, we develop a non-asymptotic analysis of the estimator and establish a data-dependent bound on its confidence interval. Our analysis further suggests that when a no-regret learning approach is used to determine the query probability and control this bound, the query probability converges to the constraint of the max value of the query probability when it is chosen obliviously to the current covariates. We also conduct simulations that corroborate these theoretical findings.

AI.tldr: 重新审视主动顺序预测驱动的均值估计问题，发现将查询概率权重偏向常数项而非不确定性建议时能获得最小置信宽度，并提出了相应的非渐近分析和数据依赖的置信区间边界。
AI.motivation: 本文动机源于观察到一个有趣的实证模式：在主动顺序预测驱动的均值估计中，当查询概率权重偏向常数项而非不确定性建议时，往往能获得最小的置信宽度。这促使作者深入分析这种现象背后的理论原因。
AI.method: 作者开发了估计器的非渐近分析，建立了数据依赖的置信区间边界。当使用无悔学习方法确定查询概率并控制这个边界时，查询概率会收敛到与当前协变量无关的最大查询概率约束。
AI.result: 理论分析表明，当查询概率权重偏向常数项时，置信宽度最小。模拟实验也证实了这些理论发现，显示查询概率会收敛到与协变量无关的最大查询概率约束。
AI.conclusion: 本文揭示了在主动顺序预测驱动的均值估计中，将查询概率权重偏向常数项而非不确定性建议的优越性，并提供了相应的理论分析和实证支持，为实际应用提供了指导。

title: Net Load Forecasting Using Machine Learning with Growing Renewable Power Capacity Features: A Comparative Study of Direct and Indirect Methods
summary: Renewable energy adoption has increased significantly over the past few years. However, with the increasing adoption of renewable energy, forecasting the net load has become a major challenge due to the inherent uncertainty associated with these renewable sources. To mitigate the impact of uncertainties, this study utilizes long short-term memory (LSTM) model and fully connected neural networks (FCNN) to predict net load based on two independent approaches: the direct method and indirect method. While the conventional direct method directly forecasts the target net load, the indirect approach derives it by separately predicting total load and renewable energy generation. Furthermore, this study innovatively incorporates renewable energy capacity as an input feature to train the forecasting model. The indirect method for FCNN provided a better estimate than the direct method, and the indirect method for LSTM model gave the best prediction. These findings suggest that recurrent architectures like LSTM are particularly well-suited for net load forecasting applications, while the choice between direct and indirect methods depends on the specific neural network architecture employed. By advancing reliable forecasting tools for renewable energy integration, this work enhances grid resilience and accelerates the transition toward renewable-dominant power systems.

AI.tldr: 该研究使用LSTM和FCNN两种神经网络，通过直接和间接两种方法预测净负荷，发现LSTM的间接方法效果最佳，为可再生能源集成提供了可靠的预测工具。
AI.motivation: 随着可再生能源采用增加，净负荷预测因可再生能源的不确定性而变得困难，需要开发可靠的预测工具来增强电网韧性并加速向可再生能源主导的电力系统过渡。
AI.method: 使用长短期记忆网络和全连接神经网络，采用两种独立方法：直接法直接预测目标净负荷，间接法分别预测总负荷和可再生能源发电量再计算净负荷。创新性地将可再生能源容量作为输入特征。
AI.result: FCNN的间接方法比直接方法预测效果更好，而LSTM模型的间接方法给出了最佳预测结果。循环架构如LSTM特别适合净负荷预测应用，直接和间接方法的选择取决于具体的神经网络架构。
AI.conclusion: 通过为可再生能源集成提供先进的可靠预测工具，这项工作增强了电网韧性，加速了向可再生能源主导的电力系统的过渡。LSTM结合间接方法是净负荷预测的有效方法。

title: The Multi-Block DC Function Class: Theory, Algorithms, and Applications
summary: We present the Multi-Block DC (BDC) class, a rich class of structured nonconvex functions that admit a DC ("difference-of-convex") decomposition across parameter blocks. This multi-block class not only subsumes the usual DC programming, but also turns out to be provably more powerful. Specifically, we demonstrate how standard models (e.g., polynomials and tensor factorization) must have DC decompositions of exponential size, while their BDC formulation is polynomial. This separation in complexity also underscores another key aspect: unlike DC formulations, obtaining BDC formulations for problems is vastly easier and constructive. We illustrate this aspect by presenting explicit BDC formulations for modern tasks such as deep ReLU networks, a result with no known equivalent in the DC class. Moreover, we complement the theory by developing algorithms with non-asymptotic convergence theory, including both batch and stochastic settings, and demonstrate the broad applicability of our method through several applications.

AI.tldr: 提出多块DC类，一种结构化非凸函数类，允许跨参数块进行DC分解，比传统DC编程更强大且易于构造。
AI.motivation: 传统DC编程在处理某些复杂模型（如多项式、张量分解）时需要指数级大小的DC分解，这在实际应用中不可行。需要一种更强大且易于构造的DC类来克服这一限制。
AI.method: 提出多块DC类，允许函数在不同参数块上进行DC分解。开发了具有非渐进收敛理论的算法，包括批处理和随机设置，并展示了在深度ReLU网络等现代任务中的具体应用。
AI.result: 证明了多块DC类比传统DC类更强大：标准模型（如多项式、张量分解）在传统DC下需要指数级分解，而在多块DC下只需多项式级分解。提供了深度ReLU网络等现代任务的具体多块DC公式。
AI.conclusion: 多块DC类为结构化非凸优化提供了更强大且实用的框架，比传统DC编程更易于构造和应用，具有广泛的适用性。

title: How Do Terms of Service Influence Social Media User Dynamics from A Privacy Anxiety Perspective
comment: Master's thesis, 69 pages, 12 figures, 4 tables, Accepted and to report at #SMSociety2026
summary: This study examines how a Terms of Service update on X enabling default AI training on user content activated privacy anxiety and reshaped user behavior. Privacy anxiety is conceptualized as a structural outcome of reduced control over data use, particularly among content creators. The study finds that privacy anxiety is activated within creator communities and diffused across user groups through inter- and cross- community interaction. As anxiety escalated, engagement declined and migration intentions increased. These findings point to an unresolved dilemma in AI-driven platform governance: how user trust and autonomy can be sustained under conditions of concentrated power and data-dependent business models remains unclear.

AI.tldr: X平台更新服务条款允许默认AI训练用户内容，引发隐私焦虑并改变用户行为，特别是内容创作者群体。研究发现隐私焦虑在创作者社区内被激活，并通过社区间互动扩散，导致参与度下降和迁移意愿增加。
AI.motivation: 研究动机是探讨AI驱动平台治理中的核心困境：当平台拥有集中权力和数据依赖商业模式时，如何维持用户信任和自主权。具体关注X平台服务条款更新（允许默认AI训练用户内容）如何影响用户隐私感知和行为。
AI.method: 研究通过分析X平台服务条款更新后的用户行为变化，考察隐私焦虑在内容创作者社区中的激活机制，以及这种焦虑如何通过社区内和跨社区互动进行扩散。
AI.result: 研究发现：1）隐私焦虑主要影响内容创作者群体，源于对数据使用控制权的丧失；2）焦虑在创作者社区内被激活，并通过社区间互动扩散到其他用户群体；3）随着焦虑升级，用户参与度下降，迁移到其他平台的意愿增加。
AI.conclusion: 研究揭示了AI驱动平台治理中未解决的困境：在平台权力集中和数据依赖商业模式下，如何维持用户信任和自主权仍然不明确。平台政策变化可能通过激活隐私焦虑而重塑用户行为，影响平台生态。

title: Sampling for Quality: Training-Free Reward-Guided LLM Decoding via Sequential Monte Carlo
summary: We introduce a principled probabilistic framework for reward-guided decoding in large language models, addressing the limitations of standard decoding methods that optimize token-level likelihood rather than sequence-level quality. Our method defines a reward-augmented target distribution over complete sequences by combining model transition probabilities with prefix-dependent reward potentials. Importantly, the approach is training-free: it leaves model weights unchanged and instead modifies the inference distribution via reward potentials, with all gains arising purely from inference-time sampling. To sample from this distribution, we develop Sequential Monte Carlo algorithms, including a computationally efficient prefix-only variant and a lookahead variant whose intermediate targets match the exact marginals of the full sequence distribution. The framework also integrates resample-move updates with Metropolis-Hastings rejuvenation and supports block-wise generation, subsuming common decoding strategies such as temperature sampling and power-tempered objectives. Empirical results across three 7B models show significant gains. On code generation (HumanEval), our method improves base performance by up to 54.9% and surpasses the strongest sampling baselines by 9.1%-15.3%. On mathematical reasoning (MATH500), it achieves gains of up to 8.8%. Notably, it reaches 87.8% on HumanEval and 78.4% on MATH500 with Qwen2.5-7B, consistently outperforming the reinforcement learning method GRPO.

AI.tldr: 提出一个基于概率框架的奖励引导解码方法，通过结合模型转移概率和奖励势能来定义序列级目标分布，无需训练即可在推理时提升大语言模型性能。
AI.motivation: 标准解码方法主要优化token级似然而非序列级质量，这限制了生成序列的整体质量。需要一种无需训练、仅在推理时就能提升序列质量的方法。
AI.method: 提出概率框架，结合模型转移概率和前缀依赖的奖励势能定义奖励增强的目标分布。使用序列蒙特卡洛算法采样，包括计算高效的前缀变体和匹配完整分布边际的lookahead变体。支持块级生成和Metropolis-Hastings更新。
AI.result: 在三个7B模型上取得显著提升：代码生成（HumanEval）提升达54.9%，超越最强基线9.1%-15.3%；数学推理（MATH500）提升达8.8%。Qwen2.5-7B在HumanEval达到87.8%，MATH500达到78.4%，均优于强化学习方法GRPO。
AI.conclusion: 提出的训练免费奖励引导解码框架能有效提升大语言模型序列生成质量，在代码生成和数学推理任务上显著优于现有方法，展示了推理时优化的潜力。

title: Why Training-Free Token Reduction Collapses: The Inherent Instability of Pairwise Scoring Signals
summary: Training-free token reduction methods for Vision Transformers (ToMe, ToFu, PiToMe, and MCTF) employ different scoring mechanisms, yet they share a closely matched cliff-like collapse at high compression. This paper explains \emph{why}. We develop a diagnostic framework with two tools, ranking consistency $ρ_s$ and off-diagonal correlation $ρ_\text{off}$, that decomposes the collapse into (1)a signal-agnostic error amplifier inherent to layer-wise reduction, predicting convex Pareto curves and $r_{\text{crit}} \propto 1/L$; and (2)shared reliance on \emph{pairwise} similarity signals whose ranking consistency degrades from $ρ_s{=}0.88$ to $0.27$ in deep layers. Pairwise rankings are inherently unstable ($O(N_p^2)$ joint perturbations) while unary signals enjoy greater stability ($O(N_p)$ perturbations, CLT). From three design principles derived from this diagnosis, we construct CATIS as a constructive validation: unary signals raise the trigger threshold, triage suppresses the gain. On ViT-Large at 63% FLOPs reduction, CATIS retains 96.9% of vanilla accuracy (81.0%) on ImageNet-1K where all baselines collapse to 43--65%.

AI.tldr: 本文分析了Vision Transformers中训练无关的token缩减方法（ToMe、ToFu、PiToMe、MCTF）在高压缩率下性能急剧下降的原因，提出了诊断框架和新的解决方案CATIS。
AI.motivation: 现有训练无关的token缩减方法在高压缩率下都会出现性能急剧下降（悬崖式崩溃），但缺乏对这种共同现象的系统性解释。本文旨在揭示这种崩溃的根本原因。
AI.method: 提出了一个诊断框架，包含两个工具：排序一致性ρ_s和离对角线相关性ρ_off。通过分析发现崩溃源于两个因素：1）层间缩减固有的信号无关误差放大器；2）基于成对相似性信号的排序一致性在深层网络中严重退化。基于三个设计原则构建了CATIS方法。
AI.result: 在ViT-Large上，当FLOPs减少63%时，CATIS在ImageNet-1K上保持了96.9%的原始准确率（81.0%），而所有基线方法都崩溃到43-65%的准确率。
AI.conclusion: 揭示了训练无关token缩减方法崩溃的根本原因，提出了基于单变量信号和分诊机制的新方法CATIS，显著提高了高压缩率下的性能稳定性。

title: Revisiting a Pain in the Neck: A Semantic Reasoning Benchmark for Language Models
summary: We present SemanticQA, an evaluation suite designed to assess language models (LMs) in semantic phrase processing tasks. The benchmark consolidates existing multiword expression (MwE) resources and reorganizes them into a unified testbed. It covers both general lexical phenomena, such as lexical collocations, and three fine-grained categories: idiomatic expressions, noun compounds, and verbal constructions. Through SemanticQA, we assess LMs of diverse architectures and scales in extraction, classification, and interpretation tasks, as well as sequential task compositions. We reveal substantial performance variation, particularly on tasks requiring semantic reasoning, highlighting differences in reasoning efficacy and semantic understanding of LMs, providing insights for pushing LMs with stronger comprehension on non-trivial semantic phrases. The evaluation harness and data of SemanticQA are available at https://github.com/jacklanda/SemanticQA.

AI.tldr: SemanticQA是一个评估语言模型处理语义短语能力的基准测试套件，整合了多词表达资源，涵盖习语、名词复合词和动词结构等类别，用于测试模型的提取、分类、解释和组合任务能力。
AI.motivation: 现有语言模型评估主要关注句子或文档级别，缺乏对语义短语（如习语、复合词等）处理能力的系统评估。需要专门的测试套件来评估模型在语义推理和短语理解方面的能力。
AI.method: 整合现有的多词表达资源，重新组织成统一的测试平台。涵盖一般词汇现象和三个细粒度类别：习语表达、名词复合词和动词结构。设计提取、分类、解释任务以及顺序任务组合来评估不同架构和规模的语言模型。
AI.result: 评估显示语言模型在语义推理任务上存在显著性能差异，特别是在需要语义推理的任务上。这揭示了不同模型在推理效果和语义理解方面的差异，为提升语言模型对非平凡语义短语的理解能力提供了见解。
AI.conclusion: SemanticQA为评估语言模型的语义短语处理能力提供了系统框架，揭示了模型在语义推理方面的局限性，有助于推动语言模型在复杂语义理解方面的发展。评估工具和数据已开源提供。

title: Learning a Non-linear Surrogate Model for Multistage Stochastic Transmission Planning
summary: Transmission expansion planning (TEP) plays a critical role in ensuring power system reliability and facilitating the integration of renewable energy resources. However, this process requires planners to constantly deal with significant uncertainty. While multistage stochastic TEP models provide a robust framework for identifying investment plans under uncertainty, the rapid growth in problem size hinders their computational tractability. To address this challenge, this paper develops a hybrid machine learning-optimisation framework for stochastic TEP. The proposed approach uses investment decisions and uncertainty scenarios as input features to train surrogate neural networks, which are then reformulated as mixed-integer linear constraints and embedded within an optimisation model. The surrogate model approximates expected operational costs to inform TEP decisions, reducing the burden arising from large operational problems. Case study applications on IEEE test systems demonstrate that, after training, the proposed approach achieves near-optimal investment costs while reducing total computational time by up to a factor of around 13 compared to a single full-optimisation stochastic formulation. This enables performing extensive multi-scenario analysis and stress testing that would otherwise be computationally prohibitive at scale.

AI.tldr: 提出混合机器学习-优化框架解决随机输电扩展规划计算难题，用神经网络代理模型近似运行成本，将计算时间减少约13倍
AI.motivation: 输电扩展规划面临巨大不确定性，多阶段随机规划模型虽能提供鲁棒框架，但问题规模快速增长导致计算不可行
AI.method: 开发混合机器学习-优化框架：使用投资决策和不确定性场景作为输入特征训练代理神经网络，将其重构为混合整数线性约束并嵌入优化模型，近似预期运行成本
AI.result: 在IEEE测试系统上的案例研究表明，训练后该方法能实现接近最优的投资成本，同时将总计算时间减少约13倍
AI.conclusion: 该方法显著提高了随机输电扩展规划的计算效率，使得原本计算上不可行的大规模多场景分析和压力测试成为可能

title: Composition and tensor train structure in polynomial optimization
summary: We study polynomial optimization problems whose objective has a composition or tensor train structure. These polynomials can be evaluated as a sequence of maps, giving rise to intermediate variables (``states'') of dimension lower than the ambient dimension. Structures like these arise naturally in dynamical systems, Markov chains, and neural networks. We develop two moment-SOS (sums of squares) hierarchies that exploit this composition structure in different ways. The first one, termed state-lifting chordal, is based on the correlative sparsity graph of the problem. The second one, termed state-lifting push-forward, encodes the structure at the level of the measures directly. Numerical experiments demonstrate that the proposed methods can compute certified bounds for problems with hundreds or even a thousand variables. To illustrate the versatility of the hierarchies we apply them to Markov chain optimization, quantum optimal control, and neural networks.

AI.tldr: 提出两种利用多项式优化问题组合结构的矩-SOS层次方法，可处理数百至上千变量问题
AI.motivation: 许多多项式优化问题具有组合或张量链结构，这些结构在动力系统、马尔可夫链和神经网络中自然出现，但现有方法未充分利用这种结构
AI.method: 开发两种矩-SOS层次方法：1) 状态提升弦图法，基于问题的相关稀疏图；2) 状态提升前推法，直接在测度层面编码结构
AI.result: 数值实验表明，所提方法能为数百甚至上千变量问题计算认证边界，应用于马尔可夫链优化、量子最优控制和神经网络
AI.conclusion: 通过利用多项式优化问题的组合结构，提出的状态提升方法显著扩展了可处理问题的规模，在多个领域具有应用潜力

title: Using Large Language Models for Emotional Support of Bulgarian Users: A Survey
