summary: The use of large language models (LLMs) for psychological and emotional support (ES) has rapidly evolved, becoming the most widely used application of generative artificial intelligence among consumers by 2025. This paper presents the results of an anonymous survey of 100 Bulgarian users, primarily high school, university, and doctoral students, to explore their attitudes toward and usage of chatbots for emotional support. Findings indicate that approximately one-half of the surveyed population utilizes chatbots for ES, with ChatGPT being the most dominant platform. Users primarily seek support for coping with stress in interpersonal relationships and work or study-related environments. While 71% of users perceive the technology as effective, non-users remain sceptical. Despite the growing adoption, significant concerns persist regarding data security, technology reliability, and the tendency of chatbots to provide excessive affirmation.

AI.tldr: 对100名保加利亚用户的调查显示，约一半受访者使用聊天机器人进行情感支持，ChatGPT是最主要平台，主要用于应对人际关系和工作/学习压力。71%用户认为技术有效，但非用户持怀疑态度，数据安全、技术可靠性和过度肯定等问题仍是主要担忧。
AI.motivation: 研究动机是探索用户对聊天机器人情感支持的态度和使用情况，因为大语言模型在心理和情感支持方面的应用快速发展，已成为2025年消费者生成式人工智能最广泛的应用领域。
AI.method: 采用匿名调查方法，调查了100名保加利亚用户，主要是高中生、大学生和博士生，了解他们对聊天机器人情感支持的态度和使用情况。
AI.result: 调查发现：约一半受访者使用聊天机器人进行情感支持；ChatGPT是最主要平台；用户主要用于应对人际关系和工作/学习压力；71%用户认为技术有效；非用户持怀疑态度；数据安全、技术可靠性和过度肯定是主要担忧。
AI.conclusion: 尽管聊天机器人情感支持应用日益普及且多数用户认为有效，但数据安全、技术可靠性和过度肯定等问题仍需关注，非用户的怀疑态度也表明需要进一步解决这些担忧。

title: Multi-Label Phase Diagram Prediction in Complex Alloys via Physics-Informed Graph Attention Networks
summary: Accurate phase equilibria are foundational to alloy design because they encode the underlying thermodynamics governing stability, transformations, and processing windows. However, while the CALculation of Phase Diagrams (CALPHAD) provides a rigorous thermodynamic framework, exploring multicomponent composition-temperature space remains computationally expensive and is typically limited to sparse section. To enable rapid phase mapping and alloy screening, we propose a physics-informed graph attention network (GAT) that learns element-aware representations and couples them with thermodynamic constraints for multi-label phase-set prediction in the Ag-Bi-Cu-Sn alloy system. Using about 25,000 equilibrium states generated with pycalphad, each composition-temperature point is represented as a four-node element graph with atomic fractions and elemental descriptors as node features. The model combines graph attention, global pooling, and a multilayer perceptron to predict nine relevant phases. To improve physical consistency, we incorporate thermodynamic constraints, applied as training penalties or as an inference-time projection. Across six binary and three ternary subsystems, the baseline model achieves a macro-F1 score of 0.951 and 93.98% exact-set match, while physics-informed decoding improves robustness and raises exact-set accuracy to about 96% on dense in-domain grids. The surrogate also generalizes to an unseen ternary section with 99.32% exact-set accuracy and to a quaternary section at 700 °C with 91.78% accuracy. These results demonstrate that attention-based graph learning coupled with thermodynamic constraint enforcement provides an effective and physically consistent surrogate for high-resolution phase mapping and extrapolative alloy screening.

AI.tldr: 基于图注意力网络与热力学约束的Ag-Bi-Cu-Sn合金体系相图快速预测方法
AI.motivation: 传统CALPHAD方法计算多组分相图耗时且通常只能得到稀疏截面，需要快速相图映射和合金筛选工具
AI.method: 提出物理信息图注意力网络(GAT)，将成分-温度点表示为四节点元素图，结合图注意力、全局池化和多层感知机预测九个相关相，并加入热力学约束作为训练惩罚或推理时投影
AI.result: 基线模型在六个二元和三个三元子系统中达到宏观F1分数0.951和93.98%精确集匹配，物理信息解码将精确集准确率提升至约96%，在未见三元截面达到99.32%准确率，在700°C四元截面达到91.78%准确率
AI.conclusion: 注意力图学习与热力学约束结合为高分辨率相图映射和外推合金筛选提供了有效且物理一致的代理模型

title: Don't Start What You Can't Finish: A Counterfactual Audit of Support-State Triage in LLM Agents
summary: Current agent evaluations largely reward execution on fully specified tasks, while recent work studies clarification [11, 22, 2], capability awareness [9, 1], abstention [8, 14], and search termination [20, 5] mostly in isolation. This leaves open whether agents can diagnose why a task is blocked before acting. We introduce the Support-State Triage Audit (SSTA-32), a matched-item diagnostic framework in which minimal counterfactual edits flip the same base request across four support states: Complete (ANSWER), Clarifiable (CLARIFY), Support-Blocked (REQUEST SUPPORT), and Unsupported-Now (ABSTAIN). We evaluate a frontier model under four prompting conditions - Direct, Action-Only, Confidence-Only, and a typed Preflight Support Check (PSC) - using Dual-Persona Auto-Auditing (DPAA) with deterministic heuristic scoring. Default execution overcommits heavily on non-complete tasks (41.7% overcommitment rate). Scalar confidence mapping avoids overcommitment but collapses the three-way deferral space (58.3% typed deferral accuracy). Conversely, both Action-Only and PSC achieve 91.7% typed deferral accuracy by surfacing the categorical ontology in the prompt. Targeted ablations confirm that removing the support-sufficiency dimension selectively degrades REQUEST SUPPORT accuracy, while removing the evidence-sufficiency dimension triggers systematic overcommitment on unsupported items. Because DPAA operates within a single context window, these results represent upper-bound capability estimates; nonetheless, the structural findings indicate that frontier models possess strong latent triage capabilities that require explicit categorical decision paths to activate safely.

AI.tldr: 论文提出SSTA-32评估框架，测试AI代理在任务受阻时的诊断能力，发现前沿模型具备潜在分类能力但需要明确的分类决策路径才能安全激活。
AI.motivation: 当前代理评估主要关注完全指定任务的执行，而澄清、能力意识、弃权和搜索终止等能力大多孤立研究。这留下了一个开放问题：代理是否能在行动前诊断任务为何受阻。
AI.method: 引入支持状态分类审计(SSTA-32)框架，通过最小反事实编辑将相同基础请求翻转为四种支持状态：完整(ANSWER)、可澄清(CLARIFY)、支持受阻(REQUEST SUPPORT)、当前不支持(ABSTAIN)。使用四种提示条件评估前沿模型，并通过双角色自动审计(DPAA)进行确定性启发式评分。
AI.result: 默认执行在非完整任务上过度承诺严重(41.7%过度承诺率)。标量置信度映射可避免过度承诺但会压缩三向延迟空间(58.3%类型延迟准确率)。相反，Action-Only和PSC通过提示中的分类本体实现了91.7%的类型延迟准确率。针对性消融实验证实移除支持充分性维度会选择性降低REQUEST SUPPORT准确率，而移除证据充分性维度会触发系统性的过度承诺。
AI.conclusion: 前沿模型具备强大的潜在分类能力，但需要明确的分类决策路径才能安全激活。虽然DPAA在单个上下文窗口中运行，这些结果代表了能力上限估计，但结构发现表明模型具有强大的潜在分类能力。

title: Spotlights and Blindspots: Evaluation Machine-Generated Text Detection
summary: With the rise of generative language models, machine-generated text detection has become a critical challenge. A wide variety of models is available, but inconsistent datasets, evaluation metrics, and assessment strategies obscure comparisons of model effectiveness. To address this, we evaluate 15 different detection models from six distinct systems, as well as seven trained models, across seven English-language textual test sets and three creative human-written datasets. We provide an empirical analysis of model performance, the influence of training and evaluation data, and the impact of key metrics. We find that no single system excels in all areas and nearly all are effective for certain tasks, and the representation of model performance is critically linked to dataset and metric choices. We find high variance in model ranks based on datasets and metrics, and overall poor performance on novel human-written texts in high-risk domains. Across datasets and metrics, we find that methodological choices that are often assumed or overlooked are essential for clearly and accurately reflecting model performance.

AI.tldr: 论文对15种机器生成文本检测模型进行系统评估，发现没有单一模型在所有领域都表现优异，模型性能高度依赖于数据集和评估指标的选择。
AI.motivation: 随着生成式语言模型的兴起，机器生成文本检测成为关键挑战。现有模型众多，但数据集、评估指标和评估策略的不一致使得模型效果难以比较。
AI.method: 评估了来自6个不同系统的15种检测模型和7个训练模型，在7个英文文本测试集和3个创意人类写作数据集上进行测试，分析模型性能、训练和评估数据的影响以及关键指标的影响。
AI.result: 没有单一系统在所有领域都表现优异，几乎所有模型在某些任务上有效；模型性能表示与数据集和指标选择密切相关；基于不同数据集和指标，模型排名差异很大；在高风险领域的新颖人类写作文本上表现普遍较差。
AI.conclusion: 方法论选择对准确反映模型性能至关重要，这些选择往往被假设或忽视。需要更系统化的评估框架来比较不同检测模型的效果。

title: Trapping Regions for Quadratic Systems with Generalized Lossless Nonlinearities
summary: A trapping region is a compact set that is forward invariant with respect to the dynamics. Existence of a trapping region certifies boundedness of trajectories, and the size of the set provides an estimate of the ultimate bound. Prior work on trapping region analysis has focused on quadratic systems with energy-preserving (lossless) nonlinearities. In this work, we focus on a generalization of the lossless property and present an efficient parameterization that enables optimal trapping region computation for a broader class of quadratic systems than afforded by existing methods. We also formulate conditions for ellipsoidal trapping regions, whereas spherical regions have been the focus of prior works. Three numerical examples are used to demonstrate the proposed framework: (1) a four dimensional system for which the prior state-of-the art is incapable of identifying a trapping region; (2) a low-order unsteady aerodynamics model for which the proposed approach yields trapping regions approximately an order of magnitude smaller than prevailing methods; and (3) a two-state academic example in which the proposed approach correctly identifies a globally asymptotically stable equilibrium point.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种用于更广泛二次系统的椭圆型捕获区域计算框架，相比现有方法能处理更复杂系统并获得更优结果。
AI.motivation: 现有捕获区域分析方法主要针对具有能量守恒非线性项的二次系统，限制了应用范围。需要扩展方法以处理更广泛的二次系统，并改进区域形状从球形到椭球形。
AI.method: 提出了一种推广的能量守恒性质参数化方法，能够高效计算最优捕获区域。特别针对椭圆型捕获区域（而非传统球形）制定了条件，扩展了分析能力。
AI.result: 在三个数值示例中验证了方法的有效性：1）四维系统中现有方法无法识别捕获区域，新方法成功；2）低阶非定常空气动力学模型中，捕获区域比现有方法小约一个数量级；3）两状态学术示例中正确识别全局渐近稳定平衡点。
AI.conclusion: 提出的框架扩展了捕获区域分析的应用范围，能够处理更广泛的二次系统，获得更精确的边界估计，并在多个示例中展示了优于现有方法的性能。

title: Exact Finite-Horizon Quantile Kelly for Repeated Multi-Outcome Events
summary:
We formulate and prove an exact finite-horizon quantile theorem for repeated identical multi-outcome Kelly wagering in wealth-profile / Arrow--Debreu coordinates. For a fixed $m$-outcome event repeated independently over a horizon $n$, the terminal wealth induced by a one-period wealth profile $W$ is a monomial $W^N$ in the multinomial count vector $N$. We show that every fixed upper quantile of terminal wealth is a positively homogeneous piecewise-monomial function on the closed Arrow--Debreu wealth simplex, equivalently piecewise linear in log-wealth coordinates on the positive interior. The pieces are indexed by the chambers of the multinomial count arrangement, and on each chamber the quantile objective is exactly a one-period Kelly objective for a count-based \emph{shadow law} $k/n$. Consequently the finite-horizon quantile problem decomposes into finitely many shadow-Kelly subproblems.
  We then refine the interior chamber picture to a finite stratification of the full closed simplex by support faces and arrangement faces, and we prove a weak exact recursive boundary algorithm. We also prove a natural first-order asymptotic collapse to ordinary Kelly, showing that the optimal scaled log-quantile converges to the ordinary Kelly value and that exact finite-horizon maximizers converge to the Kelly wealth profile. For illustration, we include worked binary and ternary examples in the main text and expanded versions in the appendices. We conclude with further remarks and conjectures concerning stronger pruning, higher-order finite-horizon corrections, and extensions to simultaneous wagers.

AI.tldr: 论文提出了有限时间范围内重复多结果凯利投注的精确分位数定理，证明了终端财富的上分位数是分段单项式函数，可分解为有限个影子凯利子问题，并渐近收敛到普通凯利策略。
AI.motivation: 研究有限时间范围内重复凯利投注的分位数优化问题，传统凯利准则关注期望对数财富最大化，而分位数优化关注财富分布的分位数，这在风险管理中更为实用。
AI.method: 使用财富剖面/Arrow-Debreu坐标，将终端财富表示为单项式W^N，证明上分位数是分段单项式函数，通过多变量计数排列的腔室分解为影子凯利子问题，并开发递归边界算法。
AI.result: 证明了有限时间分位数定理：每个固定上分位数是正齐次分段单项式函数，可分解为有限个影子凯利问题，最优解收敛到凯利财富剖面，一阶渐近收敛到普通凯利值。
AI.conclusion: 有限时间分位数优化可精确分解为影子凯利问题，渐近收敛到普通凯利策略，为风险管理提供了理论框架，并提出了进一步研究方向如剪枝优化和高阶修正。

title: Measuring the Gap Between Media Coverage and Public Information Demand: Evidence from the 2026 Lebanon Conflict
comment: 16 pages, 4 figures, 1 table. Code and data available on GitHub
summary: This study examines the relationship between media coverage and public information demand during the Lebanon conflict in March 2026. Using a dataset of 11,623 English-language news articles collected from the GDELT database and Google Trends data for searches conducted within Lebanon, the study compares the distribution of news coverage across topics with the distribution of public search interest. News headlines were filtered for relevance and classified into four categories: Conflict, Economy, Living Conditions, and Emigration. Public information demand was measured using Google Trends topic data for the same categories. The results show a substantial divergence between news coverage and search interest. Conflict accounted for 94.9% of classified news coverage but only 36.9% of total search interest. In contrast, Economy, Living Conditions, and Emigration together accounted for 63.1% of search demand but only 5.1% of news coverage. Time series analysis indicates that search demand for economic and living conditions remained consistently elevated throughout the month rather than reacting to specific conflict events. These findings were robust to the exclusion of the peak conflict period (March 1-5), with Conflict coverage remaining at 94.9% and the information gap persisting across all three under-covered categories. The findings suggest that during the study period, media coverage of Lebanon was heavily concentrated on military events, while public information demand was distributed across economic conditions, daily life, and emigration. This study contributes to agenda-setting research by providing a quantitative comparison between media agenda and public information demand during an active conflict period.

AI.tldr: 媒体对黎巴嫩冲突的报道与公众信息需求存在显著差异：94.9%的新闻报道聚焦冲突，但公众搜索中仅占36.9%；经济、生活条件和移民等民生议题占搜索需求的63.1%，却只获得5.1%的媒体报道。
AI.motivation: 本研究旨在探讨在冲突时期媒体议程设置与公众实际信息需求之间的关系，特别是在黎巴嫩冲突这样的危机情境下，检验媒体报道是否真正反映了公众关注的重点。
AI.method: 使用GDELT数据库收集11,623篇英文新闻报道，通过Google Trends获取黎巴嫩境内的搜索数据。将新闻标题分类为冲突、经济、生活条件和移民四类，并与对应的Google Trends主题搜索数据进行对比分析，包括时间序列分析。
AI.result: 研究发现媒体与公众关注存在巨大鸿沟：冲突报道占新闻覆盖的94.9%，但仅占搜索需求的36.9%；而经济、生活条件和移民合计占搜索需求的63.1%，却只获得5.1%的媒体报道。时间序列分析显示民生搜索需求在整个月保持稳定，而非仅对冲突事件做出反应。
AI.conclusion: 在黎巴嫩冲突期间，媒体报道过度集中于军事事件，而公众更关注经济状况、日常生活和移民等实际问题。这为议程设置理论提供了定量证据，表明在冲突时期媒体议程与公众信息需求存在显著脱节。

title: Positive-Only Drifting Policy Optimization
summary: In the field of online reinforcement learning (RL), traditional Gaussian policies and flow-based methods are often constrained by their unimodal expressiveness, complex gradient clipping, or stringent trust-region requirements. Moreover, they all rely on post-hoc penalization of negative samples to correct erroneous actions. This paper introduces Positive-Only Drifting Policy Optimization (PODPO), a likelihood-free and gradient-clipping-free generative approach for online RL. By leveraging the drifting model, PODPO performs policy updates via advantage-weighted local contrastive drifting. Relying solely on positive-advantage samples, it elegantly steers actions toward high-return regions while exploiting the inherent local smoothness of the generative model to enable proactive error prevention. In doing so, PODPO opens a promising new pathway for generative policy learning in online settings.

AI.tldr: PODPO是一种用于在线强化学习的无似然、无梯度裁剪的生成式方法，通过优势加权局部对比漂移进行策略更新，仅使用正优势样本将动作导向高回报区域。
AI.motivation: 传统高斯策略和基于流的方法在在线强化学习中存在局限性：单峰表达能力受限、复杂的梯度裁剪需求、严格的信任区域要求，并且都依赖对负样本的后验惩罚来纠正错误动作。
AI.method: PODPO采用漂移模型，通过优势加权局部对比漂移进行策略更新。该方法仅使用正优势样本，利用生成模型的固有局部平滑性，主动预防错误，优雅地将动作导向高回报区域。
AI.result: PODPO为在线环境中的生成式策略学习开辟了一条有前景的新途径，提供了无似然、无梯度裁剪的解决方案。
AI.conclusion: PODPO通过仅依赖正优势样本和利用生成模型的局部平滑性，克服了传统方法的局限性，为在线强化学习的生成式策略学习提供了创新方法。

title: Know When to Trust the Skill: Delayed Appraisal and Epistemic Vigilance for Single-Agent LLMs
summary: As large language models (LLMs) transition into autonomous agents integrated with extensive tool ecosystems, traditional routing heuristics increasingly succumb to context pollution and "overthinking". We argue that the bottleneck is not a deficit in algorithmic capability or skill diversity, but the absence of disciplined second-order metacognitive governance. In this paper, our scientific contribution focuses on the computational translation of human cognitive control - specifically, delayed appraisal, epistemic vigilance, and region-of-proximal offloading - into a single-agent architecture. We introduce MESA-S (Metacognitive Skills for Agents, Single-agent), a preliminary framework that shifts scalar confidence estimation into a vector separating self-confidence (parametric certainty) from source-confidence (trust in retrieved external procedures). By formalizing a delayed procedural probe mechanism and introducing Metacognitive Skill Cards, MESA-S decouples the awareness of a skill's utility from its token-intensive execution. Evaluated under an In-Context Static Benchmark Evaluation natively executed via Gemini 3.1 Pro, our early results suggest that explicitly programming trust provenance and delayed escalation mitigates supply-chain vulnerabilities, prunes unnecessary reasoning loops, and prevents offloading-induced confidence inflation. This architecture offers a scientifically cautious, behaviorally anchored step toward reliable, epistemically vigilant single-agent orchestration.

AI.tldr: MESA-S是一个单智能体元认知框架，通过分离自我置信度和来源置信度，并引入延迟评估机制，来减少上下文污染和过度思考问题，提高工具使用的可靠性。
AI.motivation: 随着大语言模型成为集成大量工具的自主体，传统路由启发式方法面临上下文污染和"过度思考"问题。瓶颈不在于算法能力或技能多样性不足，而在于缺乏有纪律的元认知治理。
AI.method: 提出MESA-S框架，将标量置信度估计转换为向量，分离自我置信度（参数确定性）和来源置信度（对外部检索过程的信任）。通过形式化延迟程序探测机制和引入元认知技能卡，将技能效用感知与其密集令牌执行解耦。
AI.result: 在基于Gemini 3.1 Pro的原生上下文静态基准评估中，早期结果表明：显式编程信任来源和延迟升级可以减轻供应链漏洞，修剪不必要的推理循环，防止卸载引起的置信度膨胀。
AI.conclusion: 该架构为可靠、具有认知警惕性的单智能体编排提供了一个科学谨慎、行为锚定的步骤，通过元认知治理提高自主体的工具使用可靠性。

title: Aligning Backchannel and Dialogue Context Representations via Contrastive LLM Fine-Tuning
summary: Backchannels (e.g., `yeah', `mhm', and `right') are short, non-interruptive feedback signals whose lexical form and prosody jointly convey pragmatic meaning. While prior computational research has largely focused on predicting backchannel timing, the relationship between lexico-prosodic form and meaning remains underexplored. We propose a two-stage framework: first, fine-tuning large language models on dialogue transcripts to derive rich contextual representations; and second, learning a joint embedding space for dialogue contexts and backchannel realizations. We evaluate alignment with human perception via triadic similarity judgments (prosodic and cross-lexical) and a context-backchannel suitability task. Our results demonstrate that the learned projections substantially improve context-backchannel retrieval compared to previous methods. In addition, they reveal that backchannel form is highly sensitive to extended conversational context and that the learned embeddings align more closely with human judgments than raw WavLM features.

AI.tldr: 提出两阶段框架：先微调大语言模型获取对话上下文表示，再学习对话上下文与反馈信号（backchannel）的联合嵌入空间，显著提升上下文-反馈信号检索性能，并发现反馈信号形式对扩展对话上下文高度敏感。
AI.motivation: 反馈信号（如"yeah"、"mhm"、"right"）的词汇形式和韵律共同传递语用意义，但现有计算研究主要关注预测反馈信号的时机，而词汇-韵律形式与意义之间的关系尚未得到充分探索。
AI.method: 两阶段框架：1）在对话转录文本上微调大语言模型，获取丰富的上下文表示；2）学习对话上下文和反馈信号实现的联合嵌入空间。通过三元相似性判断（韵律和跨词汇）和上下文-反馈信号适宜性任务评估。
AI.result: 学习的投影显著改善了上下文-反馈信号检索性能，优于先前方法。发现反馈信号形式对扩展对话上下文高度敏感，学习的嵌入比原始WavLM特征更接近人类判断。
AI.conclusion: 提出的两阶段框架有效捕捉了反馈信号的词汇-韵律形式与语用意义之间的关系，学习的联合嵌入空间能更好地对齐人类感知，为反馈信号的生成和理解提供了新方法。

title: DARLING: Detection Augmented Reinforcement Learning with Non-Stationary Guarantees
summary: We study model-free reinforcement learning (RL) in non-stationary finite-horizon episodic Markov decision processes (MDPs) without prior knowledge of the non-stationarity. We focus on the piecewise-stationary (PS) setting, where both the reward and transition dynamics can change an arbitrary number of times. We propose Detection Augmented Reinforcement Learning (DARLING), a modular wrapper for PS-RL that applies to both tabular and linear MDPs, without knowledge of the changes. Under certain change-point separation and reachability conditions, DARLING improves the best available dynamic regret bounds in both settings and yields strong empirical performance. We further establish the first minimax lower bounds for PS-RL in tabular and linear MDPs, showing that DARLING is the first nearly optimal algorithm. Experiments on standard benchmarks demonstrate that DARLING consistently surpasses the state-of-the-art methods across diverse non-stationary scenarios.

AI.tldr: DARLING：一种用于分段平稳MDP的模型无关强化学习算法，无需先验知识即可处理奖励和转移动态的任意变化，在表格和线性MDP中均实现近乎最优的动态遗憾界。
AI.motivation: 研究非平稳有限时域MDP中的模型无关强化学习，特别是分段平稳设置，其中奖励和转移动态可以任意变化多次，且没有先验知识。现有方法在动态遗憾界上仍有改进空间。
AI.method: 提出DARLING（Detection Augmented Reinforcement Learning），这是一个模块化包装器，适用于表格和线性MDP。它结合变化点检测机制，无需知道变化发生的时间或次数，在满足变化点分离和可达性条件下工作。
AI.result: 在表格和线性MDP中改进了现有最佳动态遗憾界，并建立了首个分段平稳RL的极小极大下界，证明DARLING是首个近乎最优的算法。实验表明在标准基准测试中持续超越现有方法。
AI.conclusion: DARLING是处理分段平稳MDP的有效框架，在理论和实验上均表现出色，为模型无关非平稳RL提供了首个近乎最优的解决方案。

title: Coordinated Dynamic Operating Envelopes for Unlocking Additional Flexibility at Grid Edge
summary: Dynamic operating envelopes (DOEs) provide a systematic framework to integrate the flexibility of distribution grid resources while safeguarding network limits such as line ratings and voltage bounds. However, the flexibility derived from individual DOEs is often restricted and conservative, especially when some resources can coordinate via communication with an aggregator. This paper presents a convex, geometry-aware framework for constructing DOE for distribution grid customers under partial coordination, with coordinated customers modeled through polytopal flexibility sets and non-coordinated customers through hyperrectangles. The framework additionally incorporates fairness constraints for export and import headroom allocated to the customers within the DOE design. To account for forecast uncertainty in inelastic injections, the DOE design is extended to a robust formulation for bounded uncertainty sets. Case studies on the European Low Voltage Test Feeder indicate that the proposed DOE construction expands total harnessed flexibility, while being consistent with network limits, export/import fairness constraints and is robust to forecast uncertainty. Specifically, coordinating 30% of customers increased the achievable aggregate active-power injection range by approximately 25% relative to the non-coordinated baseline.

AI.tldr: 提出一种考虑部分协调的凸几何感知动态运行边界框架，通过协调用户的多面体灵活性集和非协调用户的超矩形表示，结合公平性约束和鲁棒性设计，显著提升配电网灵活性。
AI.motivation: 传统动态运行边界（DOE）方法在整合配电网资源灵活性时较为保守，特别是当部分资源可以通过聚合器协调时。现有方法未能充分利用协调用户的灵活性潜力，且缺乏对公平性和不确定性的系统考虑。
AI.method: 提出凸几何感知框架，将协调用户建模为多面体灵活性集，非协调用户建模为超矩形。在DOE设计中加入出口/进口裕度的公平性约束，并针对非弹性注入的预测不确定性，扩展到有界不确定性集的鲁棒公式。
AI.result: 在欧洲低压测试馈线案例研究中，所提DOE构建方法在满足网络限制、公平性约束和鲁棒性的同时，显著扩展了总灵活性。协调30%用户使可实现的聚合有功功率注入范围相比非协调基线增加约25%。
AI.conclusion: 该框架通过部分协调、公平性约束和鲁棒性设计，有效提升了配电网动态运行边界的灵活性，为协调资源整合提供了系统化方法，同时保障了网络安全和用户公平。

title: Decentralized Stability-Constrained Optimal Power Flow for Inverter-Based Power Systems
summary: Future inverter-dominated power systems feature higher variability and more stressed operating conditions, which motivates the consideration of stability in operational settings. Existing approaches to stability-constrained OPF often rely on eigenvalue calculation, global model information, or dynamic evaluation inside optimization formulation, which are computationally intensive and difficult to scale. This paper proposes the first decentralized stability-constrained OPF framework for inverter-based power systems. The key novelty lies in the incorporation of a class of algebraic decentralized small-signal stability criteria that admits tractable representations in steady-state variables and is therefore suitable for optimization. The decentralized stability condition is based on local voltage differences and enables clear theoretical and practical economic interpretation of the stability contribution from each inverter. We define a Nodal Stability Shadow Price (NSSP) for each inverter, and characterize the role of these stability constraints through their associated shadow prices, enabling a nodal interpretation of their economic impacts. It is proved that under active-power-only objectives in lossless networks, binding stability constraints may occur but will admit zero shadow prices if all other operational constraints are inactive. Most importantly, we reveal the importance of considering the opportunity cost of reactive power for inverter-based resources (IBRs) that have limited capacity. When reactive power costs are considered, stability constraints can carry strictly positive shadow prices and admit meaningful economic impacts.

AI.tldr: 提出首个去中心化稳定性约束最优潮流框架，用于逆变器主导的电力系统，通过本地电压差实现可处理的稳定性判据，并引入节点稳定性影子价格分析经济影响。
AI.motivation: 未来逆变器主导的电力系统具有更高波动性和更严峻的运行条件，需要将稳定性纳入运行考虑。现有稳定性约束最优潮流方法依赖特征值计算、全局模型信息或优化中的动态评估，计算量大且难以扩展。
AI.method: 提出去中心化稳定性约束最优潮流框架，采用基于本地电压差的代数去中心化小信号稳定性判据，该判据在稳态变量中具有可处理表示，适合优化。定义节点稳定性影子价格，分析稳定性约束的经济影响。
AI.result: 证明了在无损网络中仅考虑有功功率目标时，绑定稳定性约束可能出现但影子价格为零；揭示了考虑逆变器资源有限容量下无功功率机会成本的重要性，此时稳定性约束具有严格正影子价格和显著经济影响。
AI.conclusion: 该框架首次实现了去中心化稳定性约束最优潮流，通过本地电压差判据和节点稳定性影子价格为逆变器主导电力系统的稳定性与经济运行提供了理论工具和实践指导。

title: G-PARC: Graph-Physics Aware Recurrent Convolutional Neural Networks for Spatiotemporal Dynamics on Unstructured Meshes
summary: Physics-aware recurrent convolutional networks (PARC) have demonstrated strong performance in predicting nonlinear spatiotemporal dynamics by embedding differential operators directly into the computational graph of a neural network. However, pixel-based convolutions are restricted to static, uniform Cartesian grids, making them ill-suited to following evolving localized structures in an efficient manner. Graph neural networks (GNNs) naturally handle irregular spatial discretizations, but existing graph-based physics-aware deep learning (PADL) methods have difficulty handling extreme nonlinear regimes. To address these limitations, we propose Graph PARC (G-PARC), which uses moving least squares (MLS) kernels to approximate spatial derivatives on unstructured graphs, and embeds the derivatives of governing partial differential equations into the network's computational graph. G-PARC achieves better accuracy with 2-3x fewer parameters than MeshGraphNet, MeshGraphKAN, and GraphSAGE, replacing the traditional encoder-processor-decoder framework with analytically computed differential operators. We demonstrate that G-PARC (1) generalizes across nonuniform spatial and temporal discretizations; (2) handles moving meshes required for structural deformation; and (3) outperforms existing graph-based PADL methods on nonlinear benchmarks including fluvial hydrology, planar shock waves, and elastoplastic dynamics. By embedding explicit physical operators within the flexibility of GNNs, G-PARC enables accurate modeling of extreme nonlinear phenomena on complex computational domains, moving PADLbeyond idealized Cartesian grids.

AI.tldr: G-PARC结合图神经网络与移动最小二乘核，在非结构化网格上嵌入物理微分算子，比现有方法参数更少、精度更高，能处理极端非线性现象。
AI.motivation: 传统基于像素的卷积方法受限于静态笛卡尔网格，难以高效跟踪演化局部结构；现有图神经网络物理感知方法在极端非线性区域表现不佳，需要新方法处理复杂计算域上的非线性现象。
AI.method: 提出Graph PARC (G-PARC)，使用移动最小二乘(MLS)核在非结构化图上近似空间导数，将控制偏微分方程的导数嵌入网络计算图，替代传统的编码器-处理器-解码器框架。
AI.result: G-PARC比MeshGraphNet、MeshGraphKAN和GraphSAGE精度更高且参数减少2-3倍，能泛化到非均匀时空离散化，处理结构变形所需的移动网格，在河流水文、平面冲击波和弹塑性动力学等非线性基准测试中优于现有方法。
AI.conclusion: 通过在图神经网络中嵌入显式物理算子，G-PARC能够在复杂计算域上准确建模极端非线性现象，推动物理感知深度学习超越理想化笛卡尔网格的限制。

title: Machine individuality: Separating genuine idiosyncrasy from response bias in large language models
summary: As large language models (LLMs) are increasingly integrated into daily life, in roles ranging from high-stakes decision support to companionship, understanding their behavioral dispositions becomes critical. A growing literature uses psychometric inventories and cognitive paradigms to profile LLM dispositions. However, these approaches cannot determine whether behavioral differences reflect stable, stimulus-specific individuality or global response biases and stochastic noise. Here, we apply crossed random-effects models -- widely used in psychometrics to separate systematic effects -- to 74.9 million ratings provided by 10 open-weight LLMs for over 100,000 words across 14 psycholinguistic norms. On average, 16.9% of variance is attributable to stimulus-specific individuality, robustly exceeding a statistical null model. Cross-norm prediction analyses reveal this individuality as a coherent fingerprint, unique to each model. These results identify individual differences among LLMs that cannot be attributed to response biases or stochastic noise. We term these differences machine individuality.

AI.tldr: 研究发现大型语言模型存在稳定的"机器个体性"，即模型间存在不可归因于响应偏差或随机噪声的个体差异
AI.motivation: 随着大语言模型越来越多地融入日常生活，从高风险决策支持到陪伴角色，理解它们的行为倾向变得至关重要。现有研究使用心理测量量表和认知范式来分析LLM倾向，但无法确定行为差异是反映稳定的、刺激特定的个体性，还是全局响应偏差和随机噪声。
AI.method: 应用交叉随机效应模型（心理测量学中广泛用于分离系统效应），分析10个开源大语言模型对14个心理语言学规范中超过10万个单词提供的7490万个评分。
AI.result: 平均16.9%的方差可归因于刺激特定的个体性，显著超过统计零模型。跨规范预测分析显示这种个体性是一种连贯的"指纹"，对每个模型都是独特的。
AI.conclusion: 研究识别了大语言模型中不可归因于响应偏差或随机噪声的个体差异，称之为"机器个体性"。这表明LLM具有稳定的、刺激特定的个体特征。

title: AdaExplore: Failure-Driven Adaptation and Diversity-Preserving Search for Efficient Kernel Generation
comment: Preliminary work. The implementation is available at https://github.com/StigLidu/AdaExplore
summary: Recent large language model (LLM) agents have shown promise in using execution feedback for test-time adaptation. However, robust self-improvement remains far from solved: most approaches still treat each problem instance independently, without accumulating reusable knowledge. This limitation is particularly pronounced in domain-specific languages such as Triton, which are underrepresented in LLM pretraining data. Their strict constraints and non-linear optimization landscape further make naive generation and local refinement unreliable. We propose AdaExplore, an agent framework that enables self-improvement via accumulated execution feedback for performance-critical kernel code generation through two complementary stages: failure-driven adaptation and diversity-preserving search, jointly improving correctness and optimization performance without additional fine-tuning or external knowledge. In the adaptation stage, the agent synthesizes tasks and converts recurring failures into a reusable memory of validity rules, helping subsequent generations remain within the feasible set. In the search stage, the agent organizes candidate kernels as a tree and alternates between small local refinements and larger structural regeneration, allowing it to explore the optimization landscape beyond local optima. Experiments on kernel runtime optimization benchmarks validate these gains: AdaExplore achieves 3.12x and 1.72x speedups on KernelBench Level-2 and Level-3, respectively, within 100 steps, and continues to improve with additional computation.

AI.tldr: AdaExplore是一个LLM代理框架，通过累积执行反馈实现性能关键内核代码的自我改进，包含失败驱动适应和多样性保持搜索两个阶段，无需额外微调或外部知识。
AI.motivation: 当前LLM代理在测试时适应方面虽有进展，但缺乏可复用知识的积累，特别是在Triton等预训练数据不足的领域特定语言中。严格的约束和非线性优化空间使得简单的生成和局部优化不可靠。
AI.method: AdaExplore包含两个互补阶段：1) 失败驱动适应阶段：合成任务并将重复失败转化为可复用的有效性规则记忆；2) 多样性保持搜索阶段：将候选内核组织为树结构，交替进行局部优化和结构重生成，避免陷入局部最优。
AI.result: 在KernelBench基准测试中，AdaExplore在100步内实现了Level-2 3.12倍和Level-3 1.72倍的加速，且随着计算资源增加持续改进。
AI.conclusion: AdaExplore通过累积执行反馈实现了内核代码生成的自我改进，在正确性和优化性能方面均有显著提升，为解决领域特定语言中的代码生成问题提供了有效框架。

title: How to Approximate Inference with Subtractive Mixture Models
summary: Classical mixture models (MMs) are widely used tractable proposals for approximate inference settings such as variational inference (VI) and importance sampling (IS). Recently, mixture models with negative coefficients, called subtractive mixture models (SMMs), have been proposed as a potentially more expressive alternative. However, how to effectively use SMMs for VI and IS is still an open question as they do not provide latent variable semantics and therefore cannot use sampling schemes for classical MMs. In this work, we study how to circumvent this issue by designing several expectation estimators for IS and learning schemes for VI with SMMs, and we empirically evaluate them for distribution approximation. Finally, we discuss the additional challenges in estimation stability and learning efficiency that they carry and propose ways to overcome them. Code is available at: https://github.com/april-tools/delta-vi.

AI.tldr: 该论文研究了如何将减性混合模型（SMMs）用于变分推断和重要性采样，解决了SMMs缺乏潜变量语义的问题，提出了新的估计器和学习方案。
AI.motivation: 传统混合模型（MMs）在近似推断（如变分推断和重要性采样）中广泛应用，但表达能力有限。减性混合模型（SMMs）具有负系数，理论上表达能力更强，但由于缺乏潜变量语义，无法直接用于变分推断和重要性采样。如何有效利用SMMs进行近似推断是一个开放问题。
AI.method: 设计了多种期望估计器用于重要性采样，以及针对SMMs的变分推断学习方案。通过实验评估这些方法在分布近似中的效果，并讨论了估计稳定性和学习效率方面的挑战，提出了相应的解决方案。
AI.result: 论文提出了有效的SMMs期望估计器和学习方案，能够成功将SMMs应用于变分推断和重要性采样。实验验证了这些方法在分布近似任务中的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 减性混合模型可以作为传统混合模型的有效替代，用于变分推断和重要性采样。通过设计专门的估计器和学习方案，可以克服SMMs缺乏潜变量语义的局限性，同时需要解决估计稳定性和学习效率方面的挑战。

title: On the Unification of Optimal Current Reference Theory for Wound Rotor Synchronous Machines
summary: Controllers for motor drives typically require a current reference which will satisfy the requested torque subject to system constraints. This work generalizes existing current reference theory to the case of the Wound Rotor Synchronous Machine (WRSM). By incorporating the additional rotor-current degree-of-freedom, along with magnetic saturation, cross-coupling, and speed-dependent core losses, the problem of finding an optimal current reference is formulated within affine flux regions as a quadratically constrained quadratic program using a piecewise-affine approximation derived from finite-element data. The solution is characterized according to the active constraint regime, yielding closed-form or low-dimensional polynomial solutions in several cases, and a small semidefinite program in the voltage constrained regime. The proposed framework extends unified optimal current reference theory beyond the permanent-magnet setting to three degree-of-freedom WRSMs while remaining computationally tractable. Results on a physical WRSM prototype illustrate the effectiveness of the approach across the torque-speed operating envelope.

AI.tldr: 该研究将最优电流参考理论扩展到绕线转子同步电机，通过考虑转子电流自由度、磁饱和、交叉耦合和速度相关铁损，将最优电流参考问题建模为二次约束二次规划，在不同约束机制下提供闭式解或低维多项式解。
AI.motivation: 电机驱动控制器需要满足扭矩要求且符合系统约束的电流参考。现有电流参考理论主要针对永磁电机，需要扩展到具有额外转子电流自由度的绕线转子同步电机，同时考虑磁饱和、交叉耦合和速度相关铁损等实际因素。
AI.method: 将最优电流参考问题在仿射磁链区域内建模为二次约束二次规划，使用有限元数据导出的分段仿射近似。根据主动约束机制对解进行特征化，在电压约束机制下采用小型半定规划求解。
AI.result: 在物理绕线转子同步电机原型上的结果表明，该方法在整个扭矩-速度工作范围内有效，将统一最优电流参考理论扩展到三自由度绕线转子同步电机，同时保持计算可行性。
AI.conclusion: 该框架成功将统一最优电流参考理论从永磁电机扩展到绕线转子同步电机，通过考虑转子电流自由度和其他实际因素，在不同约束机制下提供计算可行的解决方案，在实际电机原型上验证了有效性。

title: On The Mathematics of the Natural Physics of Optimization
comment: J. Nonlinear Var. Anal. 10 (2026), 661-686. https://doi.org/10.23952/jnva.10.2026.3; special issue dedicated to Yurii Nesterov on the occasion of his 70th birthday
summary: A number of optimization algorithms have been inspired by the physics of Newtonian motion. Here, we ask the question: do algorithms themselves obey some ``natural laws of motion,'' and can they be derived by an application of these laws? We explore this question by positing the theory that optimization algorithms may be considered as some manifestation of hidden algorithm primitives that obey certain universal non-Newtonian dynamics. This natural physics of optimization is developed by equating the terminal transversality conditions of an optimal control problem to the generalized Karush/John-Kuhn-Tucker conditions of an optimization problem. Through this equivalence formulation, the data functions of a given constrained optimization problem generate a natural vector field that permeates an entire hidden space with information on the optimality conditions. An ``action-at-a-distance'' operation via a Pontryagin-type minimum principle produces a local action to deliver a globalized result by way of a Hamilton-Jacobi inequality. An inverse-optimal algorithm is generated by performing control jumps that dissipate quantized ``energy'' defined by a search Lyapunov function. Illustrative applications of the proposed theory show that a large number of algorithms can be generated and explained in terms of the new mathematical physics of optimization.

AI.tldr: 该论文提出了一种新的优化算法理论框架，将优化算法视为遵循某种普遍非牛顿动力学的隐藏算法原语，通过最优控制与优化问题的等价关系建立优化的自然物理理论。
AI.motivation: 许多优化算法受到牛顿力学启发，但作者提出更深层问题：算法本身是否遵循某种"自然运动定律"？能否通过应用这些定律推导出算法？这促使作者探索优化算法背后的统一物理原理。
AI.method: 将最优控制问题的终端横截条件与约束优化问题的广义KKT条件等价起来，通过这种等价关系，约束优化问题的数据函数生成一个自然向量场。采用"超距作用"操作和Pontryagin型最小值原理，通过控制跳跃来耗散由搜索Lyapunov函数定义的量化"能量"，从而生成逆最优算法。
AI.result: 提出的理论框架能够生成和解释大量优化算法，展示了优化新数学物理的广泛适用性。通过控制跳跃和能量耗散机制，可以系统地推导出各种优化算法。
AI.conclusion: 优化算法可以视为遵循普遍非牛顿动力学的隐藏算法原语，通过建立最优控制与优化问题的等价关系，可以发展出优化的自然物理理论，为算法设计和理解提供统一框架。

title: FairLogue: Evaluating Intersectional Fairness across Clinical Machine Learning Use Cases using the All of Us Research Program
summary: Intersectional biases in healthcare data can produce compound disparities in clinical machine learning models, yet most fairness evaluations assess demographic attributes independently. FairLogue, a toolkit for intersectional fairness auditing, was applied across multiple clinical prediction tasks to evaluate disparities across combined demographic groups. Using the All of Us dataset, two published models were selected for replication and evaluation: (A) prediction of selective serotonin reuptake inhibitor associated bleeding events and (B) two-year stroke risk in patients with atrial fibrillation. Observational fairness metrics were computed across race, gender, and intersectional subgroups, followed by counterfactual analysis to evaluate whether disparities were attributable to group membership. Intersectional evaluation revealed larger disparities than single-axis analyses; however, counterfactual diagnostics indicated that most observed disparities were comparable to those expected under randomized group membership. These results highlight the importance of intersectional fairness auditing and demonstrate how FairLogue provides deeper insight into bias in clinical machine learning systems.

AI.tldr: FairLogue工具包用于临床机器学习模型的交叉公平性审计，发现交叉人口群体比单轴分析存在更大差异，但反事实分析显示大多数差异与随机群体成员资格预期一致。
AI.motivation: 医疗数据中的交叉偏见可能在临床机器学习模型中产生复合差异，但大多数公平性评估独立评估人口属性，需要交叉公平性审计工具来揭示更深层次的偏见。
AI.method: 使用FairLogue工具包对多个临床预测任务进行交叉公平性审计，选择两个已发表模型进行复制和评估，计算种族、性别和交叉子组的观察公平性指标，然后进行反事实分析评估差异是否可归因于群体成员资格。
AI.result: 交叉评估显示比单轴分析更大的差异，但反事实诊断表明大多数观察到的差异与随机群体成员资格预期下的差异相当。
AI.conclusion: 交叉公平性审计在临床机器学习系统中至关重要，FairLogue工具包提供了对偏见的更深入洞察，但需要区分真实偏见与随机预期差异。

title: SCATR: Simple Calibrated Test-Time Ranking
summary: Test-time scaling (TTS) improves large language models (LLMs) by allocating additional compute at inference time. In practice, TTS is often achieved through parallel scaling: generating multiple candidate responses and selecting the best via a Best-of-N (BoN) strategy. Its effectiveness therefore hinges on the scoring function. Learned scorers such as process reward models (PRMs) can be strong, but they are expensive to train and run. Lightweight confidence heuristics based on token log-probabilities are much cheaper, yet we find that they often perform substantially worse. To improve on lightweight confidence heuristics without incurring the full cost of stronger learned scorers, we introduce SCATR, a simple and efficient BoN ranking method that learns a lightweight scorer from a small calibration set using hidden representations from the base model. Across coding and mathematical reasoning benchmarks, SCATR improves over prior confidence-based baselines by up to 9%. Relative to LoRA fine-tuning on the same calibration data, it achieves comparable accuracy with up to 8000x fewer trainable parameters and much lower compute, reducing training and inference latency by up to 150x and 1000x, respectively. SCATR is also competitive with strong PRM baselines, and in several settings improves accuracy by up to 7.8% on math and 4.2% on coding while enabling up to 1000x faster inference. Overall, SCATR offers a strong accuracy-efficiency trade-off for scalable test-time selection.

AI.tldr: SCATR是一种轻量级BoN排名方法，通过少量校准数据学习基础模型的隐藏表示来改进测试时选择，在保持高效率的同时显著提升推理准确性。
AI.motivation: 测试时缩放（TTS）通过并行生成多个候选响应并使用Best-of-N策略选择最佳响应来改进LLMs，但其效果依赖于评分函数。学习型评分器（如PRMs）虽强但训练和运行成本高，而基于token对数概率的轻量级置信度启发式方法虽然便宜但性能较差。需要一种在轻量级启发式方法和强学习型评分器之间取得良好平衡的方案。
AI.method: SCATR是一种简单高效的BoN排名方法，它从少量校准数据中学习一个轻量级评分器，利用基础模型的隐藏表示。该方法避免了训练完整奖励模型的高成本，而是通过校准集学习如何更好地评估候选响应的质量。
AI.result: 在编码和数学推理基准测试中，SCATR比先前的基于置信度的基线方法提升了高达9%。与在相同校准数据上进行LoRA微调相比，它实现了相当的准确性，但可训练参数减少了8000倍，计算成本大幅降低，训练和推理延迟分别减少了150倍和1000倍。与强PRM基线相比，在多个设置中数学推理准确性提升了7.8%，编码准确性提升了4.2%，同时推理速度提高了1000倍。
AI.conclusion: SCATR为可扩展的测试时选择提供了强大的准确性-效率权衡，在保持轻量级的同时显著提升了Best-of-N策略的效果，是一种实用且高效的解决方案。

title: SAVE: A Generalizable Framework for Multi-Condition Single-Cell Generation with Gene Block Attention
summary: Modeling single-cell gene expression across diverse biological and technical conditions is crucial for characterizing cellular states and simulating unseen scenarios. Existing methods often treat genes as independent tokens, overlooking their high-level biological relationships and leading to poor performance. We introduce SAVE, a unified generative framework based on conditional Transformers for multi-condition single-cell modeling. SAVE leverages a coarse-grained representation by grouping semantically related genes into blocks, capturing higher-order dependencies among gene modules. A Flow Matching mechanism and condition-masking strategy further enhance flexible simulation and enable generalization to unseen condition combinations. We evaluate SAVE on a range of benchmarks, including conditional generation, batch effect correction, and perturbation prediction. SAVE consistently outperforms state-of-the-art methods in generation fidelity and extrapolative generalization, especially in low-resource or combinatorially held-out settings. Overall, SAVE offers a scalable and generalizable solution for modeling complex single-cell data, with broad utility in virtual cell synthesis and biological interpretation. Our code is publicly available at https://github.com/fdu-wangfeilab/sc-save

AI.tldr: SAVE是一个基于条件Transformer的统一生成框架，通过将语义相关基因分组为模块块来捕获基因间高阶依赖关系，用于多条件单细胞建模，在生成保真度和外推泛化方面优于现有方法。
AI.motivation: 现有单细胞基因表达建模方法通常将基因视为独立标记，忽略了它们之间的高层次生物关系，导致性能不佳。需要一种能够跨多样生物和技术条件建模的方法，以更好地表征细胞状态并模拟未见场景。
AI.method: SAVE采用条件Transformer框架，通过将语义相关基因分组为块来创建粗粒度表示，捕获基因模块间的高阶依赖关系。结合Flow Matching机制和条件掩码策略，增强灵活模拟能力并实现未见条件组合的泛化。
AI.result: SAVE在条件生成、批次效应校正和扰动预测等多个基准测试中一致优于最先进方法，在生成保真度和外推泛化方面表现优异，特别是在低资源或组合保留设置下。
AI.conclusion: SAVE提供了一个可扩展且可泛化的解决方案，用于建模复杂单细胞数据，在虚拟细胞合成和生物解释方面具有广泛实用性。

title: Migrant Voices, Local News: Insights on Bridging Community Needs with Media Content
comment: David Alonso del Barrio, Paula Dolores Rescala, Victor Bros, Daniel Gatica-Perez| ACM 2026. This is the author's version of the work. It is posted here for your personal use. Not for redistribution. The definitive Version of Record will be published in IMX'26 ACM International Conference on Interactive Media Experiences https://doi.org/10.1145/3788851.3805011
summary: Research shows news consumption differs across demographics, yet little is known about non-mainstream audiences, especially in relation to local media. Our study addresses this gap by examining how French-speaking migrants in a mid-size European city engage with local news, and whether their needs are reflected in coverage. Eight community members participated in focus groups, whose insights guided the selection of natural language processing methods (topic modeling, information retrieval, sentiment analysis, and readability) applied to over 2000 hyper-local news articles. Results showed that while articles frequently covered local events, gaps remained in topics important to participants. Sentiment analysis revealed a generally positive tone, and readability measures indicated an intermediate-advanced French level, raising questions about accessibility for integration. Our work contributes to bridging the gap between local news platforms' content and diverse readers' needs, and could inform local media organizations about opportunities to expand their current news story coverage to appeal to more diverse audiences.

AI.tldr: 研究通过焦点小组和自然语言处理分析，探讨法语移民对当地新闻的参与度以及新闻内容是否满足其需求，发现当地新闻在重要话题覆盖、可读性和可及性方面存在差距。
AI.motivation: 现有研究显示新闻消费存在人口统计学差异，但对非主流受众（特别是移民群体）在当地媒体中的参与情况了解不足。本研究旨在填补这一空白，探讨法语移民如何参与当地新闻，以及他们的需求是否在报道中得到反映。
AI.method: 采用混合方法：1）8名社区成员参与焦点小组，收集他们对当地新闻需求的见解；2）基于焦点小组的发现，应用自然语言处理方法（主题建模、信息检索、情感分析和可读性分析）分析超过2000篇超本地新闻文章。
AI.result: 结果显示：1）文章频繁报道当地事件，但在参与者认为重要的话题上存在覆盖空白；2）情感分析显示整体语调积极；3）可读性测量表明文章为中级-高级法语水平，对移民群体的可及性存在问题。
AI.conclusion: 本研究有助于弥合当地新闻平台内容与多样化读者需求之间的差距，可为当地媒体组织提供信息，帮助他们扩展新闻报道范围以吸引更多样化的受众，特别是改善对移民群体的可及性和相关性。

title: Covariance-Based Structural Equation Modeling in Small-Sample Settings with $p>n$
summary: Factor-based Structural Equation Modeling (SEM) relies on likelihood-based estimation assuming a nonsingular sample covariance matrix, which breaks down in small-sample settings with $p>n$. To address this, we propose a novel estimation principle that reformulates the covariance structure into self-covariance and cross-covariance components. The resulting framework defines a likelihood-based feasible set combined with a relative error constraint, enabling stable estimation in small-sample settings where $p>n$ for sign and direction. Experiments on synthetic and real-world data show improved stability, particularly in recovering the sign and direction of structural parameters. These results extend covariance-based SEM to small-sample settings and provide practically useful directional information for decision-making.

AI.tldr: 提出新的因子结构方程建模方法，通过重新表述协方差结构为自协方差和交叉协方差分量，解决小样本p>n情况下的估计问题。
AI.motivation: 传统基于因子的结构方程建模依赖似然估计，需要非奇异样本协方差矩阵，但在小样本p>n情况下会失效，需要新的估计方法。
AI.method: 将协方差结构重新表述为自协方差和交叉协方差分量，建立基于似然的可行集结合相对误差约束的框架，实现小样本p>n情况下的稳定估计。
AI.result: 在合成和真实数据实验中，新方法显示出改进的稳定性，特别是在恢复结构参数的符号和方向方面表现更好。
AI.conclusion: 该方法将基于协方差的SEM扩展到小样本设置，为决策提供了实用的方向性信息。

title: Intent-aligned Autonomous Spacecraft Guidance via Reasoning Models
comment: Accepted for Computer Vision and Pattern Recognition Conference (CVPR) 2026, AI4Space Workshop (4-page Short paper). 9 pages, 3 figures (including supplementary materials)
summary: Future spacecraft operations require autonomy that can interpret high-level mission intent while preserving safety. However, existing trajectory optimization still relies heavily on expert-crafted formulations and does not support intent-conditioned decision-making. This paper proposes an intent-aligned spacecraft guidance framework that links high-level reasoning and safe trajectory optimization through explicit intermediate abstractions, based on behavior sequences and waypoint constraints. A foundation model first predicts an intent-aligned behavior plan, a waypoint generation model then converts it into waypoint constraints, and the safe trajectory is computed via optimization. This decomposition enables scalable supervision without sacrificing safety. Numerical experiments in close-proximity operation scenarios demonstrate that the proposed pipeline achieves over 90\% SCP convergence and yields a $1.5\times$ higher rate of generating trajectories that satisfy the top intent-prioritized performance criteria than heuristic decision-making. These results support the use of intermediate behavior abstraction as a practical interface between foundation-model reasoning and safety-critical onboard spacecraft autonomy.

AI.tldr: 提出一个意图对齐的航天器制导框架，通过行为序列和航点约束连接高层推理与安全轨迹优化，实现超过90%的SCP收敛率。
AI.motivation: 未来航天器操作需要能够解释高层任务意图同时保证安全的自主性。现有轨迹优化方法严重依赖专家制定的公式，不支持意图条件决策。
AI.method: 提出意图对齐的航天器制导框架：基础模型预测意图对齐的行为计划，航点生成模型将其转换为航点约束，最后通过优化计算安全轨迹。
AI.result: 在近距离操作场景中，该框架实现超过90%的SCP收敛率，生成满足最高意图优先性能标准的轨迹率比启发式决策高1.5倍。
AI.conclusion: 中间行为抽象可作为基础模型推理与安全关键航天器自主性之间的实用接口，支持可扩展监督而不牺牲安全性。

title: Maximum Cuts and Fractional Cut Covers: A Computational Study of a Randomized Semidefinite Programming Approach
summary:
We present experimental work on a primal-dual framework simultaneously approximating maximum cut and weighted fractional cut-covering instances. In this primal-dual framework, we solve a semidefinite programming (SDP) relaxation to either the maximum cut problem or to the weighted fractional cut-covering problem, and then independently sample a collection of cuts via the random-hyperplane technique. We then simultaneously certify the approximate optimality of a cut and a fractional cut cover. We present several implementations which reliably achieve the celebrated Goemans and Williamson approximation ratio of $α_{\mathrm{GW}} \approx 0.878$ for both optimization problems simultaneously, after $\lceil 128 \ln m \rceil$ samples, a number significantly smaller than the best theoretical bounds.
  This is the first experimental work approximating the weighted fractional cut-covering problem, and we deliver robust and repeatable results despite the use of randomized algorithms and floating-point arithmetic. Careful pre-processing of instances and post-processing of numeric results allow for good empirical outcomes with both first-order and second-order SDP solvers. Nearly optimal SDP solutions are suitably perturbed to ensure better probabilistic and numerical behavior. Our experiments deviate from theory by using a linear programming (LP) solver to compute fractional cut covers. For most instances studied, LP solving produces certifiably better results than the theoretical algorithm after $\lceil 128 \ln m \rceil$ samples. All our experiments strictly follow a unified pipeline which explicitly documents all parameters used in each run.

AI.tldr: 该论文提出了一个同时近似最大割和加权分数割覆盖问题的原始-对偶框架实验研究，通过SDP松弛和随机超平面采样，在128ln m次采样后可靠达到0.878近似比，是首个加权分数割覆盖问题的实验工作。
AI.motivation: 研究同时解决最大割问题和加权分数割覆盖问题的实用算法，填补加权分数割覆盖问题实验研究的空白，提供可靠且可重复的随机算法实现。
AI.method: 采用原始-对偶框架：1) 求解最大割或加权分数割覆盖问题的SDP松弛；2) 使用随机超平面技术独立采样割集合；3) 同时证明割和分数割覆盖的近似最优性。使用预处理、后处理和扰动技术确保数值稳定性。
AI.result: 实验显示在⌈128ln m⌉次采样后，能可靠达到Goemans-Williamson的0.878近似比，采样次数显著少于理论界限。使用LP求解器在实践中比理论算法效果更好，所有实验遵循统一流程确保可重复性。
AI.conclusion: 这是首个加权分数割覆盖问题的实验研究，通过精心设计的数值处理和统一实验流程，实现了可靠且可重复的结果，为组合优化问题的实用算法提供了有价值的实验基准。

title: The Reliance Negotiation Framework: A Dynamic Process Model of Student LLM Engagement in Academic Writing
summary: Student engagement with large language models (LLMs) in academic writing is not a stable trait, an adoption decision, or a competency level; it is a continuously negotiated process that existing frameworks cannot adequately theorize. Typological models provide categories without mechanisms; technology acceptance models explain adoption but not post-adoption quality; AI literacy frameworks treat competency as a static predictor rather than a live input. None accounts for within-student variability across tasks, the developmental paradox whereby experience produces habituation rather than sophistication, or principled non-use as a form of ethical reasoning. This article introduces the Reliance Negotiation Framework (RNF), developed from a sequential explanatory mixed-methods study of 382 undergraduates at a public minority-serving institution in the United States (survey, N = 382; 14 semi-structured interviews; three qualitative survey strands; 1,435 coded instances). The RNF reconceptualizes LLM reliance as an ongoing negotiation among four concurrent inputs (perceived benefits, perceived risks, ethical commitments, and situational demands) with outputs that recursively modify subsequent decisions. A Two-Model Architecture accommodates the 13.0% of participants whose categorical ethical commitments foreclose negotiation entirely. The framework generates four falsifiable predictions with implications for AI literacy pedagogy, academic integrity policy, and equity-centered practice at minority-serving institutions.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了"依赖协商框架"(RNF)，用于理论化学生在学术写作中使用大语言模型(LLM)的动态过程，挑战了现有的静态分类模型。
AI.motivation: 现有框架无法充分理论化学生在学术写作中使用LLM的过程：类型学模型只有分类没有机制；技术接受模型解释采纳但不解释采纳后质量；AI素养框架将能力视为静态预测因子而非动态输入。这些框架都无法解释学生内部的任务间变异性、经验导致习惯化而非精通的"发展悖论"，或基于伦理推理的原则性不使用。
AI.method: 采用顺序解释性混合方法研究，对美国一所公立少数族裔服务机构的382名本科生进行调查(N=382)、14次半结构化访谈、三个定性调查分支，共编码1,435个实例，开发了依赖协商框架(RNF)。
AI.result: RNF将LLM依赖重新概念化为四个并发输入(感知收益、感知风险、伦理承诺和情境需求)之间的持续协商过程，其输出递归地修改后续决策。双模型架构容纳了13.0%因绝对伦理承诺而完全排除协商的参与者。框架产生了四个可证伪的预测。
AI.conclusion: RNF为AI素养教学、学术诚信政策以及少数族裔服务机构的公平中心实践提供了理论框架，强调LLM使用是一个动态协商过程而非静态特征。

title: Towards Reliable Testing of Machine Unlearning
summary: Machine learning components are now central to AI-infused software systems, from recommendations and code assistants to clinical decision support. As regulations and governance frameworks increasingly require deleting sensitive data from deployed models, machine unlearning is emerging as a practical alternative to full retraining. However, unlearning introduces a software quality-assurance challenge: under realistic deployment constraints and imperfect oracles, how can we test that a model no longer relies on targeted information? This paper frames unlearning testing as a first-class software engineering problem. We argue that practical unlearning tests must provide (i) thorough coverage over proxy and mediated influence pathways, (ii) debuggable diagnostics that localize where leakage persists, (iii) cost-effective regression-style execution under query budgets, and (iv) black-box applicability for API-deployed models. We outline a causal, pathway-centric perspective, causal fuzzing, that generates budgeted interventions to estimate residual direct and indirect effects and produce actionable "leakage reports". Proof-of-concept results illustrate that standard attribution checks can miss residual influence due to proxy pathways, cancellation effects, and subgroup masking, motivating causal testing as a promising direction for unlearning testing.

AI.tldr: 该论文将机器学习遗忘测试视为软件工程问题，提出因果模糊测试方法，通过预算干预来检测残留的直接和间接影响，生成可操作的"泄露报告"。
AI.motivation: 随着法规要求从部署模型中删除敏感数据，机器学习遗忘成为实际替代方案。但遗忘引入了软件质量保证挑战：在现实部署约束和不完美预言机下，如何测试模型不再依赖目标信息？
AI.method: 提出因果、路径中心视角的因果模糊测试方法，生成预算干预来估计残留的直接和间接影响，产生可操作的"泄露报告"。该方法需要覆盖代理和中介影响路径、提供可调试诊断、在查询预算下成本有效执行，并适用于黑盒API部署模型。
AI.result: 概念验证结果表明，标准归因检查可能因代理路径、抵消效应和子组掩蔽而错过残留影响，这促使因果测试成为遗忘测试的有前景方向。
AI.conclusion: 该论文将遗忘测试框架化为软件工程问题，提出因果模糊测试作为实用解决方案，强调需要覆盖影响路径、提供诊断、成本有效且适用于黑盒部署的测试方法。

title: Introspection Adapters: Training LLMs to Report Their Learned Behaviors
summary: When model developers or users fine-tune an LLM, this can induce behaviors that are unexpected, deliberately harmful, or hard to detect. It would be far easier to audit LLMs if they could simply describe their behaviors in natural language. Here, we study a scalable approach to rapidly identify learned behaviors of many LLMs derived from a shared base LLM. Given a model $M$, our method works by finetuning models $M_i$ from $M$ with implanted behaviors $b_i$; the $(M_i, b_i)$ pairs serve as labeled training data. We then train an \emph{introspection adapter} (IA): a single LoRA adapter jointly trained across the finetunes $M_i$ to cause them to verbalize their implanted behaviors. We find that this IA induces self-description of learned behaviors even in finetunes of $M$ that were trained in very different ways from the $M_i$. For example, IAs generalize to AuditBench, achieving state-of-the-art at identifying explicitly hidden concerning behaviors. IAs can also be used to detect encrypted finetuning API attacks. They scale favorably with model size and training data diversity. Overall, our results suggest that IAs are a scalable, effective, and practically useful approach to auditing fine-tuned LLMs.

AI.tldr: 提出一种可扩展的LLM审计方法：通过训练"内省适配器"使微调后的模型能够用自然语言描述其学习到的行为，即使这些行为被刻意隐藏。
AI.motivation: 当模型开发者或用户对LLM进行微调时，可能会诱导出意外、有害或难以检测的行为。如果LLM能够用自然语言描述自身行为，审计将变得更加容易。
AI.method: 从基础模型M微调出多个植入特定行为b_i的模型M_i，用这些(M_i, b_i)对作为训练数据，训练一个"内省适配器"——一个跨所有微调模型联合训练的LoRA适配器，使模型能够口头表达其植入的行为。
AI.result: 内省适配器能够诱导模型自我描述学习到的行为，即使这些微调模型与训练数据中的M_i训练方式完全不同。在AuditBench上达到最先进水平，能够识别明确隐藏的有害行为，并能检测加密微调API攻击。该方法随模型规模和训练数据多样性的增加而表现更好。
AI.conclusion: 内省适配器是一种可扩展、有效且实用的审计微调LLM的方法，为模型行为审计提供了新的解决方案。

title: IYKYK (But AI Doesn't): Automated Content Moderation Does Not Capture Communities' Heterogeneous Attitudes Towards Reclaimed Language
summary: Reclaimed slur usage is a common and meaningful practice online for many marginalized communities. It serves as a source of solidarity, identity, and shared experience. However, contemporary automated and AI-based moderation tools for online content largely fail to distinguish between reclaimed and hateful uses of slurs, resulting in the suppression of marginalized voices. In this work, we use quantitative and qualitative methods to examine the attitudes of social media users in LGBTQIA+, Black, and women communities around reclaimed slurs targeting our focus groups including the f-word, n-word, and b-word. With social media users from these communities, we collect and analyze an annotated online slur usage corpus. The corpus includes annotators' perceptions of whether an online text containing a slur should be flagged as hate speech, as well as contextual features of the slur usage. Across all communities and annotation questions, we observe low inter-annotator agreement, indicating substantial disagreement among in-group annotators. This is compounded by the fact that, absent clear contextual signals of identity and intent, even in-group members may disagree on how to interpret reclaimed slur usage online. Semi-structured interviews with annotators suggest that differences in lived experience and personal history contribute to this variation as well. We find poor alignment between annotator judgments and automated hate speech assessments produced by Perspective API. We further observe that certain features of a text such as whether the slur usage was derogatory and if the slur was targeted at oneself are more associated with whether annotators report the text as hate speech. Together, these findings highlight the inherent subjectivity and contextual nature of how marginalized communities interpret slurs online.

AI.tldr: 研究探讨边缘化社群在线使用"回收污名词"的现象，发现AI审核工具难以区分回收使用与仇恨言论，导致边缘化声音被压制，且社群内部对污名词的解读存在显著分歧。
AI.motivation: 边缘化社群在线使用"回收污名词"（如LGBTQIA+、黑人和女性社群使用的特定词汇）是表达团结、身份认同和共享经验的重要方式。然而，当前的自动化AI审核工具无法区分回收使用与仇恨性使用，导致边缘化声音被不当压制，需要深入研究社群内部对这些词汇使用的态度和解读。
AI.method: 采用定量和定性混合方法：1）收集并分析来自LGBTQIA+、黑人和女性社群的在线污名词使用语料库，包含标注者的感知判断；2）测量标注者间一致性；3）使用半结构化访谈了解标注者的个人经历和解读差异；4）比较人工标注与Perspective API自动仇恨言论评估的一致性；5）分析文本特征（如是否贬义、是否针对自己）与标注决策的关系。
AI.result: 1）所有社群和标注问题中都观察到较低的标注者间一致性，表明社群内部对污名词解读存在显著分歧；2）缺乏明确的身份和意图上下文信号时，即使社群内部成员也可能对回收使用有不同解读；3）访谈显示生活经历和个人历史差异导致解读差异；4）人工标注与Perspective API自动评估一致性差；5）文本特征如是否贬义、是否针对自己与标注为仇恨言论的决策更相关。
AI.conclusion: 边缘化社群对在线污名词的解读具有固有的主观性和语境依赖性。当前AI审核工具无法捕捉这种复杂性，导致对边缘化声音的不当压制。研究强调需要开发更细致、考虑社群内部多样性和语境因素的审核方法，而不是一刀切的自动化解决方案。

title: Power Flow Solvability with Volt-Var Controlled Inverter-Based Resources
summary: This paper establishes a sufficient condition for guaranteeing power flow solvability in distribution grids with inverter-based resources (IBRs) operating under IEEE 1547 compliant Volt-Var control. While designed to improve voltage profiles, reactive power injection can drive the system toward its operational limits. Under these stressed conditions, any further incremental reactive power injection can trigger voltage collapse, the point at which a power flow solution ceases to exist. In this paper, by leveraging a phasor-based voltage representation, the power flow equations with Volt-Var control are developed in the complex fixed point form, enabling a compact formulation and the rigorous application of fixed-point theorems. Addressing the challenges posed by the non-holomorphicity of the complex power flow equations due to the Volt-Var function's dependence on voltage magnitude, the solvability conditions are then developed using the Brouwer fixed-point theorem. The proposed conditions are validated through simulations on distribution test feeders, with a primary focus on their application to real-time decision-making for voltage regulation services.

AI.tldr: 该论文建立了在采用IEEE 1547兼容的Volt-Var控制的逆变器资源配电系统中保证潮流可解性的充分条件，通过固定点定理分析电压崩溃点。
AI.motivation: 虽然Volt-Var控制旨在改善电压分布，但无功功率注入可能将系统推向运行极限，在压力条件下，任何进一步的无功功率增量注入都可能触发电压崩溃，导致潮流解不存在。
AI.method: 利用基于相量的电压表示，将带有Volt-Var控制的潮流方程表示为复数固定点形式，通过Brouwer固定点定理处理由于Volt-Var函数依赖电压幅值导致的非全纯性挑战，建立可解性条件。
AI.result: 提出的可解性条件在配电测试馈线上通过仿真验证，主要关注其在电压调节服务实时决策中的应用。
AI.conclusion: 该研究为采用Volt-Var控制的逆变器资源配电系统提供了保证潮流可解性的充分条件，有助于预防电压崩溃并支持实时电压调节决策。

title: Steady-state Based Approach to Online Non-stochastic Control
comment: Under review for presentation at a conference
summary: We study the problem of online non-stochastic control (ONC), which is the control of a linear system under adversarial disturbances and adversarial cost functions, with the aim of minimizing the total cost incurred. A recent line of literature in ONC develops algorithms that enjoy sublinear regret with respect to a benchmark based on the set of steady-states that are attainable by a constant input. In this work, we extend this research direction by giving an algorithm that enjoys $\mathcal{O}(\sqrt{T})$ regret with respect to a richer benchmark set, namely the set of steady-states attainable under an \emph{affine controller}. Since this benchmark substantially broadens the comparison class, it provides significantly stronger performance guarantees. Our proposed algorithm combines a Follow-The-Perturbed-Leader-style online non-convex optimization approach with a batching method that maintains stability despite changing policies. Although our proposed algorithm requires solving non-convex subproblems, we show that an approximate solution to this subproblem is sufficient to ensure $\mathcal{O}(\sqrt{T})$ regret. Furthermore, numerical experiments show that our algorithm enjoys lower total cost and similar computation to existing methods in certain settings.

AI.tldr: 提出一种在线非随机控制算法，通过使用仿射控制器作为基准，实现O(√T)的遗憾界，相比现有方法提供更强的性能保证。
AI.motivation: 现有在线非随机控制算法通常以恒定输入可达的稳态作为基准，这限制了性能比较的范围。作者希望扩展这一研究方向，使用更丰富的仿射控制器可达稳态作为基准，从而提供更强的性能保证。
AI.method: 结合Follow-The-Perturbed-Leader风格的在线非凸优化方法和批处理方法，即使策略变化也能保持系统稳定性。虽然需要解决非凸子问题，但证明近似解已足够保证O(√T)遗憾界。
AI.result: 算法实现了O(√T)的遗憾界，相对于仿射控制器可达稳态基准。数值实验表明在某些设置下，该算法具有更低的总成本和相似的计算复杂度。
AI.conclusion: 通过扩展基准集到仿射控制器可达稳态，提出了更强的在线非随机控制算法，在保持计算效率的同时提供更好的性能保证。

title: The Effects of Request Alerts on the Diversity and Visibility of Community Notes
summary: Several major social media platforms have shifted toward crowdsourced fact-checking systems like Community Notes to combat misinformation at scale. However, these systems face criticism regarding which content is scrutinized and how visible that scrutiny is. To address these concerns, X allows users to request community notes for specific posts. When sufficient requests accumulate, X displays an alert, formalizing an interface cue intended to guide contributor behavior. In this study, we examine the effectiveness of request alerts. We infer the presence of request alerts at the time each note was written and identify 318 top writers who were repeatedly exposed to these alerts. Through analyzing their contributed 54,874 English notes written with and without request alerts, we find that at the individual level, writers fact-check more diverse and more political content under alerts. Nonetheless, at the collective level, these shifts direct contributions toward the already dominant Politics and Conflict category, thereby increasing content inequality within the Community Notes ecosystem. Finally, using a mixed-effects model that controls for both writer- and topic-level random effects, we estimate that notes written under alerts are between 8.4 and 20.2 percentage points more likely to be classified as helpful and thus visible to the public, compared to non-alerted notes. This visibility gain diminishes as topics diverge further from writers' prior interests, demonstrating a pivot penalty effect. Taken together, our findings show that request alerts function as an effective interface cue that increases both topical diversity and note visibility in Community Notes.

AI.tldr: 研究显示X平台的社区笔记请求提醒功能能增加事实核查的多样性和笔记可见性，但会加剧内容不平等，向政治类内容集中。
AI.motivation: 社交媒体平台采用众包事实核查系统（如社区笔记）应对大规模错误信息，但面临内容审查范围和可见性的批评。X平台允许用户请求对特定帖子进行社区笔记核查，当请求积累到一定数量时会显示提醒，本研究旨在评估这种请求提醒的有效性。
AI.method: 研究推断每个笔记撰写时是否存在请求提醒，识别出318名多次接触提醒的顶级作者。分析他们撰写的54,874条英文笔记（有提醒和无提醒情况下），使用混合效应模型控制作者和主题层面的随机效应，评估提醒对笔记质量和可见性的影响。
AI.result: 在个体层面，作者在有提醒时会核查更多样化和更多政治内容；但在集体层面，这些转变使贡献更集中于已占主导的政治与冲突类别，加剧内容不平等。有提醒的笔记被分类为"有帮助"（从而对公众可见）的可能性高出8.4-20.2个百分点，但当主题偏离作者先前兴趣时，可见性增益会减弱（存在"转向惩罚"效应）。
AI.conclusion: 请求提醒作为有效的界面提示，能增加社区笔记的主题多样性和笔记可见性，但也会导致内容向政治类集中，加剧生态系统内的不平等。这揭示了界面设计在引导众包事实核查行为时的复杂影响。

title: An Interpretable Framework Applying Protein Words to Predict Protein-Small Molecule Complementary Pairing Rules
summary: Despite the high accuracy of 'black box' deep learning models, drug discovery still relies on protein-ligand interaction principles and heuristics. To improve interpretability of protein-small molecule binding predictions, we developed the PWRules framework, which applies binding affinity data to identify privileged small molecule fragments and subsequently defines complementary pairing rules between these fragments and protein words (semantic sequence units) through an interpretability module. The resulting word-fragment rules are then ranked by the PWScore function to prioritize active compounds. Evaluations on benchmark datasets show that PWScore achieves competitive performance comparable to the physics-based model (Glide) and the deep learning model (PSICHIC) and shows broad applicability for protein targets outside the training dataset, e.g., SARS-CoV-2 main protease. Notably, PWScore captures complementary interaction information, yielding superior enrichment performance when integrated with these established methods. Structural analysis of protein-ligand complexes indicates that learned word-fragment rules are significantly enriched near ligand-binding pockets, despite training without explicit structural guidance. By extracting and applying complementary pairing rules, PWRules provides an interpretable framework for drug discovery.

AI.tldr: PWRules是一个可解释的蛋白质-小分子结合预测框架，通过识别特权小分子片段和蛋白质语义序列单元之间的互补配对规则，提供可解释的药物发现方法。
AI.motivation: 尽管深度学习模型在蛋白质-小分子结合预测中具有高准确性，但药物发现仍然依赖蛋白质-配体相互作用原理和启发式方法。现有"黑盒"模型缺乏可解释性，限制了其在药物发现中的应用。
AI.method: 开发PWRules框架：1) 利用结合亲和力数据识别特权小分子片段；2) 通过可解释性模块定义这些片段与蛋白质"词"（语义序列单元）之间的互补配对规则；3) 使用PWScore函数对词-片段规则进行排序以优先选择活性化合物。
AI.result: 在基准数据集上，PWScore达到与物理模型（Glide）和深度学习模型（PSICHIC）相当的性能，对训练集外的蛋白质靶点（如SARS-CoV-2主要蛋白酶）具有广泛适用性。与现有方法集成时显示出优越的富集性能。结构分析表明，学习的词-片段规则在配体结合口袋附近显著富集。
AI.conclusion: 通过提取和应用互补配对规则，PWRules为药物发现提供了一个可解释的框架，能够捕获蛋白质-小分子相互作用的互补信息，无需显式结构指导即可学习有意义的结合规则。

title: PersonalHomeBench: Evaluating Agents in Personalized Smart Homes
summary: Agentic AI systems are rapidly advancing toward real-world applications, yet their readiness in complex and personalized environments remains insufficiently characterized. To address this gap, we introduce PersonalHomeBench, a benchmark for evaluating foundation models as agentic assistants in personalized smart home environments. The benchmark is constructed through an iterative process that progressively builds rich household states, which are then used to generate personalized, context-dependent tasks. To support realistic agent-environment interaction, we provide PersonalHomeTools, a comprehensive toolbox enabling household information retrieval, appliance control, and situational understanding. PersonalHomeBench evaluates both reactive and proactive agentic abilities under unimodal and multimodal observations. Thorough experimentation reveals a systematic performance reduction as task complexity increases, with pronounced failures in counterfactual reasoning and under partial observability, where effective tool-based information gathering is required. These results position PersonalHomeBench as a rigorous evaluation platform for analyzing the robustness and limitations of personalized agentic reasoning and planning.

AI.tldr: 提出了PersonalHomeBench基准，用于评估基础模型在个性化智能家居环境中的代理能力，包含丰富的家庭状态和个性化任务，支持多模态观察和工具使用。
AI.motivation: 尽管代理AI系统在现实应用中快速发展，但在复杂个性化环境中的准备度仍缺乏充分评估。需要专门的基准来测试智能家居环境中的个性化代理能力。
AI.method: 通过迭代过程构建丰富的家庭状态，生成个性化、上下文相关的任务。提供PersonalHomeTools工具箱支持家庭信息检索、设备控制和情境理解。评估反应式和主动式代理能力，支持单模态和多模态观察。
AI.result: 实验显示随着任务复杂度增加，系统性能下降明显，在反事实推理和部分可观察性方面存在显著失败，需要有效的基于工具的信息收集。
AI.conclusion: PersonalHomeBench为分析个性化代理推理和规划的鲁棒性与局限性提供了严格的评估平台。

title: Defragmenting Language Models: An Interpretability-based Approach for Vocabulary Expansion
summary: All languages are equal; when it comes to tokenization, some are more equal than others. Tokens are the hidden currency that dictate the cost and latency of access to contemporary LLMs. However, many languages written in non-Latin scripts observe a poor exchange rate: LLMs take several multiples of tokens to encode the same information in many languages as they do for English. Our analysis reveals that this issue, known as 'token over-fragmentation', persists in modern open-weight LLMs. The standard remedy is vocabulary expansion that adds target language items missing from the model's vocabulary. In this work, we comprehensively study and advance interpretability-based vocabulary expansion, a new research direction. We focus on two core decisions in the vocabulary expansion process: What items should we add? and How should we initialize their corresponding input and output embeddings? First, we question the conventional use of frequency-based methods to choose candidate vocabulary items to add (a decision long treated as settled), and show that interpretability-based methods offer a superior performance-token efficiency trade-off. Next, we strengthen the case for interpretability-based embedding initialization by showing large gains (~20 pts) over baseline initialization methods for several languages written in non-Latin scripts. We identify the phenomenon of "subword detokenization" where models progressively merge fragmented subword tokens into larger subwords across layers. Grounded in our analysis of this phenomenon, we propose FragMend to further push the efficiency ceiling of interpretability-based expansion. We validate the effectiveness of FragMend through comparison against strong baselines and we present extensive analysis of its design choices.

AI.tldr: 该论文研究LLM中非拉丁文字语言的token过度碎片化问题，提出基于可解释性的词汇扩展方法FragMend，显著提升多语言处理效率。
AI.motivation: 当前LLM在处理非拉丁文字语言时存在token过度碎片化问题，导致相同信息需要更多token，增加了计算成本和延迟。虽然词汇扩展是标准解决方案，但传统方法（如基于频率的选择）效果有限。
AI.method: 提出基于可解释性的词汇扩展方法：1）使用可解释性方法而非频率方法选择要添加的词汇项；2）基于"子词去token化"现象分析，提出FragMend方法优化嵌入初始化；3）系统研究词汇扩展中的核心决策问题。
AI.result: 可解释性方法在性能-token效率权衡上优于传统频率方法；基于可解释性的嵌入初始化比基线方法提升约20个百分点；FragMend进一步提升了基于可解释性扩展的效率上限。
AI.conclusion: 基于可解释性的词汇扩展是解决非拉丁文字语言token过度碎片化的有效方向，FragMend方法通过优化词汇选择和嵌入初始化，显著提升了多语言LLM的处理效率。

title: LASER: Low-Rank Activation SVD for Efficient Recursion
comment: Accepted to the Latent and Implicit Thinking Workshop at ICLR 2026
summary: Recursive architectures such as Tiny Recursive Models (TRMs) perform implicit reasoning through iterative latent computation, yet the geometric structure of these reasoning trajectories remains poorly understood. We investigate the activation manifold of TRMs during recursive unrolling and find that activations occupy an effectively linear, low-dimensional subspace whose principal directions can be tracked dynamically with cheap power iterations. This suggests that weight-sharing concentrates iterative computation along a small number of dominant eigendirections, and we find that this concentration varies sharply across computational sites. We exploit this structure through LASER (Low-Rank Activation SVD for Efficient Recursion), a dynamic compression framework that maintains an evolving low-rank basis via matrix-free subspace tracking with a fidelity-triggered reset mechanism, achieving ${\sim}60\%$ activation memory savings with no statistically significant accuracy degradation. Our analysis raises questions about how recursive architectures allocate representational capacity during implicit reasoning, and whether this concentration can be exploited to improve the efficiency and stability of latent computation.

AI.tldr: 论文研究了递归模型激活轨迹的几何结构，发现其占据低维线性子空间，并提出了基于动态压缩的LASER框架以节省内存。
AI.motivation: 递归架构通过隐式推理进行迭代潜在计算，但这些推理轨迹的几何结构尚不清楚。研究旨在理解递归展开过程中激活流形的结构特征。
AI.method: 分析TRMs激活流形，发现其占据有效线性低维子空间；提出LASER框架，通过矩阵无关的子空间跟踪和保真度触发重置机制实现动态压缩。
AI.result: 发现权重共享将迭代计算集中在少量主导特征方向上，且这种集中程度在不同计算位置差异显著；LASER实现了约60%的激活内存节省，无显著精度损失。
AI.conclusion: 递归架构在隐式推理中分配表征容量的方式值得深入探讨，这种集中特性可用于提高潜在计算的效率和稳定性。

title: Bilinear Input Modulation for Mamba: Koopman Bilinear Forms for Memory Retention and Multiplicative Computation
comment: 6 pages, 5 figures, submitted to IEEE Control Systems Letters (L-CSS)
summary: Selective State Space Models (SSMs), notably Mamba, employ diagonal state transitions that limit both memory retention and bilinear computational capacity. We propose a factorized bilinear input modulation that augments the SSM with a state-input product, interpretable as a finite-dimensional Koopman bilinear form. After introducing a shared state across channels (Coupled SSM), the modulation admits two implementations. Coupled Bilinear Input Modulation (Coupled-BIM) retains the full bilinear product at the cost of sequential computation, while Coupled Gated Modulation (Coupled-GM) linearizes it into a gate modulation that is compatible with the parallel scan. Experiments on a multiple input-delay pendulum (memory retention) and NARMA-10 (bilinear computation) reveal a clear dissociation. Coupled-GM substantially improves memory retention but not bilinear computation, while Coupled-BIM improves both. A pathway ablation confirms that the two downstream routes of the bilinear signal serve complementary roles. The improvement is statistically robust, with Coupled-BIM consistently outperforming all other variants on bilinear computation. Furthermore, only Coupled-BIM benefits from increasing the SSM state dimension, while coupling or gate modulation alone show no improvement, establishing the bilin-ear mechanism as uniquely capable of exploiting larger state spaces.

AI.tldr: 提出两种耦合SSM变体：Coupled-BIM保留完整双线性乘积但需顺序计算，Coupled-GM线性化为门调制兼容并行扫描。前者在记忆保持和双线性计算上均有提升，后者仅改善记忆保持。
AI.motivation: 传统SSM（如Mamba）使用对角状态转移，限制了记忆保持能力和双线性计算能力。需要增强SSM以处理需要记忆保留和双线性计算的任务。
AI.method: 提出因子化双线性输入调制，将状态-输入乘积引入SSM，解释为有限维Koopman双线性形式。在通道间共享状态（耦合SSM）后，提出两种实现：Coupled-BIM（完整双线性乘积）和Coupled-GM（线性化门调制）。
AI.result: 在多输入延迟摆（记忆保持）和NARMA-10（双线性计算）实验中，Coupled-GM显著改善记忆保持但未改善双线性计算，而Coupled-BIM两者均改善。Coupled-BIM在双线性计算上始终优于其他变体，且只有它能从增加SSM状态维度中受益。
AI.conclusion: 双线性机制是唯一能有效利用更大状态空间的方法。完整双线性乘积对于提升SSM的双线性计算能力至关重要，而门调制仅能改善记忆保持。两种下游路径具有互补作用。

title: A Numerical Analysis for Pursuit-Evasion Games under the Stackelberg Eqilibrium
comment: 15 pages, 6 figures. English translation of a paper originally published in Japanese in the Journal of the Japan Society for Aeronautical and Space Sciences, Vol.63, No.5, pp.204--209 (2015). This version is posted on arXiv to improve accessibility and facilitate broader to dissemination to an international audience
summary: This study presents a numerical analysis framework for pursuit--evasion differential games under the Stackelberg equilibrium. The Semi-DCNLP method is introduced as an optimization solver for flight path optimization problems formulated under the Stackelberg equilibrium. In a spacecraft pursuit-evasion differential game, the Semi-DCNLP method produces trajectories that closely match those obtained with a shooting method. This agreement supports the validity of the proposed approach.

AI.tldr: 提出基于Stackelberg均衡的追逃微分博弈数值分析框架，采用Semi-DCNLP方法求解飞行路径优化问题
AI.motivation: 需要为Stackelberg均衡下的追逃微分博弈开发有效的数值分析框架和优化求解方法
AI.method: 提出Semi-DCNLP方法作为Stackelberg均衡下飞行路径优化问题的优化求解器
AI.result: 在航天器追逃微分博弈中，Semi-DCNLP方法生成的轨迹与射击法结果高度一致
AI.conclusion: Semi-DCNLP方法有效且可靠，为Stackelberg均衡下的追逃微分博弈提供了有效的数值分析框架

title: All Public Voices Are Equal, But Are Some More Equal Than Others to LLMs?
summary: Federal agencies are increasingly deploying large language models (LLMs) to process public comments submitted during notice-and-comment rulemaking, the primary mechanism through which citizens influence federal regulation. Whether these systems treat all public input equally remains largely untested. Using a counterfactual design, we held comment content constant and varied only the commenter's demographic attribution -- race, gender, and socioeconomic status -- to test whether eight LLMs available for federal use produce differential summaries of identical comments. We processed 182 public comments across 32 identity conditions, generating over 106,000 summaries. Occupation was the only identity signal to produce consistent differential treatment: the same comment attributed to a street vendor, compared to a financial analyst, received a summary that preserved less of the original meaning, used simpler language, and shifted emotional tone. This pattern held across all names, prompts, models, and regulatory contexts tested. Race effects were inconsistent and appeared driven by specific name tokens rather than racial categories; gender effects were absent. Writing quality predicted summarization outcomes through argument substance rather than surface mechanics; experimentally injected spelling and grammar errors had negligible effects. The magnitude of occupation-based differential treatment varied by model provider, meaning that selecting a model implicitly selects a level of fairness -- a dimension that current procurement frameworks such as FedRAMP do not evaluate. These findings suggest that socioeconomic signals warrant attention in AI fairness assessments for government information systems, and that fairness benchmarks could be incorporated into existing federal IT procurement processes.

AI.tldr: 研究发现联邦机构使用的LLMs在处理公众评论时，会根据评论者的职业产生差异化的摘要处理，但对种族和性别信号的影响较小。
AI.motivation: 随着联邦机构越来越多地使用大型语言模型处理公众评论，需要测试这些系统是否平等对待所有公众输入，特别是不同身份属性的评论者是否受到公平对待。
AI.method: 采用反事实设计，保持评论内容不变，仅改变评论者的人口统计属性（种族、性别、社会经济地位），测试8个联邦可用LLMs对相同评论的摘要差异。处理了182条公众评论，涉及32种身份条件，生成了超过106,000个摘要。
AI.result: 职业是唯一产生一致性差异处理的身份信号：相同评论被归因于街头小贩时，相比金融分析师，摘要保留更少的原始含义，使用更简单的语言，情感基调发生偏移。种族效应不一致且似乎由特定姓名标记驱动；性别效应不存在。写作质量通过论证实质而非表面机制预测摘要结果。
AI.conclusion: 社会经济信号在政府信息系统的AI公平性评估中值得关注，公平性基准可以纳入现有的联邦IT采购流程，因为模型选择隐含着公平性水平的选择。

title: LLM as a Tool, Not an Agent: Code-Mined Tree Transformations for Neural Architecture Search
summary: Neural Architecture Search (NAS) aims to automatically discover high-performing deep neural network (DNN) architectures. However, conventional algorithm-driven NAS relies on carefully hand-crafted search spaces to ensure executability, which restricts open-ended exploration. Recent coding-based agentic approaches using large language models (LLMs) reduce manual design, but current LLMs struggle to reliably generate complex, valid architectures, and their proposals are often biased toward a narrow set of patterns observed in their training data. To bridge reliable algorithmic search with powerful LLM assistance, we propose LLMasTool, a hierarchical tree-based NAS framework for stable and open-ended model evolution. Our method automatically extracts reusable modules from arbitrary source code and represents full architectures as hierarchical trees, enabling evolution through reliable tree transformations rather than code generation. At each evolution step, coarse-level planning is governed by a diversity-guided algorithm that leverages Bayesian modeling to improve exploration efficiency, while the LLM resolves the remaining degrees of freedom to ensure a meaningful evolutionary trajectory and an executable generated architecture. With this formulation, instead of fully agentic LLM approaches, our method explores diverse directions beyond the inherent biases in the LLM. Our method improves over existing NAS methods by 0.69, 1.83, and 2.68 points on CIFAR-10, CIFAR-100, and ImageNet16-120, demonstrating its effectiveness.

AI.tldr: LLMasTool：一种结合算法搜索与LLM辅助的分层树状NAS框架，通过模块化提取和树变换实现稳定、开放式的神经网络架构演化
AI.motivation: 传统NAS依赖手工设计的搜索空间限制了开放式探索，而基于LLM的编码方法又存在生成复杂架构不可靠和训练数据偏见的问题，需要结合算法可靠性和LLM强大能力的新方法
