AI.method: 提出分层树状NAS框架：1）从任意源代码自动提取可重用模块；2）将完整架构表示为分层树；3）通过树变换而非代码生成进行演化；4）粗粒度规划使用基于贝叶斯建模的多样性引导算法；5）LLM解决剩余自由度确保可执行性
AI.result: 在CIFAR-10、CIFAR-100和ImageNet16-120上分别比现有NAS方法提升0.69、1.83和2.68个点，证明了方法的有效性
AI.conclusion: LLMasTool成功结合了算法搜索的可靠性和LLM的辅助能力，实现了超越LLM固有偏见的多样化探索，为开放式神经网络架构搜索提供了稳定有效的解决方案

title: The CTLNet for Shanghai Composite Index Prediction
summary: Shanghai Composite Index prediction has become a hot issue for many investors and academic researchers. Deep learning models are widely applied in multivariate time series forecasting, including recurrent neural networks (RNN), convolutional neural networks (CNN), and transformers. Specifically, the Transformer encoder, with its unique attention mechanism and parallel processing capabilities, has become an important tool in time series prediction, and has an advantage in dealing with long sequence dependencies and multivariate data correlations. Drawing on the strengths of various models, we propose the CNN-Transformer-LSTM Networks (CTLNet). This paper explores the application of CTLNet for Shanghai Composite Index prediction and the comparative experiments show that the proposed model outperforms state-of-the-art baselines.

AI.tldr: 提出CNN-Transformer-LSTM网络(CTLNet)用于上证指数预测，结合多种深度学习模型优势，实验表明优于现有基准方法
AI.motivation: 上证指数预测对投资者和学术研究者都很重要，深度学习模型在多元时间序列预测中广泛应用，但需要结合不同模型的优势来提升预测性能
AI.method: 提出CNN-Transformer-LSTM网络(CTLNet)，结合CNN的局部特征提取、Transformer的注意力机制和并行处理能力、以及LSTM的序列建模优势
AI.result: 对比实验表明，提出的CTLNet模型在预测上证指数方面优于现有的最先进基准方法
AI.conclusion: CTLNet模型通过结合多种深度学习架构的优势，在上证指数预测任务中取得了更好的性能，为金融时间序列预测提供了有效解决方案

authors: A. B. M. Alim Al Islam
title: CBRS: Cognitive Blood Request System with Bilingual Dataset and Dual-Layer Filtering for Multi-Platform Social Streams
comment: Accepted to Findings of the ACL 2026
summary: Urgent blood donation seeking posts and messages on social media often go unnoticed due to the overwhelming volume of daily communications. Traditional app-based systems, reliant on manual input, struggle to reach users in low-resource settings, delaying critical responses. To address this, we introduce the Cognitive Blood Request System (CBRS), a multi-platform framework that efficiently filters and parses blood donation requests from social media streams using a cost-efficient dual-layered architecture. To do so, we curate a novel dataset of 11K parsed blood donation request messages in Bengali, English, and transliterated Bengali, capturing the linguistic diversity of real social media communications. The inclusion of adversarial negatives further enhances the robustness of our model. CBRS achieves an impressive 99% accuracy and precision in filtering, surpassing benchmark methods. In the parsing task, our LoRA finetuned Llama-3.2-3B model achieves 92% zero-shot accuracy, surpassing the base model by 41.54% and exceeding the few-shot performance of GPT-4o-mini, Gemini-2.0-Flash, and other LLMs, while resulting in a 35X reduction in input token usage. This work lays a robust foundation for scalable, inclusive information extraction in time-sensitive, object-focused tasks. Our code, dataset, and trained models are publicly available at [https://github.com/aaniksahaa/CBRS](https://github.com/aaniksahaa/CBRS).

AI.tldr: CBRS是一个多平台认知血液请求系统，使用双层架构从社交媒体中高效过滤和解析血液捐赠请求，在孟加拉语、英语和音译孟加拉语的11K数据集上达到99%过滤准确率，解析任务零样本准确率92%
AI.motivation: 社交媒体上的紧急血液捐赠请求常被海量信息淹没，传统应用系统依赖手动输入且在低资源环境下难以触达用户，导致关键响应延迟
AI.method: 提出认知血液请求系统(CBRS)，采用成本效益高的双层架构：1) 过滤层从社交媒体流中筛选血液捐赠请求；2) 解析层提取关键信息。使用包含对抗性负样本的11K多语言数据集，采用LoRA微调的Llama-3.2-3B模型进行解析
AI.result: CBRS在过滤任务上达到99%准确率和精确率，超越基准方法。解析任务中，LoRA微调的Llama-3.2-3B模型零样本准确率92%，比基础模型提升41.54%，超越GPT-4o-mini、Gemini-2.0-Flash等LLM的少样本性能，输入token使用减少35倍
AI.conclusion: CBRS为时间敏感、对象聚焦的任务提供了可扩展、包容性强的信息提取基础框架，代码、数据集和训练模型已开源

title: Contraction and Hourglass Persistence for Learning on Graphs, Simplices, and Cells
comment: 31 pages, 6 figures, 4 algorithms, 2 tables. Accepted at ICLR 2026
summary: Persistent homology (PH) encodes global information, such as cycles, and is thus increasingly integrated into graph neural networks (GNNs). PH methods in GNNs typically traverse an increasing sequence of subgraphs. In this work, we first expose limitations of this inclusion procedure. To remedy these shortcomings, we analyze contractions as a principled topological operation, in particular, for graph representation learning. We study the persistence of contraction sequences, which we call Contraction Homology (CH). We establish that forward PH and CH differ in expressivity. We then introduce Hourglass Persistence, a class of topological descriptors that interleave a sequence of inclusions and contractions to boost expressivity, learnability, and stability. We also study related families parametrized by two paradigms. We also discuss how our framework extends to simplicial and cellular networks. We further design efficient algorithms that are pluggable into end-to-end differentiable GNN pipelines, enabling consistent empirical improvements over many PH methods across standard real-world graph datasets. Code is available at \href{https://github.com/Aalto-QuML/Hourglass}{this https URL}.

AI.tldr: Hourglass Persistence：一种结合包含和收缩序列的拓扑描述符，用于提升图神经网络的表达能力、可学习性和稳定性
AI.motivation: 传统持久同调方法在图神经网络中通常使用包含序列，但这种方法存在局限性。为了克服这些限制，作者探索收缩作为拓扑操作，并研究如何结合包含和收缩来提升性能。
AI.method: 提出收缩同调（CH）概念，分析收缩序列的持久性。然后引入Hourglass Persistence，这是一种在包含和收缩序列之间交错进行的拓扑描述符。还设计了可微分的高效算法，可集成到端到端的GNN流程中。
AI.result: 在多个真实世界图数据集上，该方法相比许多持久同调方法都取得了稳定的经验改进。代码已开源。
AI.conclusion: 通过结合包含和收缩序列的Hourglass Persistence框架，能够提升图表示学习的表达能力、可学习性和稳定性，并且可扩展到单纯复形和细胞网络。

title: Distributed Nesterov Flows for Multi-agent Optimization
summary: Various distributed gradient descent algorithms for multi-agent optimization have incorporated the Nesterov accelerated gradient method, where the use of momentum enhances convergence rates. These algorithms have found broad applications in large-scale machine learning and optimization owing to their simplicity and low communication complexity. In this paper, we establish a continuous-time approximation of distributed Nesterov gradient descent. The convergence properties and convergence rate of the resulting distributed Nesterov flow are analyzed using Lyapunov methods. Building on these insights, we design new parameter choices within the flow, from which we derive flow-inspired discrete-time algorithms for multi-agent optimization. Surprisingly, the resulting algorithms achieve faster convergence compared to existing distributed gradient descent methods: they require fewer iterations to reach the same accuracy for strongly convex functions and exhibit an improved convergence rate for general convex functions without incurring additional communication rounds. Furthermore, we investigate the influence of the network topology on algorithm performance and derive an explicit relationship between the convergence rate and the graph condition number. Numerical simulations are presented to validate the effectiveness of the proposed approach.

AI.tldr: 提出分布式Nesterov梯度下降的连续时间近似，分析其收敛性，并基于此设计新的离散时间算法，在相同通信轮数下获得更快收敛
AI.motivation: 现有分布式梯度下降算法结合了Nesterov加速梯度方法，利用动量提高收敛速度，在大规模机器学习和优化中应用广泛。但需要进一步改进收敛性能
AI.method: 建立分布式Nesterov梯度下降的连续时间近似（分布式Nesterov流），使用Lyapunov方法分析其收敛性，基于这些洞察设计新的参数选择，推导出流启发的离散时间算法
AI.result: 新算法相比现有分布式梯度下降方法收敛更快：强凸函数需要更少迭代达到相同精度，一般凸函数收敛率提高，且不增加通信轮数。还建立了收敛率与图条件数的显式关系
AI.conclusion: 通过连续时间近似分析分布式Nesterov梯度下降，设计的新算法在相同通信复杂度下获得更快收敛，数值模拟验证了方法的有效性

title: An Exact Algorithm for Public Transport Line Planning Considering Passenger and Operational Costs and Lost Demand
summary: Line planning in public transport is the strategic problem of selecting lines and their operating frequencies. This problem is important as it defines the passenger service, based on available connections and expected travel times, and drives operational cost in terms of the number of vehicles required. This paper presents a line planning model that minimizes the weighted sum of passenger travel time, including in-vehicle time and frequency-dependent waiting and transfer times, and operating costs for the public transport agency. Unlike traditional approaches that assume demand to be fixed, our approach requires a minimum service level for demand to be captured, ensuring that services are provided only when they are attractive to users and cost-efficient to operate. The introduced capacity constraints ensure sufficient capacity on the lines and help guide the trade-off between expected demand on selected lines and their frequencies. The resulting mixed-integer program presents a challenging combinatorial problem as the number of passenger paths grows rapidly in relation to the number of lines and frequencies considered. To address this, we propose an iterative exact algorithm that utilizes a reduced problem representation and dynamically expands it with additional frequencies and paths. Evaluated on four networks with varying complexity and cost trade-offs, our method achieves significant speed-ups and tighter bounds compared to solving the complete model directly by CPLEX, particularly when operator and passenger costs are more evenly balanced in the objective. Furthermore, we demonstrate how accounting for lost demand leads to more efficient resource use from an overall perspective.

AI.tldr: 提出一个考虑需求捕获的公交线路规划模型，最小化乘客旅行时间与运营成本，并开发迭代精确算法处理大规模组合问题
AI.motivation: 传统公交线路规划假设需求固定，但实际中服务需要足够吸引力才能吸引乘客。需要平衡乘客服务质量和运营成本，同时考虑需求对服务水平的敏感性。
AI.method: 建立混合整数规划模型，最小化加权乘客旅行时间（车内时间、等待时间、换乘时间）和运营成本。引入最低服务水平约束确保需求捕获，添加容量约束指导需求与频率权衡。开发迭代精确算法，使用简化问题表示并动态扩展频率和路径。
AI.result: 在四个不同复杂度和成本权衡的网络上评估，相比直接使用CPLEX求解完整模型，该方法获得显著加速和更紧的界限，特别是在运营成本和乘客成本更平衡时。考虑需求损失能提高整体资源利用效率。
AI.conclusion: 提出的模型和算法能有效解决考虑需求捕获的公交线路规划问题，在计算效率和解决方案质量上表现优异，为公交规划提供了更实用的方法。

title: PsychBench: Auditing Epidemiological Fidelity in Large Language Model Mental Health Simulations
summary: Large language models are increasingly deployed to simulate patients for clinical training, research, and mental health tools, yet population-level validity remains largely untested. We introduce PsychBench, the first epidemiological audit of LLM patient simulation: 28,800 profiles from four frontier models (GPT-4o-mini, DeepSeek-V3, Gemini-3-Flash, GLM-4.7) evaluated against NHANES and NESARC-III baselines across 120 intersectional cohorts. The central finding is a coherence-fidelity dissociation: models produce clinically plausible individuals while misrepresenting the populations they are drawn from. Variance compression ranges from 14 percent (GLM-4.7) to 62 percent (DeepSeek-V3), eliminating the distributional tails of clinical reality. Despite test-retest correlations above r = 0.90, 36.66 percent of cases cross diagnostic thresholds between runs. Symptom correlation matrices diverge across demographic groups beyond split-half noise, with transgender populations diverging three to five times more than racial differences. Calibration bias is systematic and asymmetric. Models overestimate depression severity for most groups by 3.6 to 6.1 points (Cohen d = 1.13 to 1.91), consistent with training on clinical corpora with elevated base rates. For transgender women the direction inverts: models capture only 8 to 46 percent of documented minority stress elevation, yielding a -5.42 residual (d = -1.55). Models also attribute irritability to Black men and fatigue to women beyond matched controls, encoding racialized and gendered assumptions. Patterns replicate across US and Chinese architectures, indicating failures tied to current training paradigms rather than isolated implementations. For most users, LLM mental health tools risk pathologizing ordinary distress; for transgender users, algorithmic erasure of genuine need. The patients look right. They do not represent real populations.

AI.tldr: LLM模拟患者存在"一致性-保真度分离"：能生成看似合理的个体，但无法准确代表真实人群分布，存在系统性校准偏差和少数群体代表性不足问题。
AI.motivation: 随着大语言模型越来越多地用于模拟患者进行临床培训、研究和心理健康工具开发，但模型在人群层面的有效性尚未得到充分验证，需要评估LLM模拟患者的流行病学准确性。
AI.method: 引入PsychBench框架，对四个前沿模型（GPT-4o-mini、DeepSeek-V3、Gemini-3-Flash、GLM-4.7）生成28,800个患者档案进行评估，使用NHANES和NESARC-III作为基准，覆盖120个交叉队列。
AI.result: 发现一致性-保真度分离现象：模型能生成临床合理的个体，但严重扭曲人群分布。方差压缩达14-62%，消除临床现实的分布尾部。36.66%的案例在不同运行中跨越诊断阈值。跨性别群体的症状相关性矩阵偏离程度是种族差异的3-5倍。存在系统性校准偏差：对多数群体高估抑郁严重度3.6-6.1分，但对跨性别女性仅捕捉到8-46%的少数群体压力升高。
AI.conclusion: 当前LLM训练范式存在根本性缺陷，导致模型编码种族化和性别化假设。对多数用户，LLM心理健康工具可能将普通痛苦病理化；对跨性别用户，算法可能抹杀真实需求。模型生成的"患者看起来正确，但不代表真实人群"。

title: S-GRPO: Unified Post-Training for Large Vision-Language Models
summary: Current post-training methodologies for adapting Large Vision-Language Models (LVLMs) generally fall into two paradigms: Supervised Fine-Tuning (SFT) and Reinforcement Learning (RL). Despite their prevalence, both approaches suffer from inefficiencies when applied in isolation. SFT forces the model's generation along a single expert trajectory, often inducing catastrophic forgetting of general multimodal capabilities due to distributional shifts. Conversely, RL explores multiple generated trajectories but frequently encounters optimization collapse - a cold-start problem where an unaligned model fails to spontaneously sample any domain-valid trajectories in sparse-reward visual tasks. In this paper, we propose Supervised Group Relative Policy Optimization (S-GRPO), a unified post-training framework that integrates the guidance of imitation learning into the multi-trajectory exploration of preference optimization. Tailored for direct-generation visual tasks, S-GRPO introduces Conditional Ground-Truth Trajectory Injection (CGI). When a binary verifier detects a complete exploratory failure within a sampled group of trajectories, CGI injects the verified ground-truth trajectory into the candidate pool. By assigning a deterministic maximal reward to this injected anchor, S-GRPO enforces a positive signal within the group-relative advantage estimation. This mechanism reformulates the supervised learning objective as a high-advantage component of the policy gradient, compelling the model to dynamically balance between exploiting the expert trajectory and exploring novel visual concepts. Theoretical analysis and empirical results demonstrate that S-GRPO gracefully bridges the gap between SFT and RL, drastically accelerates convergence, and achieves superior domain adaptation while preserving the base model's general-purpose capabilities.

AI.tldr: S-GRPO是一个统一的后训练框架，将模仿学习指导与偏好优化的多轨迹探索相结合，通过条件性真实轨迹注入解决视觉任务中的探索失败问题。
AI.motivation: 当前大型视觉语言模型的后训练方法主要有监督微调（SFT）和强化学习（RL），但两者都存在效率问题。SFT会导致灾难性遗忘，而RL在稀疏奖励的视觉任务中容易出现优化崩溃（冷启动问题）。
AI.method: 提出监督组相对策略优化（S-GRPO），引入条件性真实轨迹注入（CGI）。当二元验证器检测到采样轨迹组中完全探索失败时，CGI将已验证的真实轨迹注入候选池，并赋予确定性最大奖励，在组相对优势估计中强制执行正信号。
AI.result: S-GRPO优雅地弥合了SFT和RL之间的差距，大幅加速收敛，在保持基础模型通用能力的同时实现了优越的领域适应性能。
AI.conclusion: S-GRPO通过将监督学习目标重新表述为策略梯度的高优势组件，强制模型在利用专家轨迹和探索新视觉概念之间动态平衡，解决了现有后训练方法的局限性。

title: GAMMA-Net: Adaptive Long-Horizon Traffic Spatio-Temporal Forecasting Model based on Interleaved Graph Attention and Multi-Axis Mamba
summary: Accurate traffic forecasting is crucial for intelligent transportation systems, supporting effective traffic management, congestion reduction, and informed urban planning. However, traditional models often fail to adequately capture the intricate spatio-temporal dependencies present in traffic data. To overcome these limitations, we introduce GAMMA-Net, a novel approach that integrates Graph Attention Networks (GAT) with multi-axis Selective State Space Models (Mamba). The GAT component uses a self-attention mechanism to dynamically adjust the influence of nodes within the traffic network, enabling adaptive spatial dependency modeling based on real-time conditions. Simultaneously, the Mamba module efficiently models long-term temporal and spatial dynamics without the heavy computational cost of conventional recurrent architectures. Extensive experiments on several benchmark traffic datasets, including METR-LA, PEMS-BAY, PEMS03, PEMS04, PEMS07, and PEMS08, show that GAMMA-Net consistently outperforms existing state-of-the-art models across different prediction horizons, achieving up to a 16.25% reduction in Mean Absolute Error (MAE) compared to baseline models. Ablation studies highlight the critical contributions of both the spatial and temporal components, emphasizing their complementary role in improving prediction accuracy. In conclusion, the GAMMA-Net model sets a new standard in traffic forecasting, offering a powerful tool for next-generation traffic management and urban planning. The code for this study is available at https://github.com/hdy6438/GAMMA-Net

AI.tldr: GAMMA-Net：结合图注意力网络和多轴选择性状态空间模型的新型交通预测方法，在多个基准数据集上显著优于现有方法。
AI.motivation: 传统交通预测模型难以充分捕捉交通数据中复杂的时空依赖关系，需要更有效的建模方法来支持智能交通系统和城市规划。
AI.method: 提出GAMMA-Net，整合图注意力网络（GAT）和多轴选择性状态空间模型（Mamba）。GAT通过自注意力机制动态调整交通网络中节点的影响，实现自适应空间依赖建模；Mamba模块高效建模长期时空动态，避免传统循环架构的高计算成本。
AI.result: 在METR-LA、PEMS-BAY、PEMS03、PEMS04、PEMS07、PEMS08等多个基准数据集上的实验表明，GAMMA-Net在不同预测时间范围内始终优于现有最先进模型，相比基线模型平均绝对误差最多降低16.25%。消融研究验证了空间和时间组件的关键贡献。
AI.conclusion: GAMMA-Net为交通预测设立了新标准，为下一代交通管理和城市规划提供了强大工具。代码已开源。

title: No-Worse Context-Aware Decoding: Preventing Neutral Regression in Context-Conditioned Generation
summary: Large language models (LLMs) can answer questions and summarize documents when conditioned on external contexts (e.g., retrieved evidence), yet context use remains unreliable: models may overwrite an already-correct output (neutral regression) even when the context is non-informative. We formalize neutral regression as a do-no-harm requirement and quantify it by measuring accuracy drops on baseline-correct items under answer-consistent contexts. We propose No-Worse Context-Aware Decoding (NWCAD), a decode-time adapter built on a two-stream setup with a two-stage gate: it backs off to no-context decoding when the context is non-informative, and otherwise uses context-conditioned decoding with a CAD-style fallback under uncertainty. We evaluate NWCAD on benchmarks that separate do-no-harm reliability from context utilization (accuracy gains on genuinely helpful contexts). NWCAD prevents neutral regression on baseline-correct items while preserving strong context-driven accuracy on helpful contexts.

AI.tldr: 论文提出NWCAD解码方法，通过两阶段门控机制防止LLMs在非信息性上下文条件下出现中性回归问题，同时保持对有用上下文的利用能力。
AI.motivation: 大型语言模型在外部上下文条件下（如检索证据）回答问题或总结文档时，上下文使用仍不可靠：即使上下文是非信息性的，模型也可能覆盖已经正确的输出（中性回归）。
AI.method: 提出No-Worse Context-Aware Decoding (NWCAD)，这是一种基于双流设置的两阶段门控解码时适配器：当上下文非信息性时回退到无上下文解码，否则在不确定性下使用带CAD风格回退的上下文条件解码。
AI.result: NWCAD在基准测试中防止了基线正确项的中性回归，同时在有用上下文上保持了强大的上下文驱动准确性。
AI.conclusion: NWCAD方法有效解决了LLMs在上下文使用中的中性回归问题，实现了"不造成伤害"的可靠性要求，同时不牺牲对有用上下文的利用能力。

title: Diverse Dictionary Learning
summary: Given only observational data $X = g(Z)$, where both the latent variables $Z$ and the generating process $g$ are unknown, recovering $Z$ is ill-posed without additional assumptions. Existing methods often assume linearity or rely on auxiliary supervision and functional constraints. However, such assumptions are rarely verifiable in practice, and most theoretical guarantees break down under even mild violations, leaving uncertainty about how to reliably understand the hidden world. To make identifiability actionable in the real-world scenarios, we take a complementary view: in the general settings where full identifiability is unattainable, what can still be recovered with guarantees, and what biases could be universally adopted? We introduce the problem of diverse dictionary learning to formalize this view. Specifically, we show that intersections, complements, and symmetric differences of latent variables linked to arbitrary observations, along with the latent-to-observed dependency structure, are still identifiable up to appropriate indeterminacies even without strong assumptions. These set-theoretic results can be composed using set algebra to construct structured and essential views of the hidden world, such as genus-differentia definitions. When sufficient structural diversity is present, they further imply full identifiability of all latent variables. Notably, all identifiability benefits follow from a simple inductive bias during estimation that can be readily integrated into most models. We validate the theory and demonstrate the benefits of the bias on both synthetic and real-world data.

AI.tldr: 论文提出在无法完全识别潜在变量的情况下，通过集合论方法恢复潜在变量的交集、补集和对称差等结构化信息，并引入多样性字典学习框架来形式化这一视角。
AI.motivation: 现有方法通常需要线性假设或辅助监督，但这些假设在实践中难以验证，且轻微违反就会破坏理论保证。论文旨在解决在一般设置下，当完全可识别性无法实现时，我们仍能保证恢复什么信息，以及可以普遍采用什么偏差。
AI.method: 引入多样性字典学习问题，证明即使没有强假设，与任意观测相关的潜在变量的交集、补集和对称差以及潜在到观测的依赖结构仍可在适当不确定性下识别。这些集合论结果可通过集合代数组合构建隐藏世界的结构化视图。
AI.result: 理论表明，当存在足够结构多样性时，这些方法可以完全识别所有潜在变量。所有可识别性优势都来自估计过程中的简单归纳偏差，可以轻松集成到大多数模型中。在合成和真实世界数据上验证了理论和偏差的益处。
AI.conclusion: 论文提供了一种在一般设置下可靠理解隐藏世界的新视角，通过集合论方法在无法完全识别潜在变量的情况下仍能恢复结构化信息，为实际应用中的可识别性问题提供了可行的解决方案。

title: CAR-EnKF: A Covariance-Adaptive and Recalibrated Ensemble Kalman Filter Framework
summary: The ensemble Kalman filter (EnKF) is widely used for nonlinear and high-dimensional state estimation because it replaces complex covariance propagation with simple ensemble statistics. However, conventional EnKF implementations can become overconfident in the presence of measurement nonlinearity. The commonly used covariance inflation technique only partially alleviates this issue. This paper proposes a covariance-adaptive and recalibrated ensemble Kalman filter (CAR-EnKF) framework for nonlinear state estimation. The framework introduces two improvements that are only active for nonlinear measurements and reduce to the conventional EnKF framework without covariance inflation in the linear case: (i) a recalibration mechanism that reassesses the effect of the chosen Kalman gain after updating the ensemble mean, and (ii) a positive semidefinite covariance compensation term that accounts for measurement nonlinearity. An adaptive update law based on the normalized innovation squared further tunes the compensation magnitude online. The framework is algorithmically general and is specialized here to the stochastic EnKF and the ensemble transform Kalman filter (ETKF). Experiments on feature-based SLAM and the Lorenz--96 system show that CAR-EnKF consistently reduces RMSE relative to conventional EnKF baselines, with especially large improvements at low measurement-noise levels. The related codes are available at \href{https://github.com/Shida-Jiang/CAR-EnKF-A-Covariance-Adaptive-and-Recalibrated-Ensemble-Kalman-Filter-Framework}

AI.tldr: 提出CAR-EnKF框架，通过重新校准机制和协方差补偿项解决非线性测量下传统EnKF过度自信问题，在特征SLAM和Lorenz-96系统中显著降低RMSE
AI.motivation: 传统集合卡尔曼滤波器(EnKF)在非线性测量情况下容易变得过度自信，常用的协方差膨胀技术只能部分缓解此问题，需要更有效的解决方案来处理非线性状态估计中的过度自信问题
AI.method: 提出CAR-EnKF框架，包含两个改进：1)重新校准机制，在更新集合均值后重新评估所选卡尔曼增益的效果；2)正半定协方差补偿项，考虑测量非线性性。基于归一化创新平方的自适应更新律在线调整补偿幅度。框架适用于随机EnKF和集合变换卡尔曼滤波器(ETKF)
AI.result: 在特征SLAM和Lorenz-96系统上的实验表明，CAR-EnKF相比传统EnKF基线持续降低RMSE，在低测量噪声水平下改进尤其显著
AI.conclusion: CAR-EnKF框架有效解决了非线性测量下传统EnKF的过度自信问题，通过重新校准和协方差补偿机制提高了状态估计精度，特别是在低噪声条件下表现优异

title: The Magnitude of Dominated Sets: A Pareto Compliant Indicator Grounded in Metric Geometry
comment: magnitude of metric spaces, metric geometry, Pareto dominance, Pareto compliance, hypervolume indicator, generalized cardinality, multiobjective optimization, unary quality indicators
summary:
We investigate \emph{magnitude} as a new unary and strictly Pareto-compliant quality indicator for finite approximation sets to the Pareto front in multiobjective optimization. Magnitude originates in enriched category theory and metric geometry, where it is a notion of size or point content for compact metric spaces and a generalization of cardinality. For dominated regions in the \(\ell_1\) box setting, magnitude is close to hypervolume but not identical: it contains the top-dimensional hypervolume term together with positive lower-dimensional projection and boundary contributions.
  This paper gives a first theoretical study of magnitude as an indicator. We consider multiobjective maximization with a common anchor point. For dominated sets generated by finite approximation sets, we derive an all-dimensional projection formula, prove weak and strict set monotonicity on finite unions of anchored boxes, and thereby obtain weak and strict Pareto compliance. Unlike hypervolume, magnitude assigns positive value to boundary points sharing one or more coordinates with the anchor point, even when their top-dimensional hypervolume contribution vanishes. We then formulate projected set-gradient methods and compare hypervolume and magnitude on biobjective and three-dimensional simplex examples. Numerically, magnitude favors boundary-including populations and, for suitable cardinalities, complete Das--Dennis grids, whereas hypervolume prefers more interior-filling configurations. Computationally, magnitude reduces to hypervolume on coordinate projections; for fixed dimension this yields the same asymptotic complexity up to a factor \(2^d-1\), and in dimensions two and three \(Θ(n\log n)\) time. These results identify magnitude as a mathematically natural and computationally viable alternative to hypervolume for finite Pareto front approximations.

AI.tldr: 本文首次将magnitude（源自范畴论和度量几何）作为多目标优化中Pareto前沿有限近似集的质量指标进行研究，证明其具有严格Pareto合规性，与超体积指标相似但不同，特别重视边界点。
AI.motivation: 探索一种新的、严格Pareto合规的质量指标来评估多目标优化中Pareto前沿的有限近似集。超体积指标虽然常用，但存在一些局限性，magnitude作为数学上自然的概念可能提供更好的替代方案。
AI.method: 1. 在ℓ₁盒子设置下研究被支配区域的magnitude；2. 推导全维度投影公式；3. 证明在锚定盒子有限并集上的弱和严格集合单调性；4. 设计投影集合梯度方法；5. 在双目标和三维单纯形示例上比较magnitude和超体积。
AI.result: 1. magnitude具有弱和严格Pareto合规性；2. 与超体积不同，magnitude为与锚点共享坐标的边界点分配正值；3. 数值上magnitude偏好包含边界的种群，而超体积偏好内部填充配置；4. 计算上magnitude可简化为坐标投影上的超体积，在固定维度下具有相同的渐近复杂度。
AI.conclusion: magnitude作为多目标优化中Pareto前沿有限近似集的质量指标，在数学上自然且计算上可行，是超体积指标的有力替代方案，特别适用于需要重视边界点的情况。

title: The Open-Weight Paradox: Why Restricting Access to AI Models May Undermine the Safety It Seeks to Protect
comment: 23 pages, 2 figures, 1 table. Preprint also deposited at Zenodo (DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.19484877) on 2026-04-09. Licensed under CC BY 4.0
summary: The governance of open-weight artificial intelligence (AI) models has been framed as a binary choice: openness as risk, restriction as safety. This paper challenges that framing, arguing that access restrictions, without governed alternatives, may displace risks rather than reduce them. The global concentration of compute infrastructure makes open-weight models one of the most viable pathways to sovereign AI capacity in the Global South; restricting such access deepens asymmetries while driving proliferation into unsupervised settings. This analysis proposes that hardware-layer governance, including chip-level attestation mechanisms such as FlexHEG, trusted execution environments, confidential computing, and complementary software-layer safeguards, offers a defense-in-depth alternative to the current binary. A threat model taxonomy mapping misuse vectors to hardware, software, institutional, and liability layers illustrates why no single governance mechanism suffices. To operationalize this approach, the paper argues that effective AI governance as a dual-use technology will likely require a multilateral institutional architecture functionally analogous, though not identical, to the role performed by the IAEA in the nuclear domain, with explicit safeguards against the co-option of hardware controls for domestic repression. The relevant policy question is how to make openness safer through technical and institutional design while addressing the transition realities of legacy hardware, attestation at scale, and civil liberties protection.

AI.tldr: 该论文挑战了AI模型治理的二元框架（开放即风险 vs 限制即安全），提出硬件层治理（芯片级认证、可信执行环境等）结合软件层保障的深度防御方案，主张建立类似IAEA的多边机构来管理AI这一双重用途技术。
AI.motivation: 当前AI模型治理被简化为"开放即风险，限制即安全"的二元选择，这种框架忽视了限制访问可能只是转移风险而非减少风险。全球计算基础设施的集中化使得开放权重模型成为全球南方国家获得AI主权能力的最可行途径，限制访问会加剧不对称性并推动AI在无监督环境中扩散。
AI.method: 提出硬件层治理框架，包括芯片级认证机制（如FlexHEG）、可信执行环境、机密计算，并结合软件层保障措施。建立威胁模型分类法，将滥用向量映射到硬件、软件、制度和责任层面，说明单一治理机制不足。主张建立功能类似于IAEA的多边机构架构来实施AI治理。
AI.result: 分析表明，通过硬件层治理和软件层保障的深度防御方法，可以在保持开放性的同时提高安全性。这种多层次治理框架能够应对AI作为双重用途技术的复杂性，避免将风险简单转移到无监督环境。
AI.conclusion: AI治理不应是开放与限制的二元选择，而应通过技术和制度设计使开放性更安全。需要建立多边机构架构来实施硬件层治理，同时解决遗留硬件过渡、大规模认证和公民自由保护等实际问题。关键政策问题是如何通过设计实现更安全的开放性。

title: Cross-Modal Generation: From Commodity WiFi to High-Fidelity mmWave and RFID Sensing
summary: AIGC has shown remarkable success in CV and NLP, and has recently demonstrated promising potential in the wireless domain. However, significant data imbalance exists across RF modalities, with abundant WiFi data but scarce mmWave and RFID data due to high acquisition cost. This makes it difficult to train high-quality generative models for these data-scarce modalities. In this work, we propose RF-CMG, a diffusion-based cross-modal generative method that leverages data-rich WiFi signals to synthesize high-fidelity RF data for scarce modalities including mmWave and RFID. The key insight of RF-CMG is to decouple cross-modal generation into high-frequency guidance and low-frequency constraint, which respectively learn high-frequency distribution from limited target modality data and preserve the underlying physical structure via low-frequency constraints during generation. On this basis, we introduce a Modality-Guided Embedding (MGE) module to steer the reverse diffusion trajectory toward the target high-frequency distribution, and a Low-Frequency Modality Consistency (LFMC) module to progressively enforce low-frequency constraints to suppress the accumulation of source-modality structural biases during inference, enabling high-quality target-modality generation. Performance comparison with several prevalent generative models demonstrates that RF-CMG achieves superior performance in synthesizing RFID and mmWave signals. We further showcase the effectiveness of the data generated by RF-CMG in gesture recognition tasks, and analyze the impact of the proportion of synthetic data on downstream performance.

AI.tldr: RF-CMG：基于扩散模型的跨模态RF数据生成方法，利用数据丰富的WiFi信号合成稀缺的mmWave和RFID数据，通过高频引导和低频约束实现高质量生成。
AI.motivation: 无线领域AIGC面临数据不平衡问题：WiFi数据丰富，但mmWave和RFID数据稀缺且获取成本高，导致难以训练高质量的生成模型。
AI.method: 提出RF-CMG扩散模型，将跨模态生成解耦为高频引导和低频约束：1) MGE模块引导反向扩散轨迹朝向目标高频分布；2) LFMC模块逐步强制执行低频约束，抑制源模态结构偏差积累。
AI.result: RF-CMG在合成RFID和mmWave信号方面优于现有生成模型，生成的数据在姿态识别任务中有效，并分析了合成数据比例对下游性能的影响。
AI.conclusion: RF-CMG成功解决了无线领域数据不平衡问题，通过跨模态生成实现了高质量稀缺RF数据的合成，为无线AIGC应用提供了有效解决方案。

title: GRAIL: Autonomous Concept Grounding for Neuro-Symbolic Reinforcement Learning
summary: Neuro-symbolic Reinforcement Learning (NeSy-RL) combines symbolic reasoning with gradient-based optimization to achieve interpretable and generalizable policies. Relational concepts, such as "left of" or "close by", serve as foundational building blocks that structure how agents perceive and act. However, conventional approaches require human experts to manually define these concepts, limiting adaptability since concept semantics vary across environments. We propose GRAIL (Grounding Relational Agents through Interactive Learning), a framework that autonomously grounds relational concepts through environmental interaction. GRAIL leverages large language models (LLMs) to provide generic concept representations as weak supervision, then refines them to capture environment-specific semantics. This approach addresses both sparse reward signals and concept misalignment prevalent in underdetermined environments. Experiments on the Atari games Kangaroo, Seaquest, and Skiing demonstrate that GRAIL matches or outperforms agents with manually crafted concepts in simplified settings, and reveals informative trade-offs between reward maximization and high-level goal completion in the full environment.

AI.tldr: GRAIL框架通过交互学习自主建立关系概念，利用LLM提供通用概念表示作为弱监督，然后针对特定环境进行细化，解决了稀疏奖励和概念不对齐问题。
AI.motivation: 传统神经符号强化学习方法需要人工定义关系概念（如"左侧"、"附近"），限制了适应性，因为概念语义在不同环境中会变化。
AI.method: 提出GRAIL框架：1) 利用大语言模型提供通用概念表示作为弱监督；2) 通过环境交互自主细化概念以捕捉环境特定语义；3) 解决稀疏奖励和概念不对齐问题。
AI.result: 在Atari游戏Kangaroo、Seaquest和Skiing上的实验表明，GRAIL在简化设置中匹配或优于人工定义概念的智能体，并在完整环境中揭示了奖励最大化与高级目标完成之间的权衡。
AI.conclusion: GRAIL通过自主概念学习框架，解决了传统神经符号强化学习中人工定义概念的局限性，实现了更好的适应性和性能表现。

title: The impact of postediting on AI generative translation in Yemeni context: Translating literary prose by ChatGPT
summary: This study examines the role of artificial intelligence in translation, focusing on ChatGPT, specifically ChatGPT-4, and the extent to which human postediting is required in literary translation. A mixed-method approach was adopted, involving 30 professional translators who evaluated and postedited AI-generated translations of selected Arabic and English literary texts. The results show that although AI improves translation speed and accessibility, it remains limited in handling cultural, stylistic, and figurative aspects of language. Participants generally confirmed the necessity of human postediting, particularly in novels and drama. The findings indicate that emerging human-machine collaboration model rather than replacement of human translators. The study concludes that AI should be used as a supportive tool, while human expertise remains essential for ensuring translation quality and cultural appropriateness.

AI.tldr: 研究探讨AI在文学翻译中的作用，发现ChatGPT-4虽提升翻译效率，但在处理文化、风格和修辞方面仍有局限，需要人工后编辑，特别是小说和戏剧翻译，建议采用人机协作模式而非取代人工翻译。
AI.motivation: 研究动机是探讨人工智能（特别是ChatGPT-4）在文学翻译中的作用，以及评估在文学翻译中人工后编辑的必要性，了解AI翻译的局限性，探索人机协作的可能性。
AI.method: 采用混合方法，邀请30名专业翻译人员评估和编辑AI生成的阿拉伯语和英语文学文本翻译，通过专业译者的实际操作为数据收集方式。
AI.result: 结果显示AI虽提高翻译速度和可及性，但在处理文化、风格和修辞语言方面存在局限；参与者普遍确认需要人工后编辑，特别是在小说和戏剧翻译中；表明正在形成人机协作模式而非取代人工翻译。
AI.conclusion: 结论是AI应作为辅助工具使用，而人类专业知识对于确保翻译质量和文化适宜性仍然至关重要，支持人机协作的翻译模式。

title: Prior-Fitted Functional Flow: In-Context Generative Models for Pharmacokinetics
summary: We introduce Prior-Fitted Functional Flows, a generative foundation model for pharmacokinetics that enables zero-shot population synthesis and individual forecasting without manual parameter tuning. We learn functional vector fields, explicitly conditioned on the sparse, irregular data of an entire study population. This enables the generation of coherent virtual cohorts as well as forecasting of partially observed patient trajectories with calibrated uncertainty. We construct a new open-access literature corpus to inform our priors, and demonstrate state-of-the-art predictive accuracy on extensive real-world datasets.

AI.tldr: 提出Prior-Fitted Functional Flows，一种用于药代动力学的生成基础模型，能够实现零样本群体合成和个体预测，无需手动参数调整
AI.motivation: 传统药代动力学模型需要手动参数调整，难以处理稀疏、不规则的数据，且缺乏生成虚拟群体和预测个体轨迹的能力
AI.method: 学习功能向量场，显式地以整个研究群体的稀疏、不规则数据为条件，构建新的开放获取文献语料库来提供先验信息
AI.result: 在广泛的实际数据集上展示了最先进的预测准确性，能够生成一致的虚拟群体并预测部分观测的患者轨迹，具有校准的不确定性
AI.conclusion: Prior-Fitted Functional Flows为药代动力学提供了一个强大的生成基础模型，实现了零样本群体合成和个体预测，具有实际应用价值

title: Stochastic Delayed Dynamics of Rumor Propagation with Awareness and Fact-Checking
summary: This paper presents a stochastic delayed differential model for rumor propagation during infodemic that incorporates human behavioral response, public skepticism and fact-checking mechanisms. A discrete time delay is introduced to model natural lags in information processing and institutional response. Additionally, we adopt additive stochastic perturbations to model random fluctuations in social interaction and exposure. We present a rigorous stability analysis of the proposed rumor transmission model and derive convergence guarantees under reproduction number conditions. We also validate the model by numerical simulations and analyze the outbreak severity and quantify uncertainty under variable information processing delays. The results highlight the importance of timely awareness and fact-checking interventions for mitigating misinformation spread during pandemics

AI.tldr: 提出一个包含时滞和随机扰动的谣言传播模型，分析稳定性并验证及时干预的重要性
AI.motivation: 在信息疫情背景下，需要建立更真实的谣言传播模型，考虑人类行为反应、公众怀疑、事实核查机制以及信息处理的自然延迟和随机波动
AI.method: 提出一个随机时滞微分模型，包含离散时间延迟（模拟信息处理和机构响应滞后）和加性随机扰动（模拟社交互动和暴露的随机波动），进行严格的稳定性分析，推导再生数条件下的收敛保证
AI.result: 通过数值模拟验证模型，分析不同信息处理延迟下的爆发严重性和不确定性量化，结果表明及时的意识提升和事实核查干预对缓解疫情期间的虚假信息传播至关重要
AI.conclusion: 该随机时滞微分模型能有效描述谣言传播动态，强调了及时干预措施在控制信息疫情中的重要性，为制定有效的虚假信息防控策略提供了理论依据

title: Local Convergence Results for Sequential Quadratic Programming with Complementarity Constraints
comment: 26 pages, 3 figures, github repo with examples
summary: Mathematical programs with complementarity constraints (MPCCs) are a challenging class of nonlinear optimization problems, because their nonlinear programming reformulations violate standard constraint qualifications at every feasible point. This paper analyzes sequential quadratic programming with complementarity constraints (SQPCC). In this method, the complementarity constraints are retained in the subproblems, yielding quadratic programs with complementarity constraints (QPCCs). The main contribution of the paper is a new local convergence result for the SQPCC method to S-stationary points. We show that there exists at least one sequence of QPCC S-stationary points converging to a reference S-stationary point of the MPCC, and we characterize conditions under which each such sequence converges and under which such a sequence is locally unique. In contrast to previous results, the analysis is established under weaker second-order sufficient conditions and requires no upper-level strict complementarity. Our result builds upon local convergence results for the classical SQP method. We present local convergence results for SQP within the kappa-omega setting, which also cover linearly convergent variants. These assumptions, which are widely used in the analysis of Newton-type methods, provide a natural framework for quantifying subproblem approximation errors, their effect on the convergence speed, and the effect of nonlinearity on the size of the local convergence region. Furthermore, we establish an active-set stabilization result for SQPCC, identifying conditions under which the optimal complementarity and inequality active sets are identified after finitely many iterations, and conditions under which such identification occurs only asymptotically. Numerical examples illustrate the theoretical findings and highlight some advantages of SQPCC over classical SQP applied to MPCCs.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种处理互补约束数学规划(MPCC)的序列二次规划方法(SQPCC)，该方法在子问题中保留互补约束，形成QPCC子问题。主要贡献是建立了SQPCC方法收敛到S-稳定点的局部收敛性理论，在较弱的二阶充分条件下无需上层严格互补性。
AI.motivation: MPCC是一类具有挑战性的非线性优化问题，因为其NLP重构在所有可行点都违反标准约束规范。现有方法通常将互补约束作为非线性约束处理，导致子问题求解困难。需要开发能有效处理互补约束且具有良好收敛性质的方法。
AI.method: 提出SQPCC方法：在序列二次规划框架中，将互补约束保留在子问题中，形成二次规划互补约束(QPCC)子问题。分析QPCC的S-稳定点序列收敛性，建立kappa-omega设置下的局部收敛理论，并研究主动集稳定化性质。
AI.result: 证明了至少存在一个QPCC S-稳定点序列收敛到MPCC的参考S-稳定点；在较弱二阶充分条件下无需上层严格互补性；建立了主动集识别条件：某些情况下有限迭代后识别，某些情况下渐近识别；数值实验显示SQPCC优于传统SQP方法。
AI.conclusion: SQPCC方法为MPCC问题提供了有效的求解框架，具有严格的收敛理论保证。该方法在较弱条件下收敛到S-稳定点，能处理主动集识别问题，数值表现优于传统方法，为互补约束优化问题提供了新的理论分析和算法工具。

title: The Inference Bottleneck: A Formal Model of Vertical Foreclosure in AI Markets
summary: As generative AI commercializes, competitive advantage is shifting from model training toward inference, distribution, and routing. This paper develops a formal game-theoretic model of vertical foreclosure in inference markets, as the formal-model companion to Besanson and Celani (2026). The model isolates two foreclosure mechanisms operating without predatory pricing: quality-of-service (QoS) discrimination against downstream rivals via latency, throughput, context limits, or feature access; and routing bias in assistant-layer interfaces. An extension motivated by Anthropic's April 2026 release of Claude Opus 4.7 alongside the restricted-access Claude Mythos Preview introduces a third mechanism, tier-based access discrimination, parameterized by a tier gap (tau) and partner-exclusivity (kappa). The main result gives an explicit local equilibrium characterization of the QoS gap. Under logit demand and symmetric rivals, the gap is strictly increasing in inference-quality importance (alpha) and downstream margins, and strictly decreasing in API price and rival entry elasticity. Discrimination vanishes at a joint boundary rather than at a simple threshold in alpha alone. A stylized calibration to four providers using April 2026 data treats parameter values as inputs to a comparative risk mapping, not structural estimates. The mapping suggests Google and OpenAI face conditions most conducive to foreclosure; Microsoft's realized routing bias has been voluntarily constrained by a March 2026 multi-model pivot; Anthropic shows low consumer-channel risk and elevated risk in enterprise coding-agent segments. The policy section proposes Neutral Inference, a four-pillar conduct framework: QoS parity, routing transparency, FRAND-style non-discrimination, and tier transparency with release-pathway discipline. Illustrative welfare calculations suggest net gains in the tens of billions annually.

AI.tldr: 该论文建立了一个关于推理市场垂直封锁的博弈论模型，识别了三种封锁机制：服务质量歧视、路由偏见和层级访问歧视，并提出了"中立推理"政策框架。
AI.motivation: 随着生成式AI商业化，竞争优势从模型训练转向推理、分发和路由。论文旨在形式化分析推理市场中的垂直封锁问题，识别非掠夺性定价的封锁机制。
AI.method: 开发了垂直封锁的博弈论模型，包含三种机制：服务质量歧视、路由偏见和层级访问歧视。使用logit需求函数和对称竞争对手假设，推导出服务质量差距的局部均衡特征。基于2026年4月数据对四家提供商进行校准分析。
AI.result: 服务质量差距随推理质量重要性和下游利润率增加而增加，随API价格和竞争对手进入弹性增加而减少。歧视在联合边界而非单一阈值处消失。校准分析显示Google和OpenAI最易实施封锁，Microsoft已通过多模型策略自我约束，Anthropic在编码代理领域风险较高。
AI.conclusion: 提出了"中立推理"四支柱行为框架：服务质量平等、路由透明、FRAND式非歧视、层级透明与发布路径规范。福利计算显示每年可带来数百亿美元的净收益。

title: Reasoning on the Manifold: Bidirectional Consistency for Self-Verification in Diffusion Language Models
summary: While Diffusion Large Language Models (dLLMs) offer structural advantages for global planning, efficiently verifying that they arrive at correct answers via valid reasoning traces remains a critical challenge. In this work, we propose a geometric perspective: Reasoning on the Manifold. We hypothesize that valid generation trajectories reside as stable attractors on the high-density manifold of the learned distribution, whereas invalid paths exhibit off-manifold drift. To operationalize this, we introduce Bidirectional Manifold Consistency (BMC), a training-free, unsupervised metric that quantifies the stability of the generated sequence through a forward-masking and backward-reconstruction cycle. Empirically, we demonstrate BMC's versatility across the full reasoning lifecycle: (1) in Diagnosis, it serves as a robust discriminator of solution validity without ground truth answer; (2) in Inference, it enables rejection resampling to effectively concentrate computational resources on complex reasoning tasks; and (3) in Alignment, it functions as a dense geometric reward that transforms sparse outcome supervision into fine-grained guidance, empowering models to self-evolve beyond standard baselines. Our results establish intrinsic geometric stability as a robust indicator of correctness for dLLMs.

AI.tldr: 提出BMC方法，通过流形一致性评估扩散大语言模型推理轨迹的稳定性，无需训练即可诊断、优化推理过程
AI.motivation: 扩散大语言模型在全局规划方面有优势，但验证其推理轨迹的正确性仍具挑战。作者假设有效推理轨迹位于学习分布的高密度流形上，而无效路径会偏离流形
AI.method: 提出双向流形一致性(BMC)：一种无需训练的无监督度量，通过前向掩码和后向重建循环来量化生成序列的稳定性
AI.result: BMC在推理全生命周期中表现多功能：1)诊断阶段可作为无监督的解决方案有效性判别器；2)推理阶段支持拒绝重采样以集中计算资源；3)对齐阶段作为密集几何奖励，将稀疏结果监督转化为细粒度指导
AI.conclusion: 内在几何稳定性是扩散大语言模型正确性的可靠指标，BMC方法为验证和改进模型推理提供了有效工具

title: Step-GRPO: Internalizing Dynamic Early Exit for Efficient Reasoning
comment: This paper has been accepted for publication at the 64th Annual Meeting of the Association for Computational Linguistics (ACL 2026)
summary: Large reasoning models that use long chain-of-thought excel at problem-solving yet waste compute on redundant checks. Curbing this overthinking is hard: training-time length penalties can cripple ability, while inference-time early-exit adds system overhead. To bridge this gap, we propose Step-GRPO, a novel post-training framework that internalizes dynamic early-exit capabilities directly into the model. Step-GRPO shifts the optimization objective from raw tokens to semantic steps by utilizing linguistic markers to structure reasoning. We introduce a Dynamic Truncated Rollout mechanism that exposes the model to concise high-confidence trajectories during exploration, synergized with a Step-Aware Relative Reward that dynamically penalizes redundancy based on group-level baselines. Extensive experiments across three model sizes on diverse benchmarks demonstrate that Step-GRPO achieves a superior accuracy-efficiency trade-off. On Qwen3-8B, our method reduces token consumption by 32.0\% compared to the vanilla model while avoiding the accuracy degradation observed in traditional length-penalty methods.

AI.tldr: Step-GRPO是一种后训练框架，通过内部化动态提前退出能力来减少大语言模型推理时的计算冗余，在保持准确率的同时显著降低token消耗。
AI.motivation: 大型推理模型使用长思维链在解决问题时表现出色，但会在冗余检查上浪费计算资源。现有的解决方案存在缺陷：训练时的长度惩罚会损害模型能力，而推理时的提前退出会增加系统开销。
AI.method: Step-GRPO通过语言标记构建推理结构，将优化目标从原始token转向语义步骤。采用动态截断展开机制，在探索过程中向模型展示简洁的高置信度轨迹，并结合基于组级基线的步感知相对奖励来动态惩罚冗余。
AI.result: 在三个不同规模模型上的广泛实验表明，Step-GRPO实现了优越的准确率-效率权衡。在Qwen3-8B上，该方法相比原始模型减少了32.0%的token消耗，同时避免了传统长度惩罚方法中观察到的准确率下降。
AI.conclusion: Step-GRPO成功地将动态提前退出能力内部化到模型中，在保持推理质量的同时显著提高了计算效率，为解决大语言模型过度思考问题提供了有效方案。

title: Detecting Alarming Student Verbal Responses using Text and Audio Classifier
comment: 9 Pages. Paper to be Presented at the National Council on Measurement in Education Conference on April 10, 2026
summary: This paper addresses a critical safety gap in the use Automated Verbal Response Scoring (AVRS). We present a novel hybrid framework for troubled student detection that combines a text classifier, trained to detect responses based on their content, and an audio classifier, trained to detect responses using prosodic markers. This approach overcomes key limitations of traditional AVRS systems by considering both content and prosody of responses, achieving enhanced performance in identifying potentially concerning responses. This system can expedite the review process by humans, which can be life-saving particularly when timely intervention may be crucial.

AI.tldr: 提出一个结合文本分类器和音频分类器的混合框架，用于检测有困扰的学生回答，通过同时考虑回答内容和语音韵律特征来提高传统自动语音评分系统的安全性。
AI.motivation: 传统自动语音评分系统存在安全漏洞，无法有效识别可能表明学生有困扰或需要紧急干预的回答。需要一种更全面的方法来检测潜在的危险信号。
AI.method: 开发了一个混合框架，结合两个分类器：1) 文本分类器：基于回答内容进行检测；2) 音频分类器：基于语音韵律标记进行检测。这种双模态方法克服了传统系统的局限性。
AI.result: 该混合方法在识别潜在问题回答方面表现出增强的性能，能够更准确地检测出需要关注的回答。
AI.conclusion: 该混合框架能够加速人工审查过程，在需要及时干预的关键情况下可能挽救生命，为自动语音评分系统提供了重要的安全保障。

title: Efficient Diffusion Models under Nonconvex Equality and Inequality constraints via Landing
summary: Generative modeling within constrained sets is essential for scientific and engineering applications involving physical, geometric, or safety requirements (e.g., molecular generation, robotics). We present a unified framework for constrained diffusion models on generic nonconvex feasible sets $Σ$ that simultaneously enforces equality and inequality constraints throughout the diffusion process. Our framework incorporates both overdamped and underdamped dynamics for forward and backward sampling. A key algorithmic innovation is a computationally efficient landing mechanism that replaces costly and often ill-defined projections onto $Σ$, ensuring feasibility without iterative Newton solves or projection failures. By leveraging underdamped dynamics, we accelerate mixing toward the prior distribution, effectively alleviating the high simulation costs typically associated with constrained diffusion. Empirically, this approach reduces function evaluations and memory usage during both training and inference while preserving sample quality. On benchmarks featuring equality and mixed constraints, our method achieves comparable sample quality to state-of-the-art baselines while significantly reducing computational cost, providing a practical and scalable solution for diffusion on nonconvex feasible sets.

AI.tldr: 提出统一框架用于非凸可行集上的约束扩散模型，通过着陆机制替代投影，结合过阻尼和欠阻尼动力学加速采样，降低计算成本
AI.motivation: 科学和工程应用中需要在约束集（如物理、几何或安全约束）内进行生成建模，现有方法在非凸可行集上存在投影计算昂贵、定义不明确等问题
AI.method: 提出统一框架处理非凸可行集上的等式和不等式约束，引入计算高效的着陆机制替代传统投影方法，结合过阻尼和欠阻尼动力学加速混合过程
AI.result: 在包含等式和混合约束的基准测试中，方法在保持样本质量的同时显著降低计算成本，减少训练和推理时的函数评估和内存使用
AI.conclusion: 该方法为在非凸可行集上进行扩散建模提供了实用且可扩展的解决方案，通过着陆机制和动力学优化有效解决了传统投影方法的计算瓶颈

title: The structure of technological learning: insights from water electrolysis for cost forecasting, policy, and strategy
summary: Forecasting the cost evolution of emerging clean technologies is crucial for informed policy, investment, and decarbonization decisions, yet it remains deeply uncertain. Learning curves, which link cost declines to cumulative deployment, are widely used for technological cost forecasting. However, applying them to emerging technologies is challenging due to parametric uncertainty in learning rates, which are scarce and highly uncertain, and structural uncertainty stemming from multiple plausible learning frameworks. Using water electrolysis as a case study, we evaluate how different learning structures, from shared to fragmented learning across technology variants and regions, alter expected cost paths. We interrogate model assumptions that represent contrasting industrial realities, including competition among electrolyzer variants and supply chain fragmentation associated with protectionism and industrial policy. We find that plausible modeling choices generate widely different trajectories, with materially different implications for policy design and technology strategy. We argue for routinely applying multiple learning frameworks to explore decision spaces and stress-test conclusions for scale-up planning, national industrial strategy, and energy-systems modeling.

AI.tldr: 该研究评估了不同学习框架对新兴清洁技术成本预测的影响，以水电解为例，发现不同的建模假设会产生显著不同的成本路径，对政策设计有重要影响。
AI.motivation: 预测新兴清洁技术的成本演变对于政策、投资和脱碳决策至关重要，但存在深度不确定性。学习曲线被广泛用于技术成本预测，但应用于新兴技术时面临参数不确定性和结构不确定性的挑战。
AI.method: 以水电解技术为案例研究，评估不同学习结构（从技术变体和区域间的共享学习到碎片化学习）如何改变预期成本路径。考察了代表不同工业现实的模型假设，包括电解槽变体间的竞争以及与保护主义和产业政策相关的供应链碎片化。
AI.result: 研究发现，合理的建模选择会产生广泛不同的成本轨迹，对政策设计和技术战略产生实质性不同的影响。不同的学习框架导致显著不同的成本预测结果。
AI.conclusion: 建议常规应用多种学习框架来探索决策空间，并对规模化规划、国家产业战略和能源系统建模的结论进行压力测试，以提高成本预测的稳健性。

title: Accuracy Certificates for Convex Optimization at Accelerated Rates via Primal-Dual Averaging
summary: Many works in convex optimization provide rates for achieving a small primal gap. However, this quantity is typically unavailable in practice. In this work, we show that solving a regularized surrogate with algorithms based on simple primal-dual averaging provides non-asymptotic convergence guarantees for a \textit{computable} optimality certificate. We first analyze primal and dual methods based on one average, namely modified dual averaging and generalized conditional gradient, and establish $\tilde{O}(\varepsilon^{-1})$ certificate complexities. Motivated by asymmetries in the one-average case, we analyze a self-dual, two-average method that preserves symmetry while losing certificate guarantees. To recover certificate convergence, we propose a three-average method that achieves an accelerated $\tilde{O}(\varepsilon^{-1/2})$ certificate complexity. Furthermore, we prove primal-dual algorithm correspondences for the one, two, and three-average cases. In particular, the primal three-average accelerated method mirrors the well-known gradient extrapolation method in the dual. By interpreting our results through the lens of zero-sum matrix games and Fisher markets, we further connect primal-dual averaging methods to game theory and market dynamics.

AI.tldr: 论文提出了一种基于原始-对偶平均的算法框架，通过可计算的最优性证书提供非渐进收敛保证，并建立了不同平均方法（单平均、双平均、三平均）之间的对应关系。
AI.motivation: 传统凸优化方法通常关注原始间隙的收敛速率，但实际中这个量通常不可计算。本文旨在开发能够提供可计算最优性证书非渐进收敛保证的方法。
AI.method: 提出基于原始-对偶平均的算法框架：1）单平均方法（改进的对偶平均和广义条件梯度）；2）自对偶的双平均方法；3）三平均方法。通过正则化代理问题求解，建立不同平均方法之间的算法对应关系。
AI.result: 单平均方法获得$\tilde{O}(\varepsilon^{-1})$证书复杂度；双平均方法保持对称性但失去证书保证；三平均方法恢复证书收敛并实现加速的$\tilde{O}(\varepsilon^{-1/2})$证书复杂度。建立了原始-对偶算法对应关系，特别是三平均加速方法与对偶梯度外推法的对应。
AI.conclusion: 基于原始-对偶平均的方法能够为可计算最优性证书提供非渐进收敛保证，三平均方法实现加速收敛。通过零和矩阵博弈和Fisher市场的视角，将原始-对偶平均方法与博弈论和市场动态联系起来。

title: Agentic Education: Using Claude Code to Teach Claude Code
summary: AI coding assistants have proliferated rapidly, yet structured pedagogical frameworks for learning these tools remain scarce. Developers face a gap between tool documentation and practical mastery, relying on fragmented resources such as blog posts, video tutorials, and trial-and-error. We present cc-self-train, a modular interactive curriculum for learning Claude Code, an agentic AI coding tool, through hands-on project construction. The system introduces five contributions: (1) a persona progression model that adapts instructor tone across four stages (Guide, Collaborator, Peer, Launcher), operationalizing Gradual Release of Responsibility for AI-mediated instruction; (2) an adaptive learning system that observes engagement quality through hook-based heuristics and adjusts scaffolding at two timescales, using streak detection for mid-module intervention and aggregate metrics for module-boundary persona changes; (3) a cross-domain unified curriculum in which five distinct project domains share identical feature sequencing, enabling transfer learning; (4) a step-pacing mechanism with explicit pause primitives to manage information overload in an AI-as-instructor context; and (5) an auto-updating curriculum design in which the onboarding agent detects upstream tool changes and updates teaching materials before instruction begins. A parametrized test suite enforces structural consistency as a proxy for pedagogical invariants across all 50 modules. A pilot evaluation with 27 participants shows statistically significant reported self-efficacy gains across all 10 assessed skill areas (p < 0.001), with the largest effects on advanced features such as hooks and custom skills. We discuss implications for the design of auto-updating educational systems.

AI.tldr: 提出cc-self-train系统，这是一个模块化交互式课程，用于学习Claude Code AI编码工具，通过五个核心贡献解决AI编码助手缺乏结构化教学框架的问题。
AI.motivation: AI编码助手快速普及，但缺乏结构化教学框架。开发者面临工具文档与实际掌握之间的差距，只能依赖零散的博客、视频教程和试错学习。
AI.method: 开发了cc-self-train系统，包含五个核心贡献：1) 四阶段角色演进模型；2) 基于参与度质量的自适应学习系统；3) 跨领域统一课程设计；4) 步骤节奏控制机制；5) 自动更新课程设计。系统包含50个模块，通过参数化测试套件确保教学一致性。
AI.result: 对27名参与者的试点评估显示，在所有10个评估技能领域中，自我效能感均有统计显著提升(p<0.001)，在hooks和自定义技能等高级功能上效果最明显。
AI.conclusion: cc-self-train系统为AI编码助手提供了有效的结构化教学框架，展示了自适应、可转移、可更新的教育系统设计方法，对自动更新教育系统的设计具有重要启示。

title: In Search of Lost DNA Sequence Pretraining
summary: DNA sequence encoding is fundamental to gene function prediction, protein synthesis, and diverse downstream biological tasks. Despite the substantial progress achieved by large-scale DNA sequence pretraining, existing studies have overwhelmingly emphasized pretraining scale and custom downstream evaluation datasets, while neglecting some essential components of the pretraining paradigm. In this paper, we reveal three critical yet heretofore overlooked problems in DNA pretraining: inappropriate downstream datasets, inherent flaws in the neighbor-masking strategy, and the lack of detailed discussion on vocabulary. Therefore, we undertake comprehensive investigations and propose principled guidelines, including selection criteria for evaluation datasets, guiding task design, and in-depth vocabulary analysis. Extensive experiments validate the significance of our identified problems and support the rationale behind our recommendations. Finally, we introduce a standardized testbed that enables reproducible and rigorous benchmarking of DNA pretraining methods to advance the development of genomic foundation models.

AI.tldr: 本文揭示了DNA预训练中三个被忽视的关键问题：不合适的下游数据集、邻域掩码策略的内在缺陷、以及词汇表讨论的缺失，并提出了相应的指导原则和标准化测试平台。
AI.motivation: 尽管大规模DNA序列预训练取得了显著进展，但现有研究过度强调预训练规模和定制下游评估数据集，而忽视了预训练范式中一些基本组成部分。本文旨在揭示DNA预训练中三个关键但被忽视的问题。
AI.method: 通过全面调查提出原则性指导方针，包括评估数据集的选择标准、指导任务设计以及深入的词汇表分析。进行大量实验验证所识别问题的重要性，并引入标准化测试平台。
AI.result: 大量实验验证了所识别问题的重要性，并支持了建议背后的合理性。标准化测试平台能够实现DNA预训练方法的可重复和严格基准测试。
AI.conclusion: 本文揭示了DNA预训练中三个关键问题，提出了相应的解决方案和指导原则，并建立了标准化测试平台，以推动基因组基础模型的发

title: Beyond Text-Dominance: Understanding Modality Preference of Omni-modal Large Language Models
summary: Native Omni-modal Large Language Models (OLLMs) have shifted from pipeline architectures to unified representation spaces. However, this native integration gives rise to a critical yet underexplored phenomenon: modality preference. To bridge this gap, we first systematically quantify modality preference of OLLMs using a newly-curated conflict-based benchmark and the modality selection rate metric. Our evaluation of ten representative OLLMs reveals a notable paradigm shift: unlike the ``text-dominance'' of traditional VLMs, most OLLMs exhibit a pronounced visual preference. To further understand the underlying mechanism, we conduct layer-wise probing and demonstrate that such modality preference is not static but emerges progressively in the mid-to-late layers. Building upon these insights, we leverage these internal signals to diagnose cross-modal hallucinations, achieving competitive performance across three downstream multi-modal benchmarks without task-specific data. Our work provides both a mechanistic understanding and a practical tool for building more trustworthy OLLMs. Our code and related resources are publicly available at: https://github.com/icip-cas/OmniPreference

AI.tldr: 本文研究了原生全模态大语言模型中的模态偏好现象，发现与传统的视觉语言模型不同，大多数OLLMs表现出明显的视觉偏好，这种偏好在中后层逐渐形成，并可用于诊断跨模态幻觉。
AI.motivation: 原生全模态大语言模型从流水线架构转向统一表示空间，但产生了关键但未被充分研究的模态偏好现象。本文旨在填补这一空白，系统量化OLLMs的模态偏好，理解其底层机制，并利用这些内部信号诊断跨模态幻觉。
AI.method: 1. 使用新构建的基于冲突的基准和模态选择率指标系统量化OLLMs的模态偏好；2. 对10个代表性OLLMs进行评估；3. 通过分层探测分析模态偏好的形成机制；4. 利用内部信号诊断跨模态幻觉，在三个下游多模态基准上进行验证。
AI.result: 1. 发现范式转变：与传统VLM的"文本主导"不同，大多数OLLMs表现出明显的视觉偏好；2. 模态偏好不是静态的，而是在中后层逐渐形成；3. 利用这些内部信号诊断跨模态幻觉，在三个多模态基准上取得了有竞争力的性能，无需任务特定数据。
AI.conclusion: 本文提供了对模态偏好的机制理解，并为构建更可信的OLLMs提供了实用工具。研究发现OLLMs的视觉偏好现象及其形成机制，展示了如何利用内部信号改善模型可靠性。

title: Evaluating Adaptive Personalization of Educational Readings with Simulated Learners
summary: We present a framework for evaluating adaptive personalization of educational reading materials with theory-grounded simulated learners. The system builds a learning-objective and knowledge-component ontology from open textbooks, curates it in a browser-based Ontology Atlas, labels textbook chunks with ontology entities, and generates aligned reading-assessment pairs. Simulated readers learn from passages through a Construction-Integration-inspired memory model with DIME-style reader factors, KREC-style misconception revision, and an open New Dale-Chall readability signal. Answers are produced by score-based option selection over the learner's explicit memory state, while BKT drives adaptation. Across three sampled subject ontologies and matched cohorts of 50 simulated learners per condition, adaptive reading significantly improved outcomes in computer science, yielded smaller positive but inconclusive gains in inorganic chemistry, and was neutral to slightly negative in general biology.

AI.tldr: 提出一个基于理论模拟学习者的自适应教育阅读材料个性化评估框架，通过构建学习目标与知识组件本体、标注教材内容、生成对齐的阅读-评估对，并利用模拟读者模型进行自适应阅读实验。
AI.motivation: 需要系统评估教育阅读材料的自适应个性化效果，但真实学习者实验成本高且难以控制变量。通过构建理论基础的模拟学习者，可以在受控环境中评估不同学科的自适应阅读策略效果。
AI.method: 1) 从开放教材构建学习目标和知识组件本体；2) 在浏览器本体图谱中管理；3) 标注教材段落；4) 生成对齐的阅读-评估对；5) 使用Construction-Integration记忆模型、DIME读者因素、KREC错误概念修正、New Dale-Chall可读性信号的模拟读者；6) 基于分数选项选择和BKT进行自适应。
AI.result: 在三个学科领域测试：计算机科学自适应阅读显著改善学习效果；无机化学有较小正面但不显著的增益；普通生物学则中性到轻微负面效果。
AI.conclusion: 自适应阅读材料个性化框架在不同学科领域效果不同，计算机科学效果最好，表明学科特性和知识结构可能影响自适应策略的有效性。

title: Online Conformal Prediction with Adversarial Semi-bandit Feedback via Regret Minimization
summary: Uncertainty quantification is crucial in safety-critical systems, where decisions must be made under uncertainty. In particular, we consider the problem of online uncertainty quantification, where data points arrive sequentially. Online conformal prediction is a principled online uncertainty quantification method that dynamically constructs a prediction set at each time step. While existing methods for online conformal prediction provide long-run coverage guarantees without any distributional assumptions, they typically assume a full feedback setting in which the true label is always observed. In this paper, we propose a novel learning method for online conformal prediction with partial feedback from an adaptive adversary-a more challenging setup where the true label is revealed only when it lies inside the constructed prediction set. Specifically, we formulate online conformal prediction as an adversarial bandit problem by treating each candidate prediction set as an arm. Building on an existing algorithm for adversarial bandits, our method achieves a long-run coverage guarantee by explicitly establishing its connection to the regret of the learner. Finally, we empirically demonstrate the effectiveness of our method in both independent and identically distributed (i.i.d.) and non-i.i.d. settings, showing that it successfully controls the miscoverage rate while maintaining a reasonable size of the prediction set.

AI.tldr: 提出一种新的在线共形预测方法，处理部分反馈场景（仅当真实标签在预测集内时才被揭示），通过将问题建模为对抗性多臂老虎机问题，实现长期覆盖率保证。
AI.motivation: 现有在线共形预测方法通常假设完全反馈设置（总能观察到真实标签），但在实际安全关键系统中，真实标签可能只在预测集内时才被揭示。需要处理这种更具挑战性的部分反馈场景。
AI.method: 将在线共形预测问题建模为对抗性多臂老虎机问题，将每个候选预测集视为一个臂。基于现有的对抗性老虎机算法，通过建立与学习者遗憾的明确连接来实现长期覆盖率保证。
AI.result: 在独立同分布和非独立同分布设置下进行实证验证，表明该方法能成功控制误覆盖率，同时保持合理的预测集大小。
AI.conclusion: 提出了一种处理部分反馈的在线共形预测新方法，通过对抗性老虎机框架实现了长期覆盖率保证，在多种设置下表现有效。

title: Time-Delay Compensators for Linear Systems with Delayed Output Measurements
summary: This paper provides a comprehensive framework for designing functional observers for linear systems subject to delayed output measurements. Moving beyond traditional methodologies, the proposed observer generates an estimate $\hat{z}(t)$ that predicts the current state functional $z(t)=Fx(t)$ using delayed data. By neutralizing sensing latency, the observer serves as a potent time-delay compensator, effectively expanding the practical utility of functional observer theory. The proposed observer architecture offers greater robustness and versatility than traditional Luenberger-type observers by leveraging multiple delayed components to preserve accuracy despite latency. A key contribution of this work is a novel method for extending the maximum allowable measurement delay while maintaining the asymptotic stability of the estimation-error system. Existence conditions are established together with constructive synthesis procedures. Extensive numerical examples are given to illustrate the proposed theory.

AI.tldr: 提出一种用于具有输出测量延迟的线性系统的功能观测器设计框架，通过利用多个延迟分量来补偿传感延迟，提高鲁棒性和实用性。
AI.motivation: 传统观测器在处理输出测量延迟时存在局限性，需要开发能够补偿传感延迟的观测器设计方法，以扩展功能观测器理论的实际应用范围。
AI.method: 提出一种新型功能观测器架构，利用多个延迟分量来预测当前状态功能，通过中立化传感延迟来补偿时间延迟，建立了存在条件和构造性综合程序。
AI.result: 该观测器能够扩展最大允许测量延迟同时保持估计误差系统的渐近稳定性，相比传统Luenberger型观测器具有更好的鲁棒性和多功能性。
AI.conclusion: 该框架为具有延迟输出测量的线性系统提供了有效的功能观测器设计方法，通过延迟补偿技术显著提升了观测器的实用性和性能。

title: An Adaptive Smoothing Algorithm for Non-Lipschitz Optimization on Manifolds with Complexity Guarantees
summary: We study a class of optimization problems on Riemannian manifolds, where the objective function consists of a smooth term and quasi-norm type penalties with exponent $p \in (0, 1]$. The essential difficulty lies in the fact that the objective function may not be locally Lipschitz continuous, which places this type of problems beyond the reach of existing Riemannian techniques. To overcome this obstacle, this paper constructs a general smoothing framework and establishes fundamental properties for developing efficient algorithms. In particular, we propose a smoothing Riemannian gradient algorithm equipped with a smoothing-aware AdaGrad-type stepsize rule. Its global convergence is demonstrated together with an iteration complexity of $O (ε^{p - 4})$, which includes the best available iteration complexity of $O (ε^{- 3})$ for Lipschitz problems with $p = 1$ as a special case. To the best of our knowledge, this is the first complexity result for non-Lipschitz optimization on Riemannian manifolds. Preliminary numerical experiments corroborate the practical efficiency of the proposed approach in real-world applications arsing from machine learning and data science.

AI.tldr: 该论文提出了一种黎曼流形上非Lipschitz优化问题的平滑框架，开发了带自适应步长的平滑黎曼梯度算法，首次获得此类问题的复杂度结果
AI.motivation: 研究黎曼流形上包含p∈(0,1]拟范数惩罚项的非光滑优化问题，这类问题的目标函数可能不具有局部Lipschitz连续性，超出了现有黎曼优化技术的处理范围
AI.method: 构建通用平滑框架，提出平滑黎曼梯度算法，配备平滑感知的AdaGrad型步长规则，处理非Lipschitz目标函数
AI.result: 证明了算法的全局收敛性，获得O(ε^{p-4})的迭代复杂度，当p=1时退化为Lipschitz问题的最佳复杂度O(ε^{-3})，这是黎曼流形上非Lipschitz优化的首个复杂度结果
AI.conclusion: 该研究为黎曼流形上的非Lipschitz优化问题提供了首个理论保证和有效算法，在机器学习和数据科学应用中展现出实用价值

title: Generative AI Technologies, Techniques & Tensions: A Primer
comment: In press chapter for M.Mayrath, J. Behrens, & D. Robinson (Eds.), The Handbook of Generative AI in Education. Springer. Expected publication date approximately August 2026
summary: Generative AI systems have entered everyday academic, professional, and personal life with remarkable speed, yet most users encounter them as mysterious artifacts rather than intelligible systems. This chapter discusses large language models within a broader historical shift in computing paradigms and argues that many of the confusions surrounding their use arise from a mismatch between how these systems are built, how they behave, and how people expect computers to behave writ large. Rather than treating generative AI as a monolithic technology, the chapter decomposes it into interacting components, spanning data, models, product features, and user inputs, each introducing distinct affordances and tensions. Particular attention is given to the statistical and data-based foundations of these systems and to the fact that their surface behavior is explicitly human-like, a combination that places them squarely within the intellectual traditions of educational and behavioral research. From this perspective, educational researchers are unusually well positioned to study, evaluate, and productively use generative AI systems, drawing on established methods for modeling latent processes, managing uncertainty, and interpreting complex human-system interactions. The goal is to equip readers with a conceptual map that supports more informed experimentation, critical interpretation, and responsible use as these systems continue to evolve.

AI.tldr: 本章将生成式AI分解为数据、模型、产品功能和用户输入等组件，指出其统计基础与类人行为的结合使其适合教育研究，旨在提供概念框架以支持更明智的实验和负责任的使用。
AI.motivation: 生成式AI系统迅速进入日常生活，但用户常将其视为神秘工具而非可理解系统。当前存在系统构建方式、行为模式与用户对计算机期望之间的不匹配，需要澄清这些混淆。
AI.method: 将生成式AI分解为相互作用的数据、模型、产品功能和用户输入等组件，从计算范式历史转变角度分析，强调其统计和数据基础，以及类人表面行为的特性。
AI.result: 生成式AI的统计基础与类人行为的结合使其位于教育和行为研究的学术传统中，教育研究者特别适合研究、评估和有效使用这些系统，可利用现有方法建模潜在过程、管理不确定性和解释复杂人机交互。
AI.conclusion: 教育研究者具备独特优势来研究和应用生成式AI，通过提供概念框架支持更明智的实验、批判性解释和负责任使用，帮助用户更好地理解这些不断发展的系统。

title: From User Recognition to Activity Counting: An Identity-Agnostic Approach to Multi-User WiFi Sensing
summary: Wi-Fi Channel State Information (CSI) enables device-free human activity recognition, but existing multi-user approaches assume a fixed set of known users during both training and inference. This closed-set assumption limits deployment, as models trained on a specific user set degrade when applied to new individuals or environments. We reformulate multi-user activity recognition as activity counting, estimating how many users perform each activity type at a given time, without associating actions with specific individuals. We propose a pipeline that converts CSI measurements into spatial projections and extracts features using a pretrained convolutional backbone. Two formulations are evaluated on the WiMANS dataset: a conventional identity-dependent model that assigns activities to fixed user slots, and an identity-agnostic model that estimates scene-level activity composition through regression. Under standard evaluation, the identity-agnostic model achieves a mean absolute error of 0.1081 on a 0-5 count scale. Under unseen-user evaluation, the identity-dependent model's macro-F1 drops from 80.38 to 32.61, while the identity-agnostic model's counting error remains stable. Feature space analysis confirms that identity-agnostic representations are more user-invariant, which explains their stronger generalization. These results suggest that activity counting provides a more practical and generalizable alternative to identity-dependent formulations for multi-user WiFi sensing.

AI.tldr: 论文提出将多用户Wi-Fi活动识别重新定义为活动计数问题，通过身份无关的模型估计每种活动类型的用户数量，而不是将活动关联到特定个体，从而提升模型在未见用户上的泛化能力。
AI.motivation: 现有的多用户Wi-Fi活动识别方法假设训练和推理阶段用户集合固定，这种封闭集假设限制了实际部署，因为当应用于新用户或新环境时，模型性能会显著下降。
AI.method: 提出一个处理流程：将CSI测量转换为空间投影，使用预训练的卷积骨干网络提取特征。评估两种方案：传统的身份依赖模型（将活动分配给固定用户槽位）和身份无关模型（通过回归估计场景级活动组成）。
AI.result: 在标准评估下，身份无关模型在0-5计数尺度上达到0.1081的平均绝对误差。在未见用户评估中，身份依赖模型的macro-F1从80.38降至32.61，而身份无关模型的计数误差保持稳定。特征空间分析证实身份无关表示更具用户不变性。
AI.conclusion: 活动计数为多用户Wi-Fi感知提供了比身份依赖方案更实用和可泛化的替代方案，能够更好地适应新用户和环境变化。

title: Skilldex: A Package Manager and Registry for Agent Skill Packages with Hierarchical Scope-Based Distribution
comment: 8 pages, 1 figure, 5 tables. IEEE conference format
summary: Large Language Model (LLM) agents are increasingly extended at runtime via skill packages, structured natural-language instruction bundles loaded from a well-known directory. Community install tooling and registries exist, but two gaps persist: no public tool scores skill packages against Anthropic's published format specification, and no mechanism bundles related skills with the shared context they need to remain mutually coherent. We present Skilldex, a package manager and registry for agent skill packages addressing both gaps. The two novel contributions are: (1) compiler-style format conformance scoring against Anthropic's skill specification, producing line-level diagnostics on description specificity, frontmatter validity, and structural adherence; and (2) the skillset abstraction, a bundled collection of related skills with shared assets (vocabulary files, templates, reference documents) that enforce cross-skill behavioral coherence. Skilldex also provides supporting infrastructure: a three-tier hierarchical scope system, a human-in-the-loop agent suggestion loop, a metadata-only community registry, and a Model Context Protocol (MCP) server. The system is implemented as a TypeScript CLI (skillpm / spm) with a Hono/Supabase registry backend, and is open-source.

AI.tldr: Skilldex是一个针对LLM代理技能包的管理器和注册表，提供格式合规性评分和技能集抽象，解决现有工具在技能包验证和跨技能一致性方面的不足。
AI.motivation: 当前LLM代理技能包管理存在两个主要问题：1) 缺乏公开工具来评估技能包是否符合Anthropic的格式规范；2) 没有机制将相关技能与共享上下文捆绑，以保持跨技能的行为一致性。
AI.method: Skilldex包含两个核心创新：1) 编译器风格的格式合规性评分系统，对描述特异性、前置元数据有效性和结构符合性进行行级诊断；2) 技能集抽象，将相关技能与共享资产（词汇文件、模板、参考文档）捆绑，确保跨技能行为一致性。系统还包括三层层次作用域系统、人工参与代理建议循环、仅元数据社区注册表和MCP服务器。
AI.result: Skilldex已实现为TypeScript CLI工具（skillpm/spm）和Hono/Supabase注册表后端，并且是开源项目。
AI.conclusion: Skilldex解决了LLM代理技能包管理中的关键空白，通过格式验证和技能集抽象提高了技能包的质量和一致性，为社区提供了实用的基础设施。

title: Expressing Social Emotions: Misalignment Between LLMs and Human Cultural Emotion Norms
summary: The expression of emotions that serve social purposes, such as asserting independence or fostering interdependence, is central to human interactions and varies systematically across cultures. As LLMs are increasingly used to simulate human behavior in culturally nuanced interactions, it is important to understand whether they faithfully capture human patterns of social emotion expression. When LLM responses are not culturally aligned, their utility is compromised -- particularly when users assume they are interacting with a culturally attuned interlocutor, and may act on advice that proves inappropriate in their cultural context. We present a psychologically informed evaluation framework of cross-cultural social emotion expression in LLMs. Using a human study comparing European American and Latin American participants' expression of engaging and disengaging emotions, we evaluate six frontier LLMs on their ability to reflect culturally differentiated patterns for expressing social emotions. We find systematic misalignment between model and human behavior: all models express engaging emotions more than disengaging ones, with particularly stark differences observed for the generally well-represented European American persona. We further highlight that LLM responses are highly concentrated and deterministic, failing to capture the diversity of human responses in expressing social emotions. Our ablation analyses reveal that these patterns are robust to sampling temperatures, partially sensitive to prompt language, and dependent on the response elicitation format. Together, our findings highlight limitations in how current LLMs represent the interaction of cultural and emotional axes, particularly when expressing social emotions, with direct implications for their deployment in cross-cultural affective contexts.

AI.tldr: 研究发现LLM在表达社交情感时存在系统性文化偏差，无法准确反映人类跨文化情感表达模式，特别是无法捕捉人类反应的多样性。
AI.motivation: 随着LLM越来越多地用于模拟具有文化细微差别的人类行为，需要了解它们是否能准确捕捉人类社交情感表达模式。当LLM反应与文化不一致时，其效用会受损，特别是当用户认为自己在与一个文化敏感的对话者互动时。
AI.method: 提出了一个心理学启发的跨文化社交情感表达评估框架。通过比较欧洲裔美国人和拉丁裔美国人表达参与性和脱离性情感的人类研究，评估了六个前沿LLM反映文化差异化社交情感表达模式的能力。
AI.result: 发现模型与人类行为存在系统性偏差：所有模型表达参与性情感多于脱离性情感，特别是对于通常代表性较好的欧洲裔美国人角色。LLM反应高度集中和确定，无法捕捉人类表达社交情感的多样性。消融分析显示这些模式对采样温度具有鲁棒性，对提示语言部分敏感，并依赖于反应引发格式。
AI.conclusion: 当前LLM在表示文化和情感轴相互作用方面存在局限性，特别是在表达社交情感时，这对它们在跨文化情感环境中的部署有直接影响。

title: Towards E-Value Based Stopping Rules for Bayesian Deep Ensembles
comment: Accepted for presentation at the OPTIMAL Workshop at AISTATS 2026, Tangier, Morocco
summary: Bayesian Deep Ensembles (BDEs) represent a powerful approach for uncertainty quantification in deep learning, combining the robustness of Deep Ensembles (DEs) with flexible multi-chain MCMC. While DEs are affordable in most deep learning settings, (long) sampling of Bayesian neural networks can be prohibitively costly. Yet, adding sampling after optimizing the DEs has been shown to yield significant improvements. This leaves a critical practical question: How long should the sequential sampling process continue to yield significant improvements over the initial optimized DE baseline? To tackle this question, we propose a stopping rule based on E-values. We formulate the ensemble construction as a sequential anytime-valid hypothesis test, providing a principled way to decide whether or not to reject the null hypothesis that MCMC offers no improvement over a strong baseline, to early stop the sampling. Empirically, we study this approach for diverse settings. Our results demonstrate the efficacy of our approach and reveal that only a fraction of the full-chain budget is often required.

AI.tldr: 提出基于E值的停止准则，用于决定贝叶斯深度集成中MCMC采样何时停止，以在保证性能提升的同时减少计算成本。
AI.motivation: 贝叶斯深度集成结合了深度集成的鲁棒性和MCMC的灵活性，但MCMC采样计算成本高昂。现有方法在优化深度集成后添加采样能显著提升性能，但缺乏指导采样何时停止的实用准则。
AI.method: 将集成构建建模为序列化随时有效假设检验，提出基于E值的停止规则。通过检验MCMC是否比基线有显著改进的零假设，来决定是否提前停止采样。
AI.result: 实验表明该方法有效，通常只需要完整链预算的一小部分就能获得显著改进，大大减少了计算成本。
AI.conclusion: 提出的E值停止准则为贝叶斯深度集成中的MCMC采样提供了实用的停止策略，在保证性能提升的同时显著降低了计算开销。

title: WirelessAgent: A Unified Agent Design for General Wireless Resource Allocation Problem without Current Channel State Information
summary: This paper investigates the agent design for solving the wireless resource allocation problem without sufficient channel state information (CSI), which cannot be effectively solved via conventional method. In the considered wireless agent design, we provide the general sense-repair-decide-act workflow, which can be used to intelligently solve general wireless resource allocation problem. A multi-objective optimization problem is formulated to adaptively satisfy different user requirements including both spectrum and energy efficiency. This work addresses the challenge of incomplete CSI for multiple optimization objectives. To solve this problem, we use an artificial intelligence (AI) model to predict missing channel data and construct an agent on the Coze platform, allowing the network operators to optimize multiple objectives through natural language conversations. To tackle the resource scheduling under different objectives, we develop adaptive algorithms. Simulation results validate the effectiveness of our proposed design, demonstrating that the proposed AI method reduces the root mean square error by approximately up to 67\% compared to the traditional approach. Moreover, the data-driven scheduling balances system performance compared to conventional baseline approaches.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于AI的无线资源分配智能体设计，在信道状态信息不完整的情况下，通过感知-修复-决策-执行的工作流程，利用AI预测缺失信道数据，并通过自然语言对话优化多目标资源调度。
AI.motivation: 传统方法在信道状态信息不完整时无法有效解决无线资源分配问题，需要设计智能体来处理不完整的CSI并同时优化多个目标（频谱效率和能量效率）。
AI.method: 提出感知-修复-决策-执行的通用工作流程；使用AI模型预测缺失信道数据；在Coze平台上构建智能体，支持自然语言对话；开发自适应算法处理不同目标下的资源调度。
AI.result: 仿真结果表明，提出的AI方法相比传统方法将均方根误差降低了约67%；数据驱动的调度在系统性能平衡方面优于传统基线方法。
AI.conclusion: 该研究成功解决了不完整CSI下的多目标无线资源分配问题，提出的AI驱动智能体设计能够有效预测缺失数据并通过自然语言交互优化系统性能。

title: Momentum Stability and Adaptive Control in Stochastic Reconfiguration
summary: Variational Monte Carlo (VMC) combined with expressive neural network wavefunctions has become a powerful route to high-accuracy ground-state calculations, yet its practical success hinges on efficient and stable wavefunction optimization. While stochastic reconfiguration (SR) provides a geometry-aware preconditioner motivated by imaginary-time evolution, its Kaczmarz-inspired variant, subsampled projected-increment natural gradient descent (SPRING), achieves state-of-the-art empirical performance. However, the effectiveness of SPRING is highly sensitive to the choice of a momentum-like parameter $μ$. The original sensitivity of $μ$ and the instability observed at $μ=1$, have remained unclear. In this work, we clarify the distinct mechanisms governing the regimes $μ<1$ and $μ=1$. We establish convergence guarantees for $0\leμ<1$ under mild assumptions, and construct counterexamples showing that $μ=1$ can induce divergence via uncontrolled growth along kernel-related directions when the step-size is not summable. Motivated by these theoretical insights and numerical observations, we further propose \textit{Principal Range Informed MomEntum SR} (PRIME-SR), a tuning-free momentum-adaptive SR method based on effective spectral dimension and subspace overlap. PRIME-SR achieves performance comparable to optimally tuned SPRING while significantly improving robustness in VMC optimization.

AI.tldr: 该论文分析了SPRING优化方法中动量参数μ的敏感性，区分了μ<1和μ=1的收敛机制，提出了无调参的自适应动量方法PRIME-SR。
AI.motivation: 变分蒙特卡洛结合神经网络波函数已成为高精度基态计算的有力途径，但其实际成功依赖于高效稳定的波函数优化。SPRING方法虽然表现出色，但对动量参数μ的选择高度敏感，特别是μ=1时的不稳定性机制尚不明确。
AI.method: 首先从理论上分析SPRING方法中μ<1和μ=1两种情况的收敛机制，建立收敛保证并构造反例。基于理论洞察和数值观察，提出PRIME-SR方法，该方法基于有效谱维度和子空间重叠实现动量自适应，无需手动调参。
AI.result: 证明了在温和假设下0≤μ<1的收敛保证，构造了μ=1时可能发散的实例。提出的PRIME-SR方法在VMC优化中达到了与最优调参SPRING相当的性能，同时显著提高了鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: 该研究阐明了SPRING优化器中动量参数敏感性的理论机制，提出的PRIME-SR方法通过自适应动量调整解决了调参难题，为VMC优化提供了更稳定高效的解决方案。

title: Community-Led AI Integration for Wildfire Risk Assessment: A Participatory AI Literacy and Explainability Integration (PALEI) Framework in Los Angeles, CA
comment: 8 pages, 3 figures, This paper was accepted following peer review, presented at the ARCC-EAAE 2026 International Conference, Local Solutions for Global Issues, held in April 2026 in Atlanta, Georgia, USA, and will be published in the conference proceedings
summary: Climate-driven wildfires are intensifying, particularly in urban regions such as Southern California. Yet, traditional fire risk communication tools often fail to gain public trust due to inaccessible design, non-transparent outputs, and limited contextual relevance. These challenges are especially critical in high-risk communities, where trust depends on how clearly and locally information is presented. Neighborhoods such as Pacific Palisades, Pasadena, and Altadena in Los Angeles exemplify these conditions. This study introduces a community-led approach for integrating AI into wildfire risk assessment using the Participatory AI Literacy and Explainability Integration (PALEI) framework. PALEI emphasizes early literacy building, value alignment, and participatory evaluation before deploying predictive models, prioritizing clarity, accessibility, and mutual learning between developers and residents. Early engagement findings show strong acceptance of visual, context-specific risk communication, positive fairness perceptions, and clear adoption interest, alongside privacy and data security concerns that influence trust.
