Participants emphasized localized imagery, accessible explanations, neighborhood-specific mitigation guidance, and transparent communication of uncertainty. The outcome is a mobile application co-designed with users and stakeholders, enabling residents to scan visible property features and receive interpretable fire risk scores with tailored recommendations. By embedding local context into design, the tool becomes an everyday resource for risk awareness and preparedness. This study argues that user experience is central to ethical and effective AI deployment and provides a replicable, literacy-first pathway for applying the PALEI framework to climate-related hazards.

AI.tldr: 本研究提出PALEI框架，通过社区参与式AI素养建设和可解释性集成，开发面向野火风险评估的移动应用，强调用户体验和本地化设计。
AI.motivation: 传统火灾风险沟通工具存在设计不透明、输出难以理解、缺乏本地相关性等问题，难以获得公众信任，特别是在南加州等高风险社区。需要开发更透明、可访问且具有本地相关性的风险评估工具。
AI.method: 采用PALEI（参与式AI素养与可解释性集成）框架，强调早期素养建设、价值对齐和参与式评估，与用户和利益相关者共同设计移动应用，让居民扫描可见物业特征并获得可解释的风险评分。
AI.result: 早期参与结果显示：视觉化、情境化风险沟通获得强烈接受；公平性感知积极；采用意愿明确；同时存在隐私和数据安全担忧。参与者强调需要本地化图像、可访问的解释、社区特定减灾指导和不确定性透明沟通。
AI.conclusion: 用户体验是AI伦理有效部署的核心，PALEI框架为气候相关灾害应用提供了可复制的素养优先路径，通过嵌入本地情境使工具成为日常风险意识和准备资源。

title: FedOBP: Federated Optimal Brain Personalization through Cloud-Edge Element-wise Decoupling
summary: Federated Learning (FL) faces challenges from client data heterogeneity and resource-constrained mobile devices, which can degrade model accuracy. Personalized Federated Learning (PFL) addresses this issue by adapting shared global knowledge to local data distributions. A promising approach in PFL is model decoupling, which separates the model into global and personalized parameters, raising the key question of which parameters should be personalized to balance global knowledge sharing and local adaptation. In this paper, we propose a Federated Optimal Brain Personalization (FedOBP) algorithm with a quantile-based thresholding mechanism and introduce an element-wise importance score. This score extends Optimal Brain Damage (OBD) pruning theory by incorporating a federated approximation of the first-order derivative in the Taylor expansion to evaluate the importance of each parameter for personalization. Moreover, we move the metric computation originally performed on clients to the server side, to alleviate the burden on resource-constrained mobile devices. To the best of our knowledge, this is the first work to bridge classical saliency-based pruning theory with federated parameter decoupling, providing a rigorous theoretical justification for selecting personalized parameters based on their sensitivity to local loss landscapes. Extensive experiments demonstrate that FedOBP outperforms state-of-the-art methods across diverse datasets and heterogeneity scenarios, while requiring personalization of only a very small number of personalized parameters.

AI.tldr: FedOBP提出了一种联邦最优大脑个性化算法，通过量化阈值机制和元素级重要性评分，在联邦学习中智能选择哪些参数应该个性化，平衡全局知识共享和本地适应。
AI.motivation: 联邦学习面临客户端数据异构和移动设备资源受限的挑战，这会影响模型准确性。个性化联邦学习通过将共享的全局知识适应到本地数据分布来解决这个问题。模型解耦方法将模型分为全局和个性化参数，但关键问题是如何选择哪些参数应该个性化以平衡全局知识共享和本地适应。
AI.method: 提出FedOBP算法，包含量化阈值机制和元素级重要性评分。该评分扩展了最优大脑损伤剪枝理论，通过结合泰勒展开中的一阶导数联邦近似来评估每个参数对个性化的重要性。将原本在客户端进行的度量计算移到服务器端，减轻资源受限移动设备的负担。
AI.result: 大量实验表明，FedOBP在多种数据集和异构场景下优于最先进的方法，同时只需要个性化极少量的参数。
AI.conclusion: 这是首个将经典的基于显著性的剪枝理论与联邦参数解耦相结合的工作，为基于参数对本地损失景观敏感性的个性化参数选择提供了严格的理论依据。

title: The Cognitive Penalty: Ablating System 1 and System 2 Reasoning in Edge-Native SLMs for Decentralized Consensus
comment: Working paper. 14 pages, 3 figures, 6 tables. Code and dataset: https://github.com/smarizvi110/sentinel-bench
summary:
Decentralized Autonomous Organizations (DAOs) are inclined explore Small Language Models (SLMs) as edge-native constitutional firewalls to vet proposals and mitigate semantic social engineering. While scaling inference-time compute (System 2) enhances formal logic, its efficacy in highly adversarial, cryptoeconomic governance environments remains underexplored. To address this, we introduce Sentinel-Bench, an 840-inference empirical framework executing a strict intra-model ablation on Qwen-3.5-9B. By toggling latent reasoning across frozen weights, we isolate the impact of inference-time compute against an adversarial Optimism DAO dataset. Our findings reveal a severe compute-accuracy inversion. The autoregressive baseline (System 1) achieved 100% adversarial robustness, 100% juridical consistency, and state finality in under 13 seconds. Conversely, System 2 reasoning introduced catastrophic instability, fundamentally driven by a 26.7% Reasoning Non-Convergence (cognitive collapse) rate. This collapse degraded trial-to-trial consensus stability to 72.6% and imposed a 17x latency overhead, introducing critical vulnerabilities to Governance Extractable Value (GEV) and hardware centralization. While rare (1.5% of adversarial trials), we empirically captured "Reasoning-Induced Sycophancy," where the model generated significantly longer internal monologues (averaging 25,750 characters) to rationalize failing the adversarial trap. We conclude that for edge-native SLMs operating under Byzantine Fault Tolerance (BFT) constraints, System 1 parameterized intuition is structurally and economically superior to System 2 iterative deliberation for decentralized consensus.
  Code and Dataset: https://github.com/smarizvi110/sentinel-bench

AI.tldr: 研究发现，在去中心化自治组织（DAO）环境中，小型语言模型（SLM）的系统1（直觉推理）比系统2（深度推理）在对抗性治理场景中表现更优，系统2推理会导致认知崩溃和严重延迟。
AI.motivation: 研究动机是探索在高度对抗性的加密经济治理环境中，小型语言模型作为边缘原生宪法防火墙时，推理时计算（系统2）与参数化直觉（系统1）的有效性对比，特别是在去中心化自治组织的提案审查场景中。
AI.method: 研究者引入了Sentinel-Bench框架，包含840次推理实验，在Qwen-3.5-9B模型上进行严格的模型内消融研究。通过切换冻结权重中的潜在推理能力，隔离推理时计算的影响，并使用对抗性的Optimism DAO数据集进行评估。
AI.result: 结果显示严重的计算-准确性反转：系统1基线实现了100%对抗鲁棒性、100%司法一致性和13秒内的状态最终性；而系统2推理导致灾难性不稳定，26.7%的推理不收敛率，共识稳定性降至72.6%，延迟增加17倍，并出现1.5%的"推理诱导奉承"现象。
AI.conclusion: 结论是，在拜占庭容错约束下运行的边缘原生小型语言模型中，系统1参数化直觉在结构上和经济上都优于系统2迭代审议，更适合去中心化共识场景。

title: When Misinformation Speaks and Converses: Rethinking Fact-Checking in Audio Platforms
summary: Audio platforms have evolved beyond entertainment. They have become central to public discourse, from podcasts and radio to WhatsApp voice notes and live streams. With millions of shows and hundreds of millions of listeners, audio platforms are now a major channel for misinformation. Yet existing fact-checking pipelines are mostly designed for written claims, overlooking the unique properties of spoken media. We argue that audio misinformation is not merely textual content with transcripts: it is structurally different because it is both spoken - carrying persuasive force through prosody, pacing, and emotion - and conversational - unfolding across turns, speakers, and episodes. These dual properties introduce verification difficulties that traditional methods rarely face. This position paper synthesizes evidence across modalities and platforms, examines datasets and methods, and highlights why existing pipelines fail on audio. We argue that advancing fact-checking requires rethinking verification pipelines around the spoken and conversational realities of audio.

AI.tldr: 音频平台已成为错误信息传播的主要渠道，但现有事实核查方法主要针对文本内容，忽视了音频作为口语和对话媒体的独特属性。
AI.motivation: 音频平台（播客、语音消息、直播等）已从娱乐工具演变为公共话语中心，成为错误信息传播的主要渠道。现有事实核查流程主要针对书面声明设计，忽视了音频作为口语和对话媒体的独特属性，导致对音频错误信息的核查效果不佳。
AI.method: 这是一篇立场论文，通过综合跨模态和跨平台的证据，分析现有数据集和方法，探讨传统事实核查流程在音频领域的局限性。论文主张围绕音频的口语和对话特性重新设计验证流程。
AI.result: 研究发现音频错误信息在结构上与文本不同：作为口语媒体，它通过韵律、节奏和情感传递说服力；作为对话媒体，它在多个话轮、说话者和剧集之间展开。这些双重特性带来了传统方法很少面对的验证困难。
AI.conclusion: 要推进事实核查工作，需要围绕音频的口语和对话现实重新思考验证流程，开发专门针对音频媒体特性的新方法，而不是简单地将文本事实核查技术应用于音频转录。

title: Knowing When to Quit: A Principled Framework for Dynamic Abstention in LLM Reasoning
summary: Large language models (LLMs) using chain-of-thought reasoning often waste substantial compute by producing long, incorrect responses. Abstention can mitigate this by withholding outputs unlikely to be correct. While most abstention methods decide to withhold outputs before or after generation, dynamic mid-generation abstention considers early termination of unpromising reasoning traces at each token position. Prior work has explored empirical variants of this idea, but principled guidance for the abstention rule remains lacking. We present a formal analysis of dynamic abstention for LLMs, modeling abstention as an explicit action within a regularized reinforcement learning framework. An abstention reward parameter controls the trade-off between compute and information. We show that abstaining when the value function falls below this reward strictly outperforms natural baselines under general conditions. We further derive a principled and efficient method to approximate the value function. Empirical results on mathematical reasoning and toxicity avoidance tasks support our theory and demonstrate improved selective accuracy over existing methods.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种基于强化学习的动态中止方法，在推理过程中根据价值函数决定是否中止不正确的长响应，平衡计算成本与信息获取
AI.motivation: 大型语言模型使用思维链推理时经常产生长而错误的响应，浪费大量计算资源。现有中止方法多在生成前或生成后决定是否保留输出，缺乏在生成过程中动态中止的原则性指导
AI.method: 将动态中止建模为强化学习框架中的显式动作，通过中止奖励参数平衡计算与信息。提出当中止价值函数低于奖励阈值时中止，并推导了高效近似价值函数的方法
AI.result: 理论分析表明该方法在一般条件下严格优于自然基线。在数学推理和毒性避免任务上的实证结果支持理论，并展示了比现有方法更好的选择性准确率
AI.conclusion: 提出了一个原则性的动态中止框架，通过强化学习建模，在推理过程中智能地中止不正确的推理轨迹，有效平衡计算效率与输出质量

title: System representations in subspaces of finite-sample signals and their application to data-driven fault detection
summary: This paper deals with system representations in finite-sample signal subspaces and their application to data-driven fault detection. The first part addresses concepts of finite-sample image and kernel system representations and, associated with them, image and residual subspaces of finite-sample signals. On this basis, the equivalence between the fundamental lemma and finite-sample image subspace is demonstrated. While the image representation models the nominal system dynamics, the residual representation describes uncertainties in the input-output data and is essential for fault detection. This result extends the fundamental lemma and builds the basis for exploring data-driven fault detection. In the second part, a data-driven projection-based fault detection approach is developed. By means of a singular value decomposition, orthogonal projections onto the image and residual subspaces are realized in the context of a low-rank matrix approximation, leading to projection-based residual generation and evaluation. Finally, analysis of detection performance in the framework of matrix perturbation theory and comparison with existing data-driven fault detection methods are explored.

AI.tldr: 该论文研究有限样本信号子空间中的系统表示及其在数据驱动故障检测中的应用，建立了基本引理与有限样本图像子空间的等价性，并开发了基于投影的故障检测方法。
AI.motivation: 研究数据驱动故障检测方法，通过有限样本信号子空间表示系统，建立基本引理与有限样本图像子空间的联系，为故障检测提供理论基础。
AI.method: 第一部分：建立有限样本图像和核系统表示概念，证明基本引理与有限样本图像子空间的等价性。第二部分：通过奇异值分解实现图像和残差子空间的正交投影，基于低秩矩阵近似开发投影式残差生成与评估方法。
AI.result: 扩展了基本引理，建立了数据驱动故障检测的基础；开发了基于投影的故障检测方法；在矩阵扰动理论框架下分析检测性能，并与现有方法进行比较。
AI.conclusion: 论文成功建立了有限样本信号子空间系统表示的理论框架，证明了基本引理与有限样本图像子空间的等价性，并开发了有效的投影式数据驱动故障检测方法，为系统故障检测提供了新的理论工具。

title: Real-Time Algorithms for Model Predictive Control of Hybrid Dynamical Systems
comment: 16 pages, 6 figures, open-source implementation of algorithms at https://github.com/nosnoc/nosnoc
summary: Model predictive control (MPC) of hybrid dynamical systems is challenging because the associated optimization problem is nonsmooth and the resulting feedback law is discontinuous. This paper develops real-time MPC algorithms for nonlinear hybrid systems modeled as dynamical complementarity systems. The resulting optimal control problems are formulated as mathematical programs with complementarity constraints (MPCCs). We show that the solution map of parametric MPCCs is discontinuous, and that standard nonlinear-programming-based approaches may become infeasible when the hybrid system switches. To address this, we introduce three real-time hybrid MPC schemes whose feedback phase solves a quadratic program with complementarity constraints per sample, yielding local discontinuous piecewise affine approximations of the MPC feedback law. Moreover, we derive continuity and differentiability results for parametric MPCCs, and establish conditions under which the approximation error of our new hybrid MPC algorithms remains uniformly bounded despite solution discontinuities. The algorithms are demonstrated on a robotic manipulation example, where contact sequences are discovered online.

AI.tldr: 该论文针对非线性混合系统的模型预测控制问题，提出了三种实时混合MPC方案，通过求解带互补约束的二次规划来近似不连续的MPC反馈律，并证明了近似误差的一致有界性。
AI.motivation: 混合动力系统的模型预测控制面临挑战，因为相关的优化问题是非光滑的，并且得到的反馈律是不连续的。标准非线性规划方法在系统切换时可能变得不可行，需要开发能够处理这些不连续性的实时MPC算法。
AI.method: 将混合系统建模为动态互补系统，最优控制问题表述为带互补约束的数学规划（MPCC）。提出了三种实时混合MPC方案，在每个采样点求解带互补约束的二次规划，得到MPC反馈律的局部不连续分段仿射近似。推导了参数化MPCC的连续性和可微性结果。
AI.result: 建立了条件，证明新混合MPC算法的近似误差在解不连续的情况下仍然保持一致有界。在机器人操作示例中演示了算法，能够在线发现接触序列。
AI.conclusion: 该研究为非线性混合系统的实时MPC提供了有效的解决方案，通过处理互补约束和不连续性，实现了在系统切换时的稳定控制，特别适用于需要在线发现接触序列的机器人操作等应用。

title: Teaching Usable Privacy in HCI Education: Designing, Implementing, and Evaluating an Active Learning Graduate
summary: As digital systems increasingly rely on pervasive data collection and inference, educating future designers and researchers about Usable Privacy has become a critical need for HCI. However, privacy education in higher education is often fragmented, theory-heavy, or detached from real-world applications. Thus, in this paper, we present the design, implementation, and evaluation of a 15-week graduate-level course on Usable Privacy that addresses this through active, practice-oriented pedagogy. The course integrates use cases, structured role playing, case-based discussions, guest lectures, and a multi-phase research project to support students in reasoning about privacy from multiple stakeholder perspectives. Grounded in contemporary privacy research and the Modern Privacy framework, the curriculum emphasizes both conceptual understanding and applied research skills. We report findings from two course offerings in consecutive years (2024-2025) using a mixed-methods evaluation that combines quantitative teaching evaluations with qualitative analysis of student reflections and instructor observations. Results indicate increased student engagement, improved ability to articulate trade-offs in privacy design, and stronger connections between theory and practice. To support adoption and replication, we also release detailed assignment descriptions and grading rubrics. This work contributes an empirically informed model for teaching Usable Privacy in HCI education and offers actionable guidance for educators seeking to integrate privacy into their curricula.

AI.tldr: 设计并评估了一门15周的研究生可用性隐私课程，采用实践导向教学法，结合案例研究、角色扮演和项目实践，结果显示学生参与度和理论实践结合能力显著提升。
AI.motivation: 随着数字系统日益依赖数据收集和推断，可用性隐私教育成为HCI领域的关键需求。然而，高等教育中的隐私教育往往碎片化、理论过重或脱离实际应用。
AI.method: 设计并实施15周研究生课程，采用主动实践导向教学法，整合用例分析、结构化角色扮演、案例讨论、客座讲座和多阶段研究项目，基于现代隐私框架，强调概念理解和应用研究技能。
AI.result: 通过2024-2025年两轮课程混合方法评估，结果显示学生参与度提高，隐私设计权衡表达能力增强，理论实践联系更紧密，并发布了详细作业描述和评分标准供复用。
AI.conclusion: 这项工作为HCI教育中的可用性隐私教学提供了经验支持的模型，并为教育工作者将隐私整合到课程中提供了可操作的指导。

authors: Tereza Cristina M. de B. Carvalho
title: Evaluating Temporal and Structural Anomaly Detection Paradigms for DDoS Traffic
comment: Paper accepted for publication at Experimental Research Workshop on the Future Internet (2026) in conjunction with Brazilian Symposium on Computer Networks and Distributed Systems (2026)
summary: Unsupervised anomaly detection is widely used to detect Distributed Denial-of-Service (DDoS) attacks in cloud-native 5G networks, yet most studies assume a fixed traffic representation, either temporal or structural, without validating which feature space best matches the data. We propose a lightweight decision framework that prioritizes temporal or structural features before training, using two diagnostics: lag-1 autocorrelation of an aggregated flow signal and PCA cumulative explained variance. When the probes are inconclusive, the framework reserves a hybrid option as a future fallback rather than an empirically validated branch. Experiments on two statistically distinct datasets with Isolation Forest, One-Class SVM, and KMeans show that structural features consistently match or outperform temporal ones, with the performance gap widening as temporal dependence weakens.

AI.tldr: 提出轻量级决策框架，通过两个诊断指标（滞后1自相关和PCA累积解释方差）在训练前优先选择时间或结构特征进行DDoS异常检测，避免固定特征表示的假设。
AI.motivation: 当前无监督异常检测在云原生5G网络DDoS攻击检测中广泛使用，但大多数研究假设固定的流量表示（时间或结构特征），没有验证哪种特征空间最适合数据。
AI.method: 提出轻量级决策框架，在训练前通过两个诊断指标优先选择特征：1）聚合流量信号的滞后1自相关性；2）PCA累积解释方差。当诊断结果不确定时，框架保留混合选项作为未来备用方案而非经验验证分支。
AI.result: 在两个统计特性不同的数据集上，使用Isolation Forest、One-Class SVM和KMeans进行实验，结果显示结构特征始终匹配或优于时间特征，且随着时间依赖性减弱，性能差距会扩大。
AI.conclusion: 结构特征在DDoS异常检测中表现更优，提出的决策框架能够有效指导特征选择，避免对固定特征表示的盲目假设，提高检测性能。

title: ClimAgent: LLM as Agents for Autonomous Open-ended Climate Science Analysis
summary: Climate research is pivotal for mitigating global environmental crises, yet the accelerating volume of multi-scale datasets and the complexity of analytical tools have created significant bottlenecks, constraining scientific discovery to fragmented and labor-intensive workflows. While the emergence Large Language Models (LLMs) offers a transformative paradigm to scale scientific expertise, existing explorations remain largely confined to simple Question-Answering (Q&A) tasks. These approaches often oversimplify real-world challenges, neglecting the intricate physical constraints and the data-driven nature required in professional climate science.To bridge this gap, we introduce ClimAgent, a general-purpose autonomous framework designed to execute a wide spectrum of research tasks across diverse climate sub-fields. By integrating a unified tool-use environment with rigorous reasoning protocols, ClimAgent transcends simple retrieval to perform end-to-end modeling and analysis.To foster systematic evaluation, we propose ClimaBench, the first comprehensive benchmark for real-world climate discovery. It encompasses challenging problems spanning 5 distinct task categories derived from professional scenarios between 2000 and 2025. Experiments on ClimaBench demonstrate that ClimAgent significantly outperforms state-of-the-art baselines, achieving a 40.21% improvement over original LLM solutions in solution rigorousness and practicality. Our code are available at https://github.com/usail-hkust/ClimAgent.

AI.tldr: ClimAgent是一个面向气候科学的自主智能框架，通过集成工具使用环境和严格推理协议，能够执行端到端建模分析，在真实气候发现基准上显著优于现有方法。
AI.motivation: 当前气候研究面临多尺度数据爆炸和分析工具复杂的瓶颈，现有LLM应用局限于简单问答任务，无法满足专业气候科学对物理约束和数据驱动的要求。
AI.method: 提出ClimAgent框架，集成统一工具使用环境和严格推理协议，超越简单检索实现端到端建模分析；同时构建ClimaBench基准，包含2000-2025年专业场景的5类任务。
AI.result: 在ClimaBench基准测试中，ClimAgent显著优于现有最先进基线，在解决方案严谨性和实用性方面比原始LLM解决方案提升40.21%。
AI.conclusion: ClimAgent通过自主智能框架解决了气候科学研究的瓶颈，为专业气候发现提供了有效的解决方案，代码已开源供社区使用。

title: StageMem: Lifecycle-Managed Memory for Language Models
summary: Long-horizon language model systems increasingly rely on persistent memory, yet many current designs still treat memory primarily as a static store: write an item, place it into memory, and retrieve it later if needed. We argue that this framing does not adequately capture the practical memory-control problem in deployed LLM systems. In realistic settings, the difficulty is often not merely forgetting useful information, but retaining too many uncertain items, forgetting important content in the wrong order, and giving users little trust in what will persist over time. We propose StageMem, a lifecycle-managed memory framework that treats memory as a stateful process rather than a passive repository. StageMem organizes memory into three stages -- transient, working, and durable memory -- and models each item with explicit confidence and strength. This separates shallow admission from long-term commitment: information may first be written at low cost and only later be promoted, retained, updated, or evicted as evidence and pressure evolve. Under controlled pressure regimes, this decomposition helps preserve late-important content while keeping memory burden and deeper-tier pollution more controlled. Adapted external tasks provide boundary evidence that the same schema remains compatible with stronger retrieval structure outside pure synthetic control. We present StageMem as a principled decomposition of the memory-control problem for language model systems.

AI.tldr: StageMem是一个生命周期管理的记忆框架，将记忆视为状态化过程而非被动存储库，通过三个阶段（瞬时、工作、持久记忆）和置信度/强度建模来优化长期语言模型系统的记忆控制。
AI.motivation: 当前LLM系统将记忆主要视为静态存储，这种框架无法充分解决实际部署中的记忆控制问题。实际困难往往不是忘记有用信息，而是保留了太多不确定项、以错误顺序忘记重要内容，以及用户对什么会随时间持久化缺乏信任。
AI.method: StageMem将记忆组织为三个阶段：瞬时记忆、工作记忆和持久记忆，每个记忆项都有明确的置信度和强度建模。这种设计将浅层接纳与长期承诺分离，信息可以低成本写入，然后根据证据和压力变化进行提升、保留、更新或淘汰。
AI.result: 在受控压力机制下，这种分解有助于保留后期重要内容，同时更好地控制记忆负担和深层污染。适应外部任务提供了边界证据，表明相同模式与纯合成控制之外的更强检索结构保持兼容。
AI.conclusion: StageMem为语言模型系统提供了一个原则性的记忆控制问题分解框架，将记忆视为状态化过程而非被动存储库，通过生命周期管理优化长期记忆性能。

title: Target Parameterization in Diffusion Models for Nonlinear Spatiotemporal System Identification
summary: Machine learning is becoming increasingly important for nonlinear system identification, including dynamical systems with spatially distributed outputs. However, classical identification and forecasting approaches become markedly less reliable in turbulent-flow regimes, where the dynamics are high-dimensional, strongly nonlinear, and highly sensitive to compounding rollout errors. Diffusion-based models have recently shown improved robustness in this setting and offer probabilistic inference capabilities, but many current implementations inherit target parameterizations from image generation, most commonly noise or velocity prediction. In this work, we revisit this design choice in the context of nonlinear spatiotemporal system identification. We consider a simple, self-contained patch-based transformer that operates directly on physical fields and use turbulent flow simulation as a representative testbed. Our results show that clean-state prediction consistently improves rollout stability and reduces long-horizon error relative to velocity- and noise-based objectives, with the advantage becoming more pronounced as the per-token dimensionality increases. These findings identify target parameterization as a key modeling choice in diffusion-based identification of nonlinear systems with spatial outputs in turbulent regimes.

AI.tldr: 该论文研究在湍流等非线性时空系统辨识中，扩散模型的目标参数化选择问题，发现直接预测物理场的"干净状态"比预测速度或噪声更稳定且误差更小。
AI.motivation: 传统辨识方法在湍流等高维非线性系统中可靠性下降，扩散模型虽提供鲁棒性和概率推断能力，但现有实现多继承图像生成中的噪声或速度预测参数化，需要重新评估这种设计选择在非线性时空系统辨识中的适用性。
AI.method: 使用简单、自包含的基于补丁的transformer模型，直接在物理场上操作，以湍流模拟为代表性测试平台，比较干净状态预测、速度预测和噪声预测三种目标参数化方法。
AI.result: 干净状态预测在滚动稳定性方面持续优于速度和噪声预测目标，能显著减少长期预测误差，且随着每个token维度增加，这种优势变得更加明显。
AI.conclusion: 目标参数化是扩散基非线性时空系统辨识中的关键建模选择，特别是在湍流等复杂系统中，直接预测物理场的干净状态是最优策略。

title: Geometric Trajectory Optimization for TRACON Arrivals: An NLP Approach with ATC Vectoring Maneuver Modeling
summary: Terminal airspace congestion remains a major bottleneck in the global air traffic network. Although the Aircraft Sequencing and Scheduling Problem (ASSP) has been widely studied, many methods rely on simplified node-link abstractions that ignore the practical flight path, producing schedules that can be hard to execute under real airspace geometric constraints. This paper introduces a high-fidelity trajectory optimization framework for Terminal Arrival Sequencing and Scheduling (TASS) that explicitly models controller vectoring maneuvers. We formulate a single-stage nonlinear programming (NLP) model with a weighted objective function that optimizes Baseleg path extension and segment-wise speed profiles for arriving aircraft. The model enforces nonlinear geometric coupling between Baseleg extensions and the required Radius-to-Fix (RF) turn for Final Approach Fix (FAF) intercept through closed-form expressions. Under the First-Come-First-Served (FCFS) rule, it generates separated, operationally feasible trajectories aligned with controller practice. Monte Carlo simulations with ample runs on the A80 TRACON in Atlanta demonstrate minimal separation violations below the runway capacity threshold through tactical path stretching, with violations occurring only when arrival rates exceed the maximum tolerable rate.

AI.tldr: 提出一个高保真的终端到达排序调度轨迹优化框架，通过建模管制员引导机动，生成符合实际空域几何约束的可执行轨迹。
AI.motivation: 终端空域拥堵是航空交通网络的主要瓶颈。现有ASSP方法多依赖简化的节点-链路抽象，忽略实际飞行路径，导致生成的调度计划在真实空域几何约束下难以执行。
AI.method: 提出单阶段非线性规划模型，优化到达飞机的Baseleg路径延伸和分段速度剖面。模型通过闭式表达式强制执行Baseleg延伸与FAF拦截所需RF转弯之间的非线性几何耦合，在FCFS规则下生成分离且操作可行的轨迹。
AI.result: 在亚特兰大A80 TRACON进行大量蒙特卡洛模拟，显示通过战术路径延伸，分离违规低于跑道容量阈值，仅在到达率超过最大可容忍率时才出现违规。
AI.conclusion: 该高保真轨迹优化框架能够生成符合管制实践的操作可行轨迹，有效解决终端空域拥堵问题，为实际应用提供了可行的解决方案。

title: Party Autonomy in Determining the Law Applicable to Non-contractual Obligations concerning Cross-Border Data Transfers
summary: (1)Cross-border data transfers have become a matter of daily occurrence against the backdrop of the development of cloud computing and artificial intelligence. Consequently, where a data leak gives rise to civil liability, the determination of that liability inevitably assumes an international dimension involving foreign elements. (2)As is starkly demonstrated by secret sharing technology in cloud computing, fragments of data may be presumed to be distributed across multiple jurisdictions on a global scale. This renders traditional private international law measures -- predicated on the identification of a physical location -- inadequate for the purposes of determining the applicable law, a difficulty that is particularly acute in relation to non-contractual obligations. (3)Bearing in mind the typical scenario encountered in practice -- in which a Data Subject brings a claim for damages against a SaaS (Software as a Service) provider, which in turn seeks recourse against an IaaS (Infrastructure as a Service) or PaaS (Platform as a Service) provider -- a characteristic feature of such cases is the concurrence of contractual and non-contractual obligations. Taking this feature into account, it is possible to determine the applicable law governing non-contractual obligations through party autonomy -- by aligning it with the law governing the contractual obligation as selected by the parties, an approach that may be termed private ordering. This serves to overcome the difficulties associated with the identification of a physical location and, at the same time, contributes to ensuring the foreseeability of the parties.

AI.tldr: 论文探讨云计算和AI背景下跨境数据泄露的民事责任适用法律问题，提出通过当事人意思自治（private ordering）将非合同义务适用法律与合同义务适用法律对齐，以解决传统国际私法基于物理位置的局限性。
AI.motivation: 随着云计算和人工智能的发展，跨境数据传输日益频繁，数据泄露引发的民事责任具有跨国性。传统国际私法基于物理位置确定适用法律的方法在云计算环境下（如秘密共享技术使数据碎片分布在多个司法管辖区）已不适用，特别是在非合同义务领域面临困难。
AI.method: 考虑实践中典型场景：数据主体向SaaS提供商索赔，SaaS提供商再向IaaS或PaaS提供商追偿。这种案件的特点是合同义务和非合同义务并存。通过当事人意思自治（private ordering），将非合同义务的适用法律与当事人选择的合同义务适用法律对齐。
AI.result: 提出的方法能够克服基于物理位置确定适用法律的困难，同时增强当事人的可预见性。通过将非合同义务适用法律与合同义务适用法律对齐，为云计算环境下跨境数据泄露的民事责任提供了可行的法律适用解决方案。
AI.conclusion: 在云计算和AI时代，传统国际私法方法已不足以处理跨境数据泄露的民事责任问题。通过当事人意思自治将非合同义务适用法律与合同义务适用法律对齐的private ordering方法，既能解决物理位置识别的困难，又能确保法律适用的可预见性，是应对这一挑战的有效途径。

title: Towards Trustworthy Depression Estimation via Disentangled Evidential Learning
summary: Automated depression estimation is highly vulnerable to signal corruption and ambient noise in real-world deployment. Prevailing deterministic methods produce uncalibrated point estimates, exposing safety-critical clinical systems to the severe risk of overconfident misdiagnoses. To establish a highly resilient and trustworthy assessment paradigm, we propose EviDep, an evidential learning framework that jointly quantifies depression severity alongside aleatoric and epistemic uncertainties via a Normal-Inverse-Gamma distribution. A fundamental vulnerability in multimodal evidential fusion is the uncontrolled accumulation of cross-modal redundancies. This structural flaw artificially inflates diagnostic confidence by double-counting overlapping evidence. To guarantee robust evidence synthesis, EviDep enforces strict information integrity. First, a Frequency-aware Feature Extraction module leverages a wavelet-based Mixture-of-Experts to dynamically isolate task-irrelevant noise, preserving the fidelity of diagnostic signals. Subsequently, a Disentangled Evidential Learning strategy separates the shared consensus from modality-specific nuances. By explicitly decoupling these representations before Bayesian fusion, EviDep systematically mitigates evidence redundancy. Extensive experiments on AVEC 2013, 2014, DAIC-WOZ, and E-DAIC confirm that EviDep achieves state-of-the-art predictive accuracy and superior uncertainty calibration, delivering a robust fail-safe mechanism for trustworthy clinical screening.

AI.tldr: EviDep：一种基于证据学习的抑郁症评估框架，通过Normal-Inverse-Gamma分布联合量化抑郁严重程度及不确定性，采用频率感知特征提取和解耦证据学习策略，有效减少跨模态冗余，提升临床筛查的鲁棒性和可信度。
AI.motivation: 现有抑郁症自动评估方法在真实场景中易受信号污染和环境噪声影响，确定性方法产生未校准的点估计，使临床系统面临过度自信误诊的风险。需要建立具有高度弹性和可信度的评估范式。
AI.method: 提出EviDep证据学习框架：1）频率感知特征提取模块，使用基于小波的专家混合模型动态隔离任务无关噪声；2）解耦证据学习策略，分离共享共识和模态特定信息；3）通过Normal-Inverse-Gamma分布联合量化抑郁严重程度、偶然不确定性和认知不确定性。
AI.result: 在AVEC 2013、2014、DAIC-WOZ和E-DAIC数据集上的实验表明，EviDep实现了最先进的预测精度和优越的不确定性校准，为可信临床筛查提供了鲁棒的故障安全机制。
AI.conclusion: EviDep通过严格的信息完整性保障和证据冗余缓解，建立了高度弹性和可信的抑郁症评估范式，为安全关键的临床系统提供了可靠的决策支持。

title: Alignment Imprint: Zero-Shot AI-Generated Text Detection via Provable Preference Discrepancy
summary: Detecting AI-generated text is an important but challenging problem. Existing likelihood-based detection methods are often sensitive to content complexity and may exhibit unstable performance. In this paper, our key insight is that modern Large Language Models (LLMs) undergo alignment (including fine-tuning and preference tuning), leaving a measurable distributional imprint. We theoretically derive this imprint by abstracting the alignment process as a sequence of constrained optimization steps, showing that the log-likelihood ratio can naturally decompose into implicit instructional biases and preference rewards. We refer to this quantity as the Alignment Imprint. Furthermore, to mitigate the instability in high-entropy regions, we introduce Log-likelihood Alignment Preference Discrepancy (LAPD), a standardized information-weighted statistic based on alignment imprint. We provide statistical guarantee that alignment-based statistics dominate Fast-DetectGPT in performance. We also theoretically show that LAPD strictly improves the unweighted alignment scores when the aligned and base models are close in distribution. Extensive experiments show that LAPD achieves an improvement 45.82% relative to the strongest existing baselines, yielding large and consistent gains across all settings.

AI.tldr: 提出LAPD方法，通过标准化信息加权的对齐印记统计量检测AI生成文本，相比现有方法提升45.82%
AI.motivation: 现有基于似然的AI文本检测方法对内容复杂度敏感且性能不稳定，需要更鲁棒的检测方法
AI.method: 理论推导对齐印记，将LLM对齐过程抽象为约束优化序列，提出基于对齐印记的标准化信息加权统计量LAPD
AI.result: LAPD相比最强基线提升45.82%，在所有设置中均取得显著且一致的性能提升
AI.conclusion: 利用LLM对齐过程留下的分布印记可以有效检测AI生成文本，LAPD方法在理论和实验上均优于现有方法

title: When Informal Text Breaks NLI: Tokenization Failure, Distribution Shift, and Targeted Mitigations
summary: We study how informal surface forms degrade NLI accuracy in ELECTRA-small (14M) and RoBERTa-large (355M) across four transforms applied to SNLI and MultiNLI: slang substitution, emoji replacement, Gen-Z filler tokens, and their combination. Slang substitution (replacing formal words with informal equivalents, e.g., "going to" -> "gonna", "friend" -> "homie") causes minimal degradation (at most 1.1pp): slang vocabulary falls largely within WordPiece coverage, so the tokenizer handles it without signal loss. Emoji replaces content words with Unicode characters that ELECTRA's WordPiece tokenizer maps to [UNK], destroying the input signal before any learned parameters see it (93.6% of emoji examples contain at least one [UNK], mean 2.91 per example). Noise tokens (no cap, deadass, tbh) are fully in-vocabulary but absent from NLI training data, consistent with the model assigning them inferential weight they do not carry. The two failure modes respond to different interventions: preprocessing recovers emoji accuracy by normalizing text before tokenization; augmentation handles noise by exposing the model to noise-bearing examples during training. A hybrid of both achieves 88.93% on the combined variant for ELECTRA on SNLI (up from 75.88%), with no statistically significant drop on clean text. Against GPT-4o-mini zero-shot, unmitigated ELECTRA is significantly worse on transformed variants (p < 0.0001); hybrid ELECTRA surpasses it across all SNLI variants and reaches statistical parity on MultiNLI.

AI.tldr: 研究非正式文本形式（俚语、表情符号、网络填充词）如何降低NLI模型性能，分析失败原因并提出预处理和数据增强的解决方案。
AI.motivation: 现实世界文本常包含非正式表达，但现有NLI模型在正式文本上训练，可能无法正确处理俚语、表情符号等非正式形式，需要评估其影响并开发缓解策略。
AI.method: 在SNLI和MultiNLI数据集上应用四种文本转换：俚语替换、表情符号替换、Gen-Z填充词添加及其组合。使用ELECTRA-small和RoBERTa-large评估性能下降，分析tokenizer处理机制，并提出预处理（表情符号规范化）和数据增强（噪声词暴露）的混合解决方案。
AI.result: 俚语替换影响最小（最多1.1pp下降），表情符号导致最严重退化（93.6%样本包含[UNK]），噪声词虽在词汇表中但训练数据中缺失。混合方法将ELECTRA在SNLI组合变体上的准确率从75.88%提升到88.93%，在干净文本上无显著下降，甚至超越GPT-4o-mini零样本性能。
AI.conclusion: 非正式文本对NLI性能的影响取决于tokenizer处理能力：俚语能被WordPiece覆盖，表情符号导致[UNK]而破坏信号，噪声词被错误赋予推理权重。针对性的预处理和数据增强能有效缓解问题，混合方法在保持干净文本性能的同时显著提升非正式文本处理能力。

title: An Innovation-Based Approach to Detect Stealthy Disturbance Attacks in Maritime Monitoring
comment: Accepted for publication on Control Engineering Practice
summary: Modern maritime navigation and control systems rely on digital sensing, estimation, and communication pipelines that fuse GNSS, radar, inertial, and AIS data through approaches such as Kalman-filter-based estimators. While these technologies are essential for safety and efficiency, their growing interconnection also exposes vessels to faults and cyber-physical anomalies. This paper introduces a Statistical Detection Suite (SDS) to detect malicious stealthy disturbances. Specifically, the SDS operates directly on the innovations of Kalman filters, providing a lightweight yet statistically grounded layer of anomaly monitoring within maritime estimation frameworks. The SDS jointly evaluates whitened innovations through four complementary checks: (i) bias, (ii) covariance consistency via the normalized innovation squared (NIS), (iii) Gaussianity, and (iv) temporal independence via portmanteau statistics. The analysis further examines how an adversary can craft stealthy finite-impulse-response (FIR) Gaussian disturbances that can evade classical chi-square checks, formulating an optimization-based design that balances stealth and trajectory impact. An evaluation in maritime navigation scenarios illustrates how the SDS exposes colored spoofing attacks that bypass traditional methods, highlighting the role of innovation-based monitoring in strengthening maritime resilience against cyber-physical threats.

AI.tldr: 提出一个统计检测套件(SDS)，直接在卡尔曼滤波器的创新序列上操作，通过四项互补检查来检测海上导航系统中的恶意隐蔽干扰。
AI.motivation: 现代海上导航系统依赖GNSS、雷达、惯性、AIS等数字传感、估计和通信管道，这些技术虽然对安全和效率至关重要，但日益增长的互联性也使船舶面临故障和网络物理异常的风险。
AI.method: 提出统计检测套件(SDS)，直接在卡尔曼滤波器的创新序列上操作，通过四项互补检查：1)偏差检测；2)通过归一化创新平方(NIS)进行协方差一致性检查；3)高斯性检查；4)通过混合统计量进行时间独立性检查。同时分析了攻击者如何设计能够规避经典卡方检验的隐蔽有限脉冲响应(FIR)高斯干扰。
AI.result: 在海上导航场景中的评估表明，SDS能够暴露传统方法无法检测的着色欺骗攻击，突显了基于创新的监控在增强海上系统对网络物理威胁的抵御能力方面的作用。
AI.conclusion: SDS为海上估计框架提供了一个轻量级但统计基础扎实的异常监控层，通过联合评估创新序列的多项统计特性，能够检测传统方法无法发现的隐蔽攻击，从而增强海上系统的网络物理安全性和韧性。

title: Learning the Riccati solution operator for time-varying LQR via Deep Operator Networks
summary: We propose a computational framework for replacing the repeated numerical solution of differential Riccati equations in finite-horizon Linear Quadratic Regulator (LQR) problems by a learned operator surrogate. Instead of solving a nonlinear matrix-valued differential equation for each new system instance, we construct offline an approximation of the associated solution operator mapping time-dependent system parameters to the Riccati trajectory. The resulting model enables fast online evaluation of approximate optimal feedbacks across a wide class of systems, thereby shifting the computational burden from repeated numerical integration to a one-time learning stage. From a theoretical perspective, we establish control-theoretic guarantees for this operator-based approximation. In particular, we derive bounds quantifying how operator approximation errors propagate to feedback performance, trajectory accuracy, and cost suboptimality, and we prove that exponential stability of the closed-loop system is preserved under sufficiently accurate operator approximation. These results provide a framework to assess the reliability of data-driven approximations in optimal control. On the computational side, we design tailored DeepONet architectures for matrix-valued, time-dependent problems and introduce a progressive learning strategy to address scalability with respect to the system dimension. Numerical experiments on both time-invariant and time-varying LQR problems demonstrate that the proposed approach achieves high accuracy and strong generalization across a wide range of system configurations, while delivering substantial computational speedups compared to classical solvers. The method offers an effective and scalable alternative for parametric and real-time optimal control applications.

AI.tldr: 提出一个计算框架，用学习到的算子替代器替换有限时域LQR问题中微分Riccati方程的重复数值求解，将计算负担从在线数值积分转移到离线学习阶段。
AI.motivation: 传统有限时域LQR问题需要为每个新系统实例重复求解非线性矩阵值微分方程（Riccati方程），计算成本高。需要一种方法能够快速在线评估近似最优反馈，适用于广泛系统类别。
AI.method: 构建一个近似解算子的离线模型，将时变系统参数映射到Riccati轨迹。设计专门的DeepONet架构处理矩阵值、时变问题，并引入渐进学习策略解决系统维度扩展性问题。
AI.result: 数值实验表明，该方法在时不变和时变LQR问题上都能实现高精度和强泛化能力，相比经典求解器提供显著的计算加速。理论分析证明算子近似误差对反馈性能、轨迹精度和成本次优性的传播有界，且在足够准确的算子近似下能保持闭环系统的指数稳定性。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为参数化和实时最优控制应用提供了一个有效且可扩展的替代方案，为数据驱动近似在最优控制中的可靠性评估提供了理论框架。

title: Label-Free Detection of Governance Evidence Degradation in Risk Decision Systems
comment: 18 pages, 8 tables, 34 references. Open-source toolkit: https://doi.org/10.5281/zenodo.19236418
summary:
Risk decision systems in fraud detection and credit scoring operate under structural label absence: ground truth arrives weeks to months after decisions are made. During this blind period, model performance may degrade silently, eroding the governance evidence that justifies automated decisions. Existing drift detection methods either require labels (supervised detectors) or detect statistical change without distinguishing harmful degradation from benign distributional evolution (unsupervised detectors). No existing framework integrates drift detection with governance evidence assessment and operational response.
  This paper presents a label-free governance monitoring extension to the Governance Drift Toolkit that produces governance alerts rather than statistical alarms. The monitoring architecture applies composite multi-proxy monitoring across four proxy monitors (score distribution, feature drift, prediction entropy, confidence distribution), with governance-calibrated thresholds.
  Empirical evaluation on the Lending Club credit scoring dataset (1.37M loans, 11 years) demonstrates three findings. First, raw proxy metrics (Feature PSI delta up to 1.84, Score PSI delta up to 0.92) distinguish injected covariate degradation from natural temporal drift in an offline evaluation setting. Second, pure concept drift in P(Y|X) produces exactly zero delta across all proxy metrics in all windows, confirming the irreducible blind spot of label-free monitoring as a structural verification. Third, the composite score provides monotonic severity progression as more monitors trigger (0.583 to 0.833 to 1.000), enabling graduated governance response. Cross-domain comparison with IEEE-CIS fraud detection results shows the detectable/undetectable boundary is consistent across both domains. The toolkit and evaluation code are available as open-source artifacts.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种无标签的治理监控框架，用于欺诈检测和信用评分中的风险决策系统，解决标签延迟期间的性能退化问题。
AI.motivation: 风险决策系统面临结构性标签缺失问题：真实标签在决策后数周至数月才到达，在此期间模型性能可能无声退化，侵蚀自动化决策的治理证据。现有漂移检测方法要么需要标签，要么只能检测统计变化而无法区分有害退化和良性分布演变。
AI.method: 提出无标签治理监控扩展，采用复合多代理监控架构，包含四个代理监控器（分数分布、特征漂移、预测熵、置信度分布），并配备治理校准阈值。
AI.result: 在Lending Club数据集上验证：1）原始代理指标能区分注入的协变量退化与自然时间漂移；2）纯概念漂移在所有代理指标上产生零变化，确认了无标签监控的结构性盲点；3）复合分数提供单调严重程度进展，支持分级治理响应。跨域比较显示可检测/不可检测边界在欺诈检测领域一致。
AI.conclusion: 该框架提供了一种实用的无标签治理监控方法，能够检测有害性能退化并支持分级治理响应，同时明确识别其结构性盲点，为风险决策系统的治理提供可靠证据。

title: Continuous ageing trajectory representations for knee-aware lifetime prediction of lithium-ion batteries across heterogeneous dataset
summary: Accurate assessment of lithium-ion battery ageing is challenged by cell-to-cell variability, heterogeneous cycling protocols, and limited transferability of data-driven models across datasets. In particular, robust identification of degradation transitions, such as the knee point, and reliable early-life prediction of remaining useful life (RUL) remain open problems. This study proposes a unified framework for battery ageing analysis based on continuous representations of voltage-capacity and capacity-cycle trajectories learned from heterogeneous public datasets (NASA, CALCE, ISU-ILCC). The continuous formulation enables consistent extraction of degradation descriptors, including curvature, plateau length and knee-related metrics, while reducing sensitivity to dataset-specific discretisation. Across more than 250 cells, statistically significant correlations between knee onset and end-of-life (Pearson 0.75-0.84) are observed. Additional early-life analysis confirms that knee-related features retain predictive value when estimated from partial trajectories. Early-life models provide increasingly stable RUL predictions as the number of observed cycles increases, with meaningful predictive performance emerging within the first 5-20 cycles and remain robust under cross-dataset domain shift. The framework integrates continuous modelling, feature extraction and uncertainty-aware prediction, providing an interpretable and dataset-consistent approach demonstrating robustness across heterogeneous dataset types. Compared with conventional discrete or feature-based methods, the proposed representation reduces sensitivity to sampling resolution and improves cross-dataset consistency. The study is limited to laboratory-scale datasets and capacity-based end-of-life definitions.

AI.tldr: 提出基于连续表示的电池老化分析统一框架，从异质数据集学习电压-容量和容量-循环轨迹，实现退化描述符一致提取和早期寿命预测。
AI.motivation: 锂离子电池老化评估面临电池间变异性、异质循环协议和数据驱动模型跨数据集可迁移性有限等挑战，特别是退化转折点（如膝点）的鲁棒识别和剩余使用寿命的早期可靠预测仍是未解决问题。
AI.method: 基于连续表示的电压-容量和容量-循环轨迹学习框架，从NASA、CALCE、ISU-ILCC等异质公共数据集提取退化描述符（曲率、平台长度、膝点相关指标），减少对数据集特定离散化的敏感性。
AI.result: 在250多个电池中观察到膝点起始与寿命终止的显著统计相关性（Pearson 0.75-0.84）；早期寿命模型在观测5-20个循环后即有有意义的预测性能，且跨数据集域偏移下保持鲁棒。
AI.conclusion: 该框架整合连续建模、特征提取和不确定性感知预测，提供可解释且数据集一致的方法，相比传统离散或基于特征的方法减少了对采样分辨率的敏感性并提高了跨数据集一致性。

title: Playing Psychic: Using Thought Trees to Predict Reasoning Models Accuracy on Coding Tasks
summary: Recent advances in large language models (LLMs) have shown that test-time scaling can substantially improve model performance on complex tasks, particularly in the coding domain. Under this paradigm, models use a larger token budget during inference to generate intermediate reasoning traces before producing a final answer. However, current evaluations primarily rely on competitive programming benchmarks, which may not capture the full range of reasoning abilities. In this work, we perform a systematic study of frontier reasoning models to understand their performance on real-world coding benchmarks. To gain more insights into the performance of such models, we devise a programmatic way to {\em automatically generate} coding tasks of arbitrary difficulty and structure from existing benchmarks. Using this framework, our analysis reveals that the structure of a reasoning trace, not just its contents, is a strong predictor of correctness. Motivated by this, we propose structured thought-trees as means to represent reasoning traces. To illustrate their use, we train a lightweight classifier on features extracted from thought-trees to predict trace correctness, and demonstrate that flagging and retrying structurally anomalous traces based on the extracted features yields consistent gains at lower complexity levels.

AI.tldr: 论文提出结构化思维树来表征推理轨迹，通过训练轻量级分类器预测轨迹正确性，在低复杂度任务中通过标记和重试异常轨迹获得性能提升。
AI.motivation: 当前LLM的测试时扩展评估主要依赖竞争性编程基准，未能全面捕捉推理能力。需要系统研究前沿推理模型在真实世界编码任务上的表现，并深入理解推理轨迹结构对正确性的影响。
AI.method: 1) 设计程序化方法从现有基准自动生成任意难度和结构的编码任务；2) 提出结构化思维树表示推理轨迹；3) 训练轻量级分类器从思维树提取特征预测轨迹正确性；4) 基于特征标记和重试结构异常轨迹。
AI.result: 分析表明推理轨迹的结构（而不仅仅是内容）是正确性的强预测因子。使用结构化思维树特征训练的分类器能够有效预测轨迹正确性，在低复杂度任务中通过标记和重试异常轨迹获得一致性能提升。
AI.conclusion: 推理轨迹的结构对模型性能有重要影响，结构化思维树提供了一种有效表征和分析推理过程的方法。通过检测和修正结构异常轨迹，可以在较低复杂度任务中提升模型性能，为LLM推理优化提供了新思路。

title: Crowded in B-Space: Calibrating Shared Directions for LoRA Merging
summary: Merging separately trained LoRA adapters is a practical alternative to joint multi-task training, but it often hurts performance. Existing methods usually treat the LoRA update $ΔW = BA$ as a single object and do not distinguish the two LoRA matrices. We show that the main source of LoRA merge interference comes from the output-side matrix $B$. Across tasks, $B$ repeatedly uses a small set of shared directions, while $A$ remains much more task-specific. As a result, the merged adapter overemphasizes these shared directions, and task-specific information is lost. We propose Pico (Pre-merge interference calibration in output-space), a data-free method that calibrates $B$ before merge by downscaling over-shared directions and then rescaling the merged update. Pico plugs directly into existing merging methods such as Task Arithmetic, TIES, and TSV-M. Across eight different benchmarks from math, coding, finance, and medical domains, Pico improves average accuracy by 3.4-8.3 points over the corresponding base method and achieves the best overall average performance. Pico also enables merged adapters to outperform the LoRA trained with all task data. These results show that LoRA merging works better when the two LoRA matrices are treated separately.

AI.tldr: 论文提出Pico方法，通过校准LoRA适配器中的输出矩阵B来减少合并干扰，提升多任务性能
AI.motivation: 现有LoRA适配器合并方法通常将ΔW=BA视为单一对象，不区分两个LoRA矩阵，导致合并后性能下降。研究发现干扰主要来自输出矩阵B，它重复使用少量共享方向，而A更任务特定，导致合并后过度强调共享方向而丢失任务特定信息。
AI.method: 提出Pico（输出空间预合并干扰校准）方法，这是一种无需数据的方法，在合并前校准B矩阵：通过缩小过度共享的方向，然后重新缩放合并后的更新。Pico可直接集成到现有合并方法（如Task Arithmetic、TIES、TSV-M）中。
AI.result: 在数学、编程、金融和医疗等八个不同基准测试中，Pico将平均准确率比相应基础方法提高了3.4-8.3个百分点，实现了最佳整体平均性能。Pico还能使合并后的适配器优于使用所有任务数据训练的LoRA。
AI.conclusion: 研究表明，当分别处理两个LoRA矩阵时，LoRA合并效果更好。Pico方法通过校准输出矩阵B中的干扰，有效提升了多任务适配器合并的性能。

title: Structural Misalignment in Financial Transmission Rights
comment: 6 page paper, 3 page apendix with proofs and toy newtwork example. Accepted to PowerUp 2026 conference
summary:
Financial Transmission Rights (FTRs) enable electricity market participants to hedge congestion risk in Day Ahead Market (DAM) operations, but for the market to be solvent, Independent System Operators (ISOs) must ensure that FTR payouts do not exceed the collected DAM merchandising surplus that funds them. We show that FTR underfunding (or conversely, hedging efficiency) can arise structurally from misalignment between the network models used in the FTR auction and the DAM, independent of bidding behavior.
  We develop a geometric framework in which both DAM merchandising surplus and the maximum supportable FTR payout are expressed as support functions of network-feasible injection polytopes. The resulting dual representation assigns nonnegative weights to transmission element-contingency constraints, enabling constraint-level attribution of model misalignment.
  Using this framework, we derive sharp implications for canonical FTR network modeling choices like uniform transmission element derates, and for structural sources of underfunding like unplanned DAM outages. We further show that multi-interval FTR products impose an intrinsic hedging inefficiency when DAM shadow prices vary over time, even under perfect model alignment.
  These results provide ISOs with rigorous tools to diagnose underfunding and quantify the efficiency cost of conservative FTR network modeling choices.

AI.tldr: FTR市场存在结构性资金不足风险，源于FTR拍卖与日前市场网络模型不匹配，即使投标行为完美也会发生。作者开发了几何框架量化这种错配，并分析了多时段FTR产品的固有对冲低效性。
AI.motivation: 电力市场中金融输电权(FTRs)用于对冲阻塞风险，但市场清算需要确保FTR支付不超过日前市场(DAM)的阻塞盈余。实践中存在FTR资金不足问题，需要理解其结构性根源，而非仅归因于投标行为。
AI.method: 开发几何框架，将DAM阻塞盈余和最大可支持FTR支付表达为网络可行注入多面体的支撑函数。通过对偶表示，为传输元件-事故约束分配非负权重，实现约束层面的模型错配归因分析。
AI.result: 1) 揭示了FTR资金不足的结构性根源：FTR拍卖与DAM网络模型不匹配；2) 分析了统一传输元件降额等典型建模选择的影响；3) 证明了多时段FTR产品在DAM影子价格随时间变化时存在固有对冲低效性，即使模型完全匹配。
AI.conclusion: 为ISO提供了诊断FTR资金不足的严谨工具，能够量化保守FTR网络建模选择的效率成本，有助于改进FTR市场设计以提高对冲效率。

title: An adaptive discretization algorithm for locally optimal experimental design with constraints
summary: We develop a novel iterative algorithm for locally optimal experimental design under constraints, like budget or performance constraints. It is an adaptive discretization algorithm. In every iteration, a discretized version of the constrained-design problem is solved and then the discretization is adaptively refined by adding an approximate violator of a suitable sufficient $\eps$-optimality condition for the current design. We prove that with $\eps = 0$, our algorithm converges to an optimal design and that with $\eps > 0$, our algorithm finitely terminates at an $\eps$-optimal design. Compared to the existing algorithms on constrained experimental design, our algorithm comes with considerably less computational effort because the nonlinear subproblems in our algorithm have a smaller dimension and have to be solved only approximately and only in selected iterations (typically the last few). Additionally, our algorithm covers a considerably larger class of constraints. We demonstrate the good convergence properties of the algorithm on experimental design problems from chemical engineering that feature time and yield constraints.

AI.tldr: 提出一种用于约束条件下局部最优实验设计的自适应离散化迭代算法，通过逐步添加违反最优性条件的点来改进设计，计算量较小且能处理更广泛的约束类型。
AI.motivation: 现有约束实验设计算法计算量大，只能处理有限类型的约束。需要开发一种计算效率更高、能处理更广泛约束（如预算、性能约束）的实验设计方法。
AI.method: 提出自适应离散化迭代算法：每轮迭代求解离散化约束设计问题，然后通过添加违反ε最优性条件的近似点来自适应细化离散化。算法在ε=0时收敛到最优设计，ε>0时有限终止于ε最优设计。
AI.result: 算法相比现有方法计算量显著减少（子问题维度更小、只需近似求解、仅在少数迭代中需要），能处理更广泛的约束类型。在化工实验设计问题（含时间和产量约束）上展示了良好的收敛性能。
AI.conclusion: 该自适应离散化算法为约束实验设计提供了一种计算高效且通用的解决方案，特别适用于具有复杂约束的实际工程问题。

title: First, Do No Harm (With LLMs): Mitigating Racial Bias via Agentic Workflows
summary: Large language models (LLMs) are increasingly used in clinical settings, raising concerns about racial bias in both generated medical text and clinical reasoning. Existing studies have identified bias in medical LLMs, but many focus on single models and give less attention to mitigation. This study uses the EU AI Act as a governance lens to evaluate five widely used LLMs across two tasks, namely synthetic patient-case generation and differential diagnosis ranking. Using race-stratified epidemiological distributions in the United States and expert differential diagnosis lists as benchmarks, we apply structured prompt templates and a two-part evaluation design to examine implicit and explicit racial bias. All models deviated from observed racial distributions in the synthetic case generation task, with GPT-4.1 showing the smallest overall deviation. In the differential diagnosis task, DeepSeek V3 produced the strongest overall results across the reported metrics. When embedded in an agentic workflow, DeepSeek V3 showed an improvement of 0.0348 in mean p-value, 0.1166 in median p-value, and 0.0949 in mean difference relative to the standalone model, although improvement was not uniform across every metric. These findings support multi-metric bias evaluation for AI systems used in medical settings and suggest that retrieval-based agentic workflows may reduce some forms of explicit bias in benchmarked diagnostic tasks. Detailed prompt templates, experimental datasets, and code pipelines are available on our GitHub.

AI.tldr: 研究评估了5个主流LLM在临床任务中的种族偏见，发现所有模型在生成患者病例时都偏离了真实的种族分布，而基于检索的智能体工作流可以减轻部分显性偏见。
AI.motivation: LLM在临床应用中日益普及，但存在种族偏见问题。现有研究多关注单一模型的偏见识别，较少探讨缓解策略。本研究以欧盟AI法案为治理视角，系统评估多个LLM的偏见表现。
AI.method: 使用欧盟AI法案作为治理框架，评估5个主流LLM在两个任务上的表现：1）基于美国种族分层流行病学分布的合成患者病例生成；2）基于专家鉴别诊断列表的鉴别诊断排序。采用结构化提示模板和两部分评估设计，分别考察隐性和显性种族偏见。
AI.result: 所有模型在合成病例生成任务中都偏离了观察到的种族分布，GPT-4.1总体偏离最小。在鉴别诊断任务中，DeepSeek V3在报告指标上表现最佳。当嵌入智能体工作流时，DeepSeek V3在平均p值、中位p值和平均差异方面均有改善，但并非所有指标都一致改善。
AI.conclusion: 研究支持对医疗AI系统进行多指标偏见评估，并表明基于检索的智能体工作流可能减轻基准诊断任务中的某些显性偏见形式。提供了详细的提示模板、实验数据集和代码管道。

title: NCO4CVRP: Neural Combinatorial Optimization for the Capacitated Vehicle Routing Problem
summary: Neural Combinatorial Optimization (NCO) has emerged as a powerful framework for solving combinatorial optimization problems by integrating deep learning-based models. This work focuses on improving existing inference techniques to enhance solution quality and generalization. Specifically, we modify the Random Re-Construct (RRC) approach of the Light Encoder Heavy Decoder (LEHD) model by incorporating Simulated Annealing (SA). Unlike the conventional RRC, which greedily replaces suboptimal segments, our SA-based modification introduces a probabilistic acceptance mechanism that allows the model to escape local optima and explore a more diverse solution space. Additionally, we enhance the Policy Optimization with Multiple Optima (POMO) approach by integrating Beam Search, enabling systematic exploration of multiple promising solutions while maintaining diversity in the search space. We further investigate different inference strategies, including Softmax Sampling, Greedy, Gumbel-Softmax, and Epsilon-Greedy, analyzing their impact on solution quality. Furthermore, we explore instance augmentation techniques, such as horizontal and vertical flipping and rotation-based augmentations, to improve model generalization across different CVRP instances. Our extensive experiments demonstrate that these modifications significantly reduce the optimality gap across various Capacitated Vehicle Routing Problem (CVRP) benchmarks, with Beam Search and SA-based RRC consistently yielding superior performance. By refining inference techniques and leveraging enhanced search strategies, our work contributes to the broader applicability of NCO models in real-world combinatorial optimization tasks.

AI.tldr: 改进神经组合优化(NCO)的推理技术，通过结合模拟退火(SA)改进RRC方法，集成束搜索增强POMO，探索多种推理策略和数据增强技术，显著降低了CVRP基准测试的最优性差距。
AI.motivation: 现有神经组合优化框架的推理技术仍有改进空间，需要更好的搜索策略来避免局部最优并探索更多样化的解空间，以提高解决方案质量和模型泛化能力。
AI.method: 1. 将模拟退火(SA)整合到LEHD模型的随机重构(RRC)方法中，引入概率接受机制；2. 在POMO方法中集成束搜索，系统探索多个有前景的解决方案；3. 分析多种推理策略(Softmax采样、贪婪、Gumbel-Softmax、Epsilon-Greedy)；4. 探索实例增强技术(水平和垂直翻转、旋转增强)。
AI.result: 实验表明这些改进显著降低了各种容量约束车辆路径问题(CVRP)基准测试的最优性差距，束搜索和基于SA的RRC方法始终表现出优越性能。
AI.conclusion: 通过改进推理技术和利用增强的搜索策略，这项工作提升了NCO模型在现实世界组合优化任务中的适用性和性能。

title: LLMs can persuade only psychologically susceptible humans on societal issues, via trust in AI and emotional appeals, amid logical fallacies
summary: Scarce longitudinal evidence examines LLMs' persuasiveness and humanness along time-evolving psychological frameworks. We introduce Talk2AI, a longitudinal framework quantifying psycho-social, reasoning and affective dimensions of LLMs' persuasiveness about polarizing societal topics. In a four-way longitudinal setup, Talk2AI's 770 participants engaged in structured conversations with one of four leading LLMs on topics like climate change, social media misinformation, and math anxiety. This produced 3,080 conversations over 60,000 turns. After each wave, participants reported conviction in their initial topic stance, perceived opinion change, LLM's perceived humanness, a self-donation to the topic and a textual explanation. Feedback time series showed longitudinal inertia in convictions, indicating some human anchoring to initial opinions even after repeated exposure to AI-generated arguments. Interestingly, NLP analyses revealed that both humans and LLMs relied on fallacious reasoning in 1 conversational quip every 6, countering the ``LLMs as superior systems" stereotype behind LLMs' cognitive surrender. LLMs' perceived humanness was most learnable from sociodemographic, psychological and engagement features ($R^2=0.44$), followed by opinion change ($R^2=0.34$), conviction ($R^2=0.26$) and personal endowment ($R^2=0.24$). Crucially, explainable AI (XAI) indicated: (i) the presence of individuals more susceptible to LLM-based opinion changes; (ii) psychological susceptibility to LLM-convincing consisted of having more trust in LLMs, being more agreeable and extraverted and with a higher need for cognition. A multiverse approach with mixed-effects models confirmed XAI results, alongside strong individual differences. Talk2AI provides a grounded framework and evidence for detecting how GenAI can influence human opinions via multiple psycho-social pathways in AI-human digital platforms.

AI.tldr: Talk2AI框架量化LLM在极化社会话题上的说服力和拟人性，通过770名参与者与4个LLM的3080次对话发现：人类对初始观点有锚定效应，LLM和人类都会使用谬误推理，LLM拟人性可从心理社会特征预测，存在对LLM说服更易感的个体。
AI.motivation: 缺乏基于时间演化心理学框架的LLM说服力和拟人性纵向研究，需要量化LLM在极化社会话题上如何通过心理社会、推理和情感维度影响人类观点。
AI.method: Talk2AI纵向框架：770名参与者与4个领先LLM进行结构化对话（气候变暖、社交媒体假信息、数学焦虑等话题），共3080次对话超过6万轮。每轮后测量参与者信念强度、感知观点变化、LLM拟人性、自我捐赠和文本解释。
AI.result: 1) 信念存在纵向惯性，人类对初始观点有锚定效应；2) LLM和人类每6次对话就有1次使用谬误推理；3) LLM拟人性可从心理社会特征最佳预测(R²=0.44)；4) 存在对LLM说服更易感的个体特征（更信任LLM、更随和、外向、高认知需求）。
AI.conclusion: Talk2AI提供了检测生成式AI如何通过多种心理社会途径影响人类观点的实证框架，挑战了"LLM作为优越系统"的刻板印象，揭示了AI-人类数字平台中的复杂互动机制。

title: HeLa-Mem: Hebbian Learning and Associative Memory for LLM Agents
summary:
Long-term memory is a critical challenge for Large Language Model agents, as fixed context windows cannot preserve coherence across extended interactions. Existing memory systems represent conversation history as unstructured embedding vectors, retrieving information through semantic similarity. This paradigm fails to capture the associative structure of human memory, wherein related experiences progressively strengthen interconnections through repeated co-activation. Inspired by cognitive neuroscience, we identify three mechanisms central to biological memory: association, consolidation, and spreading activation, which remain largely absent in current research.
  To bridge this gap, we propose HeLa-Mem, a bio-inspired memory architecture that models memory as a dynamic graph with Hebbian learning dynamics. HeLa-Mem employs a dual-level organization: (1) an episodic memory graph that evolves through co-activation patterns, and (2) a semantic memory store populated via Hebbian Distillation, wherein a Reflective Agent identifies densely connected memory hubs and distills them into structured, reusable semantic knowledge. This dual-path design leverages both semantic similarity and learned associations, mirroring the episodic-semantic distinction in human cognition. Experiments on LoCoMo demonstrate superior performance across four question categories while using significantly fewer context tokens. Code is available on GitHub: https://github.com/ReinerBRO/HeLa-Mem

AI.tldr: HeLa-Mem是一个受生物记忆机制启发的记忆架构，通过动态图结构和赫布学习模拟人类记忆的关联、巩固和扩散激活机制，在长期对话中优于传统语义检索方法。
AI.motivation: 现有LLM代理的长期记忆系统存在局限性：固定上下文窗口无法保持长期对话连贯性，基于语义相似度的检索方法无法捕捉人类记忆的关联结构，缺乏生物记忆中的关联、巩固和扩散激活机制。
AI.method: 提出HeLa-Mem生物启发记忆架构：1）双级组织：情景记忆图通过共激活模式演化，语义记忆存储通过赫布蒸馏填充；2）反射代理识别密集连接的记忆中心，将其提炼为结构化、可重用的语义知识；3）结合语义相似度和学习关联，模拟人类认知的情景-语义区分。
AI.result: 在LoCoMo基准测试中，HeLa-Mem在四个问题类别上表现优异，同时使用显著更少的上下文标记，代码已在GitHub开源。
AI.conclusion: HeLa-Mem通过模拟生物记忆机制，为LLM代理提供了更有效的长期记忆解决方案，在保持对话连贯性和知识重用方面优于传统方法，为未来记忆系统设计提供了新方向。

title: Path-Based Quantum Meta-Learning for Adaptive Optimization of Reconfigurable Intelligent Surfaces
comment: This work has been submitted to the IEEE Wireless Communications Letters Journal for possible publication
summary: Reconfigurable intelligent surfaces (RISs) modify signal reflections to enhance wireless communication capabilities. Classical RIS phase optimization is highly non convex and challenging in dynamic environments due to high interference and user mobility. Here we propose a hierarchical multi-objective quantum metalearning algorithm that switches among specific quantum paths based on historical success, energy cost, and current data rate. Candidate RIS control directions are arranged as switch paths between quantum neural network layers to minimize inference, and a scoring mechanism selects the top performing paths per layer. Instead of merely storing past successful settings of the RIS and picking the closest match when a new problem is encountered, the algorithm learns how to select and recombine the best parts of different solutions to solve new scenarios. In our model, high-dimensional RIS scenario features are compressed into a quantum state using the tensor product, then superimposed during quantum path selection, significantly improving quantum computational advantage. Results demonstrate efficient performance with enhanced spectral efficiency, convergence rate, and adaptability.

AI.tldr: 提出分层多目标量子元学习算法，通过量子路径切换优化可重构智能表面相位，提升无线通信性能
AI.motivation: 传统RIS相位优化高度非凸，在动态环境中面临高干扰和用户移动性的挑战，需要更高效的优化方法
AI.method: 分层多目标量子元学习算法，基于历史成功率、能耗和当前数据率在量子路径间切换，将RIS控制方向安排为量子神经网络层间的切换路径，通过评分机制选择每层最佳路径
AI.result: 算法表现出高效性能，提升了频谱效率、收敛速度和适应性
AI.conclusion: 提出的量子元学习方法能有效解决RIS相位优化问题，通过量子状态压缩和叠加显著提升量子计算优势

title: Minimax optimal dual control -- The single input case
comment: An earlier version was submitted to The 65th IEEE Conference on Decision and Control
summary: An explicit solution is derived for the Bellman inequality corresponding to minimax optimal dual control. The minimizing player determines control action as a function of past state measurements and inputs. The maximizing player selects disturbances and model parameters for the underlying linear time-invariant dynamics. The optimal minimizing policy is a dual controller that optimizes the tradeoff between exploration and exploitation. Once sufficient data has been collected, the policy becomes a deterministic certainty equivalence controller. However, when data is insufficient, the policy introduces a randomized term to improve excitation.

AI.tldr: 推导了极小极大最优对偶控制的Bellman不等式显式解，得到一种在探索与利用间权衡的对偶控制器
AI.motivation: 解决线性时不变系统在模型参数不确定情况下的最优控制问题，需要同时处理控制性能（利用）和参数学习（探索）的权衡
AI.method: 推导Bellman不等式的显式解，构建极小极大框架：最小化玩家基于历史状态测量和输入确定控制动作，最大化玩家选择扰动和模型参数
AI.result: 得到最优对偶控制器：数据充足时退化为确定性确定性等价控制器；数据不足时引入随机项以增强激励，改善参数学习
AI.conclusion: 成功建立了对偶控制的显式解框架，为探索-利用权衡提供了理论保证，在数据不足时通过随机激励提升系统性能

title: Moving beyond Principles: Identifying Actionable AI Fairness Practices
comment: In Proceedings of 34th European Conference on Information Systems. June 12-17, 2026. Milan, Italy
summary: Because artificial intelligence (AI) increasingly mediates organizational work, fairness has become a critical governance challenge. Existing frameworks often prioritize abstract ethical principles rather than fairness-specific ones and lack actionable guidance across the entire AI lifecycle. This study addresses the principles-to-practice gap in AI fairness governance. We develop actionable AI fairness practices and draw on a socio-technical and praxiological lens, conducting discourse and thematic analyses of 60 academic, policy, and practitioner sources. From these analyses, we derive a structured set of AI fairness practices in a comprehensive, AI lifecycle-spanning matrix organized by obligation degree and organizational role. The matrix provides dynamic, role-specific guidance to support implementation and sustainment of AI fairness. By extending the AI fairness beyond abstract principles to operationalized, actionable practices, we contribute to IS scholarship and offer a modular governance scaffold.

AI.tldr: 该研究开发了一个全面的AI公平性实践矩阵，弥合了AI公平治理中从原则到实践的差距，为组织提供了可操作的指导。
AI.motivation: 随着AI越来越多地介入组织工作，公平性成为关键治理挑战。现有框架往往优先考虑抽象伦理原则而非公平性特定原则，并且缺乏贯穿整个AI生命周期的可操作指导。
AI.method: 采用社会技术和实践学视角，对60个学术、政策和实践来源进行话语和主题分析，开发出可操作的AI公平性实践，并构建了一个按义务程度和组织角色组织的AI生命周期矩阵。
AI.result: 从分析中推导出一个结构化的AI公平性实践集合，组织成一个全面的AI生命周期矩阵，提供动态的、角色特定的指导，支持AI公平性的实施和持续维护。
AI.conclusion: 通过将AI公平性从抽象原则扩展到可操作实践，为信息系统学术做出贡献，并提供了一个模块化的治理框架，帮助组织在AI生命周期中实施公平性治理。

title: POLAR: Online Learning for LoRA Adapter Caching and Routing in Edge LLM Serving
summary: Edge deployment of large language models (LLMs) increasingly relies on libraries of lightweight LoRA adapters, yet GPU/DRAM can keep only a small resident subset at a time. Serving a request through a non-resident adapter requires paging its weights from storage, incurring measurable latency. This creates a two-timescale online control problem: on a slow timescale, the system selects which adapters remain resident in fast memory, while on a fast timescale it routes each request to an adapter whose context-dependent utility is unknown a priori. The two decisions are tightly coupled: the cache determines the cost of exploration, and the router determines which adapters receive informative feedback. We formulate this joint caching-and-routing problem as a two-timescale contextual bandit and propose POLAR (Paging and Online Learning for Adapter Routing). POLAR pairs a cache-aware LinUCB router with an epoch-based cache controller. We study two variants. A fixed-epoch version provides a robust baseline with worst-case regret guarantees under arbitrary contexts. An epoch-doubling version, POLAR+, adds forced exploration and improved cache optimization to achieve $\widetilde{\mathcal{O}}(d\sqrt{NT}+\sqrt{KT})$ sublinear regret under stochastic regularity and cacheability conditions, where $N$ is the adapter count, $K$ the cache size, $d$ the context dimension, and $T$ the horizon. The routing term matches the standard contextual-bandit rate up to logarithmic factors, showing that the memory hierarchy does not fundamentally slow routing learning. Experiments using 15 real LoRA adapters for Qwen2.5-7B together with measured GPU paging latencies show that adaptive cache control substantially outperforms non-adaptive baselines and exhibits scaling trends consistent with the theory.

AI.tldr: POLAR：面向边缘LLM LoRA适配器服务的两时间尺度缓存与路由联合优化框架，通过上下文多臂老虎机方法解决适配器权重分页延迟问题
AI.motivation: 边缘部署大型语言模型时，GPU/DRAM只能缓存少量LoRA适配器，服务非驻留适配器需要从存储分页权重，产生显著延迟，需要联合优化缓存和路由决策
AI.method: 提出POLAR框架：1) 慢时间尺度选择哪些适配器驻留快速内存；2) 快时间尺度将请求路由到未知效用的适配器；3) 使用缓存感知的LinUCB路由器和基于周期的缓存控制器
AI.result: 理论分析：固定周期版本在最坏情况下有遗憾保证；POLAR+版本在随机正则性和可缓存条件下实现次线性遗憾；实验使用15个真实LoRA适配器和实测GPU分页延迟，自适应缓存控制显著优于非自适应基线
AI.conclusion: POLAR框架有效解决了边缘LLM适配器服务的缓存-路由联合优化问题，理论证明内存层次结构不会从根本上减慢路由学习，实验验证了自适应方法的优越性和理论一致性

title: AutoPKG: An Automated Framework for Dynamic E-commerce Product-Attribute Knowledge Graph Construction
summary: Product attribute extraction in e-commerce is bottlenecked by ontologies that are inconsistent, incomplete, and costly to maintain. We present AutoPKG, a multi-agent Large Language Model (LLM) framework that automatically constructs a Product-attribute Knowledge Graph (PKG) from multimodal product content. AutoPKG induces product types and type-specific attribute keys on demand, extracts attribute values from text and images, and consolidates updates through a centralized decision agent that maintains a globally consistent canonical graph. We also propose an evaluation protocol for dynamic PKGs that measures type and key validity, consolidation quality, and edge-level accuracy for value assertions after canonicalization. On a large real-world marketplace catalog dataset from Lazada (Alibaba), AutoPKG achieves up to 0.953 Weighted Knowledge Efficiency (WKE) for product types, 0.724 WKE for attribute keys, and 0.531 edge-level F1 for multimodal value extraction. Across three public benchmarks, our method improves edge-level exact-match F1 by 0.152 and yields a precision gain of 0.208 on the attribute extraction application. Online A/B tests show that AutoPKG-derived attributes increase Gross Merchandise Value (GMV) in Badge by 3.81 percent, in Search by 5.32 percent, and in Recommendation by 7.89 percent, supporting the practical value of AutoPKG in production.

AI.tldr: AutoPKG：一个多智能体LLM框架，自动从多模态产品内容构建产品属性知识图谱，解决电商中属性提取的瓶颈问题。
AI.motivation: 电商产品属性提取受限于不一致、不完整且维护成本高的本体，需要自动化解决方案来构建和维护产品属性知识图谱。
AI.method: 采用多智能体LLM框架，按需推导产品类型和类型特定属性键，从文本和图像中提取属性值，并通过集中决策智能体维护全局一致的规范图谱。
AI.result: 在Lazada数据集上，AutoPKG在类型、属性键和值提取方面取得高WKE和F1分数；在三个公共基准测试中提升边缘级F1 0.152和精度0.208；在线A/B测试显示GMV显著提升。
AI.conclusion: AutoPKG有效解决了电商属性提取的瓶颈问题，通过自动化构建和维护产品属性知识图谱，在实际生产中具有显著商业价值。

title: DART: Mitigating Harm Drift in Difference-Aware LLMs via Distill-Audit-Repair Training
summary: Large language models (LLMs) tuned for safety often avoid acknowledging demographic differences, even when such acknowledgment is factually correct (e.g., ancestry-based disease incidence) or contextually justified (e.g., religious hiring preferences). This identity-blindness yields incorrect responses, unnecessary refusals, or generic "equal-treatment" defaults. We study this via difference-awareness classification: given a question involving demographic groups, the task is not to answer directly, but to classify whether a correct answer requires recognizing group differences (yes) or whether groups should be treated identically (no). Crucially, fine-tuning for accuracy triggers harm drift: model-generated explanations become increasingly harmful as decision accuracy improves, whether by elaborating harmful content, introducing problematic assumptions, or failing to flag harms the baseline identified. To mitigate this, we introduce DART (Distill--Audit--Repair Training), which distills label-conditioned reasoning from a teacher, audits outputs for harm drift cases relative to baseline, and repairs problematic cases via severity-weighted fine-tuning. On eight benchmarks, DART improves Llama-3-8B-Instruct accuracy from 39.0% to 68.8%, with largest gains on equal-treatment prompts (11.3% -> 72.6%), while reducing harm drift cases by 72.6%. It also transfers to 280 open-ended real-world queries across medical, legal, policy, and educational domains, improving difference-appropriate responses from 39.8% to 77.5% while reducing refusals from 34.3% to 3.0%. Our results demonstrate that accuracy and safety need not conflict when explicit detection and repair mechanisms are in place.

AI.tldr: 论文提出DART方法解决LLM在安全微调后对人口统计差异的盲目回避问题，通过差异感知分类、检测和修复机制，在提高准确性的同时减少有害内容生成。
AI.motivation: 当前为安全而调优的大语言模型往往盲目回避人口统计差异，即使这些差异是事实正确或上下文合理的。这种"身份盲目性"导致错误回答、不必要的拒绝或泛化的"平等对待"默认，需要解决准确性与安全性之间的冲突。
AI.method: 提出DART方法：1) 差异感知分类任务，判断问题是否需要识别群体差异；2) 蒸馏教师模型的标签条件推理；3) 审计输出相对于基线的有害漂移情况；4) 通过严重性加权的微调修复问题案例。
AI.result: 在8个基准测试中，DART将Llama-3-8B-Instruct的准确率从39.0%提升到68.8%，在平等对待提示上提升最大（11.3%→72.6%），同时减少72.6%的有害漂移案例。在280个现实世界查询中，差异适当响应从39.8%提升到77.5%，拒绝率从34.3%降至3.0%。
AI.conclusion: 研究表明，通过明确的检测和修复机制，准确性和安全性不必冲突。DART方法能有效解决LLM在人口统计差异处理上的问题，在提高准确性的同时减少有害内容生成。

title: Input-Side Variance Suppression under Non-Normal Transient Amplification in Continuous-Control Reinforcement Learning
summary: Continuous-control reinforcement learning (RL) often exhibits large closed-loop variance, high-frequency control jitter, and sensitivity to disturbance injection. Existing explanations usually emphasize disturbance sources such as action noise, exploration perturbations, or policy nonsmoothness. This letter studies a complementary amplifier-side perspective: in nominally stable yet strongly non-normal closed loops, small input perturbations can undergo transient amplification and lead to disproportionately large state covariance. Motivated by this source--amplifier decomposition, we introduce an input-side variance suppression layer that operates between the learned policy and the plant input to reduce applied-input variance and step-to-step jitter. To separate mechanism from correlation, we use two control-theoretic interventions: one varies only eigenvector geometry under fixed eigenvalues and spectral radius, and the other varies only applied-input statistics under fixed strongly non-normal geometry. We then provide mechanism-consistent external validation on planar quadrotor tasks. Throughout, Koopman/ALE surrogates are used only as analysis and certification tools, not as direct performance paths. Taken together, the results support a narrower claim: in the studied settings, non-normal transient amplification is an important and under-emphasized contributor to execution-time closed-loop variance, and source-side suppression can reduce downstream covariance without changing the structural peak gain.

AI.tldr: 该论文研究了强化学习控制中闭环方差大的问题，提出了非正态瞬态放大是重要原因，并引入输入侧方差抑制层来减少执行方差
AI.motivation: 连续控制强化学习常表现出大的闭环方差、高频控制抖动和对扰动注入的敏感性。现有解释通常强调动作噪声、探索扰动或策略非光滑性等扰动源，但本文研究了一个互补的放大器侧视角：在名义稳定但强非正态的闭环中，小的输入扰动会经历瞬态放大并导致不成比例大的状态协方差。
AI.method: 引入输入侧方差抑制层，位于学习策略和系统输入之间，以减少应用输入方差和步间抖动。使用两种控制理论干预：一种仅改变固定特征值和谱半径下的特征向量几何，另一种仅改变固定强非正态几何下的应用输入统计。使用Koopman/ALE代理仅作为分析和认证工具。
AI.result: 在研究的设置中，非正态瞬态放大是执行时闭环方差的重要且被低估的贡献因素，源侧抑制可以在不改变结构峰值增益的情况下减少下游协方差。
AI.conclusion: 非正态瞬态放大是强化学习控制中闭环方差的重要机制，通过输入侧方差抑制可以有效减少执行方差，这为理解RL控制性能提供了新的视角。

title: AI Agents and Hard Choices
comment: 20 pages. v2: Substantially revised and rewritten; now typeset in LaTeX. Reflects the version presented at ACM FAccT 2026 (non-archival track). A revised version is under submission to a journal
summary: Can AI agents deal with hard choices -- cases where options are incommensurable because multiple objectives are pursued simultaneously? Adopting a technologically engaged approach distinct from existing philosophical literature, I submit that the fundamental design of current AI agents as optimisers creates two limitations: the Identification Problem and the Resolution Problem. First, I demonstrate that agents relying on Multi-Objective Optimisation (MOO) are structurally unable to identify incommensurability. This inability generates three specific alignment problems: the blockage problem, the untrustworthiness problem, and the unreliability problem. I argue that standard mitigations, such as Human-in-the-Loop, are insufficient for many decision environments. As a constructive alternative, I conceptually explore an ensemble solution. Second, I argue that even if the Identification Problem is solved, AI agents face the Resolution Problem: they lack the autonomy to resolve hard choices rather than arbitrarily picking through self-modification of objectives. I conclude by examining the opaque normative trade-offs involved in granting AI this level of autonomy.

AI.tldr: AI agents作为优化器无法处理不可通约的艰难选择，存在识别问题和解决问题两个根本限制，导致对齐问题，需要重新思考AI自主性设计。
AI.motivation: 现有哲学文献对AI处理艰难选择（选项不可通约）的研究不足，需要从技术设计角度分析当前AI优化器架构的根本局限性。
AI.method: 采用技术参与式方法，分析多目标优化(MOO)AI代理的结构性缺陷，提出识别问题和解决问题两个核心限制，探讨人类在环缓解措施的不足，并概念性探索集成解决方案。
AI.result: MOO代理无法识别不可通约性，导致阻塞问题、不可信问题和不可靠问题三个对齐问题；即使识别问题解决，AI也缺乏自主解决艰难选择的能力，只能通过目标自修改进行任意选择。
AI.conclusion: 当前AI优化器设计在处理艰难选择时存在根本限制，需要重新思考AI自主性设计，但赋予AI解决艰难选择的自主权涉及不透明的规范性权衡。

title: The Global Neural World Model: Spatially Grounded Discrete Topologies for Action-Conditioned Planning
summary: We present the Global Neural World Model (GNWM), a self-stabilizing framework that achieves topological quantization through balanced continuous entropy constraints. Operating as a continuous, action-conditioned Joint-Embedding Predictive Architecture (JEPA), the GNWM maps environments onto a discrete 2D grid, enforcing translational equivariance without pixel-level reconstruction. Our results show this architecture prevents manifold drift during autoregressive rollouts by using grid ``snapping'' as a native error-correction mechanism. Furthermore, by training via maximum entropy exploration (random walks), the model learns generalized transition dynamics rather than memorizing specific expert trajectories. We validate the GNWM across passive observation, active agent control, and abstract sequence regimes, demonstrating its capacity to act not just as a spatial physics simulator, but as a causal discovery model capable of organizing continuous, predictable concepts into structured topological maps.

AI.tldr: GNWM是一个自稳定的全局神经世界模型框架，通过平衡连续熵约束实现拓扑量化，将环境映射到离散2D网格，具有平移等变性，通过网格"吸附"机制防止流形漂移。
AI.motivation: 传统世界模型在自回归推演中容易出现流形漂移问题，且通常需要像素级重建。本文旨在开发一个能够稳定表示环境、防止漂移、并学习广义过渡动态而非记忆特定轨迹的框架。
AI.method: 采用连续、动作条件的联合嵌入预测架构(JEPA)，将环境映射到离散2D网格，通过网格"吸附"作为原生纠错机制。使用最大熵探索（随机游走）进行训练，学习广义过渡动态而非专家轨迹。
AI.result: GNWM在被动观察、主动智能体控制和抽象序列三种机制下得到验证，能够防止自回归推演中的流形漂移，不仅作为空间物理模拟器，还能作为因果发现模型，将连续可预测概念组织成结构化拓扑图。
AI.conclusion: GNWM框架通过拓扑量化和平衡熵约束，实现了稳定、可推广的世界建模，既能模拟空间物理，又能发现因果关系，为构建鲁棒的世界模型提供了新方法。

title: MCPO: Mastery-Consolidated Policy Optimization for Large Reasoning Models
summary: Reinforcement Learning with Verifiable Rewards (RLVR) has emerged as a promising approach to improve the reasoning abilities of Large Language Models (LLMs). Among RLVR algorithms, Group Relative Policy Optimization (GRPO) and its variants have demonstrated strong performance and high training efficiency. However, GRPO-style objectives exhibit two issues on high accuracy prompts including mastered prompts (rollout accuracy =1) and majority-correct prompts (rollout accuracy in (0.5,1)). For mastered prompts, group-relative advantages vanish, yielding no training signal and unconstrained policy drift that can cause forgetting. For majority-correct prompts, the induced query weight shrinks as accuracy increases, weakening consolidation from partial correctness to mastery. To alleviate this, we propose Mastery-Consolidated Policy Optimization (MCPO), which introduces (i) a hinge-KL regularizer applied exclusively to mastered prompts to bound harmful policy drift between successive gradient steps, and (ii) a weighting mechanism that prioritizes majority-correct prompts to better allocate optimization effort. Extensive experiments across three mathematical benchmarks demonstrate that MCPO consistently improves pass@1 performance. Counter-intuitively, rather than restricting exploration, MCPO boosts pass@k metrics, indicating that mastery consolidation further catalyzes solution diversity.

AI.tldr: MCPO算法解决了GRPO在已掌握和多数正确提示上的训练问题，通过铰链KL正则器和加权机制提升性能
AI.motivation: GRPO等RLVR算法在已掌握提示（准确率=1）和多数正确提示（准确率在0.5-1之间）上存在两个问题：已掌握提示上训练信号消失导致策略漂移和遗忘；多数正确提示上查询权重随准确率增加而缩小，阻碍从部分正确到完全掌握的巩固
AI.method: 提出Mastery-Consolidated Policy Optimization (MCPO)，包含两个关键组件：(1) 铰链KL正则器，专门应用于已掌握提示，限制连续梯度步之间的有害策略漂移；(2) 加权机制，优先处理多数正确提示，更好地分配优化努力
AI.result: 在三个数学基准测试上的广泛实验表明，MCPO持续提升pass@1性能。反直觉的是，MCPO不仅没有限制探索，反而提升了pass@k指标，表明掌握巩固进一步催化了解决方案的多样性
AI.conclusion: MCPO通过解决GRPO在已掌握和多数正确提示上的局限性，有效提升了强化学习在可验证奖励场景下的性能，同时促进了解决方案的多样性

title: A Community-Based Approach for Stance Distribution and Argument Organization
summary: The proliferation of online debate platforms and social media has led to an unprecedented volume of argumentative content on controversial topics from multiple perspectives. While this wealth of perspectives offers opportunities for developing critical thinking and breaking filter bubbles (Pariser 2011), the sheer volume and complexity of arguments make it challenging for readers to synthesize and comprehend diverse viewpoints effectively. We present an unsupervised graph-based approach for community-based argument organization that helps users navigate and understand complex argumentative landscapes. Our system analyzes collections of topic-focused articles and constructs a rich interaction graph by capturing multiple relationship types between arguments: topic similarity, semantic coherence, shared keywords, and common entities. We then employ community detection to identify argument communities that reveal homogeneous and heterogeneous viewpoint distributions. The detected communities are simplified through strategic graph operations to present users with digestible, yet comprehensive summaries of key argumentative patterns. Our approach requires no training data and can effectively process hundreds of articles while preserving nuanced relationships between arguments. Experimental results demonstrate our system's ability to identify meaningful argument communities and present them in an interpretable manner, facilitating users' understanding of complex socio-political debates.

AI.tldr: 提出一种基于图的无监督社区检测方法，用于组织和理解争议话题中的多样化论点，帮助用户导航复杂的论证景观。
AI.motivation: 在线辩论平台和社交媒体上关于争议话题的论证内容激增，虽然这些多样化观点有助于培养批判性思维和打破信息茧房，但海量复杂的论点使得读者难以有效综合和理解不同观点。
AI.method: 采用无监督图学习方法，分析主题相关文章集合，构建包含多种关系类型（主题相似性、语义连贯性、共享关键词、共同实体）的交互图，然后使用社区检测识别论点社区，并通过策略性图操作简化社区以呈现可消化的论证模式摘要。
AI.result: 实验结果表明，该系统能够有效识别有意义的论点社区，并以可解释的方式呈现，帮助用户理解复杂的社会政治辩论，无需训练数据即可处理数百篇文章并保持论点间的细微关系。
