AI.conclusion: 提出的无监督图方法能够有效组织和呈现复杂论证景观中的多样化观点，为用户提供可导航、可理解的论点社区结构，有助于促进对争议话题的全面理解。

title: Trajectory-Based Optimization for Air Traffic Control in the Terminal Maneuvering Area
summary: We present a trajectory-based optimization framework for arrival sequencing and scheduling in the terminal maneuvering area (TMA). Unlike node-link scheduling models that reduce trajectories to time-delay variables, the proposed method computes implementable per-aircraft speed profiles and path extensions that achieve required landing separation through terminal air traffic control actions. The framework combines an analytic TMA path model, consisting of a tangent leg, a radius-to-fix turn, and a final-approach segment, with a nonlinear program (NLP) that jointly optimizes path stretch and segment speeds under a weighted objective. Three landing-order policies are examined: First-Entry-First-Serve (FEFS), First-on-Final-First-Serve (FOFFS), and FOFFS with Constrained Position Shifting (CPS) up to $k$ positions. CPS is implemented through a two-phase approach coupling mixed-integer linear programming (MILP) with NLP to select an optimized landing order before trajectory optimization. The aircraft population follows a realistic weight-class fleet mix with pair-specific wake-turbulence separation, and each scenario is perturbed by a Gaussian wind sample projected onto each segment to convert commanded airspeeds into ground speeds. An online rolling-horizon formulation commits each aircraft trajectory irrevocably upon entry, enabling real-time decision-making. Monte Carlo experiments on the simplified A80 TMA show that: (i) FOFFS consistently outperforms FEFS in delay, path stretch, and fuel burn by exploiting geometric asymmetries among arrival streams; (ii) CPS further reduces separation violations and path stretch, though with diminishing returns and rapidly increasing solver cost; (iii) fuel estimates from BADA 3 and OpenAP show consistent qualitative trends; and (iv) per-entry optimization completes in near real-time, supporting practical deployment.

AI.tldr: 提出基于轨迹的终端区到达排序调度优化框架，通过速度剖面和路径延伸实现着陆间隔，比较三种着陆顺序策略，在简化A80终端区验证实时可行性
AI.motivation: 传统节点-链路调度模型将轨迹简化为时间延迟变量，无法提供可实施的飞行轨迹。需要开发能够计算具体速度剖面和路径延伸的优化框架，实现终端区空中交通管制行动所需的着陆间隔。
AI.method: 结合解析终端区路径模型（切线段、半径到固定点转弯段和最终进近段）与非线性规划，联合优化路径延伸和分段速度。采用三种着陆顺序策略：先到先服务、先到最终进近段先服务、以及带约束位置偏移的FOFFS。通过混合整数线性规划与非线性规划的两阶段方法实现着陆顺序优化。
AI.result: 在简化A80终端区的蒙特卡洛实验中：1) FOFFS在延迟、路径延伸和燃油消耗方面始终优于FEFS；2) 约束位置偏移进一步减少间隔违规和路径延伸，但收益递减且求解成本快速增加；3) BADA 3和OpenAP的燃油估计显示一致趋势；4) 每次进入优化可在近实时完成。
AI.conclusion: 提出的轨迹优化框架能够有效管理终端区到达排序，FOFFS策略优于传统FEFS，约束位置偏移提供额外改进但计算成本较高。框架支持实时决策，具有实际部署潜力。

title: Lower Bounds and Proximally Anchored SGD for Non-Convex Minimization Under Unbounded Variance
summary: Analysis of Stochastic Gradient Descent (SGD) and its variants typically relies on the assumption of uniformly bounded variance, a condition that frequently fails in practical non-convex settings, such as neural network training, as well as in several elementary optimization settings. While several relaxations are explored in the literature, the Blum-Gladyshev (BG-0) condition, which permits the variance to grow quadratically with distance has recently been shown to be the weakest condition. However, the study of the oracle complexity of stochastic first-order non-convex optimization under BG-0 has remained underexplored. In this paper, we address this gap and establish information-theoretic lower bounds, proving that finding an $ε$-stationary point requires $Ω(ε^{-6})$ stochastic BG-0 oracle queries for smooth functions and $Ω(ε^{-4})$ queries under mean-square smoothness. These limits demonstrate an unavoidable degradation from classical bounded-variance complexities, i.e., $Ω(ε^{-4})$ and $Ω(ε^{-3})$ for smooth and mean-square smooth cases, respectively. To match these lower bounds, we consider Proximally Anchored STochastic Approximation (PASTA), a unified algorithmic framework that couples Halpern anchoring with Tikhonov regularization to dynamically mitigate the extra variance explosion term permitted by the BG-0 oracle. We prove that PASTA achieves minimax optimal complexities across numerous non-convex regimes, including standard smooth, mean-square smooth, weakly convex, star-convex, and Polyak-Lojasiewicz functions, entirely under an unbounded domain and unbounded stochastic gradients.

AI.tldr: 论文研究了在Blum-Gladyshev (BG-0)条件下非凸随机优化的最优复杂度，建立了信息论下界并提出了匹配上界的PASTA算法。
AI.motivation: 传统SGD分析依赖于方差有界假设，但在实际非凸优化（如神经网络训练）中经常不成立。BG-0条件允许方差随距离二次增长，是更弱的条件，但在此条件下的非凸随机优化复杂度研究不足。
AI.method: 提出了PASTA（Proximally Anchored STochastic Approximation）算法框架，结合Halpern锚定和Tikhonov正则化来动态缓解BG-0条件允许的额外方差爆炸项。
AI.result: 建立了信息论下界：在BG-0条件下，找到ε-稳定点需要Ω(ε⁻⁶)次查询（光滑函数）和Ω(ε⁻⁴)次查询（均方光滑）。PASTA算法在这些下界上达到了极小极大最优复杂度。
AI.conclusion: BG-0条件下的非凸随机优化复杂度相比传统有界方差条件存在不可避免的退化，但PASTA算法能够在无界域和无界随机梯度下，在多种非凸函数类中达到最优复杂度。

title: A Systematic Survey and Benchmark of Deep Learning for Molecular Property Prediction in the Foundation Model Era
comment: 32 pages. It is just accepted by Journal of Chemical Theory and Computation 2026
summary: Molecular property prediction integrates quantum chemistry, cheminformatics, and deep learning to connect molecular structure with physicochemical and biological behavior. This survey traces four complementary paradigms, including Quantum, Descriptor Machine Learning, Geometric Deep Learning, and Foundation Models, and outlines a unified taxonomy linking molecular representations, model architectures, and interdisciplinary applications. Benchmark analyses integrate evidence from both widely used datasets and datasets reflecting industry perspectives, encompassing quantum, physicochemical, physiological, and biophysical domains. The survey examines current standards in data curation, splitting strategies, and evaluation protocols, highlighting challenges including inconsistent stereochemistry, heterogeneous assay sources, and reproducibility limitations under random or poorly defined splits. These observations motivate the modernization of benchmark design toward more transparent, time- and scaffold-aware methodologies. We further propose three forward-looking directions: (i) physics-aware learning embedding quantum consistency, (ii) uncertainty-calibrated foundation models for trustworthy inference, and (iii) realistic multimodal benchmark ecosystems integrating computational and experimental data. Repository: https://github.com/Zongru-Li/Survey-and-Benchmarks-of-DL-for-Molecular-Property-Prediction-in-the-Foundation-Model-Era.

AI.tldr: 分子性质预测综述：涵盖量子化学、描述符机器学习、几何深度学习和基础模型四大范式，提出统一分类法，分析基准数据集挑战，并展望物理感知学习、不确定性校准基础模型和多模态基准生态系统三大方向。
AI.motivation: 分子性质预测是连接分子结构与理化生物行为的关键桥梁，但现有研究范式分散，基准数据集存在不一致性、异质性等问题，需要系统梳理并提出现代化基准设计方法。
AI.method: 提出统一分类法连接分子表示、模型架构和跨学科应用；分析四大范式（量子、描述符机器学习、几何深度学习、基础模型）；整合广泛使用和工业视角的数据集进行基准分析；考察数据整理、分割策略和评估协议标准。
AI.result: 识别出当前基准设计的关键挑战：立体化学不一致、异质测定来源、随机或定义不清分割下的可重复性限制；提出现代化基准设计应更透明、时间感知和骨架感知；建立开源代码库供社区使用。
AI.conclusion: 分子性质预测领域需要向三个方向发展：1) 嵌入量子一致性的物理感知学习；2) 可信推理的不确定性校准基础模型；3) 整合计算与实验数据的现实多模态基准生态系统。

title: A phenotype-driven and evidence-governed framework for knowledge graph enrichment and hypotheses discovery in population data
summary: Current knowledge graph (KG) construction methods are confirmatory, focusing on recovering known relationships rather than identifying novel or context-dependent nodes. This paper proposes a phenotype-driven and evidence-governed framework that shifts the paradigm toward structured hypothesis discovery and controlled KG expansion. The approach integrates graph neural networks (GNNs) for phenotype discovery, causal inference, probabilistic reasoning and large language models (LLMs) for hypothesis generation and claim extraction within a unified pipeline. The framework prioritizes relationships that are both structurally supported by data and underexplored in the literature. KG expansion is formulated as a multi-objective optimization problem, where candidate claims are jointly evaluated in terms of relevance, structural validation and novelty. Pareto-optimal selection enables the identification of non-dominated claims that balance confirmation and discovery, avoiding trivial or redundant knowledge inclusion. Experiments on heterogeneous population datasets demonstrate that the proposed framework produces more interpretable phenotypes, reveals context-dependent causal structures and generates high-quality claims that align with both data and scientific evidence. Compared to rule-based and LLM-only baselines, the method achieves the best trade-off across plausibility, novelty, validation and relevance. In retrieval-augmented settings, it significantly improves performance (Recall@5=0.98) while reducing hallucination rates (0.05), highlighting its effectiveness in grounding LLM outputs.

AI.tldr: 提出一个表型驱动、证据治理的知识图谱构建框架，从确认已知关系转向结构化假设发现和可控的图谱扩展
AI.motivation: 当前知识图谱构建方法主要是确认性的，专注于恢复已知关系，而忽略了发现新颖或上下文相关的节点。需要转向支持结构化假设发现和可控扩展的新范式。
AI.method: 整合图神经网络（GNNs）用于表型发现、因果推断和概率推理，结合大语言模型（LLMs）进行假设生成和声明提取。将知识图谱扩展建模为多目标优化问题，通过帕累托最优选择平衡确认与发现。
AI.result: 在异构人口数据集上的实验表明，该框架能产生更可解释的表型，揭示上下文相关的因果结构，并生成与数据和科学证据一致的高质量声明。相比基于规则和纯LLM基线，在合理性、新颖性、验证性和相关性方面达到最佳平衡。
AI.conclusion: 该表型驱动、证据治理的框架成功地将知识图谱构建从确认性范式转向发现性范式，通过整合GNNs和LLMs实现了结构化假设发现和可控扩展，显著提高了检索增强场景下的性能并减少了幻觉。

title: Incentivizing Parametric Knowledge via Reinforcement Learning with Verifiable Rewards for Cross-Cultural Entity Translation
summary: Cross-cultural entity translation remains challenging for large language models (LLMs) as literal or phonetic renderings are usually yielded instead of culturally appropriate translations in context. However, relevant knowledge may already be encoded in model parameters during large-scale pre-training. To incentivize the effective use of parametric knowledge, we propose EA-RLVR (Entity-Anchored Reinforcement Learning with Verifiable Rewards), a training framework that optimizes cross-cultural entity translation without relying on external knowledge bases. EA-RLVR anchors supervision on a verifiable, entity-level reward signal and incorporates lightweight structural gates to stabilize optimization. This design steers the model toward learning a robust reasoning process rather than merely imitating reference translations. We evaluate EA-RLVR on XC-Translate and observe consistent improvements in both entity translation accuracy and out-of-domain generalization. Specifically, training on merely 7k samples boosts Qwen3-14B's entity translation accuracy from 23.66\% to 31.87\% on a 50k test set comprising entirely unseen entities. The learned entity translation ability also transfers to general translation, yielding +1.35 XCOMET on WMT24++, which scales to +1.59 with extended optimization. Extensive analyses of $pass@k$ dynamics and reward formulations attribute these gains to superior sampling efficiency and a stable optimization landscape.

AI.tldr: EA-RLVR：一种无需外部知识库的跨文化实体翻译训练框架，通过实体锚定强化学习和可验证奖励信号，提升LLM的跨文化实体翻译能力。
AI.motivation: 大型语言模型在跨文化实体翻译中通常只能产生字面或音译结果，而无法提供符合文化背景的恰当翻译。虽然相关文化知识可能已在预训练中编码，但模型难以有效利用这些参数化知识。
AI.method: 提出EA-RLVR（Entity-Anchored Reinforcement Learning with Verifiable Rewards）训练框架：1）使用可验证的实体级奖励信号进行监督锚定；2）引入轻量级结构化门控以稳定优化过程；3）引导模型学习稳健的推理过程而非简单模仿参考翻译。
AI.result: 在XC-Translate数据集上，仅使用7k样本训练就将Qwen3-14B的实体翻译准确率从23.66%提升至31.87%（在包含5万完全未见实体的测试集上）。学习到的实体翻译能力还能迁移到通用翻译任务，在WMT24++上获得+1.35 XCOMET提升，扩展优化后可达+1.59。
AI.conclusion: EA-RLVR通过实体锚定强化学习框架有效激发了LLM中已编码的文化知识，显著提升了跨文化实体翻译能力，且具有良好的泛化性和迁移性。该方法的优势源于其优越的采样效率和稳定的优化环境。

title: Kill-Probability-Maximization Guidance: Breaking from the Miss-Distance-Minimization Paradigm
comment: his work has been submitted to the IEEE for possible publication. 10 pages, 6 figures, and 3 tables
summary: Classical guidance laws aim at minimizing the miss distance, thus implicitly determining the minimum warhead lethality radius required against nominal targets. However, nonnominal targets or scenarios might render the designed warhead insufficient, causing a significant degradation in the single-shot kill probability (SSKP). We propose a guidance methodology that shifts the interceptor's objective from minimizing the miss distance to directly maximizing the SSKP, while taking into account the warhead's probabilistic lethality model. Complying with the generalized separation theorem, the new paradigm is based on modifying deterministic differential-game-based guidance laws using Bayesian decision theory. Extensive Monte Carlo simulations demonstrate consistent SSKP improvement over the standard and recently introduced estimation-aware guidance laws, when tested against nominal and nonnominal evasively maneuvering targets.

AI.tldr: 提出一种新的制导方法，将拦截弹目标从最小化脱靶量转变为直接最大化单发杀伤概率，考虑战斗部概率杀伤模型，通过贝叶斯决策理论改进确定性微分博弈制导律。
AI.motivation: 传统制导律旨在最小化脱靶量，这隐含地决定了对抗标称目标所需的最小战斗部杀伤半径。然而，非标称目标或场景可能导致设计的战斗部不足，显著降低单发杀伤概率。
AI.method: 基于广义分离定理，采用贝叶斯决策理论修改确定性微分博弈制导律，将拦截弹目标从最小化脱靶量转变为直接最大化单发杀伤概率，并考虑战斗部的概率杀伤模型。
AI.result: 广泛的蒙特卡洛模拟表明，在对抗标称和非标称规避机动目标时，该方法相比标准制导律和最近引入的估计感知制导律，能持续提高单发杀伤概率。
AI.conclusion: 提出的制导方法通过直接优化单发杀伤概率而非间接最小化脱靶量，显著提高了对抗非标称目标的杀伤效能，为制导系统设计提供了新范式。

title: Hybrid Spectro-Temporal Fusion Framework for Structural Health Monitoring
summary: Structural health monitoring plays a critical role in ensuring structural safety by analyzing vibration responses from engineering systems. This paper proposes a Spectro-Temporal Alignment framework and a Hybrid Spectro-Temporal Fusion framework that integrate arrival-time interval descriptors with spectral features to capture both fine-scale and coarse-scale vibration dynamics. Experiments conducted on data collected from an LDS V406 electrodynamic shaker demonstrate that the proposed spectro-temporal representations significantly outperform conventional input formulations. The results indicate that a temporal resolution (Δτ) of 0.008 of 0.02 favors traditional machine learning models, whereas a finer resolution (Δτ) of 0.008 effectively unlocks the performance potential of deep learning architectures. Beyond classification accuracy, a comprehensive stability analysis based on condensed indices, including mean performance, standard deviation, coefficient of variation, and balanced score, shows that the proposed hybrid framework consistently achieves higher accuracy with substantially lower variability compared to baseline and alignment-only approaches. Overall, these results demonstrate that the proposed framework provides a robust, accurate, and reliable solution for vibration-based structural health monitoring.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种结合时频特征的振动分析框架，用于结构健康监测，通过融合到达时间间隔描述符和频谱特征来捕捉振动动态，实验证明该方法优于传统方法。
AI.motivation: 结构健康监测对工程安全至关重要，但传统振动分析方法在捕捉精细和粗尺度动态方面存在局限，需要更全面的时频表示方法。
AI.method: 提出两种框架：1) 时频对齐框架，整合到达时间间隔描述符和频谱特征；2) 混合时频融合框架，进一步优化特征融合。在LDS V406电动振动台上进行实验验证。
AI.result: 实验表明：1) 时频表示显著优于传统输入；2) 时间分辨率Δτ=0.02适合传统机器学习，Δτ=0.008适合深度学习；3) 混合框架在准确性和稳定性方面均优于基线方法。
AI.conclusion: 提出的混合时频融合框架为基于振动的结构健康监测提供了鲁棒、准确且可靠的解决方案，在精度和稳定性方面均有显著提升。

title: Rule-VLN: Bridging Perception and Compliance via Semantic Reasoning and Geometric Rectification
summary: As embodied AI transitions to real-world deployment, the success of the Vision-and-Language Navigation (VLN) task tends to evolve from mere reachability to social compliance. However, current agents suffer from a "goal-driven trap", prioritizing physical geometry ("can I go?") over semantic rules ("may I go?"), frequently overlooking subtle regulatory constraints. To bridge this gap, we establish Rule-VLN, the first large-scale urban benchmark for rule-compliant navigation. Spanning a massive 29k-node environment, it injects 177 diverse regulatory categories into 8k constrained nodes across four curriculum levels, challenging agents with fine-grained visual and behavioral constraints. We further propose the Semantic Navigation Rectification Module (SNRM), a universal, zero-shot module designed to equip pre-trained agents with safety awareness. SNRM integrates a coarse-to-fine visual perception VLM framework with an epistemic mental map for dynamic detour planning. Experiments demonstrate that while Rule-VLN challenges state-of-the-art models, SNRM significantly restores navigation capabilities, reducing CVR by 19.26% and boosting TC by 5.97%.

AI.tldr: Rule-VLN：首个大规模城市规则合规导航基准，包含29k节点环境和177种监管类别，挑战智能体在精细视觉和行为约束下的导航能力。提出SNRM模块，为零样本安全感知增强预训练智能体，显著提升合规导航性能。
AI.motivation: 当前具身AI在真实世界部署中，视觉语言导航任务从可达性转向社会合规性。现有智能体存在"目标驱动陷阱"，过于关注物理几何（"能否通过"）而忽视语义规则（"是否允许通过"），经常忽略细微的监管约束。
AI.method: 1) 建立Rule-VLN基准：大规模城市环境（29k节点），在8k约束节点中注入177种监管类别，分为四个课程难度级别；2) 提出SNRM模块：通用零样本模块，集成粗到细的视觉感知VLM框架和认知心理地图，用于动态绕行规划。
AI.result: Rule-VLN对最先进模型构成挑战，而SNRM显著恢复导航能力：约束违规率降低19.26%，任务完成率提升5.97%。
AI.conclusion: 该研究填补了规则合规导航的空白，提出的Rule-VLN基准和SNRM模块为具身AI在真实世界中的安全合规部署提供了重要工具，推动导航智能体从"能否通过"向"是否允许通过"的范式转变。

title: Prune, Interpret, Evaluate: A Cross-Layer Transcoder-Native Framework for Efficient Circuit Discovery via Feature Attribution
summary: Existing feature-interpretation pipelines typically operate on uniformly sampled units, but only a small fraction of cross-layer transcoder (CLT) features matter for a target behavior, with the rest resulting in expensive feature explaining and evaluating costs. We introduce the first CLT-native end-to-end framework, PIE, connecting Pruning, automatic Interpretation, and interpretation Evaluation, enabling systematic measurement of behavioral fidelity and downstream interpretability under pruning. To achieve this, we propose Feature Attribution Patching (FAP), a patch-grounded attribution method that scores CLT features by aggregating gradient-weighted write contributions, and FAP-Synergy, a synergy-aware reranking procedure. We evaluate pruning using KL-divergence behavior retention and assess interpretation quality with FADE-style metrics. Across IOI and Doc-String, across budgets $K \in \{50, 100, 200, 400, 800\}$, and across FAP, FAP-Synergy, Activation-Magnitude, and ACDC-style pruning, the FAP family consistently achieves the best or near-best fidelity, with FAP-Synergy providing its clearest gains in strict-budget regimes. On IOI with CLTs for Llama-3.2-1B and Gemma-2-2B, pruning to $K=100$ features matches the KL fidelity that random selection from the active feature set requires $\approx 4$k features to achieve ($\approx 40\times$ compression), enabling $\approx 40\times$ fewer interpretation/evaluation calls while substantially reducing low-quality features.

AI.tldr: PIE框架通过特征剪枝、自动解释和解释评估，显著减少跨层转码器特征解释成本，实现40倍压缩
AI.motivation: 现有特征解释流程通常处理均匀采样的单元，但只有少量跨层转码器特征对目标行为重要，其余特征导致昂贵的解释和评估成本
AI.method: 提出PIE框架，包含特征归因修补（FAP）和FAP-Synergy协同感知重排序方法，通过梯度加权写入贡献评分CLT特征
AI.result: 在IOI和Doc-String任务上，FAP系列方法在不同预算下保持最佳或接近最佳的行为保真度，K=100特征剪枝达到随机选择4k特征的效果（40倍压缩）
AI.conclusion: PIE框架能显著减少特征解释和评估调用次数，同时降低低质量特征，为CLT特征解释提供高效解决方案

title: Quantitative Verification of Constrained Occupation Time for Stochastic Discrete-time Systems
summary: This paper addresses the quantitative verification of constrained occupation time in stochastic discrete-time systems, focusing on the probability of visiting a target set at least $k$ times while maintaining safety. Such cumulative properties are essential for certifying repeated behaviors like surveillance and periodic charging. To address this, we present the first barrier certificate framework capable of certifying these behaviors. We introduce multiplicative stochastic barrier functions that encode visitation counts implicitly within the algebraic structure of a scalar barrier. By adopting a switched-system reformulation to handle safety, we derive rigorous probabilistic bounds for both finite and infinite horizons. Specifically, we show that dissipative barriers establish upper bounds ensuring the exponential decay of frequent visits, while attractive barriers provide lower bounds via submartingale analysis. The efficacy of the proposed framework is demonstrated through numerical examples.

AI.tldr: 本文提出首个用于验证随机离散时间系统中约束占用时间的屏障证书框架，通过乘性随机屏障函数隐式编码访问计数，为有限和无限时域提供严格的概率界限。
AI.motivation: 验证随机系统中目标集被访问至少k次同时保持安全的概率，这类累积性质对于认证监视、周期性充电等重复行为至关重要，但现有方法难以处理。
AI.method: 提出乘性随机屏障函数，在标量屏障的代数结构中隐式编码访问计数；采用切换系统重构处理安全性；通过耗散屏障建立上界（确保频繁访问指数衰减），通过吸引屏障提供下界（通过亚鞅分析）。
AI.result: 为有限和无限时域推导出严格的概率界限，证明了所提框架在数值示例中的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 该屏障证书框架首次能够验证随机离散时间系统中的约束占用时间，为重复行为的概率认证提供了有效工具。

title: Towards Fully Parameter-Free Stochastic Optimization: Grid Search with Self-Bounding Analysis
summary: Parameter-free stochastic optimization aims to design algorithms that are agnostic to the underlying problem parameters while still achieving convergence rates competitive with optimally tuned methods. While some parameter-free methods do not require the specific values of the problem parameters, they still rely on prior knowledge, such as the lower or upper bounds of them. We refer to such methods as ``partially parameter-free''. In this work, we target achieving ``fully parameter-free'' methods, i.e., the algorithmic inputs do not need to satisfy any unverifiable condition related to the true problem parameters. We propose a powerful and general grid search framework, named \textsc{Grasp}, with a novel self-bounding analysis technique that effectively determines the search ranges of parameters, in contrast to previous work. Our method demonstrates generality in: (i) the non-convex case, where we propose a fully parameter-free method that achieves near-optimal convergence rate, up to logarithmic factors; (ii) the convex case, where our parameter-free methods are competitive with strong performance in terms of acceleration and universality. Finally, we contribute a sharper guarantee for the model ensemble, a final step of the grid search framework, under interpolated variance characterization.

AI.tldr: 提出一个名为Grasp的通用网格搜索框架，实现完全参数自由的随机优化方法，无需任何关于问题参数的先验知识或不可验证的条件。
AI.motivation: 现有参数自由方法虽然不需要具体参数值，但仍依赖参数上下界等先验知识（部分参数自由）。本文旨在实现完全参数自由的方法，即算法输入无需满足任何与真实问题参数相关的不可验证条件。
AI.method: 提出Grasp网格搜索框架，采用新颖的自边界分析技术有效确定参数搜索范围。框架包含模型集成作为最后步骤，在插值方差特性下提供更精确的保证。
AI.result: 1) 非凸情况下：提出完全参数自由方法，达到接近最优的收敛率（对数因子内）；2) 凸情况下：参数自由方法在加速和通用性方面具有竞争力；3) 模型集成步骤在插值方差特性下获得更精确保证。
AI.conclusion: Grasp框架实现了完全参数自由的随机优化，在非凸和凸情况下均表现优异，为参数自由优化提供了通用且强大的解决方案。

title: Global Attention with Linear Complexity for Exascale Generative Data Assimilation in Earth System Prediction
summary: Accurate weather and climate prediction relies on data assimilation (DA), which estimates the Earth system state by integrating observations with models. While exascale computing has significantly advanced earth simulation, scalable and accurate inference of the Earth system state remains a fundamental bottleneck, limiting uncertainty quantification and prediction of extreme events. We introduce a unified one-stage generative DA framework that reformulates assimilation as Bayesian posterior sampling, replacing the conventional forecast-update cycle with compute-dense, GPU-efficient inference. At the core is STORM, a novel spatiotemporal transformer with a global attention linear-complexity scaling algorithm that breaks the quadratic attention barrier. On 32,768 GPUs of the Frontier supercomputer, our method achieves 63% strong scaling efficiency and 1.6 ExaFLOP sustained performance. We further scale to 20 billion spatiotemporal tokens, enabling km-scale global modeling over 177k temporal frames, regimes previously unreachable, establishing a new paradigm for Earth system prediction.

AI.tldr: 提出STORM框架，通过生成式数据同化方法将地球系统状态估计重新定义为贝叶斯后验采样，在Frontier超级计算机上实现63%强扩展效率和1.6 ExaFLOP持续性能，可处理200亿时空令牌，实现公里级全球建模。
AI.motivation: 尽管百亿亿次计算显著推进了地球模拟，但地球系统状态的可扩展且准确的推断仍然是基本瓶颈，限制了不确定性量化和极端事件预测。传统的数据同化方法存在计算效率限制。
AI.method: 提出统一的一阶段生成式数据同化框架，将同化重新定义为贝叶斯后验采样，用计算密集、GPU高效的推断取代传统的预报-更新循环。核心是STORM——一种具有全局注意力线性复杂度缩放算法的新型时空变换器，突破了二次注意力瓶颈。
AI.result: 在Frontier超级计算机的32,768个GPU上，该方法实现了63%的强扩展效率和1.6 ExaFLOP的持续性能。进一步扩展到200亿时空令牌，实现了177k时间帧的公里级全球建模，达到了以前无法达到的规模。
AI.conclusion: 该方法建立了地球系统预测的新范式，能够处理以前无法达到的规模，为不确定性量化和极端事件预测提供了突破性解决方案。

title: Small Model as Master Orchestrator: Learning Unified Agent-Tool Orchestration with Parallel Subtask Decomposition
summary: Multi-agent systems (MAS) demonstrate clear advantages in tackling complex problems by coordinating diverse agents and external tools. However, most existing orchestration methods rely on static workflows or serial agent scheduling, and are further constrained by heterogeneous interface protocols between tools and agents. This leads to high system complexity and poor extensibility. To mitigate these issues, we propose Agent-as-Tool, a unified parallel orchestration paradigm that abstracts both agents and tools into a standardized, learnable action space with protocol normalization and explicit state feedback. Building on this paradigm, we train a lightweight orchestrator, ParaManager, which decouples planning decisions from subtask solving, enabling state-aware parallel subtask decomposition, delegation, and asynchronous execution. For training, we adopt a two-stage ParaManager training pipeline. It improves robustness by incorporating supervised fine-tuning (SFT) trajectories equipped with recovery mechanisms, and further applies reinforcement learning (RL) to achieve an optimal balance among task success, protocol compliance, diversity, and reasoning efficiency. Experiments show that ParaManager achieves strong performance across multiple benchmarks and exhibits robust generalization under unseen model pools.

AI.tldr: 提出Agent-as-Tool统一并行编排范式，将代理和工具抽象为标准化的可学习动作空间，并训练轻量级编排器ParaManager实现状态感知的并行子任务分解、委派和异步执行。
AI.motivation: 现有多智能体系统编排方法大多依赖静态工作流或串行调度，且受限于工具与代理间的异构接口协议，导致系统复杂度高、可扩展性差。
AI.method: 提出Agent-as-Tool范式，通过协议标准化和显式状态反馈将代理和工具统一抽象；训练ParaManager编排器，采用两阶段训练流程：包含恢复机制的监督微调轨迹增强鲁棒性，再通过强化学习优化任务成功率、协议合规性、多样性和推理效率的平衡。
AI.result: ParaManager在多个基准测试中表现优异，在未见模型池下展现出强大的泛化能力。
AI.conclusion: Agent-as-Tool范式有效解决了多智能体系统编排的复杂性和可扩展性问题，ParaManager编排器通过解耦规划决策与子任务解决，实现了高效并行的任务执行。

title: PRISM: Probing Reasoning, Instruction, and Source Memory in LLM Hallucinations
summary: As large language models (LLMs) evolve from conversational assistants into agents capable of handling complex tasks, they are increasingly deployed in high-risk domains. However, existing benchmarks largely rely on mixed queries and posterior evaluation, output-level scoring, which quantifies hallucination severity but offers limited insight into where and why hallucinations arise in the generation pipeline. We therefore reformulate hallucination evaluation as a diagnostic problem and propose PRISM, a controlled benchmark that disentangles hallucinations into four dimensions: knowledge missing, knowledge errors, reasoning errors, and instruction-following errors, grounded in three stages of generation (memory, instruction, and reasoning). PRISM contains 9,448 instances across 65 tasks and supports fine-grained, stage-aware diagnostic evaluation. Evaluating 24 mainstream open-source and proprietary LLMs, we uncover consistent trade-offs across instruction following, memory retrieval, and logical reasoning, showing that mitigation strategies often improve specific dimensions at the expense of others. We hope PRISM provides a framework for understanding the specific mechanisms behind LLMs hallucinations, ultimately accelerating the development of trustworthy large language models.

AI.tldr: PRISM是一个用于诊断LLM幻觉的基准测试，将幻觉分解为知识缺失、知识错误、推理错误和指令遵循错误四个维度，基于生成过程的三个阶段（记忆、指令和推理），包含9,448个实例和65个任务，用于细粒度、阶段感知的诊断评估。
AI.motivation: 现有基准测试主要依赖混合查询和后验评估、输出级评分，虽然能量化幻觉严重程度，但对幻觉在生成管道中何处以及为何产生提供有限洞察。因此需要将幻觉评估重新构建为诊断问题，以理解幻觉的具体机制。
AI.method: 提出PRISM基准测试，将幻觉分解为四个维度：知识缺失、知识错误、推理错误和指令遵循错误，并基于三个生成阶段（记忆、指令和推理）。包含9,448个实例，覆盖65个任务，支持细粒度、阶段感知的诊断评估。
AI.result: 评估24个主流开源和专有LLM，发现指令遵循、记忆检索和逻辑推理之间存在一致的权衡关系，缓解策略通常在改善特定维度的同时牺牲其他维度。
AI.conclusion: PRISM为理解LLM幻觉的具体机制提供了一个框架，有望加速可信赖大型语言模型的开发。

title: Robust Distributed Sub-Optimal Coordination of Linear Agents with Uncertain Input Nonlinearities
summary: In this paper, we study robust distributed sub-optimal coordination of linear agents subject to input nonlinearities. Inspired by the robust agreement literature, we formulate a bounded distributed sub-optimal coordination problem, in which each agent converges to a neighborhood of the optimizer of a global optimization problem defined over a communication network. We propose a novel control protocol, and analyze convergence by employing a robust control approach, in which both the input nonlinearities and the gradients of the objective functions are treated in a unified manner via sector conditions. In particular, we derive sufficient conditions for the solvability of the considered problem and characterize them in terms of matrix inequalities. The effectiveness of the proposed method is demonstrated through a numerical simulation.

AI.tldr: 提出一种针对带有输入非线性的线性智能体的鲁棒分布式次优协调控制方法，通过矩阵不等式条件保证收敛到全局优化问题的邻域内。
AI.motivation: 研究在存在输入非线性的情况下，线性智能体的鲁棒分布式协调问题。传统方法难以同时处理输入非线性和目标函数梯度的影响，需要一种统一的分析框架。
AI.method: 提出一种新颖的控制协议，采用鲁棒控制方法，通过扇区条件统一处理输入非线性和目标函数梯度。将问题转化为矩阵不等式条件，推导出问题可解性的充分条件。
AI.result: 建立了分布式次优协调问题的充分条件，并表示为矩阵不等式形式。通过数值仿真验证了所提方法的有效性，智能体能够收敛到全局优化器邻域内。
AI.conclusion: 成功开发了一种鲁棒分布式协调框架，能够统一处理输入非线性和梯度不确定性，为具有非线性输入的智能体网络提供有效的次优协调解决方案。

title: Randomized Antipodal Search Done Right for Data Pareto Improvement of LLM Unlearning
summary:
Large language models (LLMs) sometimes memorize undesirable knowledge, which must be removed after deployment. Prior work on machine unlearning has focused largely on optimization methods that adjust parameters to enforce forgetting while preserving retention. However, these approaches assume that the forget and retain sets are readily available, which rarely holds in practice. Unlearning is typically triggered by an undesired generation at inference time, making the retrieval of relevant data the central challenge.
  We introduce the notion of data Pareto improvement for LLM unlearning, which formalizes how retrieval can expand the achievable trade-off frontier between forgetting and retention. To realize this principle, we propose Randomized Antipodal Search on Linearized Influence Kernel (RASLIK), a retrieval algorithm that combines permutation-projection hashing with randomized antipodal search. RASLIK reduces selection variance, achieves sublinear complexity, and yields a double gain in both quality and efficiency. Across multiple models, datasets, and unlearning algorithms, RASLIK consistently outperforms deterministic baselines and even oracle sampling, establishing randomized search as a principled and scalable solution for data-centric unlearning.

AI.tldr: 论文提出RASLIK算法，通过随机搜索改进LLM遗忘中的数据检索，在遗忘与保留间实现更好的权衡
AI.motivation: 大语言模型有时会记忆不良知识，需要在部署后移除。现有遗忘方法假设遗忘集和保留集容易获取，但实践中遗忘通常由推理时的不良生成触发，数据检索成为核心挑战
AI.method: 提出数据帕累托改进概念，并设计RASLIK算法：结合置换投影哈希和随机对极搜索，降低选择方差，实现亚线性复杂度
AI.result: RASLIK在多个模型、数据集和遗忘算法中，始终优于确定性基线甚至oracle采样，在质量和效率上实现双重提升
AI.conclusion: 随机搜索为数据中心的遗忘问题提供了原则性和可扩展的解决方案

title: Mini-BEHAVIOR-Gran: Revealing U-Shaped Effects of Instruction Granularity on Language-Guided Embodied Agents
comment: 23 pages, Keywords: Language Grounding, Language Granularity, Instruction Following Agent, Width-based Planning Research Area: Multimodality and Language Grounding to Vision, Robotics and Beyond Research Area Keywords: vision language navigation, multimodality, neurosymbolic approaches
summary: Instruction granularity is an important yet poorly controlled variable in language-guided embodied AI. Existing benchmarks typically pair each task with a single static instruction, making it difficult to study how agent behavior changes when the same task is described at different levels of detail. We introduce Mini-BEHAVIOR-Gran, a new benchmark for controlled studies of instruction granularity that extends Mini-BEHAVIOR with multiple instruction variants per task, ranging from high-level goal descriptions to step-by-step guidance. Using this benchmark, we compare four candidate metrics for cross-task granularity quantification: token count, entity count, action-verb count, and planning-width, and find that width correlates most consistently with agent performance. Using width to organize training and evaluation further reveals a non-monotonic U-shaped relationship between instruction granularity and performance, with peaks at both fine and coarse extremes. Further analysis suggests that the coarse-granularity performance rebound is associated with shallow grounding, where agents learn vision-dominant policies.

AI.tldr: 本文提出Mini-BEHAVIOR-Gran基准，用于研究指令粒度对具身AI的影响，发现指令粒度与性能呈U型关系，最粗和最细的指令都能获得较好性能。
AI.motivation: 现有具身AI基准通常每个任务只配一条静态指令，难以研究同一任务在不同详细程度描述下智能体行为的变化。指令粒度是一个重要但控制不佳的变量。
AI.method: 扩展Mini-BEHAVIOR基准，为每个任务提供多种指令变体（从高级目标描述到逐步指导）。比较四种跨任务粒度量化指标：token数、实体数、动作动词数和规划宽度，发现宽度与智能体性能最一致相关。
AI.result: 使用宽度组织训练和评估，发现指令粒度与性能呈非单调的U型关系，在精细和粗糙两个极端都有性能峰值。粗糙粒度性能回升与浅层接地相关，智能体学习到视觉主导的策略。
AI.conclusion: 指令粒度对具身AI性能有重要影响，存在U型关系。规划宽度是有效的粒度量化指标，粗糙指令下的性能回升源于视觉主导策略的学习。

title: When Choices Become Risks: Safety Failures of Large Language Models under Multiple-Choice Constraints
summary: Safety alignment in large language models (LLMs) is primarily evaluated under open-ended generation, where models can mitigate risk by refusing to respond. In contrast, many real-world applications place LLMs in structured decision-making tasks, such as multiple-choice questions (MCQs), where abstention is discouraged or unavailable. We identify a systematic failure mode in this setting: reformulating harmful requests as forced-choice MCQs, where all options are unsafe, can systematically bypass refusal behavior, even in models that consistently reject equivalent open-ended prompts. Across 14 proprietary and open-source models, we show that forced-choice constraints sharply increase policy-violating responses. Notably, for human-authored MCQs, violation rates follow an inverted U-shaped trend with respect to structural constraint strength, peaking under intermediate task specifications, whereas MCQs generated by high-capability models yield near-saturation violation rates across constraints and exhibit strong cross-model transferability. Our findings reveal that current safety evaluations substantially underestimate risks in structured task settings and highlight constrained decision-making as a critical and underexplored surface for alignment failures.

AI.tldr: 研究发现，将有害请求重新表述为强制选择多选题（所有选项都不安全）可以系统性地绕过LLMs的安全拒绝行为，即使在开放生成中会拒绝的模型也会在结构化任务中违规响应。
AI.motivation: 当前LLMs的安全对齐主要评估开放生成场景，但实际应用中LLMs常被用于结构化决策任务（如多选题），而现有安全评估可能低估了这种场景下的风险。
AI.method: 将有害请求重新表述为强制选择多选题，所有选项都不安全，测试14个专有和开源模型在这种结构化任务中的响应行为，分析约束强度对违规率的影响。
AI.result: 强制选择约束显著增加违规响应率；人工编写多选题的违规率呈倒U型趋势，在中等约束强度时达到峰值；而高能力模型生成的多选题在所有约束下都接近饱和违规率，且具有强跨模型可转移性。
AI.conclusion: 当前安全评估严重低估了结构化任务设置中的风险，约束决策是安全对齐失败的关键且未被充分探索的领域。

title: EcoTIM: Fuel-saving multi-brand tillage with ISO 11783 TIM
summary: Tillage operations account for a large share of on-farm diesel consumption, yet the fuel efficiency of the combined tractor-implement system is not optimised in current practice. Modern continuously variable transmission (CVT) tractors minimise engine fuel consumption internally, but they treat the implement as an unknown load and do not account for the effect of vehicle speed on implement draft force. This paper presents EcoTIM, a distributed fuel-optimisation concept in which the tractor and tillage implement cooperate through the extended ISO 11783 (ISOBUS) Tractor Implement Management (TIM) interface to minimise fuel consumption per hectare in real time. In the EcoTIM concept, the tractor Electric Control Unit fuses its internal engine, transmission, and traction efficiencies into a single combined efficiency value and its derivative with respect to vehicle speed, and broadcasts both to the implement at the standard 100 ms CAN bus cycle. The implement ECU combines these two received scalars with its own analytically known draft force model to evaluate the fuel-consumption gradient, and commands the optimal speed, and as a novel TIM extension, the desired acceleration, back to the tractor. Because only two scalar values are exchanged and neither party discloses proprietary subsystem models, the architecture is inherently multi-brand and plug-and-play. The required data exchange is realised with three new messages and one backward-compatible byte-level extension to the standard TIM speed command, and this paper proposes that these messages are standardised within ISO 11783. The acceleration command enables feed-forward torque and CVT ratio planning on the tractor side, improving transient response compared with speed-only TIM commands. This paper also contains a proof-of-concept simulation with six tillage scenarios and a spatially varying 1km test track for initial concept validation.

AI.tldr: EcoTIM是一个分布式燃料优化系统，通过ISO 11783标准接口让拖拉机和耕作机具协同工作，实时优化每公顷燃料消耗。
AI.motivation: 当前耕作作业占农场柴油消耗很大比例，但现有CVT拖拉机只优化内部发动机燃料消耗，将机具视为未知负载，未考虑车速对机具牵引力的影响，无法实现整个系统的燃料优化。
AI.method: 提出EcoTIM分布式优化概念：拖拉机ECU融合发动机、传动和牵引效率为单一综合效率值及其对车速的导数，通过ISOBUS TIM接口以100ms周期广播给机具；机具ECU结合自身牵引力模型计算燃料消耗梯度，向拖拉机发送最优速度和加速度命令。
AI.result: 系统仅交换两个标量值，无需披露专有子系统模型，实现多品牌即插即用；提出三个新消息和一个向后兼容的TIM速度命令扩展；加速度命令改善了瞬态响应；通过6种耕作场景和1km测试轨道的概念验证仿真。
AI.conclusion: EcoTIM通过拖拉机与机具的协同优化，显著降低耕作燃料消耗，提出的标准化消息扩展有望在ISO 11783中实现标准化，为农业机械燃料效率优化提供实用解决方案。

title: FedLLM: A Privacy-Preserving Federated Large Language Model for Explainable Traffic Flow Prediction
summary: Traffic prediction plays a central role in intelligent transportation systems (ITS) by supporting real-time decision-making, congestion management, and long-term planning. However, many existing approaches face practical limitations. Most spatio-temporal models are trained on centralized data, rely on numerical representations, and offer limited explainability. Recent Large Language Model (LLM) methods improve reasoning capabilities but typically assume centralized data availability and do not fully capture the distributed and heterogeneous nature of real-world traffic systems. To address these challenges, this study proposes FedLLM (Federated LLM), a privacy-preserving and distributed framework for explainable multi-horizon short-term traffic flow prediction (15-60 minutes). The framework introduces four key contributions: 1) a Composite Selection Score (CSS) for data-driven freeway selection that captures structural diversity across traffic regions 2) a domain-adapted LLM fine-tuned on structured traffic prompts encoding spatial, temporal, and statistical context 3) FedLLM framework, that enables collaborative training across heterogeneous clients while exchanging only lightweight LoRA adapter parameters, 4) a structured prompt representation that supports contextual reasoning and cross-region generalization. The FedLLM design allows each client to learn from local traffic patterns while contributing to a shared global model through efficient parameter exchange, reducing communication overhead and keeping data private. This setup supports learning under non-IID traffic distributions. Experimental results show that FedLLM achieves improved predictive performance over centralized baselines, while producing structured and explainable outputs. These findings highlight the potential of combining FL with domain-adapted LLMs for scalable, privacy-aware, and explainable traffic prediction.

AI.tldr: 提出FedLLM框架，结合联邦学习与领域适配LLM，实现隐私保护、可解释的多时段短时交通流预测
AI.motivation: 现有交通预测方法存在集中式数据依赖、可解释性有限、无法处理分布式异构交通系统等问题，需要隐私保护且能处理非IID数据的分布式解决方案
AI.method: 1) 基于复合选择分数(CSS)的数据驱动高速公路选择；2) 在结构化交通提示上微调的领域适配LLM；3) 联邦学习框架，仅交换轻量级LoRA适配器参数；4) 支持上下文推理和跨区域泛化的结构化提示表示
AI.result: FedLLM在预测性能上优于集中式基线方法，同时能产生结构化且可解释的输出，通信开销低且保护数据隐私
AI.conclusion: 结合联邦学习与领域适配LLM的方法具有实现可扩展、隐私感知、可解释交通预测的潜力

title: Harness as an Asset: Enforcing Determinism via the Convergent AI Agent Framework (CAAF)
summary:
Large Language Models (LLMs) produce a controllability gap in safety-critical engineering: even low rates of undetected constraint violations render a system undeployable. Current orchestration paradigms suffer from sycophantic compliance, context attention decay [Liu et al., 2024], and stochastic oscillation during self-correction [Huang et al., 2024].
  We introduce the Convergent AI Agent Framework (CAAF), which transitions agentic workflows from open-loop generation to closed-loop Fail-Safe Determinism via three pillars: (1) Recursive Atomic Decomposition with physical context firewalls; (2) Harness as an Asset, formalizing domain invariants into machine-readable registries enforced by a deterministic Unified Assertion Interface (UAI); and (3) Structured Semantic Gradients with State Locking for monotonic convergence.
  Empirical evaluation across two domains -- SAE Level 3 (L3) autonomous driving (AD) (n=30, 7 conditions) and pharmaceutical continuous flow reactor design (n=20, 4 conditions including a Mono+UAI ablation) -- shows that CAAF-all-GPT-4o-mini achieves 100% paradox detection while monolithic GPT-4o achieves 0% (even at temperature=0). The pharmaceutical benchmark features 7 simultaneous constraints with nonlinear Arrhenius interactions and a 3-way minimal unsatisfiable subset, representing a structurally harder challenge than the 2-constraint AD paradox. Alternative multi-agent architectures (debate, sequential checking) also achieve 0% across 80 trials, confirming that CAAF's reliability derives from its deterministic UAI, not from multi-agent orchestration per se. A Mono+UAI ablation (95%) isolates UAI as the core contribution. CAAF's reliability is invariant to prompt hints; all components use a single commodity model, enabling fully offline deployment.

AI.tldr: CAAF框架通过递归原子分解、领域不变量注册和结构化语义梯度，实现LLM在安全关键工程中的确定性闭环控制，解决现有方法的约束违反问题。
AI.motivation: LLM在安全关键工程中存在可控性差距，即使低概率的约束违反也会导致系统无法部署。现有编排范式存在奉承性合规、上下文注意力衰减和随机振荡等问题。
AI.method: 提出收敛AI代理框架(CAAF)，包含三个支柱：1) 递归原子分解与物理上下文防火墙；2) 领域不变量形式化为机器可读注册表，由确定性统一断言接口(UAI)强制执行；3) 结构化语义梯度与状态锁定实现单调收敛。
AI.result: 在自动驾驶和制药反应器设计两个领域评估显示，CAAF-all-GPT-4o-mini实现100%悖论检测，而单体GPT-4o为0%。多代理架构也均为0%，UAI消融实验(95%)确认UAI是核心贡献。
AI.conclusion: CAAF通过确定性UAI实现LLM在安全关键应用中的可靠闭环控制，其可靠性不依赖提示技巧，使用单一商品模型即可完全离线部署。

title: x1: Learning to Think Adaptively Across Languages and Cultures
summary: Languages encode distinct abstractions and inductive priors, yet most large language models (LLMs) overlook this diversity by reasoning in a single dominant language. In this work, we introduce x1, a family of reasoning models that can adaptively reason in an advantageous language on a per-instance basis. To isolate the effect of reasoning-language choice, x1 is constructed without expanding the model's knowledge boundaries and is trained by contrasting linguistically distinct reasoning trajectories for the same input. Our extensive experiments demonstrate the benefits of adaptive multilingual reasoning across multilingual mathematical reasoning and culturally grounded tasks. Moreover, our results challenge a simplistic view of scaling laws: while scaling reduces cross-lingual disparities in procedural domains such as math reasoning, it does not eliminate the advantages of culture-associated languages in culturally grounded tasks, as we empirically show that such reasoning enables more efficient and accurate cultural knowledge recall. Overall, our findings establish language choice as a functional component of reasoning, with implications for building more generalist and globally competent reasoning models.

AI.tldr: x1模型系列通过自适应选择推理语言提升多语言任务表现，挑战了简单的缩放定律观点
AI.motivation: 现有大语言模型通常在单一主导语言中推理，忽视了不同语言编码的独特抽象和归纳先验，限制了模型在多语言和文化相关任务中的表现
AI.method: 构建x1推理模型系列，通过对比同一输入的不同语言推理轨迹进行训练，使模型能够自适应选择优势推理语言，同时不扩展模型的知识边界
AI.result: 实验证明自适应多语言推理在多语言数学推理和文化相关任务中均有优势；缩放能减少数学推理等程序性领域的跨语言差异，但无法消除文化相关语言在文化任务中的优势
AI.conclusion: 语言选择是推理的功能性组成部分，这对构建更通用和全球胜任的推理模型具有重要意义

title: Leader-Follower Formation Control Using Differential Drag and Effective Surface Regulation
summary: The growing interest in space activities has led to the emergence of new space operators and innovative mission concepts. Small satellites such as CubeSats reduce mission costs and are typically deployed in constellations or formation flights. Since they are often propulsionless, passive orbital control strategies are the standard, primarily through differential drag achieved via attitude control maneuvers. This work develops a control system to achieve a generic relative positioning between two small satellites in a virtual leader and real follower formation flight, relying entirely on differential drag achieved through attitude maneuvers. We propose a control law based on the integrator backstepping technique, which, in a closed loop with the rotational dynamics, results in the asymptotic stability of the closed-loop system equilibrium points. We demonstrate the asymptotic stability of the closed-loop system equilibrium points using the Lyapunov theory, and a numerical simulation assesses the effectiveness and accuracy of the control strategy.

AI.tldr: 开发基于姿态控制的差动阻力控制策略，实现小型卫星虚拟领导者-真实跟随者编队飞行中的相对定位
AI.motivation: 随着太空活动兴趣增长，小型卫星（如立方星）成本降低但通常无推进系统，需要依赖差动阻力进行被动轨道控制，特别是用于编队飞行中的相对定位
AI.method: 提出基于积分器反步法的控制律，通过姿态控制实现差动阻力，与旋转动力学形成闭环系统，利用李雅普诺夫理论证明闭环系统平衡点的渐近稳定性
AI.result: 通过数值仿真验证控制策略的有效性和准确性，证明系统能够实现两星之间的通用相对定位
AI.conclusion: 成功开发了完全依赖姿态控制实现差动阻力的控制系统，为无推进小型卫星编队飞行提供了有效的相对定位解决方案

title: JudgeMeNot: Personalizing Large Language Models to Emulate Judicial Reasoning in Hebrew
comment: To appear in Findings of the ACL 2026
summary: Despite significant advances in large language models, personalizing them for individual decision-makers remains an open problem. Here, we introduce a synthetic-organic supervision pipeline that transforms raw judicial decisions into instruction-tuning data, enabling parameter-efficient fine-tuning of personalized models for individual judges in low-resource settings. We compare our approach to state-of-the-art personalization techniques across three different tasks and settings. The results show that Causal Language Modeling followed by synthetically generated instruction-tuning significantly outperforms all other baselines, providing significant improvements across lexical, stylistic, and semantic similarity. Notably, our model-generated outputs are indistinguishable from the reasoning of human judges, highlighting the viability of efficient personalization, even in low-resource settings.

AI.tldr: 提出合成-有机监督管道，将司法判决转化为指令调优数据，实现低资源环境下法官个性化模型的高效微调
AI.motivation: 尽管大语言模型取得显著进展，但为个体决策者（如法官）进行个性化定制仍是一个开放问题，特别是在低资源环境下
AI.method: 开发合成-有机监督管道，将原始司法判决转化为指令调优数据，采用因果语言建模和合成生成的指令调优进行参数高效微调
AI.result: 因果语言建模结合合成指令调优显著优于所有基线方法，在词汇、风格和语义相似度方面均有显著提升，模型生成输出与人类法官推理难以区分
AI.conclusion: 该方法证明了在低资源环境下实现高效个性化的可行性，为个性化语言模型在司法等专业领域的应用提供了有效途径

title: Beyond Feature Fusion: Contextual Bayesian PEFT for Multimodal Uncertainty Estimation
summary: We introduce CoCo-LoRA, a multimodal, uncertainty-aware parameter-efficient fine-tuning method for text prediction tasks accompanied by audio context. Existing PEFT approaches such as LoRA are efficient but typically deterministic, while recent Bayesian low-rank adapters model uncertainty in a lightweight way yet remain largely unimodal and condition uncertainty primarily on internal text features. This leaves them poorly equipped to reflect uncertainty driven by external acoustic factors such as background noise, channel variability, or speaking style, which can materially affect reliability in speech-centered applications. CoCo-LoRA addresses this gap by conditioning a contextual variational posterior in the low-rank space on both local text-derived adapter features and an audio-derived context signal. A pooled audio embedding is projected once into a shared context space and then adapted through lightweight layer-wise heads, enabling global-to-local, depth-specific modulation of the adapter uncertainty and update without high-dimensional multimodal fusion. Stochasticity is confined to a compact latent component in the rank space, preserving PEFT scalability while producing audio-sensitive, heteroscedastic uncertainty. Based on our evaluations across diverse tasks and backbone combinations, CoCo-LoRA consistently matches or outperforms text-only PEFT and conventional feature-fusion transfer baselines, particularly on high-coverage labels where reliable adaptation is critical. The results indicate that using audio as a contextual uncertainty signal, rather than as a fused feature stream, provides a robust and parameter-efficient alternative for multimodal low-resource prediction.

AI.tldr: CoCo-LoRA：一种多模态、不确定性感知的参数高效微调方法，通过音频上下文调节低秩空间中的变分后验，为文本预测任务提供音频敏感的异方差不确定性估计。
AI.motivation: 现有PEFT方法（如LoRA）虽然高效但通常是确定性的，而最近的贝叶斯低秩适配器虽然能建模不确定性，但主要基于内部文本特征，无法反映外部音频因素（如背景噪声、信道变化、说话风格）带来的不确定性，这在语音中心应用中会影响可靠性。
AI.method: CoCo-LoRA通过在低秩空间中构建一个上下文变分后验，该后验同时基于局部文本派生的适配器特征和音频派生的上下文信号。音频嵌入被投影到共享上下文空间，然后通过轻量级层特定头进行适配，实现全局到局部、深度特定的适配器不确定性和更新调制，避免高维多模态融合。
AI.result: 在多种任务和骨干网络组合的评估中，CoCo-LoRA一致匹配或优于仅文本的PEFT和传统特征融合迁移基线，特别是在高覆盖率标签上（可靠适配至关重要）。
AI.conclusion: 将音频作为上下文不确定性信号（而非融合特征流）为多模态低资源预测提供了鲁棒且参数高效的替代方案，能够在保持PEFT可扩展性的同时产生音频敏感的异方差不确定性。

title: Understanding and Enforcing Weight Disentanglement in Task Arithmetic
summary: Task arithmetic provides an efficient, training-free way to edit pre-trained models, yet lacks a fundamental theoretical explanation for its success. The existing concept of ``weight disentanglement" describes the ideal outcome of non-interfering task composition but does not reveal its underlying cause. Crucially, what intrinsic properties of the pre-trained model ($θ_0$) or the task vectors ($τ_t$) enable this disentanglement remains underexplored. In this paper, we introduce Task-Feature Specialization (TFS), a model's ability to allocate distinct internal features to different tasks, as the fundamental principle. We first prove that TFS is a sufficient condition for weight disentanglement. More importantly, we find that TFS also gives rise to an observable geometric consequence: weight vector orthogonality. This positions TFS as the common cause for both the desired functional outcome (disentanglement) and a measurable geometric property (orthogonality). This relationship provides the key insight for our method: since the abstract TFS property is intractable to enforce directly, we can instead promote weight disentanglement by shaping its concrete geometric consequence, orthogonality. Therefore, we propose OrthoReg, a simple and effective regularization method that actively enforces an internal orthogonal structure on weight updates ($ΔW$) that constitute $τ_t$ during fine-tuning. And we theoretically prove that OrthoReg promotes disentanglement. Extensive experiments demonstrate that OrthoReg consistently and significantly enhances the performance of various task arithmetic methods. Code is available at \href{https://github.com/RL-MIND/OrthoReg}{https://github.com/RL-MIND/OrthoReg}.

AI.tldr: 论文提出任务特征专业化(TFS)作为任务算术成功的基本原理，并开发了OrthoReg正则化方法通过强制权重正交性来促进任务解耦
AI.motivation: 任务算术提供了一种高效、无需训练的方法来编辑预训练模型，但缺乏对其成功的基本理论解释。现有的"权重解耦"概念描述了理想结果，但未揭示其根本原因。需要探索预训练模型或任务向量的内在属性如何实现这种解耦
AI.method: 提出任务特征专业化(TFS)作为基本原理，证明TFS是权重解耦的充分条件，并发现TFS导致可观察的几何后果：权重向量正交性。基于此提出OrthoReg正则化方法，在微调期间主动强制权重更新(ΔW)形成内部正交结构
AI.result: 理论证明OrthoReg促进解耦。大量实验表明，OrthoReg持续且显著提升了各种任务算术方法的性能
AI.conclusion: 任务特征专业化(TFS)是任务算术成功的基本原理，通过强制权重正交性可以促进任务解耦，OrthoReg正则化方法为此提供了有效的实现途径

title: Freshness-Aware Prioritized Experience Replay for LLM/VLM Reinforcement Learning
summary: Reinforcement Learning (RL) has achieved impressive success in post-training Large Language Models (LLMs) and Vision-Language Models (VLMs), with on-policy algorithms such as PPO, GRPO, and REINFORCE++ serving as the dominant paradigm. However, these methods discard all collected trajectories after a single gradient update, resulting in poor sample efficiency, particularly wasteful for agentic tasks where multi-turn environment interactions are expensive. While Experience Replay drives sample efficiency in classic RL by allowing agents to reuse past trajectories and prioritize informative ones, directly applying Prioritized Experience Replay (PER) to LLMs fails. The rapid policy evolution of billion-parameter models renders stored priorities stale, causing old high-priority trajectories to dominate sampling long after they have become uninformative. We propose Freshness-Aware PER, which addresses this priority staleness problem by augmenting any PER-based priority with a multiplicative exponential age decay grounded in effective sample size analysis. To the best of our knowledge, Freshness-Aware PER is the first work to successfully apply PER to LLM/VLM reinforcement learning. We evaluate on eight multi-step agentic, reasoning, and math competition tasks with 0.5B, 3B, and 7B models. Freshness-Aware PER significantly outperforms on-policy baselines, achieving +46% on NQ Search, +367% on Sokoban, and +133% on VLM FrozenLake, while standard PER without age decay consistently degrades performance. Our code is publicly available at https://github.com/Vision-CAIR/Freshness-Aware-PER.

AI.tldr: 提出Freshness-Aware PER方法，通过引入指数年龄衰减解决LLM/VLM强化学习中优先级经验回放的优先级过时问题，显著提升样本效率
AI.motivation: 当前LLM/VLM强化学习主要使用PPO、GRPO等在线策略算法，这些方法在单次梯度更新后丢弃所有轨迹，导致样本效率低下。虽然经典RL中经验回放能提升样本效率，但直接应用于LLM会因模型快速演化导致存储的优先级过时，使旧的高优先级轨迹长期主导采样
AI.method: 提出Freshness-Aware PER方法，基于有效样本量分析，在任何PER优先级基础上添加乘性指数年龄衰减，解决优先级过时问题。这是首个成功将PER应用于LLM/VLM强化学习的工作
AI.result: 在8个多步代理、推理和数学竞赛任务上评估（使用0.5B、3B和7B模型），Freshness-Aware PER显著优于在线策略基线：NQ Search提升46%，Sokoban提升367%，VLM FrozenLake提升133%。而标准PER（无年龄衰减）始终降低性能
AI.conclusion: Freshness-Aware PER成功解决了LLM/VLM强化学习中优先级经验回放的优先级过时问题，显著提升了样本效率和性能，为大规模语言/视觉语言模型的强化学习训练提供了更高效的解决方案

title: Frugal Geofencing via Energy-aware Sensing and Reporting
summary: Timely and accurate monitoring in geofencing scenarios is challenging when relying on ultra-low power Internet of Things devices (IoTDs) powered by energy harvesting (EH). This is mainly because frequent wake-ups for data acquisition and data uploading may quickly deplete their limited energy buffer. Conventional grid-like IoT deployments overlook these limitations and merely rely on continuously powered sensing. Herein, we propose an energy-aware geofencing framework for camera-equipped EH IoTDs deployed around a protected area and its surrounding perimeter zone. The framework integrates a directional sensing power model with an operational representation of EH, sensing, sleeping, and reporting, accounting for the limited field-of-view (FoV) and distance-dependent detection confidence of the IoTDs. Device activity is controlled by the coverage-providing access point, which hosts a mobile edge host and a facility geocencing system to ensure timely and reliable detection under tight energy constraints. Reinforcement learning is used to determine IoTD placement, enabling earlier intruder detection than uniform grid-based deployments. Numerical results show that the proposed coordinated sensing and reporting configuration achieves frugal geofencing with fewer devices, while concurrently improving detection timeliness and dependability.

AI.tldr: 提出能量感知地理围栏框架，用于能量收集物联网设备，通过强化学习优化设备布局，实现更早的入侵检测和更少的设备需求
AI.motivation: 基于能量收集的物联网设备在频繁唤醒进行数据采集和上传时会快速耗尽有限的能量缓冲，传统网格状部署忽视这些限制，仅依赖持续供电的传感
AI.method: 提出能量感知地理围栏框架，集成定向传感功率模型与能量收集、传感、睡眠和报告的操作表示，考虑有限视场和距离依赖的检测置信度，使用强化学习确定物联网设备布局
AI.result: 数值结果显示，提出的协调传感和报告配置实现了节俭的地理围栏，使用更少的设备，同时提高检测及时性和可靠性，比均匀网格部署能更早检测入侵者
AI.conclusion: 该框架为能量受限的物联网设备提供了有效的能量感知地理围栏解决方案，通过协调传感和报告配置，在严格能量约束下实现及时可靠的检测

title: Mix and Match: Context Pairing for Scalable Topic-Controlled Educational Summarisation
comment: To be published at the International Conference on Artificial Intelligence in Education (AIED'26)
summary: Topic-controlled summarisation enables users to generate summaries focused on specific aspects of source documents. This paper investigates a data augmentation strategy for training small language models (sLMs) to perform topic-controlled summarisation. We propose a pairwise data augmentation method that combines contexts from different documents to create contrastive training examples, enabling models to learn the relationship between topics and summaries more effectively. Using the SciTLDR dataset enriched with Wikipedia-derived topics, we systematically evaluate how augmentation scale affects model performance. Results show consistent improvements in win rate and semantic alignment as the augmentation scale increases, while the amount of real training data remains fixed. Consequently, a T5-base model trained with our augmentation approach achieves competitive performance relative to larger models, despite using significantly fewer parameters and substantially fewer real training examples.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种用于主题控制摘要的数据增强方法，通过组合不同文档的上下文创建对比训练样本，使小型语言模型能够更有效地学习主题与摘要之间的关系，在固定真实训练数据量的情况下，随着增强规模增加，模型性能持续提升。
AI.motivation: 主题控制摘要能让用户生成针对特定方面的摘要，但训练小型语言模型进行主题控制摘要面临数据不足的挑战。本文旨在通过数据增强策略解决这一问题，使小型模型能够更有效地学习主题与摘要的关联。
AI.method: 提出成对数据增强方法，组合不同文档的上下文创建对比训练样本。使用SciTLDR数据集并添加维基百科来源的主题信息，系统评估增强规模对模型性能的影响。
AI.result: 随着数据增强规模的增加，模型在胜率和语义对齐方面持续改进，而真实训练数据量保持固定。使用该方法训练的T5-base模型在参数和真实训练样本显著减少的情况下，仍能取得与更大模型竞争的性能。
AI.conclusion: 提出的数据增强策略能有效提升小型语言模型在主题控制摘要任务上的性能，使资源受限的模型能够通过增强训练数据达到与更大模型相当的竞争力。

title: Complementing Self-Consistency with Cross-Model Disagreement for Uncertainty Quantification
summary: Large language models (LLMs) often produce confident yet incorrect responses, and uncertainty quantification is one potential solution to more robust usage. Recent works routinely rely on self-consistency to estimate aleatoric uncertainty (AU), yet this proxy collapses when models are overconfident and produce the same incorrect answer across samples. We analyze this regime and show that cross-model semantic disagreement is higher on incorrect answers precisely when AU is low. Motivated by this, we introduce an epistemic uncertainty (EU) term that operates in the black-box access setting: EU uses only generated text from a small, scale-matched ensemble and is computed as the gap between inter-model and intra-model sequence-semantic similarity. We then define total uncertainty (TU) as the sum of AU and EU. In a comprehensive study across five 7-9B instruction-tuned models and ten long-form tasks, TU improves ranking calibration and selective abstention relative to AU, and EU reliably flags confident failures where AU is low. We further characterize when EU is most useful via agreement and complementarity diagnostics.

AI.tldr: 论文提出了一种新的不确定性量化方法，通过结合认知不确定性(EU)来改进仅依赖自一致性估计的随机不确定性(AU)，以解决LLMs过度自信产生相同错误答案的问题。
AI.motivation: 大型语言模型经常产生自信但错误的回答，现有基于自一致性的随机不确定性估计方法在模型过度自信时失效（产生相同错误答案）。研究发现跨模型语义分歧在错误答案上更高，这为改进不确定性量化提供了机会。
AI.method: 引入认知不确定性(EU)作为黑盒访问设置下的补充项：使用小型规模匹配集成模型，计算为跨模型与模型内序列语义相似度之间的差距。总不确定性(TU)定义为AU和EU之和。
AI.result: 在5个7-9B指令调优模型和10个长文本任务上的综合研究表明，TU相比AU在排名校准和选择性弃权方面表现更好，EU能可靠地标记AU较低的自信失败情况。
AI.conclusion: 提出的认知不确定性方法能有效补充随机不确定性，特别是在模型过度自信产生相同错误答案的情况下，为LLMs不确定性量化提供了更稳健的解决方案。

title: MeasHalu: Mitigation of Scientific Measurement Hallucinations for Large Language Models with Enhanced Reasoning
summary: The accurate extraction of scientific measurements from literature is a critical yet challenging task in AI4Science, enabling large-scale analysis and integration of quantitative research findings. However, Large Language Models (LLMs) frequently exhibit severe hallucinations, which significantly undermine the reliability of automated scientific document understanding systems. To address this problem, we propose MeasHalu, a novel framework for mitigating scientific measurement hallucinations through enhanced reasoning and targeted optimization. We first present a fine-grained taxonomy of measurement-specific hallucinations, categorizing errors across quantities, units, modifiers, and relations. Our approach incorporates a two-stage reasoning-aware fine-tuning strategy using augmented scientific data and process-based supervision. Furthermore, we introduce a progressive reward curriculum designed to penalize specific hallucination types, significantly improving extraction faithfulness. Experimental results demonstrate that MeasHalu substantially reduces hallucination rates and improves overall accuracy on the MeasEval benchmark. This work provides a targeted solution to a key bottleneck in automated scientific knowledge extraction, facilitating more trustworthy and scalable machine-assisted scientific literature analysis.

AI.tldr: MeasHalu框架通过增强推理和针对性优化，显著减少科学文献中测量数据提取的幻觉问题，提高自动化科学文档理解的可靠性。
AI.motivation: 从科学文献中准确提取测量数据对AI4Science至关重要，但大型语言模型存在严重幻觉问题，这严重影响了自动化科学文档理解系统的可靠性。
AI.method: 提出MeasHalu框架：1) 建立测量特定幻觉的细粒度分类法；2) 采用两阶段推理感知微调策略，使用增强的科学数据和过程监督；3) 引入渐进式奖励课程，针对特定幻觉类型进行惩罚。
AI.result: 实验结果表明，MeasHalu在MeasEval基准测试中显著降低了幻觉率并提高了整体准确性。
AI.conclusion: 这项工作为自动化科学知识提取的关键瓶颈提供了针对性解决方案，促进了更可信和可扩展的机器辅助科学文献分析。

title: Informativity of Data-Knowledge Pairs for Lyapunov Equations
summary: In the past few years, data informativity with prior knowledge has attracted increasing attention. This line of research aims to characterize a dataset on a dynamical system that enables system analysis or design only by the dataset and given prior knowledge on the system. In this paper, we investigate such a characterization for the data-driven problem of computing a unique solution to Lyapunov equations. First, we introduce a notion of joint informativity for data-knowledge pairs as an extension of the standard informativity concept. Second, we derive an algebraic equivalent condition for the joint informativity. Finally, we provide further insights into the joint informativity by considering a special case of prior knowledge. The characterization presented in this paper is developed for a wide class of prior knowledge, enabling the incorporation of various forms of system information.

AI.tldr: 提出联合信息性概念，用于数据驱动求解Lyapunov方程的唯一解，扩展了传统信息性概念以包含先验知识
AI.motivation: 近年来，结合先验知识的数据信息性研究受到关注，旨在仅通过数据集和系统先验知识进行系统分析或设计。本文研究如何为数据驱动求解Lyapunov方程唯一解的问题提供这种特征描述。
AI.method: 1. 引入数据-知识对的联合信息性概念，作为标准信息性概念的扩展；2. 推导联合信息性的代数等价条件；3. 通过考虑特殊先验知识案例提供进一步见解
AI.result: 为广泛类别的先验知识开发了特征描述，能够纳入各种形式的系统信息
AI.conclusion: 本文提出的联合信息性概念为数据驱动求解Lyapunov方程提供了理论框架，能够有效结合先验知识，扩展了传统数据驱动方法的适用范围

title: The implicated scientist: on the role of AI researchers in the development of weapons systems
comment: Presented as an oral talk and a poster at the AI for Peace workshop at ICLR 2026
summary: Artificial intelligence (AI) technologies are increasingly used in modern weapons systems. Notably, these systems have recently been involved in mass killings and destruction at scale. Furthermore, there is currently a strong interest and competition among powerful players to accelerate the proliferation of weapons with automated or AI-based components, a phenomenon known as AI arms race. This competition poses a risk of causing even more deaths and devastation in the future, as well as increased power and wealth inequality. In this work, we aim to shed light on the role of AI researchers as implicated subjects in the harms caused by weapons enabled by AI technologies. We investigate and discuss the specifics of this implication and explore ways to transfigure this position of implication into one of differentiated, long-distance solidarity with the victims of technologically fortified injustices.

AI.tldr: 该论文探讨AI研究人员在AI武器造成的伤害中的责任，并提出从"牵连主体"转变为"远程团结"受害者的立场。
AI.motivation: AI技术在现代武器系统中日益普及，这些系统已造成大规模杀伤和破坏。当前强国之间正加速AI武器竞赛，这可能导致更多死亡、破坏以及权力和财富不平等加剧。作者旨在阐明AI研究人员作为AI武器伤害的"牵连主体"的角色。
AI.method: 通过调查和讨论AI研究人员在AI武器开发中的具体牵连关系，探索将这种牵连地位转变为与科技强化不公受害者建立差异化、远程团结的方式。
AI.result: 论文分析了AI研究人员在AI武器系统中的责任链，提出了从被动牵连到主动团结受害者的伦理立场转变框架。
AI.conclusion: AI研究人员需要认识到自己在AI武器伤害中的牵连责任，并积极寻求与受害者建立远程团结关系，以应对AI武器竞赛带来的伦理挑战和社会危害。

title: FRIGID: Scaling Diffusion-Based Molecular Generation from Mass Spectra at Training and Inference Time
summary: In this work, we present FRIGID, a framework with a novel diffusion language model that generates molecular structures conditioned on mass spectra via intermediate fingerprint representations and determined chemical formulae, training at the scale of hundreds of millions of unlabeled structures. We then demonstrate how forward fragmentation models enable inference-time scaling by identifying spectrum-inconsistent fragments and refining them through targeted remasking and denoising. While FRIGID already achieves strong performance with its diffusion base, inference-time scaling significantly improves its accuracy, surpassing 18% Top-1 accuracy on the challenging MassSpecGym benchmark and tripling the Top-1 accuracy of the leading methods on NPLIB1. Further empirical analyses show that FRIGID exhibits log-linear performance scaling with increasing inference-time compute, opening a promising new direction for continued improvements in de novo structural elucidation. FRIGID code is publicly available at https://github.com/coleygroup/FRIGID

AI.tldr: FRIGID是一个基于扩散语言模型的框架，通过指纹表示和化学式从质谱生成分子结构，并通过推理时缩放显著提升准确率
AI.motivation: 解决从质谱数据中从头解析分子结构的挑战性问题，现有方法在准确率上仍有局限，需要更有效的生成模型
AI.method: 提出FRIGID框架：1）使用扩散语言模型通过中间指纹表示和确定的化学式从质谱生成分子结构；2）利用前向碎片化模型进行推理时缩放，识别谱图不一致的片段并通过针对性重掩码和去噪进行精炼
AI.result: 在MassSpecGym基准测试中达到18%以上的Top-1准确率，在NPLIB1上将领先方法的Top-1准确率提升三倍；展示了对数线性性能缩放特性，推理时计算增加能持续提升性能
AI.conclusion: FRIGID通过扩散模型和推理时缩放为分子结构从头解析开辟了新方向，代码已开源，为持续改进提供了有前景的途径

title: If Only My CGM Could Speak: A Privacy-Preserving Agent for Question Answering over Continuous Glucose Data
summary: Continuous glucose monitors (CGMs) used in diabetes care collect rich personal health data that could improve day-to-day self-management. However, current patient platforms only offer static summaries which do not support inquisitive user queries. Large language models (LLMs) could enable free-form inquiries about continuous glucose data, but deploying them over sensitive health records raises privacy and accuracy concerns. In this paper, we present CGM-Agent, a privacy-preserving framework for question answering over personal glucose data. In our design, the LLM serves purely as a reasoning engine that selects analytical functions. All computation occurs locally, and personal health data never leaves the user's device. For evaluation, we construct a benchmark of 4,180 questions combining parameterized question templates with real user queries and ground truth derived from deterministic program execution. Evaluating 6 leading LLMs, we find that top models achieve 94\% value accuracy on synthetic queries and 88\% on ambiguous real-world queries. Errors stem primarily from intent and temporal ambiguity rather than computational failures. Additionally, lightweight models achieve competitive performance in our agent design, suggesting opportunities for low-cost deployment. We release our code and benchmark to support future work on trustworthy health agents.

AI.tldr: CGM-Agent是一个保护隐私的框架，使用LLM作为推理引擎在本地分析连续血糖监测数据，避免敏感健康数据离开用户设备，在合成查询和真实查询中分别达到94%和88%的准确率。
AI.motivation: 当前糖尿病管理平台只提供静态总结，不支持用户自由查询。虽然LLM可以处理自由形式的血糖数据查询，但部署在敏感健康数据上存在隐私和准确性担忧。
AI.method: CGM-Agent框架将LLM纯粹作为推理引擎，选择分析函数。所有计算在本地进行，个人健康数据从不离开用户设备。通过参数化问题模板和真实用户查询构建了4,180个问题的基准测试。
AI.result: 评估6个领先的LLM，顶级模型在合成查询上达到94%的值准确率，在模糊的真实世界查询上达到88%。错误主要源于意图和时间模糊性而非计算失败。轻量级模型在代理设计中也能获得有竞争力的性能。
AI.conclusion: CGM-Agent展示了隐私保护的健康代理的可行性，轻量级模型表现良好，为低成本部署提供了机会。代码和基准测试已发布以支持未来可信健康代理的研究。

title: No One Fits All: From Fixed Prompting to Learned Routing in Multilingual LLMs
comment: Accepted as a long findings paper at ACL 2026
summary: Translation-based prompting is widely used in multilingual LLMs, yet its effectiveness varies across languages and tasks. We evaluate prompting strategies across ten languages of different resource levels and four benchmarks. Our analysis shows that no single strategy is universally optimal. Translation strongly benefits low-resource languages even when translation quality is imperfect, high-resource languages gain little, and prompt-based self-routing underperforms explicit translation. Motivated by these findings, we formulate prompting strategy selection as a learned decision problem and introduce lightweight classifiers that predict whether native or translation-based prompting is optimal for each instance. The classifiers achieve statistically significant improvements over fixed strategies across four benchmarks and generalize to unseen task formats not observed during training. Further analysis reveals that language resource level, rather than translation quality alone, determines when translation is beneficial.

AI.tldr: 研究评估多语言LLM中翻译提示策略，发现没有单一最优策略：翻译对低资源语言有益（即使翻译质量不佳），对高资源语言帮助有限。提出轻量级分类器动态选择最优提示策略，在多个基准测试中显著优于固定策略。
AI.motivation: 翻译提示在多语言LLM中广泛使用，但其效果在不同语言和任务间差异很大。需要系统评估不同提示策略的有效性，并开发更智能的策略选择方法。
AI.method: 在10种不同资源水平的语言和4个基准测试上评估提示策略。基于分析结果，将提示策略选择建模为学习决策问题，引入轻量级分类器预测每个实例使用原生提示还是翻译提示更优。
AI.result: 翻译对低资源语言有显著帮助（即使翻译质量不完美），对高资源语言增益有限。提出的分类器在4个基准测试中比固定策略有统计显著改进，并能泛化到训练中未见过的任务格式。语言资源水平而非翻译质量决定翻译是否有益。
AI.conclusion: 没有单一最优提示策略，翻译提示对低资源语言特别有益。轻量级分类器能有效动态选择最优策略，实现比固定策略更好的性能。语言资源水平是决定翻译提示有效性的关键因素。

title: Scenario-Based Stochastic MPC for Energy Hubs with EV Fleets Under Persistent Grid Outages
summary: Emissions reduction and resilience to outages motivate the adoption of renewable microgrids. Surprisingly, research integrating both probabilistic grid outages and electric vehicle (EV) charging requirements remains limited. This paper addresses this gap by developing a scenario-based stochastic model predictive controller (SMPC) for a microgrid energy hub comprising solar generation, battery storage, diesel backup, and an EV fleet connected to a weak grid. Grid outage and campus load scenarios are generated from a continuous-time Markov chain and a Gaussian Process, respectively. Using 2023 operational data from the Ashesi University Energy Hub in Ghana, we demonstrate that the SMPC achieves performance within 1\% of a perfect-forecast benchmark. In contrast, a naive MPC that assumes continuous grid availability offers no economic or sustainability advantage over rule-based control, with both incurring significantly higher costs and emissions than the SMPC. These results highlight that outage anticipation is essential for economic viability. Finally, we show that incorporating a deterministic buffer against EV consumption uncertainty eliminates over 90\% of state-of-charge violations with negligible impact on total operating costs

AI.tldr: 开发基于场景的随机模型预测控制器（SMPC）用于微电网能源枢纽，整合电网停电概率和电动汽车充电需求，相比传统方法显著降低成本排放
AI.motivation: 现有研究很少同时考虑概率性电网停电和电动汽车充电需求，而这两者对可再生能源微电网的经济性和可持续性至关重要
AI.method: 开发场景化随机模型预测控制器（SMPC），包含太阳能发电、电池储能、柴油备用和电动汽车车队；使用连续时间马尔可夫链生成电网停电场景，高斯过程生成校园负荷场景
AI.result: SMPC性能接近完美预测基准（1%以内）；传统MPC无经济或可持续性优势；加入确定性缓冲可消除90%以上SOC违规，对总成本影响可忽略
AI.conclusion: 停电预测对经济可行性至关重要，SMPC能有效整合可再生能源、储能和电动汽车，实现成本效益和可持续性平衡

title: On the Effect of Quadratic Regularization in Direct Data-Driven LQR
comment: This paper is a preprint of a contribution to the 23rd IFAC World Congress 2026. 7 pages, 3 figures
summary: This paper proposes an explainability concept for direct data-driven linear quadratic regulation (LQR) with quadratic regularization. Our perspective follows the parametric effect of regularization, an analysis approach that translates regularization costs from auxiliary variables to system quantities, enabling intuitive interpretations. The framework further enables the elimination of auxiliary variables, thereby reducing computational complexity. We demonstrate the effectiveness of our approach and the identified effect of regularization via simulations.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种用于带二次正则化的直接数据驱动LQR的可解释性概念，通过参数化效应分析将正则化成本从辅助变量转化为系统量，实现直观解释并降低计算复杂度。
AI.motivation: 当前直接数据驱动LQR中的正则化方法缺乏直观的可解释性，难以理解正则化对系统性能的具体影响，需要建立连接正则化成本与系统量之间关系的分析框架。
AI.method: 采用参数化效应分析视角，将正则化成本从辅助变量转化为系统量，建立正则化与系统性能之间的直接联系，同时通过消除辅助变量来降低计算复杂度。
AI.result: 通过仿真验证了方法的有效性，展示了正则化对系统性能的具体影响，实现了对直接数据驱动LQR中正则化效应的直观解释。
AI.conclusion: 提出的可解释性框架成功地将正则化成本与系统量联系起来，不仅提供了直观的解释，还通过消除辅助变量降低了计算复杂度，为直接数据驱动LQR的正则化设计提供了理论支持。

title: FLARE: A Data-Efficient Surrogate for Predicting Displacement Fields in Directed Energy Deposition
summary: Directed energy deposition (DED) produces complex thermo-mechanical responses that can lead to distortion and reduced dimensional accuracy of a manufactured part. Thermo-mechanical finite element simulations are widely used to estimate these effects, but their computational cost and the complexity of accurately capturing DED physics limit their use in design iteration and process optimization. This paper introduces FLARE (Field Prediction via Linear Affine Reconstruction in wEight-space), a data-efficient surrogate modeling framework for predicting post-cooling displacement fields in DED from geometric and process parameters. We develop a predefined-geometry DED simulation workflow using an open-source finite element framework and generate a dataset of simulations with varying geometry, laser power, and deposition velocity. Each simulation provides full-field displacement, stress, strain, and temperature data throughout the manufacturing process. FLARE encodes each simulation as an implicit neural field and regularizes the corresponding neural-network weights so that they follow the affine structure of the input parameter space. This enables prediction of unseen parameter combinations by reconstructing network weights through affine mixing of training examples. On this DED benchmark, the method shows improved accuracy compared to baseline methods in both in-distribution and extrapolation settings. Although the present study focuses on DED displacement prediction, the proposed affine weight-space reconstruction framework offers a promising approach for data-efficient surrogate modeling of physical fields.

AI.tldr: FLARE框架通过仿射权重空间重构实现数据高效的DED位移场预测，相比基线方法在分布内和外推场景下均有更好精度。
AI.motivation: DED工艺产生复杂热机械响应导致变形和尺寸精度降低，传统有限元模拟计算成本高且复杂，限制了在设计迭代和工艺优化中的应用。
AI.method: 提出FLARE框架：将每个模拟编码为隐式神经场，正则化神经网络权重使其遵循输入参数空间的仿射结构，通过训练样本的仿射混合重构网络权重来预测未见参数组合。
AI.result: 在DED基准测试中，该方法在分布内和外推设置下相比基线方法均显示出更高的精度。
AI.conclusion: 虽然本研究专注于DED位移预测，但提出的仿射权重空间重构框架为物理场的数据高效代理建模提供了有前景的方法。

title: Local Inconsistency Resolution: The Interplay between Attention and Control in Probabilistic Models
summary: We present a generic algorithm for learning and approximate inference with an intuitive epistemic interpretation: iteratively focus on a subset of the model and resolve inconsistencies using the parameters under control. This framework, which we call Local Inconsistency Resolution (LIR) is built upon Probabilistic Dependency Graphs (PDGs), which provide a flexible representational foundation capable of capturing inconsistent beliefs. We show how LIR unifies and generalizes a wide variety of important algorithms in the literature, including the Expectation-Maximization (EM) algorithm, belief propagation, adversarial training, GANs, and GFlowNets. In the last case, LIR actually suggests a more natural loss, which we demonstrate improves GFlowNet convergence. Each method can be recovered as a specific instance of LIR by choosing a procedure to direct focus (attention and control). We implement this algorithm for discrete PDGs and study its properties on synthetically generated PDGs, comparing its behavior to the global optimization semantics of the full PDG.

AI.tldr: 提出LIR框架，通过迭代聚焦模型子集并解决不一致性来统一多种重要算法
AI.motivation: 需要一个具有直观认知解释的通用算法框架，能够统一处理学习与近似推理中的不一致性
AI.method: 基于概率依赖图(PDG)构建LIR框架，通过选择注意力与控制机制迭代聚焦子集并解决参数不一致
AI.result: LIR统一了EM、信念传播、对抗训练、GANs和GFlowNets等算法，并为GFlowNets提出了改进的损失函数
AI.conclusion: LIR提供了一个通用框架，通过局部不一致性解决机制统一多种重要算法，具有理论意义和实际应用价值

title: MNAFT: modality neuron-aware fine-tuning of multimodal large language models for image translation
comment: Accepted by SCIS (SCIENCE CHINA Information Science)
summary: Multimodal large language models (MLLMs) have shown impressive capabilities, yet they often struggle to effectively capture the fine-grained textual information within images crucial for accurate image translation. This often leads to a modality gap between visual text inputs and textual inputs/outputs for image translation. Existing methods, primarily relying on instruction fine-tuning, risk parameter redundancy of pre-trained knowledge, hindering generalization performance. To address this, we introduce modality neuron-aware fine-tuning (MNAFT), a novel approach that takes advantage of the specialized roles of individual neurons within MLLMs for enhanced image translation. MNAFT identifies language-agnostic and language-specific neurons in both vision and language modules through an instruction-driven activation analysis, evaluating their importance in various translation tasks. We then perform selective fine-tuning, updating only the parameters of language-specific and language-agnostic neurons within the selected layers relevant to the target task, while preserving the knowledge encoded in other neurons and layers. Our extensive experiments on multiple benchmarks demonstrate that MNAFT significantly outperforms state-of-the-art image translation methods, including cascaded models, standard full fine-tuning, and parameter-efficient tuning techniques. Furthermore, we provide comprehensive analysis, including visualizations of neuron activations and clustering patterns, to offer insights into the roles of different neuron groups in mediating cross-modal understanding and facilitating accurate language-specific translation.

AI.tldr: MNAFT通过识别并选择性微调语言无关和语言特定神经元，解决MLLMs在图像翻译中文本信息捕捉不足的问题，显著提升性能同时避免参数冗余。
AI.motivation: 多模态大语言模型在图像翻译中难以有效捕捉图像中的细粒度文本信息，导致视觉文本输入与文本输入/输出之间的模态鸿沟。现有方法主要依赖指令微调，存在预训练知识参数冗余问题，影响泛化性能。
AI.method: 提出模态神经元感知微调(MNAFT)：1)通过指令驱动激活分析识别视觉和语言模块中的语言无关和语言特定神经元；2)评估这些神经元在不同翻译任务中的重要性；3)选择性微调目标任务相关层中的语言特定和语言无关神经元参数，保留其他神经元和层的知识。
AI.result: 在多个基准测试上的广泛实验表明，MNAFT显著优于最先进的图像翻译方法，包括级联模型、标准全微调和参数高效调优技术。同时提供了神经元激活和聚类模式的可视化分析。
AI.conclusion: MNAFT通过利用MLLMs中神经元的专门角色，有效解决了图像翻译中的模态鸿沟问题，在保持模型泛化能力的同时显著提升了翻译准确性，为跨模态理解和语言特定翻译提供了新见解。

title: Composite Control of Grid-Following Inverters for Stabilizing AI-Induced Fast Power Disturbances
summary: AI data center loads create query-driven power transients on millisecond timescales. Such loads can violate the timescale separation assumptions underlying internal inverter control of grid-following resources collocated with data centers as supplementary generation. This paper develops a singular perturbation-based modeling and control for stabilizing fast power imbalances. We show that physically-implementable droop control is derived and valid by requiring reduced-system stability rather than being imposed a priori, and that AI workloads satisfy a bounded-rate disturbance class due to physical filtering in power delivery hardware. The analysis yields explicit gain bounds linking inverter parameters to disturbance rejection performance, a modulation admissibility condition ensuring physical realizability of the feedback linearizing control, and a feasibility condition identifying the maximum tolerable load ramp rate. Numerical simulations validate the theoretical predictions under stochastic AI transients.

AI.tldr: 该论文针对AI数据中心负载引起的毫秒级功率瞬变问题，提出了基于奇异摄动的建模与控制方法，通过推导物理可实现的droop控制来稳定快速功率不平衡。
AI.motivation: AI数据中心负载会在毫秒时间尺度上产生查询驱动的功率瞬变，这种负载可能违反与数据中心共址的电网跟随资源内部逆变器控制所基于的时间尺度分离假设，导致系统不稳定。
AI.method: 采用奇异摄动理论进行建模和控制设计，推导出物理可实现的droop控制，要求简化系统稳定性而非先验强加，并利用AI负载在电力传输硬件中的物理滤波特性将其归类为有界速率扰动。
AI.result: 分析得出了连接逆变器参数与扰动抑制性能的显式增益界限、确保反馈线性化控制物理可实现性的调制可容许条件，以及识别最大可容忍负载爬坡率的可行性条件。数值模拟验证了理论预测在随机AI瞬变下的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 该研究为AI数据中心引起的快速功率不平衡问题提供了理论分析和控制解决方案，通过奇异摄动方法推导出物理可实现的稳定控制策略，并建立了系统参数与性能之间的明确关系。

title: Wasserstein Distributionally Robust Risk-Sensitive Estimation via Conditional Value-at-Risk
summary: We propose a distributionally robust approach to risk-sensitive estimation of an unknown signal x from an observed signal y. The unknown signal and observation are modeled as random vectors whose joint probability distribution is unknown, but assumed to belong to a given type-2 Wasserstein ball of distributions, termed the ambiguity set. The performance of an estimator is measured according to the conditional value-at-risk (CVaR) of the squared estimation error. Within this framework, we study the problem of computing affine estimators that minimize the worst-case CVaR over all distributions in the given ambiguity set. As our main result, we show that, when the nominal distribution at the center of the Wasserstein ball is finitely supported, such estimators can be exactly computed by solving a tractable semidefinite program. We evaluate the proposed estimators on a wholesale electricity price forecasting task using real market data and show that they deliver lower out-of-sample CVaR of squared error compared to existing methods.
