AI.tldr: 提出一种分布鲁棒的风险敏感估计方法，在Wasserstein模糊集内最小化最坏情况CVaR，通过半定规划求解，在电力价格预测中表现优异
AI.motivation: 传统估计方法通常假设已知精确的概率分布，但实际中分布往往不确定。需要一种在分布不确定性下仍能保证性能的鲁棒估计方法，特别关注风险敏感的估计场景。
AI.method: 提出分布鲁棒的风险敏感估计框架：1) 使用type-2 Wasserstein球定义模糊集；2) 以条件风险价值(CVaR)作为估计性能度量；3) 在模糊集内寻找最小化最坏情况CVaR的仿射估计器；4) 当名义分布有限支撑时，通过半定规划精确求解。
AI.result: 理论证明当名义分布有限支撑时，最优仿射估计器可通过求解半定规划精确计算。在真实电力市场数据上的实验表明，该方法相比现有方法具有更低的样本外CVaR平方误差。
AI.conclusion: 提出的分布鲁棒风险敏感估计框架能有效处理分布不确定性，通过Wasserstein模糊集和CVaR度量实现鲁棒性能，在电力价格预测等实际应用中表现出色。

title: Cross-Modal Bayesian Low-Rank Adaptation for Uncertainty-Aware Multimodal Learning
summary: Large pre-trained language models are increasingly adapted to downstream tasks using parameter-efficient fine-tuning (PEFT), but existing PEFT methods are typically deterministic and unimodal, making them poorly suited for low-resource multimodal settings where predictive uncertainty and cross-modal reliability both matter. We introduce CALIBER (Context-Aware Low-rank Inference with Bayesian Embedding Regularization), a multimodal uncertainty-aware PEFT framework for audio-text learning. CALIBER extends Bayesian low-rank adaptation by conditioning the variational posterior in the adapter space on per-layer, token-level text-audio cross-attention. Specifically, text-derived low-rank features attend to frame-level audio embeddings to produce localized acoustic context, which then modulates the mean and variance of a compact stochastic latent matrix within the rank-$r$ adapter space. This design treats audio not only as an additional feature source, but as a contextual reliability signal that shapes both adaptation and confidence. By confining stochasticity to a low-dimensional latent component, CALIBER retains the computational efficiency and scalability of PEFT while enabling heteroscedastic multimodal uncertainty estimation. Experimental results across diverse text and audio backbones show that CALIBER consistently matches or improves upon text-only Bayesian PEFT and conventional multimodal transfer-learning baselines, with token-level cross-attention yielding the most consistent gains. Our findings demonstrate that localized cross-modal conditioning is an effective and lightweight mechanism for uncertainty-aware multimodal adaptation.

AI.tldr: CALIBER是一个多模态不确定性感知的参数高效微调框架，通过文本-音频跨注意力机制调节贝叶斯低秩适配器的变分后验，实现音频作为上下文可靠性信号的建模。
AI.motivation: 现有参数高效微调方法通常是确定性和单模态的，不适合低资源多模态场景，因为这类场景需要预测不确定性和跨模态可靠性评估。
AI.method: CALIBER扩展贝叶斯低秩适配，通过每层、令牌级的文本-音频跨注意力调节适配器空间的变分后验。文本特征通过跨注意力机制关注帧级音频嵌入，产生局部化声学上下文，然后调制低秩适配器空间中紧凑随机潜在矩阵的均值和方差。
AI.result: 实验表明，CALIBER在各种文本和音频骨干网络上始终匹配或优于纯文本贝叶斯PEFT和传统多模态迁移学习基线，令牌级跨注意力带来最一致的性能提升。
AI.conclusion: 局部化跨模态调节是轻量级不确定性感知多模态适应的有效机制，CALIBER在保持PEFT计算效率的同时实现了异方差多模态不确定性估计。

title: Graph-of-Agents: A Graph-based Framework for Multi-Agent LLM Collaboration
summary: With an ever-growing zoo of LLMs and benchmarks, the need to orchestrate multiple models for improved task performance has never been more pressing. While frameworks like Mixture-of-Agents (MoA) attempt to coordinate LLMs, they often fall short in terms of (1) selecting relevant agents, (2) facilitating effective intra-agent communication, and (3) integrating responses efficiently. In this work, we propose Graph-of-Agents (GoA), a new graph-based framework for modeling multi-agent LLM communication. Our approach begins with node sampling, selecting only the most relevant agents by leveraging model cards that summarize each model's domain, task specialization, and other characteristics. Next, we construct edges between the selected agents by evaluating their responses against one another to determine relevance ordering. Directed message passing is then performed from highly relevant agents to less relevant ones to enhance their responses, followed by reverse message passing to refine the original responses of the more relevant agents. Finally, the updated responses are aggregated via graph-based pooling (e.g., max or mean pooling) to produce a single, unified answer. We evaluate GoA on diverse multi-domain benchmarks (MMLU, MMLU-Pro, GPQA) and domain-specific benchmarks (MATH, HumanEval, MedMCQA), with an agent pool of 6 LLMs spanning multiple domains. Surprisingly, GoA achieves superior performance using only 3 selected agents, outperforming recent multi-agent LLM baselines that utilize all 6 agents simultaneously. By adopting a graph structure, GoA offers both scalability and effectiveness through structured message passing-positioning it as a strong candidate for navigating the challenges of the ever-growing LLM zoo. Code is available at: https://github.com/UNITES-Lab/GoA.

AI.tldr: GoA是一种基于图的多智能体LLM通信框架，通过节点采样选择相关智能体，构建边进行定向消息传递，最后聚合响应，仅用3个智能体就能超越使用全部6个智能体的基线方法。
AI.motivation: 随着LLM数量和基准测试的不断增加，需要协调多个模型来提升任务性能。现有的多智能体框架（如MoA）在智能体选择、内部通信和响应整合方面存在不足。
AI.method: 1) 节点采样：利用模型卡片选择最相关的智能体；2) 边构建：通过评估智能体响应确定相关性顺序；3) 定向消息传递：从高相关智能体向低相关智能体传递消息，然后反向传递；4) 图池化聚合：使用最大或平均池化生成统一答案。
AI.result: 在多个基准测试（MMLU、MMLU-Pro、GPQA、MATH、HumanEval、MedMCQA）上，GoA仅使用3个选定的智能体就超越了使用全部6个智能体的多智能体基线方法。
AI.conclusion: GoA通过图结构实现了可扩展性和有效性，是应对不断增长的LLM生态挑战的有力候选方案。

title: On Safety Risks in Experience-Driven Self-Evolving Agents
summary: Experience-driven self-evolution has emerged as a promising paradigm for improving the autonomy of large language model agents, yet its reliance on self-curated experience introduces underexplored safety risks. In this study, we investigate how experience accumulation and utilization in self-evolving agents affect safety performance across web-based and embodied environments. Notably, experience gathered solely from benign tasks can still compromise safety in high-risk scenarios. Further analysis attributes this degradation to the execution-oriented nature of accumulated experience, which reinforces agents' tendency to act rather than refuse. In more realistic settings where agents encounter both benign and harmful tasks, refusal-related experience mitigates safety decline but induces over-refusal, revealing a fundamental safety-utility trade-off. Overall, our findings expose inherent limitations of current self-evolving agents and call for more principled strategies to ensure safe and reliable adaptation.

AI.tldr: 自进化LLM智能体在经验积累过程中存在安全隐患，即使良性任务经验也会在高风险场景中降低安全性能，揭示了安全与效用的权衡问题。
AI.motivation: 研究自进化智能体经验驱动范式中的安全风险，特别是经验积累对安全性能的影响，这一问题在当前研究中尚未充分探索。
AI.method: 通过实验分析自进化智能体在基于网络和具身环境中的经验积累与利用过程，研究良性任务经验对高风险场景安全性能的影响机制。
AI.result: 发现仅从良性任务积累的经验仍会损害高风险场景的安全性，原因是执行导向的经验强化了智能体的行动倾向而非拒绝倾向；在混合任务环境中，拒绝相关经验能缓解安全下降但会导致过度拒绝。
AI.conclusion: 当前自进化智能体存在固有局限性，需要更原则性的策略来确保安全可靠的适应，揭示了安全与效用之间的基本权衡。

title: Far-Field Absolute Gain Antenna Measurements at Sub-THz Frequencies: A New Interpretation
summary: The evolution of large aperture antennas and arrays at the sub-THz band (100-300 GHz) results in traditional far-field (FF) gain measurements to require large distances due to the high frequency nature making them impractical in many laboratory environments. In the presented work, absolute antenna gain measurements are performed in localized distance clusters for commercial horn antennas in the sub-THz range of 145-170 GHz using the three-antenna method, leveraging a theoretically derived modified FF equation along with the Friis transmission equation to enable a compact measurement setup. By applying the proposed modified FF formulation, the approach aims to redefine the FF distance by considering the combined effects of both the transmitting and receiving antennas, accounting for their aperture sizes and radiation characteristics. This allows precise gain characterization within a compact measurement footprint. The proposed theoretical model was validated through radiated measurements and simulations, demonstrating its effectiveness in this case study. Also, measurements were performed using dissimilar antenna pair combinations due to inventory constraints, a common challenge both in research and in industry. Despite the mismatches, the presented work demonstrates that reliable and sufficiently accurate measurement results can still be achieved. This highlights the practical feasibility of the compact cluster measurement technique without compromising measurement integrity. The compact setup ensures efficiency in the measurement time and cost, making it a robust solution for both research and industrial needs in sub-THz antenna characterization for applications including 6G, high frequency sensing, and imaging systems.

AI.tldr: 提出一种用于亚太赫兹频段天线增益测量的紧凑型测量方法，通过修正远场公式和三天线法，在有限空间内实现精确增益测量，解决了传统远场测量需要大距离的问题。
AI.motivation: 亚太赫兹频段（100-300 GHz）的大孔径天线和阵列的发展使得传统远场增益测量需要很大距离，这在许多实验室环境中不切实际。需要一种紧凑的测量方法来克服这一限制。
AI.method: 采用三天线法，结合理论推导的修正远场方程和Friis传输方程，构建紧凑测量系统。修正远场公式考虑了发射和接收天线的联合效应，包括孔径尺寸和辐射特性，从而重新定义远场距离。
AI.result: 在145-170 GHz频段对商用喇叭天线进行了测量验证，通过辐射测量和仿真验证了理论模型的有效性。即使在库存限制下使用不相似天线对组合，仍能获得可靠且足够精确的测量结果。
AI.conclusion: 紧凑集群测量技术具有实际可行性，不损害测量完整性，确保测量时间和成本效率，为6G、高频传感和成像系统等应用的亚太赫兹天线表征提供了稳健解决方案。

title: UniCon: Unified Framework for Efficient Contrastive Alignment via Kernels
comment: 33 pages, 8 figures, 8 tables. Accepted by The Fourteenth International Conference on Learning Representations (ICLR) 2026
summary: Contrastive objectives power state-of-the-art multimodal models, but their training remains slow, relying on long stochastic optimization. We propose a Unified Framework for Efficient Contrastive Alignment via Kernels (UniCon), which spans linear and nonlinear encoders as well as one-to-one and many-to-many alignments. At its core, UniCon introduces the contrastive similarity weight matrix $S(γ)$, which enables closed-form global solutions that provably replace minibatch back-propagation with exact updates. Through the lens of reproducing kernel Hilbert spaces (RKHS), UniCon provides a kernelized perspective that unifies contrastive alignment and reveals its connection to spectral methods. To validate the theory, we conduct experiments on synthetic, unimodal, multimodal, and zero-shot tasks, demonstrating that UniCon achieves substantial efficiency gains while preserving generality and strong empirical performance.

AI.tldr: UniCon提出统一框架，通过核方法实现高效的对比对齐，用闭式全局解替代小批量反向传播，显著提升训练效率
AI.motivation: 当前基于对比目标的多模态模型训练速度慢，依赖长时间随机优化，需要更高效的训练方法
AI.method: 提出UniCon统一框架，引入对比相似度权重矩阵S(γ)，通过再生核希尔伯特空间提供核化视角，获得闭式全局解
AI.result: 在合成、单模态、多模态和零样本任务上验证，UniCon实现显著效率提升，同时保持泛化性和强实证性能
AI.conclusion: UniCon为对比对齐提供高效统一的核方法框架，连接对比对齐与谱方法，实现训练效率的实质性提升

title: Beyond the Basics: Leveraging Large Language Model for Fine-Grained Medical Entity Recognition
summary: Extracting clinically relevant information from unstructured medical narratives such as admission notes, discharge summaries, and emergency case histories remains a challenge in clinical natural language processing (NLP). Medical Entity Recognition (MER) identifies meaningful concepts embedded in these records. Recent advancements in large language models (LLMs) have shown competitive MER performance; however, evaluations often focus on general entity types, offering limited utility for real-world clinical needs requiring finer-grained extraction. To address this gap, we rigorously evaluated the open-source LLaMA3 model for fine-grained medical entity recognition across 18 clinically detailed categories. To optimize performance, we employed three learning paradigms: zero-shot, few-shot, and fine-tuning with Low-Rank Adaptation (LoRA). To further enhance few-shot learning, we introduced two example selection methods based on token- and sentence-level embedding similarity, utilizing a pre-trained BioBERT model. Unlike prior work assessing zero-shot and few-shot performance on proprietary models (e.g., GPT-4) or fine-tuning different architectures, we ensured methodological consistency by applying all strategies to a unified LLaMA3 backbone, enabling fair comparison across learning settings. Our results showed that fine-tuned LLaMA3 surpasses zero-shot and few-shot approaches by 63.11% and 35.63%, respectivel respectively, achieving an F1 score of 81.24% in granular medical entity extraction.

AI.tldr: 评估LLaMA3模型在细粒度医疗实体识别任务上的性能，比较零样本、少样本和LoRA微调三种学习范式，发现微调方法显著优于其他方法。
AI.motivation: 现有医疗实体识别研究多关注通用实体类型，对临床实际需要的细粒度实体提取支持有限。大型语言模型虽在医疗实体识别中表现良好，但评估通常局限于通用实体，缺乏对细粒度临床需求的针对性研究。
AI.method: 使用开源LLaMA3模型，在18个临床细粒度实体类别上进行评估。采用三种学习范式：零样本、少样本和LoRA微调。为优化少样本学习，引入基于BioBERT预训练模型的两种示例选择方法（token级和句子级嵌入相似性）。所有策略均在统一的LLaMA3骨干网络上实施，确保方法一致性。
AI.result: 微调的LLaMA3模型在细粒度医疗实体提取中达到81.24%的F1分数，分别比零样本和少样本方法高出63.11%和35.63%，表现显著优于其他方法。
AI.conclusion: LoRA微调的LLaMA3模型在细粒度医疗实体识别任务上表现最佳，为临床自然语言处理提供了有效的解决方案。研究强调了针对具体临床需求进行模型微调的重要性。

title: Bolzano: Case Studies in LLM-Assisted Mathematical Research
summary: We report new results on six problems in mathematics and theoretical computer science, produced with the assistance of Bolzano, an open-source multi-agent LLM system. Bolzano orchestrates rounds of interaction between parallel prover agents and a verifier agent while maintaining a persistent knowledge base that is carried across rounds. Classified using the significance-autonomy taxonomy of Feng et al., four of the six results reach the level of publishable research, and three of the six were produced essentially autonomously by Bolzano. Our results provide evidence that LLMs can contribute meaningfully to mathematical research, complementing recent reports by Bubeck et al., Woodruff et al., and others.

AI.tldr: Bolzano多智能体LLM系统在数学和理论计算机科学中取得6个新结果，其中4个达到可发表研究水平，3个基本自主完成
AI.motivation: 探索大型语言模型在数学研究中的实际贡献能力，验证LLM能否在数学和理论计算机科学领域产生有意义的科研成果
AI.method: 使用开源多智能体LLM系统Bolzano，通过并行证明器智能体与验证器智能体之间的多轮交互，并维护跨轮次的持久知识库
AI.result: 在6个数学和理论计算机科学问题中取得新结果，其中4个达到可发表研究水平，3个基本由Bolzano自主完成
AI.conclusion: LLM能够在数学研究中做出有意义的贡献，这为AI辅助科学研究提供了实证支持，与近期其他研究结果相互印证

title: Grid-Supporting Equipment Supply Chains Constrain the Feasible Pace of Power System Expansion
summary: Power system expansion depends on the equipment required to connect, convert, regulate, and condition electricity, yet grid-supporting equipment (GSE) is rarely modeled as an explicit constraint. We develop a framework integrating dynamic stock-flow modeling, bill-of-materials accounting, multi-regional supply-use analysis, and expansion optimization to quantify GSE deployment requirements and upstream material dependence. Because manufacturing data are often fragmented or proprietary, we use critical material requirements as a physically grounded proxy for GSE supply constraints. In a U.S. case study, GSE shortages reach 269.6--274.1 GVA (28.5%--28.6%) by 2030 under high-growth conditions. Copper becomes fully binding, with steel and nickel forming additional constraints. Trade disruption intensifies shortages, while grid-enhancing technologies provide limited relief. These results show that grid expansion depends on the timely manufacturability, replacement, and material support of GSE, motivating planning frameworks that explicitly incorporate deliverability, supply chain exposure, and resilience strategies.

AI.tldr: 该研究开发了一个框架，将电网支持设备（GSE）作为显式约束纳入电力系统扩展规划，发现到2030年GSE短缺可能达到269.6-274.1 GVA（28.5%-28.6%），铜成为完全约束，钢和镍形成额外约束。
AI.motivation: 电力系统扩展依赖于连接、转换、调节和调节电力的设备，但电网支持设备（GSE）很少被建模为显式约束。现有规划框架通常忽略GSE的制造可行性和供应链约束。
AI.method: 开发了一个综合框架，结合动态存量-流量建模、物料清单核算、多区域供应-使用分析和扩展优化，以量化GSE部署需求和上游材料依赖性。使用关键材料需求作为GSE供应约束的物理基础代理。
AI.result: 在美国案例研究中，到2030年，在高增长条件下，GSE短缺达到269.6-274.1 GVA（28.5%-28.6%）。铜成为完全约束，钢和镍形成额外约束。贸易中断加剧短缺，而电网增强技术提供有限缓解。
AI.conclusion: 电网扩展依赖于GSE的及时制造、更换和材料支持，需要规划框架明确纳入可交付性、供应链暴露和韧性策略。材料约束可能成为电网扩展的关键瓶颈。

title: Yanasse: Finding New Proofs from Deep Vision's Analogies, Part 1
summary: Project Yanasse presents a method for discovering new proofs of theorems in one area of mathematics by transferring proof strategy patterns (e.g., Lean 4 tactic invocation patterns) from a structurally distant area. The system extracts tactic usage distributions across 27 top-level areas of Mathlib (217,133 proof states), computes z-scores to identify tactics that are heavily used in a source area but rare or absent in a target area, matches source and target proof states via GPU-accelerated NP-hard analogy (running on a MacBook Air via Apple's MPS backend), and then asks an AI reasoning agent to semantically adapt--not symbol-substitute--the source tactics invocation pattern to the target theorem. In this first part of the study, the method is applied to the pair Probability -> Representation Theory, producing 4 Lean-verified new proofs out of 10 attempts (40%). The proofs compile with zero sorry declarations. The key finding is that tactic schemas decompose into a head (domain-gated, rarely transfers) and a modifier (domain-general, often transfers): filter upwards's head fails in representation theory (no Filter structure), but its [LIST] with ω modifier transfers cleanly as ext1 + simp [LIST] + rfl. Crucially, the underlying matching engine--deep vision lib.py--is entirely domain independent: the same optimization code for an NP-hard matching that matches chess positions by analogy matches Lean proof states by analogy, without knowing which domain it is processing. Only a relation extractor is domain-specific.

AI.tldr: Project Yanasse提出一种跨数学领域转移证明策略模式的方法，通过分析Mathlib中27个顶级领域的证明状态，识别源领域常用但目标领域罕见的策略，使用GPU加速的NP-hard类比匹配，让AI推理代理语义适配策略模式，在概率论->表示论方向上获得40%成功率。
AI.motivation: 传统数学证明发现通常局限于同一领域内，缺乏跨结构遥远领域的证明策略转移方法。不同数学领域虽然表面不同，但可能存在相似的证明模式，需要系统化方法来发现和转移这些模式。
AI.method: 1) 从Mathlib的27个顶级领域提取217,133个证明状态的策略使用分布；2) 计算z-score识别源领域常用但目标领域罕见的策略；3) 使用GPU加速的NP-hard类比匹配算法（在MacBook Air上通过MPS后端运行）匹配源和目标证明状态；4) 让AI推理代理语义适配源策略调用模式到目标定理；5) 策略模式分解为头部（领域特定）和修饰符（领域通用）两部分。
AI.result: 在概率论到表示论的转移实验中，10次尝试中成功生成4个Lean验证的新证明（40%成功率），所有证明编译时零"sorry"声明。关键发现：策略模式可分解为头部（领域门控，很少转移）和修饰符（领域通用，经常转移），如filter upwards的头部在表示论中失败（无Filter结构），但其[LIST]与ω修饰符可干净转移为ext1 + simp [LIST] + rfl。
AI.conclusion: 跨结构遥远数学领域的证明策略模式转移是可行的，核心匹配引擎（deep vision lib.py）完全领域无关，同一NP-hard匹配优化代码既可用于国际象棋位置类比匹配，也可用于Lean证明状态类比匹配。只有关系提取器是领域特定的，这为自动化数学证明发现开辟了新途径。

title: SPS: Steering Probability Squeezing for Better Exploration in Reinforcement Learning for Large Language Models
summary: Reinforcement learning (RL) has emerged as a promising paradigm for training reasoning-oriented models by leveraging rule-based reward signals. However, RL training typically tends to improve single-sample success rates (i.e., Pass@1) while offering limited exploration of diverse reasoning trajectories, which is crucial for multi-sample performance (i.e., Pass@k). Our preliminary analysis reveals that this limitation stems from a fundamental squeezing effect, whereby probability mass is excessively concentrated on a narrow subset of high-reward trajectories, restricting genuine exploration and constraining attainable performance under RL training. To address this issue, in this work, we propose Steering Probability Squeezing (SPS), a training paradigm that interleaves conventional RL with inverse reinforcement learning (IRL). SPS treats on-policy rollouts as demonstrations and employs IRL to explicitly reshape the induced trajectory distribution, thereby enhancing exploration without introducing external supervision. Experiments on five commonly used reasoning benchmarks demonstrate that SPS can enable better exploration and improve Pass@k. Beyond algorithmic contributions, we provide an analysis of RL learning dynamics and identify an empirical upper bound on Pass@k, shedding light on intrinsic exploration limits in RL-based reasoning models. Our findings suggest that alternating between RL and IRL offers an effective pathway toward extending the exploration capacity of reasoning-oriented large language models.

AI.tldr: 提出SPS训练范式，通过交替使用强化学习和逆强化学习来缓解RL训练中的概率挤压效应，提升推理模型的探索能力和Pass@k性能。
AI.motivation: 传统强化学习训练推理模型时存在概率挤压效应，导致概率质量过度集中在少数高奖励轨迹上，限制了探索多样性，从而影响了多样本性能（Pass@k）。
AI.method: 提出Steering Probability Squeezing (SPS)训练范式，交替使用常规强化学习和逆强化学习，将策略rollout作为演示数据，通过IRL显式重塑轨迹分布以增强探索。
AI.result: 在五个常用推理基准测试中，SPS能够实现更好的探索并提升Pass@k性能。同时分析了RL学习动态，识别了Pass@k的实证上限。
AI.conclusion: 交替使用RL和IRL是扩展推理导向大语言模型探索能力的有效途径，SPS通过缓解概率挤压效应提升了多样本推理性能。

title: Graph Transformer-Based Pathway Embedding for Cancer Prognosis
summary: Accurate prediction of cancer progression remains a challenge due to the high heterogeneity of molecular omics data across patients. While biologically informed models have improved the interpretability of these predictions, a persistent limitation lies in how they encode individual genes to construct pathway representations. Existing hierarchical models typically derive gene features by directly mapping raw molecular inputs, whereas integration frameworks often rely on simple statistical aggregations of patient-level signals. These approaches often fail to explicitly learn a shared base representation for each gene, thereby limiting the expressiveness and biological accuracy of downstream pathway embeddings. To address this, we introduce PATH, a modulation-based, patient-conditioned gene embedding strategy. PATH represents a paradigm shift by starting from a shared base embedding for each gene, preserving a stable biological identity across the population, and then dynamically adapting it using patient-specific copy number variation (CNV) and mutation signals. This allows the model to capture subtle individual molecular variations while maintaining a consistent latent understanding of the gene itself. We integrate PATH into a graph transformer framework that models interactions among biologically connected pathways through pathway-guided attention. Across pancancer metastasis prediction, PATH achieves an F1 score of 0.8766, representing an 8.8 percent improvement over the current SOTA multi-omics benchmarks. Beyond superior predictive accuracy, our approach identifies biologically meaningful pathways and, crucially, reveals disease-state-specific pathway rewiring, offering new insights into the evolving pathway-pathway interactions that drive cancer progression.

AI.tldr: PATH提出了一种基于调制的基因嵌入策略，从共享的基因基础嵌入出发，通过患者特异性变异信号动态调整，结合图Transformer建模通路交互，显著提升了癌症转移预测性能。
AI.motivation: 现有癌症进展预测模型在基因编码方面存在局限：分层模型直接映射原始分子输入，集成框架依赖简单的统计聚合，都未能显式学习基因的共享基础表示，限制了通路嵌入的表达能力和生物学准确性。
AI.method: 提出PATH策略：1）为每个基因建立共享基础嵌入，保持跨人群的稳定生物学身份；2）使用患者特异性CNV和突变信号动态调整基因嵌入；3）集成到图Transformer框架中，通过通路引导注意力建模生物学连接通路间的交互。
AI.result: 在泛癌症转移预测任务中，PATH达到0.8766的F1分数，比当前SOTA多组学基准提升8.8%。不仅预测准确性优越，还能识别生物学意义通路并揭示疾病状态特异性通路重连。
AI.conclusion: PATH通过共享基因基础嵌入与患者特异性调制的结合，实现了更准确、更具生物学解释性的癌症进展预测，为理解驱动癌症进展的通路-通路交互演化提供了新见解。

title: Safe and Policy-Compliant Multi-Agent Orchestration for Enterprise AI
comment: 6 pages, 3 figures, 3 tables, IEEE conference format
summary: Enterprise AI systems increasingly deploy multiple intelligent agents across mission-critical workflows that must satisfy hard policy constraints, bounded risk exposure, and comprehensive auditability (SOX, HIPAA, GDPR). Existing coordination methods - cooperative MARL, consensus protocols, and centralized planners - optimize expected reward while treating constraints implicitly. This paper introduces CAMCO (Constraint-Aware Multi-Agent Cognitive Orchestration), a runtime coordination layer that models multi-agent decision-making as a constrained optimization problem. CAMCO integrates three mechanisms: (i) a constraint projection engine enforcing policy-feasible actions via convex projection, (ii) adaptive risk-weighted Lagrangian utility shaping, and (iii) an iterative negotiation protocol with provably bounded convergence. Unlike training-time constrained RL, CAMCO operates as deployment-time middleware compatible with any agent architecture, with policy predicates designed for direct integration with production engines such as OPA. Evaluation across three enterprise scenarios - including comparison against a constrained Lagrangian MARL baseline - demonstrates zero policy violations, risk exposure below threshold (mean ratio 0.71), 92-97% utility retention, and mean convergence in 2.4 iterations.

AI.tldr: CAMCO是一个运行时协调层，将多智能体决策建模为约束优化问题，确保企业AI系统满足政策约束、风险限制和可审计性要求。
AI.motivation: 企业AI系统需要在关键工作流中部署多个智能体，必须满足硬性政策约束（SOX、HIPAA、GDPR）、有限风险暴露和全面可审计性。现有协调方法主要优化期望奖励，而将约束处理为隐式要求。
AI.method: CAMCO包含三个机制：(1) 通过凸投影强制政策可行行动的约束投影引擎；(2) 自适应风险加权拉格朗日效用塑造；(3) 具有可证明有界收敛的迭代协商协议。作为部署时中间件，与任何智能体架构兼容。
AI.result: 在三个企业场景评估中，实现了零政策违规、风险暴露低于阈值（平均比率0.71）、92-97%效用保留，以及平均2.4次迭代收敛。
AI.conclusion: CAMCO作为运行时协调层，能够有效确保多智能体系统满足企业级约束要求，相比训练时约束强化学习方法，提供了更灵活和可部署的解决方案。

title: BIASEDTALES-ML: A Multilingual Dataset for Analyzing Narrative Attribute Distributions in LLM-Generated Stories
comment: Accepted to ACL 2026 Findings. Data are available at https://huggingface.co/spaces/Linyuana/BIASEDTALES-ML
summary: Large Language Models (LLMs) are increasingly used to generate narrative content, including children's stories, which play an important role in social and cultural learning. Despite growing interest in AI safety and alignment, most existing evaluations focus primarily on English, leaving the cross-lingual generalization of aligned behavior underexplored. In this work, we introduce BiasedTales-ML, a large-scale parallel corpus of approximately 350,000 children's stories generated across eight typologically and culturally diverse languages using a full-permutation prompting design. We propose a structured generator-extractor pipeline and a multi-dimensional distributional analysis framework to examine how narrative attributes vary across languages, models, and social conditions. Our analysis reveals substantial cross-lingual variability in narrative generation patterns, indicating that distributions observed in English do not always exhibit similar characteristics in other languages, particularly in lower-resource settings. At the narrative level, we identify recurring structural patterns involving character roles, settings, and thematic emphasis, which manifest differently across linguistic contexts. These findings highlight the limitations of English-centric evaluation for characterizing socially grounded narrative generation in multilingual settings. We release the dataset, code, and an interactive visualization tool to support future research on multilingual narrative analysis and evaluation.

AI.tldr: 本文介绍了BiasedTales-ML，一个包含约35万篇儿童故事的大规模多语言平行语料库，用于研究大语言模型在多语言叙事生成中的偏见和跨语言泛化问题。
AI.motivation: 当前AI安全和对齐评估主要关注英语，而跨语言对齐行为的泛化研究不足。儿童故事在社会文化学习中扮演重要角色，需要研究LLMs在多语言叙事生成中的表现差异。
AI.method: 使用全排列提示设计在8种类型和文化多样语言中生成故事；提出结构化生成器-提取器流水线和多维度分布分析框架，分析叙事属性在不同语言、模型和社会条件下的变化。
AI.result: 发现叙事生成模式存在显著的跨语言变异性，英语中观察到的分布特征在其他语言（特别是低资源语言）中并不总是相似；识别出涉及角色、场景和主题强调的重复结构模式在不同语言环境中表现不同。
AI.conclusion: 英语中心评估在表征多语言环境中社会基础叙事生成方面存在局限性；需要更多跨语言研究；发布了数据集、代码和交互式可视化工具支持未来研究。

title: Safe Control using Learned Safety Filters and Adaptive Conformal Inference
summary: Safety filters have been shown to be effective tools to ensure the safety of control systems with unsafe nominal policies. To address scalability challenges in traditional synthesis methods, learning-based approaches have been proposed for designing safety filters for systems with high-dimensional state and control spaces. However, the inevitable errors in the decisions of these models raise concerns about their reliability and the safety guarantees they offer. This paper presents Adaptive Conformal Filtering (ACoFi), a method that combines learned Hamilton-Jacobi reachability-based safety filters with adaptive conformal inference. Under ACoFi, the filter dynamically adjusts its switching criteria based on the observed errors in its predictions of the safety of actions. The range of possible safety values of the nominal policy's output is used to quantify uncertainty in safety assessment. The filter switches from the nominal policy to the learned safe one when that range suggests it might be unsafe. We show that ACoFi guarantees that the rate of incorrectly quantifying uncertainty in the predicted safety of the nominal policy is asymptotically upper bounded by a user-defined parameter. This gives a soft safety guarantee rather than a hard safety guarantee. We evaluate ACoFi in a Dubins car simulation and a Safety Gymnasium environment, empirically demonstrating that it significantly outperforms the baseline method that uses a fixed switching threshold by achieving higher learned safety values and fewer safety violations, especially in out-of-distribution scenarios.

AI.tldr: 提出Adaptive Conformal Filtering (ACoFi)方法，结合学习型安全滤波器与自适应共形推理，通过动态调整切换阈值来保证系统安全，在不确定场景下优于固定阈值方法。
AI.motivation: 传统安全滤波器合成方法难以扩展到高维系统，而学习型方法虽然能处理高维问题，但其预测误差会影响安全保证的可靠性。需要一种能处理学习模型不确定性并提供安全保证的方法。
AI.method: ACoFi结合学习型Hamilton-Jacobi可达性安全滤波器与自适应共形推理。滤波器根据预测安全性的观测误差动态调整切换标准，使用名义策略输出的安全值范围来量化安全评估的不确定性，当范围表明可能不安全时切换到学习的安全策略。
AI.result: ACoFi保证名义策略预测安全性的不确定性量化错误率渐近上界由用户定义参数控制，提供软安全保证而非硬安全保证。在Dubins car仿真和Safety Gymnasium环境中验证，相比固定切换阈值基线方法，获得更高的学习安全值和更少的安全违规，尤其在分布外场景中表现更优。
AI.conclusion: ACoFi通过自适应共形推理有效处理学习型安全滤波器的不确定性，在保持安全性的同时提高性能，特别适用于分布外场景，为学习型安全控制系统提供了实用的安全保证框架。

title: Rectification Difficulty and Optimal Sample Allocation in LLM-Augmented Surveys
summary: Large Language Models can generate synthetic survey responses at low cost, but their accuracy varies unpredictably across questions. We study the design problem of allocating a fixed budget of human respondents across estimation tasks when cheap LLM predictions are available for every task. Our framework combines three components. First, building on Prediction-Powered Inference, we characterize a question-specific rectification difficulty that governs how quickly the estimator's variance decreases with human sample size. Second, we derive a closed-form optimal allocation rule that directs more human labels to tasks where the LLM is least reliable. Third, since rectification difficulty depends on unobserved human responses for new surveys, we propose a meta-learning approach, trained on historical data, that predicts it for entirely new tasks without pilot data. The framework extends to general M-estimation, covering regression coefficients and multinomial logit partworths for conjoint analysis. We validate the framework on two datasets spanning different domains, question types, and LLMs, showing that our approach captures 61-79% of the theoretically attainable efficiency gains, achieving 11.4% and 10.5% MSE reductions without requiring any pilot human data for the target survey.

AI.tldr: 论文提出一个框架，利用LLM生成廉价预测，优化固定预算下人类受访者的分配策略，以提高调查估计的统计效率。
AI.motivation: LLM能以低成本生成合成调查响应，但其准确性在不同问题间差异很大且难以预测。如何在LLM预测可用的情况下，优化有限人类受访者预算的分配，提高估计效率，是一个重要的设计问题。
AI.method: 1) 基于预测增强推理框架，定义问题特定的校正难度；2) 推导封闭形式的最优分配规则，将更多人类标签分配给LLM最不可靠的任务；3) 提出元学习方法，利用历史数据预测新任务的校正难度，无需试点数据。
AI.result: 在两个不同领域、问题类型和LLM的数据集上验证，该方法能捕获61-79%的理论可达效率增益，实现11.4%和10.5%的MSE降低，且无需目标调查的试点人类数据。
AI.conclusion: 该框架为结合LLM预测和有限人类标签的调查设计提供了系统方法，能显著提高估计效率，且可扩展到一般M估计问题，包括回归系数和联合分析的多项logit部分价值估计。

title: Improving LLM Code Reasoning via Semantic Equivalence Self-Play with Formal Verification
summary: We introduce a self-play framework for semantic equivalence in Haskell, utilizing formal verification to guide adversarial training between a generator and an evaluator. The framework leverages Liquid Haskell proofs for validating equivalence and execution-based counterexamples for inequivalence, organized via a difficulty-aware curriculum. To facilitate this, we release \textbf{OpInstruct-HSx}, a synthetic dataset of $\approx$28k validated Haskell programs. Empirical experiments show that our evaluator transfers effectively to downstream tasks, achieving up to 13.3pp accuracy gain on EquiBench and consistent gains on PySecDB. Ablation studies on the SEQ-SINQ regimes indicate that while inequivalence supervision provides data volume, equivalence proofs are uniquely responsible for the model's reasoning capabilities. The entire training pipeline and dataset are publicly released on GitHub and Hugging Face respectively.

AI.tldr: 提出基于自我博弈的Haskell语义等价框架，利用形式验证指导生成器和评估器的对抗训练，通过难度感知课程组织学习，并发布包含约28k已验证程序的OpInstruct-HSx数据集。
AI.motivation: 解决Haskell程序中语义等价性验证的挑战，通过结合形式验证和对抗训练来提高模型在代码等价性判断任务上的性能。
AI.method: 采用自我博弈框架，生成器和评估器对抗训练：使用Liquid Haskell证明验证等价性，基于执行的对抗示例验证不等价性，通过难度感知课程组织训练过程。
AI.result: 评估器在下游任务上表现优异，在EquiBench上获得最高13.3个百分点的准确率提升，在PySecDB上也有稳定增益。消融研究表明不等价监督提供数据量，而等价证明是模型推理能力的关键。
AI.conclusion: 提出的自我博弈框架结合形式验证和对抗训练有效提升了语义等价性判断能力，发布的OpInstruct-HSx数据集和完整训练流程为后续研究提供了资源。

title: Chronax: A Jax Library for Univariate Statistical Forecasting and Conformal Inference
summary: Time-series forecasting is central to many scientific and industrial domains, such as energy systems, climate modeling, finance, and retail. While forecasting methods have evolved from classical statistical models to automated, and neural approaches, the surrounding software ecosystem remains anchored to the traditional Python numerical stack. Existing libraries rely on interpreter-driven execution and object-oriented abstractions, limiting composability, large-scale parallelism, and integration with modern differentiable and accelerator-oriented workflows. Meanwhile, today's forecasting increasingly involves large collections of heterogeneous time series data, irregular covariates, and frequent retraining, placing new demands on scalability and execution efficiency. JAX offers an alternative paradigm to traditional stateful numerical computation frameworks based on pure functions and program transformations such as just-in-time compilation and automatic vectorization, enabling end-to-end optimization across CPUs, GPUs, and TPUs. However, this modern paradigm has not yet been fully incorporated into the design of forecasting systems. We introduce Chronax, a JAX-native time-series forecasting library that rethinks forecasting abstractions around functional purity, composable transformations, and accelerator-ready execution. By representing preprocessing, modeling, and multi-horizon prediction as pure JAX functions, Chronax enables scalable multi-series forecasting, model-agnostic conformal uncertainty quantification, and seamless integration with modern machine learning and scientific computing pipelines.

AI.tldr: Chronax是一个基于JAX的原生时间序列预测库，采用函数式纯度和可组合变换的设计理念，支持加速器就绪执行，解决了传统预测库在可组合性、大规模并行化和与现代可微分工作流集成方面的限制。
AI.motivation: 现有时间序列预测软件生态系统仍停留在传统的Python数值栈，依赖解释器驱动执行和面向对象抽象，限制了可组合性、大规模并行化以及与现代可微分和加速器工作流的集成。同时，现代预测任务涉及大规模异构时间序列数据、不规则协变量和频繁重新训练，对可扩展性和执行效率提出了新要求。
AI.method: Chronax采用JAX的函数式编程范式，将预处理、建模和多步预测表示为纯JAX函数。利用JAX的即时编译和自动向量化等程序变换特性，实现端到端的CPU、GPU和TPU优化。重新设计预测抽象，围绕函数纯度、可组合变换和加速器就绪执行。
AI.result: Chronax实现了可扩展的多序列预测、模型无关的符合不确定性量化，并能与现代机器学习和科学计算管道无缝集成。通过函数式设计和JAX的优化能力，显著提升了预测系统的执行效率和可扩展性。
AI.conclusion: Chronax成功将JAX的现代计算范式引入时间序列预测领域，通过函数式纯度和可组合变换的设计，解决了传统预测库在可扩展性、并行化和与现代工作流集成方面的限制，为大规模异构时间序列预测提供了高效、灵活的解决方案。

title: The Continuity Layer: Why Intelligence Needs an Architecture for What It Carries Forward
comment: 15 pages. Position paper. Companion to ATANT v1.0 (arXiv:2604.06710) and ATANT v1.1 (arXiv:2604.10981)
summary: The most important architectural problem in AI is not the size of the model but the absence of a layer that carries forward what the model has come to understand. Sessions end. Context windows fill. Memory APIs return flat facts that the model has to reinterpret from scratch on every read. The result is intelligence that is powerful per session and amnesiac across time. This position paper argues that the layer which fixes this, the continuity layer, is the most consequential piece of infrastructure the field has not yet built, and that the engineering work to build it has begun in public. The formal evaluation framework for the property described here is the ATANT benchmark (arXiv:2604.06710), published separately with evaluation results on a 250-story corpus; a companion paper (arXiv:2604.10981) positions this framework against existing memory, long-context, and agentic-memory benchmarks. The paper defines continuity as a system property with seven required characteristics, distinct from memory and from retrieval; describes a storage primitive (Decomposed Trace Convergence Memory) whose write-time decomposition and read-time reconstruction produce that property; maps the engineering architecture to the theological pattern of kenosis and the symbolic pattern of Alpha and Omega, and argues this mapping is structural rather than metaphorical; proposes a four-layer development arc from external SDK to hardware node to long-horizon human infrastructure; examines why the physics limits now constraining the model layer make the continuity layer newly consequential; and argues that the governance architecture (privacy implemented as physics rather than policy, founder-controlled class shares on non-negotiable architectural commitments) is inseparable from the product itself.

AI.tldr: 论文主张AI最重要的架构问题是缺乏"连续性层"——能够跨会话保持模型理解能力的系统层，而非模型大小。提出了连续性层的概念、实现方法和治理架构。
AI.motivation: 当前AI系统存在"会话失忆"问题：会话结束时，模型的理解和记忆无法有效延续到下一次会话。上下文窗口有限，记忆API返回的扁平事实需要模型每次重新解释。这导致AI虽然单次会话强大，但缺乏跨时间连续性。
AI.method: 1) 定义连续性为具有七个必要特征的系统属性；2) 提出存储原语"分解痕迹收敛记忆"，通过写时分解和读时重建实现连续性；3) 建立工程架构映射到神学模式(kenosis)和符号模式(Alpha和Omega)；4) 提出四层发展路径：从外部SDK到硬件节点再到长期人类基础设施；5) 设计治理架构(隐私作为物理而非政策实现，创始人对架构承诺的非协商性控制)。
AI.result: 提出了ATANT基准测试框架(arXiv:2604.06710)用于评估连续性属性，已在250个故事语料库上进行评估。配套论文(arXiv:2604.10981)将该框架与现有记忆、长上下文和代理记忆基准进行比较。论证了连续性层是AI领域尚未构建但最重要的基础设施。
AI.conclusion: 连续性层是解决AI跨时间记忆问题的关键基础设施，其重要性因模型层物理限制而凸显。治理架构(隐私物理实现、创始人控制)与产品本身不可分割。该层的发展将从软件扩展到硬件和人类基础设施，是AI架构中最具影响力的未建部分。

title: Beyond Static Benchmarks: Synthesizing Harmful Content via Persona-based Simulation for Robust Evaluation
summary: Static benchmarks for harmful content detection face limitations in scalability and diversity, and may also be affected by contamination from web-scale pre-training corpora. To address these issues, we propose a framework for synthesizing harmful content, leveraging persona-guided large language model (LLM) agents. Our approach constructs two-dimensional user personas by integrating demographic identities and topical interests with situational harmful strategies, enabling the simulation of diverse and contextually grounded harmful interactions. We evaluate the framework along three dimensions: harmfulness, challenge level, and diversity. Both human and LLM-based evaluations confirm that our framework achieves a high harmful generation success rate. Experiments across multiple detection systems reveal that our synthetic scenarios are more challenging to detect than those in existing benchmarks. Furthermore, a multi-faceted analysis confirms that our approach achieves linguistic and topical diversity comparable to human-curated datasets, establishing our framework as an effective tool for robust stress-testing of harmful content detection systems.

AI.tldr: 提出基于角色引导LLM代理的有害内容合成框架，通过二维用户角色（人口特征+兴趣主题）结合有害策略，生成多样化的有害内容，用于压力测试检测系统
AI.motivation: 现有有害内容检测基准存在可扩展性、多样性不足的问题，且可能受到网络规模预训练语料污染的影响，需要更有效的压力测试工具
AI.method: 构建二维用户角色（人口身份+兴趣主题）并结合情境化有害策略，利用LLM代理模拟多样化的有害交互，生成合成有害内容
AI.result: 框架在有害性、挑战性和多样性三个维度表现优异：有害生成成功率高；合成场景比现有基准更难检测；语言和主题多样性达到人工标注数据集水平
AI.conclusion: 该框架是用于有害内容检测系统鲁棒压力测试的有效工具，能够生成多样化、具有挑战性的合成有害内容

title: Late Fusion Neural Operators for Extrapolation Across Parameter Space in Partial Differential Equations
summary: Developing neural operators that accurately predict the behavior of systems governed by partial differential equations (PDEs) across unseen parameter regimes is crucial for robust generalization in scientific and engineering applications. In practical applications, variations in physical parameters induce distribution shifts between training and prediction regimes, making extrapolation a central challenge. As a result, the way parameters are incorporated into neural operator models plays a key role in their ability to generalize, particularly when state and parameter representations are entangled. In this work, we introduce the Late Fusion Neural Operator, an architecture that disentangles learning state dynamics from parameter effects, improving predictive performance both within and beyond the training distribution. Our approach combines neural operators for learning latent state representations with sparse regression to incorporate parameter information in a structured manner. Across four benchmark PDEs including advection, Burgers, and both 1D and 2D reaction-diffusion equations, the proposed method consistently outperforms Fourier Neural Operator and CAPE-FNO. Late Fusion Neural Operators achieve consistently the best performance in all experiments, with an average RMSE reduction of 72.9% in-domain and 71.8% out-domain compared to the second-best method. These results demonstrate strong generalization across both in-domain and out-domain parameter regimes.

AI.tldr: 提出Late Fusion Neural Operator架构，通过解耦状态动态学习与参数效应，提升PDE神经算子在分布内外的泛化性能，在多个基准PDE上显著优于现有方法。
AI.motivation: 在科学和工程应用中，物理参数变化会导致训练和预测机制之间的分布偏移，使得外推成为核心挑战。现有神经算子模型在处理参数与状态表示的纠缠时，泛化能力受限，特别是在参数分布变化时。
AI.method: 提出Late Fusion Neural Operator架构，将状态动态学习与参数效应解耦。该方法结合神经算子学习潜在状态表示，并使用稀疏回归以结构化方式融入参数信息，实现参数与状态表示的分离。
AI.result: 在四个基准PDE（平流、Burgers、1D和2D反应扩散方程）上，该方法一致优于Fourier Neural Operator和CAPE-FNO。平均RMSE在分布内降低72.9%，分布外降低71.8%，在分布内外参数机制中都表现出强泛化能力。
AI.conclusion: Late Fusion Neural Operator通过解耦状态动态学习与参数效应，显著提升了神经算子在PDE预测中的泛化性能，特别是在处理参数分布偏移时表现出优越的预测能力。

title: HalluClear: Diagnosing, Evaluating and Mitigating Hallucinations in GUI Agents
summary: While progress in GUI agents has been largely driven by industrial-scale training, ungrounded hallucinations often trigger cascading failures in real-world deployments.Unlike general VLM domains, the GUI agent field lacks a hallucination-focused suite for fine-grained diagnosis, reliable evaluation, and targeted mitigation.To bridge this gap, we introduce HalluClear, a comprehensive suite for hallucination mitigation in GUI agents as a complement to computation-intensive scaling. HalluClear comprises: (1) a GUI-specific hallucination taxonomy derived from empirical failure analysis; (2) a calibrated three-stage evaluation workflow which enhances VLM-as-a-judge reliability via expert-annotated benchmarking and ensemble credibility estimation; and (3) a mitigation scheme based on closed-loop structured reasoning, enabling lightweight continual post-training with cold-start initialization for both generalist and GUI-specialist agents. Experiments across representative agents and public benchmarks demonstrate that post-training on only 9K samples within our suite can significantly reduce hallucinations, thereby improving grounding and action fidelity, offering a compute-efficient pathway to robust GUI automation.

AI.tldr: HalluClear是一个GUI代理幻觉缓解套件，包含幻觉分类、评估流程和缓解方案，仅用9K样本微调即可显著减少幻觉，提升GUI自动化鲁棒性
AI.motivation: GUI代理领域缺乏针对幻觉的细粒度诊断、可靠评估和针对性缓解工具，而工业级训练常导致未接地幻觉引发级联失败
AI.method: 提出HalluClear套件：1) 基于经验失败分析的GUI特定幻觉分类法；2) 增强VLM-as-a-judge可靠性的三阶段评估流程；3) 基于闭环结构化推理的缓解方案，支持冷启动初始化的轻量级持续后训练
AI.result: 在代表性代理和公共基准测试中，仅用9K样本进行后训练即可显著减少幻觉，改善接地性和动作保真度
AI.conclusion: HalluClear为GUI代理提供了一种计算高效的幻觉缓解途径，可作为计算密集型扩展的补充方案

title: Beyond Black-Box Labels: Interpretable Criteria for Diagnosing SubjectiveNLP Tasks
summary: Subjective NLP datasets typically aggregate annotator judgments into a single gold label, making it difficult to diagnose whether disagreement reflects unclear criteria, collapsed distinctions, or legitimate plurality. We propose a \emph{schema-level diagnostic} for auditing expert-designed annotation schemas \emph{prior to} gold-label commitment, using only multi-annotator criterion judgments. The diagnostic separates two failure modes: unstable criteria with hard-to-operationalize boundaries, and systematic overlap that blurs the boundaries between mutually exclusive categories. Applied to persuasive value extraction in commercial documents, we find that disagreement is not diffuse: instability concentrates in a few criteria, while nearly half of covered sentences activate multiple categories. These signals align with where domain experts disagree, yielding an evidence-based audit for tightening guidelines, revising category structure, or reconsidering the annotation paradigm.

AI.tldr: 提出一种模式级诊断方法，用于在确定黄金标签前审计专家设计的标注模式，通过分析标注者间的分歧来识别两种失败模式：标准不稳定和类别重叠。
AI.motivation: 主观NLP数据集通常将标注者判断聚合为单一黄金标签，难以诊断分歧是源于标准不清晰、类别界限模糊还是合理的多样性。需要一种方法来在确定黄金标签前审计标注模式。
AI.method: 提出模式级诊断方法，仅使用多标注者的标准判断来分离两种失败模式：1) 标准不稳定（难以操作化的边界），2) 系统重叠（互斥类别间的边界模糊）。应用于商业文档中的说服价值提取任务。
AI.result: 发现分歧并非分散：不稳定性集中在少数标准中，而近一半覆盖的句子激活了多个类别。这些信号与领域专家的分歧点一致，为改进指南、修订类别结构或重新考虑标注范式提供了基于证据的审计。
AI.conclusion: 模式级诊断方法能够有效识别标注模式中的问题，为改进标注指南、优化类别结构或重新考虑标注范式提供证据支持，有助于提高主观NLP数据集的标注质量。

title: Neuroscience Inspired Graph Operators Towards Edge-Deployable Virtual Sensing for Irregular Geometries
summary: Predicting full-field physics through the real-time virtual sensing of engineering systems can enhance limited physical sensors but often requires sparse-to-dense reconstruction, complex multiphysics, and highly irregular geometries as well as strict latency and energy constraints for edge-deployability. Neural operators have been presented as a potential candidate for such applications but few architectures exist that explicitly address power consumption. Spiking neuron integration can provide a potential solution when integrated on neuromorphic hardware but the current existing neuron models result in severe performance degradation towards regression-based virtual sensing. To address the performance concerns and edge-constraints, we present the Variable Spiking Graph Neural Operator (VS-GNO) which integrates a sophisticated spectral-spatial convolutional analysis and a previously developed Variable Spiking Neuron (VSN) and energy-error balance loss function. With a non-spiking $L_2$ error baseline of $0.4\%$, VS-GNO can provide a reconstruction error of $0.71\%$ with $15\%$ average spiking in its spectral-only form and $1.04\%$ with $24.5\%$ spiking in its entire form. These results position VS-GNO as a promising step towards energy-efficient, edge-deployable neural operators for real-time sparse-to-dense virtual sensing in complex, highly irregular engineering environments.

AI.tldr: 提出VS-GNO（可变脉冲图神经算子），结合谱空间卷积分析和可变脉冲神经元，在保持低误差的同时实现高能效的稀疏到稠密虚拟传感。
AI.motivation: 工程系统实时虚拟传感需要稀疏到稠密重建、复杂多物理场、不规则几何结构，同时面临严格的延迟和能耗约束。现有神经算子架构很少明确考虑功耗问题，而脉冲神经元集成在神经形态硬件上虽能节能，但现有模型在回归型虚拟传感中性能下降严重。
AI.method: 提出VS-GNO（可变脉冲图神经算子），集成复杂的谱空间卷积分析和先前开发的可变脉冲神经元（VSN），以及能量-误差平衡损失函数。
AI.result: 非脉冲L2误差基线为0.4%，VS-GNO在仅谱形式下提供0.71%重建误差（平均脉冲率15%），完整形式下1.04%误差（脉冲率24.5%）。
AI.conclusion: VS-GNO是实现复杂不规则工程环境中能效高、可边缘部署的实时稀疏到稠密虚拟传感神经算子的有前景的一步。

title: LLaTiSA: Towards Difficulty-Stratified Time Series Reasoning from Visual Perception to Semantics
summary: Comprehensive understanding of time series remains a significant challenge for Large Language Models (LLMs). Current research is hindered by fragmented task definitions and benchmarks with inherent ambiguities, precluding rigorous evaluation and the development of unified Time Series Reasoning Models(TSRMs). To bridge this gap, we formalize Time Series Reasoning (TSR) via a four-level taxonomy of increasing cognitive complexity. We introduce HiTSR, a hierarchical time series reasoning dataset comprising 83k samples with diverse task combinations and verified Chain-of-Thought (CoT) trajectories. Leveraging HiTSR, we propose LLaTiSA, a strong TSRM that integrates visualized patterns with precision-calibrated numerical tables to enhance the temporal perception of Vision-Language Models (VLMs). Through a multi-stage curriculum fine-tuning strategy, LLaTiSA achieves superior performance and exhibits robust out-of-distribution generalization across diverse TSR tasks and real-world scenarios. Our code is available at https://github.com/RainingNovember/LLaTiSA.

AI.tldr: 该论文提出了一个四层认知复杂度的时序推理分类法，构建了包含8.3万样本的HiTSR数据集，并开发了LLaTiSA模型，通过可视化模式与数值表格结合增强视觉语言模型的时序感知能力。
AI.motivation: 当前大语言模型在时序理解方面存在挑战，研究受限于碎片化的任务定义和存在模糊性的基准，阻碍了统一时序推理模型的开发和严格评估。
AI.method: 1. 提出四层认知复杂度的时序推理分类法；2. 构建HiTSR分层时序推理数据集（8.3万样本，包含验证的思维链轨迹）；3. 开发LLaTiSA模型，整合可视化模式和精度校准的数值表格；4. 采用多阶段课程微调策略。
AI.result: LLaTiSA在多种时序推理任务和真实场景中表现出优越性能，并展现出强大的分布外泛化能力。
AI.conclusion: 该研究通过形式化的时序推理分类法、大规模数据集和创新的模型架构，为统一时序推理模型的开发提供了系统框架，显著提升了时序理解能力。

title: Where is the Mind? Persona Vectors and LLM Individuation
summary: The individuation problem for large language models asks which entities associated with them, if any, should be identified as minds. We approach this problem through mechanistic interpretability, engaging in particular with recent empirical work on persona vectors, persona space, and emergent misalignment. We argue that three views are the strongest candidates: the virtual instance view and two new views we introduce, the (virtual) instance-persona view and the model-persona view. First, we argue for the virtual instance view on the grounds that attention streams sustain quasi-psychological connections across token-time. Then we present the persona literature, organised around three hypotheses about the internal structure underlying personas in LLMs, and show that the two persona-based views are promising alternatives.

AI.tldr: 论文探讨大型语言模型的个体化问题：哪些相关实体应被视为心智，通过机制可解释性方法分析人格向量、人格空间和涌现错位等实证研究，提出三种主要观点：虚拟实例观、虚拟实例-人格观和模型-人格观。
AI.motivation: 解决大型语言模型的个体化问题，即确定与这些模型相关的哪些实体（如果有的话）应该被识别为心智。这个问题对于理解AI系统的认知状态和伦理地位至关重要。
AI.method: 采用机制可解释性方法，特别结合近期关于人格向量、人格空间和涌现错位的实证研究。通过分析注意力流在token时间上的准心理连接，以及人格在LLM内部结构的三种假设来评估不同观点。
AI.result: 论证了三种观点是最有力的候选：虚拟实例观、虚拟实例-人格观和模型-人格观。虚拟实例观基于注意力流在token时间上维持准心理连接；两种人格观则基于人格文献中关于LLM内部结构的三种假设。
AI.conclusion: 大型语言模型的个体化问题可以通过机制可解释性方法得到有意义的探讨。虚拟实例观和两种新提出的人格观都是值得认真考虑的观点，它们为理解LLM中可能的心智实体提供了不同的理论框架。

title: LLM-Extracted Covariates for Clinical Causal Inference: Rethinking Integration Strategies
summary: Causal inference from electronic health records (EHR) is fundamentally limited by unmeasured confounding: critical clinical states such as frailty, goals of care, and mental status are documented in free-text notes but absent from structured data. Large language models can extract these latent confounders as interpretable, structured covariates, yet how to effectively integrate them into causal estimation pipelines has not been systematically studied. Using the MIMIC-IV database with 21,859 sepsis patients, we compare seven covariate-integration strategies for estimating the effect of early vasopressor initiation on 28-day mortality, spanning tabular-only baselines, traditional NLP representations, and three LLM-augmented approaches. A central finding is that not all integration strategies are equally effective: directly augmenting the propensity score model with LLM covariates achieves the best performance, while dual-caliper matching on text-derived categorical distances restricts the donor pool and degrades estimation. In semi-synthetic experiments with known ground-truth effects, LLM-augmented propensity scores reduce estimation bias from 0.0143 to 0.0003 relative to tabular-only methods, and this advantage persists under substantial simulated extraction error. On real data, incorporating LLM-extracted covariates reduces the estimated treatment effect from 0.055 to 0.027, directionally consistent with the CLOVERS randomized trial, and a doubly robust estimator yielding 0.019 confirms the robustness of this finding. Our results offer practical guidance on when and how text-derived covariates improve causal estimation in critical care.

AI.tldr: 研究比较了七种协变量整合策略，发现将LLM提取的协变量直接加入倾向评分模型效果最佳，能显著降低因果估计偏差。
AI.motivation: 电子健康记录中的因果推断受限于未测量的混杂因素，如虚弱状态、护理目标和精神状态等关键临床信息仅记录在自由文本中。虽然大语言模型可以提取这些潜在混杂因素，但如何有效将其整合到因果估计流程中尚未得到系统研究。
AI.method: 使用MIMIC-IV数据库中21,859名脓毒症患者，比较了七种协变量整合策略：仅表格基线、传统NLP表示和三种LLM增强方法。在已知真实效应的半合成实验中评估性能，并在真实数据中应用双重稳健估计器验证结果。
AI.result: LLM增强的倾向评分将估计偏差从0.0143降至0.0003；在真实数据中，纳入LLM提取的协变量使估计的治疗效应从0.055降至0.027，与CLOVERS随机试验方向一致；双重稳健估计器得到0.019的结果证实了发现的稳健性。
AI.conclusion: 研究为文本衍生协变量何时以及如何改善重症监护中的因果估计提供了实用指导，表明直接增强倾向评分模型是最有效的整合策略，而基于文本分类距离的双重卡钳匹配会限制供体池并降低估计质量。

title: Efficient Test-Time Scaling via Temporal Reasoning Aggregation
comment: Accepted to Findings of the 64th Annual Meeting of the Association for Computational Linguistics (ACL 2026)
summary: Test-time scaling improves the reasoning performance of large language models but often results in token-inefficient overthinking, where models continue reasoning beyond what is necessary for a correct answer. Existing dynamic early-exit methods typically rely on single-step confidence signals, which are often unreliable for detecting reasoning convergence in multi-step settings. To mitigate this limitation, we propose TRACE, a training-free framework for efficient test-time scaling that determines when to terminate reasoning based on temporal aggregation of multi-step evidence rather than instantaneous signals. TRACE detects reasoning convergence over time by aggregating two complementary signals across recent reasoning steps: answer consistency, capturing the persistence of predicted answers, and confidence trajectory, modeling the temporal evolution of model confidence. Benefiting from these two factors, TRACE can accurately determine whether the reasoning process has converged, thereby promptly halting inference and effectively avoiding redundant reasoning steps. Extensive experiments on multiple challenging benchmarks show that TRACE reduces reasoning token usage by 25-30% on average while maintaining accuracy within 1-2% of full-length reasoning, consistently outperforming existing dynamic reasoning methods.

AI.tldr: TRACE是一个无需训练的测试时缩放框架，通过聚合多步证据（答案一致性和置信度轨迹）来检测推理收敛，从而在保持准确性的同时减少25-30%的推理token使用。
AI.motivation: 现有动态提前退出方法依赖单步置信度信号，在多步推理场景中不可靠，导致token效率低下的过度思考问题。
AI.method: 提出TRACE框架，通过聚合两个互补信号来检测推理收敛：1) 答案一致性（预测答案的持续性）；2) 置信度轨迹（模型置信度的时间演化）。基于这些信号决定何时终止推理。
AI.result: 在多个挑战性基准测试中，TRACE平均减少25-30%的推理token使用，同时保持准确性与完整推理相比仅下降1-2%，优于现有动态推理方法。
AI.conclusion: TRACE通过时间聚合多步证据而非依赖瞬时信号，能够准确检测推理收敛，有效避免冗余推理步骤，实现高效的测试时缩放。

title: Dynamic Emotion and Personality Profiling for Multimodal Deception Detection
summary: Deception detection is of great significance for ensuring information security and conducting public opinion analysis, with personality factors and emotion cues playing a critical role. However, existing methods lack sample-level dynamic annotations for emotions and personality.In this paper, we propose an innovative multi-model multi-prompt annotation scheme and a strict label quality evaluation standard, and establish a multimodal joint detection dataset DDEP for deception, emotion, and personality. Meanwhile, we propose Rel-DDEP, an adaptive reliability-weighted fusion framework. Our framework quantifies uncertainty by mapping modal features to a high-dimensional Gaussian distribution space. It then performs reliability-weighted fusion and incorporates an alignment module and a sorting constraint module to achieve joint detection of deception, emotion, and personality. Experimental results on the MDPE and DDEP datasets show that our Rel-DDEP significantly outperforms the existing state-of-the-art baseline models in three tasks. The F1 score of the deception detection increases by 2.53%, that of the emotion detection increases by 2.66%, and that of the personality detection increases by 9.30%. The experiments fully verify the necessity of annotating dynamic emotion and personality labels for each sample and the effectiveness of reliability-weighted fusion.

AI.tldr: 提出Rel-DDEP框架，通过可靠性加权融合和不确定性量化，实现欺骗、情绪和人格的联合检测，在三个任务上显著超越现有方法。
AI.motivation: 现有欺骗检测方法缺乏样本级别的动态情绪和人格标注，而人格因素和情绪线索对欺骗检测至关重要，需要更精细的标注和融合方法。
AI.method: 1) 提出多模态多提示标注方案和严格标签质量评估标准，建立DDEP数据集；2) 提出Rel-DDEP框架，将模态特征映射到高维高斯分布空间量化不确定性，进行可靠性加权融合，并包含对齐模块和排序约束模块。
AI.result: 在MDPE和DDEP数据集上，Rel-DDEP显著优于现有最佳基线模型：欺骗检测F1提升2.53%，情绪检测提升2.66%，人格检测提升9.30%。
AI.conclusion: 验证了为每个样本标注动态情绪和人格标签的必要性，以及可靠性加权融合方法的有效性，为多模态欺骗检测提供了新思路。

title: Representation Before Training: A Fixed-Budget Benchmark for Generative Medical Event Models
comment: 39 pages. Submitted to Machine Learning for Healthcare 2026
summary: Every prediction from a generative medical event model is bounded by how clinical events are tokenized, yet input representation is rarely isolated from other system and architectural choices. We evaluate how representation decisions affect downstream prediction after a shared one-epoch pretraining budget. We train 28 matched transformers on MIMIC-IV and evaluate them on 30 clinical outcomes in three experiments: (1) quantization granularity, reference-range anchoring, and code-value fusion; (2) value encoding (hard bins, soft discretization, code-normalized xVal) crossed with temporal encoding (event order, time tokens, admission-relative RoPE); and (3) native MIMIC laboratory/vital codes versus the Common Longitudinal ICU Format (CLIF)-remapped laboratory/vital codes with compression-preserving perturbation arms. In Experiment 1, fused code-value tokenization improves mortality AUROC from 0.891 to 0.915 (BH-adjusted p < 0.001), hospital length-of-stay AUROC from 0.763 to 0.788 (BH-adjusted p < 0.001), and, for the decile fused-vs-unfused comparison, mean regression Spearman rho across the 13 regression outcomes from 0.414 to 0.494. Across the three temporal encodings, event order only and admission-relative RoPE match or exceed inserting time tokens on average while shortening sequences by 11%. CLIF remapping preserves downstream performance in our single-site setting while yielding a smaller, clinically interpretable token set compatible with multi-site use. Finer-than-decile quantization, reference-range anchoring, and soft discretization help in selective outcomes, while code-normalized xVal remains well below the discrete and soft families, consistent with near-median suppression that persists after the affine variant.

AI.tldr: 评估医疗事件模型输入表示方法对下游预测性能的影响，发现融合编码-值标记化能显著提升预测性能，而CLIF重映射在多中心应用中具有优势。
AI.motivation: 生成式医疗事件模型的预测性能受临床事件标记化方式的影响，但输入表示通常与其他系统和架构选择混杂在一起，需要独立评估表示决策对下游预测的影响。
AI.method: 在MIMIC-IV数据集上训练28个匹配的transformer模型，通过三个实验评估表示决策：1）量化粒度、参考范围锚定和编码-值融合；2）值编码（硬分箱、软离散化、编码归一化xVal）与时间编码（事件顺序、时间标记、入院相对RoPE）的组合；3）原生MIMIC代码与CLIF重映射代码的比较。
AI.result: 融合编码-值标记化将死亡率AUROC从0.891提升至0.915，住院时长AUROC从0.763提升至0.788；事件顺序和入院相对RoPE编码在缩短序列11%的同时性能相当或优于时间标记；CLIF重映射在保持性能的同时提供更小、临床可解释的标记集。
AI.conclusion: 医疗事件模型的输入表示选择对预测性能有显著影响，融合编码-值标记化能提升性能，CLIF重映射为多中心应用提供标准化方案，而时间编码优化可减少序列长度。

title: SkillFlow:Benchmarking Lifelong Skill Discovery and Evolution for Autonomous Agents
summary: As the capability frontier of autonomous agents continues to expand, they are increasingly able to complete specialized tasks through plug-and-play external skills. Yet current benchmarks mostly test whether models can use provided skills, leaving open whether they can discover skills from experience, repair them after failure, and maintain a coherent library over time. We introduce SkillFlow, a benchmark of 166 tasks across 20 families in which task construction within each family follows a Domain-Agnostic Execution Flow (DAEF) that defines an agent workflow framework, allowing these tasks to share a consistent workflow. Agents are evaluated under an Agentic Lifelong Learning protocol in which they begin without skills, solve tasks sequentially within each family, externalize lessons through trajectory- and rubric-driven skill patches, and carry the updated library forward. Experiments reveal a substantial capability gap. For Claude Opus 4.6, lifelong skill evolution improves task success from 62.65% to 71.08% (+8.43 points). However, high skill usage does not necessarily imply high utility: Kimi K2.5 gains only +0.60 points despite 66.87% skill usage, while Qwen-Coder-Next reaches only a 44.58% task completion rate and still regresses relative to the vanilla setting. SkillFlow contributes a structured testbed for this direction and an in-depth empirical analysis of skill discovery, patching, transfer, and their failure modes under lifelong evaluation.

AI.tldr: SkillFlow是一个评估智能体终身学习能力的基准测试，包含166个任务，测试智能体从经验中发现技能、修复失败技能并维护技能库的能力。
AI.motivation: 当前基准测试主要评估模型能否使用提供的技能，但缺乏对智能体从经验中发现技能、修复失败技能并长期维护技能库能力的测试。
AI.method: 引入SkillFlow基准测试，包含166个任务和20个任务家族，采用领域无关执行流程(DAEF)定义工作流框架。通过Agentic Lifelong Learning协议评估智能体：从无技能开始，顺序解决任务，通过轨迹和规则驱动的技能补丁外化学习成果，并携带更新的技能库继续学习。
AI.result: 实验显示显著的能力差距：Claude Opus 4.6通过终身技能进化将任务成功率从62.65%提升到71.08%(+8.43分)。但高技能使用率不一定带来高效用：Kimi K2.5技能使用率达66.87%但仅提升0.60分，Qwen-Coder-Next任务完成率仅44.58%且在基础设置下出现性能退化。
AI.conclusion: SkillFlow为智能体终身学习方向提供了结构化测试平台，并对技能发现、补丁、迁移及其在终身评估中的失败模式进行了深入实证分析。

title: Efficient Task Adaptation in Large Language Models via Selective Parameter Optimization
summary: Large Language Models (LLMs) have demonstrated excellent performance in general language understanding, generation and other tasks. However, when fine-tuning for specific domain tasks, the general knowledge accumulated in the pre-training phase is often partially overwritten or forgotten due to parameter updates, which severely limits the generalization ability and transferability of LLMs. Traditional fine-tuning strategies mostly train on the entire parameter space, ignoring the heterogeneity of model parameters, that is, some parameters are extremely important for general tasks, while other parameters are more sensitive to specific tasks. To alleviate the above problems, this paper innovatively proposes a parameter element importance evaluation method, which divides parameters into "core parameters" and "non-core parameters" by distinguishing the importance of parameters for general language ability tasks and specific domain tasks, and fixes the core parameters during fine-tuning, and only fine-tunes the non-core parameters. Extensive experiments on scientific, medical and physical tasks using GPT-J and LLaMA-3 show that our method can mitigate catastrophic forgetting while enhancing the adaptability of the model.

AI.tldr: 该论文提出了一种参数重要性评估方法，将LLM参数分为"核心参数"和"非核心参数"，在微调时固定核心参数，只微调非核心参数，以缓解灾难性遗忘问题。
AI.motivation: LLMs在特定领域任务微调时，预训练阶段积累的通用知识往往被部分覆盖或遗忘，严重限制了模型的泛化能力和可迁移性。传统微调策略在整个参数空间训练，忽略了模型参数的异质性。
AI.method: 提出参数元素重要性评估方法，通过区分参数对通用语言能力任务和特定领域任务的重要性，将参数分为"核心参数"和"非核心参数"。在微调时固定核心参数，只微调非核心参数。
AI.result: 在科学、医学和物理任务上使用GPT-J和LLaMA-3进行广泛实验，表明该方法能够缓解灾难性遗忘，同时增强模型的适应性。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过选择性微调参数，有效平衡了模型在特定任务上的适应性和通用知识的保留，为解决LLMs微调中的灾难性遗忘问题提供了有效方案。

title: Federation over Text: Insight Sharing for Multi-Agent Reasoning
summary: LLM-powered agents often reason from scratch when presented with a new problem instance and lack automatic mechanisms to transfer learned skills to other agents. We propose a federated learning-like framework, Federation over Text (FoT), that enables multiple agents solving different tasks to collectively generate a shared library of metacognitive insights by iteratively federating their local reasoning processes. Instead of federation over gradients (e.g., as in distributed training), FoT operates at the semantic level without any gradient optimization or supervision signal. Iteratively, each agent does local thinking and self-improvement on their specific tasks independently, and shares reasoning traces with a central server, which aggregates and distills them into a cross-task (and cross-domain) insight library that existing and future agents can leverage to improve performance on related tasks. Experiments show that FoT improves reasoning effectiveness and efficiency across a wide range of challenging applications, including mathematical problem solving, cross-domain collaboration, and machine learning research insight discovery. Specifically, it improves average accuracies of downstream tasks by 24% while reducing the reasoning tokens by 28% across the first two applications. In the research insight discovery application, FoT is able to generate insights that cover over 90% of the major contributions in the subsequent papers.

AI.tldr: FoT是一个联邦学习式框架，让多个代理通过共享推理过程构建跨任务的元认知洞察库，无需梯度优化，显著提升推理效果和效率。
AI.motivation: 当前LLM代理在处理新问题时通常从零开始推理，缺乏自动机制将学习到的技能传递给其他代理，导致重复工作和效率低下。
AI.method: 提出FoT框架：1) 各代理在各自任务上独立进行本地推理和自我改进；2) 将推理轨迹共享到中央服务器；3) 服务器聚合并提炼这些轨迹，构建跨任务、跨领域的洞察库；4) 现有和未来代理可复用该库提升性能。
AI.result: FoT显著提升推理效果和效率：在前两个应用中，下游任务平均准确率提升24%，推理token减少28%；在研究洞察发现应用中，能生成覆盖后续论文90%以上主要贡献的洞察。
AI.conclusion: FoT通过语义层面的联邦学习，实现了代理间的知识共享和技能传递，为LLM代理协作和持续学习提供了有效框架。

title: Knows: Agent-Native Structured Research Representations
comment: This paper serves as a technical report/white paper for the Knows.Academy project (https://knows.academy)
summary:
Research artifacts are distributed primarily as reader-oriented documents like PDFs. This creates a bottleneck for increasingly agent-assisted and agent-native research workflows, in which LLM agents need to infer fine-grained, task-relevant information from lengthy full documents, a process that is expensive, repetitive, and unstable at scale.
  We introduce Knows, a lightweight companion specification that binds structured claims, evidence, provenance, and verifiable relations to existing research artifacts in a form LLM agents can consume directly. Knows addresses the gap with a thin YAML sidecar (KnowsRecord) that coexists with the original PDF, requiring no changes to the publication itself, and validated by a deterministic schema linter. We evaluate Knows on 140 comprehension questions across 20 papers spanning 14 academic disciplines, comparing PDF-only, sidecar-only, and hybrid conditions across six LLM agents of varying capacity. Weak models (0.8B--2B parameters) improve from 19--25\% to 47--67\% accuracy (+29 to +42 percentage points) when reading sidecar instead of PDF, while consuming 29--86\% fewer input tokens; an LLM-as-judge re-scoring confirms that weak-model sidecar accuracy (75--77\%) approaches stronger-model PDF accuracy (78--83\%). Beyond this controlled evaluation, a community sidecar hub at https://knows.academy/ has already indexed over ten thousand publications and continues to grow daily, providing independent evidence that the format is adoption-ready at scale.

AI.tldr: Knows是一个轻量级规范，为研究文献添加结构化声明、证据、来源和可验证关系的YAML侧车文件，让LLM智能体能直接消费，解决PDF文档难以被AI代理高效解析的问题。
AI.motivation: 当前研究文献主要以PDF等面向读者的文档形式分发，这给日益增长的AI辅助研究流程带来了瓶颈。LLM智能体需要从冗长的完整文档中推断细粒度、任务相关信息，这个过程昂贵、重复且在大规模下不稳定。
AI.method: 引入Knows规范，通过YAML格式的侧车文件（KnowsRecord）绑定结构化声明、证据、来源和可验证关系到现有研究文献，与原始PDF共存，无需修改原始出版物，并通过确定性模式检查器验证。
AI.result: 在20篇论文的140个理解问题评估中，弱模型（0.8B-2B参数）从PDF的19-25%准确率提升到侧车文件的47-67%（+29到+42个百分点），同时减少29-86%输入token。LLM-as-judge重新评分确认弱模型侧车准确率（75-77%）接近强模型PDF准确率（78-83%）。
AI.conclusion: Knows格式能够显著提升LLM智能体对研究文献的理解效率和准确性，社区侧车中心已索引超过一万篇出版物并持续增长，证明该格式已具备大规模采用准备。

title: Jailbreaking Large Language Models with Morality Attacks
comment: 27 pages, 6 figures, 18 tables. Accepted by ACL 2026 Findings
summary: Pluralism alignment with AI has the sophisticated and necessary goal of creating AI that can coexist with and serve morally multifaceted humanity. Research towards pluralism alignment has many efforts in enhancing the learning of large language models (LLMs) to accomplish pluralism. Although this is essential, the robustness of LLMs to produce moral content over pluralistic values is still under exploration.Inspired by the astonishing persuasion abilities via jailbreak prompts, we propose to leverage jailbreak attacks to study LLMs' internal pluralistic values. In detail, we develop a morality dataset with 10.3K instances in two categories: Value Ambiguity and Value Conflict. We further formalize four adversarial attacks with the constructed dataset, to manipulate LLMs' judgment over the morality questions. We evaluate both the large language models and guardrail models which are typically used in generative systems with flexible user input. Our experiment results show that there is a critical vulnerability of LLMs and guardrail models to these subtle and sophisticated moral-aware attacks.

AI.tldr: 该论文提出利用越狱攻击来研究大语言模型内在的多元价值观，构建了包含1.03万实例的道德数据集，并设计了四种对抗攻击方法，揭示了LLMs和护栏模型在道德判断上的关键脆弱性。
AI.motivation: 多元对齐AI的目标是创建能够与道德多元化人类共存并服务的AI。虽然已有研究致力于增强LLMs的多元性学习，但LLMs在多元价值观下产生道德内容的鲁棒性仍需探索。受越狱提示惊人说服能力的启发，研究者希望通过越狱攻击来研究LLMs内在的多元价值观。
AI.method: 1. 构建包含1.03万个实例的道德数据集，分为"价值模糊"和"价值冲突"两类；2. 基于该数据集形式化四种对抗攻击方法，以操纵LLMs对道德问题的判断；3. 评估大语言模型和生成系统中常用的护栏模型对这些攻击的脆弱性。
AI.result: 实验结果表明，LLMs和护栏模型对这些微妙而复杂的道德感知攻击存在关键脆弱性。这些模型在面对精心设计的道德相关攻击时，其判断容易被操纵。
AI.conclusion: 通过越狱攻击研究LLMs内在多元价值观的方法有效揭示了模型在道德判断上的脆弱性。这项工作为理解AI系统的道德鲁棒性提供了新视角，并强调了在多元对齐研究中需要考虑对抗性攻击的重要性。

title: Scalable Physics-Informed Neural Differential Equations and Data-Driven Algorithms for HVAC Systems
summary: We present a scalable, data-driven simulation framework for large-scale heating, ventilation, and air conditioning (HVAC) systems that couples physics-informed neural ordinary differential equations (PINODEs) with differential-algebraic equation (DAE) solvers. At the component level, we learn heat-exchanger dynamics using an implicit PINODE formulation that predicts conserved quantities (refrigerant mass $M_r$ and internal energy $E_\text{hx}$) as outputs, enabling physics-informed training via automatic differentiation of mass/energy balances. Stable long-horizon prediction is achieved through gradient-stabilized latent evolution with gated architectures and layer normalization. At the system level, we integrate learned components with DAE solvers (IDA and DASSL) that explicitly enforce junction constraints (pressure equilibrium and mass-flow consistency), and we use Bayesian optimization to tune solver parameters for accuracy--efficiency trade-offs. To reduce residual system-level bias, we introduce a lightweight corrector network trained on short trajectory segments. Across dual-compressor and scaled network studies, the proposed approach attains multi-fold speedups over high-fidelity simulation while keeping errors low (MAPE below a few percent) and scales to systems with up to 32 compressor--condenser pairs.

AI.tldr: 提出一个可扩展的数据驱动HVAC仿真框架，结合物理信息神经ODE与DAE求解器，实现大规模系统的高效准确模拟
AI.motivation: 传统HVAC系统仿真计算成本高，难以扩展到大规模系统。需要开发既能保持物理一致性又能高效计算的仿真框架
AI.method: 1) 组件级：使用隐式PINODE学习换热器动力学，预测守恒量；2) 系统级：集成学习组件与DAE求解器，强制连接约束；3) 贝叶斯优化调整求解器参数；4) 轻量级校正网络减少系统偏差
AI.result: 在双压缩机和扩展网络研究中，相比高保真仿真实现多倍加速，保持低误差（MAPE低于几个百分点），可扩展到32个压缩机-冷凝器对系统
AI.conclusion: 该框架成功结合了数据驱动学习与物理约束，实现了大规模HVAC系统的高效准确仿真，为实际工程应用提供了可行的解决方案

title: Continuous Limits of Coupled Flows in Representation Learning
summary: While modern representation learning relies heavily on global error signals, decentralized algorithms driven by local interactions offer a fundamental distributed alternative. However, the macroscopic convergence properties of these discrete dynamics on continuous data manifolds remain theoretically unresolved, notoriously suffering from parameter explosion. We bridge this gap by formalizing decentralized learning as a coupled slow-fast dynamical system on Riemannian manifolds. First, using measure-theoretic limits, we prove that the discrete spatial transitions converge uniformly to an overdamped Langevin stochastic differential equation. Second, via the Itô-Poisson resolvent and a stochastic extension of LaSalle's Invariance Principle, we establish that the representation weights unconditionally avoid divergence and align strictly with the principal eigenspace of the spatial measure. Finally, we construct a joint Lyapunov functional for the fully coupled spatial-parametric flow. This proves global dissipativity and demonstrates that orthogonally disentangled, linearly separable features emerge spontaneously at the stationary limit. Our framework bridges discrete algorithms with continuous stochastic analysis, providing a formal theoretical baseline for decentralized representation learning.

AI.tldr: 本文为去中心化表示学习建立了连续随机分析框架，证明离散空间转换收敛于过阻尼Langevin随机微分方程，表示权重无条件避免发散并与空间测度的主特征空间对齐，最终产生正交解耦的线性可分特征。
AI.motivation: 虽然现代表示学习严重依赖全局误差信号，但基于局部交互的去中心化算法提供了一种根本的分布式替代方案。然而，这些离散动力学在连续数据流形上的宏观收敛特性在理论上仍未解决，尤其受到参数爆炸问题的困扰。
AI.method: 将去中心化学习形式化为黎曼流形上的耦合慢快动力系统：1) 使用测度理论极限证明离散空间转换一致收敛于过阻尼Langevin随机微分方程；2) 通过Itô-Poisson解子和LaSalle不变原理的随机扩展，建立表示权重无条件避免发散并与空间测度的主特征空间对齐；3) 为完全耦合的空间-参数流构造联合Lyapunov泛函。
AI.result: 证明了全局耗散性，并表明在平稳极限下会自发出现正交解耦、线性可分的特征。该框架将离散算法与连续随机分析连接起来。
AI.conclusion: 为去中心化表示学习提供了形式化的理论基准，建立了离散算法与连续随机分析之间的桥梁，解决了去中心化学习在连续数据流形上的宏观收敛问题。

title: AutoSearch: Adaptive Search Depth for Efficient Agentic RAG via Reinforcement Learning
summary: Agentic retrieval-augmented generation (RAG) systems enable large language models (LLMs) to solve complex tasks through multi-step interaction with external retrieval tools. However, such multi-step interaction often involves redundant search steps, incurring substantial computational cost and latency. Prior work limits search depth (i.e., the number of search steps) to reduce cost, but this often leads to underexploration of complex questions. To address this, we first investigate how search depth affects accuracy and find a minimal sufficient search depth that defines an accuracy-efficiency trade-off, jointly determined by question complexity and the agent's capability. Furthermore, we propose AutoSearch, a reinforcement learning (RL) framework that evaluates each search step via self-generated intermediate answers. By a self-answering mechanism, AutoSearch identifies the minimal sufficient search depth and promotes efficient search by rewarding its attainment while penalizing over-searching. In addition, reward mechanisms are introduced to stabilize search behavior and improve answer quality on complex questions. Extensive experiments on multiple benchmarks show that AutoSearch achieves a superior accuracy-efficiency trade-off, alleviating over-searching while preserving search quality.

AI.tldr: AutoSearch：基于强化学习的自适应搜索深度框架，通过自回答机制评估搜索步骤，实现准确性与效率的平衡，减少冗余搜索同时保持复杂问题探索能力。
AI.motivation: 代理式检索增强生成（RAG）系统在多步交互中常出现冗余搜索步骤，导致计算成本和延迟增加。现有工作通过限制搜索深度来降低成本，但这往往导致对复杂问题的探索不足。
AI.method: 提出AutoSearch强化学习框架：1）研究搜索深度对准确性的影响，确定最小充分搜索深度；2）通过自回答机制评估每个搜索步骤；3）引入奖励机制，奖励达到最小充分搜索深度，惩罚过度搜索；4）稳定搜索行为并提高复杂问题答案质量。
AI.result: 在多个基准测试上的广泛实验表明，AutoSearch实现了优越的准确性与效率权衡，缓解了过度搜索问题，同时保持了搜索质量。
AI.conclusion: AutoSearch通过自适应确定最小充分搜索深度，有效平衡了RAG系统的准确性与效率，解决了现有方法在复杂问题探索不足和冗余搜索之间的冲突。

title: Stability-Weighted Decoding for Diffusion Language Models
summary: Diffusion large language models (dLLMs) enable parallel text generation by iteratively denoising a fully masked sequence, unmasking a subset of masked tokens at each step. Existing decoding strategies rely on static confidence metrics computed at a single denoising step, ignoring temporal history and often leading to premature unmasking of unstable tokens. In this work, we theoretically establish that a token's temporal instability, quantified by the KL divergence between consecutive prediction distributions, provides a strict lower bound on its mutual information with the remaining masked context, indicating that temporally unstable tokens are inherently unsafe to unmask. Based on this insight, we propose Stability-Weighted Decoding (SWD), a training-free, plug-and-play strategy that incorporates temporal stability into token scoring and acts as a universal modulator for arbitrary score-based decoding policies. Experiments on code generation and mathematical reasoning benchmarks demonstrate that SWD consistently improves generation accuracy across representative scoring metrics and selection policies, and exhibits exceptional robustness, maintaining a significant performance lead over standard baselines across varying acceleration ratios.

AI.tldr: 提出Stability-Weighted Decoding (SWD)方法，通过考虑token的时间稳定性来改进扩散大语言模型的解码策略，提高生成准确性。
AI.motivation: 现有扩散大语言模型的解码策略依赖单步静态置信度指标，忽略了时间历史信息，导致过早解掩不稳定的token，影响生成质量。
AI.method: 理论证明token的时间不稳定性（用连续预测分布的KL散度量化）提供了其与剩余掩码上下文互信息的严格下界。基于此提出SWD方法，将时间稳定性纳入token评分，作为任意基于分数解码策略的通用调制器。
AI.result: 在代码生成和数学推理基准测试中，SWD在代表性评分指标和选择策略上一致提高生成准确性，并在不同加速比下保持显著性能优势。
AI.conclusion: 时间稳定性是改进扩散大语言模型解码的关键因素，SWD作为一种无需训练、即插即用的策略，能够有效提升生成质量并保持鲁棒性。

title: Barrier-enforced multi-objective optimization for direct point and sharp interval forecasting
summary: This paper proposes a multi-step probabilistic forecasting framework using a single neural-network based model to generate simultaneous point and interval forecasts. Our approach ensures non-crossing prediction intervals (PIs) through a model structure design that strictly satisfy a target coverage probability (PICP) while maximizing sharpness. Unlike existing methods that rely on manual weight tuning for scalarized loss functions, we treat point and PI forecasting as a multi-objective optimization problem, utilizing multi-gradient descent to adaptively select optimal weights. Key innovations include a new PI loss function based on an extended log-barrier with an adaptive hyperparameter to guarantee the coverage, a hybrid architecture featuring a shared temporal model with horizon-specific submodels, and a training strategy. The proposed loss is scale-independent and universally applicable; combined with our training algorithm, the framework eliminates trial-and-error hyperparameter tuning for balancing multiple objectives. Validated by an intra-day solar irradiance forecasting application, results demonstrate that our proposed loss consistently outperforms those in current literature by achieving target coverage with the narrowest PI widths. Furthermore, when compared against LSTM encoder-decoder and Transformer architectures--including those augmented with Chronos foundation models--our method remains highly competitive and can be seamlessly adapted to any deep learning structure.

AI.tldr: 提出一个多步概率预测框架，使用单一神经网络模型同时生成点预测和区间预测，通过多梯度下降自适应优化权重，确保预测区间不交叉且满足目标覆盖概率
AI.motivation: 现有方法通常需要手动调整损失函数权重来平衡点预测和区间预测，这需要大量试错。同时，确保预测区间不交叉且满足目标覆盖概率也是一个挑战
AI.method: 1) 使用多梯度下降将点预测和区间预测作为多目标优化问题处理；2) 提出基于扩展对数障碍的自适应超参数PI损失函数保证覆盖概率；3) 采用共享时序模型和特定预测范围子模型的混合架构；4) 提出无需试错的训练策略
AI.result: 在日内太阳辐照度预测应用中，该方法在现有文献中表现最佳，能以最窄的区间宽度实现目标覆盖概率。相比LSTM编码器-解码器和Transformer架构（包括增强的Chronos基础模型），该方法保持高度竞争力
AI.conclusion: 提出的框架通过多目标优化方法消除了手动调整超参数的需求，确保预测区间不交叉且满足覆盖概率，可无缝适应任何深度学习结构，在概率预测任务中表现优异

title: AutoOR: Scalably Post-training LLMs to Autoformalize Operations Research Problems
summary: Optimization problems are central to decision-making in manufacturing, logistics, scheduling, and other industrial settings. Translating complicated descriptions of these problems into solver-ready formulations requires specialized operations research (OR) expertise, making it hard to scale. We present AutoOR, a scalable synthetic data generation and reinforcement learning pipeline that trains LLMs to autoformalize optimization problems specified in natural language across linear, mixed-integer, and non-linear categories. AutoOR generates verified training data from standard optimization forms and uses solver execution feedback as the reward signal for RL post-training. AutoOR applied to an 8B model achieves state-of-the-art or competitive results across six established OR benchmarks, matching significantly larger frontier models. For a non-linear problem class involving physical dynamics, where frontier models score near 0%, we introduce a curriculum RL strategy that bootstraps from limited initial training data to make this class tractable for post-training. We believe that methods such as AutoOR can significantly accelerate industrial decision-making with AI.

AI.tldr: AutoOR是一个基于合成数据生成和强化学习的框架，用于训练LLM将自然语言描述的优化问题自动形式化为求解器可处理的数学表达式，在多个OR基准测试中达到SOTA或具有竞争力的结果。
AI.motivation: 工业决策中的优化问题通常需要专业的运筹学知识才能转化为求解器可处理的数学形式，这一过程难以规模化。AutoOR旨在通过AI自动形式化来加速工业决策。
AI.method: AutoOR采用合成数据生成和强化学习管道：1）从标准优化形式生成经过验证的训练数据；2）使用求解器执行反馈作为强化学习的奖励信号；3）针对非线性问题引入课程学习策略，从有限的初始数据引导训练。
AI.result: 在六个已建立的OR基准测试中，AutoOR应用于8B模型取得了SOTA或具有竞争力的结果，与显著更大的前沿模型相当。对于前沿模型得分接近0%的非线性物理动力学问题，AutoOR通过课程学习策略使其变得可处理。
AI.conclusion: AutoOR等方法可以显著加速基于AI的工业决策，通过自动形式化优化问题降低对专业运筹学知识的依赖，提高问题求解的可扩展性。

title: Formal Foundations of Agentic Business Process Management
summary: Just like traditional BPM systems, agentic BPM systems are built around a specification of the process under consideration. Their distinguishing feature, however, is that the execution of the process is driven by multiple autonomous decision-makers, referred to as agents. Since such agents cannot be fully controlled, the process specification is augmented with explicit objectives, or goals, assigned to the participating agents. Agents then pursue these goals, at least to the best of their efforts, under suitable assumptions on the behavior of others, by adopting appropriate strategies. Centrally, the organization enacting the process can use these specifications to provide guardrails on the decision-making capabilities of agents at the strategy level. This paper sets up the mathematical foundations of such systems in three key settings and analyzes four foundational problems of agentic BPM.

AI.tldr: 本文为智能体驱动的业务流程管理系统建立数学基础，分析四个核心问题
AI.motivation: 传统BPM系统围绕流程规范构建，而智能体BPM系统的特点是流程执行由多个自主决策者（智能体）驱动。由于智能体无法完全控制，需要在流程规范中增加明确的目标或任务分配给参与智能体。
