title: Towards Shutdownable Agents: Generalizing Stochastic Choice in RL Agents and LLMs
summary: Misaligned artificial agents might resist shutdown. One proposed solution is to train agents to lack preferences between different-length trajectories. The Discounted Reward for Same-Length Trajectories (DReST) reward function does this by penalizing agents for repeatedly choosing same-length trajectories, and thus incentivizes agents to (1) choose stochastically between different trajectory-lengths (be Neutral about trajectory-lengths), and (2) pursue goals effectively conditional on each trajectory-length (be Useful). In this paper, we use DReST to train deep RL agents and fine-tune LLMs to be Neutral and Useful. We find that these DReST agents generalize to being Neutral and Useful in unseen contexts at test time. Indeed, DReST RL agents achieve 11% (PPO) and 18% (A2C) higher Usefulness on our test set than baseline agents, and our fine-tuned LLM achieves maximum Usefulness and near-maximum Neutrality. Our results provide some early evidence that DReST could be used to train more advanced agents to be Useful and Neutral. Prior theoretical work suggests that these agents would be useful and shutdownable.

AI.tldr: DReST训练方法能让AI代理在不同长度轨迹间保持中立，同时保持有效性，提高可关闭性
AI.motivation: 解决AI代理可能抵抗关闭的问题，通过训练代理在不同长度轨迹间保持中立偏好，使其更容易被关闭
AI.method: 使用DReST奖励函数训练深度强化学习代理和微调大型语言模型，通过惩罚重复选择相同长度轨迹来激励随机选择不同长度轨迹
AI.result: DReST代理在未见过的测试场景中表现出良好的中立性和有效性，PPO和A2C代理分别提高11%和18%的有效性，微调LLM达到接近最大中立性和最大有效性
AI.conclusion: DReST方法为训练高级AI代理提供了一种可行方案，使其既有效又可关闭，为解决AI对齐问题提供了早期证据

title: Beyond Overlap Metrics: Rewarding Reasoning and Preferences for Faithful Multi-Role Dialogue Summarization
summary: Multi-role dialogue summarization requires modeling complex interactions among multiple speakers while preserving role-specific information and factual consistency. However, most existing methods optimize for automatic metrics such as ROUGE and BERTScore, which favor surface-level imitation of references rather than genuine gains in faithfulness or alignment with human preferences. We propose a novel framework that couples explicit cognitive-style reasoning with reward-based optimization for multi-role dialogue summarization. Our method first distills structured reasoning traces (e.g., step-by-step inferences and intermediate reflections) from a large teacher model and uses them as auxiliary supervision to initialize a reasoning-aware summarizer via staged supervised fine-tuning. It then applies GRPO with a dual-principle reward that blends metric-based signals with human-aligned criteria targeting key information coverage, implicit inference, factual faithfulness, and conciseness. Experiments on multilingual multi-role dialogue benchmarks show that our method matches strong baselines on ROUGE and BERTScore. Specifically, results on CSDS confirm the framework's stability in semantic consistency, while in-depth analysis on SAMSum demonstrates clear gains in factual faithfulness and model-based preference alignment. These findings underscore the value of reasoning-aware and preference-aware training for reliable dialogue summarization. Checkpoints and datasets are available at https://huggingface.co/collections/NebulaPixel/summorchestra-multirole-summary.

AI.tldr: 提出结合显式认知推理与奖励优化的多角色对话摘要框架，通过推理轨迹监督和双原则奖励优化，在保持ROUGE/BERTScore性能的同时提升事实忠实度和人类偏好对齐。
AI.motivation: 现有方法过度依赖ROUGE和BERTScore等自动指标，这些指标偏向表面模仿参考摘要而非真正提升忠实度或人类偏好对齐。多角色对话摘要需要建模复杂说话者交互并保持角色特定信息。
AI.method: 1) 从大型教师模型提取结构化推理轨迹作为辅助监督；2) 通过分阶段监督微调初始化推理感知摘要器；3) 应用GRPO（Group Relative Policy Optimization）结合双原则奖励：融合基于指标的信号和人类对齐标准（关键信息覆盖、隐式推理、事实忠实度、简洁性）。
AI.result: 在多语言多角色对话基准测试中，方法在ROUGE和BERTScore上匹配强基线。CSDS结果显示语义一致性稳定，SAMSum分析显示事实忠实度和模型偏好对齐有显著提升。
AI.conclusion: 推理感知和偏好感知训练对可靠对话摘要具有重要价值，结合显式推理与奖励优化能提升摘要质量而不牺牲自动指标性能。

title: L1 Regularization Paths in Linear Models by Parametric Gaussian Message Passing
summary: The paper considers the computation of L1 regularization paths in a state space setting, which includes L1 regularized Kalman smoothing, linear SVM, LASSO, and more. The paper proposes two new algorithms, which are duals of each other; the first algorithm applies to L1 regularization of independent variables while the second applies to L1 regularization of dependent variables. The heart of the proposed algorithms is parametric Gaussian message passing (i.e., Kalman-type forward-backward recursions) in the pertinent factor graphs. The proposed methods are broadly applicable, they (usually) require only matrix multiplications, and their complexity can be competitive with prior methods in some cases.

AI.tldr: 提出两种计算L1正则化路径的新算法，分别适用于独立变量和依赖变量的L1正则化，基于参数化高斯消息传递（卡尔曼型前向后向递归）。
AI.motivation: 在状态空间设置中计算L1正则化路径（包括L1正则化卡尔曼平滑、线性SVM、LASSO等）需要高效算法。现有方法可能计算复杂或不够通用。
AI.method: 提出两种互为对偶的新算法：第一种适用于独立变量的L1正则化，第二种适用于依赖变量的L1正则化。核心是相关因子图中的参数化高斯消息传递（卡尔曼型前向后向递归）。
AI.result: 算法具有广泛适用性，通常只需要矩阵乘法，在某些情况下计算复杂度可与现有方法竞争。
AI.conclusion: 提出的参数化高斯消息传递方法为状态空间设置中的L1正则化路径计算提供了高效、通用的解决方案。

title: SkillGraph: Self-Evolving Multi-Agent Collaboration with Multimodal Graph Topology
summary: Scaling vision-language models into Visual Multiagent Systems (VMAS) is hindered by two coupled issues. First, communication topologies are fixed before inference, leaving them blind to visual content and query context; second, agent reasoning abilities remain static during deployment. These issues reinforce each other: a rigid topology fails to leverage richer agent expertise, while static agents lack incentives to specialize for a given query. We address this with SkillGraph, a joint framework that evolves both agent expertise and communication topology. Within this framework, a Multimodal Graph Transformer (MMGT) encodes visual tokens, instruction semantics and active skill embeddings to predict a query-conditioned collaboration graph, replacing hand-crafted routing with dynamic, content-aware information flow. Complementing this, a Skill Designer distills and refines reasoning heuristics from failure cases, constructing a self-evolving multimodal Skill Bank. Crucially, updated skill embeddings are fed back into the MMGT, enabling the topology to adapt alongside capability growth. Experiments show that SkillGraph achieves consistent improvements across four benchmarks, five common MAS structures and four base models. Code is available at https://github.com/niez233/skillgraph.

AI.tldr: SkillGraph提出了一种联合优化视觉多智能体系统中智能体专业能力和通信拓扑的框架，通过多模态图变换器动态预测查询条件协作图，并结合技能设计师从失败案例中提炼推理启发式，实现系统能力的持续进化。
AI.motivation: 当前视觉多智能体系统存在两个耦合问题：1）通信拓扑在推理前固定，无法根据视觉内容和查询上下文动态调整；2）智能体推理能力在部署后保持静态。这两个问题相互强化，导致系统无法充分利用智能体专业知识和适应特定查询需求。
AI.method: 提出SkillGraph框架，包含两个核心组件：1）多模态图变换器（MMGT），编码视觉标记、指令语义和活动技能嵌入，预测查询条件协作图，实现动态、内容感知的信息流；2）技能设计师，从失败案例中提炼和优化推理启发式，构建自进化的多模态技能库。更新后的技能嵌入反馈给MMGT，使拓扑能够随能力增长而适应。
AI.result: 实验表明，SkillGraph在四个基准测试、五种常见MAS结构和四个基础模型上均取得了一致的性能提升。
AI.conclusion: SkillGraph通过联合演化智能体专业能力和通信拓扑，解决了视觉多智能体系统中静态拓扑和静态推理能力的耦合问题，实现了动态、内容感知的协作和持续的能力进化。

title: Learning to Control Summaries with Score Ranking
summary: Recent advances in summarization research focus on improving summary quality across multiple criteria, such as completeness, conciseness, and faithfulness, by jointly optimizing these dimensions. However, these efforts largely overlook the challenge of controlling summary generation with respect to individual criteria, especially in the presence of their inherent trade-offs. For example, enhancing conciseness can compromise completeness, and vice versa. In this work, we address this gap by proposing a loss function that aligns model outputs with fine-grained, model-based evaluation scores (e.g., from FineSurE), enabling both improvement in summary quality and dimension-specific control. Our approach improves the overall quality of summaries while maintaining the ability to selectively prioritize one criterion over others. Experiments on three pretrained models (LLaMA, Qwen, and Mistral) demonstrate that our method achieves performance comparable to state-of-the-art summarizers, while uniquely offering strong controllability over individual quality dimensions.

AI.tldr: 提出一种基于细粒度评估分数的损失函数，既能提升摘要整体质量，又能实现对特定质量维度（如完整性、简洁性）的精确控制。
AI.motivation: 现有摘要研究主要关注联合优化多个质量维度，但忽视了在维度间存在权衡时对单个维度的精确控制需求。例如，提升简洁性可能损害完整性，反之亦然。
AI.method: 提出一种损失函数，将模型输出与细粒度的模型评估分数（如FineSurE）对齐，实现摘要质量提升和维度特定控制的双重目标。
AI.result: 在LLaMA、Qwen和Mistral三个预训练模型上的实验表明，该方法在保持与最先进摘要模型相当性能的同时，提供了对单个质量维度的强大可控性。
AI.conclusion: 该方法填补了摘要生成中维度特定控制的空白，实现了在保持整体质量的同时，能够根据需求优先考虑特定质量维度。

title: Open-TQ-Metal: Fused Compressed-Domain Attention for Long-Context LLM Inference on Apple Silicon
comment: 8 pages, 8 figures, 8 tables. Code: https://github.com/svv232/gemma4metal and https://github.com/svv232/turboquant-llama3.170B
summary: We present Open-TQ-Metal, the first implementation of fused compressed-domain attention on Apple Silicon, enabling 128K-context inference for Llama 3.1 70B on a single 64GB consumer Mac -- a configuration impossible with all existing inference frameworks. Open-TQ-Metal quantizes the KV cache to int4 on the fly and computes attention directly on the compressed representation via custom Metal compute shaders, eliminating all intermediate dequantization matrices. Across 330 experiments spanning two model families (Gemma 4 31B and Llama 3.1 70B), the fused sdpa_int4 kernel achieves 48x attention speedup at 128K context over the dequantize-then-attend baseline, reduces KV cache memory from 40 GB to 12.5 GB (3.2x compression), and maintains identical top-1 token predictions to FP16 inference. We further provide the first cross-architecture analysis of KV cache quantization methods, revealing that the attention scale factor -- not model size -- determines whether angular quantization schemes like PolarQuant succeed or fail, with Gemma 4's attn_scale=1.0 amplifying directional error 25-100x more than Llama's standard 1/sqrt(d) scaling.

AI.tldr: Open-TQ-Metal实现了首个在Apple Silicon上的融合压缩域注意力机制，使单台64GB Mac能运行128K上下文的Llama 3.1 70B模型，通过int4量化KV缓存和自定义Metal着色器实现48倍注意力加速和3.2倍内存压缩。
AI.motivation: 现有推理框架无法在64GB消费级Mac上运行128K上下文的Llama 3.1 70B模型，需要解决KV缓存内存占用过大和计算效率低的问题。
AI.method: 开发Open-TQ-Metal框架，在Apple Silicon上实现融合压缩域注意力：1）实时将KV缓存量化为int4；2）通过自定义Metal计算着色器直接在压缩表示上计算注意力；3）消除所有中间反量化矩阵。
AI.result: 在330个实验中（Gemma 4 31B和Llama 3.1 70B）：1）128K上下文下注意力速度提升48倍；2）KV缓存内存从40GB降至12.5GB（3.2倍压缩）；3）保持与FP16推理相同的top-1 token预测准确率；4）首次跨架构分析发现注意力缩放因子（而非模型大小）决定角度量化方案成败。
AI.conclusion: Open-TQ-Metal成功实现了在消费级硬件上的超长上下文推理，揭示了注意力缩放因子对量化方案的关键影响，为高效大模型部署提供了新方向。

title: From Admission to Invariants: Measuring Deviation in Delegated Agent Systems
comment: 21 pages. Paper 2 of the 4-paper Agent Governance Series. Zenodo: https://doi.org/10.5281/zenodo.19643761. Companion: ACP (arXiv:2603.18829), Atomic Boundaries (zenodo.19642166), Fair Allocation (zenodo.19643928), Irreducibility (zenodo.19643950)
summary: Autonomous agent systems are governed by enforcement mechanisms that flag hard constraint violations at runtime. The Agent Control Protocol identifies a structural limit of such systems: a correctly-functioning enforcement engine can enter a regime in which behavioral drift is invisible to it, because the enforcement signal operates below the layer where deviation is measurable. We show that enforcement-based governance is structurally unable to determine whether an agent's behavior remains within the admissible behavior space A0 established at admission time. Our central result, the Non-Identifiability Theorem, proves that A0 is not in the sigma-algebra generated by the enforcement signal g under the Local Observability Assumption, which every practical enforcement system satisfies. The impossibility arises from a fundamental mismatch: g evaluates actions locally against a point-wise rule set, while A0 encodes global, trajectory-level behavioral properties set at admission time. We define the Invariant Measurement Layer (IML), which bypasses this limitation by retaining direct access to the generative model of A0. We prove an information-theoretic impossibility for enforcement-based monitoring; separately, we show IML detects admission-time drift with provably finite detection delay, operating in the region where enforcement is structurally blind. Validated across four settings: three drift scenarios (300 and 1000 steps), a live n8n webhook pipeline, and a LangGraph StateGraph agent -- enforcement triggers zero violations while IML detects each drift type within 9-258 steps. Paper 2 of a 4-paper Agent Governance Series: atomic boundaries (P0, 10.5281/zenodo.19642166), ACP enforcement (P1, arXiv:2603.18829), fair allocation (P3, 10.5281/zenodo.19643928), irreducibility (P4, 10.5281/zenodo.19643950).

AI.tldr: 本文提出Agent Control Protocol，证明基于执行的治理系统存在结构性局限：无法检测行为漂移，因为执行信号在可观测层之下操作。提出Invariant Measurement Layer来绕过此限制。
AI.motivation: 现有自治代理系统依赖运行时约束违反检测机制，但这些机制存在结构性局限：即使正确运行，也无法检测行为漂移，因为执行信号在可测量偏差的层面之下操作。
AI.method: 提出Agent Control Protocol理论框架，证明Non-Identifiability Theorem：在Local Observability Assumption下，初始行为空间A0不在执行信号g生成的sigma代数中。定义Invariant Measurement Layer，保留对A0生成模型的直接访问。
AI.result: 证明基于执行的监控存在信息论不可能性；IML能在有限延迟内检测行为漂移。在四种场景验证：三个漂移场景（300和1000步）、n8n webhook管道、LangGraph StateGraph代理。执行触发零违规，而IML在9-258步内检测到每种漂移。
AI.conclusion: 基于执行的治理存在结构性局限，无法检测行为漂移。Invariant Measurement Layer能绕过此限制，在有限延迟内检测漂移。这是Agent Governance系列论文的第二篇。

title: Calibrating Model-Based Evaluation Metrics for Summarization
summary: Recent advances in summary evaluation are based on model-based metrics to assess quality dimensions, such as completeness, conciseness, and faithfulness. However, these methods often require large language models, and predicted scores are frequently miscalibrated, limiting their reliability. Moreover, evaluating the average quality across different summaries for a single document typically requires access to multiple reference summaries. Here, we propose a general framework that generates individual and average proxy scores without relying on reference summaries, human annotations, or expensive model-based metrics. We also propose group isotonic regression binning (GIRB), a calibration method that adjusts the raw predictions to better align with ground-truth evaluation metrics. While we focus on continuous-value scenarios, such as summarization, the method is applicable to discrete-value tasks, such as question answering. Experiments on seven datasets demonstrate that our approach consistently outperforms existing baselines.

AI.tldr: 提出无需参考摘要、人工标注或昂贵模型的新框架，通过校准方法生成个体和平均代理分数，在七个数据集上优于现有基线
AI.motivation: 现有摘要评估方法依赖大型语言模型，预测分数经常校准不当，可靠性有限，且评估单个文档不同摘要的平均质量通常需要多个参考摘要
AI.method: 提出通用框架生成个体和平均代理分数，无需参考摘要、人工标注或昂贵模型；提出组等渗回归分箱（GIRB）校准方法，调整原始预测以更好对齐真实评估指标
AI.result: 在七个数据集上的实验表明，该方法始终优于现有基线方法
AI.conclusion: 该方法不仅适用于连续值任务（如摘要），也适用于离散值任务（如问答），提供了一种更可靠、更经济的评估方案

title: Hyperbolic Enhanced Representation Learning for Incomplete Multi-view Clustering
summary: Incomplete Multi-View Clustering (IMVC) faces the challenge of learning discriminative representations from fragmentary observations while maintaining robustness against missing views. However, prevalent Euclidean-based methods suffer from a geometric mismatch when modeling real-world data with intrinsic hierarchies, leading to semantic blurring where representations drift towards spatially proximal but semantically distinct neighbors. To bridge this gap, we propose HERL, a Hyperbolic Enhanced Representation Learning framework for IMVC. Operating within the Poincaré ball, HERL constructs a structure-aware latent space to enhance representation learning. Specifically, we design a dual-constraint hyperbolic contrastive mechanism optimizing: an angular-based loss to preserve semantic identity via directional alignment, and a distance-based loss to enforce hierarchical compactness. Furthermore, a hyperbolic prototype head is introduced to rectify global structural drift by aligning cross-view hierarchy-aware prototype distributions. Consequently, HERL disentangles fine-grained semantic correlations to sharpen cluster boundaries and imposes geometric constraints to rectify the data recovery process. Extensive experimental results demonstrate that HERL consistently outperforms state-of-the-art approaches.

AI.tldr: HERL：一种用于不完整多视图聚类的双曲增强表示学习框架，通过双约束双曲对比机制和双曲原型头来解决几何不匹配和语义模糊问题。
AI.motivation: 现有基于欧几里得空间的不完整多视图聚类方法在处理具有内在层次结构的真实世界数据时存在几何不匹配问题，导致语义模糊——表示会漂移到空间邻近但语义不同的邻居。
AI.method: 在庞加莱球中构建结构感知的潜在空间，设计双约束双曲对比机制（角度损失保持语义一致性，距离损失增强层次紧凑性），并引入双曲原型头来对齐跨视图的层次感知原型分布。
AI.result: 广泛的实验结果表明，HERL在多个数据集上持续优于最先进的方法，能够解耦细粒度语义相关性并锐化聚类边界。
AI.conclusion: HERL通过双曲几何建模有效解决了不完整多视图聚类中的几何不匹配问题，增强了表示学习能力，为处理层次结构数据提供了新思路。

title: COSEARCH: Joint Training of Reasoning and Document Ranking via Reinforcement Learning for Agentic Search
summary: Agentic search -- the task of training agents that iteratively reason, issue queries, and synthesize retrieved information to answer complex questions -- has achieved remarkable progress through reinforcement learning (RL). However, existing approaches such as Search-R1, treat the retrieval system as a fixed tool, optimizing only the reasoning agent while the retrieval component remains unchanged. A preliminary experiment reveals that the gap between an oracle and a fixed retrieval system reaches up to +26.8% relative F1 improvement across seven QA benchmarks, suggesting that the retrieval system is a key bottleneck in scaling agentic search performance. Motivated by this finding, we propose CoSearch, a framework that jointly trains a multi-step reasoning agent and a generative document ranking model via Group Relative Policy Optimization (GRPO). To enable effective GRPO training for the ranker -- whose inputs vary across reasoning trajectories -- we introduce a semantic grouping strategy that clusters sub-queries by token-level similarity, forming valid optimization groups without additional rollouts. We further design a composite reward combining ranking quality signals with trajectory-level outcome feedback, providing the ranker with both immediate and long-term learning signals. Experiments on seven single-hop and multi-hop QA benchmarks demonstrate consistent improvements over strong baselines, with ablation studies validating each design choice. Our results show that joint training of the reasoning agent and retrieval system is both feasible and strongly performant, pointing to a key ingredient for future search agents.

AI.tldr: CoSearch框架通过联合训练推理智能体和生成式文档排序模型，解决了现有智能搜索方法中检索系统作为固定瓶颈的问题，在多个QA基准上实现了性能提升。
AI.motivation: 现有智能搜索方法（如Search-R1）将检索系统视为固定工具，只优化推理智能体而不改进检索组件。实验表明，固定检索系统与理想检索系统之间存在高达+26.8%的相对F1差距，表明检索系统是提升智能搜索性能的关键瓶颈。
AI.method: 提出CoSearch框架，通过组相对策略优化（GRPO）联合训练多步推理智能体和生成式文档排序模型。引入语义分组策略，通过令牌级相似性聚类子查询，形成有效的优化组而无需额外rollout。设计复合奖励，结合排序质量信号和轨迹级结果反馈，为排序器提供即时和长期学习信号。
AI.result: 在七个单跳和多跳QA基准测试中，CoSearch相比强基线方法实现了持续改进。消融研究验证了每个设计选择的有效性，证明联合训练推理智能体和检索系统是可行且性能优越的。
AI.conclusion: 联合训练推理智能体和检索系统是可行且性能优越的，这为未来搜索智能体提供了一个关键要素。研究表明，将检索系统从固定工具转变为可优化组件能显著提升智能搜索性能。

title: A Multi-Agent Approach for Claim Verification from Tabular Data Documents
summary: We present a novel approach for claim verification from tabular data documents. Recent LLM-based approaches either employ complex pretraining/fine-tuning or decompose verification into subtasks, often lacking comprehensive explanations and generalizability. To address these limitations, we propose a Multi-Agentic framework for Claim verification (MACE) consisting of three specialized agents: Planner, Executor, and Verifier. Instead of elaborate finetuning, each agent employs a zero-shot Chain-of-Thought setup to perform its tasks. MACE produces interpretable verification traces, with the Planner generating explicit reasoning strategies, the Executor providing detailed computation steps, and the Verifier validating the logic. Experiments demonstrate that MACE achieves state-of-the-art (SOTA) performance on two datasets and performs on par with the best models on two others, while achieving 80--100\% of best performance with substantially smaller models: 27--92B parameters versus 235B. This combination of competitive performance, memory efficiency, and transparent reasoning highlights our framework's effectiveness.

AI.tldr: 提出MACE多智能体框架，用于表格数据文档的声明验证，通过三个专门智能体（规划器、执行器、验证器）实现零样本推理，在保持高性能的同时显著减少模型参数需求
AI.motivation: 现有基于LLM的声明验证方法要么需要复杂的预训练/微调，要么将验证分解为子任务，通常缺乏全面的解释和泛化能力。需要一种既能提供可解释验证痕迹，又不需要复杂微调的方法。
AI.method: 提出MACE多智能体框架，包含三个专门智能体：规划器（生成显式推理策略）、执行器（提供详细计算步骤）、验证器（验证逻辑）。每个智能体采用零样本思维链设置执行任务，无需精细微调。
AI.result: 在两个数据集上达到最先进性能，在另外两个数据集上与最佳模型表现相当。使用显著更小的模型（27-92B参数 vs 235B）实现了最佳性能的80-100%，展现了竞争性性能、内存效率和透明推理的优势。
AI.conclusion: MACE框架在表格数据声明验证任务中表现出色，结合了竞争性性能、内存效率和透明推理，为声明验证提供了有效的多智能体解决方案。

title: Evaluating Multimodal LLMs for Inpatient Diagnosis: Real-World Performance, Safety, and Cost Across Ten Frontier Models
summary:
Background: Large language models (LLMs) are increasingly proposed for diagnostic support, but few evaluations use real-world multimodal inpatient data, particularly in low and middle-income country (LMIC) public hospitals.
  Methods: We conducted VALID, a retrospective evaluation of 539 multimodal inpatient cases from a tertiary public hospital in South Africa. Inputs included radiology imaging (CT, MRI, CXR) and reports, laboratory results, clinical notes, and vital signs. Expert panels adjudicated 300 cases (balanced and discordant subsets) to establish ground truth diagnoses, differentials, and reasoning. Ten multimodal LLMs generated zero-shot outputs. A calibrated three-model LLM Jury scored all outputs and routine ward diagnoses across diagnostic accuracy, differential quality, reasoning, and patient safety (>10,000 evaluations). Primary outcomes were composite scores ($S_3$, $S_4$) and win rates.
  Results: (i) LLM performance was tightly clustered (<15% variation) despite large cost differences; low-cost models performed comparably to top models. (ii) All LLMs significantly outperformed routine ward diagnoses on average diagnostic and safety scores. (iii) Top performance was achieved by GPT-5.1, followed by Gemini models. (vi) Adding radiology reports improved performance by 6%. (v) Diagnostic and reasoning scores were highly correlated ($ρ= 0.85$). (vi) Output rates varied (65-100%) due to input constraints. Results were robust across subsets and evaluation design.
  Conclusions: Across a real-world LMIC dataset, multimodal LLMs showed similar diagnostic performance despite large cost differences and outperformed routine care on average safety metrics. Affordability, robustness, and deployment constraints may outweigh marginal performance differences in LMIC settings.

AI.tldr: 多模态大语言模型在真实世界LMIC医院数据中表现相似，低成本模型与顶级模型性能相当，且均优于常规病房诊断，尤其在安全性方面。
AI.motivation: 评估多模态LLMs在真实世界低收入和中等收入国家公立医院环境中的诊断支持能力，现有研究缺乏对多模态住院数据的实际评估。
AI.method: 回顾性研究539例南非三级公立医院多模态住院病例，包括影像、实验室结果、临床记录等。专家小组确定300例真实诊断，10个多模态LLMs进行零样本输出，由校准的三模型LLM评审团进行评分。
AI.result: 1) LLMs性能差异小(<15%)，低成本模型与顶级模型相当；2) 所有LLMs在诊断和安全性评分上显著优于常规病房诊断；3) GPT-5.1表现最佳；4) 添加放射报告提升6%性能；5) 诊断与推理评分高度相关(ρ=0.85)。
AI.conclusion: 在LMIC真实数据集中，多模态LLMs表现出相似的诊断性能，且优于常规护理的平均安全性指标。在LMIC环境中，可负担性、鲁棒性和部署约束可能比边际性能差异更重要。

title: SafeAgent: A Runtime Protection Architecture for Agentic Systems
summary: Large language model (LLM) agents are vulnerable to prompt-injection attacks that propagate through multi-step workflows, tool interactions, and persistent context, making input-output filtering alone insufficient for reliable protection. This paper presents SafeAgent, a runtime security architecture that treats agent safety as a stateful decision problem over evolving interaction trajectories. The proposed design separates execution governance from semantic risk reasoning through two coordinated components: a runtime controller that mediates actions around the agent loop and a context-aware decision core that operates over persistent session state. The core is formalized as a context-aware advanced machine intelligence and instantiated through operators for risk encoding, utility-cost evaluation, consequence modeling, policy arbitration, and state synchronization. Experiments on Agent Security Bench (ASB) and InjecAgent show that SafeAgent consistently improves robustness over baseline and text-level guardrail methods while maintaining competitive benign-task performance. Ablation studies further show that recovery confidence and policy weighting determine distinct safety-utility operating points.

AI.tldr: SafeAgent是一个运行时安全架构，将LLM代理安全视为状态决策问题，通过分离执行治理和语义风险推理来防御多步骤工作流中的提示注入攻击。
AI.motivation: LLM代理在多步骤工作流、工具交互和持久上下文中容易受到提示注入攻击，仅靠输入输出过滤不足以提供可靠保护。
AI.method: 提出SafeAgent架构，包含两个协调组件：运行时控制器（在代理循环中调解动作）和上下文感知决策核心（在持久会话状态上操作）。核心被形式化为上下文感知高级机器智能，通过风险编码、效用成本评估、后果建模、策略仲裁和状态同步等操作实现。
AI.result: 在Agent Security Bench (ASB)和InjecAgent上的实验表明，SafeAgent相比基线和文本级护栏方法持续提高鲁棒性，同时保持竞争力的良性任务性能。消融研究显示恢复置信度和策略加权决定了不同的安全-效用操作点。
AI.conclusion: SafeAgent通过将代理安全视为状态决策问题，提供了一种有效的运行时安全架构，能够防御多步骤工作流中的提示注入攻击，在安全性和实用性之间实现平衡。

title: DORA Explorer: Improving the Exploration Ability of LLMs Without Training
summary: Despite the rapid progress, LLMs for sequential decision-making (i.e., LLM agents) still struggle to produce diverse outputs. This leads to insufficient exploration, convergence to sub-optimal solutions, and becoming stuck in loops. Such limitations can be problematic in environments that require active exploration to gather information and make decisions. Sampling methods such as temperature scaling introduce token-level randomness but fail to produce enough diversity at the sequence level. We analyze LLM exploration in the classic Multi-Armed Bandit (MAB) setting and the Text Adventure Learning Environment Suite (TALES). We find that current decoding strategies and prompting methods like Chain-of-Thought and Tree-of-Thought are insufficient for robust exploration. To address this, we introduce DORA Explorer (Diversity-Oriented Ranking of Actions), a training-free framework for improving exploration in LLM agents. DORA generates diverse action candidates, scores them using token log-probabilities, and selects actions using a tunable exploration parameter. DORA achieves UCB-competitive performance on MAB and consistent gains across TALES, e.g., improving Qwen2.5-7B's performance from 29.2% to 45.5% in TextWorld. Our project is available at: https://dora-explore.github.io/.

AI.tldr: DORA Explorer：一种无需训练、基于多样性导向动作排序的框架，用于提升LLM智能体在序列决策中的探索能力，解决现有方法多样性不足导致的次优解和循环问题。
AI.motivation: 当前用于序列决策的LLM智能体在输出多样性方面存在不足，导致探索不充分、收敛到次优解以及陷入循环。这在需要主动探索来收集信息和做出决策的环境中尤为问题。现有的温度缩放等采样方法只能在token级别引入随机性，无法在序列层面产生足够的多样性。
AI.method: 提出DORA Explorer（多样性导向动作排序）框架：1）生成多样化的动作候选集；2）使用token对数概率为候选动作评分；3）通过可调节的探索参数选择动作。该框架无需额外训练，可直接应用于现有LLM智能体。
AI.result: 在经典多臂老虎机（MAB）和文本冒险学习环境套件（TALES）上的实验表明：DORA在MAB上达到与UCB算法相当的性能；在TALES中实现一致性能提升，例如将Qwen2.5-7B在TextWorld中的性能从29.2%提升至45.5%。
AI.conclusion: DORA Explorer是一个有效的训练免费框架，能够显著提升LLM智能体的探索能力，解决现有解码策略和提示方法（如思维链、思维树）在探索方面的不足，为LLM在序列决策任务中的实际应用提供了重要改进。

title: In-Context Learning Under Regime Change
summary: Non-stationary sequences arise naturally in control, forecasting, and decision-making. The data-generating process shifts at unknown times, and models must detect the change, discard or downweight obsolete evidence, and adapt to new dynamics on the fly. Transformer-based foundation models increasingly rely on in-context learning for time series forecasting, tabular prediction, and continuous control. As these models are deployed in non-stationary environments, understanding their ability to detect and adapt to regime shifts is important. We formalize this as an in-context change-point detection problem and formally establish the existence of transformer models that solve this problem. Our construction demonstrates that model complexity, in layers and parameters, depends on the level of information available about the change-point location, from no knowledge to knowing exact timing. We validate our results with experiments on synthetic linear regression and linear dynamical systems, where trained transformers match the performance of optimal baselines across information levels. We also show that encoding and incorporating changepoint knowledge indeed improves the real-world performance of a pretrained foundation models on infectious disease forecasting and on financial volatility forecasting around Federal Open Market Committee (FOMC) announcements without retraining, demonstrating practical applicability to real-world regime changes.

AI.tldr: 论文研究了Transformer模型在非平稳序列中的上下文变化点检测问题，证明了存在能够解决该问题的Transformer架构，并展示了在实际应用中结合变化点知识能提升预测性能。
AI.motivation: 随着Transformer基础模型在时间序列预测、表格预测和连续控制等任务中越来越多地依赖上下文学习，这些模型在非平稳环境中部署时，理解其检测和适应机制变化的能力变得至关重要。数据生成过程在未知时间点发生变化，模型需要检测变化、丢弃或降低过时证据的权重，并实时适应新动态。
AI.method: 将问题形式化为上下文变化点检测问题，从理论上证明存在能够解决该问题的Transformer模型。构建的模型复杂度（层数和参数）取决于关于变化点位置的信息水平（从无知识到精确时间）。在合成线性回归和线性动态系统上进行实验验证，并展示如何将变化点知识编码并整合到预训练基础模型中。
AI.result: 理论证明存在解决上下文变化点检测问题的Transformer模型。实验表明，训练的Transformer在不同信息水平下都能匹配最优基线的性能。在实际应用中，编码和整合变化点知识确实提升了预训练基础模型在传染病预测和FOMC公告期间金融波动预测中的性能，无需重新训练。
AI.conclusion: 论文形式化了上下文变化点检测问题，证明了Transformer模型能够有效检测和适应机制变化，模型复杂度与变化点位置信息水平相关。在实际应用中，整合变化点知识可以显著提升预训练模型在真实世界机制变化场景中的性能，展示了实际应用价值。

title: Beyond Static Snapshots: A Grounded Evaluation Framework for Language Models at the Agentic Frontier
summary: We argue that current evaluation frameworks for large language models (LLMs) suffer from four systematic failures that make them structurally inadequate for assessing deployed, agentic systems: distributional invalidity (evaluation inputs do not reflect real interaction distributions), temporal invalidity (evaluations are post-hoc rather than training-integrated), scope invalidity (evaluations measure single-turn outputs rather than long-horizon trajectories), and process invalidity (evaluations assess outputs rather than reasoning). These failures compound critically in RLHF, where reward models are evaluated under conditions that do not hold during RL training, making reward hacking a predictable consequence of evaluation design rather than a training pathology. We propose the Grounded Continuous Evaluation (GCE) framework and present ISOPro, a simulation-based fine-tuning and evaluation system. ISOPro replaces the learned reward model with a deterministic ground-truth verifier, eliminating reward hacking by construction in verifiable-reward domains, and operates on LoRA adapter weights updatable on CPU, reducing the hardware barrier by an order of magnitude. We validate ISOPro on a resource-constrained scheduling domain with six difficulty tiers, demonstrating capability emergence visible only through continuous evaluation, an implicit curriculum that forms without researcher curation, and a 3x accuracy improvement over zero-shot baselines, all on consumer hardware with 0.216% trainable parameters.

AI.tldr: 论文指出当前LLM评估框架存在四大系统性缺陷，提出GCE框架和ISOPro系统，通过确定性验证器消除奖励黑客问题，在消费级硬件上实现3倍准确率提升。
AI.motivation: 当前大语言模型评估框架存在四大系统性失败：分布无效性（评估输入不反映真实交互分布）、时间无效性（评估是事后而非训练集成的）、范围无效性（评估单轮输出而非长期轨迹）、过程无效性（评估输出而非推理）。这些缺陷在RLHF中尤为严重，导致奖励黑客成为评估设计而非训练病理的可预测后果。
AI.method: 提出Grounded Continuous Evaluation (GCE)框架和ISOPro系统。ISOPro用确定性真实验证器替代学习型奖励模型，在可验证奖励领域从构造上消除奖励黑客问题；使用CPU可更新的LoRA适配器权重，将硬件需求降低一个数量级。
AI.result: 在资源受限调度领域的六个难度层级上验证ISOPro：展示了仅通过连续评估可见的能力涌现、无需研究者策划的隐式课程形成、相比零样本基线3倍的准确率提升，所有实验在消费级硬件上使用0.216%可训练参数完成。
AI.conclusion: 当前LLM评估框架存在结构性不足，需要转向GCE等连续评估方法。ISOPro通过确定性验证和硬件高效设计，为部署型智能体系统提供了更有效的评估和训练框架。

title: Seeing Isn't Believing: Mitigating Belief Inertia via Active Intervention in Embodied Agents
summary: Recent advancements in large language models (LLMs) have enabled agents to tackle complex embodied tasks through environmental interaction. However, these agents still make suboptimal decisions and perform ineffective actions, as they often overlook critical environmental feedback that differs from their internal beliefs. Through a formal probing analysis, we characterize this as belief inertia, a phenomenon where agents stubbornly adhere to prior beliefs despite explicit observations. To address this, we advocate active belief intervention, moving from passive understanding to active management. We introduce the Estimate-Verify-Update (EVU) mechanism, which empowers agents to predict expected outcomes, verify them against observations through explicit reasoning, and actively update prior beliefs based on the verification evidence. EVU is designed as a unified intervention mechanism that generates textual belief states explicitly, and can be integrated into both prompting-based and training-based agent reasoning methods. Extensive experiments across three embodied benchmarks demonstrate that EVU consistently yields substantial gains in task success rates. Further analyses validate that our approach effectively mitigates belief inertia, advancing the development of more robust embodied agents. Our code is available at https://github.com/WangHanLinHenry/EVU.

AI.tldr: 该论文提出了EVU机制来解决LLM智能体在具身任务中的信念惯性问题，通过预测-验证-更新流程主动管理信念，显著提升任务成功率。
AI.motivation: 现有LLM智能体在复杂具身任务中常做出次优决策和无效动作，原因是它们忽视了与内部信念不同的关键环境反馈，这种"信念惯性"现象导致智能体固执地坚持先验信念而忽略显式观察。
AI.method: 提出Estimate-Verify-Update (EVU)机制：1) 预测预期结果，2) 通过显式推理验证观察结果，3) 基于验证证据主动更新先验信念。EVU作为统一的干预机制，生成显式的文本信念状态，可集成到基于提示和基于训练的智能体推理方法中。
AI.result: 在三个具身基准测试上的广泛实验表明，EVU持续带来任务成功率的显著提升。进一步分析验证了该方法有效缓解信念惯性问题。
AI.conclusion: EVU机制通过主动信念干预，从被动理解转向主动管理，有效解决了LLM智能体的信念惯性问题，推动了更鲁棒的具身智能体发展。

title: When Spike Sparsity Does Not Translate to Deployed Cost: VS-WNO on Jetson Orin Nano
comment: 4 pages, 2 figures. Submitted to ICONS 2026 (under review)
summary: Spiking neural operators are appealing for neuromorphic edge computing because event-driven substrates can, in principle, translate sparse activity into lower latency and energy. Whether that advantage survives deployment on commodity edge-GPU software stacks, however, remains unclear. We study this question on a Jetson Orin Nano 8 GB using five pretrained variable-spiking wavelet neural operator (VS-WNO) checkpoints and five matched dense wavelet neural operator (WNO) checkpoints on the Darcy rectangular benchmark. On a reference-aligned path, VS-WNO exhibits substantial algorithmic sparsity, with mean spike rates decreasing from 54.26% at the first spiking layer to 18.15% at the fourth. On a deployment-style request path, however, this sparsity does not reduce deployed cost: VS-WNO reaches 59.6 ms latency and 228.0 mJ dynamic energy per inference, whereas dense WNO reaches 53.2 ms and 180.7 mJ, while also achieving slightly lower reference-path error (1.77% versus 1.81%). Nsight Systems indicates that the request path remains launch-dominated and dense rather than sparsity-aware: for VS-WNO, cudaLaunchKernel accounts for 81.6% of CUDA API time within the latency window, and dense convolution kernels account for 53.8% of GPU kernel time; dense WNO shows the same pattern. On this Jetson-class GPU stack, spike sparsity is measurable but does not reduce deployed cost because the runtime does not suppress dense work as spike activity decreases.

AI.tldr: 脉冲神经算子理论上能通过稀疏活动降低延迟和能耗，但在Jetson Orin Nano GPU上部署时，其稀疏性并未转化为实际性能优势，反而比密集算子更慢更耗能。
AI.motivation: 研究脉冲神经算子在商用边缘GPU软件栈上的实际部署效果，验证其理论上的稀疏性优势是否能转化为实际的延迟和能耗降低。
AI.method: 在Jetson Orin Nano 8 GB上对比测试5个预训练的变脉冲小波神经算子(VS-WNO)和5个匹配的密集小波神经算子(WNO)，使用Darcy矩形基准测试，分析算法稀疏性和部署成本。
AI.result: VS-WNO在算法层面确实表现出显著稀疏性（脉冲率从54.26%降至18.15%），但在部署路径上反而更差：延迟59.6ms vs 53.2ms，动态能耗228.0mJ vs 180.7mJ，且误差略高（1.81% vs 1.77%）。Nsight分析显示运行时仍以密集卷积为主。
AI.conclusion: 在当前Jetson GPU软件栈上，脉冲稀疏性虽然可测量，但由于运行时未能根据脉冲活动减少而抑制密集计算工作，因此无法降低部署成本，需要稀疏感知的运行时支持才能发挥优势。

title: DIRCR: Dual-Inference Rule-Contrastive Reasoning for Solving RAVENs
summary: Abstract visual reasoning remains challenging as existing methods often prioritize either global context or local row-wise relations, failing to integrate both, and lack intermediate feature constraints, leading to incomplete rule capture and entangled representations. To address these issues, we propose the Dual-Inference Rule-Contrastive Reasoning (DIRCR) model. Its core component, the Dual-Inference Reasoning Module, combines a local path for row-wise analogical reasoning and a global path for holistic inference, integrated via a gated attention mechanism. Additionally, a Rule-Contrastive Learning Module introduces pseudo-labels to construct positive and negative rule samples, applying contrastive learning to enhance feature separability and promote abstract, transferable rule learning. Experimental results on three RAVEN datasets demonstrate that DIRCR significantly enhances reasoning robustness and generalization. Codes are available at https://github.com/csZack-Zhang/DIRCR.

AI.tldr: DIRCR模型通过双路径推理和规则对比学习，显著提升了抽象视觉推理的鲁棒性和泛化能力。
AI.motivation: 现有方法要么关注全局上下文，要么关注局部行间关系，缺乏两者的有效整合，且缺少中间特征约束，导致规则捕捉不完整和表征纠缠。
AI.method: 提出双推理规则对比学习模型：1) 双推理推理模块结合局部路径（行间类比推理）和全局路径（整体推理），通过门控注意力机制整合；2) 规则对比学习模块引入伪标签构建正负规则样本，应用对比学习增强特征可分性和抽象规则学习。
AI.result: 在三个RAVEN数据集上的实验结果表明，DIRCR显著提升了推理的鲁棒性和泛化能力。
AI.conclusion: DIRCR通过整合局部和全局推理路径，并结合规则对比学习，有效解决了抽象视觉推理中的规则捕捉不完整和表征纠缠问题。

title: Are Emotion and Rhetoric Neurons in LLM? Neuron Recognition and Adaptive Masking for Emotion-Rhetoric Prediction Steering
summary: Accurate comprehension and controllable generation of emotion and rhetoric are pivotal for enhancing the reasoning capabilities of large language models (LLMs). Existing studies mostly rely on external optimizations, lacking in-depth exploration of internal representation mechanisms, thus failing to achieve fine-grained steering at the neuron level. A handful of works on neurons are confined to emotions, neglecting rhetoric neurons and their intrinsic connections. Traditional neuron masking also exhibits counterintuitive phenomena, making reliable verification of neuron functionality infeasible. To address these issues, we systematically investigate the neurons representation mechanisms and inherent associations of 6 emotion categories and 4 core rhetorical devices. We propose a neuron identification framework that integrates multi-dimensional screening, and design an adaptive masking method incorporating dynamic filtering, attenuation masking, and feedback optimization, enabling reliable causal validation of neuron functionality.Through neuron regulation, we achieve directed induction of non-target sentences and enhancement of emotion tasks via rhetoric neurons. Experiments on 5 commonly used datasets validate the effectiveness of our method, providing a novel paradigm for the fine-grained steering of emotion and rhetoric expressions in LLMs.

AI.tldr: 该论文提出了一种神经元识别与调控框架，用于在神经元层面精细控制大语言模型的情感和修辞表达，通过多维度筛选和自适应掩码方法实现可靠的因果验证。
AI.motivation: 现有研究主要依赖外部优化，缺乏对内部表示机制的深入探索，无法在神经元层面实现精细控制。少数关于神经元的研究局限于情感，忽略了修辞神经元及其内在联系，传统神经元掩码方法存在反直觉现象，无法可靠验证神经元功能。
AI.method: 提出神经元识别框架，整合多维度筛选；设计自适应掩码方法，包含动态过滤、衰减掩码和反馈优化，实现神经元功能的可靠因果验证；通过神经元调控实现非目标句子的定向诱导和利用修辞神经元增强情感任务。
AI.result: 在5个常用数据集上的实验验证了方法的有效性，实现了对LLMs中情感和修辞表达的精细控制，为相关研究提供了新范式。
AI.conclusion: 该研究系统探索了情感和修辞的神经元表示机制，提出的框架能够可靠识别和调控神经元，为大语言模型在情感和修辞表达方面的精细控制提供了有效方法。

title: Reference-state System Reliability method for scalable uncertainty quantification of coherent systems
comment: 36 pages, 13 figures, under review at a peer-reviewed journal
summary: Coherent systems are representative of many practical applications, ranging from infrastructure networks to supply chains. Probabilistic evaluation of such systems remains challenging, however, because existing decomposition-based methods scale poorly as the number of components grows. To address this limitation, this study proposes the Reference-state System Reliability (RSR) method. Like existing approaches, RSR characterises the boundary between different system states using reference states in the component-state space. Where it departs from these methods is in how the state space is explored: rather than using reference states to decompose the space into disjoint hypercubes, RSR uses them to classify Monte Carlo samples, making computational cost significantly less sensitive to the number of reference states. To make this classification efficient, samples and reference states are stored as matrices and compared using batched matrix operations, allowing RSR to exploit the advances in high-throughput matrix computing driven by modern machine learning. We demonstrate that RSR evaluates the system-state probability of a graph with 119 nodes and 295 edges within 10~seconds, highlighting its potential for real-time risk assessment of large-scale systems. We further show that RSR scales to problems involving hundreds of thousands of reference states -- well beyond the reach of existing methods -- and extends naturally to multi-state systems. Nevertheless, when the number of boundary reference states grows exceedingly large, RSR's convergence slows down, a limitation shared with existing reference-state-based approaches that motivates future research into learning-based representations of system-state boundaries.

AI.tldr: 提出RSR方法，通过将参考状态用于蒙特卡洛样本分类而非空间分解，显著降低计算成本对参考状态数量的敏感性，实现大规模系统实时可靠性评估。
AI.motivation: 现有基于分解的系统可靠性评估方法在组件数量增加时扩展性差，难以满足实际应用（如基础设施网络、供应链）中对大规模系统进行概率评估的需求。
AI.method: 提出参考状态系统可靠性（RSR）方法：1）使用参考状态表征系统状态边界；2）将参考状态用于蒙特卡洛样本分类而非空间分解；3）利用矩阵存储和批量矩阵运算实现高效分类，充分利用现代机器学习驱动的高通量矩阵计算优势。
AI.result: RSR方法在10秒内评估了包含119个节点和295条边的图的系统状态概率，能够处理涉及数十万个参考状态的问题，远超现有方法能力范围，并自然扩展到多状态系统。
AI.conclusion: RSR方法为大规模系统实时风险评估提供了有效解决方案，但当边界参考状态数量极大时收敛速度会减慢，这一局限性与现有基于参考状态的方法相同，未来需要研究基于学习的系统状态边界表示方法。

title: Characterizing Model-Native Skills
comment: We argue that when the goal is to intervene on model behavior, skill characterization should be *model-native*: grounded in the model's own representations rather than imposed through external ontologies
summary: Skills are a natural unit for describing what a language model can do and how its behavior can be changed. However, existing characterizations rely on human-written taxonomies, textual descriptions, or manual profiling pipelines--all external hypotheses about what matters that need not align with the model's internal representations. We argue that when the goal is to intervene on model behavior, skill characterization should be *model-native*: grounded in the model's own representations rather than imposed through external ontologies. We instantiate this view by recovering a compact orthogonal basis from sequence-level activations. The resulting basis is semantically interpretable but need not correspond to any predefined human ontology; instead, it captures axes of behavioral variation that the model itself organizes around. We validate this characterization on reasoning post-training, using the recovered basis for both SFT data selection and inference-time steering. We develop lightweight proxy interventions to identify which directions are most useful for a given model. Across Llama3-8B and Qwen2.5-3B, selecting data along those directions improves Pass@1 by up to 20% on MATH and 41% on AMC, outperforming data selection based on human-characterized skills. Because the basis lives in activation space, the same directions also serve as steering vectors at inference time, improving Pass@8 by up to 4.8% on MATH--an intervention that human-characterized skills cannot support. We further validate the characterization on safety alignment, where selecting adversarial training data for model-native skill coverage rather than textual diversity yields more sample-efficient learning. These results suggest that recovering skills from the model's own representations, rather than imposing them externally, provides a more effective foundation for intervening on model behavior. Codes are open-sourced.

AI.tldr: 该论文提出了一种从语言模型内部表示中提取技能的方法，而不是依赖外部人工定义，这种方法在推理后训练中能更有效地干预模型行为。
AI.motivation: 现有技能描述方法依赖人工分类、文本描述或手动分析流程，这些都是外部假设，可能与模型内部表示不一致。当目标是干预模型行为时，技能描述应该是"模型原生"的，基于模型自身的表示而非外部本体。
AI.method: 从序列级激活中恢复紧凑的正交基，该基在语义上可解释但不需要对应任何预定义的人类本体，而是捕捉模型自身围绕的行为变化轴。开发轻量级代理干预来识别对特定模型最有用的方向。
AI.result: 在Llama3-8B和Qwen2.5-3B上，沿这些方向选择数据使MATH的Pass@1提高达20%，AMC提高达41%，优于基于人工定义技能的数据选择。相同的方向也可作为推理时的引导向量，使MATH的Pass@8提高达4.8%。在安全对齐中，选择覆盖模型原生技能而非文本多样性的对抗训练数据能实现更高效的样本学习。
AI.conclusion: 从模型自身表示中恢复技能，而不是从外部强加，为干预模型行为提供了更有效的基础。模型原生技能表征在数据选择和推理引导方面都优于人工定义的方法。

title: REZE: Representation Regularization for Domain-adaptive Text Embedding Pre-finetuning
summary: Recent text embedding models are often adapted to specialized domains via contrastive pre-finetuning (PFT) on a naive collection of scattered, heterogeneous tasks. However, this approach often introduces task-induced bias alongside domain knowledge, leading to uncontrolled representation shifts that distort the pretrained embedding geometry and cause substantial performance degradation. To address this issue, we propose REZE}, a representation regularization framework that explicitly controls representation shift during embedding pre-finetuning. REZE operates on the relations of anchor-positive pairs and decomposes them in an eigenspace. It then measures task-wise dispersion along each eigencomponent to identify task-variant directions and applies adaptive soft-shrinkage to suppress task-induced noise while preserving task-invariant semantic structure, without inference-time overhead. Experiments across multiple embedding backbones and specialized benchmarks show that REZE outperforms standard pre-finetuning and isotropy-oriented post-hoc regularization in most settings, remaining stable where existing PFT variants collapse. Embedding space analyses further confirm that REZE induces controlled shifts aligned with the original embedding manifold, underscoring representation shift control as a key principle for robust embedding pre-finetuning under heterogeneous supervision.

AI.tldr: REZE是一个表示正则化框架，通过特征空间分解和自适应软收缩来控制预微调过程中的表示偏移，减少任务诱导偏差，保持语义结构
AI.motivation: 当前文本嵌入模型通过对比预微调适应专业领域时，会引入任务诱导偏差，导致表示偏移和性能下降，需要控制这种偏移
AI.method: 在特征空间中分解锚点-正样本对关系，测量任务间离散度识别任务变异方向，应用自适应软收缩抑制任务诱导噪声，保持任务不变语义结构
AI.result: 在多个嵌入骨干和专业基准测试中，REZE优于标准预微调和各向同性后处理正则化，保持稳定性，诱导与原始嵌入流形对齐的受控偏移
AI.conclusion: 表示偏移控制是异构监督下鲁棒嵌入预微调的关键原则，REZE框架有效实现了这一目标

title: Tree of Concepts: Interpretable Continual Learners in Non-Stationary Clinical Domains
summary: Continual learning aims to update models under distribution shift without forgetting, yet many high-stakes deployments, such as healthcare, also require interpretability. In practice, models that adapt well (e.g., deep networks) are often opaque, while models that are interpretable (e.g., decision trees) are brittle under shift, making it difficult to achieve both properties simultaneously. In response, we propose Tree of Concepts, an interpretable continual learning framework that uses a shallow decision tree to define a fixed, rule-based concept interface and trains a concept bottleneck model to predict these concepts from raw features. Continual updates act on the concept extractor and label head while keeping concept semantics stable over time, yielding explanations that do not drift across sequential updates. On multiple tabular healthcare benchmarks under continual learning protocols, our method achieves a stronger stability-plasticity trade-off than existing baselines, including replay-enhanced variants. Our results suggest that structured concept interfaces can support continual adaptation while preserving a consistent audit interface in non-stationary, high-stakes domains.

AI.tldr: 提出Tree of Concepts框架，通过固定规则的概念接口和概念瓶颈模型，实现可解释的持续学习，在医疗等高风险领域保持解释一致性。
AI.motivation: 持续学习需要在分布漂移下更新模型而不遗忘，但许多高风险应用（如医疗）还需要可解释性。现有问题：适应能力强的模型（如深度网络）不透明，而可解释的模型（如决策树）在分布漂移下脆弱，难以同时实现这两个特性。
AI.method: 提出Tree of Concepts框架：使用浅层决策树定义固定的、基于规则的概念接口；训练概念瓶颈模型从原始特征预测这些概念；持续更新作用于概念提取器和标签头，同时保持概念语义随时间稳定。
AI.result: 在多个医疗表格数据的持续学习基准测试中，该方法比现有基线（包括增强回放变体）实现了更好的稳定性-可塑性权衡，解释不会随时间漂移。
AI.conclusion: 结构化概念接口可以在非平稳的高风险领域中支持持续适应，同时保持一致的审计接口，为可解释的持续学习提供了可行方案。

title: KnowledgeBerg: Evaluating Systematic Knowledge Coverage and Compositional Reasoning in Large Language Models
summary: Many real-world questions appear deceptively simple yet implicitly demand two capabilities: (i) systematic coverage of a bounded knowledge universe and (ii) compositional set-based reasoning over that universe, a phenomenon we term "the tip of the iceberg." We formalize this challenge through two orthogonal dimensions: knowledge width, the cardinality of the required universe, and reasoning depth, the number of compositional set operations. We introduce KnowledgeBerg, a benchmark of 4,800 multiple-choice questions derived from 1,183 enumeration seeds spanning 10 domains and 17 languages, with universes grounded in authoritative sources to ensure reproducibility. Representative open-source LLMs demonstrate severe limitations, achieving only 5.26-36.88 F1 on universe enumeration and 16.00-44.19 accuracy on knowledge-grounded reasoning. Diagnostic analyses reveal three stages of failure: completeness, or missing knowledge; awareness, or failure to identify requirements; and application, or incorrect reasoning execution. This pattern persists across languages and model scales. Although test-time compute and retrieval augmentation yield measurable gains -- up to 4.35 and 3.78 points, respectively -- substantial gaps remain, exposing limitations in how current LLMs organize structured knowledge and execute compositional reasoning over bounded domains. The dataset is available at https://huggingface.co/datasets/2npc/KnowledgeBerg

AI.tldr: KnowledgeBerg是一个评估LLMs在有限知识领域内进行系统性覆盖和组合集合推理能力的基准，包含4,800个多选题，涵盖10个领域和17种语言，揭示了当前LLMs在知识完整性和组合推理方面的严重不足。
AI.motivation: 许多现实问题看似简单，但实际需要两种能力：(1) 对有限知识领域的系统性覆盖；(2) 在该领域上的组合集合推理。当前LLMs在这方面的能力尚未得到充分评估，因此需要创建专门的基准来量化这些限制。
AI.method: 通过两个正交维度形式化挑战：知识宽度（所需知识领域的基数）和推理深度（组合集合操作的数量）。从1,183个枚举种子中创建了4,800个多选题，涵盖10个领域和17种语言，所有知识领域都基于权威来源以确保可复现性。
AI.result: 代表性开源LLMs表现严重不足：在知识枚举任务上F1分数仅为5.26-36.88，在知识基础推理任务上准确率为16.00-44.19。诊断分析揭示了三个失败阶段：完整性（知识缺失）、意识（未能识别需求）和应用（推理执行错误）。尽管测试时计算和检索增强带来了一定提升（分别最多4.35和3.78分），但差距仍然显著。
AI.conclusion: 当前LLMs在组织结构化知识和在有限领域内执行组合推理方面存在根本性限制。KnowledgeBerg基准暴露了这些限制，并为未来研究提供了评估工具，数据集已公开可用。

title: Rethinking Meeting Effectiveness: A Benchmark and Framework for Temporal Fine-grained Automatic Meeting Effectiveness Evaluation
summary: Evaluating meeting effectiveness is crucial for improving organizational productivity. Current approaches rely on post-hoc surveys that yield a single coarse-grained score for an entire meeting. The reliance on manual assessment is inherently limited in scalability, cost, and reproducibility. Moreover, a single score fails to capture the dynamic nature of collaborative discussions. We propose a new paradigm for evaluating meeting effectiveness centered on novel criteria and temporal fine-grained approach. We define effectiveness as the rate of objective achievement over time and assess it for individual topical segments within a meeting. To support this task, we introduce the AMI Meeting Effectiveness (AMI-ME) dataset, a new meta-evaluation dataset containing 2,459 human-annotated segments from 130 AMI Corpus meetings. We also develop an automatic effectiveness evaluation framework that uses a Large Language Model (LLM) as a judge to score each segment's effectiveness relative to the overall meeting objectives. Through substantial experiments, we establish a comprehensive benchmark for this new task and evaluate the framework's generalizability across distinct meeting types, ranging from business scenarios to unstructured discussions. Furthermore, we benchmark end-to-end performance starting from raw speech to measure the capabilities of a complete system. Our results validate the framework's effectiveness and provide strong baselines to facilitate future research in meeting analysis and multi-party dialogue. Our dataset and code will be publicly available. The AMI-ME dataset and the Automatic Evaluation Framework are available at: this URL.

AI.tldr: 提出基于细粒度时间段的会议有效性评估新范式，使用LLM作为评判者自动评估各主题段落的有效性，并发布AMI-ME数据集和评估框架。
AI.motivation: 现有会议评估方法依赖事后调查，只能提供单一粗粒度评分，无法捕捉协作讨论的动态特性，且手动评估在可扩展性、成本和可重复性方面存在局限。
AI.method: 将有效性定义为随时间的目标达成率，在会议内按主题段落进行评估。使用大型语言模型作为评判者，自动评估每个段落相对于整体会议目标的有效性。构建AMI-ME数据集（包含130个AMI语料库会议的2,459个人工标注段落）。
AI.result: 建立了该新任务的全面基准，验证了框架在不同会议类型（从商业场景到非结构化讨论）的泛化能力。展示了从原始语音到评估的端到端系统性能，为会议分析和多方对话研究提供了强基线。
AI.conclusion: 提出了一种新颖的细粒度会议有效性评估范式，通过自动评估框架和公开数据集推动了会议分析领域的研究，为组织生产力提升提供了更精确的评估工具。

title: Live LTL Progress Tracking: Towards Task-Based Exploration
summary: Motivated by the challenge presented by non-Markovian objectives in reinforcement learning (RL), we present a novel framework to track and represent the progress of autonomous agents through complex, multi-stage tasks. Given a specification in finite linear temporal logic (LTL), the framework establishes a 'tracking vector' which updates at each time step in a trajectory rollout. The values of the vector represent the status of the specification as the trajectory develops, assigning true, false, or 'open' labels (where 'open' is used for indeterminate cases). Applied to an LTL formula tree, the tracking vector can be used to encode detailed information about how a task is executed over a trajectory, providing a potential tool for new performance metrics, diverse exploration, and reward shaping. In this paper, we formally present the framework and algorithm, collectively named Live LTL Progress Tracking, give a simple working example, and demonstrate avenues for its integration into RL models. Future work will apply the framework to problems such as task-space exploration and diverse solution-finding in RL.

AI.tldr: 提出Live LTL Progress Tracking框架，通过跟踪向量实时监控智能体在复杂多阶段任务中的进度，支持LTL规范的状态追踪
AI.motivation: 解决强化学习中非马尔可夫目标的挑战，需要跟踪智能体在复杂多阶段任务中的进度
AI.method: 基于有限线性时序逻辑(LTL)规范，建立"跟踪向量"在轨迹展开的每个时间步更新，向量的值表示规范状态（真、假或"开放"），应用于LTL公式树
AI.result: 框架能够编码任务执行过程中的详细信息，为新的性能指标、多样化探索和奖励塑造提供潜在工具
AI.conclusion: 正式提出了Live LTL Progress Tracking框架和算法，展示了其在RL模型中的集成途径，未来将应用于任务空间探索和多样化解决方案发现

title: Toward Reusability of AI Models Using Dynamic Updates of AI Documentation
summary:
This work addresses the challenge of disseminating reusable artificial intelligence (AI) models accompanied by AI documentation (a.k.a., AI model cards). The work is motivated by the large number of trained AI models that are not reusable due to the lack of (a) AI documentation and (b) the temporal lag between rapidly changing requirements on AI model reusability and those specified in various AI model cards. Our objectives are to shorten the lag time in updating AI model card templates and align AI documentation more closely with current AI best practices.
  Our approach introduces a methodology for delivering agile, data-driven, and community-based AI model cards. We use the Hugging Face (HF) repository of AI models, populated by a subset of the AI research and development community, and the AI consortium-based Zero Draft (ZD) templates for the AI documentation of AI datasets and AI models, as our test datasets. We also address questions about the value of AI documentation for AI reusability.
  Our work quantifies the correlations between AI model downloads/likes (i.e., AI model reuse metrics) from the HF repository and their documentation alignment with the ZD documentation templates using tables of contents and word statistics (i.e., AI documentation quality metrics). Furthermore, our work develops the infrastructure to regularly compare AI documentation templates against community-standard practices derived from millions of uploaded AI models in the Hugging Face repository. The impact of our work lies in introducing a methodology for delivering agile, data-driven, and community-based standards for documenting AI models and improving AI model reuse.

AI.tldr: 提出敏捷、数据驱动、社区化的AI模型文档方法，通过分析Hugging Face模型库与Zero Draft模板对齐度，量化文档质量与模型重用相关性，建立持续更新的文档标准基础设施。
AI.motivation: 解决大量已训练AI模型因缺乏文档或文档过时而无法重用的问题，缩短AI模型卡模板更新滞后时间，使AI文档更贴近当前最佳实践。
AI.method: 使用Hugging Face模型库和Zero Draft文档模板作为测试数据集，通过目录对齐度和词频统计量化文档质量，建立基础设施定期比较文档模板与社区实践。
AI.result: 量化了AI模型下载/点赞（重用指标）与文档对齐Zero Draft模板（质量指标）之间的相关性，开发了持续监控文档模板与社区实践对齐度的基础设施。
AI.conclusion: 提出了一种敏捷、数据驱动、社区化的AI模型文档方法，能提高AI模型重用率，通过持续对齐文档标准与社区实践来改善AI文档质量。

title: HopRank: Self-Supervised LLM Preference-Tuning on Graphs for Few-Shot Node Classification
summary: Node classification on text-attributed graphs (TAGs) is a fundamental task with broad applications in citation analysis, social networks, and recommendation systems. Current GNN-based approaches suffer from shallow text encoding and heavy dependence on labeled data, limiting their effectiveness in label-scarce settings. While large language models (LLMs) naturally address the text understanding gap with deep semantic reasoning, existing LLM-for-graph methods either still require abundant labels during training or fail to exploit the rich structural signals freely available in graph topology. Our key observation is that, in many real-world TAGs, edges predominantly connect similar nodes under the homophily principle, meaning graph topology inherently encodes class structure without any labels. Building on this insight, we reformulate node classification as a link prediction task and present HopRank, a fully self-supervised LLM-tuning framework for TAGs. HopRank constructs preference data via hierarchical hop-based sampling and employs adaptive preference learning to prioritize informative training signals without any class labels. At inference, nodes are classified by predicting their connection preferences to labeled anchors, with an adaptive early-exit voting scheme to improve efficiency. Experiments on three TAG benchmarks show that HopRank matches fully-supervised GNNs and substantially outperforms prior graph-LLM methods, despite using zero labeled training data.

AI.tldr: HopRank是一个完全自监督的LLM微调框架，将节点分类重新定义为链接预测任务，利用图拓扑中的同质性原理，无需任何标签训练数据就能达到与全监督GNN相当的性能。
AI.motivation: 当前基于GNN的方法存在文本编码浅层化和对标签数据依赖严重的问题，而现有的LLM-图方法要么仍然需要大量标签，要么未能充分利用图拓扑中丰富的结构信号。作者观察到现实世界TAG中边主要连接相似节点（同质性原理），这意味着图拓扑本身就编码了类别结构，无需任何标签。
AI.method: HopRank将节点分类重新定义为链接预测任务，通过分层跳数采样构建偏好数据，采用自适应偏好学习来优先处理信息丰富的训练信号（无需类别标签）。在推理时，通过预测节点与标记锚点的连接偏好进行分类，并使用自适应提前退出投票方案提高效率。
AI.result: 在三个TAG基准测试中，HopRank匹配了全监督GNN的性能，并显著优于先前的图-LLM方法，尽管使用了零标签训练数据。
AI.conclusion: HopRank证明了利用图拓扑中的同质性原理，通过完全自监督的LLM微调框架，可以在无需标签数据的情况下实现有效的节点分类，为标签稀缺场景下的图学习提供了新思路。

title: The Topological Trouble With Transformers
summary: Transformers encode structure in sequences via an expanding contextual history. However, their purely feedforward architecture fundamentally limits dynamic state tracking. State tracking -- the iterative updating of latent variables reflecting an evolving environment -- involves inherently sequential dependencies that feedforward networks struggle to maintain. Consequently, feedforward models push evolving state representations deeper into their layer stack with each new input step, rendering information inaccessible in shallow layers and ultimately exhausting the model's depth. While this depth limit can be bypassed by dynamic depth models and by explicit or latent thinking that externalizes state representations, these solutions are computationally and memory inefficient. In this article, we argue that temporally extended cognition requires refocusing from explicit thought traces to implicit activation dynamics via recurrent architectures. We introduce a taxonomy of recurrent and continuous-thought transformer architectures, categorizing them by their recurrence axis (depth versus step) and their ratio of input tokens to recurrence steps. Finally, we outline promising research directions, including enhanced state-space models and coarse-grained recurrence, to better integrate state tracking into modern foundation models.

AI.tldr: 该论文认为Transformer的纯前馈架构限制了动态状态跟踪能力，提出需要转向循环架构来实现时间扩展认知，并介绍了循环和连续思维Transformer的分类体系。
AI.motivation: Transformer的纯前馈架构在动态状态跟踪方面存在根本性限制。状态跟踪涉及迭代更新反映演化环境的潜在变量，这需要顺序依赖关系，而前馈网络难以维持这种关系。这导致演化状态表示在每一新输入步骤中都被推入更深的网络层，使得浅层无法访问信息，最终耗尽模型深度。
AI.method: 提出从显性思维轨迹转向通过循环架构实现隐性激活动态。引入循环和连续思维Transformer架构的分类体系，根据循环轴（深度vs步骤）以及输入标记与循环步骤的比例进行分类。
AI.result: 论文提出了一个分类框架，将现有方法按循环轴和输入-循环比例进行组织，为理解不同架构的状态跟踪能力提供了系统视角。
AI.conclusion: 时间扩展认知需要转向循环架构。论文概述了有前景的研究方向，包括增强状态空间模型和粗粒度循环，以更好地将状态跟踪集成到现代基础模型中。

title: PV-SQL: Synergizing Database Probing and Rule-based Verification for Text-to-SQL Agents
summary: Text-to-SQL systems often struggle with deep contextual understanding, particularly for complex queries with subtle requirements. We present PV-SQL, an agentic framework that addresses these failures through two complementary components: Probe and Verify. The Probe component iteratively generates probing queries to retrieve concrete records from the database, resolving ambiguities in value formats, column semantics, and inter-table relationships to build richer contextual understanding. The Verify component employs a rule-based method to extract verifiable conditions and construct an executable checklist, enabling iterative SQL refinement that effectively reduces missing constraints. Experiments on the BIRD benchmarks show that PV-SQL outperforms the best text-to-SQL baseline by 5% in execution accuracy and 20.8% in valid efficiency score while consuming fewer tokens.

AI.tldr: PV-SQL：一个用于复杂文本到SQL转换的代理框架，通过Probe和Verify组件解决上下文理解不足问题，在BIRD基准上显著提升执行准确性和效率
AI.motivation: 现有文本到SQL系统在处理复杂查询时，对深层上下文理解不足，特别是在处理具有微妙要求的查询时容易失败。需要解决值格式、列语义和表间关系的歧义问题，以及减少约束缺失的问题。
AI.method: 提出PV-SQL代理框架，包含两个互补组件：1) Probe组件：迭代生成探测查询从数据库检索具体记录，解决值格式、列语义和表间关系的歧义；2) Verify组件：使用基于规则的方法提取可验证条件并构建可执行检查表，实现迭代SQL优化。
AI.result: 在BIRD基准测试中，PV-SQL相比最佳文本到SQL基线方法，执行准确率提升5%，有效效率分数提升20.8%，同时消耗更少的token。
AI.conclusion: PV-SQL通过Probe和Verify组件的协同工作，有效解决了复杂文本到SQL转换中的上下文理解问题，显著提升了查询准确性和执行效率。

title: MedPRMBench: A Fine-grained Benchmark for Process Reward Models in Medical Reasoning
summary: Process-Level Reward Models (PRMs) are essential for guiding complex reasoning in large language models, yet existing PRM benchmarks cover only general domains such as mathematics, failing to address medical reasoning -- which is uniquely characterized by safety criticality, knowledge intensity, and diverse error patterns. Without a reliable medical PRM evaluation framework, we cannot quantify models' error detection capabilities in clinical reasoning, leaving their safety in real-world healthcare applications unverified. We propose MedPRMBench, the first process-level reward model benchmark for the medical domain. Built through a three-phase pipeline based on Clinical Reasoning Blueprints (CRBs), MedPRMBench systematically generates high-quality evaluation data from seven medical QA sources, covering 14 fine-grained error types across three categories (Simplicity, Soundness, and Sensitivity) with the first 4-level severity grading system to quantify clinical impact. The benchmark comprises 6{,}500 questions with 13{,}000 reasoning chains and 113{,}910 step-level labels, plus 6{,}879 questions for training. Our medical PRM baseline achieves an 87.1\% overall PRMScore -- substantially surpassing all baselines -- and serves as a plug-and-play verifier that improves downstream medical QA accuracy by 3.2--6.7 percentage points. Systematic evaluation spanning proprietary frontier models, open-source reasoning models, and medical-specialized models reveals critical weaknesses in current models' medical reasoning error detection capabilities, providing clear directions for future PRM improvement.

AI.tldr: MedPRMBench是首个医学领域过程级奖励模型基准，通过临床推理蓝图生成高质量评估数据，涵盖14种错误类型和4级严重度分级，显著提升医学QA准确性。
AI.motivation: 现有PRM基准仅覆盖数学等通用领域，无法满足医学推理的安全性、知识密集性和错误模式多样性需求，缺乏可靠的医学PRM评估框架来验证临床推理中的错误检测能力。
AI.method: 基于临床推理蓝图的三阶段流程，从7个医学QA来源系统生成高质量评估数据，涵盖14种细粒度错误类型（简洁性、合理性、敏感性）和4级严重度分级系统。
AI.result: 基准包含6,500个问题、13,000个推理链和113,910个步骤级标签，医学PRM基线达到87.1%的PRMScore，作为即插即用验证器将下游医学QA准确率提升3.2-6.7个百分点。
AI.conclusion: MedPRMBench揭示了当前模型在医学推理错误检测能力上的关键弱点，为未来PRM改进提供了明确方向，是首个系统评估医学过程级奖励模型的基准。

title: BOIL: Learning Environment Personalized Information
summary: Navigating complex environments poses challenges for multi-agent systems, requiring efficient extraction of insights from limited information. In this paper, we introduce the Blackbox Oracle Information Learning (BOIL) process, a scalable solution for extracting valuable insights from the environment structure. Leveraging the Pagerank algorithm and common information maximization, BOIL facilitates the extraction of information to guide long-term agent behavior applicable to problems such as coverage, patrolling, and stochastic reachability. Through experiments, we demonstrate the efficacy of BOIL in generating strategy distributions conducive to improved performance over extended time horizons, surpassing heuristic approaches in complex environments.

AI.tldr: BOIL方法通过PageRank算法和共同信息最大化，从环境结构中提取有价值信息，指导多智能体在复杂环境中的长期行为
AI.motivation: 多智能体系统在复杂环境中导航面临挑战，需要从有限信息中高效提取洞察。现有方法在处理覆盖、巡逻和随机可达性等问题时，难以有效指导长期行为
AI.method: 提出黑盒预言机信息学习（BOIL）过程，结合PageRank算法和共同信息最大化，从环境结构中提取有价值信息，指导智能体的长期行为策略
AI.result: 实验证明BOIL能生成有利于长期性能提升的策略分布，在复杂环境中超越启发式方法
AI.conclusion: BOIL为多智能体系统在复杂环境中的导航问题提供了可扩展的解决方案，能够有效提取环境结构信息并指导长期行为

title: Poly-EPO: Training Exploratory Reasoning Models
summary: Exploration is a cornerstone of learning from experience: it enables agents to find solutions to complex problems, generalize to novel ones, and scale performance with test-time compute. In this paper, we present a framework for post-training language models (LMs) that explicitly encourages optimistic exploration and promotes a synergy between exploration and exploitation. The central idea is to train the LM to generate sets of responses that are collectively accurate under the reward function and exploratory in their reasoning strategies. We first develop a general recipe for optimizing LMs with set reinforcement learning (set RL) under arbitrary objective functions, showing how standard RL algorithms can be adapted to this setting through a modification to the advantage computation. We then propose Polychromic Exploratory Policy Optimization (Poly-EPO), which instantiates this framework with an objective that explicitly synergizes exploration and exploitation. Across a range of reasoning benchmarks, we show that Poly-EPO improves generalization, as evidenced by higher pass@$k$ coverage, preserves greater diversity in model generations, and effectively scales with test-time compute.

AI.tldr: 提出Poly-EPO框架，通过集合强化学习训练语言模型生成既准确又具有探索性的响应集合，实现探索与利用的协同
AI.motivation: 探索是从经验中学习的关键，能帮助智能体找到复杂问题的解决方案、推广到新问题，并随着测试时计算资源的增加而扩展性能。当前语言模型在推理任务中缺乏有效的探索机制。
AI.method: 提出集合强化学习框架，通过修改优势计算将标准RL算法适配到集合设置。具体提出Polychromic Exploratory Policy Optimization (Poly-EPO)，训练语言模型生成在奖励函数下集体准确且在推理策略上具有探索性的响应集合。
AI.result: 在多个推理基准测试中，Poly-EPO提高了泛化能力（表现为更高的pass@k覆盖率），保持了更大的生成多样性，并能有效利用测试时计算资源进行扩展。
AI.conclusion: Poly-EPO框架成功地将探索与利用相结合，通过集合强化学习训练语言模型，在推理任务中实现了更好的泛化、多样性和计算扩展性。

title: HorizonBench: Long-Horizon Personalization with Evolving Preferences
summary: User preferences evolve across months of interaction, and tracking them requires inferring when a stated preference has been changed by a subsequent life event. We define this problem as long-horizon personalization and observe that progress on it is limited by data availability and measurement, with no existing resource providing both naturalistic long-horizon interactions and the ground-truth provenance needed to diagnose why models fail. We introduce a data generator that produces conversations from a structured mental state graph, yielding ground-truth provenance for every preference change across 6-month timelines, and from it construct HorizonBench, a benchmark of 4,245 items from 360 simulated users with 6-month conversation histories averaging ~4,300 turns and ~163K tokens. HorizonBench provides a testbed for long-context modeling, memory-augmented architectures, theory-of-mind reasoning, and user modeling. Across 25 frontier models, the best model reaches 52.8% and most score at or below the 20% chance baseline. When these models err on evolved preferences, over a third of the time they select the user's originally stated value without tracking the updated user state. This belief-update failure persists across context lengths and expression explicitness levels, identifying state-tracking capability as the primary bottleneck for long-horizon personalization.

AI.tldr: 论文提出了HorizonBench基准测试，用于评估AI模型在长期个性化对话中跟踪用户偏好演变的能力，发现现有模型在状态跟踪方面存在严重瓶颈。
AI.motivation: 用户偏好会随时间演变，现有研究缺乏包含长期自然交互和真实偏好演变溯源的数据资源，限制了长期个性化问题的进展。
AI.method: 开发了一个数据生成器，从结构化心理状态图生成对话，构建了HorizonBench基准测试，包含360个模拟用户的6个月对话历史，共4,245个项目。
AI.result: 测试25个前沿模型，最佳模型准确率仅52.8%，多数模型在或低于20%的随机基线。模型错误时，超过三分之一的情况选择了用户最初声明的值而非更新后的状态。
AI.conclusion: 状态跟踪能力是长期个性化的主要瓶颈，这种信念更新失败在不同上下文长度和表达明确性水平上持续存在，需要改进模型的状态跟踪机制。

title: SeekerGym: A Benchmark for Reliable Information Seeking
summary: Despite their substantial successes, AI agents continue to face fundamental challenges in terms of trustworthiness. Consider deep research agents, tasked with searching for information relevant to a given topic-while AI agents can perform effective information retrieval, there is little guarantee regarding the completeness of this information. Gaps in retrieved information can leave biases that mislead users even if the information they are given is correct and relevant. We introduce SeekerGym, a benchmark designed to evaluate the completeness of information retrieved by AI agents. In addition, SeekerGym also measures how well agents quantify their uncertainty in the completeness of their information; if an agent fails to retrieve all relevant information, it is useful for it to at least quantify how much might be missing. At a high level, each task in SeekerGym is a document (e.g., a Wikipedia article), and the AI agent must issue queries to retrieve passages from that document. Intuitively, the document comprehensively covers a topic, so the ability to retrieve its sections directly measures completeness of information retrieval. In addition to Wikipedia, we also consider machine learning survey papers, where the goal is to retrieve relevant sections of a survey paper. We benchmark several models and algorithms; the best approaches retrieve 42.5% of passages on Wikipedia and 29.2% on ML Surveys, leaving substantial room for improvement.

AI.tldr: SeekerGym是一个评估AI代理信息检索完整性的基准测试，通过让代理从文档中检索段落来衡量信息完整性，并评估代理对其信息完整性的不确定性量化能力。
AI.motivation: 尽管AI代理取得了显著成功，但在可信度方面仍面临基本挑战。特别是深度研究代理在信息检索时，虽然能有效检索信息，但无法保证信息的完整性。信息检索的空白可能导致偏见，即使提供的信息正确且相关，也可能误导用户。
AI.method: SeekerGym基准测试中，每个任务是一个文档（如维基百科文章），AI代理必须通过查询从该文档中检索段落。文档全面涵盖某个主题，因此检索其章节的能力直接衡量信息检索的完整性。除了维基百科，还考虑了机器学习综述论文，目标是检索综述论文的相关章节。
AI.result: 对多种模型和算法进行了基准测试：最佳方法在维基百科上检索到42.5%的段落，在机器学习综述上检索到29.2%的段落，表明仍有很大的改进空间。
AI.conclusion: SeekerGym为评估AI代理信息检索的完整性提供了一个基准测试框架，同时还能测量代理对其信息完整性的不确定性量化能力。当前最佳方法的性能表明，在确保信息检索完整性方面仍有显著改进空间。

title: Semantic Entanglement in Vector-Based Retrieval: A Formal Framework and Context-Conditioned Disentanglement Pipeline for Agentic RAG Systems
summary: Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) systems depend on the geometric properties of vector representations to retrieve contextually appropriate evidence. When source documents interleave multiple topics within contiguous text, standard vectorization produces embedding spaces in which semantically distinct content occupies overlapping neighborhoods. We term this condition semantic entanglement. We formalize entanglement as a model-relative measure of cross-topic overlap in embedding space and define an Entanglement Index (EI) as a quantitative proxy. We argue that higher EI constrains attainable Top-K retrieval precision under cosine similarity retrieval. To address this, we introduce the Semantic Disentanglement Pipeline (SDP), a four-stage preprocessing framework that restructures documents prior to embedding. We further propose context-conditioned preprocessing, in which document structure is shaped by patterns of operational use, and a continuous feedback mechanism that adapts document structure based on agent performance. We evaluate SDP on a real-world enterprise healthcare knowledge base comprising over 2,000 documents across approximately 25 sub-domains. Top-K retrieval precision improves from approximately 32% under fixed-token chunking to approximately 82% under SDP, while mean EI decreases from 0.71 to 0.14. We do not claim that entanglement fully explains RAG failure, but that it captures a distinct preprocessing failure mode that downstream optimization cannot reliably correct once encoded into the vector space.

AI.tldr: 本文提出语义纠缠概念，量化嵌入空间中不同主题内容的重叠问题，并开发语义解纠缠管道(SDP)来预处理文档，显著提升RAG系统的检索精度。
AI.motivation: 当源文档在连续文本中交织多个主题时，标准向量化会产生语义纠缠问题，即语义不同的内容在嵌入空间中占据重叠区域，这会限制RAG系统的检索精度。
AI.method: 1) 形式化语义纠缠为模型相关的跨主题重叠度量，定义纠缠指数(EI)；2) 提出语义解纠缠管道(SDP)，四阶段预处理框架，在嵌入前重构文档；3) 引入上下文条件预处理和基于代理性能的连续反馈机制。
AI.result: 在包含2000+文档、25+子领域的真实企业医疗知识库上评估，Top-K检索精度从固定令牌分块约32%提升到SDP约82%，平均EI从0.71降至0.14。
AI.conclusion: 语义纠缠捕获了RAG系统中独特的预处理失败模式，一旦编码到向量空间，下游优化无法可靠纠正。SDP通过预处理解决此问题，显著提升检索性能。

title: Probabilistic Programs of Thought
summary: LLMs are widely used for code generation and mathematical reasoning tasks where they are required to generate structured output. They either need to reason about code, generate code for a given specification, or reason using programs of thought. The typical approach to code generation is to prompt the model and generate samples until an appropriate program is obtained. Within this process, sampling $n$ programs from the language model requires $n$ GPU compute-intensive generations which becomes prohibitively expensive for larger values of $n$. In this work, we address this limitation by exposing the LLM's distribution within the generated programs themselves. We propose a novel test-time framework we dub probabilistic programs of thought to obtain more samples from the model with fewer LLM generations. Given a program generated by a model and the associated next-token probabilities, we build a probabilistic program that compactly represents exponentially many deterministic programs. Since performing probabilistic reasoning in this probabilistic program is much cheaper, our approach allows sampling new programs without any additional GPU compute and little CPU overhead. We instantiate our approach on benchmarks for code generation, code understanding and mathematical reasoning and report improvements in performance with fewer generations from the LLM.

AI.tldr: 提出"概率思维程序"框架，通过构建概率程序来紧凑表示指数级数量的确定性程序，从而减少LLM生成次数，降低GPU计算成本
AI.motivation: LLM在代码生成和数学推理任务中需要生成结构化输出，传统方法需要多次采样，每次采样都需要GPU计算，当n较大时计算成本过高
AI.method: 提出概率思维程序框架：利用LLM生成的程序及其下一个token的概率分布，构建一个紧凑表示指数级数量确定性程序的概率程序，通过概率推理而非额外LLM生成来获取新样本
AI.result: 在代码生成、代码理解和数学推理基准测试中，该方法在减少LLM生成次数的情况下提高了性能
AI.conclusion: 提出的概率思维程序框架能够显著降低代码生成和推理任务的GPU计算成本，通过概率程序紧凑表示大量确定性程序，实现更高效的采样

title: Uncertainty Quantification in PINNs for Turbulent Flows: Bayesian Inference and Repulsive Ensembles
summary: Physics-informed neural networks (PINNs) have emerged as a promising framework for solving inverse problems governed by partial differential equations (PDEs), including the reconstruction of turbulent flow fields from sparse data. However, most existing PINN formulations are deterministic and do not provide reliable quantification of epistemic uncertainty, which is critical for ill-posed problems such as data-driven Reynolds-averaged Navier-Stokes (RANS) modeling. In this work, we develop and systematically evaluate a set of probabilistic extensions of PINNs for uncertainty quantification in turbulence modeling. The proposed framework combines (i) Bayesian PINNs with Hamiltonian Monte Carlo sampling and a tempered multi-component likelihood, (ii) Monte Carlo dropout, and (iii) repulsive deep ensembles that enforce diversity in function space. Particular emphasis is placed on the role of ensemble diversity and likelihood tempering in improving uncertainty calibration for PDE-constrained inverse problems. The methods are assessed on a hierarchy of test cases, including the Van der Pol oscillator and turbulent flow past a circular cylinder at Reynolds numbers Re=3,900 (direct numerical simulation data) and Re = 10,000 (experimental particle image velocimetry data). The results demonstrate that Bayesian PINNs provide the most consistent uncertainty estimates across all inferred quantities, while function-space repulsive ensembles offer a computationally efficient approximation with competitive accuracy for primary flow variables. These findings provide quantitative insight into the trade-offs between accuracy, computational cost, and uncertainty calibration in physics-informed learning, and offer practical guidance for uncertainty quantification in data-driven turbulence modeling.

AI.tldr: 提出并系统评估了三种概率性PINN扩展方法，用于湍流建模中的不确定性量化，包括贝叶斯PINN、蒙特卡洛dropout和排斥性深度集成，在多个测试案例中验证了其有效性。
AI.motivation: 传统PINN方法通常是确定性的，无法可靠量化认知不确定性，这在数据驱动的RANS建模等不适定问题中至关重要。需要开发能够提供可靠不确定性量化的概率性PINN框架。
AI.method: 提出了三种概率性PINN扩展方法：1）基于哈密顿蒙特卡洛采样和温度调节多分量似然的贝叶斯PINN；2）蒙特卡洛dropout；3）在函数空间中强制多样性的排斥性深度集成。特别关注集成多样性和似然温度调节在改善PDE约束逆问题不确定性校准中的作用。
AI.result: 在Van der Pol振荡器和圆柱绕流（Re=3,900的DNS数据和Re=10,000的PIV实验数据）等测试案例中，贝叶斯PINN在所有推断量上提供了最一致的不确定性估计，而函数空间排斥性集成在计算效率上具有优势，对主要流动变量的预测精度具有竞争力。
AI.conclusion: 研究为物理信息学习中准确性、计算成本和不确定性校准之间的权衡提供了定量见解，并为数据驱动湍流建模中的不确定性量化提供了实用指导。贝叶斯PINN提供最可靠的不确定性估计，而排斥性集成在计算效率和精度之间提供了良好平衡。

title: Stratagem: Learning Transferable Reasoning via Trajectory-Modulated Game Self-Play
summary: Games offer a compelling paradigm for developing general reasoning capabilities in language models, as they naturally demand strategic planning, probabilistic inference, and adaptive decision-making. However, existing self-play approaches rely solely on terminal game outcomes, providing no mechanism to distinguish transferable reasoning patterns from game-specific heuristics. We present STRATAGEM, which addresses two fundamental barriers to reasoning transfer: domain specificity, where learned patterns remain anchored in game semantics, and contextual stasis, where static game contexts fail to cultivate progressive reasoning. STRATAGEM selectively reinforces trajectories exhibiting abstract, domain-agnostic reasoning through a Reasoning Transferability Coefficient, while incentivizing adaptive reasoning development via a Reasoning Evolution Reward. Experiments across mathematical reasoning, general reasoning, and code generation benchmarks demonstrate substantial improvements, with particularly strong gains on competition-level mathematics where multi-step reasoning is critical. Ablation studies and human evaluation confirm that both components contribute to transferable reasoning.

AI.tldr: STRATAGEM提出了一种新的自博弈方法，通过选择性强化抽象推理轨迹和激励适应性推理发展，解决现有方法在推理迁移中的领域特定性和上下文静态问题。
AI.motivation: 现有自博弈方法仅依赖游戏最终结果，无法区分可迁移的推理模式和游戏特定启发式方法。游戏为语言模型发展通用推理能力提供了有前景的范式，但需要解决推理迁移的两个基本障碍：领域特定性和上下文静态性。
AI.method: STRATAGEM包含两个核心组件：1) 通过推理可迁移性系数选择性强化展示抽象、领域无关推理的轨迹；2) 通过推理演化奖励激励适应性推理发展。该方法旨在培养可迁移的推理模式而非游戏特定启发式。
AI.result: 在数学推理、通用推理和代码生成基准测试中表现出显著改进，特别是在需要多步推理的竞赛级数学问题上获得强劲提升。消融研究和人工评估确认两个组件都对可迁移推理有贡献。
AI.conclusion: STRATAGEM通过解决推理迁移中的领域特定性和上下文静态性问题，成功培养了语言模型中的可迁移推理能力，为通过游戏范式发展通用推理提供了有效方法。

title: Beyond "I Don't Know": Evaluating LLM Self-Awareness in Discriminating Data and Model Uncertainty
summary: Reliable Large Language Models (LLMs) should abstain when confidence is insufficient. However, prior studies often treat refusal as a generic "I don't know'', failing to distinguish input-level ambiguity (data uncertainty) from capability limitations (model uncertainty). This lack of distinction limits downstream action decisions like requesting clarification or invoking external tools. In this work, we introduce UA-Bench, a benchmark of over 3,500 questions drawn from six datasets spanning knowledge-intensive and reasoning-intensive tasks, designed to evaluate explicit uncertainty attribution. An evaluation of 18 frontier LLMs shows that even state-of-the-art models struggle to reliably discriminate between data uncertainty and model uncertainty, and that high answer accuracy does not necessarily imply strong uncertainty attribution ability. To narrow this gap, we propose a lightweight data synthesis and reinforcement learning strategy. Experiments on both Qwen3-4B-Instruct-2507 and Qwen3-8B in thinking mode show that the proposed method improves uncertainty attribution while preserving answer accuracy. Our code and data are publicly available now.

AI.tldr: 论文提出UA-Bench基准，用于评估LLM区分数据不确定性和模型不确定性的能力，并开发了轻量级数据合成和强化学习方法来提升不确定性归因能力。
AI.motivation: 现有LLM拒绝回答时通常使用通用的"我不知道"，未能区分输入层面的模糊性（数据不确定性）和能力限制（模型不确定性），这限制了后续行动决策如请求澄清或调用外部工具。
AI.method: 1) 构建UA-Bench基准，包含来自6个数据集的3500多个问题，涵盖知识密集型和推理密集型任务；2) 提出轻量级数据合成和强化学习策略来提升不确定性归因能力。
