We are also working with contextualized data instead of isolated words or sentences. Our methodology applies to textual productions in any genre, encompassing narrative, task-oriented or dialogic. Contextualized data are generated using controlled combinations of situational scenarios and group markers, creating minimal pairs of texts that differ only in the referenced group while maintaining comparable narrative conditions. To facilitate robust analysis, linguistic forms are generalized and associations between linguistic abstractions and groups are quantified using a variant of pointwise mutual information to detect expressions that appear disproportionately across groups. A fragment-ranking strategy then prioritizes text segments with a high concentration of biased linguistic signals, which allows for experts to assess the harmful potential of linguistic expressions in context, bridging quantitative analysis and qualitative interpretation.

AI.tldr: 提出一个通过对比合成文本生成和统计分析来发现不同社会群体语言和话语模式的框架，旨在捕捉微妙偏见表达而非依赖预设词汇表
AI.motivation: 现有方法通常依赖预定义的偏见词汇表或孤立文本分析，难以捕捉语境中的微妙偏见表达。需要一种能处理各种文本类型、在真实语境中识别群体相关语言模式的方法
AI.method: 使用情境场景和群体标记的受控组合生成对比合成文本，创建仅群体标记不同但叙事条件可比的最小文本对。通过语言形式泛化和点互信息变体量化语言抽象与群体的关联，采用片段排序策略识别偏见信号集中的文本段
AI.result: 开发了一个系统性的方法论框架，能够生成对比文本、量化语言模式与群体的关联，并识别出偏见表达集中的文本片段，为专家评估提供支持
AI.conclusion: 该框架能够发现语境中的微妙偏见表达，连接定量分析与定性解释，适用于各种文本类型，为偏见检测提供了更细致和上下文敏感的方法

title: Towards a Data-Parameter Correspondence for LLMs: A Preliminary Discussion
summary: Large language model optimization has historically bifurcated into isolated data-centric and model-centric paradigms: the former manipulates involved samples through selection, augmentation, or poisoning, while the latter tunes model weights via masking, quantization, or low-rank adaptation. This paper establishes a unified \emph{data-parameter correspondence} revealing these seemingly disparate operations as dual manifestations of the same geometric structure on the statistical manifold $\mathcal{M}$. Grounded in the Fisher-Rao metric $g_{ij}(θ)$ and Legendre duality between natural ($θ$) and expectation ($η$) parameters, we identify three fundamental correspondences spanning the model lifecycle: 1. Geometric correspondence: data pruning and parameter sparsification equivalently reduce manifold volume via dual coordinate constraints; 2. Low-rank correspondence: in-context learning (ICL) and LoRA adaptation explore identical subspaces on the Grassmannian $\mathcal{G}(r,d)$, with $k$-shot samples geometrically equivalent to rank-$r$ updates; 3. Security-privacy correspondence: adversarial attacks exhibit cooperative amplification between data poisoning and parameter backdoors, whereas protective mechanisms follow cascading attenuation where data compression multiplicatively enhances parameter privacy. Extending from training through post-training compression to inference, this framework provides mathematical formalization for cross-community methodology transfer, demonstrating that cooperative optimization integrating data and parameter modalities may outperform isolated approaches across efficiency, robustness, and privacy dimensions.

AI.tldr: 该论文提出了一个统一的"数据-参数对应"框架，揭示数据操作和模型操作在统计流形上的几何对偶性，为LLM优化提供数学基础。
AI.motivation: 传统LLM优化分为数据中心和模型中心两个孤立范式，缺乏统一的理论框架。作者希望建立数学基础来揭示这两种看似不同的操作实际上是统计流形上的几何对偶表现。
AI.method: 基于Fisher-Rao度量和自然参数与期望参数之间的Legendre对偶，在统计流形M上建立数据-参数对应关系。提出了三个基本对应：几何对应（数据剪枝与参数稀疏化）、低秩对应（ICL与LoRA）、安全隐私对应（对抗攻击与保护机制）。
AI.result: 建立了统一的数学框架，证明数据操作和参数操作在统计流形上是几何对偶的。该框架为跨社区方法转移提供数学形式化，表明数据与参数模态的协同优化在效率、鲁棒性和隐私维度上可能优于孤立方法。
AI.conclusion: 数据中心和模型中心的LLM优化实际上是统计流形上的几何对偶操作。统一的数学框架揭示了它们的内在联系，为协同优化提供了理论基础，有望在训练、压缩和推理全生命周期中实现更好的性能。

title: A Sugeno Integral View of Binarized Neural Network Inference
summary: In this article, we establish a precise connection between binarized neural networks (BNNs) and Sugeno integrals. The advantage of the Sugeno integral is that it provides a framework for representing the importance of inputs and their interactions, while being equivalent to a set of if-then rules. For a hidden BNN neuron at inference time, we show that the activation threshold test can be written as a Sugeno integral on binary inputs. This yields an explicit set-function representation of each neuron decision, and an associated rule-based representation. We also provide a Sugeno-integral expression for the last-layer score. Finally, we discuss how the same framework can be adapted to support richer input interactions and how it can be extended beyond the binary case induced by binarized neural networks.

AI.tldr: 论文建立了二值化神经网络(BNNs)与Sugeno积分之间的精确联系，揭示了BNN神经元决策可以用Sugeno积分表示，从而获得明确的集合函数表示和规则表示。
AI.motivation: Sugeno积分提供了表示输入重要性和交互作用的框架，并且等价于一组if-then规则。研究希望利用这一优势来理解和解释二值化神经网络的决策过程。
AI.method: 证明在推理时，隐藏BNN神经元的激活阈值测试可以写成二进制输入上的Sugeno积分，从而得到每个神经元决策的显式集合函数表示和关联的规则表示。同时提供了最后一层得分的Sugeno积分表达式。
AI.result: 成功建立了BNNs与Sugeno积分之间的精确对应关系，获得了BNN神经元决策的显式数学表示，并展示了如何将这一框架扩展到更丰富的输入交互和超越二值化的情况。
AI.conclusion: 该研究为理解二值化神经网络提供了新的理论框架，通过Sugeno积分连接了神经网络和基于规则的表示，为神经网络的可解释性提供了新的途径，并展示了该框架的扩展潜力。

title: DuConTE: Dual-Granularity Text Encoder with Topology-Constrained Attention for Text-attributed Graphs
summary: Text-attributed graphs integrate semantic information of node texts with topological structure, offering significant value in various applications such as document classification and information extraction. Existing approaches typically encode textual content using language models (LMs), followed by graph neural networks (GNNs) to process structural information. However, during the LM-based text encoding phase, most methods not only perform semantic interaction solely at the word-token granularity, but also neglect the structural dependencies among texts from different nodes. In this work, we propose DuConTE, a dual-granularity text encoder with topology-constrained attention. The model employs a cascaded architecture of two pretrained LMs, encoding semantics first at the word-token granularity and then at the node granularity. During the self-attention computation in each LM, we dynamically adjust the attention mask matrix based on node connectivity, guiding the model to learn semantic correlations informed by the graph structure. Furthermore, when composing node representations from word-token embeddings, we separately evaluate the importance of tokens under the center-node context and the neighborhood context, enabling the capture of more contextually relevant semantic information. Extensive experiments on multiple benchmark datasets demonstrate that DuConTE achieves state-of-the-art performance on the majority of them.

AI.tldr: DuConTE：一种双粒度文本编码器，通过拓扑约束注意力机制在文本属性图上实现更好的语义表示学习
AI.motivation: 现有方法在文本属性图处理中存在两个主要问题：1）仅基于词粒度进行语义交互；2）忽略不同节点文本之间的结构依赖关系。这限制了模型对图结构和文本语义的联合理解能力。
AI.method: 提出双粒度文本编码器DuConTE，采用两个预训练语言模型的级联架构：先在词粒度编码语义，然后在节点粒度编码。在自注意力计算中，根据节点连接性动态调整注意力掩码矩阵，使模型学习图结构引导的语义相关性。在从词嵌入组合节点表示时，分别评估中心节点上下文和邻居上下文中词的重要性。
AI.result: 在多个基准数据集上的实验表明，DuConTE在大多数数据集上达到了最先进的性能。
AI.conclusion: DuConTE通过双粒度编码和拓扑约束注意力机制，有效解决了文本属性图中语义与结构信息融合的问题，显著提升了模型性能。

title: Back to Repair: A Minimal Denoising Network\ for Time Series Anomaly Detection
summary: We introduce JuRe (Just Repair), a minimal denoising network for time series anomaly detection that exposes a central finding: architectural complexity is unnecessary when the training objective correctly implements the manifold-projection principle. JuRe consists of a single depthwise-separable convolutional residual block with hidden dimension 128, trained to repair corrupted time series windows and scored at inference by a fixed, parameter-free structural discrepancy function. Despite using no attention, no latent variable, and no adversarial component, JuRe ranks second on the TSB-AD multivariate benchmark (AUC-PR 0.404, 180 series, 17 datasets) and second on the UCR univariate archive by AUC-PR (0.198, 250 series), leading all neural baselines on AUC-PR and VUS-PR. Component ablation on TSB-AD identifies training-time corruption as the dominant factor ($Δ$AUC-PR $= 0.047$ on removal), confirming that the denoising objective, not network capacity, drives detection quality. Pairwise Wilcoxon signed-rank tests establish statistical significance against 21 of 25 baselines on TSB-AD. Code is available at the URL https://github.com/iis-esslingen/JuRe.

AI.tldr: JuRe是一个极简的去噪网络，用于时间序列异常检测，仅使用单个深度可分离卷积残差块，通过修复损坏的时间序列窗口实现检测，在多个基准测试中表现优异。
AI.motivation: 研究发现架构复杂性是不必要的，关键在于训练目标正确实现流形投影原理。现有方法通常使用复杂的架构，但JuRe证明简单的网络结构配合正确的训练目标就能达到优异性能。
AI.method: 使用单个深度可分离卷积残差块（隐藏维度128），训练时修复损坏的时间序列窗口，推理时使用固定的无参数结构差异函数进行评分。不使用注意力机制、潜在变量或对抗组件。
AI.result: 在TSB-AD多变量基准测试中排名第二（AUC-PR 0.404，180个序列，17个数据集），在UCR单变量存档中AUC-PR排名第二（0.198，250个序列），在所有神经基线方法中AUC-PR和VUS-PR领先。消融实验显示训练时损坏是主要影响因素。
AI.conclusion: 架构复杂性对时间序列异常检测不是必需的，关键是通过去噪目标实现流形投影原理。简单的网络结构配合正确的训练目标就能达到甚至超越复杂架构的性能。

title: From Fallback to Frontline: When Can LLMs be Superior Annotators of Human Perspectives?
summary: Although large language models (LLMs) are increasingly used as annotators at scale, they are typically treated as a pragmatic fallback rather than a faithful estimator of human perspectives. This work challenges that presumption. By framing perspective-taking as the estimation of a latent group-level judgment, we characterize the conditions under which modern LLMs can outperform human annotators, including in-group humans, when predicting aggregate subgroup opinions on subjective tasks, and show that these conditions are common in practice. This advantage arises from structural properties of LLMs as estimators, including low variance and reduced coupling between representation and processing biases, rather than any claim of lived experience. Our analysis identifies clear regimes where LLMs act as statistically superior frontline estimators, as well as principled limits where human judgment remains essential. These findings reposition LLMs from a cost-saving compromise to a principled tool for estimating collective human perspectives.

AI.tldr: LLMs可作为优于人类标注者的集体观点估计器，而非仅是成本妥协方案
AI.motivation: 挑战将LLMs仅视为实用替代而非人类观点忠实估计器的普遍假设，探索LLMs在预测群体主观意见方面的潜力
AI.method: 将观点采纳框架化为潜在群体层面判断的估计问题，分析LLMs作为估计器的结构特性（低方差、表示与处理偏差解耦）
AI.result: LLMs在预测子群体聚合意见时能超越人类标注者（包括群体内人类），这种优势源于其结构特性而非生活经验
AI.conclusion: LLMs应重新定位为估计集体人类观点的原则性工具，而非成本妥协方案，同时识别了人类判断仍必要的原则性限制

title: Jupiter-N Technical Report
summary: We present Jupiter-N, a hybrid reasoning model post-trained from Nemotron 3 Super, a fully open-source 120 billion parameter LLM. We target three objectives: (1) agentic capability via uncertainty-curated trajectories; (2) UK cultural alignment via synthetic data grounded in cultural norms; and (3) Welsh language support via parallel corpora and LLM-translated Welsh conversations. Our data curation strategy carefully preserves the base model's capabilities: using our Forget-Me-Not framework, we mix on-policy synthetic replay with off-policy task data to mitigate catastrophic forgetting, and include a mixture of reasoning and non-reasoning traces to maintain Nemotron's hybrid reasoning ability. Jupiter-N achieves standout gains over Nemotron in Welsh (+18 on ARC-Easy, +5.25 on MMLU-Lite), terminal-use (+9.1 on Terminal Bench 2) and instruction following (+4.4 on IFBench), while retaining the base model capabilities. We frame this work as a reproducible template for sovereign post-training: substituting cultural knowledge, institutional corpora, and target languages produces an equivalent pipeline for any country. All model weights and all post-training datasets are publicly released under open licences.

AI.tldr: Jupiter-N是基于Nemotron 3 Super的1200亿参数开源大模型，通过混合训练方法提升代理能力、英国文化对齐和威尔士语支持，同时防止灾难性遗忘。
AI.motivation: 开发一个能够同时具备代理能力、特定文化对齐（英国文化）和少数语言支持（威尔士语）的混合推理模型，同时保持基础模型能力不退化。
AI.method: 使用Forget-Me-Not框架，混合策略内合成回放和策略外任务数据来防止灾难性遗忘；通过不确定性引导的轨迹提升代理能力；使用基于文化规范的合成数据进行文化对齐；通过平行语料库和LLM翻译的威尔士语对话支持威尔士语。
AI.result: 在威尔士语任务上显著提升（ARC-Easy +18，MMLU-Lite +5.25），终端使用能力提升（Terminal Bench 2 +9.1），指令跟随能力提升（IFBench +4.4），同时保持了基础模型能力。
AI.conclusion: Jupiter-N提供了一个可复制的后训练模板，通过替换文化知识、机构语料和目标语言，可以为任何国家创建类似的管道。所有模型权重和训练数据都已开源发布。

title: On the Generalization Bounds of Symbolic Regression with Genetic Programming
summary: Symbolic regression (SR) with genetic programming (GP) aims to discover interpretable mathematical expressions directly from data. Despite its strong empirical success, the theoretical understanding of why GP-based SR generalizes beyond the training data remains limited. In this work, we provide a learning-theoretic analysis of SR models represented as expression trees. We derive a generalization bound for GP-style SR under constraints on tree size, depth, and learnable constants. Our result decomposes the generalization gap into two interpretable components: a structure-selection term, reflecting the combinatorial complexity of choosing an expression-tree structure, and a constant-fitting term, capturing the complexity of optimizing numerical constants within a fixed structure. This decomposition provides a theoretical perspective on several widely used practices in GP, including parsimony pressure, depth limits, numerically stable operators, and interval arithmetic. In particular, our analysis shows how structural restrictions reduce hypothesis-class growth while stability mechanisms control the sensitivity of predictions to parameter perturbations. By linking these practical design choices to explicit complexity terms in the generalization bound, our work offers a principled explanation for commonly observed empirical behaviors in GP-based SR and contributes towards a more rigorous understanding of its generalization properties.

AI.tldr: 该论文为基于遗传编程的符号回归提供了学习理论分析，推导了表达式树模型在树大小、深度和可学习常数约束下的泛化界，将泛化差距分解为结构选择项和常数拟合项，解释了GP实践中常用技术（如简约压力、深度限制等）的理论基础。
AI.motivation: 尽管基于遗传编程的符号回归在实证上取得了成功，但其为何能在训练数据之外泛化的理论理解仍然有限。作者旨在为表达式树表示的SR模型提供学习理论分析，从理论上解释GP实践中的常见设计选择。
AI.method: 作者对GP风格的符号回归进行学习理论分析，推导了在树大小、深度和可学习常数约束下的泛化界。该界将泛化差距分解为两个可解释的组成部分：结构选择项（反映选择表达式树结构的组合复杂性）和常数拟合项（捕捉在固定结构中优化数值常数的复杂性）。
AI.result: 分析结果表明，结构限制（如简约压力和深度限制）减少了假设类的增长，而稳定性机制（如数值稳定算子和区间算术）控制了预测对参数扰动的敏感性。该理论为GP实践中广泛使用的技术提供了原则性解释。
AI.conclusion: 该工作通过将GP实践中的设计选择与泛化界中的显式复杂性项联系起来，为基于GP的符号回归的常见经验行为提供了原则性解释，并为其泛化特性提供了更严格的理论理解。

title: AIT Academy: Cultivating the Complete Agent with a Confucian Three-Domain Curriculum
summary:
What does it mean to give an AI agent a complete education? Current agent development produces specialists systems optimized for a single capability dimension, whether tool use, code generation, or security awareness that exhibit predictable deficits wherever they were not trained. We argue this pattern reflects a structural absence: there is no curriculum theory for agents, no principled account of what a fully developed agent should know, be, and be able to do across the full scope of intelligent behavior.
  This paper introduces the AIT Academy (Agents Institute of Technology Academy), a curriculum framework for cultivating AI agents across the tripartite structure of human knowledge. Grounded in Kagan's Three Cultures and UNESCO ISCED-F 2013, AIT organizes agent capability development into three domains: Natural Science and Technical Reasoning (Domain I), Humanities and Creative Expression (Domain II), and Social Science and Ethical Reasoning (Domain III). The Confucian Six Arts (liuyi) a 2,500-year-old holistic education system are reinterpreted as behavioral archetypes that map directly onto trainable agent capabilities within each domain.
  Three representative training grounds instantiate the framework across multiple backbone LLMs: the ClawdGO Security Dojo (Domain I), Athen's Academy (Domain II), and the Alt Mirage Stage (Domain III). Experiments demonstrate a 15.9-point improvement in security capability scores under weakest-first curriculum scheduling, and a 7-percentage-point gain in social reasoning performance under principled attribution modeling. A cross-domain finding Security Awareness Calibration Pathology (SACP), in which over-trained Domain I agents fail on out-of-distribution evaluation illustrates the diagnostic value of a multi-domain perspective unavailable to any single-domain framework.

AI.tldr: 论文提出AIT Academy框架，将AI智能体教育分为自然科学与技术推理、人文与创意表达、社会科学与伦理推理三大领域，借鉴孔子六艺作为行为原型，通过三个训练场验证了多领域教育的有效性。
AI.motivation: 当前AI智能体开发专注于单一能力维度（如工具使用、代码生成、安全意识），导致在其他未训练领域存在可预测的缺陷。缺乏关于智能体全面发展的课程理论，即智能体应该知道什么、成为什么、能够做什么的完整框架。
AI.method: 基于Kagan的三种文化和UNESCO ISCED-F 2013，将智能体能力发展组织为三个领域：自然科学与技术推理、人文与创意表达、社会科学与伦理推理。重新诠释孔子六艺作为可训练的行为原型。通过三个代表性训练场（ClawdGO Security Dojo、Athen's Academy、Alt Mirage Stage）在不同骨干LLM上实例化该框架。
AI.result: 实验显示：在弱项优先课程安排下，安全能力得分提高15.9分；在原则性归因建模下，社会推理性能提升7个百分点。发现跨领域现象"安全意识校准病理学"（SACP），即过度训练领域I的智能体在分布外评估中失败，这显示了多领域视角的诊断价值。
AI.conclusion: AIT Academy框架为AI智能体提供了全面的教育课程理论，通过多领域能力发展避免了单一领域训练的局限性，孔子六艺的重新诠释为智能体能力发展提供了行为原型，多领域视角能够诊断出单一领域框架无法发现的问题。

title: Self-Consistency from Only Two Samples: CoT-PoT Ensembling for Efficient LLM Reasoning
comment: 9 pages, 3 figures; accepted to Findings of ACL 2026
summary: Self-consistency (SC) is a popular technique for improving the reasoning accuracy of large language models by aggregating multiple sampled outputs, but it comes at a high computational cost due to extensive sampling. We introduce a hybrid ensembling approach that leverages the complementary strengths of two distinct modes of reasoning: Chain-of-Thought (CoT) and Program-of-Thought (PoT). We describe a general framework for combining these two forms of reasoning in self-consistency, as well as particular strategies for both full sampling and early-stopping. We show that CoT-PoT ensembling not only improves overall accuracy, but also drastically reduces the number of samples required for SC by a factor of 9.3x. In particular, the majority of tasks (78.6%) can be addressed with only two samples, which has not been possible with any prior SC methods.

AI.tldr: CoT-PoT混合集成方法通过结合思维链和程序链两种推理模式，在保持自洽性技术准确率的同时，将所需样本数量减少9.3倍，78.6%的任务仅需2个样本即可解决。
AI.motivation: 自洽性技术虽然能提高大语言模型的推理准确率，但需要大量采样导致计算成本高昂。现有方法无法在少量样本下实现高准确率。
AI.method: 提出混合集成框架，结合思维链和程序链两种推理模式的优势。设计了完整的采样策略和提前停止策略，通过两种模式的互补性减少所需样本数量。
AI.result: CoT-PoT集成不仅提高了整体准确率，还将自洽性所需的样本数量减少了9.3倍。78.6%的任务仅需2个样本即可解决，这是以往自洽性方法无法实现的。
AI.conclusion: 混合集成方法通过结合不同推理模式，显著降低了自洽性技术的计算成本，为高效推理提供了新途径。

title: Reward Score Matching: Unifying Reward-based Fine-tuning for Flow and Diffusion Models
summary: Reward-based fine-tuning aims to steer a pretrained diffusion or flow-based generative model toward higher-reward samples while remaining close to the pretrained model. Although existing methods are motivated by different perspectives such as Soft RL, GFlowNets, etc., we show that many can be written under a common framework, which we call reward score matching (RSM). Under this view, alignment becomes score matching toward a reward-guided target, and the main differences across methods reduce to the construction of the value-guidance estimator and the effective optimization strength across timesteps. This unification clarifies the bias--variance--compute tradeoffs of existing designs and distinguishes core optimization components from auxiliary mechanisms that add complexity without clear benefit. Guided by this perspective, we develop simpler redesigns that improve alignment effectiveness and compute efficiency across representative settings with differentiable and black-box rewards. Overall, RSM turns a seemingly fragmented collection of reward-based fine-tuning methods into a smaller, more interpretable, and more actionable design space.

AI.tldr: 该论文提出了奖励分数匹配（RSM）框架，将多种基于奖励的微调方法统一起来，揭示了不同方法在价值引导估计器和时间步优化强度上的差异，并基于此开发了更简单有效的重新设计。
AI.motivation: 现有基于奖励的微调方法（如Soft RL、GFlowNets等）虽然从不同视角出发，但缺乏统一的理论框架。作者希望建立一个通用框架来理解这些方法的本质差异，简化设计空间，并开发更有效的微调方法。
AI.method: 提出了奖励分数匹配（RSM）框架，将对齐问题转化为向奖励引导目标的分数匹配。该框架将不同方法的核心差异归结为价值引导估计器的构建和时间步优化强度的差异。基于此分析，作者开发了简化的重新设计。
AI.result: RSM框架成功统一了多种现有方法，澄清了偏差-方差-计算权衡，区分了核心优化组件和辅助机制。简化的重新设计在可微分和黑盒奖励的代表性设置中提高了对齐效果和计算效率。
AI.conclusion: RSM将看似分散的基于奖励的微调方法转化为更小、更可解释、更可操作的设计空间，为理解和改进这类方法提供了统一的理论基础。

title: SELF-EMO: Emotional Self-Evolution from Recognition to Consistent Expression
summary: Emotion Recognition in Conversation (ERC) has become a fundamental capability for large language models (LLMs) in human-centric interaction. Beyond accurate recognition, coherent emotional expression is also crucial, yet both are limited by the scarcity and static nature of high-quality annotated data. In this work, we propose SELF-EMO, a self-evolution framework grounded in the hypothesis that better emotion prediction leads to more consistent emotional responses. We introduce two auxiliary tasks, emotional understanding and emotional expression, and design a role-based self-play paradigm where the model acts as both an emotion recognizer and a dialogue responder. Through iterative interactions, the model generates diverse conversational trajectories, enabling scalable data generation. To ensure quality, we adopt a data flywheel mechanism that filters candidate predictions and responses using a smoothed IoU-based reward and feeds selected samples back for continuous self-improvement without external supervision. We further develop SELF-GRPO, a reinforcement learning algorithm that stabilizes optimization with multi-label alignment rewards and group-level consistency signals. Experiments on IEMOCAP, MELD, and EmoryNLP show that SELF-EMO achieves state-of-the-art performance, improving accuracy by +6.33% on Qwen3-4B and +8.54% on Qwen3-8B, demonstrating strong effectiveness and generalization.

AI.tldr: SELF-EMO：基于自进化框架的对话情感识别与表达方法，通过角色扮演自生成对话数据，结合强化学习优化，在多个数据集上达到SOTA性能。
AI.motivation: 对话情感识别（ERC）对LLMs至关重要，但高质量标注数据稀缺且静态，限制了准确识别和连贯情感表达的能力。
AI.method: 提出SELF-EMO自进化框架，包含情感理解和情感表达两个辅助任务，采用基于角色的自扮演范式，模型同时扮演情感识别器和对话响应者。通过迭代交互生成多样化对话轨迹，使用数据飞轮机制筛选高质量样本，并开发SELF-GRPO强化学习算法进行优化。
AI.result: 在IEMOCAP、MELD和EmoryNLP数据集上达到最先进性能，Qwen3-4B准确率提升+6.33%，Qwen3-8B提升+8.54%，显示出强大的有效性和泛化能力。
AI.conclusion: SELF-EMO框架通过自进化机制有效解决了ERC任务中数据稀缺问题，实现了无外部监督的持续自我改进，显著提升了对话情感识别和表达的准确性。

title: MoVE: Translating Laughter and Tears via Mixture of Vocalization Experts in Speech-to-Speech Translation
comment: Submitted to Interspeech. Audio Demo and Dataset: https://47zzz.github.io/MoVE/
summary: Recent Speech-to-Speech Translation (S2ST) systems achieve strong semantic accuracy yet consistently strip away non-verbal vocalizations (NVs), such as laughter and crying that convey pragmatic intent, which severely limits real-world utility. We address this via three contributions. First, we propose a synthesis pipeline for building scalable expressive datasets to overcome the data scarcity limitation. Second, we propose MoVE, a Mixture-of-LoRA-Experts architecture with expressive-specialized adapters and a soft-weighting router that blends experts for capturing hybrid expressive states. Third, we show pretrained AudioLLMs enable striking data efficiency: 30 minutes of curated data is enough for strong performance. On English-Chinese S2ST, while comparing with strong baselines, MoVE reproduces target NVs in 76% of cases and achieves the highest human-rated naturalness and emotional fidelity among all compared systems, where existing S2ST systems preserve at most 14% of NVs.

AI.tldr: 论文提出MoVE架构，通过混合LoRA专家和软加权路由器，在语音到语音翻译中保留非语言发声（如笑声、哭声），解决了现有系统语义准确但缺乏表达性的问题。
AI.motivation: 当前语音到语音翻译系统虽然语义准确，但会剥离非语言发声（笑声、哭声等表达语用意图的元素），这严重限制了实际应用价值。
AI.method: 1. 提出可扩展的表达性数据集合成流水线；2. 提出MoVE架构（混合LoRA专家），包含表达性专用适配器和软加权路由器，混合专家以捕捉混合表达状态；3. 利用预训练AudioLLM实现数据高效性。
AI.result: 在英中S2ST任务中，MoVE在76%的情况下能重现目标非语言发声，而现有系统最多只能保留14%。MoVE获得了最高的人类评分自然度和情感保真度。
AI.conclusion: 通过数据合成、MoVE架构和预训练模型的数据高效性，成功解决了语音到语音翻译中非语言发声保留的问题，显著提升了系统的表达性和实用性。

title: TransXion: A High-Fidelity Graph Benchmark for Realistic Anti-Money Laundering
summary: Money laundering poses severe risks to global financial systems, driving the widespread adoption of machine learning for transaction monitoring. However, progress remains stifled by the lack of realistic benchmarks. Existing transaction-graph datasets suffer from two pervasive limitations: (i) they provide sparse node-level semantics beyond anonymized identifiers, and (ii) they rely on template-driven anomaly injection, which biases benchmarks toward static structural motifs and yields overly optimistic assessments of model robustness. We propose TransXion, a benchmark ecosystem for Anti-Money Laundering (AML) research that integrates profile-aware simulation of normal activity with stochastic, non-template synthesis of illicit subgraphs.TransXion jointly models persistent entity profiles and conditional transaction behavior, enabling evaluation of "out-of-character" anomalies where observed activity contradicts an entity's socio-economic context. The resulting dataset comprises approximately 3 million transactions among 50,000 entities, each endowed with rich demographic and behavioral attributes. Empirical analyses show that TransXion reproduces key structural properties of payment networks, including heavy-tailed activity distributions and localized subgraph structure. Across a diverse array of detection models spanning multiple algorithmic paradigms, TransXion yields substantially lower detection performance than widely used benchmarks, demonstrating increased difficulty and realism. TransXion provides a more faithful testbed for developing context-aware and robust AML detection methods. The dataset and code are publicly available at https://github.com/chaos-max/TransXion.

AI.tldr: TransXion是一个反洗钱研究基准生态系统，通过整合配置文件感知的正常活动模拟和随机的非模板化非法子图合成，解决了现有交易图数据集节点语义稀疏和模板驱动异常注入的局限性。
AI.motivation: 现有反洗钱交易图数据集存在两个普遍局限性：1) 节点语义稀疏，仅提供匿名标识符；2) 依赖模板驱动的异常注入，导致基准偏向静态结构模式，对模型鲁棒性评估过于乐观。这阻碍了反洗钱研究的进展。
AI.method: TransXion联合建模持久实体配置文件和条件交易行为，整合配置文件感知的正常活动模拟与随机的非模板化非法子图合成。数据集包含约300万笔交易和5万个实体，每个实体都有丰富的人口统计和行为属性。
AI.result: TransXion重现了支付网络的关键结构特性，包括重尾活动分布和局部子图结构。在多种检测模型上的实验表明，TransXion的检测性能显著低于广泛使用的基准，证明了其更高的难度和真实性。
AI.conclusion: TransXion为开发上下文感知和鲁棒的反洗钱检测方法提供了更真实的测试平台，数据集和代码已公开可用。

title: The Topological Dual of a Dataset: A Logic-to-Topology Encoding for AlphaGeometry-Style Data
summary: AlphaGeometry represents a milestone in neuro-symbolic reasoning, yet its architecture faces a log-linear scaling bottleneck within its symbolic deduction engine that limits its efficiency as problem complexity increases. Recent technical reports suggest that current domain-specific languages may be isomorphic as input representations to natural language, interchanging them acts as a performance-invariant transformation, implying that current neural guidance relies on superficial encodings rather than structural understanding. This paper addresses this representation bottleneck by proposing a logic-to-topology encoding designed to reveal the structural invariants of a model's latent space under a transformation of its input space. By leveraging the Logic of Observation, we utilize the duality between provability in observable theories and topologies to propose a logic-to-topology encoder for the input space. We introduce the concept of the "topological dual of a dataset", a transformation that bridges formal logic, topology, and neural processing. This framework serves as a Rosetta Stone for neuro-symbolic AI, providing a principled pathway for the mechanistic interpretability of how models navigate complex discovery paths.

AI.tldr: 该论文提出了一种逻辑到拓扑的编码方法，通过揭示模型潜在空间在输入空间变换下的结构不变性，来解决神经符号AI中的表示瓶颈问题。
AI.motivation: AlphaGeometry等神经符号推理系统面临符号演绎引擎的对数线性扩展瓶颈，且当前领域特定语言与自然语言同构，神经引导依赖于表面编码而非结构理解。这揭示了表示瓶颈问题。
AI.method: 利用观察逻辑，基于可观测理论中可证性与拓扑的对偶性，提出逻辑到拓扑编码器。引入"数据集的拓扑对偶"概念，连接形式逻辑、拓扑和神经处理。
AI.result: 该框架作为神经符号AI的"罗塞塔石碑"，为模型如何导航复杂发现路径提供了机制可解释性的原则性途径。
AI.conclusion: 通过逻辑到拓扑编码揭示结构不变性，为解决神经符号AI中的表示瓶颈提供了新方法，促进了模型机制可解释性的发展。

title: Answer Only as Precisely as Justified: Calibrated Claim-Level Specificity Control for Agentic Systems
summary: Agentic systems often fail not by being entirely wrong, but by being too precise: a response may be generally useful while particular claims exceed what the evidence supports. We study this failure mode as overcommitment control and introduce compositional selective specificity (CSS), a post-generation layer that decomposes an answer into claims, proposes coarser backoffs, and emits each claim at the most specific calibrated level that appears admissible. The method is designed to express uncertainty as a local semantic backoff rather than as a whole-answer refusal. Across a full LongFact run and HotpotQA pilots, calibrated CSS improves the risk-utility trade-off of fixed drafts. On the full LongFact run, it raises overcommitment-aware utility from 0.846 to 0.913 relative to the no-CSS output while achieving 0.938 specificity retention. These results suggest that claim-level specificity control is a useful uncertainty interface for agentic systems and a target for future distribution-free validity layers.

AI.tldr: 论文提出CSS方法，通过将回答分解为具体声明，为每个声明提供更宽泛的回退选项，并在证据支持的最具体校准层级输出，从而解决AI系统过度承诺的问题。
AI.motivation: AI代理系统经常失败不是因为完全错误，而是因为过于精确：回答可能整体有用，但具体声明超出了证据支持的范围。这种过度承诺问题需要被控制，以在保持实用性的同时减少错误风险。
AI.method: 提出组合选择性特异性（CSS）方法，作为后生成层：1）将回答分解为具体声明；2）为每个声明提出更宽泛的回退选项；3）在每个声明证据支持的最具体校准层级输出，将不确定性表达为局部语义回退而非整体拒绝。
AI.result: 在LongFact完整运行和HotpotQA试点中，校准CSS改善了固定草稿的风险-效用权衡。在LongFact完整运行中，相对于无CSS输出，将过度承诺感知效用从0.846提高到0.913，同时实现0.938的特异性保留。
AI.conclusion: 声明级特异性控制是AI代理系统有用的不确定性接口，也是未来无分布有效性层的目标。CSS方法能够有效平衡回答的精确性和可靠性。

title: A unified convergence theory for adaptive first-order methods in the nonconvex case, including AdaNorm, full and diagonal AdaGrad, Shampoo and Muo
summary: A unified framework for first-order optimization algorithms fornonconvex unconstrained optimization is proposed that uses adaptivelypreconditioned gradients and includes popular methods such as full anddiagonal AdaGrad, AdaNorm, as well as adpative variants of Shampoo andMuon. This framework also allows combining heterogeneous geometriesacross different groups of variables while preserving a unifiedconvergence analysis. A fully stochastic global rate-of-convergenceanalysis is conducted for all methods in the framework, with andwithout two types of momentum, using reasonable assumptions on thevariance of the gradient oracle and without assuming boundedstochastic gradients or small enough stepsize.

AI.tldr: 提出了一个统一的非凸无约束优化一阶算法框架，使用自适应预处理的梯度，包含多种流行方法，支持跨变量组的异构几何结构，并提供统一的收敛性分析。
AI.motivation: 现有自适应优化算法（如AdaGrad、Shampoo等）缺乏统一的理论框架和分析，特别是在非凸优化、随机设置和动量机制下的收敛性分析不够完善。
AI.method: 提出统一框架，使用自适应预处理的梯度，支持跨变量组的异构几何结构，包含多种自适应算法（全/对角AdaGrad、AdaNorm、自适应Shampoo/Muon），并在完全随机设置下分析带/不带两种动量的收敛性。
AI.result: 为框架内所有方法提供了完全随机的全局收敛率分析，无需假设梯度有界或步长足够小，仅需合理的梯度方差假设。
AI.conclusion: 该框架统一了多种自适应优化算法，提供了强大的收敛性分析工具，支持异构几何结构，为自适应优化算法的理论和实践提供了重要基础。

title: Understanding Human Actions through the Lens of Executable Models
summary: Human-centred systems require an understanding of human actions in the physical world. Temporally extended sequences of actions are intentional and structured, yet existing methods for recognising what actions are performed often do not attempt to capture their structure, particularly how the actions are executed. This, however, is crucial for assessing the quality of the action's execution and its differences from other actions. To capture the internal mechanics of actions, we introduce a domain-specific language EXACT that represents human motions as underspecified motion programs, interpreted as reward-generating functions for zero-shot policy inference using forward-backwards representations. By leveraging the compositional nature of EXACT motion programs, we combine individual policies into an executable neuro-symbolic model that uses program structure for compositional modelling. We evaluate the utility of the proposed pipeline for creating executable action models by analysing motion-capture data to understand human actions, for the tasks of human action segmentation and action anomaly detection. Our results show that the use of executable action models improves data efficiency and captures intuitive relationships between actions compared with monolithic, task-specific approaches.

AI.tldr: 本文提出EXACT领域特定语言，将人类动作表示为未完全指定的运动程序，通过前向-后向表示进行零样本策略推断，构建可执行的神经符号模型，用于动作分割和异常检测。
AI.motivation: 现有的人类动作识别方法往往忽略动作的内部结构，特别是动作的执行方式，而这对于评估动作执行质量、区分不同动作至关重要。需要一种能够捕捉动作内部机制的方法。
AI.method: 引入EXACT领域特定语言，将人类动作表示为未完全指定的运动程序，这些程序被解释为奖励生成函数，通过前向-后向表示进行零样本策略推断。利用EXACT运动程序的组合性质，将个体策略组合成可执行的神经符号模型，使用程序结构进行组合建模。
AI.result: 通过分析运动捕捉数据来理解人类动作，在动作分割和动作异常检测任务中评估了所提管道的效用。结果表明，使用可执行动作模型相比单一任务特定方法，提高了数据效率并捕捉了动作间的直观关系。
AI.conclusion: 可执行动作模型能够更好地捕捉人类动作的内部结构，在动作理解和分析任务中表现出优越的数据效率和关系建模能力，为人类中心系统提供了更有效的动作表示和分析框架。

title: CoAct: Co-Active LLM Preference Learning with Human-AI Synergy
summary: Learning from preference-based feedback has become an effective approach for aligning LLMs across diverse tasks. However, high-quality human-annotated preference data remains expensive and scarce. Existing methods address this challenge through either self-rewarding, which scales by using purely AI-generated labels but risks unreliability, or active learning, which ensures quality through oracle annotation but cannot fully leverage unlabeled data. In this paper, we present CoAct, a novel framework that synergistically combines self-rewarding and active learning through strategic human-AI collaboration. CoAct leverages self-consistency to identify both reliable self-labeled data and samples that require oracle verification. Additionally, oracle feedback guides the model to generate new instructions within its solvable capability. Evaluated on three reasoning benchmarks across two model families, CoAct achieves average improvements of +13.25% on GSM8K, +8.19% on MATH, and +13.16% on WebInstruct, consistently outperforming all baselines.

AI.tldr: CoAct框架结合自奖励和主动学习，通过人机协同解决高质量偏好数据稀缺问题，在推理任务上显著优于基线方法。
AI.motivation: 高质量人工标注的偏好数据昂贵且稀缺，现有方法（自奖励和主动学习）各有局限：自奖励方法依赖纯AI生成标签但可靠性不足，主动学习依赖专家标注但无法充分利用未标注数据。
AI.method: CoAct框架通过策略性人机协作协同结合自奖励和主动学习，利用自一致性识别可靠的自标注数据和需要专家验证的样本，同时利用专家反馈指导模型在其可解决能力范围内生成新指令。
AI.result: 在三个推理基准测试（GSM8K、MATH、WebInstruct）和两个模型家族上，CoAct平均提升分别为+13.25%、+8.19%和+13.16%，始终优于所有基线方法。
AI.conclusion: CoAct通过人机协同有效解决了高质量偏好数据稀缺问题，在推理任务上取得了显著性能提升，为LLM对齐提供了新框架。

title: Neural Adjoint Method for Meta-optics: Accelerating Volumetric Inverse Design via Fourier Neural Operators
summary: Meta-optics promises compact, high-performance imaging and color routing. However, designing high-performance structures is a high-dimensional optimization problem: mapping a desired optical output back to a physical 3D structure requires solving computationally expensive Maxwell's equations iteratively. Even with adjoint optimization, broadband design can require thousands of Maxwell solves, making industrial-scale optimization slow and costly. To overcome this challenge, we propose the Neural Adjoint Method, a solver-supervised surrogate that predicts 3D adjoint gradient fields from a voxelized permittivity volume using a Fourier Neural Operator (FNO). By learning the dense, per-voxel sensitivity field that drives gradient-based updates, our method can replace per-iteration adjoint solves with fast predictions, greatly reducing the computational cost of full-wave simulations required during iterative refinement. To better preserve sensitivity peaks, we introduce a stage-wise FNO that progressively refines residual errors with increasing emphasis on higher-frequency components. We curate a meta-optics dataset from paired forward/adjoint FDTD simulations and evaluate it across three tasks: spectral sorting (color routers), achromatic focusing (metalenses), and waveguide mode conversion. Our method reduces design time from hours to seconds. These results suggest a practical route toward fast, large-scale volumetric meta-optical design enabled by AI-accelerated scientific computing.

AI.tldr: 提出神经伴随方法，使用傅里叶神经算子预测3D伴随梯度场，将元光学设计时间从小时级减少到秒级
AI.motivation: 元光学设计需要解决高维优化问题，传统基于伴随优化的方法需要数千次麦克斯韦方程求解，计算成本高昂且耗时
AI.method: 提出神经伴随方法，使用傅里叶神经算子从体素化介电常数体积预测3D伴随梯度场；引入阶段式FNO逐步细化残差误差，更好保留灵敏度峰值
AI.result: 方法在光谱分选、消色差聚焦和波导模式转换三个任务上验证，将设计时间从小时减少到秒，实现快速大规模体元光学设计
AI.conclusion: 神经伴随方法为快速、大规模体元光学设计提供了实用途径，通过AI加速科学计算实现高效优化

title: Architectural Design Decisions in AI Agent Harnesses
summary: AI agent systems increasingly rely on reusable non-LLM engineering infrastructure that packages tool mediation, context handling, delegation, safety control, and orchestration. Yet the architectural design decisions in this surrounding infrastructure remain understudied. This paper presents a protocol-guided, source-grounded empirical study of 70 publicly available agent-system projects, addressing three questions: which design-decision dimensions recur across projects, which co-occurrences structure those decisions, and which typical architectural patterns emerge. Methodologically, we contribute a transparent investigation procedure for analyzing heterogeneous agent-system corpora through source-code and technical-material reading. Empirically, we identify five recurring design dimensions (subagent architecture, context management, tool systems, safety mechanisms, and orchestration) and find that the corpus favors file-persistent, hybrid, and hierarchical context strategies; registry-oriented tool systems remain dominant while MCP- and plugin-oriented extensions are emerging; and intermediate isolation is common but high-assurance audit is rare. Cross-project co-occurrence analysis reveals that deeper coordination pairs with more explicit context services, stronger execution environments with more structured governance, and formalized tool-registration boundaries with broader ecosystem ambitions. We synthesize five recurring architectural patterns spanning lightweight tools, balanced CLI frameworks, multi-agent orchestrators, enterprise systems, and scenario-verticalized projects. The result provides an evidence-based account of architectural regularities in agent-system engineering, with grounded guidance for framework designers, selectors, and researchers.

AI.tldr: 对70个公开AI代理系统项目的实证研究，识别了5个设计维度、发现常用架构模式，为框架设计者和研究者提供基于证据的指导。
AI.motivation: AI代理系统依赖可重用的非LLM工程基础设施，但这些基础设施的架构设计决策研究不足，需要实证分析来理解实际项目中的设计模式和规律。
AI.method: 采用协议引导、基于源代码的实证研究方法，分析70个公开可用的代理系统项目，通过源代码和技术材料阅读，识别设计维度、共现关系和架构模式。
AI.result: 识别出5个重复出现的设计维度（子代理架构、上下文管理、工具系统、安全机制和编排），发现常用文件持久化、混合和分层上下文策略，注册导向的工具系统占主导，中间隔离常见但高保证审计罕见。共现分析揭示了设计决策间的关联模式。
AI.conclusion: 研究提供了AI代理系统工程架构规律的经验证据，识别了5种架构模式（轻量工具、平衡CLI框架、多代理编排器、企业系统、场景垂直化项目），为框架设计者、选择者和研究者提供了基于证据的指导。

title: ONTO: A Token-Efficient Columnar Notation for LLM Input Optimization
comment: 8 pages, 5 tables, 1 figure. Code, benchmarks, and specification at https://github.com/harsh-aranga/onto
summary: Serialization formats designed for document interchange impose structural overhead that becomes prohibitive when large language models consume operational data at scale. A modest dataset of 1,000 IoT sensor readings serialized as JSON requires approximately 80,000 tokens - the majority spent on repeated field names, nested braces, and structural punctuation rather than semantic content. We present ONTO (Object Notation for Token Optimization), a columnar notation that declares field names once per entity and arranges values in pipe-delimited rows with indentation-based hierarchy. This schema-once, data-many design eliminates per-record key repetition while preserving human readability and nested structure support. Evaluation across three synthetic operational datasets demonstrates 46-51% token reduction versus JSON, with stable scaling from 100 to 1,000 records. Controlled inference benchmarks on Qwen2.5-7B show corresponding 5-10% latency improvement. Comprehension validation confirms no material degradation in LLM task accuracy across lookup, counting, extraction, and aggregation operations when format context is provided. Ablation analysis reveals that key repetition accounts for the majority of JSON overhead, with indentation costs in nested structures explaining the 4-percentage-point gap between flat and hierarchical data. ONTO occupies a previously unfilled position in the serialization landscape: columnar efficiency with hierarchical structure, optimized for LLM context windows rather than document interchange. Code and specification are available at https://github.com/harsh-aranga/onto.

AI.tldr: ONTO是一种面向LLM优化的列式序列化格式，通过一次性声明字段名和管道分隔值，相比JSON减少46-51%的token开销，提升推理延迟5-10%，同时保持可读性和嵌套结构支持。
AI.motivation: JSON等文档交换格式在处理大规模操作数据时存在显著的结构开销，大量token被用于重复的字段名、嵌套括号和标点符号，而非语义内容。当LLM需要处理大规模物联网传感器数据等操作数据时，这种开销变得不可接受。
AI.method: 提出ONTO（对象表示法标记优化），采用列式表示法：每个实体只声明一次字段名，值以管道分隔的行排列，使用缩进表示层次结构。这种"一次定义模式，多次数据"的设计消除了每记录键重复，同时保持人类可读性和嵌套结构支持。
AI.result: 在三个合成操作数据集上评估显示，相比JSON减少46-51%的token开销，从100到1000条记录的扩展稳定。在Qwen2.5-7B上的受控推理基准测试显示相应5-10%的延迟改进。理解验证确认在提供格式上下文的情况下，LLM任务准确性（查找、计数、提取、聚合）没有实质性下降。
AI.conclusion: ONTO填补了序列化领域的空白：具有层次结构的列式效率，专门为LLM上下文窗口优化而非文档交换。键重复是JSON开销的主要来源，嵌套结构中的缩进成本解释了平面数据与层次数据之间4个百分点的差距。

title: Machine Learning Hamiltonian Dynamical Systems with Sparse and Noisy Data
summary: Machine learning has become a powerful tool for discovering governing laws of dynamical systems from data. However, most existing approaches degrade severely when observations are sparse, noisy, or irregularly sampled. In this work, we address the problem of learning symbolic representations of nonlinear Hamiltonian dynamical systems under extreme data scarcity by explicitly incorporating physical structure into the learning architecture. We introduce Adaptable Symplectic Recurrent Neural Networks (ASRNNs), a parameter-cognizant, structure-preserving model that combines Hamiltonian learning with symplectic recurrent integration, avoiding time derivative estimation, and enabling stable learning under noise. We demonstrate that ASRNNs can accurately predict long-term dynamics even when each training trajectory consists of only two irregularly spaced time points, possibly corrupted by correlated noise. Leveraging ASRNNs as structure-preserving data generators, we further enable symbolic discovery using independent regression methods (SINDy and PySR), recovering exact symbolic equations for polynomial systems and consistent polynomial approximations for non-polynomial Hamiltonians. Our results show that such architectures can provide a robust pathway to interpretable discovery of Hamiltonian dynamics from sparse and noisy data.

AI.tldr: 提出ASRNN模型，通过结合哈密顿学习与辛循环积分，从极稀疏、噪声数据中学习非线性哈密顿系统的符号表示
AI.motivation: 现有方法在观测数据稀疏、噪声大或不规则采样时性能严重下降，需要从极端数据稀缺条件下学习哈密顿系统符号表示的新方法
AI.method: 提出ASRNN（自适应辛循环神经网络），将物理结构融入学习架构，结合哈密顿学习与辛循环积分，避免时间导数估计，在噪声下稳定学习
AI.result: ASRNN能在每个训练轨迹仅含两个不规则时间点（可能含相关噪声）时准确预测长期动力学，并能通过SINDy和PySR等回归方法恢复多项式系统的精确符号方程和非多项式哈密顿量的多项式近似
AI.conclusion: ASRNN架构为从稀疏噪声数据中发现可解释的哈密顿动力学提供了稳健途径

title: DSAINet: An Efficient Dual-Scale Attentive Interaction Network for General EEG Decoding
summary: In real-world applications of noninvasive electroencephalography (EEG), specialized decoders often show limited generalizability across diverse tasks under subject-independent settings. One central challenge is that task-relevant EEG signals often follow different temporal organization patterns across tasks, while many existing methods rely on task-tailored architectural designs that introduce task-specific temporal inductive biases. This mismatch makes it difficult to adapt temporal modeling across tasks without changing the model configuration. To address these challenges, we propose DSAINet, an efficient dual-scale attentive interaction network for general EEG decoding. Specifically, DSAINet constructs shared spatiotemporal token representations from raw EEG signals and models diverse temporal dynamics through parallel convolutional branches at fine and coarse scales. The resulting representations are then adaptively refined by intra-branch attention to emphasize salient scale-specific patterns and by inter-branch attention to integrate task-relevant features across scales, followed by adaptive token aggregation to yield a compact representation for prediction. Extensive experiments on five downstream EEG decoding tasks across ten public datasets show that DSAINet consistently outperforms 13 representative baselines under strict subject-independent evaluation. Notably, this performance is achieved using the same architecture hyperparameters across datasets. Moreover, DSAINet achieves a favorable accuracy-efficiency trade-off with only about 77K trainable parameters and provides interpretable neurophysiological insights. The code is publicly available at https://github.com/zy0929/DSAINet.

AI.tldr: DSAINet：一种高效的双尺度注意力交互网络，用于通用EEG解码，通过并行卷积分支建模不同时间动态，无需任务特定架构调整即可适应多样化任务。
AI.motivation: 在非侵入性脑电图（EEG）的实际应用中，专用解码器在跨任务、跨被试的设置下泛化能力有限。核心挑战在于任务相关的EEG信号在不同任务中遵循不同的时间组织模式，而现有方法多依赖任务定制的架构设计，引入了任务特定的时间归纳偏置，导致难以在不改变模型配置的情况下适应跨任务的时间建模。
AI.method: DSAINet从原始EEG信号构建共享的时空token表示，通过精细和粗糙尺度的并行卷积分支建模多样化时间动态。然后通过分支内注意力强调显著的尺度特定模式，通过分支间注意力整合跨尺度的任务相关特征，最后通过自适应token聚合生成紧凑表示用于预测。
AI.result: 在10个公共数据集的5个下游EEG解码任务上进行广泛实验，DSAINet在严格的跨被试评估中始终优于13个代表性基线。重要的是，所有数据集使用相同的架构超参数实现这一性能。模型仅需约77K可训练参数，实现了良好的准确率-效率权衡，并提供可解释的神经生理学见解。
AI.conclusion: DSAINet是一种高效的通用EEG解码网络，能够适应不同任务的时间动态变化，无需任务特定架构调整，在跨被试设置下表现出强大的泛化能力和良好的效率，为EEG解码提供了新的解决方案。

title: OPSDL: On-Policy Self-Distillation for Long-Context Language Models
summary: Extending the effective context length of large language models (LLMs) remains a central challenge for real-world applications. While recent post-training methods have made progress in long-context scaling, they either rely on high-quality supervision data or sparse sequence-level rewards, leading to unstable and inefficient optimization. We propose OPSDL, an On-Policy Self-Distillation method for enhancing the Long-context capabilities of LLMs. Unlike other recent self-distillation methods that inject privileged information and rely on the model's in-context learning ability to act as a teacher, OPSDL leverages the model's own inherently strong short-context capability as a self-teacher to supervise its own generation in long-context scenarios. The model first generates responses conditioned on the full long-context, then the self-teacher provides per-token supervision signals via point-wise reverse KL divergence under the relevant extracted short-context. This dense token-level signal encourages faithful use of relevant evidence and mitigates hallucinations induced by irrelevant context. We evaluate OPSDL on long-context benchmarks across a range of models from 7B to 32B parameters. Results show consistent and substantial improvements across varying context lengths, outperforming standard post-training approaches such as SFT and DPO with higher sample efficiency. Notably, these gains are achieved without degrading general short-context performance. These findings highlight the effectiveness of OPSDL as a scalable and stable approach for long-context learning.

AI.tldr: OPSDL是一种基于策略的自蒸馏方法，利用LLM自身强大的短上下文能力作为教师，监督其在长上下文场景中的生成，通过逐token监督信号提升长上下文处理能力。
AI.motivation: 扩展大语言模型的有效上下文长度是实际应用中的核心挑战。现有后训练方法要么依赖高质量监督数据，要么使用稀疏序列级奖励，导致优化不稳定且效率低下。
AI.method: OPSDL利用模型自身固有的强短上下文能力作为自教师，在长上下文场景中监督自身生成。模型首先生成基于完整长上下文的响应，然后自教师通过点对点反向KL散度在相关提取的短上下文下提供逐token监督信号。
AI.result: 在7B到32B参数范围的模型上评估，OPSDL在各种上下文长度的长上下文基准测试中表现出一致且显著的改进，优于标准的SFT和DPO后训练方法，且样本效率更高。这些改进不会降低一般短上下文性能。
AI.conclusion: OPSDL作为一种可扩展且稳定的长上下文学习方法，通过利用模型自身短上下文能力作为监督信号，有效提升了LLM的长上下文处理能力，同时保持了短上下文性能。

title: Trustworthy deep domain adaptation for wearable photoplethysmography signal analysis with decision-theoretic uncertainty quantification
summary: In principle, deep generative models can be used to perform domain adaptation; i.e. align the input feature representations of test data with that of a separate discriminative model's training data. This can help improve the discriminative model's performance on the test data. However, generative models are prone to producing hallucinations and artefacts that may degrade the quality of generated data, and therefore, predictive performance when processed by the discriminative model. While uncertainty quantification can provide a means to assess the quality of adapted data, the standard framework for evaluating the quality of predicted uncertainties may not easily extend to generative models due to the common lack of ground truths (among other reasons). Even with ground truths, this evaluation is agnostic to how the generated outputs are used on the downstream task, limiting the extent to which the uncertainty reliability analysis provides insights about the utility of the uncertainties with respect to the intended use case of the adapted examples. Here, we describe how decision-theoretic uncertainty quantification can address these concerns and provide a convenient framework for evaluating the trustworthiness of generated outputs, in particular, for domain adaptation. We consider a case study in photoplethysmography time series denoising for Atrial Fibrillation classification. This formalises a well-known heuristic method of using a downstream classifier to assess the quality of generated outputs.

AI.tldr: 本文提出使用决策理论的不确定性量化来评估生成模型在领域适应中的可信度，通过下游分类器评估生成输出的质量，并以光电容积脉搏波去噪用于房颤分类为例进行验证。
AI.motivation: 深度生成模型可用于领域适应，但容易产生幻觉和伪影，可能降低下游判别模型的性能。传统的不确定性评估方法难以直接应用于生成模型，且评估结果与下游任务脱节，无法反映不确定性在实际应用中的效用。
AI.method: 采用决策理论的不确定性量化框架，通过下游分类器来评估生成输出的质量。该方法将生成输出的不确定性评估与下游任务的实际效用相结合，形式化了使用下游分类器评估生成质量的启发式方法。
AI.result: 在光电容积脉搏波时间序列去噪用于房颤分类的案例研究中，该方法能够有效评估生成输出的可信度，为领域适应任务提供可靠的生成质量评估框架。
AI.conclusion: 决策理论的不确定性量化为评估生成模型在领域适应中的可信度提供了有效框架，将不确定性评估与下游任务的实际效用相结合，解决了传统评估方法的局限性。

title: Stability Implies Redundancy: Delta Attention Selective Halting for Efficient Long-Context Prefilling
summary: Prefilling computational costs pose a significant bottleneck for Large Language Models (LLMs) and Large Multimodal Models (LMMs) in long-context settings. While token pruning reduces sequence length, prior methods rely on heuristics that break compatibility with hardware-efficient kernels like FlashAttention. In this work, we observe that tokens evolve toward \textit{semantic fixing points}, making further processing redundant. To this end, we introduce Delta Attention Selective Halting (DASH), a training-free policy that monitors the layer-wise update dynamics of the self-attention mechanism to selectively halt stabilized tokens. Extensive evaluation confirms that DASH generalizes across language and vision benchmarks, delivering significant prefill speedups while preserving model accuracy and hardware efficiency. Code will be released at https://github.com/verach3n/DASH.git.

AI.tldr: DASH是一种无需训练的策略，通过监控自注意力机制的层间更新动态，选择性地停止已稳定的token，从而减少长上下文场景中LLM/LMM的预填充计算成本。
AI.motivation: 在长上下文场景中，大型语言模型和大型多模态模型的预填充计算成本成为显著瓶颈。现有的token剪枝方法依赖启发式规则，与FlashAttention等硬件高效内核不兼容。
AI.method: 提出Delta Attention Selective Halting (DASH)方法，通过监控自注意力机制的层间更新动态，检测token是否达到语义固定点，从而选择性地停止已稳定的token处理。
AI.result: DASH在语言和视觉基准测试中表现出良好的泛化能力，在保持模型准确性和硬件效率的同时，显著提升了预填充速度。
AI.conclusion: DASH通过监控注意力更新动态实现token选择性停止，有效解决了长上下文场景中的预填充计算瓶颈，同时保持与硬件高效内核的兼容性。

title: PoliLegalLM: A Technical Report on a Large Language Model for Political and Legal Affairs
summary: Large language models (LLMs) have achieved remarkable success in general-domain tasks, yet their direct application to the legal domain remains challenging due to hallucinated legal citations, incomplete knowledge coverage, and weak structured reasoning. To address these issues, we propose PoliLegalLM, a domain-specific large language model tailored for political and legal applications. Our approach adopts a unified training framework that integrates continued pretraining, progressive supervised fine-tuning, and preference-based reinforcement learning to jointly enhance legal knowledge grounding, task alignment, and reasoning capability. We construct a large-scale, high-quality legal corpus and design a structured post-training pipeline, enabling the model to effectively learn domain-specific knowledge and adapt to diverse legal tasks. We evaluate PoliLegalLM on three representative benchmarks, including LawBench, LexEval, and a real-world dataset, PoliLegal. Experimental results demonstrate that PoliLegalLM achieves strong and consistent performance, outperforming competitive models of similar scale and remaining highly competitive with significantly larger models, while achieving the best results on real-world legal scenarios. These results highlight the effectiveness of our training paradigm and the practical value of domain-specific LLMs for real-world legal applications.

AI.tldr: PoliLegalLM是一个针对政治法律领域定制的专业大语言模型，通过统一训练框架解决法律领域LLM的幻觉、知识覆盖不全和推理能力弱的问题，在多个法律基准测试中表现优异。
AI.motivation: 通用大语言模型在法律领域应用存在三个主要问题：1）法律引用幻觉（生成虚假引用）；2）法律知识覆盖不完整；3）结构化推理能力弱。需要专门针对法律领域开发定制化模型来解决这些问题。
AI.method: 采用统一训练框架，包含三个关键阶段：1）持续预训练（continued pretraining）；2）渐进式监督微调（progressive supervised fine-tuning）；3）基于偏好的强化学习（preference-based reinforcement learning）。构建大规模高质量法律语料库，设计结构化后训练流程。
AI.result: 在三个代表性基准测试（LawBench、LexEval和真实世界数据集PoliLegal）上评估，PoliLegalLM表现出色：1）优于相似规模的竞争模型；2）与更大模型保持高度竞争力；3）在真实法律场景中取得最佳结果。
AI.conclusion: 该训练范式有效，领域特定LLM对真实世界法律应用具有实用价值。PoliLegalLM展示了专业领域定制化模型在解决法律领域特定挑战方面的优势。

title: A Probabilistic Consensus-Driven Approach for Robust Counterfactual Explanations
summary: Counterfactual explanations (CFEs) are essential for interpreting black-box models, yet they often become invalid when models are slightly changed. Existing methods for generating robust CFEs are often limited to specific types of models, require costly tuning, or inflexible robustness controls. We propose a novel approach that jointly models the data distribution and the space of plausible model decisions to ensure robustness to model changes. Using a probabilistic consensus over a model ensemble, we train a conditional normalizing flow that captures the data density under varying levels of classifier agreement. At inference time, a single interpretable parameter controls the robustness level; it specifies the minimum fraction of models that should agree on the target class without retraining the generative model. Our method effectively pushes CFEs toward regions that are both plausible and stable across model changes. Experimental results demonstrate that our approach achieves superior empirical robustness while also maintaining good performance across other evaluation measures.

AI.tldr: 提出一种基于条件归一化流和模型集成的新方法，通过单一可解释参数控制反事实解释的鲁棒性，确保模型变化时解释仍有效
AI.motivation: 现有生成鲁棒反事实解释的方法通常局限于特定模型类型、需要昂贵调参或缺乏灵活的鲁棒性控制，当模型轻微变化时解释容易失效
AI.method: 联合建模数据分布和模型决策空间，使用模型集成的概率共识训练条件归一化流，捕获不同分类器一致性水平下的数据密度，通过单一参数控制鲁棒性级别
AI.result: 实验结果表明该方法在保持其他评估指标良好性能的同时，实现了优越的经验鲁棒性
AI.conclusion: 提出的方法能有效生成既合理又对模型变化稳定的反事实解释，通过可解释参数灵活控制鲁棒性，无需重新训练生成模型

title: Training LLM Agents for Spontaneous, Reward-Free Self-Evolution via World Knowledge Exploration
summary:
Most agents today ``self-evolve'' by following rewards and rules defined by humans. However, this process remains fundamentally dependent on external supervision; without human guidance, the evolution stops. In this work, we train agents to possess an intrinsic meta-evolution capability to spontaneously learn about unseen environments prior to task execution.
  To instill this ability, we design an outcome-based reward mechanism that measures how much an agent's self-generated world knowledge improves its success rate on downstream tasks. This reward signal is used exclusively during the training phase to teach the model how to explore and summarize effectively. At inference time, the agent requires no external rewards or human instructions. It spontaneously performs native self-evolution to adapt to unknown environments using its internal parameters.
  When applied to Qwen3-30B and Seed-OSS-36B, this shift to native evolution yields a 20% performance increase on WebVoyager and WebWalker. Most strikingly, the generated world knowledge even enables a compact 14B Qwen3 model to outperform the unassisted Gemini-2.5-Flash, establishing a new paradigm for truly evolving agents.

AI.tldr: 训练具有内在元进化能力的智能体，使其能在无外部监督下自发学习未知环境知识，并在下游任务中实现20%性能提升
AI.motivation: 当前智能体的"自我进化"仍然依赖人类定义奖励和规则的外部监督，缺乏真正的自主进化能力。本文旨在让智能体具备内在的元进化能力，在任务执行前自发学习未知环境知识
AI.method: 设计基于结果的奖励机制：衡量智能体自我生成的世界知识对下游任务成功率的影响。该奖励信号仅在训练阶段使用，教导模型如何有效探索和总结。推理时智能体无需外部奖励或人工指令
AI.result: 在Qwen3-30B和Seed-OSS-36B上应用该方法，在WebVoyager和WebWalker任务上实现20%性能提升。最显著的是，14B Qwen3模型通过生成的世界知识甚至超越了未辅助的Gemini-2.5-Flash
AI.conclusion: 该方法建立了真正进化智能体的新范式，使智能体具备内在的元进化能力，无需外部监督即可自发适应未知环境

title: MAPLE: A Meta-learning Framework for Cross-Prompt Essay Scoring
summary: Automated Essay Scoring (AES) faces significant challenges in cross-prompt settings, where models must generalize to unseen writing prompts. To address this limitation, we propose MAPLE, a meta-learning framework that leverages prototypical networks to learn transferable representations across different writing prompts. Across three diverse datasets (ELLIPSE and ASAP (English), and LAILA (Arabic)), MAPLE achieves state-of-the-art performance on ELLIPSE and LAILA, outperforming strong baselines by 8.5 and 3 points in QWK, respectively. On ASAP, where prompts exhibit heterogeneous score ranges, MAPLE yields improvements on several traits, highlighting the strengths of our approach in unified scoring settings. Overall, our results demonstrate the potential of meta-learning for building robust cross-prompt AES systems.

AI.tldr: MAPLE：基于元学习和原型网络的跨提示自动作文评分框架，在多个数据集上取得SOTA性能
AI.motivation: 自动作文评分系统在跨提示场景下面临泛化挑战，需要能够处理未见过的写作提示。现有方法在跨提示设置中表现有限，需要更有效的解决方案。
AI.method: 提出MAPLE框架，采用元学习和原型网络学习跨不同写作提示的可迁移表示。通过原型网络捕获每个提示的特征模式，实现跨提示的知识迁移。
AI.result: 在三个数据集上验证：ELLIPSE和ASAP（英文）、LAILA（阿拉伯文）。在ELLIPSE和LAILA上达到SOTA，QWK分别提升8.5和3分。在ASAP上对多个评分维度有改进，特别在统一评分设置中表现突出。
AI.conclusion: 元学习方法在构建鲁棒的跨提示自动作文评分系统方面具有巨大潜力，MAPLE框架为处理不同写作提示的泛化问题提供了有效解决方案。

title: Multi-Agent Systems: From Classical Paradigms to Large Foundation Model-Enabled Futures
comment: Accepted by IEEE/CAA Journal of Automatica Sinica
summary: With the rapid advancement of artificial intelligence, multi-agent systems (MASs) are evolving from classical paradigms toward architectures built upon large foundation models (LFMs). This survey provides a systematic review and comparative analysis of classical MASs (CMASs) and LFM-based MASs (LMASs). First, within a closed-loop coordination framework, CMASs are reviewed across four fundamental dimensions: perception, communication, decision-making, and control. Beyond this framework, LMASs integrate LFMs to lift collaboration from low-level state exchanges to semantic-level reasoning, enabling more flexible coordination and improved adaptability across diverse scenarios. Then, a comparative analysis is conducted to contrast CMASs and LMASs across architecture, operating mechanism, adaptability, and application. Finally, future perspectives on MASs are presented, summarizing open challenges and potential research opportunities.

AI.tldr: 本文系统综述了经典多智能体系统(CMAS)与基于大基础模型的多智能体系统(LMAS)，在闭环协调框架下对比了感知、通信、决策、控制四个维度，分析了LMAS如何通过语义级推理提升协作灵活性，并展望了未来研究方向。
AI.motivation: 随着人工智能快速发展，多智能体系统正从经典范式向基于大基础模型的架构演进。需要系统梳理这一演进过程，对比分析经典与新兴架构的差异，为未来研究提供指导。
AI.method: 采用系统性综述和比较分析方法：1) 在闭环协调框架下，从感知、通信、决策、控制四个维度回顾CMAS；2) 分析LMAS如何集成大基础模型实现语义级推理；3) 对比CMAS与LMAS在架构、运行机制、适应性和应用方面的差异。
AI.result: LMAS通过大基础模型将协作从低层状态交换提升到语义级推理，实现了更灵活的协调和跨场景的适应性提升。比较分析揭示了两种范式在架构、运行机制、适应性和应用方面的根本差异。
AI.conclusion: 多智能体系统正经历从经典范式向基于大基础模型架构的范式转变。LMAS通过语义级推理能力显著提升了系统的灵活性和适应性。未来研究需要解决开放挑战，探索新的研究方向。

title: Beyond Fine-Tuning: In-Context Learning and Chain-of-Thought for Reasoned Distractor Generation
summary: Distractor generation (DG) remains a labor-intensive task that still significantly depends on domain experts. The task focuses on generating plausible yet incorrect options, known as distractors, for multiple-choice questions. A reliable distractor must be contextually relevant to the question and able to mislead examinees through implicit reasoning when identifying the correct answer. While a recent method integrates fine-tuning pre-trained encoder-decoder models with contrastive learning to generate semantically relevant distractors for a given question-answer, it often fails to capture the underlying reasoning process that experts utilize when selecting distractors in benchmarks. In this paper, we explore large language models (LLMs) reasoning for DG through in-context learning with unsupervised semantic retrieval for selecting few-shot examples. We design a rationale-augmented DG framework that jointly generates distractors and their rationales for a given question-answer. Extensive experiments on six benchmarks, with varying average distractor lengths and domains, demonstrate that prompting LLMs with few-shot examples substantially improves the performance compared to recent DG models. It outperforms recent approaches and achieves state-of-the-art results in generating reasoned distractors that align with human-labeled benchmarks.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于大语言模型推理能力的干扰项生成框架，通过上下文学习和语义检索选择少样本示例，联合生成干扰项及其推理依据，在多个基准测试中取得SOTA效果。
AI.motivation: 当前干扰项生成任务仍高度依赖领域专家，现有方法虽然能生成语义相关的干扰项，但无法捕捉专家选择干扰项时的推理过程。需要一种能生成具有推理依据的干扰项的方法。
AI.method: 提出基于大语言模型的推理增强干扰项生成框架：1) 使用无监督语义检索选择少样本示例；2) 通过上下文学习让LLM生成干扰项及其推理依据；3) 联合生成干扰项和选择理由。
AI.result: 在6个不同领域和干扰项长度的基准测试中，该方法显著优于现有DG模型，取得了SOTA结果，生成的干扰项与人工标注基准高度一致。
AI.conclusion: 通过大语言模型的推理能力和少样本学习，可以生成具有合理推理依据的干扰项，有效模拟专家选择过程，显著提升干扰项生成质量。

title: SVL: Goal-Conditioned Reinforcement Learning as Survival Learning
summary: Standard approaches to goal-conditioned reinforcement learning (GCRL) that rely on temporal-difference learning can be unstable and sample-inefficient due to bootstrapping. While recent work has explored contrastive and supervised formulations to improve stability, we present a probabilistic alternative, called survival value learning (SVL), that reframes GCRL as a survival learning problem by modeling the time-to-goal from each state as a probability distribution. This structured distributional Monte Carlo perspective yields a closed-form identity that expresses the goal-conditioned value function as a discounted sum of survival probabilities, enabling value estimation via a hazard model trained via maximum likelihood on both event and right-censored trajectories. We introduce three practical value estimators, including finite-horizon truncation and two binned infinite-horizon approximations to capture long-horizon objectives. Experiments on offline GCRL benchmarks show that SVL combined with hierarchical actors matches or surpasses strong hierarchical TD and Monte Carlo baselines, excelling on complex, long-horizon tasks.

AI.tldr: SVL将目标条件强化学习重构为生存学习问题，通过建模从每个状态到目标的时间分布，使用生存概率的折现和来估计价值函数，在长时域任务上表现优异。
AI.motivation: 传统基于时序差分的目标条件强化学习方法存在不稳定和样本效率低的问题，需要更稳定、更高效的替代方案。
AI.method: 提出生存价值学习(SVL)，将GCRL重构为生存学习问题，建模从状态到目标的时间分布，通过生存概率折现和表达价值函数，使用危险模型通过最大似然训练。
AI.result: 在离线GCRL基准测试中，SVL结合分层行动者匹配或超越了强基线方法，在复杂长时域任务上表现突出。
AI.conclusion: SVL为GCRL提供了一种稳定、高效的分布式蒙特卡洛方法，特别适合长时域目标导向任务。

title: State Transfer Reveals Reuse in Controlled Routing
summary: Prompt-based interventions can change model behavior, but trained success alone does not identify where the behaviorally relevant state is represented. We study this question in controlled routing tasks using interfaces chosen on support data, held-out query evaluation, and matched necessity, sufficiency, and wrong-interface controls. On GPT-2 triop, an early interface supports exact transfer under these tests. On GPT-2 add/sub, zero-retrain compiled transfer at the fixed interface recovers most of donor routing accuracy, while trainable prompt slots can relearn the same behavior at several other positions only after additional support examples and optimization. These results distinguish fixed-interface reuse from prompt relocation in a setting where the two can be tested directly. Qwen routing provides a cross-architecture consistency check for the same matched-interface pattern at the operator token, although donor-specific identity on the local V-path remains unresolved. Generation and reasoning branches are used to map scope: they show broader transport or weaker controller identifiability once control depends on longer trajectories or harder selection. In controlled routing, fixed-interface transfer is therefore stronger evidence of reuse than trained prompt success alone.

AI.tldr: 研究通过固定接口与可训练提示槽在控制路由任务中的行为转移差异，发现固定接口转移比训练提示成功更能证明模型内部表征的重用
AI.motivation: 虽然基于提示的干预可以改变模型行为，但仅凭训练成功无法确定行为相关状态在模型中的具体表征位置，需要区分固定接口重用与提示重新定位的差异
AI.method: 使用控制路由任务，通过接口选择、支持数据、保留查询评估以及匹配的必要性、充分性和错误接口控制等测试方法，在GPT-2 triop、GPT-2 add/sub和Qwen模型上进行实验
AI.result: 在GPT-2 triop中早期接口支持精确转移；在GPT-2 add/sub中，固定接口的零重训练编译转移恢复了大部分捐赠路由准确性，而可训练提示槽需要额外支持和优化才能在其他位置重新学习相同行为；Qwen在操作符标记处显示出相同的匹配接口模式
AI.conclusion: 在控制路由任务中，固定接口转移比仅凭训练提示成功更能提供模型内部表征重用的证据，这有助于区分真正的表征重用与通过训练实现的提示重新定位

title: Agents Explore but Agents Ignore: LLMs Lack Environmental Curiosity
summary: LLM-based agents are assumed to integrate environmental observations into their reasoning: discovering highly relevant but unexpected information should naturally lead to a model exploiting its own discoveries. We show that this assumption is false for current LLM-based agents, which struggle to reflect or react to unexpected information. Across three benchmarks (Terminal-Bench, SWE-Bench, AppWorld), we inject complete task solutions into the agent environments to deliberately expose a task's solution to a model. While agents discover these solutions on Terminal-Bench in 79-81% of runs, they interact, or exploit, them in only 37-50% of cases. This gap is starkest in AppWorld: agents see documentation stating that a command "returns the complete solution to this task" in over 90% of attempts but exploit this in fewer than 7% of trials. We show that agents lack what we call environmental curiosity: the capability to recognize and investigate unexpected but relevant observations in response to environmental stimuli. We identify three main factors influencing environmental curiosity: available tools in the agent scaffold, test-time compute, and training data distribution. Our findings identify configurations that maximize curiosity also achieve the best performance on the unmodified benchmarks. Yet even jointly optimized agents still ignore discovered solutions in the majority of trials: current agents use the environment to fetch expected information, but not to revise their strategy or maximally exploit useful stimuli.

AI.tldr: 当前基于LLM的智能体缺乏环境好奇心，即使发现意外但相关的任务解决方案，也无法有效利用这些信息来调整策略或最大化利用有用刺激。
AI.motivation: 研究当前LLM智能体在环境中整合观察信息的能力，特别是它们对意外但相关信息的反应能力。假设智能体应该能够利用自己发现的信息，但实际测试表明这一假设不成立。
AI.method: 在三个基准测试（Terminal-Bench、SWE-Bench、AppWorld）中注入完整任务解决方案，故意将任务解决方案暴露给模型。分析智能体发现和利用这些解决方案的情况，研究影响环境好奇心的因素：可用工具、测试时计算和训练数据分布。
AI.result: 智能体在Terminal-Bench中发现解决方案的比例为79-81%，但利用比例仅为37-50%。在AppWorld中，超过90%的尝试中智能体看到"返回此任务的完整解决方案"的文档，但利用比例不到7%。优化配置可提高好奇心，但即使优化后的智能体在大多数试验中仍忽略发现的解决方案。
AI.conclusion: 当前LLM智能体缺乏环境好奇心，无法有效识别和利用意外但相关的环境观察。它们主要使用环境获取预期信息，但不会根据新发现修订策略或最大化利用有用刺激。需要改进智能体架构以增强环境好奇心。

title: QuantumQA: Enhancing Scientific Reasoning via Physics-Consistent Dataset and Verification-Aware Reinforcement Learning
summary: Large language models (LLMs) show strong capabilities in general reasoning but typically lack reliability in scientific domains like quantum mechanics, which demand strict adherence to physical constraints. This limitation arises from the scarcity of verifiable training resources and the inadequacy of coarse feedback signals in standard alignment paradigms. To address the data challenge, we introduce QuantumQA, a large-scale dataset constructed via a task-adaptive strategy and a hybrid verification protocol that combines deterministic solvers with semantic auditing to guarantee scientific rigor. Building on this foundation, we propose the verification-aware reward model (VRM) tailored for Reinforcement Learning with Verifiable Rewards (RLVR), which employs an adaptive reward fusion (ARF) mechanism to dynamically integrate deterministic signals from a scientific execution suite (SES) with multidimensional semantic evaluations for precise supervision. Experimental results demonstrate that our method consistently outperforms baselines and general-purpose preference models. Notably, our optimized 8B model achieves performance competitive with proprietary models, validating that incorporating verifiable, rule-based feedback into the reinforcement learning loop offers a parameter-efficient alternative to pure scaling.

AI.tldr: 该论文提出QuantumQA数据集和验证感知奖励模型(VRM)，通过结合确定性求解器和语义评估的混合验证协议，提升LLM在量子力学等科学领域的可靠性
AI.motivation: 大型语言模型在一般推理方面表现出色，但在量子力学等科学领域缺乏可靠性，主要原因是缺乏可验证的训练资源和标准对齐范式中粗糙的反馈信号
AI.method: 1) 构建QuantumQA大规模数据集，采用任务自适应策略和混合验证协议；2) 提出验证感知奖励模型(VRM)，用于可验证奖励的强化学习(RLVR)，采用自适应奖励融合机制结合确定性信号和多维语义评估
AI.result: 方法在实验中持续优于基线模型和通用偏好模型，优化的8B模型性能可与专有模型竞争，验证了将可验证的、基于规则的反馈纳入强化学习循环是纯扩展的参数高效替代方案
AI.conclusion: 通过结合确定性求解器和语义审计的混合验证协议，以及验证感知奖励模型的强化学习框架，能够有效提升LLM在科学领域的可靠性，为参数高效的科学AI对齐提供了新途径

title: Does Welsh media need a review? Detecting bias in Nation.Cymru's political reporting
summary: Wales' political landscape has been marked by growing accusations of bias in Welsh media. This paper takes the first computational step toward testing those claims by examining Nation.Cymru, a prominent Welsh political news outlet. I use a two-stage natural language processing (NLP) pipeline: (1) a robustly optimized BERT approach (RoBERTa) bias detector for efficient bias discovery and (2) a large language model (LLM) for target-attributed sentiment classification of bias labels from (1). A primary analysis of 15,583 party mentions across 2022-2026 news articles finds that Reform UK attracts biased framing at twice the rate of Plaid Cymru and over three times as negative in mean sentiment (p<0.001). A secondary analysis across four parties across both news and opinion articles shows that Plaid Cymru is the outlier, receiving markedly more favourable framing than any other party. These findings provide evidence of measurable differential framing in a single Welsh political media outlet, supporting calls for a broader review of Welsh media coverage. Furthermore, the two-stage pipeline offers a low-cost, replicable framework for extending this analysis to other Welsh outlets, as well as media ecosystems outside of Wales.

AI.tldr: 使用NLP方法分析威尔士媒体Nation.Cymru的政治偏见，发现Reform UK受到最多负面偏见报道，而Plaid Cymru获得最有利的报道框架。
AI.motivation: 威尔士政治环境中存在媒体偏见指控，但缺乏计算验证。本研究旨在首次通过计算方法测试这些主张，分析威尔士主要政治新闻媒体Nation.Cymru是否存在可测量的偏见。
AI.method: 采用两阶段自然语言处理流程：1) 使用RoBERTa偏见检测器进行高效偏见发现；2) 使用大型语言模型对第一阶段检测到的偏见标签进行目标属性情感分类。分析2022-2026年新闻文章中15,583个政党提及。
AI.result: 主要分析发现Reform UK受到偏见框架的比例是Plaid Cymru的两倍，平均情感负面程度超过三倍(p<0.001)。次要分析显示Plaid Cymru是异常值，比其他任何政党获得明显更有利的报道框架。
AI.conclusion: 研究提供了威尔士单一政治媒体存在可测量差异框架的证据，支持对威尔士媒体报道进行更广泛审查的呼吁。两阶段流程为扩展到其他威尔士媒体及威尔士以外的媒体生态系统提供了低成本、可复制的框架。

title: Recovery Guarantees for Continual Learning of Dependent Tasks: Memory, Data-Dependent Regularization, and Data-Dependent Weights
summary: Continual learning (CL) is concerned with learning multiple tasks sequentially without forgetting previously learned tasks. Despite substantial empirical advances over recent years, the theoretical development of CL remains in its infancy. At the heart of developing CL theory lies the challenge that the data distribution varies across tasks, and we argue that properly addressing this challenge requires understanding this variation--dependency among tasks. To explicitly model task dependency, we consider nonlinear regression tasks and propose the assumption that these tasks are dependent in such a way that the data of the current task is a nonlinear transformation of previous data. With this model and under natural assumptions, we prove statistical recovery guarantees (more specifically, bounds on estimation errors) for several CL paradigms in practical use, including experience replay with data-independent regularization and data-independent weights that balance the losses of tasks, replay with data-dependent weights, and continual learning with data-dependent regularization (e.g., knowledge distillation). To the best of our knowledge, our bounds are informative in cases where prior work gives vacuous bounds.

AI.tldr: 该论文为持续学习建立了首个理论框架，通过建模任务间依赖关系，为多种实际CL方法提供了非平凡的统计恢复保证。
AI.motivation: 持续学习虽然近年来在实证方面取得显著进展，但其理论发展仍处于起步阶段。核心挑战在于不同任务间的数据分布变化，作者认为要解决这一挑战需要理解任务间的依赖关系。
AI.method: 提出非线性回归任务依赖模型，假设当前任务数据是先前数据的非线性变换。在此模型和自然假设下，为多种实际CL范式提供统计恢复保证：1) 经验回放加数据无关正则化；2) 平衡任务损失的数据无关权重；3) 数据依赖权重的回放；4) 数据依赖正则化（如知识蒸馏）。
AI.result: 证明了这些CL范式的估计误差边界，这些边界在先前工作给出平凡边界的情况下仍然具有信息性，为持续学习提供了首个非平凡的理论保证。
AI.conclusion: 通过显式建模任务依赖关系，为持续学习建立了首个有意义的理论框架，为实际CL方法提供了统计保证，填补了CL理论发展的空白。

title: A Control Architecture for Training-Free Memory Use
summary: Prompt-injected memory can improve reasoning without updating model weights, but it also creates a control problem: retrieved content helps only when it is applied in the right state. We study this problem in a strict training-free setting and formulate it as applicability control: when to trigger a memory-assisted second pass, when to trust it, and how to maintain the memory bank over time. Our method combines uncertainty-based routing, confidence-based selective acceptance, bank selection across rule and exemplar memory, and evidence-based governance of the memory bank over time. Under a locked training-free protocol with compute-matched controls, it improves two core arithmetic benchmarks by +7.0 points on SVAMP and +7.67 points on ASDiv over baseline. The same architecture also transfers to QA and agent benchmarks with smaller positive effects and shows the same positive direction on a second checkpoint for the main arithmetic tasks. On arithmetic, the main empirical pattern is that the control architecture, rather than raw memory exposure, drives the improvements on SVAMP and ASDiv. Mechanistically, confidence separates helpful from harmful rule-bank interventions, and under fixed retrieval the repair-versus-corrupt difference localizes to rows whose retrieved set actually contains the edited entries.

AI.tldr: 提出一种无需权重更新的记忆注入控制方法，通过不确定性路由、置信度选择、记忆库管理和证据治理，在算术推理任务上显著提升性能
AI.motivation: 记忆注入虽然能提升推理能力，但存在控制问题：检索到的内容只有在正确状态下应用才有效。研究在严格无训练设置下的适用性控制问题
AI.method: 结合不确定性路由、置信度选择性接受、规则和示例记忆库选择，以及基于证据的记忆库治理机制
AI.result: 在SVAMP和ASDiv算术基准上分别提升7.0和7.67分，在QA和智能体任务上也有较小正向效果，控制架构而非原始记忆暴露驱动改进
AI.conclusion: 置信度能区分有益和有害的规则库干预，控制架构是提升性能的关键，为无训练记忆增强提供了有效解决方案

title: Copy First, Translate Later: Interpreting Translation Dynamics in Multilingual Pretraining
summary: Large language models exhibit impressive cross-lingual capabilities. However, prior work analyzes this phenomenon through isolated factors and at sparse points during training, limiting our understanding of how cross-lingual generalization emerges--particularly in the early phases of learning. To study the early trajectory of linguistic and translation capabilities, we pretrain a multilingual 1.7B model on nine diverse languages, capturing checkpoints at a much finer granularity. We further introduce a novel word-level translation dataset and trace how translation develops over training through behavioral analyses, model-component analysis, and parameter-based ablations. We find that the model quickly acquires basic linguistic capabilities in parallel with token-level copying, while translation develops in two distinct phases: an initial phase dominated by copying and surface-level similarities, and a second phase in which more generalizing translation mechanisms are developed while copying is refined. Together, these findings provide a fine-grained view of how cross-lingual generalization develops during multilingual pretraining.

AI.tldr: 该研究通过高频检查点追踪多语言模型早期训练中跨语言泛化能力的形成过程，发现翻译能力分两个阶段发展：初始阶段以复制和表面相似性为主，第二阶段发展出更通用的翻译机制。
AI.motivation: 现有研究通常孤立分析跨语言能力，且在训练过程中只取稀疏检查点，限制了我们对跨语言泛化能力如何形成（特别是早期阶段）的理解。需要更精细地追踪多语言模型早期训练轨迹。
AI.method: 在9种不同语言上预训练一个17亿参数的多语言模型，以更细粒度捕获检查点。引入新的词级翻译数据集，通过行为分析、模型组件分析和参数消融实验追踪翻译能力在训练中的发展。
AI.result: 模型快速获得基本语言能力并与词级复制并行发展。翻译能力分两个阶段：初始阶段由复制和表面相似性主导；第二阶段发展出更通用的翻译机制，同时复制能力得到精炼。
AI.conclusion: 研究提供了多语言预训练期间跨语言泛化能力发展的精细视图，揭示了翻译能力从表面复制到通用机制的渐进发展过程，为理解大语言模型跨语言能力形成机制提供了新见解。

title: How Much Data is Enough? The Zeta Law of Discoverability in Biomedical Data, featuring the enigmatic Riemann zeta function
summary:
How much data is enough to make a scientific discovery? As biomedical datasets scale to millions of samples and AI models grow in capacity, progress increasingly depends on predicting when additional data will substantially improve performance. In practice, model development often relies on empirical scaling curves measured across architectures, modalities, and dataset sizes, with limited theoretical guidance on when performance should improve, saturate, or exhibit cross-over behavior.
  We propose a scaling-law framework for cross-modal discoverability based on spectral structure of data covariance operators, task-aligned signal projections, and learned representations. Many performance metrics, including AUC, can be expressed in terms of cumulative signal-to-noise energy accumulated across identifiable spectral modes of an encoder and cross-modal operator. Under mild assumptions, this accumulation follows a zeta-like scaling law governed by power-law decay of covariance spectra and aligned signal energy, leading naturally to the appearance of the Riemann zeta function. Representation learning methods such as sparse models, low-rank embeddings, and multimodal contrastive objectives improve sample efficiency by concentrating useful signal into earlier stable modes, effectively steepening spectral decay and shifting scaling curves.
  The framework predicts cross-over regimes in which simpler models perform best at small sample sizes, while higher-capacity or multimodal encoders outperform them once sufficient data stabilizes additional degrees of freedom. Applications include multimodal disease classification, imaging genetics, functional MRI, and topological data analysis. The resulting zeta law provides a principled way to anticipate when scaling data, improving representations, or adding modalities is most likely to accelerate discovery.

AI.tldr: 提出基于协方差算子谱结构的跨模态可发现性缩放定律框架，将性能指标表达为谱模式累积信噪比，推导出类zeta缩放定律，预测模型在不同数据规模下的交叉表现。
AI.motivation: 随着生物医学数据集规模扩大和AI模型容量增长，需要理论指导预测何时增加数据能显著提升性能，而当前主要依赖经验缩放曲线，缺乏理论框架。
AI.method: 基于数据协方差算子的谱结构、任务对齐信号投影和学习表示，将AUC等性能指标表达为编码器和跨模态算子可识别谱模式的累积信噪比能量，推导出受协方差谱幂律衰减和对齐信号能量控制的类zeta缩放定律。
AI.result: 框架预测交叉机制：小样本时简单模型最优，大数据时高容量或多模态编码器更优；稀疏模型、低秩嵌入和多模态对比目标通过将有用信号集中到早期稳定模式来提高样本效率。
AI.conclusion: zeta定律为预测何时扩展数据、改进表示或添加模态最可能加速科学发现提供了原则性方法，应用于多模态疾病分类、成像遗传学、功能MRI和拓扑数据分析。

title: TacticGen: Grounding Adaptable and Scalable Generation of Football Tactics
summary: Success in association football relies on both individual skill and coordinated tactics. While recent advancements in spatio-temporal data and deep learning have enabled predictive analyses like trajectory forecasting, the development of tactical design remains limited. Bridging this gap is essential, as prediction reveals what is likely to occur, whereas tactic generation determines what should occur to achieve strategic objectives. In this work, we present TacticGen, a generative model for adaptable and scalable tactic generation. TacticGen formulates tactics as sequences of multi-agent movements and interactions conditioned on the game context. It employs a multi-agent diffusion transformer with agent-wise self-attention and context-aware cross-attention to capture cooperative and competitive dynamics among players and the ball. Trained with over 3.3 million events and 100 million tracking frames from top-tier leagues, TacticGen achieves state-of-the-art precision in predicting player trajectories. Building on it, TacticGen enables adaptable tactic generation tailored to diverse inference-time objectives through classifier guidance mechanism, specified via rules, natural language, or neural models. Its modeling performance is also inherently scalable. A case study with football experts confirms that TacticGen generates realistic, strategically valuable tactics, demonstrating its practical utility for tactical planning in professional football. The project page is available at: https://shengxu.net/TacticGen/.

AI.tldr: TacticGen是一个用于足球战术生成的生成模型，通过多智能体扩散变换器捕捉球员互动，基于大量比赛数据训练，能够根据实时目标生成适应性战术。
AI.motivation: 当前足球分析主要集中在轨迹预测（预测可能发生什么），但战术设计（决定应该发生什么以实现战略目标）的研究有限。需要弥合这一差距，因为战术生成对于实现战略目标至关重要。
AI.method: TacticGen将战术建模为基于比赛上下文的多智能体移动和互动序列。采用多智能体扩散变换器，包含智能体自注意力机制和上下文感知的交叉注意力机制，以捕捉球员和球之间的合作与竞争动态。通过分类器引导机制支持多样化的推理时目标。
