AI.motivation: 虽然许多欧洲语言都有自然语言理解任务，但卢森堡语作为官方国家语言之一却常被忽视。需要为卢森堡语建立首个NLU基准来评估模型能力。
AI.method: 基于流行的英语GLUE基准构建ltzGLUE，创建新任务并复用现有任务，包含二分类和多分类设置下的常见NLP任务，如命名实体识别、主题分类和意图分类。
AI.result: 评估了多种卢森堡语预训练语言模型，展示了这些模型在当前卢森堡语处理能力上的概况。
AI.conclusion: 提出了首个卢森堡语NLU基准ltzGLUE，填补了该语言在自然语言理解评估方面的空白，为未来研究提供了基础。

title: Neural Shape Operator Surrogates -- Expression Rate Bounds
summary:
We prove error bounds for operator surrogates of solution operators for partial differential and boundary integral equations on families of domains which are diffeomorphic to one common reference (or latent) domain $D_{ref}$. The pullback of the PDE to $D_{ref}$ via affine-parametric shape encoding produces a collection of holomorphic parametric PDEs on $D_{ref}$. Sufficient conditions for (uniformly with respect to the parameter) well-posedness are given, implying existence, uniqueness and stability of parametric solution families on $D_{ref}$. We illustrate the abstract hypotheses by reviewing recent holomorphy results for a suite of elliptic and parabolic PDEs.
  Quantified parametric holomorphy implies existence of finite-parametric, discrete approximations of the parametric solution families with convergence rates in terms of the number $N$ of parameters. We obtain constructive proofs of existence of Neural and Spectral Operator surrogates for the shape-to-solution maps with error bounds and convergence rate guarantees uniform on the collection of admissible shapes. We admit principal-component shape encoders and frame decoders.
  Our results support in particular the (empirically reported) ability of neural operators to realize data-to-solution maps for elliptic and parabolic PDEs and BIEs that generalize across parametric families of shapes.

AI.tldr: 该论文证明了在参数化形状族上求解偏微分方程和边界积分方程的算子代理的误差界，通过将PDE拉回到参考域得到全纯参数PDE，并构建具有收敛率保证的神经和谱算子代理。
AI.motivation: 研究在参数化形状族上求解PDE和BIE的算子代理的数学基础，为神经算子等数据驱动方法在形状参数化问题中的泛化能力提供理论支持。
AI.method: 将参数化形状上的PDE通过仿射参数形状编码拉回到参考域，得到全纯参数PDE；建立参数解族的存在性、唯一性和稳定性条件；利用量化参数全纯性构造有限参数离散近似。
AI.result: 证明了神经算子和谱算子作为形状到解映射的代理存在性，给出了误差界和收敛率保证，且保证在允许形状集合上一致成立。
AI.conclusion: 该理论结果为神经算子在椭圆和抛物型PDE及BIE的形状参数化问题中的泛化能力提供了数学基础，支持了经验观察到的神经算子能够实现跨形状参数族的数据到解映射。

title: Employing General-Purpose and Biomedical Large Language Models with Advanced Prompt Engineering for Pharmacoepidemiologic Study Design
summary: Background: The potential of large language models (LLMs) to automate and support pharmacoepidemiologic study design is an emerging area of interest, yet their reliability remains insufficiently characterized. General-purpose LLMs often display inaccuracies, while the comparative performance of specialized biomedical LLMs in this domain remains unknown. Methods: This study evaluated general-purpose LLMs (GPT-4o and DeepSeek-R1) versus biomedically fine-tuned LLMs (QuantFactory/Bio-Medical-Llama-3-8B-GGUF and Irathernotsay/qwen2-1.5B-medical_qa-Finetune) using 46 protocols (2018-2024) from the HMA-EMA Catalogue and Sentinel System. Performance was assessed across relevance, logic of justification, and ontology-code agreement across multiple coding systems using Least-to-Most (LTM) and Active Prompting strategies. Results: GPT-4o and DeepSeek-R1 paired with LTM prompting achieved the highest relevance and logic of justification scores, with GPT-4o-LTM reaching a median relevance score of 4 in 8 of 9 questions for HMA-EMA protocols. Biomedical LLMs showed lower relevance overall and frequently generated insufficient justification. All LLMs demonstrated limited proficiency in ontology-code mapping, although LTM provided the most consistent improvements in reasoning stability. Conclusion: Off-the-shelf general-purpose LLMs currently offer superior support for pharmacoepidemiologic design compared to biomedical LLMs. Prompt strategy strongly influenced LLM performance.

AI.tldr: 评估通用LLM与生物医学LLM在药物流行病学研究设计中的表现，发现通用LLM（GPT-4o和DeepSeek-R1）配合LTM提示策略表现最佳，而生物医学LLM表现较差，所有模型在本体代码映射方面都有限制。
AI.motivation: 大型语言模型在药物流行病学研究设计自动化方面具有潜力，但其可靠性尚未充分评估。通用LLM常有不准确之处，而专业生物医学LLM在该领域的表现尚不清楚，需要比较两者的性能。
AI.method: 使用HMA-EMA目录和Sentinel系统的46个协议（2018-2024），评估通用LLM（GPT-4o和DeepSeek-R1）与生物医学微调LLM（Bio-Medical-Llama-3-8B和qwen2-1.5B-medical_qa-Finetune）。通过相关性、逻辑合理性、本体代码一致性等指标，采用Least-to-Most和Active Prompting策略进行评估。
AI.result: GPT-4o和DeepSeek-R1配合LTM提示策略在相关性和逻辑合理性方面得分最高，GPT-4o-LTM在HMA-EMA协议的9个问题中有8个达到中位数相关性得分4。生物医学LLM整体相关性较低，常产生不充分的论证。所有LLM在本体代码映射方面能力有限，但LTM在推理稳定性方面提供了最一致的改进。
AI.conclusion: 现成的通用LLM目前在药物流行病学研究设计支持方面优于生物医学LLM。提示策略对LLM性能有强烈影响，LTM提示策略能显著提升推理稳定性。

title: Clusterability-Based Assessment of Potentially Noisy Views for Multi-View Clustering
summary: In multi-view clustering, the quality of different views may vary substantially, and low-quality or degraded views can impair overall clustering performance. However, existing studies mainly address this issue within the clustering process through view weighting or noise-robust optimization, while paying limited attention to data-level assessment before clustering. In this paper, we study the problem of pre-clustering noisy-view analysis in multi-view data from a clusterability perspective. To this end, we propose a Multi-View Clusterability Score (MVCS), which quantifies the strength of latent cluster-related structures in multi-view data through three complementary components: per-view structural clusterability, joint-space clusterability, and cross-view neighborhood consistency. To the best of our knowledge, this is the first clusterability score specifically designed for multi-view data. We further use it to perform potentially noisy view analysis and noisy-view detection before clustering. Extensive experiments on real-world datasets demonstrate that noisy views can significantly degrade clustering performance, and that, compared with existing clusterability measures designed for single-view data, the proposed method more effectively supports noisy-view analysis and detection.

AI.tldr: 提出首个针对多视图数据的聚类性评分MVCS，用于在聚类前分析潜在噪声视图，包含三个互补组件：单视图结构聚类性、联合空间聚类性和跨视图邻域一致性。
AI.motivation: 多视图聚类中，不同视图的质量差异很大，低质量或退化的视图会损害整体聚类性能。现有研究主要通过聚类过程中的视图加权或噪声鲁棒优化来解决这个问题，而对聚类前的数据级评估关注有限。
AI.method: 提出多视图聚类性评分(MVCS)，通过三个互补组件量化多视图数据中潜在聚类相关结构的强度：1) 单视图结构聚类性；2) 联合空间聚类性；3) 跨视图邻域一致性。这是首个专门为多视图数据设计的聚类性评分。
AI.result: 在真实数据集上的大量实验表明：1) 噪声视图会显著降低聚类性能；2) 与为单视图数据设计的现有聚类性度量相比，所提方法能更有效地支持噪声视图分析和检测。
AI.conclusion: MVCS是首个专门为多视图数据设计的聚类性评分，能够在聚类前有效分析潜在噪声视图，为多视图聚类提供重要的数据级评估工具。

title: How Creative Are Large Language Models in Generating Molecules?
summary: Molecule generation requires satisfying multiple chemical and biological constraints while searching a large and structured chemical space. This makes it a non-binary problem, where effective models must identify non-obvious solutions under constraints while maintaining exploration to improve success by escaping local optima. From this perspective, creativity is a functional requirement in molecular generation rather than an aesthetic notion. Large language models (LLMs) can generate molecular representations directly from natural language prompts, but it remains unclear what type of creativity they exhibit in this setting and how it should be evaluated. In this work, we study the creative behavior of LLMs in molecular generation through a systematic empirical evaluation across physicochemical, ADMET, and biological activity tasks. We characterize creativity along two complementary dimensions, convergent creativity and divergent creativity, and analyze how different factors shape these behaviors. Our results indicate that LLMs exhibit distinct patterns of creative behavior in molecule generation, such as an increase in constraint satisfaction when additional constraints are imposed. Overall, our work is the first to reframe the abilities required for molecule generation as creativity, providing a systematic understanding of creativity in LLM-based molecular generation and clarifying the appropriate use of LLMs in molecular discovery pipelines.

AI.tldr: 该研究首次将分子生成所需能力重新定义为创造力，系统评估了LLMs在分子生成中的创造性行为，发现LLMs表现出独特的创造性模式，如增加约束时能提高约束满足度。
AI.motivation: 分子生成需要满足多种化学和生物约束，同时搜索大规模结构化化学空间，这使得它成为一个非二元问题。LLMs可以直接从自然语言提示生成分子表示，但尚不清楚它们在这种设置下表现出何种创造力以及如何评估这种创造力。
AI.method: 通过系统实证评估，在物理化学、ADMET和生物活性任务中研究LLMs在分子生成中的创造性行为。从两个互补维度（收敛创造力和发散创造力）来表征创造力，并分析不同因素如何塑造这些行为。
AI.result: LLMs在分子生成中表现出独特的创造性行为模式，例如当施加额外约束时，约束满足度会增加。研究提供了对LLM基分子生成中创造力的系统理解。
AI.conclusion: 该研究首次将分子生成所需能力重新定义为创造力，为LLM基分子生成中的创造力提供了系统理解，并阐明了LLMs在分子发现流程中的适当使用方式。

title: RASP-Tuner: Retrieval-Augmented Soft Prompts for Context-Aware Black-Box Optimization in Non-Stationary Environments
comment: Withdraw by ICML and prepare for NeurIPS or ICLR
summary: Many deployed systems expose black-box objectives whose minimizing configuration shifts with an externally observed context. When contexts revisit a small set of latent regimes, an optimizer that discards history pays repeated adaptation cost; when each step must remain inexpensive, full Gaussian-process (GP) refits at high observation counts are difficult to sustain. We cast online tuning as context-conditioned regret minimization and present RASP-Tuner, which instantiates a decomposition motivated by first principles: (i) identify a regime proxy by retrieving similar past contexts; (ii) predict short-horizon loss with a mixture-of-experts surrogate whose input concatenates parameters, context, and a retrieved soft prompt; (iii) adapt chiefly in a low-dimensional prompt subspace, invoking full surrogate updates only when scalarized error or disagreement spikes. A RealErrorComposer maps heterogeneous streaming metrics to [0,1] via EMA-stabilized logistic scores, supplying a single differentiable training target. On nine synthetic non-stationary benchmarks, an adversarial-context sanity check, and three tabular real-world streams (Section on real-world experiments), RASP-Tuner improves or matches cumulative regret relative to our GP-UCB and CMA-ES implementations on seven of nine synthetic tasks under paired tests at horizon T=100, while recording 8-12 times lower wall-clock per step than sliding-window GP-UCB on identical hardware. Idealized analysis in a cluster-separated, strongly convex regime model (RA-GD) supplies sufficient conditions for bounded dynamic regret; the deployed pipeline violates several of these premises, and we articulate which gaps remain open.

AI.tldr: RASP-Tuner：一种用于在线黑盒优化的上下文感知方法，通过混合专家模型和软提示检索来减少重复适应成本，在合成和真实世界任务中实现低后悔值和高效计算。
AI.motivation: 许多部署系统具有黑盒目标函数，其最优配置会随外部观察到的上下文而变化。当上下文重复访问少量潜在机制时，丢弃历史的优化器会重复支付适应成本；而每个步骤必须保持低成本时，高斯过程在高观测数下的完全重新拟合难以持续。
AI.method: RASP-Tuner将在线调优视为上下文条件后悔最小化，采用基于第一性原理的分解：(1)通过检索相似过去上下文识别机制代理；(2)使用混合专家代理预测短期损失，输入包含参数、上下文和检索的软提示；(3)主要在低维提示子空间中进行适应，仅在标量化误差或分歧激增时调用完整代理更新。RealErrorComposer通过EMA稳定逻辑分数将异构流式指标映射到[0,1]，提供单一可微分训练目标。
AI.result: 在9个合成非平稳基准、对抗上下文健全性检查和3个表格真实世界流上，RASP-Tuner在7/9合成任务中改进或匹配累积后悔值（T=100），同时比滑动窗口GP-UCB在相同硬件上每步墙钟时间降低8-12倍。在集群分离、强凸机制模型(RA-GD)中的理想化分析为有界动态后悔提供了充分条件。
AI.conclusion: RASP-Tuner通过上下文感知的混合专家架构和高效的提示适应机制，在保持低成本的同时有效处理非平稳黑盒优化问题。虽然部署管道违反了理想化分析的某些前提，但该方法在实际应用中表现出色，为在线优化提供了实用的解决方案。

title: SignDPO: Multi-level Direct Preference Optimisation for Skeleton-based Gloss-free Sign Language Translation
summary: We present SignDPO, a novel multi-level Direct Preference Optimisation (DPO) framework designed to enhance the alignment of skeleton-based Sign Language Translation. While current skeleton-based models have made significant progress using Maximum Likelihood Estimation, they are primarily constrained by an imitation-based paradigm that lacks discriminative sensitivity to the fine-grained spatio-temporal nuances of sign language, often leading to semantic drift. To address this, SignDPO shifts the optimisation goal from simple sequence mimicry to structured preference alignment across spatial, temporal, and linguistic dimensions. Our framework involves three key designs. First, we introduce a hierarchical perturbation strategy to construct spatial and temporal non-preferred samples at both global and local granularities automatically. Second, we propose a self-guiding mechanism that leverages decoder cross-attention scores to identify and perturb semantically salient skeletal regions, forcing the model to distinguish genuine sign signals from structural distortions. Third, we establish an automated language-level preference generator by fine-tuning a dedicated perturbation model, capturing complex output-level failure modes without manual annotation. Extensive experiments on three widely adopted benchmarks, CSL-Daily, How2Sign, and OpenASL, demonstrate that SignDPO consistently outperforms state-of-the-art gloss-free methods and even rivals established gloss-based ones. Our results suggest that multi-level preference alignment is a powerful paradigm for bridging the gap between high-entropy skeletal trajectories and discrete linguistic semantics.

AI.tldr: SignDPO是一个用于骨架手语翻译的多层次直接偏好优化框架，通过空间、时间和语言三个维度的偏好对齐，提升模型对精细时空特征的区分能力，超越现有无词汇方法并接近有词汇方法性能。
AI.motivation: 当前基于骨架的手语翻译模型主要使用最大似然估计，受限于模仿式范式，缺乏对精细时空特征的区分敏感性，容易导致语义漂移。需要从简单的序列模仿转向结构化偏好对齐。
AI.method: 1. 分层扰动策略：自动构建全局和局部粒度的空间和时间非偏好样本；2. 自引导机制：利用解码器交叉注意力分数识别并扰动语义显著骨架区域；3. 自动化语言级偏好生成器：微调专用扰动模型捕获复杂输出级失败模式。
AI.result: 在CSL-Daily、How2Sign和OpenASL三个基准测试中，SignDPO持续超越最先进的无词汇方法，甚至能与成熟的基于词汇的方法相媲美。
AI.conclusion: 多层次偏好对齐是弥合高熵骨架轨迹与离散语言语义之间差距的有效范式，为骨架手语翻译提供了新的优化方向。

title: Variational Autoencoder Domain Adaptation for Cross-System Generalization in ML-Based SOP Monitoring
summary: Machine learning (ML) models trained to detect physical-layer threats on one optical fiber system often fail catastrophically when applied to a different system, due to variations in operating wavelength, fiber properties, and network architecture. To overcome this, we propose a Domain Adaptation (DA) framework based on a Variational Autoencoder (VAE) that learns a shared representation capturing event signatures common to both systems while suppressing system-specific differences. The shared encoder is first trained on the combined data from two distinct optical systems: a 21 km O-band dark-fiber testbed (System 1) and a 63.4 km C-band live metro ring (System 2). The encoder is then frozen, and a classifier is trained using labels from an individual system. The proposed approach achieves 95.3% and 73.5% cross-system accuracy when moving from System 1 to System 2 and vice versa, respectively. This corresponds to gains of 83.4% and 51% over a fully supervised Deep Neural Network (DNN) baseline trained on a single system, while preserving intra-system performance.

AI.tldr: 提出基于变分自编码器的域适应框架，解决光纤系统中机器学习模型跨系统失效问题，显著提升跨系统检测准确率
AI.motivation: 传统机器学习模型在光纤物理层威胁检测中存在跨系统失效问题，由于工作波长、光纤特性和网络架构的差异，导致模型无法在不同系统间通用
AI.method: 基于变分自编码器的域适应框架：首先在来自两个不同光纤系统（21km O波段暗光纤测试平台和63.4km C波段实时城域环网）的合并数据上训练共享编码器，学习捕获两个系统共同的事件特征同时抑制系统特定差异；然后冻结编码器，使用单个系统的标签训练分类器
AI.result: 从系统1到系统2的跨系统准确率达到95.3%，反向达到73.5%，相比在单个系统上训练的完全监督深度神经网络基线分别提升83.4%和51%，同时保持系统内性能
AI.conclusion: 提出的域适应框架有效解决了光纤系统中机器学习模型跨系统泛化问题，显著提升了物理层威胁检测在不同光纤系统间的可迁移性

title: Sonata: A Hybrid World Model for Inertial Kinematics under Clinical Data Scarcity
summary: We introduce Sonata, a compact latent world model for six-axis trunk IMU representation learning under clinical data scarcity. Clinical cohorts typically comprise tens to hundreds of patients, making web-scale masked-reconstruction objectives poorly matched to the problem. Sonata is a 3.77 M-parameter hybrid model, pre-trained on a harmonised corpus of nine public datasets (739 subjects, 190k windows) with a latent world-model objective that predicts future state rather than reconstructing raw sensor traces. In a controlled comparison against a matched autoregressive forecasting baseline (MAE) on the same backbone, Sonata yields consistently stronger frozen-probe clinical discrimination, prospective fall-risk prediction, and cross-cohort transfer across a 14-arm evaluation suite, while producing higher-rank, more structured latent representations. At 3.77 M parameters the model is compatible with on-device wearable inference, offering a step toward general kinematic world models for neurological assessment.

AI.tldr: Sonata是一个紧凑的潜在世界模型，用于六轴躯干IMU表示学习，专门针对临床数据稀缺场景设计，具有3.77M参数，适合可穿戴设备推理。
AI.motivation: 临床队列通常只有几十到几百名患者，网络规模的掩码重建目标不适用于这种数据稀缺问题，需要专门针对临床IMU数据设计的表示学习方法。
AI.method: Sonata是一个3.77M参数的混合模型，在9个公共数据集（739名受试者，19万个窗口）上进行预训练，使用潜在世界模型目标来预测未来状态，而不是重建原始传感器轨迹。
AI.result: 在与匹配的自回归预测基线（MAE）的对比中，Sonata在14项评估中表现出更强的冻结探针临床区分能力、前瞻性跌倒风险预测能力和跨队列迁移能力，同时产生更高秩、更结构化的潜在表示。
AI.conclusion: Sonata为神经学评估提供了一种通用的运动学世界模型，其紧凑的3.77M参数设计使其兼容可穿戴设备的实时推理，是向临床可部署的IMU表示学习模型迈出的重要一步。

title: Modeling Human Perspectives with Socio-Demographic Representations
summary: Humans often hold different perspectives on the same issues. In many NLP tasks, annotation disagreement can reflect valid subjective perspectives. Modeling annotator perspectives and understanding their relationship with other human factors, such as socio-demographic attributes, have received increasing attention. Prior work typically focuses on single demographic factors or limited combinations. However, in real-world settings, annotator perspectives are shaped by complex social contexts, and finer-grained socio-demographic attributes can better explain human perspectives. In this work, we propose Socio-Contrastive Learning, a method that jointly models annotator perspectives while learning socio-demographic representations. Our method provides an effective approach for the fusion of socio-demographic features and textual representations to predict annotator perspectives, outperforming standard concatenation-based methods. The learned representations further enable analysis and visualization of how demographic factors relate to variation in annotator perspectives. Our code is available at GitHub: https://github.com/Leixin-Zhang/Socio_Contrastive_Learning

AI.tldr: 本文提出Socio-Contrastive Learning方法，联合建模标注者视角并学习社会人口学表征，通过融合社会人口学特征和文本表征来预测标注者视角，优于标准拼接方法。
AI.motivation: 在NLP任务中，标注分歧反映了有效的主观视角。现有研究通常关注单一人口学因素或有限组合，但现实世界中标注者视角由复杂社会背景塑造，更细粒度的社会人口学属性能更好解释人类视角。
AI.method: 提出Socio-Contrastive Learning方法，联合建模标注者视角并学习社会人口学表征，有效融合社会人口学特征和文本表征来预测标注者视角。
AI.result: 该方法在预测标注者视角方面优于标准拼接方法，学习到的表征还能分析和可视化人口学因素如何与标注者视角变化相关联。
AI.conclusion: Socio-Contrastive Learning为建模标注者视角和理解其与社会人口学属性的关系提供了有效方法，能够捕捉更细粒度的社会背景对视角的影响。

title: Towards a Foundation-Model Paradigm for Aerodynamic Prediction in Three-dimensional Design
summary: Accurate machine-learning models for aerodynamic prediction are essential for accelerating shape optimization, yet remain challenging to develop for complex three-dimensional configurations due to the high cost of generating training data. This work introduces a methodology for efficiently constructing accurate surrogate models for design purposes by first pre-training a large-scale model on diverse geometries and then fine-tuning it with a few more detailed task-specific samples. A Transformer-based architecture, AeroTransformer, is developed and tailored for large-scale training to learn aerodynamics. The methodology is evaluated on transonic wings, where the model is pre-trained on SuperWing, a dataset of nearly 30000 samples with broad geometric diversity, and subsequently fine-tuned to handle specific wing shapes perturbed from the Common Research Model. Results show that, with 450 task-specific samples, the proposed methodology achieves 0.36% error on surface-flow prediction, reducing 84.2% compared to training from scratch. The influence of model configurations and training strategies is also systematically studied to provide guidance on effectively training and deploying such models under limited data and computational budgets. To facilitate reuse, we release the datasets and the pre-trained models at https://github.com/tum-pbs/AeroTransformer. An interactive design tool is also built on the pre-trained model and is available online at https://webwing.pbs.cit.tum.de.

AI.tldr: 提出AeroTransformer方法，通过大规模预训练+少量任务微调，实现高精度气动预测，在翼型表面流动预测误差仅0.36%，比从头训练减少84.2%
AI.motivation: 复杂三维构型的气动预测模型开发困难，因为生成训练数据成本高昂。需要一种高效构建准确代理模型的方法，以加速形状优化设计
AI.method: 开发基于Transformer的AeroTransformer架构，先在包含近30000个样本的SuperWing数据集上进行大规模预训练，然后在特定任务（CRM翼型扰动）上用少量样本（450个）进行微调
AI.result: 仅用450个任务特定样本，表面流动预测误差达到0.36%，比从头训练减少84.2%。系统研究了模型配置和训练策略的影响，为有限数据和计算预算下的训练部署提供指导
AI.conclusion: 提出的预训练+微调方法能高效构建准确的气动代理模型，显著降低数据需求。发布了数据集、预训练模型和在线交互设计工具，促进复用

title: Towards Real-Time ECG and EMG Modeling on $μ$ NPUs
summary: The miniaturisation of neural processing units (NPUs) and other low-power accelerators has enabled their integration into microcontroller-scale wearable hardware, supporting near-real-time, offline, and privacy-preserving inference. Yet physiological signal analysis has remained infeasible on such hardware; recent Transformer-based models show state-of-the-art performance but are prohibitively large for resource- and power-constrained hardware and incompatible with $μ$ NPUs due to their dynamic attention operations. We introduce PhysioLite, a lightweight, NPU-compatible model architecture and training framework for ECG/EMG signal analysis. Using learnable wavelet filter banks, CPU-offloaded positional encoding, and hardware-aware layer design, PhysioLite reaches performance comparable to state-of-the-art Transformer-based foundation models on ECG and EMG benchmarks, while being <10% of the size ($\sim$370KB with 8-bit quantization). We also profile its component-wise latency and resource consumption on both the MAX78000 and HX6538 WE2 $μ$ NPUs, demonstrating its viability for signal analysis on constrained, battery-powered hardware. We release our model(s) and training framework at: https://github.com/j0shmillar/physiolite.

AI.tldr: PhysioLite是一个轻量级、NPU兼容的模型架构和训练框架，用于ECG/EMG信号分析，在保持与Transformer基础模型相当性能的同时，模型大小仅为后者的<10%（约370KB），可在资源受限的微控制器硬件上运行。
AI.motivation: 虽然神经处理单元（NPUs）和其他低功耗加速器已经小型化并集成到微控制器级可穿戴硬件中，但生理信号分析在这些硬件上仍然不可行。现有的Transformer模型虽然性能优异，但模型过大且动态注意力操作与μNPUs不兼容。
AI.method: 使用可学习的小波滤波器组、CPU卸载的位置编码和硬件感知的层设计，创建轻量级NPU兼容的PhysioLite架构。通过8位量化将模型压缩到约370KB。
AI.result: PhysioLite在ECG和EMG基准测试中达到与最先进Transformer基础模型相当的性能，同时在MAX78000和HX6538 WE2 μNPUs上展示了可行的延迟和资源消耗。
AI.conclusion: PhysioLite证明了在资源受限、电池供电的硬件上进行生理信号分析的可行性，为可穿戴设备上的实时、离线、隐私保护的推理提供了解决方案。

title: Culture-Aware Humorous Captioning: Multimodal Humor Generation across Cultural Contexts
summary: Recent multimodal large language models have shown promising ability in generating humorous captions for images, yet they still lack stable control over explicit cultural context, making it difficult to jointly maintain image relevance, contextual appropriateness, and humor quality under a specified cultural background. To address this limitation, we introduce a new multimodal generation task, culture-aware humorous captioning, which requires a model to generate a humorous caption conditioned on both an input image and a target cultural context. Captions generated under different cultural contexts are not expected to share the same surface form, but should remain grounded in similar visual situations or humorous rationales.To support this task, we establish a six-dimensional evaluation framework covering image relevance, contextual fit, semantic richness, reasonableness, humor, and creativity. We further propose a staged alignment framework that first initializes the model with high-resource supervision under the Western cultural context, then performs multi-dimensional preference alignment via judge-based GRPO with a Degradation-aware Prototype Repulsion Constraint to mitigate reward hacking in open-ended generation, and finally adapts the model to the Eastern cultural context with a small amount of supervision. Experimental results show that our method achieves stronger overall performance under the proposed evaluation framework, with particularly large gains in contextual fit and a better balance between image relevance and humor under cultural constraints.

AI.tldr: 提出文化感知幽默字幕生成任务，通过多阶段对齐框架解决多模态大语言模型在特定文化背景下难以同时保持图像相关性、上下文适当性和幽默质量的问题。
AI.motivation: 当前多模态大语言模型在生成图像幽默字幕方面表现出潜力，但缺乏对明确文化背景的稳定控制，难以在指定文化背景下同时保持图像相关性、上下文适当性和幽默质量。
AI.method: 提出多阶段对齐框架：1) 在西方文化背景下用高资源监督初始化模型；2) 通过基于评判的GRPO进行多维偏好对齐，加入退化感知原型排斥约束来缓解开放生成中的奖励黑客问题；3) 用少量监督将模型适应到东方文化背景。
AI.result: 实验结果表明，该方法在提出的六维评估框架下实现了更强的整体性能，特别是在上下文适配方面有显著提升，并在文化约束下更好地平衡了图像相关性和幽默性。
AI.conclusion: 该研究提出了文化感知幽默字幕生成任务和相应的评估框架，通过多阶段对齐方法有效解决了多模态模型在文化背景控制方面的局限性，实现了更好的文化适应性和生成质量平衡。

title: Implicit neural representations as a coordinate-based framework for continuous environmental field reconstruction from sparse ecological observations
summary: Reconstructing continuous environmental fields from sparse and irregular observations remains a central challenge in environmental modelling and biodiversity informatics. Many ecological datasets are heterogeneous in space and time, making grid-based approaches difficult to scale or generalise across domains. Here, we evaluate implicit neural representations (INRs) as a coordinate-based modelling framework for learning continuous spatial and spatio-temporal fields directly from coordinate inputs. We analyse their behaviour across three representative modelling scenarios: species distribution reconstruction, phenological dynamics, and morphological segmentation derived from open biodiversity data. Beyond predictive performance, we examine interpolation behaviour, spatial coherence, and computational characteristics relevant for environmental modelling workflows, including scalability, resolution-independent querying, and architectural inductive bias. Results show that neural fields provide stable continuous representations with predictable computational cost, complementing classical smoothers and tree-based approaches. These findings position coordinate-based neural fields as a flexible representation layer that can be integrated into environmental modelling pipelines and exploratory analysis frameworks for large, irregularly sampled datasets.

AI.tldr: 该论文评估了隐式神经表示（INRs）作为坐标建模框架，用于从稀疏、不规则的生物多样性观测数据中重建连续环境场，在物种分布、物候动态和形态分割三个场景中验证了其性能。
AI.motivation: 环境建模和生物多样性信息学面临的核心挑战是从稀疏、不规则观测中重建连续环境场。许多生态数据集在时空上具有异质性，使得基于网格的方法难以跨领域扩展或泛化。
AI.method: 使用隐式神经表示（INRs）作为坐标建模框架，直接从坐标输入学习连续空间和时空场。在三个代表性建模场景中进行分析：物种分布重建、物候动态和基于开放生物多样性数据的形态分割。
AI.result: 神经场提供了稳定的连续表示，具有可预测的计算成本，能够补充经典平滑器和基于树的方法。它们在插值行为、空间一致性和计算特性方面表现良好，包括可扩展性、分辨率无关查询和架构归纳偏置。
AI.conclusion: 基于坐标的神经场可以作为一个灵活的表示层，集成到环境建模流程和探索性分析框架中，特别适用于处理大规模、不规则采样的数据集。

title: Efficient Low-Resource Language Adaptation via Multi-Source Dynamic Logit Fusion
summary: Adapting large language models (LLMs) to low-resource languages (LRLs) is constrained by the scarcity of task data and computational resources. Although Proxy Tuning offers a logit-level strategy for introducing scaling effects, it often fails in LRL settings because the large model's weak LRL competence might overwhelm the knowledge of specialized smaller models. We thus propose TriMix, a test-time logit fusion framework that dynamically balances capabilities from three different sources: LRL competence from a continually pretrained small model, task competence from high-resource language instruction tuning, and the scaling benefits of large models. It is data- and compute-efficient, requiring no LRL task annotations, and only continual pretraining on a small model. Experiments across four model families and eight LRLs show that TriMix consistently outperforms single-model baselines and Proxy Tuning. Our analysis reveals that prioritizing the small LRL-specialized model's logits is crucial for success, challenging the prevalent large-model-dominant assumption.

AI.tldr: TriMix：一种测试时logit融合框架，通过动态平衡三个来源的能力（小模型的低资源语言能力、高资源语言指令调优的任务能力、大模型的缩放优势），在低资源语言场景中超越Proxy Tuning和单模型基线。
AI.motivation: 将大语言模型适配到低资源语言面临任务数据稀缺和计算资源有限的约束。Proxy Tuning虽然提供logit级策略引入缩放效应，但在低资源语言场景中常因大模型的弱低资源语言能力压倒专业化小模型的知识而失败。
AI.method: 提出TriMix测试时logit融合框架，动态平衡三个来源的能力：1）持续预训练小模型的低资源语言能力；2）高资源语言指令调优的任务能力；3）大模型的缩放优势。该方法数据高效（无需低资源语言任务标注）且计算高效（仅需对小模型进行持续预训练）。
AI.result: 在四个模型家族和八种低资源语言上的实验表明，TriMix持续优于单模型基线和Proxy Tuning。分析显示，优先考虑小低资源语言专业化模型的logits对成功至关重要，挑战了当前普遍的大模型主导假设。
AI.conclusion: TriMix通过有效融合三个不同来源的能力，为低资源语言适配提供了一种数据高效、计算高效的解决方案，并揭示了在低资源语言场景中优先考虑小专业化模型的重要性。

title: Predicting LLM Compression Degradation from Spectral Statistics
summary: Matrix-level low-rank compression is a promising way to reduce the cost of large language models, but running compression and evaluating the resulting models on language tasks can be prohibitively expensive. Can compression-induced degradation be predicted before committing to this compute? We systematically analyze the Qwen3 and Gemma3 model families across four representative low-rank compression methods: vanilla SVD, two ASVD variants, and SVD-LLM. We find that stable rank and information density, measured in bits per parameter, dominate performance degradation. The interaction term $γ\cdot \barρ_s$, defined as compression ratio times stable rank, is a robust predictor of accuracy degradation, achieving leave-one-out cross-validation Pearson correlations of $0.890$ for attention layers and $0.839$ for MLP layers. We provide theoretical intuition for why this predictor succeeds by connecting it to standard SVD truncation bounds and error composition mechanisms in transformer layers. These findings enable a predict-then-compress workflow: compute $γ\cdot \barρ_s$ from weights, estimate degradation, and invest compute only in desirable configurations.

AI.tldr: 该论文提出使用压缩比与稳定秩的乘积（γ·ρ_s）作为预测低秩压缩对LLM性能影响的指标，实现"先预测后压缩"的工作流程，避免昂贵的压缩计算成本。
AI.motivation: 大型语言模型的低秩压缩计算成本高昂，压缩后评估模型性能也很昂贵。需要一种方法在投入大量计算资源进行压缩之前，就能预测压缩导致的性能下降。
AI.method: 系统分析Qwen3和Gemma3模型家族，使用四种代表性低秩压缩方法（vanilla SVD、两种ASVD变体、SVD-LLM）。研究发现稳定秩和信息密度（每参数比特数）主导性能下降，提出压缩比与稳定秩的乘积（γ·ρ_s）作为预测指标。
AI.result: γ·ρ_s是预测准确度下降的稳健指标，在注意力层和MLP层分别达到0.890和0.839的留一交叉验证皮尔逊相关性。该指标与标准SVD截断界限和Transformer层误差传播机制有理论联系。
AI.conclusion: 研究提出了"先预测后压缩"的工作流程：从权重计算γ·ρ_s，估计性能下降，只对有利的配置投入计算资源，从而显著降低低秩压缩的评估成本。

title: FLiP: Towards understanding and interpreting multimodal multilingual sentence embeddings
summary: This paper presents factorized linear projection (FLiP) models for understanding pretrained sentence embedding spaces. We train FLiP models to recover the lexical content from multilingual (LaBSE), multimodal (SONAR) and API-based (Gemini) sentence embedding spaces in several high- and mid-resource languages. We show that FLiP can recall more than 75% of lexical content from the embeddings, significantly outperforming existing non-factorized baselines. Using this as a diagnostic tool, we uncover the modality and language biases across the selected sentence encoders and provide practitioners with intrinsic insights about the encoders without relying on conventional downstream evaluation tasks. Our implementation is public https://github.com/BUTSpeechFIT/FLiP.

AI.tldr: FLiP模型通过因子化线性投影分析预训练句子嵌入空间，能够从多语言、多模态和API基础的嵌入中恢复超过75%的词汇内容，显著优于现有基线，为理解嵌入空间提供了诊断工具。
AI.motivation: 现有方法难以深入理解预训练句子嵌入空间的内在特性，缺乏不依赖下游任务的诊断工具来分析嵌入空间的模态和语言偏差。
AI.method: 提出因子化线性投影（FLiP）模型，通过训练线性投影从句子嵌入中恢复原始词汇内容，应用于LaBSE（多语言）、SONAR（多模态）和Gemini（API基础）等嵌入空间。
AI.result: FLiP能够从嵌入中恢复超过75%的词汇内容，显著优于非因子化基线；成功揭示了所选句子编码器的模态和语言偏差，提供了内在洞察。
AI.conclusion: FLiP为分析预训练句子嵌入空间提供了有效的诊断工具，能够在不依赖传统下游评估任务的情况下揭示编码器的内在特性，代码已开源。

title: Retrieval-Augmented Multimodal Model for Fake News Detection
summary: In recent years, multimodal multidomain fake news detection has garnered increasing attention. Nevertheless, this direction presents two significant challenges: (1) Failure to Capture Cross-Instance Narrative Consistency: existing models usually evaluate each news in isolation, fail to capture cross-instance narrative consistency, and thus struggle to address the spread of cluster based fake news driven by social media; (2) Lack of Domain Specific Knowledge for Reasoning: conventional models, which rely solely on knowledge encoded in their parameters during training, struggle to generalize to new or data-scarce domains (e.g., emerging events or niche topics). To tackle these challenges, we introduce Retrieval-Augmented Multimodal Model for Fake News Detection (RAMM). First, RAMM employs a Multimodal Large Language Model (MLLM) as its backbone to capture cross-modal semantic information from news samples. Second, RAMM incorporates an Abstract Narrative Alignment Module. This component adaptively extracts abstract narrative consistency from diverse instances across distinct domains, aggregates relevant knowledge, and thereby enables the modeling of high-level narrative information. Finally, RAMM introduces a Semantic Representation Alignment Module, which aligns the model's decision-making paradigm with that of humans - specifically, it shifts the model's reasoning process from direct inference on multimodal features to an instance-based analogical reasoning process. Extensive experimental results on three public datasets validate the efficacy of our proposed approach. Our code is available at the following link: https://github.com/li-yiheng/RAMM

AI.tldr: RAMM是一个检索增强的多模态假新闻检测模型，通过MLLM骨干网络、抽象叙事对齐模块和语义表示对齐模块，解决跨实例叙事一致性和领域特定知识推理的挑战。
AI.motivation: 当前多模态多领域假新闻检测面临两个主要挑战：1) 现有模型孤立评估每条新闻，无法捕捉跨实例的叙事一致性，难以应对社交媒体驱动的集群式假新闻传播；2) 传统模型仅依赖训练时编码的知识，难以泛化到新领域或数据稀缺领域（如新兴事件或小众话题）。
AI.method: RAMM采用三阶段方法：1) 使用多模态大语言模型(MLLM)作为骨干网络，从新闻样本中捕捉跨模态语义信息；2) 引入抽象叙事对齐模块，自适应地从不同领域的多样实例中提取抽象叙事一致性，聚合相关知识；3) 设计语义表示对齐模块，将模型的决策范式与人类对齐，从直接多模态特征推理转向基于实例的类比推理过程。
AI.result: 在三个公共数据集上的大量实验结果验证了所提方法的有效性。具体性能指标未在摘要中详细说明，但实验结果表明RAMM能够有效解决跨实例叙事一致性和领域特定知识推理的挑战。
AI.conclusion: RAMM通过结合MLLM骨干网络、抽象叙事对齐和语义表示对齐，成功解决了多模态多领域假新闻检测中的关键挑战，为应对社交媒体驱动的集群式假新闻传播和领域泛化问题提供了有效解决方案。

title: Generalization Boundaries of Fine-Tuned Small Language Models for Graph Structural Inference
summary: Small language models fine-tuned for graph property estimation have demonstrated strong in-distribution performance, yet their generalization capabilities beyond training conditions remain poorly understood. In this work, we systematically investigate the boundaries of structural inference in fine-tuned small language models along two generalization axes - graph size and graph family distribution - and assess domain-learning capability on real-world graph benchmarks. Using a controlled experimental setup with three instruction-tuned models in the 3-4B parameter class and two graph serialization formats, we evaluate performance on graphs substantially larger than the training range and across held-out random graph families. Our results show that fine-tuned models maintain strong ordinal consistency across structurally distinct graph families and continue to rank graphs by structural properties on inputs substantially larger than those seen during training, with distinct architecture-specific degradation profiles. These findings delineate where fine-tuned small language models generalize reliably, providing empirical grounding for their use in graph-based reasoning tasks.

AI.tldr: 本文系统研究了微调后的小型语言模型在图属性估计任务中的泛化能力，重点关注图规模和图族分布两个维度，发现模型在超出训练范围的情况下仍能保持结构推理能力。
AI.motivation: 尽管微调后的小型语言模型在图属性估计任务中表现出良好的分布内性能，但其在训练条件之外的泛化能力尚未得到充分理解。本文旨在系统探索这些模型在结构推理方面的边界。
AI.method: 采用控制实验设置，使用3-4B参数规模的三种指令微调模型和两种图序列化格式，评估模型在远大于训练范围的图规模上以及跨保留随机图族上的性能。
AI.result: 研究发现：1）微调模型在不同结构图族之间保持强序一致性；2）在远大于训练输入的图上仍能按结构属性对图进行排序；3）不同架构模型表现出特定的性能退化模式。
AI.conclusion: 这些发现明确了微调后小型语言模型能够可靠泛化的边界，为它们在基于图的推理任务中的应用提供了实证基础，表明模型在超出训练条件的情况下仍能保持结构推理能力。

title: Decisive: Guiding User Decisions with Optimal Preference Elicitation from Unstructured Documents
summary: Decision-making is a cognitively intensive task that requires synthesizing relevant information from multiple unstructured sources, weighing competing factors, and incorporating subjective user preferences. Existing methods, including large language models and traditional decision-support systems, fall short: they often overwhelm users with information or fail to capture nuanced preferences accurately. We present Decisive, an interactive decision-making framework that combines document-grounded reasoning with Bayesian preference inference. Our approach grounds decisions in an objective option-scoring matrix extracted from source documents, while actively learning a user's latent preference vector through targeted elicitation. Users answer pairwise tradeoff questions adaptively selected to maximize information gain over the final decision. This process converges efficiently, minimizing user effort while ensuring recommendations remain transparent and personalized. Through extensive experiments, we demonstrate that our approach significantly outperforms both general-purpose LLMs and existing decision-making frameworks achieving up to 20% improvement in decision accuracy over strong baselines across domains.

AI.tldr: Decisive是一个结合文档基础推理与贝叶斯偏好推断的交互式决策框架，通过主动学习用户潜在偏好向量，显著提升决策准确性
AI.motivation: 现有决策方法（包括大语言模型和传统决策支持系统）存在不足：要么给用户提供过多信息造成负担，要么无法准确捕捉细微偏好，需要更有效的决策支持框架
AI.method: 结合文档基础推理与贝叶斯偏好推断，从源文档提取客观选项评分矩阵，同时通过自适应选择的成对权衡问题主动学习用户的潜在偏好向量，最大化最终决策的信息增益
AI.result: 通过广泛实验证明，该方法显著优于通用大语言模型和现有决策框架，在多个领域比强基线实现高达20%的决策准确性提升
AI.conclusion: Decisive框架通过最小化用户努力同时确保推荐透明和个性化，实现了高效收敛的交互式决策支持，解决了现有方法的局限性

title: LoRaQ: Optimized Low Rank Approximation for 4-bit Quantization
summary: Post-training quantization (PTQ) is essential for deploying large diffusion transformers on resource-constrained hardware, but aggressive 4-bit quantization significantly degrades generative performance. Low-rank approximation methods have emerged as a promising solution by appending auxiliary linear branches to restore performance. However, current state-of-the-art approaches assume these branches must retain high precision (W16A16) and rely on heavy, data-dependent calibration for initialization. We challenge both limitations with LoRaQ (Low-Rank Approximated Quantization), a simple, data-free calibration approach that optimizes quantization error compensation. By overcoming the need for high-precision branches, LoRaQ enables the first fully sub-16 bit pipeline, allowing the low-rank branch itself to be quantized. We demonstrate that, at equal memory overhead, LoRaQ outperforms the state-of-the-art methods in their native implementations on Pixart-$Σ$ and SANA. We also analyze mixed-precision configurations, showing that setups such as W8A8, W6A6, and W4A8 for the low-rank branch, alongside a W4 main layer, yield superior results while maintaining a fully quantized architecture compatible with modern mixed-precision hardware.

AI.tldr: LoRaQ提出了一种无需数据校准的低秩近似量化方法，首次实现了完全低于16位的扩散变换器量化管道，在相同内存开销下优于现有方法。
AI.motivation: 后训练量化对于在资源受限硬件上部署大型扩散变换器至关重要，但激进的4位量化会显著降低生成性能。现有低秩近似方法需要高精度分支（W16A16）和依赖大量数据校准，限制了实际应用。
AI.method: LoRaQ通过优化量化误差补偿，无需数据校准，允许低秩分支本身也被量化，实现了完全低于16位的量化管道。支持混合精度配置如W8A8、W6A6、W4A8等。
AI.result: 在相同内存开销下，LoRaQ在Pixart-Σ和SANA上优于现有方法。混合精度配置（如W8A8、W6A6、W4A8低秩分支配合W4主层）在保持完全量化架构的同时获得更好结果。
AI.conclusion: LoRaQ突破了现有低秩近似量化方法的限制，实现了无需数据校准、完全低于16位的量化方案，兼容现代混合精度硬件，为大型扩散变换器的部署提供了更实用的解决方案。

title: TLoRA: Task-aware Low Rank Adaptation of Large Language Models
summary: Low-Rank Adaptation (LoRA) has become a widely adopted parameter-efficient fine-tuning method for large language models, with its effectiveness largely influenced by the allocation of ranks and scaling factors, as well as initialization. Existing LoRA variants typically address only one of these factors, often at the cost of increased training complexity or reduced practical efficiency. In this work, we present Task-aware Low-Rank Adaptation (TLoRA), a unified framework that jointly optimizes initialization and resource allocation at the outset of training. TLoRA introduces a data-driven initialization strategy that aligns the LoRA $A$ matrix with task-relevant subspaces by performing singular value decomposition on the product of pre-trained weights and input activation covariance. After this, the $A$ matrix is frozen, and only the $B$ matrix is trained. Furthermore, TLoRA employs a sensitivity-based importance metric to adaptively allocate ranks and scaling factors across layers under a fixed parameter budget. We conduct extensive experiments that demonstrate TLoRA consistently performs excellently across various tasks, including natural language understanding, commonsense reasoning, math reasoning, code generation, and chat generation, while significantly reducing the number of trainable parameters.

AI.tldr: TLoRA是一个统一的LoRA优化框架，通过数据驱动的初始化策略和基于敏感度的资源分配，在固定参数预算下显著提升大语言模型微调效果。
AI.motivation: 现有LoRA变体通常只解决初始化、秩分配或缩放因子中的一个问题，且往往以增加训练复杂度或降低实际效率为代价。需要一种能联合优化这些因素的方法。
AI.method: 1. 数据驱动初始化：通过预训练权重与输入激活协方差的乘积进行奇异值分解，将LoRA的A矩阵与任务相关子空间对齐后冻结；2. 基于敏感度的重要性度量：在固定参数预算下自适应分配各层的秩和缩放因子。
AI.result: TLoRA在自然语言理解、常识推理、数学推理、代码生成和聊天生成等多种任务上表现优异，同时显著减少了可训练参数数量。
AI.conclusion: TLoRA提供了一个统一的框架，能够联合优化LoRA的初始化和资源分配，在保持高效参数微调的同时，在各种任务上实现卓越性能。

title: An `Inverse' Experimental Framework to Estimate Market Efficiency
summary: Digital marketplaces processing billions of dollars annually represent critical infrastructure in sociotechnical ecosystems, yet their performance optimization lacks principled measurement frameworks that can inform algorithmic governance decisions regarding market efficiency and fairness from complex market data. By looking at orderbook data from double auction markets alone, because bids and asks do not represent true maximum willingnesses to buy and true minimum willingnesses to sell, there is little an economist can say about the market's actual performance in terms of allocative efficiency. We turn to experimental data to address this issue, `inverting' the standard induced value approach of double auction experiments. Our aim is to predict key market features relevant to market efficiency, particularly allocative efficiency, using orderbook data only -- specifically bids, asks and price realizations, but not the induced reservation values -- as early as possible. Since there is no established model of strategically optimal behavior in these markets, and because orderbook data is highly unstructured, non-stationary and non-linear, we propose quantile-based normalization techniques that help us build general predictive models. We develop and train several models, including linear regressions and gradient boosting trees, leveraging quantile-based input from the underlying supply-demand model. Our models can predict allocative efficiency with reasonable accuracy from the earliest bids and asks, and these predictions improve with additional realized price data. The performance of the prediction techniques varies by target and market type. Our framework holds significant potential for application to real-world market data, offering valuable insights into market efficiency and performance, even prior to any trade realizations.

AI.tldr: 提出一个基于分位数归一化的预测框架，仅使用订单簿数据（买卖报价和价格实现）来预测市场分配效率，无需真实保留价值信息。
AI.motivation: 数字市场作为关键基础设施缺乏原则性的性能测量框架，传统订单簿数据无法反映真实买卖意愿，经济学家难以评估市场实际分配效率。
AI.method: 采用实验数据，反转标准诱导价值方法，提出分位数归一化技术处理非结构化、非平稳、非线性的订单簿数据，建立线性回归和梯度提升树等预测模型。
AI.result: 模型能够从最早的买卖报价中合理预测分配效率，随着价格实现数据的增加预测效果改善，不同目标和市场类型的预测性能有所差异。
AI.conclusion: 该框架对现实市场数据具有重要应用潜力，能在交易实现前提供有价值的市场效率和性能洞察。

title: Depth Registers Unlock W4A4 on SwiGLU: A Reader/Generator Decomposition
summary: We study post-training W4A4 quantization in a controlled 300M-parameter SwiGLU decoder-only language model trained on 5B tokens of FineWeb-Edu, and ask which input-activation sites dominate the error. Naive round-to-nearest W4A4 collapses validation perplexity from FP16 23.6 to 1727. A simple residual-axis training-time intervention -- Depth Registers with a register-magnitude hinge loss (DR+sink) -- reduces this to 119 (about 14x) at matched FP16 PPL and matched zero-shot capacity, and composes with SmoothQuant to 39.9 PPL. The residual ~2 PPL gap to FP16 is the diagnostic core. We decompose W4A4 damage by input-activation site: the five trainable linears in a SwiGLU block split into residual-axis readers (qkv, w1, w3) and block-internal generators (o_proj, w2). Elementary norm arguments show residual-axis magnitude control bounds readers tightly but leaves w2's bilinear input bounded only by the trivial product of factor bounds; empirically, DR+sink collapses reader kurtosis while leaving generators essentially unchanged, and the reader-rescued W4A4 residue is flat at ~0.28 nats across three matched checkpoints with Delta-remove(w2) dominating. We present DR+sink as a training-time probe rather than a deployment proposal: a post-hoc alternative (Per-Linear QuaRot) nearly matches it on the reader axis. Full QuaRot -- adding online per-head value Hadamard plus online w2-input rotation -- does not close the gap either, directly testing the prediction that orthogonal rotation cannot bound the bilinear SwiGLU tail. Claims are specific to our 300M, 5B-token, single-seed setting, and our experiments do not isolate the partition from the hinge.

AI.tldr: 研究在300M参数SwiGLU语言模型中，W4A4量化误差主要来自残差轴读取器(qkv,w1,w3)，通过深度寄存器+铰链损失(DR+sink)训练时干预可显著降低误差，但无法完全解决w2的双线性输入问题。
AI.motivation: 研究W4A4量化后训练中，哪些输入激活位置主导误差，以理解量化误差的来源并开发改进方法。
AI.method: 在300M参数SwiGLU解码器语言模型上，使用深度寄存器+铰链损失(DR+sink)训练时干预，分析残差轴读取器(qkv,w1,w3)和块内生成器(o_proj,w2)的误差贡献。
AI.result: DR+sink将W4A4验证困惑度从1727降至119(约14倍改进)，与SmoothQuant组合可达39.9 PPL。残差轴读取器误差被有效控制，但w2的双线性输入误差仍主导残差差距(~2 PPL)。
AI.conclusion: W4A4量化误差主要由残差轴读取器主导，可通过训练时干预控制，但w2的双线性输入问题无法通过正交旋转解决，需要专门处理。

title: Does "Do Differentiable Simulators Give Better Policy Gradients?'' Give Better Policy Gradients?
summary: In policy gradient reinforcement learning, access to a differentiable model enables 1st-order gradient estimation that accelerates learning compared to relying solely on derivative-free 0th-order estimators. However, discontinuous dynamics cause bias and undermine the effectiveness of 1st-order estimators. Prior work addressed this bias by constructing a confidence interval around the REINFORCE 0th-order gradient estimator and using these bounds to detect discontinuities. However, the REINFORCE estimator is notoriously noisy, and we find that this method requires task-specific hyperparameter tuning and has low sample efficiency. This paper asks whether such bias is the primary obstacle and what minimal fixes suffice. First, we re-examine standard discontinuous settings from prior work and introduce DDCG, a lightweight test that switches estimators in nonsmooth regions; with a single hyperparameter, DDCG achieves robust performance and remains reliable with small samples. Second, on differentiable robotics control tasks, we present IVW-H, a per-step inverse-variance implementation that stabilizes variance without explicit discontinuity detection and yields strong results. Together, these findings indicate that while estimator switching improves robustness in controlled studies, careful variance control often dominates in practical deployments.

AI.tldr: 论文研究了策略梯度强化学习中不连续动态导致的梯度估计偏差问题，提出了两种轻量级解决方案：DDCG（不连续区域切换估计器）和IVW-H（逆方差加权方法）。
AI.motivation: 在策略梯度强化学习中，可微分模型能提供一阶梯度估计加速学习，但不连续动态会导致偏差并削弱一阶估计器的效果。现有方法使用REINFORCE零阶估计器构建置信区间检测不连续性，但该方法噪声大、需要任务特定超参数调优且样本效率低。
AI.method: 1. 提出DDCG：轻量级测试方法，在不平滑区域切换估计器，只需单个超参数；2. 提出IVW-H：每步逆方差加权实现，无需显式不连续性检测即可稳定方差。
AI.result: DDCG在标准不连续设置中表现出鲁棒性能，小样本下仍可靠；IVW-H在可微分机器人控制任务中产生强结果。研究表明估计器切换在受控研究中提高鲁棒性，但在实际部署中仔细的方差控制往往更为关键。
AI.conclusion: 偏差并非主要障碍，最小化修复即可解决。估计器切换在受控研究中提高鲁棒性，但在实际应用中，仔细的方差控制通常占主导地位。两种轻量级方法都能有效应对不连续动态带来的挑战。

title: FreezeEmpath: Efficient Training for Empathetic Spoken Chatbots with Frozen LLMs
summary: Empathy is essential for fostering natural interactions in spoken dialogue systems, as it enables machines to recognize the emotional tone of human speech and deliver empathetic responses. Recent research has made significant progress in developing empathetic spoken chatbots based on large language models (LLMs). However, several challenges still exist when training such models, including reliance on costly empathetic speech instruction data and a lack of emotional expressiveness in the generated speech. Finetuning LLM with cross-modal empathetic instruction data may also lead to catastrophic forgetting and a degradation of its general capability. To address these challenges, we propose FreezeEmpath, an end-to-end empathetic spoken chatbot trained in a simple and efficient manner. The entire training process relies solely on existing speech instruction data and speech emotion recognition (SER) data, while keeping the LLM's parameters frozen. Experiments demonstrate that FreezeEmpath is able to generate emotionally expressive speech and outperforms other empathetic models in empathetic dialogue, SER, and SpokenQA tasks, demonstrating the effectiveness of our training strategy.

AI.tldr: FreezeEmpath：一种简单高效的端到端共情语音聊天机器人，通过冻结LLM参数，仅使用现有语音指令数据和语音情感识别数据进行训练，解决了传统方法依赖昂贵共情语音数据、生成语音缺乏情感表达以及灾难性遗忘等问题。
AI.motivation: 共情对于语音对话系统至关重要，但现有基于大语言模型的共情语音聊天机器人面临三大挑战：1）依赖昂贵的共情语音指令数据；2）生成语音缺乏情感表达；3）跨模态微调可能导致灾难性遗忘和通用能力退化。
AI.method: 提出FreezeEmpath方法，采用简单高效的端到端训练方式，仅使用现有语音指令数据和语音情感识别（SER）数据，同时保持大语言模型参数冻结，避免灾难性遗忘。
AI.result: 实验表明，FreezeEmpath能够生成富有情感表达的语音，在共情对话、语音情感识别和语音问答任务上优于其他共情模型，证明了训练策略的有效性。
AI.conclusion: FreezeEmpath通过冻结LLM参数并仅使用现有数据，成功解决了共情语音聊天机器人训练中的关键挑战，为构建更自然、富有情感的语音交互系统提供了有效方案。

title: Scalable Neighborhood-Based Multi-Agent Actor-Critic
summary: We propose MADDPG-K, a scalable extension to Multi-Agent Deep Deterministic Policy Gradient (MADDPG) that addresses the computational limitations of centralized critic approaches. Centralized critics, which condition on the observations and actions of all agents, have demonstrated significant performance gains in cooperative and competitive multi-agent settings. However, their critic networks grow linearly in input size with the number of agents, making them increasingly expensive to train at scale. MADDPG-K mitigates this by restricting each agent's critic to the $k$ closest agents under a chosen metric which in our case is Euclidean distance. This ensures a constant-size critic input regardless of the total agent count. We analyze the complexity of this approach, showing that the quadratic cost it retains arises from cheap scalar distance computations rather than the expensive neural network matrix multiplications that bottleneck standard MADDPG. We validate our method empirically across cooperative and adversarial environments from the Multi-Particle Environment suite, demonstrating competitive or superior performance compared to MADDPG, faster convergence in cooperative settings, and better runtime scaling as the number of agents grows. Our code is available at https://github.com/TimGop/MADDPG-K .

AI.tldr: MADDPG-K扩展MADDPG，通过限制每个智能体的critic只关注k个最近邻智能体，解决集中式critic计算复杂度随智能体数量线性增长的问题。
AI.motivation: 集中式critic方法在观察和动作上依赖所有智能体，在多智能体环境中表现出色，但其critic网络输入大小随智能体数量线性增长，导致大规模训练成本过高。
AI.method: MADDPG-K限制每个智能体的critic只考虑k个最近邻智能体（使用欧氏距离度量），确保critic输入大小恒定，不随总智能体数量变化。保留的二次计算成本来自廉价的标量距离计算，而非昂贵的神经网络矩阵乘法。
AI.result: 在Multi-Particle Environment套件的合作和对抗环境中验证，MADDPG-K相比MADDPG表现出竞争性或更优的性能，在合作环境中收敛更快，且随着智能体数量增加具有更好的运行时扩展性。
AI.conclusion: MADDPG-K通过限制critic关注范围，有效解决了集中式critic方法的计算扩展性问题，同时保持了多智能体强化学习的性能优势。

title: MM-JudgeBias: A Benchmark for Evaluating Compositional Biases in MLLM-as-a-Judge
summary: Multimodal Large Language Models (MLLMs) have been increasingly used as automatic evaluators-a paradigm known as MLLM-as-a-Judge. However, their reliability and vulnerabilities to biases remain underexplored. We find that many MLLM judges fail to reliably integrate key visual or textual cues, yielding unreliable evaluations when evidence is missing or mismatched, and exhibiting instability under semantically irrelevant perturbations. To address this, we systematically define Compositional Bias in MLLM-as-a-Judge systems and introduce MM-JudgeBias, a benchmark for evaluating it. MM-JudgeBias introduces controlled perturbations across Query, Image, and Response, and evaluates model behavior via two complementary metrics: Bias-Deviation (BD) for sensitivity and Bias-Conformity (BC) for stability. Our dataset of over 1,800 curated and refined multimodal samples, drawn from 29 source benchmarks, enables a fine-grained diagnosis of nine bias types across diverse tasks and domains. Experiments on 26 state-of-the-art MLLMs reveal systematic modality neglect and asymmetric evaluation tendencies, underscoring the need for more reliable judges.

AI.tldr: 本文提出MM-JudgeBias基准，用于系统评估多模态大语言模型作为评判者时的组合偏见问题，发现现有模型存在模态忽视和不对称评估倾向等可靠性问题。
AI.motivation: 多模态大语言模型越来越多地被用作自动评估器，但其可靠性和对偏见的脆弱性尚未得到充分探索。研究发现许多MLLM评判者无法可靠地整合关键的视觉或文本线索，在证据缺失或不匹配时产生不可靠的评估，并在语义无关扰动下表现出不稳定性。
AI.method: 系统定义了MLLM-as-a-Judge系统中的组合偏见，并引入了MM-JudgeBias基准进行评估。该基准通过对查询、图像和响应进行受控扰动，使用两个互补指标进行评估：衡量敏感性的偏见偏差和衡量稳定性的偏见一致性。数据集包含超过1800个精心策划的多模态样本，涵盖29个源基准，能够对9种偏见类型进行细粒度诊断。
AI.result: 对26个最先进的MLLM进行的实验揭示了系统性的模态忽视和不对称评估倾向，突显了对更可靠评判者的需求。
AI.conclusion: MLLM作为评判者存在显著的组合偏见问题，需要开发更可靠的评估系统。MM-JudgeBias基准为诊断和缓解这些偏见提供了系统框架。

title: Attraction, Repulsion, and Friction: Introducing DMF, a Friction-Augmented Drifting Model
summary: Drifting Models [Deng et al., 2026] train a one-step generator by evolving samples under a kernel-based drift field, avoiding ODE integration at inference. The original analysis leaves two questions open. The drift-field iteration admits a locally repulsive regime in a two-particle surrogate, and vanishing of the drift ($V_{p,q}\equiv 0$) is not known to force the learned distribution $q$ to match the target $p$. We derive a contraction threshold for the surrogate and show that a linearly-scheduled friction coefficient gives a finite-horizon bound on the error trajectory. Under a Gaussian kernel we prove that the drift-field equilibrium is identifiable: vanishing of $V_{p,q}$ on any open set forces $q=p$, closing the converse of Proposition 3.1 of Deng et al. Our friction-augmented model, DMF (Drifting Model with Friction), matches or exceeds Optimal Flow Matching on FFHQ adult-to-child domain translation at 16x lower training compute.

AI.tldr: 本文分析了Drifting Models方法的理论缺陷，提出了带摩擦系数的改进模型DMF，在FFHQ成人转儿童任务上以16倍更低的训练计算量达到或超过Optimal Flow Matching性能。
AI.motivation: Drifting Models方法虽然避免了推理时的ODE积分，但存在两个理论问题：1）双粒子代理模型中存在局部排斥区域；2）漂移场消失不能保证学习分布q匹配目标分布p。需要解决这些理论缺陷并改进方法。
AI.method: 1）推导了代理模型的收缩阈值；2）提出线性调度的摩擦系数，给出误差轨迹的有限时间界；3）在高斯核下证明漂移场平衡的可识别性；4）提出带摩擦的改进模型DMF（Drifting Model with Friction）。
AI.result: 1）理论证明了漂移场消失时q=p的等价关系；2）DMF在FFHQ成人转儿童域转换任务上，以16倍更低的训练计算量，达到或超过Optimal Flow Matching的性能。
AI.conclusion: 本文解决了Drifting Models的理论缺陷，提出了DMF改进模型，在保持高效推理的同时显著降低了训练计算成本，并在实际任务中验证了其优越性。

title: Beyond Reproduction: A Paired-Task Framework for Assessing LLM Comprehension and Creativity in Literary Translation
summary: Large language models (LLMs) are increasingly used for creative tasks such as literary translation. Yet translational creativity remains underexplored and is rarely evaluated at scale, while source-text comprehension is typically studied in isolation, despite the fact that, in professional translation, comprehension and creativity are tightly intertwined. We address these gaps with a paired-task framework applied to literary excerpts from 11 books. Task 1 assesses source-text comprehension, and Task 2 evaluates translational creativity through Units of Creative Potential (UCPs), such as metaphors and wordplay. Using a scalable evaluation setup that combines expert human annotations with UCP-based automatic scoring, we benchmark 23 models and four creativity-oriented prompts. Our findings show that strong comprehension does not translate into human-level creativity: models often produce literal or contextually inappropriate renderings, with particularly large gaps for the more distant English-Chinese language pair. Creativity-oriented prompts yield only modest gains, and only one model, Mistral-Large, comes close to human-level creativity (0.167 vs. 0.246). Across all model-prompt combinations, only three exceed a creativity score of 0.1, while the rest remain at or near zero.

AI.tldr: 研究评估大语言模型在文学翻译中的理解与创造力表现，发现模型理解能力虽强但创造力远不及人类水平，尤其在远距离语言对中差距更大。
AI.motivation: 当前大语言模型在文学翻译等创造性任务中的应用日益增多，但翻译创造力研究不足，且通常将源文本理解与创造力分开评估，而专业翻译中这两者紧密相关。
AI.method: 采用配对任务框架，从11本书中选取文学片段：任务1评估源文本理解，任务2通过"创造性潜力单元"（如隐喻、文字游戏）评估翻译创造力。结合专家人工标注和基于UCP的自动评分，对23个模型和4种创造力导向提示进行基准测试。
AI.result: 模型理解能力强但创造力远不及人类水平：模型常产生字面或上下文不恰当的翻译，英语-中文语言对的差距尤其大。创造力导向提示仅带来有限提升，只有Mistral-Large接近人类创造力水平（0.167 vs. 0.246）。所有模型-提示组合中，仅三个超过0.1创造力分数，其余接近零。
AI.conclusion: 大语言模型在文学翻译中展现出强大的理解能力，但翻译创造力严重不足，特别是在远距离语言对中。现有创造力导向提示效果有限，模型需要更先进的创造力提升方法。

title: FSEVAL: Feature Selection Evaluation Toolbox and Dashboard
summary: Feature selection is a fundamental machine learning and data mining task, involved with discriminating redundant features from informative ones. It is an attempt to address the curse of dimensionality by removing the redundant features, while unlike dimensionality reduction methods, preserving explainability. Feature selection is conducted in both supervised and unsupervised settings, with different evaluation metrics employed to determine which feature selection algorithm is the best. In this paper, we propose FSEVAL, a feature selection evaluation toolbox accompanied with a visualization dashboard, with the goal to make it easy to comprehensively evaluate feature selection algorithms. FSEVAL aims to provide a standardized, unified, evaluation and visualization toolbox to help the researchers working in the field, conduct extensive and comprehensive evaluation of feature selection algorithms with ease.

AI.tldr: FSEVAL：一个特征选择评估工具箱，提供标准化评估和可视化功能，帮助研究人员轻松全面评估特征选择算法。
AI.motivation: 特征选择是机器学习和数据挖掘的基础任务，但缺乏标准化的评估工具。现有评估方法分散且不统一，研究人员难以全面比较不同特征选择算法的性能。
AI.method: 开发FSEVAL工具箱，包含评估框架和可视化仪表板，支持监督和无监督设置下的特征选择算法评估，提供统一的评估标准和可视化分析功能。
AI.result: FSEVAL提供了标准化的特征选择评估工具，能够帮助研究人员轻松进行全面的算法评估和比较，提高评估效率和一致性。
AI.conclusion: FSEVAL是一个实用的特征选择评估工具箱，通过标准化评估流程和可视化功能，简化了特征选择算法的评估工作，有助于推动该领域的研究发展。

title: Copy-as-Decode: Grammar-Constrained Parallel Prefill for LLM Editing
comment: 31 pages, 8 figures, 25 tables (17-page main body plus appendix)
summary: LLMs edit text and code by autoregressively regenerating the full output, even when most tokens appear verbatim in the input. We study Copy-as-Decode, a decoding-layer mechanism that recasts edit generation as structured decoding over a two-primitive grammar: <copy lines="i-j"/> references an input line range, <gen>...</gen> emits new content. A token-level FSM guarantees syntactic validity, and a serving-layer primitive updates the KV cache for each copy span via a single parallel-prefill forward rather than $N$ autoregressive steps -- sharing the parallel-forward kernel of speculative decoding but with input tokens as the draft and program-enforced acceptance replacing probabilistic verification. We report an upper-bound analysis that requires no end-to-end training. (i) Kernel speedup: on Qwen2.5-{1.5B, 7B}, copying $N$ tokens via parallel prefill is $6.8\times$--$303\times$ faster than autoregressive ($N \in [8, 512]$, A100 80GB bf16). (ii) Copy ceiling: on ProbeEdit and HumanEvalPack-Fix (Py/JS), $74$--$98\%$ of gold tokens are reachable under the line-level primitive; composed with the empirical kernel over each corpus's span histogram this yields a closed-form wall-clock bound of $29.0\times / 3.4\times / 4.2\times$ ($13.0\times$ pooled). A token-level extension reaches $91$--$99\%$ coverage with $4.5\times$--$6.5\times$ floors. (iii) Pipeline losslessness: oracle programs round-trip through the deterministic resolver on all $482$ cases, localizing any downstream failure to span selection rather than the mechanism. A perturbation study shows pooled EM drops from $100\%$ to $15.48\%$ under off-by-one noise. A fine-tuning pilot on Qwen2.5-Coder-1.5B lifts HEvalFix-Py EM from $0/33$ (untrained) to $12$--$17\%$, a learnability signal, not a production selector. Batched-serving integration and multi-file coverage are scoped as follow-up.

AI.tldr: Copy-as-Decode：一种通过结构化解码机制加速LLM编辑任务的方法，将编辑重构为复制和生成两种基本操作，通过并行预填充大幅提升速度
AI.motivation: 当前LLM在编辑文本和代码时，即使大部分标记与输入相同，仍采用自回归方式重新生成完整输出，效率低下。需要一种机制来加速编辑过程，特别是当大量内容可以直接从输入复制时。
AI.method: 提出Copy-as-Decode机制，将编辑重构为结构化解码，使用两种基本操作：<copy lines="i-j"/>引用输入行范围，<gen>...</gen>生成新内容。通过令牌级有限状态机保证语法有效性，服务层原语通过单次并行预填充前向传播更新KV缓存，而非N次自回归步骤。
AI.result: 1) 内核加速：在Qwen2.5模型上，通过并行预填充复制N个令牌比自回归快6.8-303倍；2) 复制覆盖率：在编辑任务中，74-98%的金标令牌可通过行级原语覆盖；3) 管道无损性：确定性解析器在所有482个案例中实现100%往返正确性；4) 微调实验：在Qwen2.5-Coder-1.5B上，HumanEvalFix-Py准确率从0/33提升到12-17%。
AI.conclusion: Copy-as-Decode机制通过结构化解码和并行预填充技术，显著加速LLM编辑任务，同时保持高覆盖率。该方法为高效编辑提供了理论基础和实现框架，未来可扩展到批处理服务和多文件覆盖。

title: Semantic-based Distributed Learning for Diverse and Discriminative Representations
summary: In large-scale distributed scenarios, increasingly complex tasks demand more intelligent collaboration across networks, requiring the joint extraction of structural representations from data samples. However, conventional task-specific approaches often result in nonstructural embeddings, leading to collapsed variability among data samples within the same class, particularly in classification tasks. To address this issue and fully leverage the intrinsic structure of data for downstream applications, we propose a novel distributed learning framework that ensures both diverse and discriminative representations. For independent and identically distributed (i.i.d.) data, we reformulate and decouple the global optimization function by introducing constraints on representation variance. The update rules are then derived and simplified using a primal-dual approach. For non-i.i.d. data distributions, we tackle the problem by clustering and virtually replicating nodes, allowing model updates within each cluster using block coordinate descent. In both cases, the resulting optimal solutions are theoretically proven to maintain discriminative and diverse properties, with a guaranteed convergence for i.i.d. conditions. Additionally, semantic information from representations is shared among nodes, reducing the need for common neural network architectures. Finally, extensive simulations on MNIST, CIFAR-10 and CIFAR-100 confirm the effectiveness of the proposed algorithms in capturing global structural representations.

AI.tldr: 提出分布式学习框架，通过约束表示方差确保多样且可区分的表征，解决传统方法中同类样本表征塌缩问题
AI.motivation: 大规模分布式场景中，复杂任务需要跨网络智能协作，但传统任务特定方法常产生非结构化嵌入，导致同类样本表征变异性塌缩，无法充分利用数据内在结构
AI.method: 1) 对i.i.d.数据：通过引入表示方差约束重构并解耦全局优化函数，使用原始-对偶方法推导简化更新规则；2) 对非i.i.d.数据：通过聚类和虚拟复制节点，在每个簇内使用块坐标下降法更新模型
AI.result: 理论证明最优解保持可区分性和多样性，i.i.d.条件下保证收敛；语义信息在节点间共享，减少对共同神经网络架构的需求；在MNIST、CIFAR-10和CIFAR-100上的仿真验证了算法在捕获全局结构表征方面的有效性
AI.conclusion: 提出的分布式学习框架能够有效解决表征塌缩问题，确保多样且可区分的表征，充分利用数据内在结构，适用于大规模分布式场景

title: STaD: Scaffolded Task Design for Identifying Compositional Skill Gaps in LLMs
summary: Benchmarks are often used as a standard to understand LLM capabilities in different domains. However, aggregate benchmark scores provide limited insight into compositional skill gaps of LLMs and how to improve them. To make these weaknesses visible, we propose Scaffolded Task Design (STaD) framework. STaD generates controlled variations of benchmark tasks based on the concept of scaffolding, which introduces structured, incremental support in a step-by-step manner. Rather than inspecting failures individually, this approach enables systematic and scalable probing of model behavior by identifying the specific reasoning skill compositions they lack. Treating the LLM as a black box, our experiments on six models of varying sizes reveal multiple failure points in three reasoning benchmarks and highlight each model's unique and distinct skill gaps.

AI.tldr: STaD框架通过生成基准任务的受控变体，系统性地探测LLM在组合推理技能上的缺陷，而非仅关注总体分数。
AI.motivation: 现有基准测试的总体分数无法深入揭示LLM在组合技能上的具体缺陷，需要更系统的方法来识别模型在推理能力上的弱点。
AI.method: 提出Scaffolded Task Design (STaD)框架，基于"脚手架"概念生成基准任务的受控变体，通过逐步引入结构化支持来系统探测模型行为。
AI.result: 在六个不同规模的模型上进行实验，在三个推理基准测试中发现了多个失败点，并揭示了每个模型独特且不同的技能缺陷。
AI.conclusion: STaD框架能够系统性地识别LLM在组合推理技能上的具体缺陷，为理解模型能力提供了比总体基准分数更深入的洞察。

title: Towards Disentangled Preference Optimization Dynamics Beyond Likelihood Displacement
summary:
Preference optimization is widely used to align large language models (LLMs) with human preferences. However, many margin-based objectives suppress the chosen response along with the rejected one, a phenomenon known as likelihood displacement, and no general mechanism currently prevents this across objectives.
  We bridge this gap by presenting a unified \emph{incentive-score decomposition} of preference optimization, revealing that diverse objectives share identical local update directions and differ only in their scalar weighting coefficients.
  Building on this decomposition, by analyzing the dynamics of the chosen/rejected likelihoods, we identify the \emph{disentanglement band} (DB), a simple, testable condition that characterizes when training can avoid likelihood displacement by realizing the preferred pathway: suppressing the loser while maintaining the winner, possibly after an initial transient.
  Leveraging the DB, we propose a plug-and-play \emph{reward calibration} (RC) that adaptively rebalances chosen versus rejected updates to satisfy the DB and mitigate likelihood displacement, without redesigning the base objective.
  Empirical results show that RC steers training toward more disentangled dynamics and often improves downstream performance across a range of objectives. Our code is available at https://github.com/IceyWuu/DisentangledPreferenceOptimization.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种统一框架来分析偏好优化中的似然位移问题，通过激励分数分解揭示了不同目标函数的共性，并提出了解缠带条件和奖励校准方法来缓解似然位移问题。
AI.motivation: 现有基于边际的偏好优化目标在抑制被拒绝响应的同时也会抑制被选择的响应（称为似然位移），目前缺乏通用的机制来防止这种现象。
AI.method: 1. 提出统一的激励分数分解框架，揭示不同目标函数具有相同的局部更新方向，仅权重系数不同；2. 分析选择/拒绝似然的动态，提出解缠带条件来避免似然位移；3. 基于解缠带条件提出即插即用的奖励校准方法，自适应平衡选择与被拒绝的更新。
AI.result: 实验结果表明，奖励校准方法能够引导训练朝向更解缠的动态，并在多种目标函数下改善下游任务性能。
AI.conclusion: 通过激励分数分解框架和解缠带条件，本文提供了一种系统方法来理解和缓解偏好优化中的似然位移问题，提出的奖励校准方法能够有效改善训练动态和性能。

title: Linear-Time and Constant-Memory Text Embeddings Based on Recurrent Language Models
summary: Transformer-based embedding models suffer from quadratic computational and linear memory complexity, limiting their utility for long sequences. We propose recurrent architectures as an efficient alternative, introducing a vertically chunked inference strategy that enables fast embedding generation with memory usage that becomes constant in the input length once it exceeds the vertical chunk size. By fine-tuning Mamba2 models, we demonstrate their viability as general-purpose text embedders, achieving competitive performance across a range of benchmarks while maintaining a substantially smaller memory footprint compared to transformer-based counterparts. We empirically validate the applicability of our inference strategy to Mamba2, RWKV, and xLSTM models, confirming consistent runtime-memory trade-offs across architectures and establishing recurrent models as a compelling alternative to transformers for efficient embedding generation.

AI.tldr: 提出基于循环架构的垂直分块推理策略，实现内存使用随输入长度恒定，验证Mamba2等循环模型作为高效文本嵌入器的可行性
AI.motivation: Transformer嵌入模型存在二次计算复杂度和线性内存复杂度问题，限制了其在长序列处理中的应用，需要更高效的替代方案
AI.method: 提出垂直分块推理策略，将循环架构（Mamba2、RWKV、xLSTM）作为Transformer的替代方案，通过微调Mamba2模型实现通用文本嵌入
AI.result: 在多个基准测试中达到竞争性性能，同时保持比Transformer模型小得多的内存占用，验证了推理策略在不同循环架构中的一致运行时-内存权衡
AI.conclusion: 循环模型是Transformer的高效替代方案，垂直分块推理策略使内存使用在输入长度超过分块大小时保持恒定，为高效嵌入生成提供了新途径

title: Correction and Corruption: A Two-Rate View of Error Flow in LLM Protocols
comment: 42 pages main paper, 21 pages supplementary material included as ancillary file
summary: Large language models are increasingly deployed as protocols: structured multi-call procedures that spend additional computation to transform a baseline answer into a final one. These protocols are evaluated only by end-to-end accuracy, giving limited insight into when they help, when they hurt, and whether their behavior transfers under distribution shift or composition. We propose a paired-outcome measurement interface for auditing a single protocol step on exact-match tasks. For each instance, the interface records a baseline correctness bit $E_0\in\{0,1\}$ and a post-step correctness bit $E_1\in\{0,1\}$, separating correction ($E_0=0\to E_1=1$) from corruption ($E_0=1\to E_1=0$) through two rates: $c=\Pr(E_1=1\mid E_0=0)$ and $γ=\Pr(E_1=0\mid E_0=1)$. These rates predict accuracy changes and define a reusable empirical interface testable across seeds, mixtures, and pipelines. We identify three failure mechanisms. Under mixture shift, pooled estimates of $(c,γ)$ become biased when calibration and deployment mixtures differ; conditioning on a difficulty proxy restores stability without additional model calls. Under presentation contamination, selection protocols alter the interface through stable presentation artifacts when candidate content is fixed. Under state insufficiency, the correctness bit may not carry enough history for multi-step pipelines to compose predictably; a Markov factorization test identifies when composition is valid and where additional state is needed. When a protocol step passes these diagnostics, it becomes an auditable module: gated by estimated gain, conditioned on a difficulty proxy to correct mixture bias, and composed into multi-step pipelines with predictable accuracy. We demonstrate these ideas on synthetic mathematical tasks and on GSM8K, where the calibrated interface correctly predicts when protocol steps should be activated or suppressed.

AI.tldr: 提出一种配对结果测量接口，用于审计LLM协议步骤，通过校正率c和腐败率γ量化协议效果，识别三种失效机制，实现可审计模块化
AI.motivation: 当前LLM协议（结构化多调用程序）仅通过端到端准确率评估，无法深入了解其何时有效、何时有害，以及在分布偏移或组合下的行为迁移
AI.method: 提出配对结果测量接口，记录基线正确位E0和步骤后正确位E1，计算校正率c和腐败率γ；识别混合偏移、呈现污染和状态不足三种失效机制；通过难度代理条件化、马尔可夫分解测试等方法实现稳定审计
AI.result: 在合成数学任务和GSM8K上验证，校准后的接口能正确预测何时应激活或抑制协议步骤，实现可预测的准确率组合
AI.conclusion: 配对结果测量接口为LLM协议步骤提供可重用、可测试的审计框架，通过识别失效机制和相应解决方案，使协议步骤成为可审计模块，支持可预测的组合和部署

title: Multiplication in Multimodal LLMs: Computation with Text, Image, and Audio Inputs
summary: Multimodal LLMs can accurately perceive numerical content across modalities yet fail to perform exact multi-digit multiplication when the identical underlying arithmetic problem is presented as numerals, number words, images, or in audio form. Because existing benchmarks often lack systematically paired instances across modalities, it remains difficult to compare genuine arithmetic limits within and across model families. We therefore introduce a controlled multimodal multiplication benchmark that factorially varies digit length, digit sparsity, representation (e.g., numerals vs. number words), and modality (text, rendered images, audio), with paired instances from a reproducible generator. We also define arithmetic load, C, as the product of the total and non-zero digit count as a compact, mechanistically motivated proxy for operation count. Across evaluations, accuracy falls sharply as C grows, often nearing zero by C > 100. Indeed, C remains predictive of performance across modalities and models, with R-squared often > 0.5, nearing the value from more complex measures of arithmetic load that count the number of intermediate arithmetic steps. A separate perception-versus-computation decomposition shows that multimodal degradation is primarily computational rather than perceptual: on matched-perception checks, models are near-perfect (> 99%) across modalities, even when multiplication accuracy drops. Beyond measuring when models fail, we ask which procedures they are predisposed to follow. We introduce a forced-completion loss probe that scores heuristic-specific reasoning prefixes--including columnar multiplication, distributive decomposition, and rounding/compensation. Here, decomposition is favored in both text and vision modalities; heuristic-specific LoRA adapters produce near-orthogonal updates yet degrade accuracy, indicating the base model maintains a well-tuned internal router.

AI.tldr: 该论文提出了一个受控的多模态乘法基准测试，用于评估多模态大语言模型在不同表示形式和模态下的算术能力，发现模型失败主要是计算而非感知问题，并揭示了模型倾向于使用分解启发式方法。
AI.motivation: 现有基准测试缺乏跨模态的系统性配对实例，难以比较模型家族内外的真正算术能力限制。多模态LLM在感知数字内容方面准确，但在精确多位数乘法方面存在困难。
AI.method: 引入受控多模态乘法基准测试，因子化变化数字长度、数字稀疏性、表示形式（如数字vs数字词）和模态（文本、渲染图像、音频）。定义算术负载C作为总数字数和非零数字数的乘积。使用强制完成损失探针评估启发式推理前缀。
AI.result: 随着算术负载C增加，准确率急剧下降（C>100时接近零）。C在不同模态和模型中保持预测性（R平方常>0.5）。多模态性能下降主要是计算而非感知问题（匹配感知检查准确率>99%）。模型倾向于使用分解启发式方法。
AI.conclusion: 多模态LLM的乘法失败主要是计算限制而非感知问题。算术负载C是预测性能的有效指标。模型内部维护着良好调整的启发式路由器，倾向于使用分解方法进行算术推理。

title: Universally Empowering Zeroth-Order Optimization via Adaptive Layer-wise Sampling
summary: Zeroth-Order optimization presents a promising memory-efficient paradigm for fine-tuning Large Language Models by relying solely on forward passes. However, its practical adoption is severely constrained by slow wall-clock convergence and high estimation variance. In this work, we dissect the runtime characteristics of ZO algorithms and identify a critical system bottleneck where the generation of perturbations and parameter updates accounts for over 40% of the training latency. We argue that the standard uniform exploration strategy is fundamentally flawed as it fails to account for the heterogeneous sensitivity of layers in deep networks, resulting in computationally wasteful blind searches. To address this structural mismatch, we propose AdaLeZO, an Adaptive Layer-wise ZO optimization framework. By formulating the layer selection process as a non-stationary Multi-Armed Bandit problem, AdaLeZO dynamically allocates the limited perturbation budget to the most sensitive parameters. We further introduce an Inverse Probability Weighting mechanism based on sampling with replacement, which guarantees unbiased gradient estimation while effectively acting as a temporal denoiser to reduce variance. Extensive experiments on LLaMA and OPT models ranging from 6.7B to 30B parameters demonstrate that AdaLeZO achieves 1.7x to 3.0x wall-clock acceleration compared to state-of-the-art methods. Crucially, AdaLeZO functions as a universal plug-and-play module that seamlessly enhances the efficiency of existing ZO optimizers without incurring additional memory overhead.

AI.tldr: AdaLeZO是一种自适应分层零阶优化框架，通过将层选择建模为非平稳多臂老虎机问题，动态分配扰动预算到最敏感参数，实现1.7-3.0倍加速，且不增加内存开销。
AI.motivation: 零阶优化虽然内存效率高，但实际应用受限于收敛慢和估计方差大的问题。研究发现传统均匀探索策略存在结构性缺陷，未能考虑深度网络中各层的异质性敏感度，导致计算资源浪费。
AI.method: 提出AdaLeZO框架：1) 将层选择过程建模为非平稳多臂老虎机问题，动态分配有限扰动预算到最敏感参数；2) 引入基于有放回采样的逆概率加权机制，保证无偏梯度估计同时作为时间降噪器减少方差。
AI.result: 在LLaMA和OPT模型（6.7B到30B参数）上的实验表明，AdaLeZO相比最先进方法实现了1.7倍到3.0倍的wall-clock加速，且作为通用即插即用模块，不增加额外内存开销。
AI.conclusion: AdaLeZO通过自适应层选择机制解决了零阶优化的关键瓶颈，显著提升了训练效率，为大规模语言模型的高效微调提供了实用解决方案。

authors: V. S. D. S. Mahesh Akavarapu
title: Hard to Be Heard: Phoneme-Level ASR Analysis of Phonologically Complex, Low-Resource Endangered Languages
summary: We present a phoneme-level analysis of automatic speech recognition (ASR) for two low-resourced and phonologically complex East Caucasian languages, Archi and Rutul, based on curated and standardized speech-transcript resources totaling approximately 50 minutes and 1 hour 20 minutes of audio, respectively. Existing recordings and transcriptions are consolidated and processed into a form suitable for ASR training and evaluation. We evaluate several state-of-the-art audio and audio-language models, including wav2vec2, Whisper, and Qwen2-Audio. For wav2vec2, we introduce a language-specific phoneme vocabulary with heuristic output-layer initialization, which yields consistent improvements and achieves performance comparable to or exceeding Whisper in these extremely low-resource settings. Beyond standard word and character error rates, we conduct a detailed phoneme-level error analysis. We find that phoneme recognition accuracy strongly correlates with training frequency, exhibiting a characteristic sigmoid-shaped learning curve. For Archi, this relationship partially breaks for Whisper, pointing to model-specific generalization effects beyond what is predicted by training frequency. Overall, our results indicate that many errors attributed to phonological complexity are better explained by data scarcity. These findings demonstrate the value of phoneme-level evaluation for understanding ASR behavior in low-resource, typologically complex languages.

AI.tldr: 针对两种低资源高复杂性的东高加索语言（Archi和Rutul），本研究进行了音素级别的自动语音识别分析，发现数据稀缺而非语音复杂性是主要错误来源，并提出基于音素词汇的wav2vec2改进方法在极低资源场景下表现优异。
AI.motivation: 研究动机是理解在极低资源（约50分钟和80分钟音频）且语音复杂的东高加索语言中，自动语音识别系统的表现和行为模式，特别是区分数据稀缺和语音复杂性对识别错误的影响。
AI.method: 方法包括：1）整理标准化Archi和Rutul语言的语音-文本资源；2）评估多种先进模型（wav2vec2、Whisper、Qwen2-Audio）；3）为wav2vec2引入语言特定音素词汇和启发式输出层初始化；4）进行详细的音素级别错误分析，包括训练频率与识别准确率的关系研究。
AI.result: 结果显示：1）改进的wav2vec2方法在极低资源场景下表现与Whisper相当或更好；2）音素识别准确率与训练频率呈S型学习曲线关系；3）对于Archi语言，Whisper的表现偏离这一规律，显示模型特定的泛化效应；4）许多归因于语音复杂性的错误实际上由数据稀缺导致。
AI.conclusion: 结论表明音素级别评估对于理解低资源、类型复杂语言中的ASR行为具有重要价值，数据稀缺是比语音复杂性更主要的错误来源，且模型特定的泛化能力在极低资源场景中起关键作用。

title: Dissipative Latent Residual Physics-Informed Neural Networks for Modeling and Identification of Electromechanical Systems
comment: Accepted for publication at the 23rd IFAC World Congress 2026
summary:
Accurate dynamical modeling is essential for simulation and control of embodied systems, yet first-principles models of electromechanical systems often fail to capture complex dissipative effects such as joint friction, stray losses, and structural damping. While residual-learning physics-informed neural networks (PINNs) can effectively augment imperfect first-principles models with data-driven components, the residual terms are typically implemented as unconstrained multilayer perceptrons (MLPs), which may inadvertently inject artificial energy into the system.
  To more faithfully model the dissipative dynamics, we propose DiLaR-PINN, a dissipative latent residual PINN designed to learn unmodeled dissipative effects in a physically consistent manner. Structurally, the residual network operates only on unmeasurable (latent) state components and is parameterized in a skew-dissipative form that guarantees non-increasing energy for any choice of network parameters. To enable stable and data-efficient training under partial measurability of the state, we further develop a recurrent rollout scheme with a curriculum-based sequence length extension strategy.
  We validate DiLaR-PINN on a real-world helicopter system and compare it against four baselines: a pure physical model (without a residual network), an unstructured residual MLP, a DiLaR variant with a soft dissipativity constraint, and a black-box LSTM. The results demonstrate that DiLaR-PINN more accurately captures dissipative effects and achieves superior long-horizon extrapolation performance.

AI.tldr: DiLaR-PINN：一种用于学习未建模耗散效应的物理一致神经网络，通过耗散性结构约束保证能量不增，在直升机系统上验证了优越性能。
AI.motivation: 传统第一性原理模型难以准确捕捉复杂耗散效应（如关节摩擦、杂散损耗、结构阻尼），而现有的残差学习PINN方法使用无约束MLP可能向系统注入虚假能量，需要更物理一致的耗散建模方法。
AI.method: 提出DiLaR-PINN（耗散潜在残差PINN）：1）残差网络仅作用于不可测量的潜在状态分量；2）采用斜耗散形式参数化，保证任意网络参数下能量不增；3）开发基于课程学习的序列长度扩展策略的循环展开方案，支持部分可观测状态下的稳定高效训练。
AI.result: 在真实直升机系统上验证，与四个基线（纯物理模型、无结构残差MLP、软耗散约束DiLaR变体、黑盒LSTM）比较，DiLaR-PINN更准确捕捉耗散效应，在长时域外推上表现最优。
AI.conclusion: DiLaR-PINN通过结构化的耗散性约束，实现了物理一致的未建模耗散效应学习，在部分可观测条件下仍能稳定训练，为机电系统的精确动力学建模提供了有效解决方案。

title: Model in Distress: Sentiment Analysis on French Synthetic Social Media
summary: Automated analysis of customer feedback on social media is hindered by three challenges: the high cost of annotated training data, the scarcity of evaluation sets, especially in multilingual settings, and privacy concerns that prevent data sharing and reproducibility. We address these issues by developing a generalizable synthetic data generation pipeline applied to a case study on customer distress detection in French public transportation. Our approach utilizes backtranslation with fine-tuned models to generate 1.7 million synthetic tweets from a small seed corpus, complemented by synthetic reasoning traces. We train 600M-parameter reasoners with English and French reasoning that achieve 77-79% accuracy on human-annotated evaluation data, matching or exceeding SOTA proprietary LLMs and specialized encoders. Beyond reducing annotation costs, our pipeline preserves privacy by eliminating the exposure of sensitive user data. Our methodology can be adopted for other use cases and languages.

AI.tldr: 提出一个合成数据生成管道，用于解决社交媒体客户反馈分析中的标注成本高、评估数据稀缺和隐私问题，在法国公共交通客户困扰检测案例中取得良好效果
AI.motivation: 社交媒体客户反馈分析面临三大挑战：标注训练数据成本高、评估数据集稀缺（尤其在多语言环境下）、以及隐私问题阻碍数据共享和可复现性
AI.method: 开发通用合成数据生成管道，使用微调模型进行回译，从少量种子语料生成170万条合成推文，并辅以合成推理轨迹，训练6亿参数推理模型
AI.result: 训练出的英语和法语推理模型在人工标注评估数据上达到77-79%准确率，匹配或超越最先进的专有LLM和专用编码器
AI.conclusion: 该方法不仅降低标注成本，还能通过避免敏感用户数据暴露来保护隐私，可推广到其他用例和语言

title: CAARL: In-Context Learning for Interpretable Co-Evolving Time Series Forecasting
